1.1: Iesu Keriso vouḡa nizeꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe. Aniꞌe Aberahamo mariga ebu Davida mariga.
1.2: Aberahamoꞌe Isako moga, Isakoꞌe Iakobo moga, Iakoboꞌe Iuda zu ani negoḡa duḡuru moze.
1.3: Iudaꞌe Pereze zu Zera moze ebu Tamaraꞌe zeḡe vize. Perezeꞌe Hezarona moga, Hezaronaꞌe Ramo moga.
1.4: Ramoꞌe Aminadaba moga, Aminadabaꞌe Nasona moga, Nasonaꞌe Salamona moga.
1.5: Salamonaꞌe Boazi moga ebu Rahabaꞌe Boazi viꞌa. Boaziꞌe Obeda moga ebu Rutaꞌe Obeda viꞌa. Obedaꞌe Iese moga.
1.6: Ieseꞌe kini Davida moga. Davidaꞌe Solomona moga ebu Basebaꞌe Solomona viꞌa. Basebaꞌe ibite Uria inuga.
1.7: Solomonaꞌe Rehoboama moga, Rehoboamaꞌe Abia moga, Abiaꞌe Asa moga.
1.8: Asaꞌe Iehosafata moga, Iehosafataꞌe Iehorama moga, Iehoramaꞌe Uzia moga.
1.9: Uziaꞌe Iotama moga, Iotamaꞌe Ahasi moga, Ahasiꞌe Hezekia moga.
1.10: Hezekiaꞌe Manase moga, Manaseꞌe Amona moga, Amonaꞌe Iosia moga.
1.11: Iosiaꞌe Iekonia zu ani negoḡa duḡuru moze. Eꞌe madaḡano Babulonia azaḡaniꞌa Isaraela azaḡa teite utitadu Isaraela azaḡa Babulonia habaꞌano obozi onamiro.
1.12: Babulonia habaꞌano obozi onamiroteꞌe ḡarugano, Iekoniaꞌe Sealetiele moga, Sealetieleꞌe Zerubabele moga.
1.13: Zerubabeleꞌe Abiuda moga, Abiudaꞌe Eliakimi moga, Eliakimiꞌe Azora moga.
1.14: Azoraꞌe Zadoka moga, Zadokaꞌe Akimi moga, Akimiꞌe Eliuda moga.
1.15: Eliudaꞌe Eleazara moga, Eleazaraꞌe Matana moga, Matanaꞌe Iakobo moga.
1.16: Iakoboꞌe Iosefa moga ebu Iosefa inugaꞌe Maria. Mariaonoꞌo Keriso rae huneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, Iesuꞌa fureraro.
1.17: Eꞌanoꞌo Aberahamonoꞌo onao Davida madaḡano zeḡe ega niduꞌaꞌe 14, zu Davidaonoꞌo onao Isaraela azaḡa Babulonia habaꞌano obozi onamiroteꞌe madaḡano zeḡe ega niduꞌaꞌe 14, ebu Babulonia habaꞌano obozi onamiroteꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo onao Keriso madaḡano zeḡe ega niduꞌaꞌe 14. Iesu Kerisoꞌa Fureraro (Luka 2:1-7)
1.18: Iesu Kerisoꞌe ꞌahige fureraro. Ani viꞌa Mariaꞌe Iosefa iraꞌauḡa. Anianine ꞌizema hahurogano Mariaꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡanonoꞌo ahiꞌeta reiroteꞌe ederiro.
1.19: Maria iꞌa Iosefaꞌe Badiꞌa ubumao duduḡa vazeḡa, eꞌanoꞌo hunihunio Maria mene mae mazagaronifine ani sifu tuḡune modiꞌuma rae zamariro.
1.20: Ani ꞌouge rae zamarirotene, Zuhiꞌa Boro tuḡure viga ꞌahoganiꞌa iḡunao fureranadu ꞌahige rae niro, “Davida mariga Iosefa, Maria teite hahuroga ago rihanoꞌi. Mazaḡa Mariaꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡanonoꞌo ahiꞌeta.
1.21: Aniꞌe ubuga ꞌahoga furenoꞌidene, niḡaꞌe Iesu rae turahoꞌi, mazaḡa aniꞌe ane mone azaḡa haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡaboziꞌuma.”
1.22: ꞌOugadu Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa peroveta vazeḡanonoꞌo rae fureniroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro,
1.23: “Ḡianoꞌi, ohoze ꞌize mene edereꞌeteꞌe nogobaḡaniꞌa ahiꞌeta reꞌuma, ebu ubuga ꞌahoga fureniꞌuma. Ubuga niḡaꞌe Imanuela rae huniꞌuma.” Imanuela hugaꞌe, “Badiꞌaꞌe emeḡe teite radiuꞌohe.”
1.24: Iosefaꞌa bazunanoꞌo evatirotene, Zuhiꞌa Boro tuḡure viganiꞌa niroteꞌe idunaḡano haḡairo, ebu Mariaꞌe ani inuga radu zamaharo.
1.25: Rehano Iosefaꞌe Maria teite tibano mene baziro, onamo ubuga fureniro, ebu ubuga niḡaꞌe Iesu rae turahiro.

2.1: Herodaꞌe Iudea habaꞌa kiniḡa reiroteꞌe madaḡano Iesuꞌe Iudea habaꞌano ne ꞌahoga, Betelehemao fureraro. Eꞌe enogano edeḡa azaḡa nuꞌe madaꞌa iteꞌeteꞌe moneonoꞌo Ierusalemao feuri ariro.
2.2: Ebu ze vaze ḡadiziro, “Iuda azaḡa kini raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe nouma fureraneha? Mazaḡa eme madaꞌa iteꞌeteꞌe moneo ani buzuva horoniro ebu ani mazao kuranoga veize areha.”
2.3: Kini Herodaꞌa ḡoereze igirotene, zamaḡaniꞌa adudaro ebu Ierusalema azaḡa niduꞌa zuni zamazeꞌa adudaro.
2.4: Eꞌanoꞌo Herodaꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa nuꞌozadu ḡadiziro, “Kerisoꞌe nouma fureraꞌuma?”
2.5: Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Aniꞌe Iudea habaꞌano Betelehema neḡano fureraꞌuma. Mazaḡa peroveta vazeḡaꞌe ꞌahige rae mirihiro,
2.6: 'O Iudea habaꞌano ne ꞌahoga Betelehema, ḡaꞌe Iudea habaꞌano ne boroboro boꞌaḡano mene zuhuꞌa. Mazaḡa ḡae mazaonoꞌo vaze niduꞌa zuhiꞌaziteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ariꞌuma. Aniꞌe mamoe taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa teige, eḡe none azaḡa, Isaraela azaḡa taufiꞌuma.' ”
2.7: Eꞌanoꞌo Herodaꞌa edeḡa azaḡa sifu huzadu zeḡe mazaonoꞌo noꞌe madaḡano buzuva eꞌeꞌa agararotaꞌaꞌe ederiro.
2.8: Ebu edeḡa azaḡa Betelehema neḡano tuḡuzeꞌenaꞌa, ꞌahige rae ziro, “Onamadu ene guraḡa eꞌe faine vaḡoꞌi ebu horonoꞌidene ihohoꞌi. Eḡe zuni ani vaḡe onamadu ani mazao kuraꞌuma.”
2.9: -10 Ze Heroda ḡoere igi hauḡirotene, ibionoꞌo onamiro. Ze ibio onameꞌenogano, ibite madaꞌa iteꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano horoniroteꞌe buzuvaḡaniꞌa bare fureraro. Ze eꞌe horonadu matuꞌe rudaro. Ebu buzuva eꞌeꞌa ze ibitozeadu ene guraḡaniꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa ragano tue radiro.
2.11: Ze ne zamaḡa diuḡadu ene guraḡaꞌe viꞌa Maria teite radiuꞌenoga horoniro. ꞌOugirotene, ze ani mazao ḡuḡuradu kuraro. Ebu ꞌumiroteꞌe ḡauḡa naeḡa boroboro fuhiꞌadu ḡahuno haro. Aꞌe golo zu ꞌuvahu hohoḡa manoḡa ebu murava hohoḡa manoḡa.
2.12: Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa iḡunao edeḡa azaḡa ihoziro, “Heroda vaḡe ago bare onamoꞌi.” ꞌOugadu zeꞌe ibi ꞌahoganonoꞌo zeḡe haba bare onamiro. Ferau Izipi Habaꞌa Onamiro
2.13: Edeḡa azaḡaniꞌa iḡuniroteꞌe enogano, Zuhiꞌa Boro tuḡure viganiꞌa iḡunao Iosefa mazao fureranadu niro, “Herodaꞌa ene guraḡa vaḡadu matihi raꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo iḡunoꞌi ebu ene guraḡa viꞌeta zamazadu Izipi habaꞌa ferau onamoꞌi. Ebu eꞌea radoꞌi onamo eḡeꞌa ḡeꞌuma.”
2.14: ꞌOugadu Iosefaꞌe ene guraḡa viꞌeta zamazadu ohere ferau Izipi habaꞌa onamiro.
2.15: Ebu ze eꞌea radiro onamo Herodaꞌa rudaro. ꞌOugadu Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa peroveta vazeḡanonoꞌo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro, “Eḡeꞌa Izipi habaꞌanonoꞌo ubudehe hune ariro.” Herodaꞌa Tahiꞌa Komeꞌa Zimi Hauḡiro
2.16: Herodaꞌe edeḡa azaḡaniꞌa soꞌoniroteꞌe ederirotene, maḡune rudaro. Aniꞌe edeḡa azaḡaniꞌa ihoniroteꞌe madaḡa idunaḡano mada meꞌodadu ene aꞌe muri aheu heuḡa rae zamariro. Eꞌanoꞌo ane uti azaḡa tuḡuzadu Betelehema neḡa zu uhiḡa neḡa niduꞌa zamaḡano ohoze komeꞌa muri aheuonoꞌo onamo ene guraḡa ḡonaga niduꞌa zimi hauḡiro.
2.17: ꞌOugadu Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta vazeḡa Ieremiaonoꞌo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro,
2.18: “Rama neḡano roḡae ꞌahoganiꞌa kuau niauꞌeteꞌe agoḡa igiro. Rahelaꞌa ubugaubuga uꞌano niaro, ebu ani vazeꞌa naminoga hezahoziniro, mazaḡa ubugaubuganiꞌa rudaro.” Izipionoꞌo Nazareta Bare Ariro
2.19: Herodaꞌa rudaroteꞌe enogano, Zuhiꞌa Boro tuḡure viga ꞌahoganiꞌa Izipi habaꞌano Iosefa mazao iḡunao fureraro ebu niro,
2.20: “Iḡunoꞌi ebu ene guraḡa viꞌeta Isaraela habaꞌa tutuze onamoꞌi. Mazaḡa ene guraḡa matihi reiroteꞌe azaḡa ꞌai rudau hauḡeha.”
2.21: Eꞌanoꞌo Iosefaꞌa iḡunadu ene guraḡa viꞌeta Isaraela habaꞌa tutuze onamiro.
2.22: Rehano ani Akelaoꞌe moga Heroda iḡuri madu Iudea habaꞌa kiniḡa reiroteꞌe igirotene, Iudea habaꞌa onamogaꞌe riharo. Eꞌanoꞌo tuḡure viganiꞌa iḡunao ihoniroteꞌe idunaḡano, ze Galilea habaꞌa onamiro.
2.23: Ebu ne ꞌahoga, niḡa Nazaretao radiro. ꞌOugadu Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta azaḡanonoꞌo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro, “Aniꞌe Nazareta vazeḡa rae huniꞌuma.”

3.1: Eꞌe madaḡano Ioane Babatisoꞌa Iudea habaꞌano haba bohaꞌa aradu ꞌahige haramiro,
3.2: “Haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡihuroꞌi, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡa ꞌai haniteha.”
3.3: Peroveta vazeḡa Isaiaꞌa Ioane Babatiso moneo ꞌahige rae reiro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa haba bohaꞌano huau ḡoereꞌohe, raenaꞌa, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro veize ibi ruhiboꞌi, ebu ani veize ibi mae dudunoꞌi.'”
3.4: Ioaneꞌa kamelo iguḡa hina haḡairoteꞌe dabuaḡa vidaro, zu mani ogaḡa miniḡa hina gabaꞌiḡano autiro, ebu fihore zu butu ꞌavoreḡa godaga aro.
3.5: Eꞌe madaḡano Ierusalemaonoꞌo, zu Iudea habaꞌa niduꞌaonoꞌo, zu Ioridana vuḡa habaꞌa niduꞌaonoꞌo vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa Ioane vaḡe onamiro.
3.6: Ebu ze haḡaize sauꞌa rae furenadu Ioaneꞌa Ioridana vuḡano babatisoziro.
3.7: Farisea azaḡa zu Sadukea azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa babatiso mouga radu Ioane vaḡe ariro. Ebu aneꞌa ze horozadu ziro, “Zaꞌe Zarama ubugaubuga! Iniuꞌa zae mazao, 'Badiꞌa zama ḡugiꞌanonoꞌo ferau muhinoꞌi,' rae reiro? Aꞌe mene idaḡa!
3.8: Rehano ibite haḡaize sau'anono'o ḡihuniroteꞌe haḡaiḡa izidi furenoꞌi.
3.9: Ebu ꞌahige rae ago zamaroꞌi, 'Emeꞌe Aberahamo mariga, eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa mene maḡunofiꞌuma.' Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, Badi'a'a hadi ꞌadi hina Aberahamo mariga haḡaoga zuni idaḡa.
3.10: Ḡiro 'ai ire taigano amahi tiro. Eꞌanoꞌo huga manoḡa mene iniꞌeteꞌe ireḡa niduꞌa'e udi higonadu ire rogao feuniꞌuma.
3.11: Zaeꞌa haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡihuroga veize eḡeꞌa vu hina babatisoziꞌohe. Rehano eḡe ḡaruna ariteꞌe vazeḡa gigiꞌaḡaꞌe ufeta ḡihiꞌaḡa zu eḡe vitihoga. Eḡe'a ani tamaka odoheꞌeteꞌe tuḡureḡa vazeḡa rae rouga zuni mene idaḡa. Aniꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡa zu ire roga hina babatisoziꞌuma.
3.12: Maho hiriveꞌeteꞌe madaḡano, vazeꞌa kari hina rouḡa tenadu maho huꞌiꞌohe, ebu iguḡa manoneꞌohe zu meba hare deheneꞌohe. Ebu hugaꞌe nuꞌonadu suaba zamaḡano tiꞌohe, rehano iguḡaꞌe mene vidauꞌeteꞌe ire rogao hufi haoneꞌohe.” Iesuꞌa Babatiso Meiro (Mareko 1:9-11; Luka 3:21-22)
3.13: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesuꞌa Ioaneonoꞌo babatiso mouga radu Galilea habaꞌanonoꞌo Ioane vaḡe Ioridana vuḡa ariro.
3.14: Rehano Ioaneꞌa Iesu garariro zu niro, “Ḡaeꞌa eḡe babatisohifo. Nougaꞌahi ḡaꞌe eḡe vaḡe areha?”
3.15: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Izidiꞌe ꞌahige haḡaoꞌi. Eme Badiꞌaꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa duduḡa niduꞌa haḡae huniꞌuma.” ꞌOugadu Ioaneꞌa Iesu babatisoniro.
3.16: Iesuꞌa babatiso meiroteꞌe enogano vuonoꞌo gaba tiri onamiro. ꞌOugirotene, adureꞌa bohatanadu Iesuꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa Tubugo niniḡa teige ane mazao ovairoteꞌe horoniro.
3.17: Ebu ago ꞌahoganiꞌa adureonoꞌo ꞌahige rae reiro, “ꞌAdiꞌe eḡe zamarone ubude. Eꞌa ani mazao matu'e rudau'ohe.”

4.1: Eꞌe ḡarugano Diaboloꞌa Iesu tuhune nuroga veize Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa Iesu tutune haba bohaꞌa onamiro.
4.2: Eꞌea mada 40 zamaḡano ohere zu madai ogomu mene aro. Eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌe vinine runiro.
4.3: Ebu Diaboloꞌa tuhunoga radu ani vaḡe ariro ebu niro, “Ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa Ubuga roꞌidene, hadi ꞌadi ninaꞌa, 'Ḡihuradu ꞌuvahu odogano roꞌi,' rae noꞌi.”
4.4: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Mene, Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Vaze'e ꞌuvahu odogano da'o mene ḡabode radi'uma, rehano Badiꞌa hebeonoꞌo buauꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa hina ḡabode radiꞌuma.' ”
4.5: Ebu Diaboloꞌa Iesu ne zaḡoḡa, Ierusalema tutune onamiro zu kuru neḡa hitaga huneo ohonadu niro,
4.6: “Ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa Ubuga roꞌidene, rafatoꞌi. Mazaḡa Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Badi'aꞌa ḡaꞌe duguoga veize ane tuḡure vigaviga ḡae vaḡe tuḡuziꞌuma. Ze'a ꞌevoreze hina mae ḡihi'i'uma ꞌahine, odaḡoꞌe hadio mene tutuhaꞌuma.' ”
4.7: Iesu'a naenaeniro, “Mene, Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro ḡae Badiꞌa ago tuhuno'i.' ”
4.8: Ebu Diaboloꞌa Iesu maḡa hitaga hune tutune itadu kini'a zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe haba'a niduꞌa zu zeḡe ḡau naeḡa boro niduꞌa ihoniro.
4.9: Ebu aneꞌa Iesu niro, “Ḡaeꞌa eḡe zamao ḡuḡuradu kuraune, eꞌe niduꞌa ḡae ḡaniꞌuma.”
4.10: Iesuꞌa niro, “Mene, eḡe mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi. Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro ḡae Badiꞌa mazao da'o kurano'i zu ane veize daꞌo gauoꞌi.' ”
4.11: ꞌOugadu Diaboloꞌa Iesu mazaonoꞌo vaḡine onamiro. Ebu tuḡure vigaviganiꞌa aradu Iesu taufiro. Galilea Habaꞌano Ḡadahe Haramiro (Mareko 1:14-15; Luka 4:14-15)
4.12: Iesuꞌa Ioaneꞌe ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoniroteꞌe egadu Galilea habaꞌa bare onamiro.
4.13: Galilea habaꞌano ani Nazareta neḡano radiro. Ebu neḡa eꞌe modadu Kaperanauma onamiro, ebu eꞌea radiunu. Kaperanaumaꞌe Zebulono zu Nafatali habaꞌano ebu Galilea duꞌuraḡa genaḡano ne boro ꞌahoga.
4.14: Ibite Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta vazeḡa Isaiaonoꞌo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro,
4.15: “Zebulono zu Nafatali habaꞌaꞌe Galilea duꞌuraḡa ibiḡano zu Ioridana vuḡa moneafao. Galileaꞌe Iuda mene azaḡa haba.
4.16: Uzabo zamaḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa agaḡa boro horoneha. Rune zauhaḡa habaꞌano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa rana agaḡaniꞌa agazeha.”
4.17: Eꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo Iesuꞌa ḡadahe haramiro, “Ḡihuroꞌi, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡa ꞌai haniteha.” Iesuꞌa Ane Tahiꞌatahiꞌa Ohotiro (Mareko 1:16-20; Luka 5:1-11)
4.18: Iesuꞌa Galilea duꞌuraḡa genaḡano onameꞌeteꞌea, vaze aheuꞌa reꞌeva feune radiunuteꞌe horoziro. Zeꞌe Simona, niḡa ꞌahogaꞌe Petero ebu negoḡa Anderea. Zeꞌe ḡozone mauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa.
4.19: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡe ḡaruna hegotoꞌi. Zaꞌe vaze reꞌevaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa rouga veize ohoziꞌuma.”
4.20: ꞌOugirotene, ze zogone reꞌevaze modadu ani hegote onamiro.
4.21: Iesuꞌa eꞌeanoꞌo tahiꞌa faḡa onamirotene, vaze ꞌahoga negoḡeta horoziro. Zeꞌe Zebedeo ubuga aheu, Iakobo zu negoḡa Ioane. Zeꞌe moze teite ḡasi zamaḡano reꞌeva zigoga faine radiunu. Ebu Iesuꞌa ze huziro, “Eḡe hegotoꞌi.”
4.22: ꞌOugirotene, zeꞌe zogone ḡasize zu moze modadu ani hegote onamiro. Ugi Azaḡa Faiziro (Luka 6:17-19)
4.23: Iesuꞌe Galilea habaꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano ragaveꞌenaꞌa, Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano ihoziro zu Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe moneo hari manoḡa haramiro. Ebu vaze ḡehaḡa boꞌaḡano ugi zu gigiꞌa niduꞌa fainiro.
4.24: Ebu Iesu hariḡaniꞌa bororanadu Siria habaꞌa azaḡa niduꞌa igiro. Zeꞌa ugi azaḡa niduꞌa tutuze ani vaḡe ariro. Ugi nunu uꞌano ahirizeꞌa gigize ruzeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, vine sauꞌaniꞌa ragano reiroteꞌe azaḡa, ketoketeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu ahirize haganoga mene idaḡa azaḡa tutuze arirotene, Iesuꞌa ze faiziro.
4.25: Galilea habaꞌa, Dekapoli, Ierusalema, Iudea habaꞌa zu Ioridana vuḡa moneafa habaꞌanonoꞌo vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa aradu Iesu hegotiro.

5.1: Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa horozirotene, maḡa komeꞌa itadu eꞌea ehoriro. Ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ane vaḡe ariro.
5.3: “Zamaze zaharaḡa azaḡaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌohe.
5.4: Zamaze areꞌenaꞌa, niauꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa zeꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa namiziꞌuma.
5.5: Zamaze roḡeḡa azaḡaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa ze Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo haba meꞌuma.
5.6: Badiꞌa urao haḡai duduḡa haḡaihi rae inareꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zeḡe ura niduꞌa ziniꞌuma.
5.7: Vaze vetuḡaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa ze vetuḡaziꞌuma.
5.8: Zamaze deheḡa azaḡaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa zeꞌe Badiꞌa horoniꞌuma.
5.9: Uniho manoḡa veize gaueꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zeꞌe ane ubugaubuga rae huziꞌuma.
5.10: Badiꞌa ura haḡaeꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, vazeꞌa sausauzeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa zeꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌohe.
5.11: Eḡe uꞌano, vazeꞌa za rae sausauziꞌetene, aduga boro ziniꞌetene, ebu ḡurireꞌenaꞌa ḡoere sauꞌa nunu hina ziꞌetene, zaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe.
5.12: Zaꞌe matuꞌe rudanoꞌi, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa adureo naeḡa boro bagaḡa ziniꞌuma. Zeḡe vouḡaniꞌa peroveta ibiꞌa azaḡa zuni deꞌuge sausauzido.” Dama zu Ihure Agaḡa (Mareko 9:50; Luka 14:34-35)
5.13: “Zaꞌe raha ꞌadaoꞌe dama heuḡa. Rehano dama iniganiꞌa dauḡine, nougenouge bare inidaꞌuma? Dama mene inigaꞌe ḡauni ꞌahoga veize zuni mene manoḡa ꞌahine, mae modadu vazeꞌa edene oname onaeꞌohe.
5.14: Zaꞌe raha ꞌada aganeꞌeteꞌe agaḡa. Maḡa hitagano ogoraroteꞌe neḡa boroꞌe uꞌuranoga mene idaḡa.
5.15: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ihure hofadu siuva ꞌuꞌuḡano mene tiꞌohe, rehano ihure odaḡa rana teadu ne zamaḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa agazeꞌohe.
5.16: Eꞌe teige, zae agaḡa hina vaze agazoꞌi. ꞌOugine, zeꞌa zae haḡai manoḡa horonadu Moze adureo niguniꞌuma.” Mose Goro Ḡoeꞌa moneo Ihoziro
5.17: “Zaꞌe eḡeꞌa Mose goro ḡoeꞌa zu peroveta azaḡa ḡoere fahoga radu ariro rae ago zamaroꞌi. E zeḡe ḡoere fahihi radu mene ariro, rehano zeḡe ḡoereꞌa hudanoga veize ariro.
5.18: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, adure zu raha ꞌizema dauḡogano Mose goro ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa boꞌaḡano komeꞌa ꞌahoga zuni mene hune dauḡiꞌuma, rehano Mose goro ḡoeꞌa niduꞌaꞌe hudaꞌuma.
5.19: Eꞌanoꞌo iniuꞌa Mose goro ḡoeꞌa komeꞌa ꞌahoga variꞌine ebu vaze ꞌouge ihozine, aniꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze ḡonaga rae huniꞌuma. U iniuꞌa Mose goro ḡoeꞌa tihitihinine ebu vaze ꞌouge ihozine, aniꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze ḡihiꞌaḡa rae huniꞌuma.
5.20: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, zaeꞌa Badiꞌa ubumao haḡai duduḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌeꞌa Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡa mene vitizine, zaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zihiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mene reꞌuma.” Maḡunu moneo Ihoziro
5.21: “Ibite azaḡa mazao reiroteꞌe goro ḡoeꞌa ꞌadi zaeꞌa igiro, 'Vaze ago gorunoꞌi. Iniuꞌa vaze ꞌahoga gorunine, kotaniꞌuma.'
5.22: Rehano eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa ane nego nabudi mazao maḡunine, kotaniꞌuma. Iniuꞌa ane nego nabudi mazao, 'Kauriḡa,' rae nine, Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo boro zamaḡano kotaniꞌuma. Ebu iniuꞌa ane nego nabudi mazao, 'Baboḡa,' rae reine, ire roga radiu tuḡutuḡu zamaḡano mae feuniꞌuma.
5.23: Eꞌanoꞌo ḡaeꞌa dibuꞌo fataḡano ḡahunoneḡo hauꞌeteꞌe madaḡano negoḡo ꞌahoganiꞌa ḡae mazao maḡuneꞌeteꞌe zamaroꞌidene,
5.24: ḡahunoneḡoꞌe fata genaḡano modoꞌi, ebu negoḡo vaḡe onamadu ane teite uniho manofoꞌi. Eꞌe enogano bare aradu ḡahunoneḡo hanoꞌi.
5.25: Ḡaꞌe vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa kotao ohoꞌihi radu ani teite onamoꞌidene, ibio ḡanine ḡarihe uniho manofoꞌi. Mene ꞌougine, aniꞌa oboꞌe teadu kota vazeḡa ꞌevoreo ohoꞌiꞌuma, ebu hena kota vazeḡaniꞌa ḡuꞌa neḡa taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌevoreo ohoꞌadu ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoꞌiꞌuma.
5.26: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, za ḡuꞌa neḡanonoꞌo mene buaꞌuma, onamo zaeꞌa ani hadi niduꞌaꞌe baroniꞌuma.” Ubuma Ago Ḡezanoꞌi
5.27: “Zaꞌe edeḡa, Mose goro ḡoeꞌano ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Ubuma ago ḡezanoꞌi.'
5.28: Rehano eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa roḡae ꞌahoga ḡianadu roḡae ꞌomo teite bazihi reine, aniꞌe zamaḡano ubuma ḡezaneha.
5.29: Ḡae edaꞌe ubumaḡaniꞌa haḡai sauꞌa haḡaoꞌidene, eꞌe ubumaḡa ḡude modoꞌi. Mazaḡa ahiriḡo tahiḡa modeꞌetaꞌaꞌe manoḡa, aꞌe ahiriḡo niduꞌa ire roga radiu tuḡutuḡu zamaḡano mae feuneꞌeteꞌe ufeta vitinoga.
5.30: Ebu ḡae edaꞌe ꞌevoreꞌa haḡai sauꞌa haḡaoꞌidene, eꞌe ꞌevoꞌa variꞌe modoꞌi. Mazaḡa ahiriḡo tahiḡa modeꞌetaꞌaꞌe manoḡa, aꞌe ahiriḡo niduꞌa ire roga radiu tuḡutuḡu zamaḡano mae feuneꞌeteꞌe ufeta vitinoga.” Inuga Modeꞌeteꞌe Moneo (Mataio 19:9; Mareko 10:11-12; Luka 16:18)
5.31: “Mose goro ḡoeꞌano ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Iniuꞌa inuga modoꞌidene, aneꞌa ihore soꞌaḡa mirihadu inuga hanoꞌi.'
5.32: Rehano eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, iniu inugaꞌe ubuma mene ḡezaro rehano, inuga modine, iꞌaniꞌa ubuma ḡezo ibiḡano inuga tuḡuneꞌeteꞌe heuḡa. Ebu iꞌaniꞌa modiroteꞌe roḡaeḡa teite hahuriroteꞌe vazeḡa zuni ubuma ḡezauꞌohe.” Ḡoere Ago Rinede Toꞌi
5.33: “Ibite azaḡa mazao reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ꞌadi zaeꞌa igiro, 'Nagi ḡoeꞌa rinede toꞌidene, ago variꞌoꞌi. Badiꞌa mazao ḡoere rinede toꞌidene, huga haḡaoꞌi.'
5.34: Rehano eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, ḡoereni ꞌahoga ago rinede toꞌi. Adure niḡano ḡoere ago rinede toꞌi, mazaḡa adureꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa ehoreꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa.
5.35: Raha niḡano ḡoere ꞌahoga ago rinede toꞌi, mazaḡa rahaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa odaḡa tiꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa. Ierusalema niḡano ḡoere ꞌahoga ago rinede toꞌi, mazaḡa Ierusalemaꞌe Kini Ḡihiꞌaḡa ane ne boro.
5.36: Ḡoere rinede tiroteꞌe mene haḡaine rudaꞌuma rae ago ḡoitoroꞌi, mazaḡa ḡabonezeꞌe zaeꞌa mene haḡairo. Zaꞌe vadinize iguze tiba zuni mae ꞌurunoga zu mae ḡuḡunoga mene idaḡa.
5.37: Zaeꞌa nagini haḡaiꞌuma rae roꞌidene, 'Oꞌe,' rae tauḡoꞌi. Ga mene haḡaiꞌuma rae roꞌidene, 'Mene,' rae tauḡoꞌi. Ḡoere ꞌahogaꞌahoga ragate tiꞌetaꞌaꞌe sauꞌa ḡauḡa, Satanionoꞌo fureruꞌohe.” Haḡai Sauꞌano Ago Naenaetitoꞌi (Luka 6:29-30)
5.38: “Zaꞌe Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ꞌahi igiro, 'Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ḡae ubuma sausaunoꞌidene, ḡae zuni ane ubuma sausaunoꞌi. Ebu aneꞌa ḡae ḡonone vahegoꞌidene, ḡae zuni ane ḡonone vahegoꞌi.'
5.39: Rehano eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, vaze sauꞌa mazao ago naenaetitoꞌi. Iniuꞌa zae edaꞌe ḡanineḡa faꞌonoꞌidene, zae kauri ḡanineḡa zuni notonohanoꞌi.
5.40: Iniuꞌa zae zizuni dabuaḡa mouga rae kotazihi roꞌidene, raga dabuaḡa zuni hanoꞌi.
5.41: Iniu zaeꞌa ane ḡau odohadu tiba kilomita onamoga tuḡutuḡuzoꞌidene, aheu kilomita onamoꞌi.
5.42: Iniuꞌa nagini umizoꞌidene hau tauḡoꞌi, zu ḡauze ꞌahoga umizadu vesuꞌu baroniꞌuma rae roꞌidene, ago hezahohanoꞌi.” Agire Azaḡa Zamare Borofoꞌi (Luka 6:27-28, 32-36)
5.43: “Zaꞌe edeḡa, Mose goro ḡoeꞌano ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Ḡae nabudi zamare borofoꞌi, ebu ḡae agire vazeḡa heꞌeheꞌenoꞌi.'
5.44: Rehano eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, zae agire azaḡa zamare borofoꞌi ebu zae sausauzeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa veize kuranoꞌi.
5.45: ꞌOugine, zaꞌe Moze adureo ubuga rae reꞌuma. Mazaḡa Mozeꞌe vaze manoḡa zu vaze sauꞌa veize idane mada aganoziniꞌohe, ebu vaze duduḡa zu vaze veꞌoḡa veize idane irugu tuḡuneꞌohe.
5.46: Zaeꞌa zae zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa daꞌo zamare borofine, Badiꞌaꞌa eꞌe naeḡa mene ziniꞌuma. Takesi azaḡaꞌe haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa rehano, zeḡe zuni zeḡe zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zamare borofeꞌohe.
5.47: Zaeꞌa zae nego nabudi teite daꞌo obotitine, vaze nunu mene vitiziꞌuma. Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡa zuni ꞌouge haḡaeꞌohe.
5.48: Eꞌanoꞌo zae Badiꞌa adureo mazaoꞌe veꞌoḡa oꞌoꞌa teige, zae zuni veꞌoḡani ꞌahoga ago haḡaoꞌi.”

6.1: “Zaꞌe vazeꞌa ḡiazoga veize vaze zamao haḡai duduḡa mene haḡaifine tohutohoꞌi. Mene tohutohine, adureo radiuꞌeteꞌe Mozeꞌa naeḡa manoḡa mene ziniꞌuma.
6.2: Eꞌanoꞌo ḡau ꞌahoga zahara vazeḡa haune, zama guhi azaḡa teige ago hirihiroꞌi. Zama guhi azaḡaꞌe vazeꞌa niguzoga veize nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano zu ibio haḡae fureneꞌohe. Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zeꞌe naeze niduꞌa mae hauḡiro.
6.3: Ḡau ꞌahoga zahara vazeḡa haune, zae nabudi uhiḡa vazeḡa zu ago ihonoꞌi.
6.4: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa mene ederoga veize sifu hanoꞌi. ꞌOugine, Mozeꞌa haḡaize sifu horonadu naeḡa manoḡa ziniꞌuma.” Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa Kuru Ihoziro (Luka 11:2-4)
6.5: “Zaꞌe kuranoꞌidene, zama guhi azaḡa teige ago kuranoꞌi. Mazaḡa zeꞌe vazeꞌa horozoga veize nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano zu ibi boro genaḡano edauꞌenaꞌa, kuranoga urateꞌohe. Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, ze naeze niduꞌa mae hauḡiro.
6.6: Zaꞌe kuranoꞌidene, bazuni habaꞌa diuḡadu ibiheta haranoꞌi, ebu mene horoneꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa, Moze mazao kuranoꞌi. ꞌOugine, Mozeꞌa zae haḡai sifu horonadu naeḡa manoḡa ziniꞌuma.
6.7: Ebu za kuranoꞌidene, Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡa teige, huga oꞌoꞌa ḡoeꞌa hina ago barebare roꞌi. Mazaḡa zeꞌe ḡoere ḡehaḡa hina kuraune, Badiꞌaꞌa igiꞌuma rae zamareꞌohe.
6.8: Ze ago hegotoꞌi, mazaḡa Mozeꞌe zaeꞌa ꞌizema umidogano nagini urateꞌetaꞌaꞌe edeḡa.
6.9: Eꞌanoꞌo zaꞌe ꞌahige kuranoꞌi: 'Emeḡe Mama adureo, eme umiꞌeꞌohe, ḡa niḡoꞌe zaḡoḡa reꞌuma,
6.10: ḡaeꞌa ḡau niduꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌuma, zu adureo ḡae uraꞌe hudauꞌeteꞌe teige, raha ꞌadao zuni hudaꞌuma.
6.12: ebu emeꞌa emeḡe mazao sauꞌa haḡairoteꞌe azaḡa haḡaize sauꞌa rae modiroteꞌe teige, emeḡe haḡai sauꞌa rae modoꞌi.
6.13: Ebu eme haḡai sauꞌa haḡaihi raꞌeteꞌe zamaroneḡanonoꞌo tutufe vaḡifoꞌi, ebu Satani mazaonoꞌo mae ḡabofoꞌi.'
6.14: Zaeꞌa vaze haḡai sauꞌa rae modine, Moze adureo radiuꞌeteꞌeꞌa zae haḡai sauꞌa zuni rae modiꞌuma.
6.15: Rehano zaeꞌa vaze haḡai sauꞌa mene rae modine, Mozeꞌa zuni zae haḡai sauꞌa mene rae modiꞌuma.” Ogomu moneo Zaḡozaḡeꞌeteꞌe Ihoziro
6.16: “Zaeꞌa ogomu moneo zaḡozaḡoꞌidene, zama guhi azaḡa teige, ago vetuḡarau radoꞌi. Zeꞌe vazeꞌa horozadu zeḡeꞌa ogomu moneo zaḡozaḡeꞌeteꞌe ederoga veize, mene vireꞌohe zu iguze mene siꞌeꞌohe. Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zeꞌe naeze niduꞌa mae hauḡiro.
6.17: Rehano zaeꞌa ogomu moneo zaḡozaḡoꞌidene, viradu iguze siꞌoꞌi.
6.18: ꞌOugine, vazeꞌa zaꞌe zaḡozaḡeꞌeteꞌe mene ederiꞌuma, rehano mene horoneꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa, Moze daꞌo ederiꞌuma. Ebu Mozeꞌa zaꞌa sifu haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa horonadu naeze ziniꞌuma.” Ḡau Naeḡa Boroboro Adureo Nuꞌone Toꞌi (Luka 12:33-34)
6.19: “Zae veize raha ꞌadao ḡauze naeḡa boroboro ago nuꞌone toꞌi. Raha ꞌadaoꞌe zuhiꞌa sausauneꞌohe, zu atenarauꞌohe, ebu ḡonoreꞌa varade diuḡadu ḡonotuꞌohe.
6.20: Eꞌanoꞌo zae veize ḡauze naeḡa boroꞌe adureo nuꞌone toꞌi. Eꞌea zuhiꞌa mene sausauneꞌohe, zu mene atenarauꞌohe, ebu ḡonoreꞌa varade diuḡadu mene ḡonotuꞌohe.
6.21: Mazaḡa za ḡauze naeḡa boro nouma tine, zamaze zuni eꞌea tiꞌohe.” Ahiri Ihureḡa (Luka 11:34-36)
6.22: “Za ubumaꞌe ahiri ihureḡa. Ubumazeꞌe manoḡa reine, ahirizeꞌe agaḡaniꞌa iriꞌavoniꞌuma.
6.23: Rehano ubumazeꞌe sauꞌa reine, ahirizeꞌe uzaboꞌa iriꞌavoniꞌuma. Eꞌanoꞌo zae zamao agaḡaꞌe uzaboraune, zaꞌe uzabo ḡiḡiꞌaḡa hune zamaḡano radiꞌuma!” Badiꞌa Aheu mazao Ago Kuranoꞌi (Luka 16:13)
6.24: “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa zuhiꞌa aheu veize gauoga mene idaḡa. Ani ꞌahogaꞌe heꞌeheꞌeniꞌuma, u ꞌahogaꞌe zamare borofiꞌuma. Ebu ꞌahoga veize faine gauiꞌuma, u ꞌahogaꞌe turuniꞌuma. Eꞌe teige, zaꞌe Badiꞌa ebu hadi, aheu veize gauogaꞌe mene idaḡa.” Ago Zamare Adudanoꞌi (Luka 12:22-34)
6.25: “Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe. Zae ḡabone veize nagi ogomu aꞌuma ga nagini gagiꞌuma ebu ahirize veize nagi dabua vidaꞌuma rae ago zamare adudanoꞌi. Mazaḡa ḡaboneꞌe ogomu vitinoga, zu ahiriꞌe dabua vitinoga.
6.26: Hitanao rafiuꞌeteꞌe niniḡa ḡiazoꞌi. Ze ezone mene ḡorauꞌohe, mene hiriveꞌohe, zu ogomuze godoḡo neḡano mene nuꞌone tiꞌohe. Rehano Moze adureo radiuꞌeteꞌeꞌa ḡubuzeꞌohe. Zaꞌe nini vitize hunoga.
6.27: Zae boꞌaḡano iniuꞌa zamare adudu radiune, ḡaboneḡaꞌe tahiḡa nu faraꞌumahe?
6.28: Za nougaꞌahi dabua uꞌano zamare aduduꞌohe? Butu kakaḡaꞌe nougenouge ḡuhureꞌeteꞌe ḡianoꞌi. Ze mene gaueꞌohe ga dabuaze mene turineꞌohe.
6.29: Rehano eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, butu kakaḡani ꞌahoga zuni maꞌora vazeḡa kini Solomonaꞌa haḡairoteꞌe dabuaḡa manomano vitine hunoga.
6.30: Butu veḡaꞌe izidi ḡaboga, u ohoḡoreꞌe masinadu ireo hufi haoniꞌuma, rehano Badiꞌaꞌa dabua vidohauꞌohe. Zaꞌe ve vitinoga, eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa dabua manoḡa ufeta vidoziniꞌuma. Rehano zaꞌa Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe tahiḡa fase!
6.31: Eꞌanoꞌo zaꞌe nagini aꞌuma ga nagini gagiꞌuma ga nagi dabua vidaꞌuma rae ago zamare adudanoꞌi.
6.32: Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡaniꞌa eꞌeguḡa niduꞌa vaḡe inareꞌohe, rehano Moze adureo radiuꞌetaꞌaꞌe zaeꞌa eꞌeguḡa niduꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe edereꞌohe.
6.33: Ibite geno Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌazoga zu ane ura haḡaoga vaḡoꞌi, ꞌougine eꞌeguḡa niduꞌa zuni ziniꞌuma.
6.34: Eꞌanoꞌo za ohoḡore moneo ago zamare adudanoꞌi. Mazaḡa ohoḡore adugaꞌe ohoḡoruꞌu zamariꞌuma. Izidiꞌe izidi aduga daꞌo zamariꞌuma.”

7.1: “Vaze mazao sauꞌa rae ago roꞌi. ꞌOugine, Badiꞌaꞌa zuni zae mazao sauꞌa rae mene ziꞌuma.
7.2: Mazaḡa zaeꞌa vaze mazao sauꞌa rae reine, eꞌe moneo Badiꞌaꞌa zuni zae mazao sauꞌa rae reꞌuma. Zaeꞌa vaze nagini hauꞌeteꞌe idunaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌouge zae ziniꞌuma.
7.3: Zaꞌe nabudize ubuma beꞌa dinunuḡa ḡianeꞌohe. Rehano nougadu zae ubuma beꞌa gado ireḡa mene horoneꞌohe?
7.4: Zaꞌe zae ubuma beꞌa gado ireḡa mene horoneꞌe rehano, nabudize mazao ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Eḡe nabudi, eḡeꞌa ubumaḡo beꞌa dinunu eꞌe mae vaḡinihi.'
7.5: Zama guhi azaḡa, ibite geno zae ubuma beꞌa gado ireḡa eꞌe mae vaḡinoꞌi. ꞌOugine, zaeꞌa faine ehamanadu nabudize ubuma beꞌa dinunuḡa mae vaḡiniꞌuma.
7.6: Ḡau zaḡoḡa ḡuni ago hanoꞌi, ebu zae hadi naeḡa boro aba zamao ago feunoꞌi. Zeꞌe oda hina edene ḡuzuhiꞌuma zu vaetadu zae vihoziꞌuma.” Badiꞌa Uminoꞌi (Luka 11:9-13)
7.7: “Uminoꞌi, ꞌougine ziniꞌuma. Vaḡoꞌi, ꞌougine horoniꞌuma. Ibiheta toketokeroꞌi, ꞌougine ibiheta vavaoziniꞌuma.
7.8: Umineꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ziniꞌuma, zu vaḡeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa horoniꞌuma, ebu ibiheta toketokereꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ibiheta vavaoziniꞌuma.
7.9: Zae boꞌaḡano iniu ubuganiꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga umidine, moganiꞌa hadi haꞌumahe?
7.10: Ga ubuganiꞌa ḡozone umidine, moganiꞌa mohe haꞌumahe?
7.11: Zaꞌe sauꞌa azaḡa rehano, ḡahunone manoḡa ubudeze zenoga urateꞌohe. Eꞌe teige, Moze adureo radiuꞌetaꞌaꞌe ane mazao umideꞌeteꞌe azaḡa hube hune ḡahunone manoḡa ziniꞌuma!
7.12: Eꞌanoꞌo ḡau niduꞌa moneo vazeꞌa zae mazao manoḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe uratoꞌidene, zae zuni zeḡe mazao manoḡa haḡaoꞌi. ꞌAdiꞌe Mose goro ḡoeꞌa zu peroveta azaḡaniꞌa ihoziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa.” Ibiheta Kokosiḡa (Luka 13:24)
7.13: “Ibiheta kokosiḡa diuḡoꞌi. Mazaḡa runeo diuḡeꞌeteꞌe ibiḡa ibihetaḡaꞌe rafaḡa zu boro ꞌahine, eꞌe ibiḡano diuḡeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ḡehaḡa.
7.14: U ḡabone tuḡutuḡu diuḡeꞌeteꞌe ibiḡa ibihetaḡaꞌe kokosiḡa zu eꞌe ibiḡano onamogaꞌe riḡa. Eꞌanoꞌo eꞌe ibihetaḡa vaḡeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe tahiḡa daꞌo.” Ire ebu Ire Maḡa (Luka 6:43-44)
7.15: “Ḡuriro peroveta azaḡa ḡiazoꞌi. Ze mamoe roḡeḡa teige ariꞌuma, rehano zeḡe zamaꞌe butu ḡuniḡa vihovihoḡa heuḡa.
7.16: Ireꞌe maḡa horonadu nagi ireḡa ederiꞌuma. Vaini maḡaꞌe ire renoganonoꞌo mene iniꞌohe, zu figi maḡaꞌe ḡunu renoganonoꞌo mene iniꞌohe.
7.17: Eꞌe teige, ire manoḡa niduꞌaꞌe maḡa manoḡa iniꞌohe, u ire sauꞌaꞌe maḡa sauꞌa iniꞌohe.
7.18: Ire manoḡaꞌe maḡa sauꞌa mene iniꞌohe, u ire sauꞌaꞌe maḡa manoḡa mene iniꞌohe.
7.19: Maḡa manoḡa mene iniꞌeteꞌe ireḡa niduꞌaꞌe udi modeꞌohe ebu ire rogao hufi haoneꞌohe.
7.20: Eꞌanoꞌo zeḡe haḡai horonadu zeꞌe vaze nagiga ederiꞌuma.” Badiꞌa Ura Haḡaiꞌuma (Luka 13:25-27)
7.21: “Eḡe mazao, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro, Zuhiꞌa Boro,' rae huheꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano mene niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano diuḡiꞌuma. Rehano eḡe Mama adureo radiuꞌeteꞌe, ane ura haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa daꞌo diuḡiꞌuma.
7.22: Badiꞌa kota madaḡano vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ꞌahige ihiꞌuma, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro, Zuhiꞌa Boro, emeꞌe ḡae niḡano Badiꞌa ḡoere rae furenido, zu ḡae niḡano vine sauꞌa hegoze buzido, zu ḡae niḡano gigiꞌa haḡaiḡa ḡehaḡa haḡaido.'
7.23: ꞌOugine, eḡeꞌa dehene ziꞌuma, 'E zaꞌe mene hune ederiro. Haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa, eḡe mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi.'” Egadu Haḡaeꞌeteꞌe Azaḡa (Luka 6:47-49)
7.24: “Eꞌanoꞌo eḡe ḡoere egadu ꞌouge haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe huhuzaḡa. Aniꞌe vatava rana neḡa ogoraroteꞌe vazeḡa heuḡa.
7.25: Iruguꞌa ruꞌanadu zobozoboꞌa bororarotene, ebu zavara boroꞌa feuradu neḡa beirotene, ne aꞌe mene higaro, mazaḡa vatava rana ogoraro.
7.26: Rehano eḡe ḡoere egadu ꞌouge mene haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe kauriḡa. Aniꞌe niꞌuri rana neḡa ogoraroteꞌe vazeḡa heuḡa.
7.27: Iruguꞌa ruꞌanadu zobozoboꞌa bororarotene, zu zavara boroꞌa feuradu neḡa beirotene, eꞌe neḡaꞌe higau bauradu fahau ḡuzuhiro.”
7.28: Iesuꞌa eꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa hauḡirotene, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ane ihore uꞌano zaguzagaro.
7.29: Mazaḡa Iesuꞌe Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teige mene ihoziro, rehano Badiꞌa gigiꞌaḡa hina ihoziro.

8.1: Iesuꞌa maḡanonoꞌo ovairotene, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ane hegote onamiro.
8.2: Ebu refera vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ani vaḡe aradu ane zamao obenaḡa hina tuḡadu niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡa uratine, eḡe faihogaꞌe idaraꞌuma.”
8.3: Iesuꞌa ꞌevoꞌa einadu vaze eꞌe oboniro ebu niro, “E urateꞌohe. Ḡaꞌe deheru manoroꞌi!” ꞌOugadu refera eꞌeꞌa zogone manoriro.
8.4: Ebu Iesuꞌa niro, “Vazeni ꞌahoga ago noꞌi. Rehano dibuꞌo vazeḡa vaḡe onamadu ahiriḡo ihonoꞌi. Ebu ḡaeꞌa manorateꞌe vazeꞌa ederifine, Moseꞌa reiroteꞌe ḡahunoneḡa mae onamadu Badiꞌa dibuꞌohanoꞌi.” Uti Vazeḡa Boroꞌa Iesu mazao Firo (Luka 7:1-10; Ioane 4:43-54)
8.5: Iesuꞌa Kaperanauma diuḡirotene, uti vazeḡa boro ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu dananoga uminiro,
8.6: ebu ꞌahige rae niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eḡe tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahogaꞌe ahiꞌa haganoga mene idaḡa radu neo bazeꞌohe zu ufeta giginadu ḡaniḡanauꞌohe.”
8.8: Rehano uti vazeḡa boroꞌa naenaeniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eꞌe mene vaze manoḡa, eꞌanoꞌo ḡaeꞌa eḡe ne diuḡogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Rehano ḡae ḡoere daꞌo roꞌi, ꞌougine eḡe tuḡure vazeḡaniꞌa manoriꞌuma.
8.9: Mazaḡa eḡe zuni vaze ꞌahoga ꞌuꞌuḡano gaueꞌohe, ebu uti azaḡa zuni eḡe ꞌuꞌuḡano gaueꞌohe. Eḡeꞌa uti vazeḡa ꞌahi ninaꞌa, 'Onamoꞌi,' raꞌetene aniꞌe onameꞌohe, ebu ꞌahoga ꞌomo ninaꞌa, 'Aroꞌi,' raꞌetene aniꞌe areꞌohe. Eḡeꞌa eḡe tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoga ninaꞌa, 'ꞌAdi haḡaoꞌi,' raꞌetene aniꞌe haḡaeꞌohe.”
8.10: Iesuꞌa eꞌe ḡoeꞌa igirotene zaguzagaro ebu ane hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, Isaraela azaḡa boꞌaḡano ꞌahige fie gigaruꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe e ꞌize mene horoneha.
8.11: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa madaꞌa iteꞌeteꞌe moneonoꞌo zu madaꞌa zubureꞌeteꞌe moneonoꞌo aradu adureo Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano Aberahamo, Isako zu Iakobo teite ogau tiburaꞌuma.
8.12: Rehano Iuda azaḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa ze zuhiꞌaziꞌohe rae zamareꞌe rehano, enona mae feuzadu uzabo zamaḡano radiꞌuma, ebu eꞌea niaꞌuma zu ḡononeze atitiꞌuma.”
8.13: Ebu Iesuꞌa uti vazeḡa boro niro, “Onamoꞌi. Ḡaꞌe eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, ḡae tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe manoriꞌuma.” Aniꞌa ꞌouge reiroteꞌe madaḡano tuḡure vazeḡa aꞌe manoriro. Vaze Ḡehaḡa Faiziro (Mareko 1:29-34; Luka 4:38-41)
8.14: Ebu Iesuꞌa Petero ne diuḡirotene, Petero emoḡa roḡaeḡa ahiꞌaniꞌa gigine runadu evane rana baze radoga horoniro.
8.15: Iesuꞌa roḡae eꞌe ꞌevoꞌa obonirotene, ahiꞌa gigiꞌa ꞌai dauḡiro. Ebu ani iḡunadu Iesu veize ogomu ruhibiro.
8.16: Ḡoravararotene, vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa vine sauꞌaniꞌa ragano reiroteꞌe azaḡa ḡehaḡa Iesu vaḡe tutuze ariro. Aniꞌe ḡoere hina vine sauꞌa hegoze buziro ebu ugi azaḡa niduꞌa faiziro.
8.17: ꞌOugadu Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta vazeḡa Isaiaonoꞌo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro, “Aniꞌe emeḡe gigiꞌa meiro ebu emeḡe ugi odohiro.” Iesu Hegoteꞌeteꞌe Vazeḡa (Luka 9:57-62)
8.18: Iesuꞌa ane uhiḡano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa horozirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Duꞌura moneafa fare onamihi.”
8.19: Eꞌe madaḡano Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, ḡaꞌa noꞌe onamine eḡeꞌa ḡae hegotiꞌuma.”
8.20: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Butu ḡuniḡaꞌe bazuni habaꞌazeta ebu hitana niniḡaꞌe nezeta. Rehano Vaze Ubugaꞌe bazuni habaꞌa oꞌoꞌa.”
8.21: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌa ꞌahoganiꞌa niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, e ibite geno mamahe guri onamihi.”
8.22: Rehano Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡaꞌe eḡe hegotoꞌi. Rune azaḡaniꞌa rune azaḡa guriꞌuma.” Zavara ꞌUiro (Mareko 4:35-41; Luka 8:22-25)
8.23: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡasio tirirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ani hegote tiriro.
8.24: Ebu zavara boroꞌa duꞌurao feuriro ebu saꞌuꞌa ḡasio kafere diuḡiro. Rehano Iesuꞌe baze radiro.
8.25: Eꞌanoꞌo ze ane vaḡe onamadu evaniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eme ḡabofoꞌi! Eme hunuhuneꞌohe!”
8.26: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Za nougadu rihauꞌohe? Zaꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe komeꞌa!” Ebu ani iḡunadu zavara zu saꞌu roziro. ꞌOugirotene, zavara zu saꞌuꞌe roḡeru hauḡiro.
8.27: Ebu zeꞌa zaguzagauꞌenaꞌa, ḡadimutitiro, “Vaze ꞌahiꞌe nagi vaze? Zavara zu saꞌuꞌa zuni ani ḡoere egohuꞌohe!” Vine Sauꞌazeta Azaḡa Faiziro (Mareko 5:1-20; Luka 8:26-39)
8.28: Iesuꞌa duꞌura moneafa, Gadara azaḡa habao feurirotene, vine sauꞌazeta azaḡa aheuꞌa idu habaꞌanonoꞌo areꞌenogano Iesu hidiro. Zamazeꞌe ufeta ḡugiziro ꞌahine, eꞌe ibiḡano vazeꞌa onamoga mene idararo.
8.29: Ebu ze Iesu ḡihau ḡoreniro, “Badiꞌa Ubuga, ḡaꞌe emeḡe mazao nagini urateꞌohe? Ḡaꞌe, kota madaḡa ḡonaga ꞌizema mougano, aduga rifoga veize emeḡe vaḡe arahe?”
8.30: Zeḡe mazaonoꞌo faḡano aba ḡehaḡaniꞌa ogau radiunu.
8.31: Ebu vine sauꞌasauꞌaniꞌa Iesu uminiro, “Ḡaeꞌa eme hegofe bufoꞌidene, aba ḡuḡuvaḡa ꞌomo mazao tuḡufoꞌi.”
8.32: Ebu aniꞌa vine sauꞌasauꞌa ziro, “Onamoꞌi!” ꞌOuge reirotene, ze vaze aheu mazaonoꞌo buanadu aba ḡuḡuvaḡa zamaḡano diuḡiro. Ebu aba ḡuḡuvaḡa niduꞌaꞌe maḡa komeꞌa gagaḡanonoꞌo dure ovoradu duꞌurao hunuhune rudaro.
8.33: ꞌOugirotene, aba taufeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa neze ferau manahadu vine sauꞌasauꞌaniꞌa ragano reiroteꞌe azaḡa mazao naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe hariḡa niduꞌa meꞌodoziniro.
8.34: Ebu ne azaḡa niduꞌa buanadu Iesu hidoga veize ariro. Ze Iesu horonirotene, aniꞌe zeḡe habaꞌanonoꞌo vaḡinoga uminiro.

9.1: Iesuꞌa ḡasio tiradu duꞌura moneafa fariro ebu aneꞌa radiunuteꞌe neḡa boro, Kaperanauma bare onamiro.
9.2: Ebu vaze nuꞌa ahiꞌa mene haganeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoga faratao bazune teadu ani vaḡe herate ariro. Zeḡeꞌa Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe Iesuꞌa horonirotene, ahiꞌa mene haganeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa niro, “Ubude, zamaḡo rinedoꞌi. Ḡae haḡai sauꞌa ꞌai aḡutu modeha.”
9.3: ꞌOugirotene, Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌe ꞌahige zamariro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe Badiꞌa rae sausauneꞌohe!”
9.4: Iesuꞌe zeḡeꞌa nagini zamareꞌetaꞌaꞌe ederadu ziro, “Nougadu za zamarone sauꞌa zamareꞌohe?
9.5: Ugi vazeḡa mazao nagi ḡoeꞌa nine, ufiḡa? 'Ḡae haḡai sauꞌa ꞌai rae modeha,' rae niꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ga, 'Iḡunadu onamoꞌi,' rae niꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa?
9.6: Rehano Vaze Ubugaꞌe raha ꞌadao haḡai sauꞌa rae modeꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa meirotaꞌaꞌe zaeꞌa ederiꞌuma.” Ebu Iesuꞌa ahiꞌa mene haganeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa niro, “Iḡunoꞌi ebu farataḡo madu neḡo onamoꞌi.”
9.7: Ebu ugi vazeḡa ꞌai iḡunadu neḡa onamiro.
9.8: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaꞌe eꞌe horonirotene rihau rudaro ebu Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌuguḡa gigiꞌaḡa vaze ziniroteꞌe uꞌano, Badiꞌa niguniro. Mataio Huniro (Mareko 2:13-17; Luka 5:27-32)
9.9: Iesuꞌa eꞌeanoꞌo iḡunadu onamirotene, vaze ꞌahoga, niḡa Mataioꞌa takesi fataḡa uhiḡano ehore radiroteꞌe horoniro. Ebu Iesuꞌa niro, “Eḡe hegotoꞌi.” Ebu Mataioꞌa iḡunadu Iesu hegotiro.
9.10: Iesuꞌa Mataio neo ḡorava ogomu aroteꞌe zamaḡano, takesi azaḡa zu haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesu zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite ogau tiburaro.
9.11: Farisea azaḡaniꞌa eꞌe horonirotene, Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡadiziro, “Nougadu zae ihore vazeḡaꞌe takesi azaḡa zu haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa teite ogau tiburuꞌohe?”
9.12: Iesuꞌa eꞌe egadu ziro, “Ugi oꞌoꞌa azaḡaꞌe gohe vazeḡa mene vaḡeꞌohe, rehano ugi azaḡaꞌe gohe vazeḡa vaḡeꞌohe.
9.13: Zaꞌe onamadu Badiꞌa ḡoere ꞌahi huga ederoꞌi, 'Eꞌe dibuꞌo mene urateꞌohe, rehano zaeꞌa vaze vetuḡazoga urateꞌohe.' E iniu zeḡeꞌa bare duduḡa azaḡa rae zamareꞌeteꞌe azaḡa huzoga radu mene ariro, rehano iniu zeḡeꞌa bare haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa rae zamareꞌeteꞌe azaḡa huzoga radu ariro.” Ogomu moneo Zaḡozaḡeꞌeteꞌe (Mareko 2:18-22; Luka 5:33-39)
9.14: Ebu Ioane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Eme zu Farisea azaḡaꞌe ḡae ḡehaḡa ogomu moneo zaḡozaḡeꞌohe. Rehano ḡae tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe nougadu ogomu moneo mene zaḡozaḡeꞌohe?”
9.15: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Hahu muiḡa madaḡano hahu ohozeḡa iziganiꞌa huziroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe, hahu ohozeḡa iziga teite radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano zamazeꞌa aradu niaꞌumahe? Rehano zeḡe mazaonoꞌo hahu ohozeḡa izigaꞌe mae vaḡiniteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma. Eꞌe madaḡano ze ogomu moneo zaḡozaḡiꞌuma.
9.16: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa dabua iziga variꞌe madu dabua amahiḡa mene banineꞌohe, mazaḡa dabuaḡa vuzuꞌine, dabua siꞌiga izigaꞌe ḡuanadu amahiḡa hutubiꞌuma zu borofe zigiꞌuma.
9.17: Ebu vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa vaini vuḡa fuse amahiḡa zamaḡano vaini vuḡa iziga mene beꞌune ufiꞌohe. Beꞌune ufine, vaini vuḡa iziganiꞌa bare busure bororanadu vaini vuḡa fuse amahiḡaniꞌa zigaꞌuma, ebu vaini vuḡaꞌe sore rururaꞌuma zu vaini vuḡa fuse amahiḡa sausauniꞌuma. Eꞌanoꞌo vaini vuḡa izigaꞌe vaini vuḡa fuse izigano beune ufine, aheuni manoḡa radiꞌuma.” Rune Roḡae Tahiꞌaḡa ebu Ugi Roḡaeḡa (Mareko 5:21-43; Luka 8:40-56)
9.18: Iesuꞌa eꞌe ḡoeꞌa ziꞌeteꞌea, nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu vaḡe ariro. Ebu Iesu zamao obenaḡa hina tuḡadu niro, “Eḡe aboeꞌe iziduꞌu rudaneha. Rehano ḡaeꞌa aradu ani rana ꞌevoꞌo toꞌi, ꞌougine ani ḡabodiꞌuma.”
9.19: Ebu Iesuꞌa iḡunadu ani teite onamiro ebu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌa zuni ani teite onamiro.
9.20: Eꞌe ibiḡano roḡae ugi madu muri gaubanana aheu fare adugano radiunuteꞌe roḡaeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu ḡaruna aradu ani dabua ꞌariḡa tahiḡa oboniro.
9.21: Mazaḡa aniꞌe ꞌahige zamariro, “E ani dabua tahiḡa obonine, manoriꞌuma.”
9.22: Ebu Iesuꞌa tehadu ani ḡianadu niro, “Aboe, zamaḡo rinedoꞌi. Ḡaeꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, ugiḡoꞌa manoreha.” ꞌOuge reirotene, ani manoriro.
9.23: Iesuꞌa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa neo feurirotene, rune vazeḡa veize suraꞌi hodiꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu borofe haraeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ḡuḡuvaḡa horoziro.
9.24: Ebu aneꞌa ziro, “Zae niduꞌa buanoꞌi. Roḡae komeꞌa aꞌe mene rudaneha, rehano bazeꞌohe.” Rehano zeꞌe Iesu eḡofoharo.
9.25: Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa enoneo tuḡuze buziroteꞌe ḡarugano, ne zamaḡa diuḡadu roḡae komeꞌa ꞌevoꞌa oboniro. ꞌOugadu ani iḡuniro.
9.26: Ebu eꞌe hariḡaꞌe eꞌe habaꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano bororaro. Ubumaze Kuruḡa Azaḡa Aheu Faiziro
9.27: Iesuꞌa eꞌea mode onamirotene, ubumaze kuruḡa azaḡa aheuꞌa ani hegotiro. Zeꞌa ḡihau huaro, “Davida mariga, eme vetuḡafoꞌi!”
9.28: Iesuꞌa ne diuḡirotene, ubuma kuruḡa azaḡaniꞌa ane vaḡe ariro. Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Zaꞌe eḡeꞌa faizoga idaḡa rae mae ḡihiheꞌehe?” Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Oꞌe, Zuhiꞌa Boro.”
9.29: Ebu aniꞌa ubumaze obonadu ziro, “Zaeꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe idunaḡano ubumazeꞌa manoriꞌuma.”
9.30: ꞌOugirotene, ubumazeꞌa raꞌaro. Ebu Iesuꞌa riḡa ziro, “Zae mazao naginiꞌa fureranateꞌe vazeni ꞌahoga ago noꞌi.”
9.31: Rehano ze onamadu eꞌe habaꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano ani hari rae ḡehaniro. Mumutafa Vazeḡa Fainiro
9.32: Ebu ze neonoꞌo buau onamirotene, vaze nuꞌa vaze ꞌahoga Iesu vaḡe tutune ariro. Vine sauꞌaniꞌa vaze eꞌe ragano radu aniꞌe ḡoeroga mene idararo.
9.33: Ebu Iesuꞌa vine sauꞌa vaze eꞌe mazaonoꞌo hegone bunirotene, mumutafa vazeḡaniꞌa ḡoeriro. Ebu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa zaguzaganadu reiro, “Ibite Isaraela habaꞌano ꞌahiguḡaniꞌa mene fureraro.”
9.34: Rehano Farisea azaḡaniꞌa reiro, “Iesuꞌe vine sauꞌa zuhiꞌaḡa gigiꞌaḡa hina vine sauꞌasauꞌa hegoze buzeꞌohe.” Gau Azaḡaꞌe Tahiḡa
9.35: Iesuꞌe ne boro nunu zu ne komeꞌa nunu ragave onamadu Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano ihoziro, zu Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe moneo hari manoḡa haramiro. Ebu ugi zu gigiꞌa niduꞌa fainiro.
9.36: Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa horozadu vetuḡaziro, mazaḡa zeꞌe vazeꞌa mene taufeꞌeteꞌe mamoeḡa teige ufeta taoraro zu dana ꞌahoga mene hidiro.
9.37: ꞌOugadu ani ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Hiriviteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe ḡehaḡa bagaḡa, rehano gau azaḡaꞌe tahiḡa.
9.38: Eꞌanoꞌo hiriveꞌeteꞌe Zuhiꞌaḡa Boro mazao gau azaḡa ane mebao tuḡuzoga veize uminoꞌi.”

10.1: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare huze nuꞌoziro, ebu vine sauꞌa hegoze buzeꞌeteꞌe zu ugi nunu faineꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa ziniro.
10.2: Iesu apostolo gaubanana aheu fare nizeꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe: Ibiꞌaꞌe Simona (niḡa ꞌahogaꞌe Petero), ani negoḡa Anderea, Zebedeo ubuga Iakobo zu ane negoḡa Ioane,
10.3: Filipi, Batolomeo, Tomasi, takesi vazeḡa Mataio, Alefeo ubuga Iakobo, Tadeo,
10.4: Zelota vazeḡa Simona ebu Iesu revoharoteꞌe vazeḡa, Isakariota vazeḡa Iuda. Iesu Tahiꞌa Gaubanana Aheu Fareꞌa Ragave Onamadu Haramiro (Mareko 6:7-13; Luka 9:1-6)
10.5: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare tuḡuzeꞌenaꞌa, ꞌahige ihoziro, “Iuda mene azaḡa haba ago onamoꞌi, ebu Samaria azaḡa ne zuni ago diuḡoꞌi.
10.6: Rehano Isaraela habaꞌano dauḡiroteꞌe mamoeḡa vaḡe onamoꞌi.
10.7: Ebu neḡaneḡa ragave onamoꞌidene, 'Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡa ꞌai haniteha,' rae haramozenoꞌi.
10.8: Ugi azaḡa faizoꞌi, rune azaḡa ḡabozoꞌi, refera azaḡa faizoꞌi ebu vine sauꞌa hegoze buzoꞌi. Zaeꞌa naeḡa oꞌoꞌa ḡauḡa hidiro ꞌahine, naeḡa ago maꞌenaꞌa, ḡahugoꞌi.
10.9: Niharazeo hadi boro ga komeꞌa zuni ago odohoꞌi.
10.10: Zae ragavo veize nihara ga dabua ꞌahoga ga tamaka ga tuḡu ago odohoꞌi, mazaḡa gau azaḡaꞌe nagini urateꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe hideꞌohe.
10.11: Noꞌe ne boro ga ne komeꞌa diuḡoꞌidene, zae mae ḡihiziteꞌe vazeḡa vaḡadu ane neo radoꞌi onamo ne eꞌe mode iḡunoꞌi.
10.12: Ane ne diuḡoꞌidene, ibite geno ꞌahige unihoꞌi, 'Badiꞌaꞌa zama roḡeḡa zenoꞌi.'
10.13: Ebu eꞌe neo radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe zama roḡeḡa urateꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reine, zaeꞌa rateꞌe zama roḡeḡaꞌe zeḡe rana radiꞌuma. U mene reine, zaeꞌa rateꞌe zama roḡeḡa eꞌeꞌa zae bare vaḡiꞌuma.
10.14: Ne azaḡaniꞌa zae mene mae zouzoꞌidene, ga ḡoereze mene egozenoꞌidene, odaze huꞌuruḡa zauhe mode manahadu eꞌe habaꞌa ga neḡa mode iḡunoꞌi.
10.15: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, Badiꞌa kota madaḡano za mene mae ḡihiziroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Sodoma zu Gomora azaḡa ufeta vitize aduga boro hidiꞌuma.” Aduga Boro Hidiꞌuma (Mareko 13:9-13; Luka 21:12-17)
10.16: “Ḡianoꞌi. Butu ḡuniḡa boꞌaḡano mamoe tuḡuzeꞌeteꞌe teige, e za agire azaḡa boꞌaḡano tuḡuzeꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo mohe teige zamarone huhuzaḡa moꞌi, zu Tubugo niniḡa teige sauꞌa ago haḡaoꞌi.
10.17: Rehano vaze ḡiazoꞌi. Ze zae oboze teadu kotao ohoziꞌuma ebu zeḡe nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano masiziꞌuma.
10.18: Eḡe uꞌano, gavana azaḡa zu kini mazao zae tutuze onamiꞌuma, ebu zaeꞌa eḡe hari manoḡa zeḡe zu Iuda mene azaḡa zamao rae fureniꞌuma.
10.19: Rehano zeꞌa kotao za oboze toꞌidene, nougenouge zae bare biriteꞌe ga nagini rae ḡoeriteꞌe moneo zamaze ago adudanoꞌi, mazaḡa eꞌe madaḡano zaeꞌa nagini rae ḡoeriteꞌe moneo ihoziꞌuma.
10.20: Ḡoere aꞌe mene zae mazaonoꞌo, rehano Moze Viganiꞌa zae mazaonoꞌo ḡoeriꞌuma.
10.21: Negoḡaniꞌa negoḡa revohanadu runeo tuḡuniꞌuma. Ebu moganiꞌa ubuga revohanadu runeo tuḡuniꞌuma. Ebu ubudezeꞌa vize moze agirozeadu runeo tuḡuziꞌuma.
10.22: Eḡe uꞌano, vaze niduꞌa za heꞌeheꞌeziꞌuma. Rehano iniu edau gigaru onamo ḡonaga meiteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone hidiꞌuma.
10.23: Ne ꞌahogano za sausauzoꞌidene, feranadu ne ꞌahoga onamoꞌi. Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zaeꞌa Isaraela habaꞌa niduꞌa ꞌizema harame oname hauḡogano Vaze Ubuganiꞌa ariꞌuma.
10.24: Tahiꞌaꞌe ane ihore vazeḡa mene vitinoga, ebu tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe ane zuhiꞌa mene vitinoga.
10.25: Tahiꞌaꞌe ane ihore vazeḡa teigeꞌohe rae reine, aꞌe idaḡa, ebu tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe ane zuhiꞌa teigeꞌohe rae reine, aꞌe idaḡa. Zaꞌe eḡe teite ne tibano tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa heuḡa. Vazeꞌa eꞌe Belezebulo rae huhiro. Eꞌanoꞌo eḡe teite tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, zaꞌe ufeta sauꞌano huziꞌuma.” Iniu Rihoniꞌuma? (Luka 12:2-7)
10.26: “Eꞌanoꞌo vazeꞌa sausauzoꞌidene, ago rihozoꞌi. Uꞌuru radiuꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌa fureraꞌuma, ebu ogone ḡahineꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa zuni ederiꞌuma.
10.27: Eḡeꞌa uzabo zamaḡano zae daꞌo ziꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe za mada agaḡano vaze niduꞌa zoꞌi. Ebu eḡeꞌa nagini sifu gumude ziꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe ne binuḡa hitaganonoꞌo rae furenoꞌi.
10.28: Vazeꞌe ahiri manogaꞌe idaḡa rehano, vine manogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Eꞌanoꞌo ze ago rihozoꞌi. Rehano Badiꞌa daꞌo rihonoꞌi, mazaḡa aniꞌe vine zu ahiriꞌe ire roga radiu tuḡutuḡu zamaḡano ruizoga idaḡa.
10.29: Tiburi niniḡa aheuꞌe hadi komeꞌa hina seroneꞌohe. Rehano Badiꞌa, zae Mamaꞌa mene uratine, zeḡe boꞌaḡano tiba zuni rahao mene uitiꞌuma.
10.30: Badiꞌaꞌa zae zamare borofadu vadinize iguḡa niduꞌaꞌe nugu zuni edereꞌohe.
10.31: Eꞌanoꞌo ago rihanoꞌi, mazaḡa zaꞌe Badiꞌa ubumao Tiburi niniḡa ḡehaḡa ufeta vitizoga.
10.32: Iniuꞌa vaze ubumao eḡe moneo edaune, eḡe zuni adureo Mamahe ubumao ane moneo edaꞌuma.
10.33: Rehano iniuꞌa vaze ubumao eḡe oꞌohine, eḡe zuni adureo Mamahe ubumao ani oꞌoniꞌuma.” Mene Uniho Manoḡa, Rehano Benisi (Luka 12:51-53, 14:26-27)
10.34: “Eḡeꞌa uniho manoḡa rahao ꞌada mae ariro rae ago zamaroꞌi. Eꞌe uniho manoḡa mene mae ariro, rehano benisi mae ariro.
10.35: Eꞌa ubugaꞌe moga teite agirotitoga, avoḡaꞌe viꞌa teite agirotitoga, roḡaeꞌe ani hadoga roḡaeḡa teite agirotitoga veize ariro.
10.36: Za agire azaḡaꞌe zae teite ne tibano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reꞌuma.
10.37: Iniuꞌa moga ga viꞌa eḡe ufeta vitihe zamare borofine, aniꞌe eḡe mene tahiꞌa reꞌuma, ebu iniuꞌa ubuga ga aboḡa eḡe ufeta vitihe zamare borofine, aniꞌe eḡe mene tahiꞌa reꞌuma.
10.38: Iniuꞌa ane satauro odoheꞌenaꞌa eḡe ḡaruna mene hegotine, aniꞌe eḡe mene tahiꞌa reꞌuma.
10.39: Iniu ani ḡabone obone giganine, ani ḡabone tuḡutuḡu mene hidiꞌuma. Rehano iniuꞌa ane ḡabone eḡe veize ahetine, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma.” Naeḡa Hidiꞌuma (Mareko 9:41)
10.40: “Zae mae ḡihizeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe mae ḡihiheꞌohe. Ebu eḡe mae ḡihiheꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa mae ḡihineꞌohe.
10.41: Iniuꞌa peroveta vazeḡaꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere rae fureneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa rae mae ḡihinine, aniꞌe peroveta vazeḡaniꞌa hiditeꞌe naeḡa hidiꞌuma. Iniuꞌa duduḡa vazeḡaꞌe vaze duduḡa rae mae ḡihinine, aniꞌe vaze duduḡaniꞌa hiditeꞌe naeḡa hidiꞌuma.
10.42: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa nize komeꞌa azaḡa ꞌadi boꞌaḡano ꞌahogaꞌe eḡe tahiꞌa radu vu nahuga bioḡa tiba haune, aniꞌe aneꞌa meiteꞌe naeḡa mene hune dauniꞌuma.”

11.1: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare ihoze hauḡirotene, eꞌeanoꞌo iḡunadu ne uhiḡauhiḡano ihozifine zu haramifine onamiro. Iesu zu Ioane Babatiso (Luka 7:18-35)
11.2: Ioane Babatisoꞌa ḡuꞌa neḡano radiunuteꞌe zamaḡano Kerisoꞌa nagini haḡairoteꞌe hariḡa igiro. ꞌOugadu aniꞌe Iesu ḡadinoga veize ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa Iesu vaḡe tuḡuziro.
11.3: Ebu zeḡeꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ariꞌuma rae reiroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡahe? Mene reine, eme vaze ꞌahoga guhiniꞌumahe?”
11.4: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Bare onamadu zaeꞌa igiꞌeteꞌe zu horoneꞌeteꞌe Ioane ihonoꞌi.
11.5: Ubuma kuru azaḡaꞌe ehamuꞌohe, oda sauꞌa azaḡaꞌe edau ragaveꞌohe, refera azaḡaꞌe manoreꞌohe, teḡaze uhuḡa azaḡaꞌe igiꞌohe, rune azaḡaꞌe bare ḡabodeꞌohe ebu zahara azaḡaniꞌa hari manoḡa igiꞌohe.
11.6: Eḡe mazao fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe mene modeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe matuꞌe rudauꞌohe.”
11.7: Ioane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa iḡunirotene, Iesuꞌa Ioane moneo vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ḡadahe ziro, “Za nagini horonoga veize haba bohaꞌa onamiro? Zavaraꞌa imi hudi naeninaeniꞌeteꞌe horonoga radu onamirohe?
11.8: Mene reine, za nagini horonoga veize onamiro? Dabua manomano vidaroteꞌe vazeḡa horonoga veize onamirohe? Mene, dabua manomano vidaroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe kini neo radiuꞌohe.
11.9: Tena nagini horonoga veize onamiro? Peroveta vazeḡahe? Oꞌe, eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, peroveta azaḡa vitizeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Ioane.
11.10: Ioane moneo Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Ḡianoꞌi, eḡeꞌa ḡae zamao vaze ꞌahoga ibite tuḡuniꞌuma. Aniꞌe ḡae zamao ḡae ibi ruhibiꞌuma.'
11.11: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, Ioaneꞌe rahao ꞌada fureraroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa vitizoga. Rehano Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡanoꞌe ḡonaga vazeḡa zuni Ioane vitinoga.
11.12: Ioane Babatisoꞌa haramiroteꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo onao izidi, Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe hariḡaꞌe riḡa harame onameꞌohe. Ebu vaze inaraḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano diuḡeꞌohe.
11.13: Ioaneꞌa ꞌizema ariroteꞌe madaḡanoꞌe peroveta azaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌaniꞌa Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe moneo rae fureniro.
11.14: Zeḡeꞌa rae fureniroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa zaeꞌa mae ḡihinihi rae reine, zaꞌe ederiꞌuma, Ioaneꞌe ariꞌuma rae reiroteꞌe vazeḡa, Elia.
11.15: Teḡaḡeta vazeḡaꞌe faifaine egadu huga ederoꞌi.
11.16: Izidi azaḡaꞌe naginio idaziꞌuma? Zeꞌe tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌaniꞌa ne hunio ehoradu araheꞌeteꞌe heuḡa. Ze rovozadu none tahiꞌaḡaniꞌa mone tahiꞌaḡa mazao ꞌahige huauꞌohe,
11.17: 'Eme muio suraꞌi hodeha, rehano za mene zavoneha. Ebu eme rune habaꞌano niau ḡoinaheha, rehano za mene nianeha.'
11.18: Ioane Babatisoꞌa aradu ogomu mene audo zu vaini vuḡa mene gagido. ꞌOugadu ze ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Ioaneꞌe vine sauꞌaḡeta.'
11.19: U Vaze Ubugaꞌe aradu ogomu auꞌohe ebu vaini vuḡa gageꞌohe. ꞌOugeꞌetene, ze ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Ḡianoꞌi, aniꞌe ogomu fuꞌa zu vaini vuḡa fuꞌa. Ebu ani takesi azaḡa zu haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa teite tiburuꞌohe.' Rehano iniu Badiꞌa zamarone huhuzaḡa hegotiroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Badiꞌazamarone huhuzaḡaꞌe duduḡa rae fureneꞌohe.” Haḡai Sauꞌanonoꞌo Mene Ḡihureꞌeteꞌe Habaꞌa (Luka 10:13-15)
11.20: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesuꞌe aneꞌa haḡai gigiꞌa ḡehaḡa haḡairoteꞌe habaꞌahabaꞌa azaḡa roziro, mazaḡa zeꞌe haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo mene ḡihuriro.
11.21: Aneꞌa ziro, “Korasini azaḡa, za aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Betesaida azaḡa, za aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Eḡeꞌa zae mazao haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa gigiꞌaꞌe Turo zu Sidono azaḡa mazao haḡaifone, ze dabuaze ḡuꞌa vidanadu vega vadinizeo ase ḡuzuheꞌenaꞌa, haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡihurifo.
11.22: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, Badiꞌa kota madaḡano zaꞌe Turo zu Sidono azaḡa ufeta vitize aduga boro hidiꞌuma.
11.23: Kaperanauma azaḡa, zaꞌe adureo Badiꞌa haba tutuze itiꞌuma rae zamareꞌehe? Mene! Zaꞌe rune habaꞌano mae feuziꞌuma. Eḡeꞌa zae mazao haḡairoteꞌe haḡai gigiꞌaḡa Sodoma azaḡa mazao haḡaifone, zeꞌe haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡihuradu izidi ꞌize radiuꞌefo.
11.24: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, Badiꞌa kota madaḡano zaꞌe Sodoma azaḡa ufeta vitize aduga boro hidiꞌuma.” Eḡe Vaḡe Aradu Ahirize Ohonoꞌi (Luka 10:21-22)
11.25: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesuꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Mama, ḡaꞌe adure zu raha Zuhiꞌaḡa. E niguꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa ḡaeꞌa vaze huhuzaḡa zu edeḡa boro azaḡa mazaoꞌe ḡoere huga ꞌahiguḡa ꞌuꞌuru tiro, rehano tahiꞌa komeꞌa teigeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazaoꞌe rae fureniro.
11.26: Mama, a hube, ꞌouge haḡairotaꞌaꞌe ḡae ura.
11.27: Eḡe Mamaꞌa ḡau niduꞌa eḡe iniro. Vazeni ꞌahoga Ubuga aḡuꞌa, rehano Moga ane daꞌo edeḡa. Ebu vazeni ꞌahoga Moga aḡuꞌa, rehano ane Ubuga daꞌo zu Ubuganiꞌa Moga moneo ihozoga veize ohotiroteꞌe azaḡa daꞌo Moga edeḡa.
11.28: Taoḡa zu aduga odoheꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, eḡe vaḡe aroꞌi, ꞌougine eḡeꞌa ahirize ohoniꞌuma.
11.29: Eꞌe namiḡa zu roḡeḡa ꞌahine, eḡe ihore mae ḡihinadu eḡe mazaonoꞌo edeḡa moꞌi. ꞌOugine, zamaze roḡeraꞌuma.
11.30: Mazaḡa eḡe ihoreꞌe mene riḡa zu eꞌe hegotogaꞌe mene aduga.”

12.1: Eꞌe madaḡano, Iesuꞌa Bana Madaḡano vuidi mebaḡa zamaḡano onamiro. Ebu ani tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe viniziroteꞌe uꞌano, vuidi maḡa ririꞌe madu ḡadahe aro.
12.2: Farisea azaḡaniꞌa eꞌe horonadu Iesu niro, “Ḡianoꞌi! Ḡae tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Bana Madaḡa goroḡa varadeꞌohe.”
12.3: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Zaꞌe Buka Zaḡoḡa mene meꞌodirohe? Davida zu ani ḡatiniroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe vinize ruzirotene, Davidaꞌa nougiro?
12.4: Aniꞌe Badiꞌa ne diuḡadu dibuꞌo azaḡaniꞌa daꞌo auꞌeteꞌe dibuꞌo ꞌuvahuḡa odoga aro, ebu ani ḡatiniroteꞌe azaḡa zuni aro. Aꞌe ze anogaꞌe mene idaḡa rae reiroteꞌe ḡauḡa.
12.5: Ebu Mose goro ḡoeꞌano ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Bana Madaḡano dibuꞌo azaḡaniꞌa kuru neḡano gaueꞌetaꞌaꞌe mene veꞌoḡa.' Za ꞌahi mene meꞌodirohe?
12.6: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, kuru neḡa ufeta vitineꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe.
12.7: Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, 'E dibuꞌo mene urateꞌohe, rehano zaꞌe vaze vetuḡazoga urateꞌohe.' Zaeꞌa ḡoere eꞌe huga ederifone, veꞌoḡa oꞌoꞌa azaḡa mazao veꞌoḡa rae mene zifo.
12.8: Vaze Ubugaꞌe Bana Madaḡa Zuhiꞌaḡa.” ꞌEvoꞌa Hoega Vazeḡa Fainiro (Mareko 3:1-6; Luka 6:6-11)
12.9: Ebu Iesuꞌa eꞌe habaꞌa modadu Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa diuḡiro.
12.10: Eꞌea naeḡa ꞌevoꞌa hoega vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu. Farisea azaḡaꞌe Iesuꞌa vaze eꞌe fainine, kotao ohonihi radu ḡadiniro, “Bana Madaḡano ugi azaḡa faizogaꞌe idaḡahe?”
12.11: Aniꞌa ziro, “Zae boꞌaḡano iniu mamoe tibuhugaḡeta radu Bana Madaḡano mamoeḡaniꞌa iduo uite ovoine, iduonoꞌo mene mae vaḡiniꞌumahe?
12.12: Vazeꞌe mamoe ufeta vitizoga zu ḡihiꞌaḡa. Eꞌanoꞌo Bana Madaḡano manoḡa haḡaeꞌetaꞌaꞌe idaḡa.”
12.13: Ebu aniꞌa ꞌevoꞌa hoega vazeḡa niro, “ꞌEvoꞌo ꞌeinoꞌi.” Aniꞌa ꞌevoꞌa ꞌeinirotene, naeḡa ꞌevoꞌa teige ꞌevoꞌaniꞌa manoriro.
12.14: Rehano Farisea azaḡaniꞌa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡanonoꞌo buanadu nougenouge Iesu matiteꞌe moneo ḡoꞌaniro. Badiꞌaꞌa Ohotiroteꞌe Tuḡure Vazeḡa
12.15: Iesuꞌe Farisea azaḡaniꞌa ani matihi raꞌeteꞌe ederirotene, eꞌe habaꞌa mode vaḡiniro. Rehano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani hegotiro ebu aneꞌa ugi azaḡa niduꞌa faiziro.
12.16: Ebu ani riḡa ḡoreziro, “Eꞌe iniu rae vaze ago ihozoꞌi.”
12.17: ꞌOugadu Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta vazeḡa Isaiaonoꞌo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro,
12.18: “ꞌAhiꞌe eḡeꞌa ohotiroteꞌe vazeḡa zu eḡe tuḡure vazeḡa. Aniꞌe eḡe zamarone vazeḡa zu eḡe matuꞌoniꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Eḡeꞌa Vinehe ane rana ohoniꞌuma, aniꞌa habaꞌahabaꞌano Badiꞌa kota moneo haramiꞌuma.
12.19: Aniꞌe mene rotetiꞌuma ga mene hounaꞌiꞌuma, aniꞌa ne hunio mene hounaꞌe ḡoeriꞌuma.
12.20: Roratiteꞌe veḡa mene mae vaḡineꞌeteꞌe ga vidatiteꞌe ihureḡa mene hudi vineꞌeteꞌe teige, aniꞌa zoreḡa azaḡa mene mae vaḡiziꞌuma, onamo ḡau veꞌoḡa niduꞌa mae vaḡinadu zuhiꞌaziꞌuma.
12.21: Ebu Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡaniꞌa ani niḡano ḡabone hiditeꞌe madaḡa guhiniꞌuma.” Iesu ebu Belezebulo (Mareko 3:20-30; Luka 11:14-23, 12:10)
12.22: Ebu vaze nuꞌe vine sauꞌaniꞌa agatoharoteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoga Iesu vaḡe tutune ariro. Aniꞌe ubumaḡa kuruḡa zu mumutafa. Ebu Iesuꞌa ani fainadu aniꞌe ḡoeriro zu ehamaro.
12.23: Ebu vaze niduꞌa zaguzaganadu ꞌahige rae reiro, “ꞌAhiꞌe Davida mariga, Keriso gaogi!”
12.24: Rehano Farisea azaḡaniꞌa ḡoereze igirotene, ꞌahige rae reiro, “Aniꞌe vine sauꞌa zuhiꞌaḡa, Belezebulo inaraḡa hina vine sauꞌasauꞌa hegoze buzeꞌohe.”
12.25: Rehano Iesuꞌa ze nouge rae zamareꞌeteꞌe ederadu ziro, “Haba tiba zamaḡano zeḡeꞌa rovotadu utitine, eꞌe habaꞌaꞌe aneꞌa bare ruiniꞌuma. Ebu ne boro ꞌahoga ga ne tiba zamaḡano zeḡeꞌa rovotadu utitine, ze mene edau gigaraꞌuma.
12.26: Sataniꞌa Satani hegone bunine, ani aneꞌa bare rovotadu utitiꞌuma. ꞌOugine, aneꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe habaꞌaꞌe nougenouge edau gigaraꞌuma?
12.27: Eḡeꞌa Belezebulo inaraḡa hina vine sauꞌa hegoze buzine, zae tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe iniu inaraḡa hina vine sauꞌa hegoziꞌuma? Zae tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare zaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae reꞌuma.
12.28: Rehano eḡeꞌa vine sauꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa Viga hina hegoze buzeꞌohe. Aꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa amahi zae zuhiꞌazirotaꞌaꞌe ihozeꞌohe.
12.29: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa inara vazeḡa ꞌahoga mene batune tine, nougenouge ani ne diuḡadu ane tohe ḡonotu buau tauḡiꞌuma? Ani ibite inara vazeḡa batune teadu ane ne toheḡa ḡonotaꞌuma.
12.30: Iniu eḡe teite mene reine, aniꞌe eḡe agirohiꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Ebu iniu Badiꞌa veize eḡe teite vaze mene nuꞌozine, ani Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo vaze rovozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.
12.31: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, vaze haḡai sauꞌa niduꞌa ebu Badiꞌa rae sausauneꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa rae modiꞌuma. Rehano iniuꞌa Vine Zaḡoḡa rae sausaunine, ani haḡai sauꞌaꞌe mene rae modiꞌuma.
12.32: Iniuꞌa Vaze Ubuga agirohauꞌenaꞌa rae sausaunine, Badiꞌaꞌa ani haḡai sauꞌa rae modiꞌuma, rehano iniuꞌa Vine Zaḡoḡa agirohauꞌenaꞌa rae sausaunine, ane haḡai sauꞌaꞌe izidi ebu zazore madaḡano zuni mene rae modiꞌuma.” Ire ebu Ire Maḡa (Luka 6:43-45)
12.33: “Ire manoḡaꞌe maḡa manoḡa iniꞌuma zu ire sauꞌaꞌe maḡa sauꞌa iniꞌuma. Ireꞌe maḡa horonadu nagi ireḡa rae edereꞌohe.
12.34: Zaꞌe Zarama mariga! Zaꞌe sauꞌa azaḡa uꞌano, ḡoere manoḡa ꞌahoga mene raꞌohe. Naginiꞌa ane zamao iriꞌave radiuꞌetaꞌaꞌe hebeꞌanonoꞌo buauꞌohe.
12.35: Vaze manoḡaꞌe ani zamao manoḡa nuꞌonadu manoḡa fureneꞌohe, ebu sauꞌa vazeḡaꞌe ane zamao sauꞌa nuꞌonadu sauꞌa fureneꞌohe.
12.36: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, Badiꞌa kota madaḡano vaze niduꞌa zeḡeꞌa bare ibite reiroteꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa moneo Badiꞌaꞌa kotaziꞌuma.
12.37: Zaeꞌa reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa idunaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa zaꞌe duduḡa ga veꞌoḡa rae kotaziꞌuma.” Iona Haḡai Nu Badeḡa (Mareko 8:11-12; Luka 11:29-32)
12.38: Eꞌe madaḡano Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡa boꞌaḡano nuꞌa Iesu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, eme ḡaeꞌa haḡai nu badeḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe ḡianihi raꞌohe.”
12.39: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Sauꞌa zu ubuma ḡezo azaḡaniꞌa haḡai nu badeḡa umideꞌohe. Rehano peroveta vazeḡa Iona mazao fureraroteꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa daꞌo ihoziꞌuma.
12.40: Ionaꞌe mada uḡidu zu ohere uḡidu ḡozone boro isio radiro. Eꞌe teige, Vaze Ubuganiꞌa zuni mada uḡidu zu ohere uḡidu raha zamaḡano radiꞌuma.
12.41: Badiꞌa kota madaḡano Nineva azaḡaniꞌa izidi ega azaḡa teite iḡune edanadu izidi ega azaḡaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae roziꞌuma. Mazaḡa ibite madaḡano Nineva azaḡaꞌe Iona haramo abitadu haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡihure ḡouriro. Izidi Iona vitinoga vazeḡaꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe, rehano ze ani ḡoere mene abitadu mene ḡihureꞌohe.
12.42: Badiꞌa kota madaḡano Siba habaꞌa kini roḡaeḡaniꞌa izidi ega azaḡa teite iḡune edanadu izidi ega azaḡaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae roziꞌuma. Mazaḡa ibite madaḡano Siba habaꞌa kini roḡaeḡaniꞌa haba ḡonaga faḡa huneonoꞌo kini Solomona zamarone huhuzaḡa abitoga veize onamiro. U izidi Solomona vitinoga vazeḡaꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe, rehano ze ani ḡoere abitoga mene urateꞌohe.” Vine Sauꞌaniꞌa Bariro (Luka 11:24-26)
12.43: “Vine sauꞌa ꞌahoganiꞌa vaze ꞌahoga mazaonoꞌo buauꞌetene, ahiꞌa ohonoga radu vu oꞌoꞌa habaꞌa vaḡe ragaveꞌohe. Rehano mene horonadu,
12.44: ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'E eḡeꞌa vaḡinateꞌe vazeḡa vaḡe bare onamihi.' Ebu ani baradu vaze eꞌe horoneꞌetene, aniꞌe neḡa bohaꞌa, deheḡa hune zu idaidane touga heuḡa.
12.45: Ebu vine sauꞌa eꞌeꞌa onamadu vine sauꞌa niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fare, ufeta hune sauꞌa zamaze areꞌohe ebu ze vaze eꞌe zamao diuḡe radiuꞌohe. ꞌOugadu vaze eꞌeꞌa ibiꞌa vitine ufeta sautuꞌohe. Eꞌeguḡaꞌe izidi ega sauꞌa mazao fureraꞌuma.” Iesu Viꞌa zu Negoḡa (Mareko 3:31-35; Luka 8:19-21)
12.46: Iesuꞌa ꞌize vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ḡoreziroteꞌe zamaḡano viꞌa zu negoḡa duḡuruꞌa feuradu ani teite ḡoeroga veize enona edaro.
12.47: Ebu vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu niro, “Viꞌu zu negoḡo duḡuruꞌa ḡae teite ḡoerihi radu enona edau radiuꞌohe.”
12.48: Aniꞌa naenaeniro, “Iniuꞌe eḡe nanu? Iniuꞌe eḡe nego duḡuru?”
12.49: Ebu aniꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa surizeꞌenaꞌa, ꞌahige rae reiro, “Eḡe nanu zu eḡe nego duḡuruꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe.
12.50: Iniuꞌa eḡe Mama adureo ura haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe nego, eze ebu nanu.”

13.1: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesuꞌa neonoꞌo iḡunadu duꞌura genaḡano ehoriro.
13.2: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani babaḡano nuꞌorarotene, aniꞌe ḡasio tiradu ehoriro ebu vaze niduꞌaꞌe duꞌura genaḡano edaro.
13.3: Ebu Iesuꞌa hari idaidaḡa hina ḡau ḡehaḡa ihoziro, “Egoꞌi. Hihi vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa mebaḡano ezone ḡora onamiro.
13.4: Ani ezone feune ḡorarotene, nuꞌe ibio rururaro ebu nini'a aradu au hauḡiro.
13.5: Ezone nuꞌe hadi habaꞌano rururaro ebu rahaḡaꞌe mene baruḡa. Rahaḡaꞌe mene baruḡa radu ezoneꞌe ḡarihe ḡuhuriro.
13.6: Rehano madaꞌa hiarotene, ane gigiꞌaḡaniꞌa ḡuhuḡa manadu roraro, mazaḡa taiga oꞌoꞌa.
13.7: Ezone nuꞌe ve renogano rururaro. Ebu ve renoganiꞌa ḡuhure bororanadu ezone ḡuhuḡa simariniro.
13.8: U ezone nuꞌe raha manoḡano rururanadu faine ḡuhure bororaro. ꞌOugadu nuꞌe huga ḡae 100, nuꞌe huga ḡae 60 ebu nuꞌe huga ḡae 30 hudaro.
13.9: Teḡaḡeta vazeḡaꞌe faifaine egadu huga ederoꞌi.” Nagini veize Hari Idaidaḡa hina Ḡoeriroteꞌe moneo Ihoziro (Mareko 4:10-12; Luka 8:9-10)
13.10: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ane vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Ḡa nougadu vaze mazaoꞌe hari idaidaḡa hina ḡoereꞌohe?”
13.11: Ebu Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe moneo ꞌuꞌuru tirotaꞌaꞌe zae mazao fureniro, rehano vaze nunu mazaoꞌe mene fureniro.
13.12: Faifaine zamare igiꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa edeḡa boro zenadu ze edeḡaꞌe ufeta bororaꞌuma. U mene faine zamare igiꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ze edeḡa zuni mae vaḡiniꞌuma.
13.13: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa hari idaidaḡa hina ze ḡorezeꞌohe. Buka zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Zeꞌe horoneꞌe rehano, hugaꞌe mene horoneꞌohe. Zeꞌe igiꞌe rehano, hugaꞌe mene igiꞌohe ga mene edereꞌohe.'
13.14: ꞌOugadu Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta vazeḡa Isaiaonoꞌo rae fureniroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa zeḡe mazao hugano fureraro, 'Zeꞌe igiꞌe rehano, hugaꞌe mene ederiꞌuma. Zeꞌe horoneꞌe rehano, hugaꞌe mene horoniꞌuma.
13.15: ꞌAhi duḡuru zamaꞌe tuḡa, teḡazeꞌe uhuḡa zu ubumazeꞌe kuruḡa. Ze mene ꞌougifone, ubumaze hina horonifo, teḡaze hina igifo zu zamazeo ederifo. Ebu ḡihuradu eḡeꞌa ze faizifo.'
13.16: Rehano zaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa naginiꞌa fureruꞌeteꞌe ubumaze hina horoneꞌohe zu teḡaze hina igiꞌohe.
13.17: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, peroveta azaḡa zu duduḡa azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa zaeꞌa izidi nagini horoneꞌeteꞌe horonihi rae reiro, rehano mene horoniro, ebu zaeꞌa izidi nagini igiꞌeteꞌe igihi rae reiro, rehano mene igiro.” Hari Idaidaḡa Huga Ihoziro (Mareko 4:13-20; Luka 8:11-15)
13.18: “Ezone feune ḡorauꞌeteꞌe hariḡa idaidaḡa huga egoꞌi.
13.19: Vaze nuꞌe ibio rururaroteꞌe ezoga heuḡa. Zeꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa igiꞌe rehano, huga mene edereꞌeteꞌe uꞌano Sataniꞌa aradu zamazeo ḡoraroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa mae vaḡineꞌohe.
13.20: Vaze nuꞌe hadi habaꞌano rururaroteꞌe ezoga heuḡa. Zeꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere igiꞌetene matuꞌeꞌenaꞌa, zogone mae ḡihineꞌohe.
13.21: Rehano zeꞌa fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe taiga oꞌoꞌa radu mada tahiḡa daꞌo fieꞌohe. Ebu Badiꞌa ḡoere mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, aduga zu sauꞌa hideꞌetene, zogone uiteꞌohe.
13.22: Vaze nuꞌe ve renogano rururaroteꞌe ezoga heuḡa. Zeꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere igiꞌe rehano, ḡaboneze zamaḡano zamaze aduga borofeꞌohe zu haba toheḡa barebare mouga veize ufeta zamareꞌohe. ꞌUguḡaniꞌa Badiꞌa ḡoere ꞌuadu zeꞌe mene iniꞌohe.
13.23: U vaze nuꞌe raha manoḡano rururaroteꞌe ezoga heuḡa. Zeꞌa Badiꞌa ḡoere igiꞌohe zu eꞌe huga edereꞌohe. Ebu ḡae 100, ḡae 60 ga ḡae 30 hudauꞌohe.” Ve Hariḡa Idaidaḡa
13.24: Iesu'a hari idaidaḡa ꞌahoga ziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ani mebao ezone manoḡa ḡoraroteꞌe heuḡa.
13.25: Rehano vaze niduꞌa bazeꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ane agire vazeḡaniꞌa aradu vuidi boꞌaḡano ve ḡoraro ebu vaḡiniro.
13.26: Vuidiꞌa ḡuhuradu maḡa haḡairotene ve zuni ḡuhuriro.
13.27: Eꞌanoꞌo meba vazeḡa tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa aradu niro, ꞌZuhiꞌa, ḡaꞌa ḡae mebao vuidi ezone manoḡa ḡoraro. Rehano ve aꞌe noumanoꞌo?'
13.28: Aneꞌa naenaeziro, 'Agire vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ꞌougiro.' Tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa ḡadiniro, 'Ḡaꞌe emeꞌa onamadu ve eꞌe ḡoroga urateꞌehe?'
13.29: Aneꞌa naenaeziro, 'Mene, zaꞌa ve ḡurine vuidi zuni ḡuriꞌuma gaogi.
13.30: Aheuꞌa tibano ḡuhuroga modoꞌi, onamo hiriviteꞌe madaḡa meꞌuma. Hiriveꞌeteꞌe madaḡano eḡeꞌa hiriveꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zeadu zeꞌa ibite geno ve ḡoraꞌuma ebu tibano utadu hufiꞌuma. Hena vuidiꞌe tibano nuꞌonadu eḡe suabao zounoꞌi.'” Kuava Maḡa zu Isiti Hariḡa Idaidaḡa (Mareko 4:30-32; Luka 13:18-21)
13.31: Aniꞌa hari idaidaḡa ꞌahoga ziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe Kuava maḡa tiba vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa madu mebaḡano ḡoraroteꞌe heuḡa.
13.32: kuava maḡaꞌe maḡa niduꞌa boꞌaḡano komeꞌa fase, rehano ḡuhurine meba ḡauḡa niduꞌa boꞌaḡano ufeta bororanadu ire boro raꞌohe. Ebu hitagano nini'a rafiu aradu ezagano neze ogoruꞌohe.”
13.33: Aniꞌa hari idaidaḡa ꞌahoga bare ziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌazitaꞌaꞌe isiti heuḡa. Roḡae ꞌahoganiꞌa isiti tahiḡa madu ꞌuvahu ḡehaḡa teite mirune tibunirotene, ꞌuvahu niduꞌaꞌe ubaruꞌohe.” Hari Idaidaḡa hina Ḡoeriro (Mareko 4:33-34)
13.34: Iesuꞌa hari idaidaḡa hina ḡoere niduꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ziro. Aniꞌe hari idaidaḡa hina daꞌo vaze ḡoreziro.
13.35: ꞌOugadu Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta vazeḡanonoꞌo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro, “Eḡeꞌa ḡorezine, hari idaidaḡa hina ziꞌuma. Raha ꞌadi haḡairoteꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo onao izidi ꞌuꞌuru tirotaꞌaꞌe eḡeꞌa rae fureniꞌuma.” Ve Hariḡa Idaidaḡa Huga Ihoziro
13.36: Ebu aniꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa muhizadu ne zamaḡa diuḡiro. Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa hegote diuḡadu niro, “Mebao ḡoraroteꞌe ve hari idaidaḡa huga ihofoꞌi.”
13.37: Aneꞌa naenaeziro, “Ezone manoḡa ḡoraroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Vaze Ubuga.
13.38: Mebaꞌe raha ꞌadi. Ezone manoḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, u veꞌe Diabolo mone azaḡa.
13.39: Ve ḡoraroteꞌe agire vazeḡaꞌe Diabolo. Hiriveꞌeteꞌe madaḡaꞌe mada ḡonaga, ebu hiriveꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe tuḡure vigaviga.
13.40: Mada ḡonagaꞌe ve niduꞌa nuꞌonadu ire rogao hufi haoneꞌeteꞌe teigiꞌuma.
13.41: Vaze Ubuganiꞌa ane tuḡure vigaviga tuḡuziꞌuma, ebu zeꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazaonoꞌo vaze ibi sauꞌano tutuzeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa zu haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa niduꞌa rovoze nuꞌoziꞌuma.
13.42: Ebu zeḡe niduꞌaꞌe ire roga gigiꞌaḡano mae feuzadu ze eꞌea niaꞌuma zu ḡononeze atitiꞌuma.
13.43: Ebu duduḡa azaḡaꞌe Mozeꞌa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano mada teige hiaꞌuma. Teḡaḡeta vazeḡaꞌe faifaine egadu huga ederoꞌi.” Uꞌuru Tiroteꞌe Ḡauḡa Naeḡa Boroboro Hariḡa Idaidaḡa
13.44: “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe mebao ꞌuꞌuru tiroteꞌe ḡauḡa naeḡa boroboro heuḡa. Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa horonirotene bare uꞌuranadu matuꞌuḡeta ne onamiro. Ebu ane ḡau niduꞌa seronadu meba eꞌe hoitiro.
13.45: Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe hadi naeḡa boroboro vaḡeꞌeteꞌe sero vazeḡa heuḡa.
13.46: Aniꞌa hadi naeḡa boro tiba horonirotene, ne onamadu ane ḡau niduꞌa seronadu eꞌe hoitiro.” Reꞌeva Hariḡa Idaidaḡa
13.47: “Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe reꞌeva heuḡa. Davarao reꞌeva feunadu ḡozone nunu niduꞌa oḡaro.
13.48: Reꞌevaꞌa iri'avirotene, vazeꞌa mae hesao rehaniro, ebu zeꞌa ehoradu ḡozone manoḡaꞌe inahe tunahuo mae ufiro, ebu ḡozone sauꞌaꞌe mae modiro.
13.49: Mada ḡonaga zuni ꞌahiguḡa reꞌuma. Tuḡure vigaviganiꞌa aradu duduḡa azaḡa mazaonoꞌo sauꞌa azaḡa mae rovoziꞌuma.
13.50: Ebu ze ire roga gigiꞌaḡano mae feuzadu eꞌea niaꞌuma zu ḡononeze atitiꞌuma.” Iziga zu Amahiḡa
13.51: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Zaꞌe eḡe ḡoere huga niduꞌa ederahe?” Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Oꞌe.”
13.52: Aniꞌa ziro, “Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe moneo ederifone, zeꞌe ne vazeḡa heuḡa reifo. Ne vazeḡaꞌe ane godoḡo neḡanonoꞌo ḡau iziga zu ḡau amahiḡa mae buneꞌohe.”
13.53: Iesuꞌa hari idaidaḡa eꞌeguḡa hauḡirotene, eꞌeanoꞌo vaḡiniro. Nazareta Azaḡaniꞌa Iesu Hezahoharo (Mareko 6:1-6; Luka 4:16-30)
13.54: Iesuꞌa ane haba, Nazareta neḡa onamadu Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano ihoze ḡadahiro. Ze ani ḡoere egadu zaguzagaro ebu ḡadimutitiro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe noumanoꞌo zamarone huhuzaḡa zu haḡai gigiꞌa inaraḡa ꞌahi meiro?
13.55: Vaze ꞌahiꞌe ne ogoruꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ubuga, oꞌehe? Ani viꞌaꞌe Maria, ani negoḡa duḡuruꞌe Iakobo, Iosefa, Simona zu Iuda.
13.56: Ani ezeḡa niduꞌaꞌe ꞌaha emeḡe teite radiuꞌohe. Aniꞌa ꞌahiguḡa niduꞌa nouma meiro?”
13.57: Ebu zeꞌa ani hezahoharo. ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Peroveta vazeḡaꞌe haba nunu zamaḡano vazeꞌa gubaneꞌohe, rehano ane haba azaḡa zu ane ne azaḡaniꞌa daꞌo mene gubaneꞌohe.”
13.58: Ebu aniꞌe eꞌe neḡano haḡai gigiꞌa ḡehaḡa mene haḡairo, mazaḡa zeꞌa ani mazao mene firo.

14.1: Eꞌe madaḡano Galilea habaꞌa kiniḡa, Herodaꞌa Iesu hariḡa igiro.
14.2: Ebu aniꞌa ane gau azaḡa ziro, “Iesuꞌe Ioane Babatiso. Aneꞌa rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡabodeha. ꞌOugadu aneꞌa haḡai gigiꞌa inaraḡa hina gaueꞌohe.”
14.3: Ibite Herodaꞌa negoḡa Filipi inuga, niḡa Herodia uꞌano, Ioane obone teadu ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoniro.
14.4: Mazaḡa Ioaneꞌa Heroda mazao ꞌahige barebare niro, “Ḡaꞌa negoḡo inuga meirotaꞌaꞌe mene idaḡa.”
14.5: Herodaꞌa Ioane matihi reiro, rehano aniꞌe vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa rihoziro, mazaḡa zeꞌe Ioaneꞌe peroveta vazeḡa rae mae ḡihiniro.
14.6: Herodaꞌa fureraroteꞌe madaḡa meirotene, Heroda aboḡaniꞌa vaze ḡehaḡa zamao zavonadu Heroda zama ufeta matuꞌoharo.
14.7: Eꞌanoꞌo Herodaꞌa ani teite ꞌahige ḡoitoradu ane ḡoere rinede tiro, “Ḡaeꞌa nagini umidine zuni, eḡeꞌa ḡaniꞌuma.”
14.8: Ebu aniꞌa viꞌa ḡoere egadu Heroda niro, “Ioane Babatiso vadiniꞌe siuva rana teadu izidi ꞌada enoꞌi.”
14.9: ꞌOugadu Heroda zamaḡaniꞌa adudaro. Rehano ani aneꞌa huziroteꞌe azaḡa zamao ane ḡoere rinede tiro ꞌahine, ani uti azaḡa mazao aboḡaniꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa hanoꞌi rae ziro.
14.10: Eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌa uti azaḡa tuḡuzadu ḡuꞌa neḡano Ioane Babatiso ꞌunu variꞌe riꞌiro.
14.11: Ebu vadigaꞌe siuva rana teadu odohe ariro ebu roḡae tahiꞌaḡa hanadu aneꞌa viꞌa haro.
14.12: Ebu Ioane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa aradu ane ahiri meiro ebu guriro. Eꞌe enogano zeꞌe Iesu vaḡe onamadu Ioane rune hariḡa meꞌodoharo. Vaze 5,000 Ḡubuziro (Mareko 6:30-44; Luka 9:10-17; Ioane 6:1-14)
14.13: Iesuꞌa Ioane hariḡa igirotene, eꞌe habaꞌa modadu ḡasi hina vaze oꞌoꞌa habaꞌa sifu ruhau onamiro. Rehano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa eꞌe egadu nezeonoꞌo odao Iesu hegote onamiro.
14.14: Iesuꞌa ḡasionoꞌo buanadu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa horozirotene, vetuḡazeadu ugi azaḡa faiziro.
14.15: Ḡoravararotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu niro, “ꞌAhiꞌe haba bohaꞌa ebu mada ꞌai zubureha. Eꞌanoꞌo vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ꞌadi tuḡuze vaḡizoꞌi. ꞌOugine, ze neḡaneḡa onamadu ogomuze hoitiꞌuma.”
14.16: Rehano aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Ze mene onamiꞌuma, rehano zaeꞌa ogomu nu zenoꞌi.”
14.17: Zeꞌa niro, “Eme mazaoꞌe ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo zu ḡozone aheu daꞌo.”
14.19: Ebu aniꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ve rana ehoroga radu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro. Ebu aniꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo zu ḡozone aheu madu adure ite ḡianeꞌenaꞌa, Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi reiro. Ebu vahege tahitahadu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziniro, ebu zeḡeꞌa vaze niduꞌa ḡahugo ziniro.
14.20: ꞌOugadu zeḡe niduꞌa au ubararo, ebu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ogomu ḡahaꞌaḡahaꞌaꞌe nuꞌonadu tunahu niduꞌa gaubanana aheu fare iriꞌavoniro.
14.21: Eꞌea ogaroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano ohoze niduꞌa daꞌoꞌe 5,000, ebu roḡaeroḡae zu tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa ḡehaḡa zuni aro. Vu rana Onamiro (Mareko 6:45-52; Ioane 6:15-21)
14.22: Iesuꞌa zogone ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa tuḡuze ḡasio tiriro ebu ziro, “Eḡe vitihe duꞌura moneafa fare onamoꞌi.” U Iesuꞌe vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa tuḡuziro.
14.23: Iesuꞌe vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa tuḡuze hauḡiroteꞌe enogano, ane daꞌo maḡa komeꞌa itadu kuraro. Ḡoravararotene, eꞌea ane daꞌo radiunu.
14.24: Eꞌe madaḡano ḡasizeꞌe hesaonoꞌo fararo ebu zavara boroboroꞌa ariro ꞌahine, saꞌu boroꞌa ragatadu ḡasize ḡihuḡihuniro.
14.25: Iraranae reirotene, Iesuꞌa vu rana ragaveꞌenaꞌa, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa vaḡe onamiro.
14.26: Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe Iesuꞌa vu rana edau ariroteꞌe horonirotene, rihau rudanadu huau ḡaniḡanaro, “Aꞌe vine!”
14.27: Rehano Iesuꞌa zogone ziro, “Zamaze rinedoꞌi! ꞌAdiꞌe eḡe. Ago rihanoꞌi.”
14.28: Peteroꞌa niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, a hube hune ḡa roꞌidene, eḡe zuni vu rana ḡae vaḡe amoga veize huhoꞌi.”
14.29: Iesuꞌa niro, “Aroꞌi.” Ebu Peteroꞌa ḡasionoꞌo buanadu vu rana Iesu vaḡe edau onamiro.
14.30: Rehano aniꞌa zavara boro horonirotene, rihanadu vu zamaḡa zubure ovoiro ebu ḡaniḡanaro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, e ḡabohoꞌi!”
14.31: Iesuꞌa zogone ꞌevoꞌa ꞌeinadu ani abine ḡihiniro ebu niro, “Ḡaꞌe mene gigaru fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa! Nougadu ꞌadaꞌadeha?”
14.32: Anianine ḡasio tirirotene, zavara ꞌai dauḡiro.
14.33: Ebu ḡasi zamaḡa azaḡaꞌe Iesu mazao kuraro ebu niro, “Hube hune ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa Ubuga.” Ugi Azaḡa Faiziro (Mareko 6:53-56)
14.34: Zeꞌa duꞌura faradu Genesareta habaꞌano hebetiro.
14.35: Haba eꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Iesuꞌa ariroteꞌe ederadu ne uhiḡauhiḡa azaḡa niduꞌa veize ḡoere tuḡuriro. Ebu ze ugi azaḡa niduꞌa Iesu vaḡe tutuze ariro.
14.36: Ebu ugi azaḡaꞌe Iesu dabuaḡa ꞌariḡa tahiḡano daꞌo obonoga veize Iesu uminiro. ꞌOugadu oboniroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe ugizeꞌa manoriro.

15.1: Eꞌe madaḡano Farisea azaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌa Ierusalemaonoꞌo Iesu vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro,
15.2: “Ḡae tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe ꞌizema oganogano ꞌevoreze mene vuzuꞌeꞌohe. Nougadu zeꞌa emeḡe vouḡa haḡai variꞌeꞌohe?”
15.3: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Zaꞌe nougadu vouḡaze haḡai hegotoga veize Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌaꞌe variꞌeꞌohe?
15.4: Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Viꞌu mogo gubazoꞌi,' ebu 'Iniuꞌa ane viꞌa moga rae sausauzine, ani mau runiꞌuma.'
15.5: Rehano zaꞌe vize moze mazao ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Fase, e zae danazoga mene idaḡa, mazaḡa eḡeꞌa danaziteꞌe ḡauḡa ꞌahiꞌe Badiꞌa hatiteꞌe ḡahunoneḡa raha.' Zaeꞌa ꞌouge radu,
15.6: vize moze mene gubazoga zuni idaḡa raꞌohe. Zaeꞌa vouḡaze haḡai hegotoga veize, Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa mae vaḡineꞌohe.
15.7: Zaꞌe zama guhi azaḡa! Peroveta vazeḡa Isaiaꞌa zae moneo Badiꞌa ḡoere rae furenirotaꞌaꞌe duduḡa,
15.8: 'Vaze ꞌahiguḡaꞌe hebeze hina eḡe gubaheꞌohe, rehano zamazeꞌe eḡe mazaonoꞌo faḡa hune.
15.9: Zeḡeꞌa Badiꞌa mazao kurauꞌetaꞌaꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa. Zeꞌe vazeꞌa tiroteꞌe goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌohe.'”
15.10: Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ane vaḡe huze onamadu ziro, “Eḡe ḡoere egadu huga ederoꞌi.
15.11: Hebeo diuḡeꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe vaze mene toratoraneꞌohe. Rehano hebeonoꞌo buauꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡaniꞌa vaze toratoraneꞌohe.”
15.12: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ane vaḡe aradu niro, “Ḡa Farisea azaḡaniꞌa ḡae ḡoere egadu maḡuneꞌetaꞌaꞌe edeḡahe?”
15.13: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡe Mama adureo radiuꞌeteꞌeꞌa mene ḡoraroteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌaꞌe taiganonoꞌo ḡuri modiꞌuma.
15.14: Ze mode tauḡoꞌi. Zeꞌe ubuma kuruḡa azaḡa rehano, ubuma kuruḡa azaḡa ibitoziꞌohe. Ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡaniꞌa ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa ibitohaune, anianine hoꞌona uite ovoiꞌuma.”
15.15: Peteroꞌa niro, “Hari idaidaḡa eꞌe huga ihofoꞌi.”
15.17: Ogomuꞌe vaze hebeonoꞌo diuḡadu isi zamaḡa ovoeꞌohe ebu vesuꞌu ahirionoꞌo buauꞌohe. Za eꞌe aḡuꞌahe?
15.18: Rehano hebeonoꞌo buauꞌetaꞌaꞌe zamaonoꞌo buanadu vaze toratoraneꞌohe.
15.19: Vaze zamaonoꞌo buauꞌetaꞌaꞌe zamarone sauꞌa. Aꞌe gorugoru, ubuma ḡezo, daro fuꞌa, ḡonore, vaze moneo ḡurireꞌeteꞌe zu vaze rae sausauzeꞌeteꞌe raꞌohe.
15.20: Eꞌeguḡaniꞌa vaze toratoraneꞌohe. Rehano ꞌevore mene vuzuꞌadu ogomu auꞌeteꞌeꞌa vaze mene toraneꞌohe.” Kanana Roḡaeḡaniꞌa Iesu mazao Firo (Mareko 7:24-30)
15.21: Iesuꞌa Galilea habaꞌa modadu Turo zu Sidono habaꞌa onamiro.
15.22: Ebu eꞌe habaꞌano Kanana roḡaeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ani vaḡe aradu ḡihau huniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, Davida mariga, eḡe vetuḡahoꞌi! Vine sauꞌaniꞌa eḡe aboe ragano radu ani ufeta aduga hideꞌohe.”
15.23: Rehano Iesuꞌa ḡoere ꞌahoga mene naenaeniro. Ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa aradu uminiro, “Aniꞌa eme hegoteꞌenaꞌa, barebare huau ḡunuḡunufeꞌohe. Ani tuḡune vaḡinoꞌi.”
15.24: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Isaraela azaḡa boꞌaḡano dauḡiroteꞌe mamoeḡa veize daꞌo eḡe tuḡuhiro.”
15.25: Rehano roḡaeḡaniꞌa aradu ani zamao ḡuḡuriro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, danahoꞌi.”
15.26: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Tahiꞌatahiꞌa ogomu madu ḡuni hanogaꞌe mene duduḡa.”
15.27: Roḡaeḡaniꞌa niro, “A hube, Zuhiꞌa Boro. Rehano ḡuni zuni ane zuhiꞌa fataḡanonoꞌo buauꞌeteꞌe ogomuḡa mumuḡa auꞌohe.”
15.28: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Roḡae, ḡaeꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe boro hune! Ḡaeꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe hidiꞌuma.” Eꞌe madaḡano ani aboḡaniꞌa manoriro. Vaze Ḡehaḡa Faiziro
15.29: Iesuꞌa haba eꞌe modadu Galilea duꞌuraḡa onamiro. Ebu maḡa komeꞌa itadu eꞌea ehoriro.
15.30: ꞌOugadu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa mene edauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, ubuma kuruḡa azaḡa, oda sauꞌa azaḡa, mumutafa azaḡa zu ugi azaḡa nunu ḡehaḡa tutuze ane vaḡe ariro. Ebu zeꞌe ane oda babaḡano ugi azaḡa bazuze teadu aneꞌa faiziro.
15.31: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaꞌe mumutafa azaḡaniꞌa ḡoereꞌeteꞌe, oda sauꞌa azaḡaniꞌa manorateꞌe, mene edauꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ragaveꞌeteꞌe zu ubuma kuruḡa azaḡaniꞌa ehamuꞌeteꞌe horozirotene, zaguzagaro ebu Isaraela azaḡa Badiꞌaḡa niguniro. Vaze 4,000 Ḡubuziro (Mareko 8:1-10)
15.32: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ane uhiḡano huze onamadu ziro, “Eꞌe ꞌahi duḡuru vetuḡaziꞌohe, mazaḡa ze ꞌaha mada uḡidu eḡe teite radiuꞌohe zu ogomuze oꞌoꞌa. Eꞌe ze vinini tare nezeo tuḡuzoga mene urateꞌohe, mazaḡa ze ibio higau bauriꞌuma gaogi.”
15.33: Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa niro, “Haba bohaꞌano ꞌahi eme nouma ogomu ḡehaḡa horonadu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ꞌahi ḡubuziꞌuma?”
15.34: Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Za mazao ꞌuvahu odogaꞌe nugu?” Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “ꞌUvahu odogaꞌe fuꞌo aheu fare zu ḡozone komeꞌaꞌe tahiḡa.”
15.35: Ebu aniꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa rahao ehoroga radu ziro.
15.36: Ebu hena ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo aheu fare zu ḡozone nu madu Badiꞌa mazao kuraro. Ebu vahegadu tahiꞌaḡa ziniro ebu zeꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ḡahugiro.
15.37: ꞌOugadu zeḡe niduꞌa au idararo. Ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ogomu ḡahaꞌaḡahaꞌa mae ofadu tunahu fuꞌo aheu fare iri'avoniro.
15.38: Ogaroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano ohoze daꞌo niduꞌaꞌe 4,000. Roḡaeroḡae zu tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌaꞌe mene meꞌodiro.
15.39: Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa tuḡuze vaḡiziroteꞌe ḡarugano ḡasio tiradu Magadana habaꞌa onamiro.

16.1: Farisea zu Sadukea azaḡaniꞌa Iesu tuhune nuroga veize ani vaḡe aradu niro, “Ḡaeꞌa Badiꞌa gigiꞌaḡa hina haḡai nu badeḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe ihofoꞌi.”
16.2: Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Za ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Ḡorava madaꞌa kanaru zuburine, ohoḡore mada manoḡa reꞌuma,'
16.3: ebu 'Oherebau adureꞌa ḡutanoga horonine, iruguꞌa ruꞌaꞌuma.' Zaꞌe adure iraḡa horonadu naginiꞌa fureratitaꞌaꞌe edereꞌohe. Rehano izidi madaḡano naginiꞌa fureru radiuꞌeteꞌe moneo hugaꞌe aḡuꞌa.
16.4: Sauꞌa zu ubuma ḡezo azaḡaꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa vaḡeꞌohe. Rehano Iona mazao fureraroteꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa daꞌo ihoziꞌuma.” Ebu aneꞌa ze muhize onamiro. Farisea zu Sadukea Azaḡa Isiti (Mareko 8:14-21)
16.5: Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe duꞌura moneafa farirotene ꞌuvahu odoga mae odohoga aḡutaro.
16.6: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Farisea zu Sadukea azaḡa ḡiazoꞌi, mazaḡa zeꞌe isiti heuḡa.”
16.7: ꞌOugadu ze zeḡeꞌa bare ḡadimutitiro, “Emeꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga mene mae aradu ani ꞌouge raꞌohe.”
16.8: Iesuꞌa ze nagini reirotaꞌaꞌe ederadu ziro, “Zaꞌa Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe komeꞌa! Nougadu zae mazao ꞌuvahu odoga oꞌoꞌa radu ḡadimutiteꞌohe?
16.9: Zaꞌe ꞌize mene edeḡahe? Eḡeꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo hina vaze 5,000 ḡubuzirotaꞌaꞌe mene zamareꞌehe? Ogomu ḡahaꞌaḡahaꞌaꞌe tunahu nugu iriꞌavoniro?
16.10: Ebu ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo aheu fare hina vaze 4,000 ḡubuzirotaꞌaꞌe mene zamareꞌehe? Ogomu ḡahaꞌaḡahaꞌaꞌe tunahu nugu iriꞌavoniro?
16.11: Eḡeꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga moneo mene zeataꞌaꞌe nougadu zaꞌe mene edereꞌohe? Farisea zu Sadukea azaḡa isiti ḡianoꞌi!”
16.12: ꞌOuge reirotene, zeꞌe ederiro, aniꞌe ꞌuvahu odoga isitiḡa moneo mene ziro, rehano Farisea zu Sadukea azaḡa ihoreḡa ḡianoga veize ziro. Peteroꞌa Iesuꞌe Keriso rae Reiro (Mareko 8:27-30; Luka 9:18-21)
16.13: Iesuꞌa Kaisarea Filipo habaꞌa onamirotene, ani ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡadiziro, “Vazeꞌa Vaze Ubugaꞌe iniu rae raꞌohe?”
16.14: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Nuꞌe Ioane babatiso, nuꞌe Elia ebu nuꞌe Ieremia ga amahi peroveta vazeḡa ꞌahoga rae raꞌohe.”
16.15: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “U zaꞌe eꞌe iniu rae raꞌohe?”
16.16: Simona Peteroꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡaꞌe Keriso, ḡabode radiuꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌa Ubuga.”
16.17: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Iona ubuga Simona, matuꞌoꞌi, mazaḡa vazeꞌa ḡae mazao ꞌadi mene ihoꞌeha, rehano adureo eḡe Mamaꞌa ihoꞌeha.
16.18: Eḡeꞌa ḡaꞌohe, ḡaꞌe Petero, hugaꞌe vatava. Eḡeꞌa vatava eꞌe rana ekalesia ohoziꞌuma ebu rune gigiꞌaniꞌa ze mene raharahaziꞌuma.
16.19: E Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano diuḡeꞌeteꞌe ibihetaḡa kiḡa ḡaniꞌuma. Eꞌanoꞌo ḡaꞌe nagini rahao gararine, Badiꞌaꞌa adureo zuni garariꞌuma, ebu ḡaꞌa nagini rahao ahetine, Badiꞌaꞌa adureo zuni ahetiꞌuma.”
16.20: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡoere riḡa ziro, “Eꞌe Keriso rae vazeni ꞌahoga ago noꞌi.” Iesu Rune moneo Ihoziro (Mareko 8:31-9:1; Luka 9:22-27)
16.21: Eꞌe madaḡano onamo, Iesuꞌa ane rune moneo ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡadahe ihoziro, “Eḡeꞌa Ierusalema oname huniꞌuma, ebu vaze boroboro, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazaonoꞌo aduga ḡehaḡa hidiꞌuma. Zeꞌa uḡuhiꞌuma, rehano eḡeꞌa mada uḡiduḡano bare ḡabodiꞌuma.”
16.22: Ebu Peteroꞌa Iesu ane genaḡano zamahu onamadu ḡadahe roniro, “Mene, Zuhiꞌa Boro! ꞌUguḡaniꞌa ḡae mazao mene hune fureraꞌuma!”
16.23: Rehano Iesuꞌa tehadu Petero niro, “Satani, eḡe mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi! Ḡaꞌe hadi feꞌoḡa teige eḡeꞌa uitoga veize ḡoereꞌohe, mazaḡa zamaroneḡoꞌe mene Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo, rehano vaze mazaonoꞌo areha.”
16.24: Ebu hena Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Iniuꞌa eḡe ḡaruna hegotihi rae roꞌidene, ani ura niduꞌa modadu ane satauro odoheꞌenaꞌa, eḡe hegotoꞌi.
16.25: Mazaḡa iniu ane ḡabone obone giganine, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu mene hidiꞌuma. Rehano iniu ane ḡabone eḡe veize ahetine, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma.
16.26: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa haba niduꞌa meiroteꞌe ḡarugano ḡaboneḡa daunine, nagi manoḡa hidiꞌuma? Ḡau ꞌahoga hanadu ḡaboneḡa bare mouga idaḡahe?
16.27: Vaze Ubuganiꞌa Moga agaḡa zamaḡano tuḡure viga niduꞌa teite ariꞌuma, ebu hena vazeꞌa nagini haḡairoteꞌe idunaḡano aneane naeḡa ziniꞌuma.
16.28: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, izidi ꞌada edau radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze nuꞌe mene rudaꞌuma, onamo Vaze Ubuganiꞌa aradu zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe horoniꞌuma.”

17.1: Mada fuꞌo tiba fare ḡarugano Iesuꞌa Petero, Iakobo zu Iakobo negoḡa Ioane zamazadu zeḡe daꞌo maḡa boro itiro.
17.2: Eꞌea ani iraḡaniꞌa zeḡe ubumao nufiro. Iraḡaniꞌa mada teige agararo ebu dabuaḡaniꞌa agaḡa teige ꞌuraro.
17.3: Eꞌe madaḡano zeḡe zamao Mose zu Eliaꞌa fureranadu Iesu teite ḡoeriro.
17.4: Ebu Peteroꞌa Iesu niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eme ꞌaha radiuꞌetaꞌaꞌe manoḡa. Ḡa uratine e taruha uḡidu ogoraꞌuma. Tibaꞌe ḡae veize, tibaꞌe Mose veize ebu tibaꞌe Elia veize ogoraꞌuma.”
17.5: Aniꞌa ꞌize ḡoereꞌeteꞌea, ḡoze vazavazahoganiꞌa ovadu ze ogoziro. Ebu ḡozeonoꞌo ago ꞌahoganiꞌa ziro, “ꞌAhiꞌe eḡe zamarone Ubude. Ani uꞌano, e matuꞌe rudauꞌohe. Zaꞌe ani ḡoere egohanoꞌi.”
17.6: Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ago eꞌe igirotene, rihau rudanadu rahao ḡuḡuriro.
17.7: Rehano Iesuꞌa aradu oboziro ebu ziro, “Iḡunoꞌi. Ago rihanoꞌi.”
17.8: Zeḡeꞌa dude ehamarotene, vaze ꞌahoga mene horoniro, rehano Iesu daꞌo horoniro.
17.9: Ze maḡanonoꞌo ovairoteꞌea, Iesuꞌa riḡa ziro, “Zaeꞌa horonataꞌaꞌe vaze ꞌahoga ago noꞌi, onamo Vaze Ubuganiꞌa runeonoꞌo bare ḡabode iḡuniꞌuma.”
17.10: Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ḡadiniro, “Nougadu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa, ꞌKerisoꞌa ꞌizema arogano Eliaꞌa ibite ariꞌuma,' rae raꞌohe?”
17.11: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Hube hune Eliaꞌa aradu ḡau niduꞌa ruhibiꞌuma.
