17.12: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, Elia ꞌai amahi ariro. Rehano vazeꞌa ani mene ederadu ani mazao zeḡeꞌa uratiroteꞌe haḡaiḡa haḡairo. Eꞌe teige, Vaze Ubuga zuni zeḡe mazaonoꞌo aduga hidiꞌuma.”
17.13: ꞌOuge reirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe Iesuꞌa Ioane Babatisoꞌe Elia rae reirotaꞌaꞌe ederiro. Tahiꞌa Komeꞌa Vine Sauꞌaḡeta Manoniro (Mareko 9:14-29; Luka 9:37-43)
17.14: Iesu zu ane tahiꞌa uḡiduꞌa maḡanonoꞌo vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa vaḡe ovairotene, vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu ane zamao obenaḡa hina tuḡiro ebu niro,
17.15: “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eḡe ubude vetuḡanoꞌi. Aniꞌe ketoketeꞌohe ebu ahiꞌaꞌe gigiꞌa boro maꞌohe. Aniꞌe ḡae ḡehaḡa ire rogao ga vuo higauꞌohe.
17.16: Eꞌa ani tutune ḡae tahiꞌatahiꞌa vaḡe areha, rehano zeꞌe ani manonoga mene idaraneha.”
17.17: Iesuꞌa eꞌea radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ziro, “Zaꞌe Badiꞌa mazao mene fiꞌeꞌeteꞌe zu veꞌoḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa! E zae teite noꞌe faḡa radiꞌuma? E noꞌe faḡa zae mazao zamahe obone tiꞌuma? Tahiꞌa komeꞌa eꞌe eḡe vaḡe tutune aroꞌi.”
17.18: Ebu Iesuꞌa vine sauꞌa ronadu vine sauꞌaniꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌa eꞌe mazaonoꞌo buaro. ꞌOugadu tahiꞌa komeꞌa eꞌeꞌa zogone manoriro.
17.19: Ebu ani tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa zeḡe daꞌo Iesu vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Emeꞌa nougadu vine sauꞌa hegone bunoga mene idaraneha?”
17.20: Aneꞌa naenaeziro, “Mazaḡa zaeꞌa fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe tahiḡa fase. Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zaꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe fufu maḡa komeꞌa tiba heuḡa radu maḡa ꞌahi mazao ninaꞌa, 'ꞌAdanoꞌo vaḡinadu ꞌomo onamoꞌi,' rae reine, maḡa eꞌeꞌa ꞌouge haḡaiꞌuma. Zaeꞌa eḡe mazao fine, ḡau niduꞌa haḡaogaꞌe idaḡa.” Iesu Rune zu Bare Ḡaboditeꞌe moneo Ziro (Mareko 9:30-32; Luka 9:43b-45)
17.22: Zeꞌa Galilea habaꞌano nuꞌorarotene, Iesuꞌa ziro, “Vaze Ubugaꞌe agireḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌiniꞌuma.
17.23: Zeꞌa ani maꞌuma ebu aniꞌa mada uḡiduḡano bare ḡabodiꞌuma.” ꞌOugadu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe zamaze are rudaro. Kuru Neḡa Takesiḡa
17.24: Zeꞌa Kaperanaumao feurirotene, kuru neḡa takesi azaḡaniꞌa Petero vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Zae ihore vazeḡaꞌe kuru neḡa takesi mene hauꞌehe?”
17.25: Aniꞌa naenaeniro, “Mene, aniꞌe takesiḡa hauꞌohe.” Peteroꞌa ne diuḡirotene, Iesuꞌa ibite ḡadiniro, “Petero, ḡa nouge rae zamareꞌohe? Haba kiniḡaꞌe iniu mazao takesi ufeꞌohe, ani haba azaḡa mazao ga avoꞌa azaḡa mazao?”
17.26: Aniꞌa naenaeniro, “Avoꞌa azaḡa mazao ufeꞌohe.” Ebu Iesuꞌa niro, “Oꞌe, ani haba azaḡaꞌe takesi mene hauꞌohe.
17.27: Rehano emeꞌa takesi azaḡa mene maḡunozinifine takesi ziniꞌuma. Ḡaꞌe duꞌura ovoadu kimai feunoꞌi. Ebu ibite manateꞌe ḡozoneḡa hebeꞌa mae nahanine, siliva hadiḡa tiba horoniꞌuma. Eꞌe madu emenane veize zenoꞌi.”

18.1: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano iniuꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune?”
18.2: Iesuꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌa ꞌahoga hunadu zeḡe boꞌaḡano mae ohoniro,
18.3: ebu ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zaeꞌa ḡihuradu tahiꞌa komeꞌa ꞌahi mene teigine, Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano mene hune diuḡiꞌuma.
18.4: Iniu tahiꞌa komeꞌa ꞌadi teige aneꞌa bare ovoeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ḡihiꞌa hune rae raꞌohe.
18.5: Ebu iniu eḡe niḡano tahiꞌa komeꞌa ꞌahiguḡa mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe mae ḡihiheꞌohe.” Haḡai Sauꞌa Haḡaihi raꞌeteꞌe Zamaroneḡa (Mareko 9:42-48; Luka 17:1-2)
18.6: “Eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe tahiꞌaḡa komeꞌakomeꞌa ꞌahiguḡa boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga zuni haḡai sauꞌano tutune veꞌoneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe hadi horeḡa ꞌunuḡano autadu davara guniḡano mae feunineꞌe ufeta manoḡa.
18.7: Vaze ibi sauꞌano tutuzeꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe ḡehaḡa uꞌano, raha ꞌadi azaḡaniꞌa aduga boro hidiꞌuma. Eꞌeguḡaꞌe mada niduꞌa fureruꞌohe rehano, vaze haḡai sauꞌano tutuzeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe aduga boro hidiꞌuma.
18.8: ꞌEvoꞌo naeḡa ga odaḡo naeḡaniꞌa haḡai sauꞌano tutuꞌe veꞌoꞌoꞌidene, variꞌe modoꞌi. ꞌEvo'o tiba ga odaḡo tiba hina ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidogaꞌe ufeta manoḡa. Aꞌe ꞌevoꞌo aheu ga odaḡo aheu hina ire roga mene hauḡeꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano mae feuꞌoga vitineꞌohe.
18.9: Ubumaḡo naeḡaniꞌa haḡai sauꞌano tutuꞌe veꞌoꞌoꞌidene, ḡude modoꞌi. Ubumaḡo tiba hina ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidogaꞌe ufeta manoḡa. Aꞌe ubumaḡo aheu hina ire roga radiu tuḡutuḡu zamaḡano mae feuꞌoga vitineꞌohe.” Mamoeꞌa Dauḡiroteꞌe Hari Idaidaḡa (Luka 15:3-7)
18.10: “Nize komeꞌa ꞌahiguḡa boꞌaḡano tiba zuni mene ovoe ḡianoga veize tohutohoꞌi. Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, zeḡe taufeꞌeteꞌe tuḡure vigavigaꞌe eḡe Mama adureo radiuꞌeteꞌe teite iḡaiḡa radiuꞌohe.
18.12: Zaꞌe nouge rae zamareꞌohe? Vaze ꞌahoga mazao mamoeḡaꞌe 100. Rehano tibaniꞌa dauḡine, ani nougiꞌuma? Aniꞌe mamoeḡa 99 maḡa habaꞌano modadu mamoeḡa dauḡoga vaḡe ragaviꞌuma.
18.13: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, aneꞌa mamoe dauḡoga horone meine, mamoe tiba eꞌe uꞌano matuꞌe rudaꞌuma. Aniꞌe mamoe 99 mene dauḡoḡa ufeta vitize matuꞌiꞌuma.
18.14: Eꞌe teige, nize komeꞌa ꞌahiguḡa boꞌaḡano tiba zuni dauḡogaꞌe zae Moze adureo radiuꞌeteꞌeꞌa mene urateꞌohe.” Haḡai Sauꞌa Haḡaeꞌeteꞌe Nabuga Duduneꞌeteꞌe Ibiḡa (Luka 17:3)
18.15: “Ekalesia boꞌaḡano negoḡo ꞌahoganiꞌa ḡae mazao haḡai sauꞌa haḡaoꞌidene, ane vaḡe onamadu ḡanine daꞌo radiuꞌenaꞌa haḡaiḡa sauꞌa ihonoꞌi. Aniꞌa egoḡanadu ḡihurine, ḡaꞌe nabugota bare tiburaneha.
18.16: U aniꞌa mene egoḡanoꞌidene, vaze tiba ga aheu zamazadu ane vaḡe bare onamoꞌi, mazaḡa ḡanine nagini raꞌetaꞌaꞌe vaze aheu ga uḡiduꞌa zuni ederiꞌuma.
18.17: Aniꞌa zeḡe ḡoere mene egozenoꞌidene, ekalesia zamaḡano rae furenoꞌi. Aniꞌa ekalesia zuni mene egozenoꞌidene, aniꞌe Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa vazeḡa ga takesi vazeḡa sauꞌa heuḡa rae zamaroꞌi.
18.18: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zaeꞌa nagini rahao gararine, Badiꞌaꞌa adureo zuni garariꞌuma, ebu zaeꞌa nagini rahao ahetine, Badiꞌaꞌa adureo zuni ahetiꞌuma.
18.19: Eḡeꞌa bare hube hune ziꞌohe, rahao ꞌada zae boꞌaḡano vaze aheuꞌa zamaze tibano nagini umidine, eḡe Mama adureo radiuꞌeteꞌeꞌa zae umido haḡaoziniꞌuma.
18.20: Mazaḡa eḡe niḡano aheu ga uḡiduꞌa nuꞌoraune, eḡeꞌa zeḡe boꞌaḡano radiuꞌohe.” Vaze Haḡai Sauꞌa mene Aḡutu Modiroteꞌe Tuḡure Vazeḡa Hari Idaidaḡa
18.21: Ebu Peteroꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eḡe ekalesia negoḡaniꞌa eḡe mazao haḡai sauꞌa haḡaine, ḡae nugu eḡeꞌa haḡaiḡa sauꞌa rae modiꞌuma? Ḡae fuꞌo aheu fare ga?”
18.22: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eḡeꞌa ḡaꞌohe, mene ḡae fuꞌo aheu fare daꞌo, rehano barebare rae modoꞌi.
18.23: Eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe hari idaidaḡa ꞌahi heuḡa. Kini ꞌahoganiꞌa ane mazaonoꞌo hadi meiroteꞌe tuḡure azaḡa huzadu ani hadi bare meihi rae reiro.
18.24: ꞌOugirotene, hadi borofe meiroteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ani vaḡe tutune ariro.
18.25: Aniꞌe hadi baronoga mene idararo ꞌahine, kiniꞌa riḡa ḡoreniro, 'Ḡa ḡae bare, inugo, ubugo zu ḡae mazao ḡau niduꞌa seronadu eḡe hadi baronoꞌi!'
18.26: ꞌOugadu tuḡure vazeḡaniꞌa ani zamao obenaḡa hina tuḡadu uminiro, 'Geno mada nu enoꞌi, ꞌougine e hadiḡo niduꞌa baroniꞌuma.'
18.27: ꞌOuge reirotene, zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa vetuḡaniro ebu hadiḡa baronogaꞌe ahiḡa radu ani tuḡuniro.
18.28: Eꞌe ḡarugano tuḡure vazeḡaniꞌa ani teite tiburu gaueꞌeteꞌe tuḡureḡa vazeḡa ꞌahoga hidiro. Tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ani mazaonoꞌo hadi nu meiroteꞌe uꞌano, aneꞌa ani matanadu oḡorabiḡa harinoharo ebu riḡa niro, 'Eḡe hadi baronoꞌi!'
18.29: ꞌOugirotene, ane vaze, tuḡure vazeḡaniꞌa obenaḡa hina tuḡadu uminiro, 'Geno mada nu enoꞌi, ꞌougine hadiḡo baroniꞌuma.'
18.30: Rehano aniꞌe ane vaze hezahoharo ebu onamadu ḡuꞌa neḡano mae ohoniro, onamo aniꞌa hadi eꞌe baroniꞌuma.
18.31: Tuḡure azaḡa nuꞌa naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe horonirotene, ze maḡune rudanadu zeḡe zuhiꞌa vaḡe onamiro ebu hariḡa niduꞌa ihoniro.
18.32: ꞌOugadu zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa tuḡure vazeḡa ibiꞌa hunadu niro, 'Ḡaꞌe tuḡure vazeḡa sauꞌa! Ḡaꞌa umihadu ḡa eḡe mazaonoꞌo meiroteꞌe hadiḡa niduꞌa baronogaꞌe eḡeꞌa ahiḡa rae reiro.
18.33: Eḡeꞌa ḡae vetuḡaḡadateꞌe teige, ḡae zuni ḡae vaze, tuḡure vazeḡa eꞌe vetuḡanifo!'
18.34: Zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa zama ḡugiꞌano ani aduga hanoga veize ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoniro, onamo ane hadi niduꞌa barone hauḡiꞌuma.
18.35: Eꞌe teige, zaeꞌa zamaze niduꞌa hina zae nego nabudi haḡaize sauꞌa mene rae modine, eḡe Mama adureo zuni zae mazao ꞌouge haḡaiꞌuma.”

19.1: Iesuꞌa eꞌe ḡoeꞌa hauḡirotene Galilea habaꞌa modadu Ioridana vuḡa moneafa Iudea habaꞌa onamiro.
19.2: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani hegotiro ebu aniꞌa eꞌea ugi azaḡa faiziro.
19.3: Farisea azaḡa nuꞌa Iesu tuhune nurifine ani vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Ohoze ꞌahoganiꞌa inuga mazao mene matuꞌine, inuga modogaꞌe idaḡahe?”
19.4: Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Za Buka Zaḡoḡa mene meꞌodirohe? Ḡadaheḡano Badiꞌaꞌa vaze haḡairotene, ohoze zu roḡae haḡairo.
19.5: Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Eꞌanoꞌo ohozeꞌe viꞌa moga modadu inuga teite tiburaꞌuma ebu anianine ahiri tiba reꞌuma.'
19.6: Eꞌe uꞌano, zeꞌe mene aheu, rehano ahiri tiba. Eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa tibuzirotaꞌaꞌe vazeꞌa mene rovoniꞌuma.”
19.7: Zeꞌa ḡadiniro, “ꞌOugine, nougadu Moseꞌa ḡoere riḡa ꞌadi ziro, 'Ohozeꞌa inuga modoꞌidene, ihore soꞌaḡa mirihadu inuga hanoꞌi ebu ani modoꞌi.' ”
19.8: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Zamaze riḡa ꞌahine, Moseꞌa inudeze modogaꞌe idaḡa rae reiro. Rehano ḡadaheḡanoꞌe mene idararo.
19.9: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa inugaꞌe mene ubuma ḡezaro rehano, inuga modadu roḡae ꞌahoga teite hahurine, aniꞌe ubuma ḡezauꞌohe.”
19.10: Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Iesu niro, “ꞌAhiguḡaniꞌa iꞌa inuga mazao fureraune, guruvorau radiuꞌetaꞌaꞌe ufeta manoḡa.”
19.11: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Vaze niduꞌa ḡoere ꞌahi mae ḡihinogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Rehano Badiꞌaꞌa danazeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa daꞌo idaḡa.
19.12: Vaze nuꞌe fureraroteꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo ahiri ugiḡeta radu mene hahureꞌohe. Nuꞌe vazeꞌa ahiri ariro. Nuꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌazoga veize gauihi radu zeḡeꞌa bare mene hahuriro. Iniuꞌa ꞌahi ḡoeꞌa mae ḡihinoga idaḡa roꞌidene, mae ḡihinoꞌi.” Tahiꞌa Komeꞌakomeꞌa ebu Iesu (Mareko 10:13-16; Luka 18:15-17)
19.13: Eꞌe madaḡano vaze nuꞌe tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa tutuze Iesu vaḡe ariro, mazaḡa aniꞌa ze rana ꞌevoꞌa teadu kuranoga uratiro. Rehano ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa tutuze ariroteꞌe azaḡa roziro.
19.14: ꞌOugirotene, Iesuꞌa ziro, “Tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa eḡe vaḡe tuḡuzoꞌi zu ze ago gararoꞌi. Mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa teigeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa.”
19.15: Ebu aniꞌa zeḡe rana ꞌevoꞌa teadu kuraroteꞌe ḡarugano eꞌea iḡune onamiro. Maꞌora Vazeḡa (Mareko 10:17-31; Luka 18:18-30)
19.16: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Ihore vazeḡa, e nagi manoḡa haḡaine, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma?”
19.17: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡaꞌe nougadu eḡe mazao naginiꞌe manoḡa rae ḡadimuꞌohe? Manoḡaꞌe Badiꞌa tibuhuga daꞌo. Ḡaꞌa ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidihi roꞌidene, Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa hegotoꞌi.”
19.18: Vaze eꞌeꞌa ḡadiniro, “Noꞌe goro ḡoeꞌa hegotiꞌuma?” Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “'Vaze ago gorunoꞌi, ubuma ago ḡezanoꞌi, ago ḡonotanoꞌi, vaze moneo ago ḡuriroꞌi,
19.19: viꞌu mogo gubazoꞌi ebu ḡaeꞌa bare zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe teige nabugo zuni zamare borofoꞌi. '”
19.20: Tahiꞌa iziganiꞌa niro, “E goro ḡoeꞌa eꞌe niduꞌa hegote ariro. Hena nagini bare haḡaiꞌuma?”
19.21: Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa ubumao veꞌoḡa oꞌoꞌa reihi roꞌidene, onamadu ḡauḡo niduꞌa seronoꞌi ebu zahara azaḡa zenoꞌi. ꞌOugine, ḡa adureo ḡau naeḡa boroboro hidiꞌuma. Ebu aradu eḡe hegotoꞌi.”
19.22: Tahiꞌa iziganiꞌa Iesu ḡoere igirotene, zamaḡaniꞌa adudu bororuꞌenaꞌa iḡuniro, mazaḡa aniꞌe ufeta maꞌora vazeḡa.
19.23: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, maꞌora vazeḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa rougaꞌe riḡa bagaḡa.
19.24: Eḡeꞌa bare ziꞌohe, kameroꞌa niduru hoꞌoga diuḡogaꞌe riḡa. Rehano maꞌora vazeḡaniꞌa Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaniꞌeteꞌe vazeḡano rougaꞌe ufeta riḡa.”
19.25: Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa eꞌe igirotene, zaguzagau rudaro ebu ḡadiniro, “ꞌOugine, iniuꞌa ḡabone hidiꞌuma?”
19.26: Iesuꞌa ḡiazadu ziro, “Vaze aneꞌa bare ḡabone hidogaꞌe mene idaḡa, rehano Badiꞌaꞌe ḡau niduꞌa haḡaoga idaḡa.”
19.27: Ebu Peteroꞌa niro, “Eme emeḡe ḡau niduꞌa modadu ḡa hegotiro. ꞌOugadu emeꞌe nagini hidiꞌuma?”
19.28: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe. Raha ꞌahi niduꞌaꞌe bare izidatiteꞌe madaḡano Vaze Ubuganiꞌa kini ehoro habaꞌa ḡihiꞌaḡa hune rana ehorine, eḡe hegotiroteꞌe azaḡa, zae zuni kini ehoro habaꞌa gaubanana aheu fare rana ehoradu Isaraela azaḡa, urabo niduꞌa gaubanana aheu fare kotaziꞌuma.
19.29: Ebu iniuꞌa eḡe uꞌano neḡa, negoḡa, ezeḡa, viꞌa, moga, tahiꞌaḡa ga ane haba modine, aniꞌe naeḡa ḡae 100 hidiꞌuma ebu Moga mazaonoꞌo ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma.
19.30: Rehano vaze ibiꞌa ḡehaḡaꞌe ḡonaga reꞌuma, u vaze ḡonaga ḡehaḡaꞌe ibiꞌa reꞌuma.”

20.1: Iesuꞌa hari idaidaḡa ꞌahoga ziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe hari ꞌadi heuḡa. Haba vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ane vaini meba veize gaueꞌeteꞌe azaḡa vaḡihi radu oherebau uzeuze onamiro.
20.2: Ebu aneꞌa vaze nu horozadu ziro, 'Eḡe meba onamadu gauoꞌi. Mada tiba gauḡa hadiḡa ziniꞌuma.' ꞌOugadu aniꞌa ze mebaḡano tuḡuze onamiro.
20.3: Ebu oherebau mada fuꞌo ḡazaḡa fare meirotene ani bare onamiro. Ebu maketi habaꞌano mene gaueꞌeteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌe edau radiuꞌeteꞌe horoziro.
20.4: Ebu aniꞌa ziro, 'Za zu eḡe vaini mebaḡa onamoꞌi ebu gauḡa hadiḡa idane ziniꞌuma.'
20.5: ꞌOugadu ze ane meba onamiro. Aniꞌa madai zu mada uḡidu ḡoravaḡano bare onamadu ꞌouge haḡairo.
20.6: Mada fuꞌo ḡoravaḡano ani onamirotene, vaze nuꞌe edau ragaveꞌeteꞌe horozadu ḡadiziro, 'Za nougadu mada niduga mene gaueꞌenaꞌa edau tauḡeꞌohe?'
20.7: Zeꞌa naenaeniro, 'Mazaḡa vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa eme gau ꞌahoga mene refeha.' ꞌOugadu aneꞌa ziro, 'Zae zuni eḡe vaini mebaḡa onamadu gauoꞌi.'
20.8: Madaꞌa ovorirotene, vaini mebaḡa vazeḡaniꞌa meba taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa niro, 'Gau azaḡa huzadu ḡonaga vazeḡanonoꞌo ibite vazeḡa gau hadiḡa zenoꞌi.'
20.9: Mada fuꞌo ḡoravaḡano huziroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa aradu aneane mada tiba gau hadiḡa meiro.
20.10: ꞌOugadu ibite ariroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ze hadi ufeta boro meꞌuma rae zamariro. Rehano zeḡe zuni aneane mada tiba gau hadiḡa idane meiro.
20.11: Zeꞌa eꞌe hadiḡa madu haba vazeḡa mazao maḡuniro ebu tururuꞌenaꞌa niro,
20.12: 'Ḡonagano arateꞌe azaḡaꞌe mada tahiḡa daꞌo gauꞌeha. U emeꞌa mada gigiꞌa zamaḡano mada niduga gau boro haḡaeha. Rehano ḡaꞌe zeḡe hadiꞌe emeḡe teite idane zeneha.'
20.13: Haba vazeḡaniꞌa zeḡe boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga naenaeniro, 'Eḡe vaze, eꞌe mene nae daꞌo badareha. Ḡaꞌe eḡe teite ḡoere idane teadu mada tiba gau hadiḡa meꞌuma rae raha.
20.14: Eꞌanoꞌo hadiḡo madu onamoꞌi. E ḡonagano arateꞌe vazeḡa gau hadiꞌe ḡae hadi teite idane hatihi raꞌohe.
20.15: Eḡeꞌa eḡe hadi hina eḡe edeḡano haḡaine, veꞌoḡahe? Eḡeꞌa vaze ufeta danazadu ḡaeꞌa ahiahiheꞌehe?'”
20.16: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eꞌanoꞌo vaze ḡonagaꞌe ibiꞌa reꞌuma ebu vaze ibiꞌaꞌe ḡonaga reꞌuma.” Iesuꞌa Ane Rune moneo Bare Ziro (Mareko 10:32-34; Luka 18:31-34)
20.17: Iesuꞌa Ierusalema iteꞌeteꞌea, ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare ane uhiḡano huzadu ibio ziro,
20.18: “Eme Ierusalema iteꞌohe. Ebu Vaze Ubugaꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌiniꞌuma zu runeo tuḡuniꞌuma.
20.19: Ebu Iuda mene azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌinadu zeꞌa ḡirihohaꞌuma, masiniꞌuma zu satauroniꞌuma. Rehano mada uḡiduḡano aneꞌa bare ḡabodiꞌuma.” Iakobo zu Ioane Vizeꞌa Iesu Uminiro (Mareko 10:35-45)
20.20: Eꞌe madaḡano Zebedeo ubugaubuga, Iakobo zu Ioane, ze vizeꞌa zeḡe teite Iesu vaḡe aradu obena hina tuḡiro ebu ḡau ꞌahoga uminiro.
20.21: Iesuꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe nagini urateꞌohe?” Aniꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡaeꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡa moꞌidene, eḡe ubude aheu ohozadu tibaꞌe ḡae edaꞌe mone zu ꞌahogaꞌe ḡae kauri mone iḡuꞌa ḡihiꞌaḡano ehoroga urateꞌohe.”
20.22: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Za zaeꞌa nagini umiheꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa. Eḡeꞌa gagiteꞌe bioḡa aduga zaeꞌa gagoga idaḡahe?” Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Oꞌe, eme idaḡa.”
20.23: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Hube hune eḡe bio zae zuni gagiꞌuma. Rehano eḡe edaꞌe mone zu kauri mone iḡuꞌa ḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe eḡeꞌa mene ziniꞌuma, rehano eḡe Mamaꞌa ohoziroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa daꞌo iḡuꞌa eꞌe meꞌuma.”
20.24: Iesu tahiꞌa gaubananaꞌa eꞌe igirotene, Iakobo zu Ioane mazao maḡuniro.
20.25: Rehano Iesuꞌa huze nuꞌozadu ziro, “Za edeḡa, Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡa habaꞌano zuhiꞌa niduꞌaꞌe zeḡe haba azaḡa riḡa zuhiꞌaziꞌohe, ebu gavana vazeḡa boroboroꞌe inaraze hina zeḡe haba azaḡa rana edauꞌohe.
20.26: Rehano zaꞌe ze ago teigoꞌi. Zae boꞌaḡano iniuꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune reihi reine, aniꞌe zae tuḡure vazeḡa reꞌuma.
20.27: Ebu iniuꞌe zae boꞌaḡano vaze ibiꞌa reihi reine, aniꞌe zae tuḡure vazeḡa rae reꞌuma.
20.28: Mazaḡa Vaze Ubugaꞌe vazeꞌe ane tuḡure azaḡa rouga radu mene ariro, rehano aniꞌe vaze tuḡure vazeḡa rouga radu ariro. Ebu vaze ḡehaḡa veize ane ḡabone hina dibuꞌohafine ariro.” Ubuma Kuruḡa Azaḡa Faiziro (Mareko 10:46-52; Luka 18:35-43)
20.29: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite Ieriko mode iḡunirotene, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani hegotiro.
20.30: Ebu ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa aheuꞌe ibi genaḡano ehore radiunu. Ze Iesuꞌa vitau onameꞌeteꞌe egadu ḡihau huaro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, Davida mariga, eme vetuḡafoꞌi!”
20.31: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa horozadu roziro, “Za sifu radoꞌi!” Rehano zeꞌe ufeta ḡihau huaro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, Davida mariga, eme vetuḡafoꞌi!”
20.32: Ebu Iesuꞌa tue edanadu huziro ebu ḡadiziro, “Eḡeꞌa zae veize nagini haḡaoga urateꞌohe?”
20.34: Ebu Iesuꞌa vetuḡazeadu ubumaze oboniro. ꞌOugirotene, ubumazeꞌa zogone manoradu ze ehamaro ebu Iesu hegotiro.

21.1: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite Ierusalema hanitadu Olivi Maḡano Betefage neḡano feuriro. Ebu ane tahiꞌa aheu tuḡuzeꞌenaꞌa, ziro,
21.2: “Zama ḡoha neḡa onamoꞌi. Eꞌe neḡa diuḡine, doniki ꞌahoga batune touga ubugeta horoziꞌuma. Ebu fuhiꞌadu eḡe vaḡe zamaze aroꞌi.
21.3: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ḡoere nu zoꞌidene, 'Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa urateꞌohe,' rae noꞌi. ꞌOugine ani zogone tuḡuziꞌuma.”
21.4: ꞌOugadu Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta vazeḡanonoꞌo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro,
21.5: “Ierusalema azaḡa mazao ꞌahige zoꞌi, 'Ḡianoꞌi, zae Kiniꞌe zae vaḡe areꞌohe. Aniꞌe vaḡuꞌa ebu doniki rana ehoreha. Doniki ubuga rana ehoradu areꞌohe.'”
21.6: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌa aheuꞌa onamadu Iesuꞌa nagini ziroteꞌe idunaḡano haḡairo.
21.7: Ze doniki ubugeta tutuze Iesu vaḡe aradu dabuaze doniki ubuga ḡarunio zahariro, ebu Iesuꞌa eꞌe rana tire ehoriro.
21.8: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa dabuaze ibio hirau tiro, u vaze nuꞌe ire ezaga variꞌe madu ibi rana hiraro.
21.9: Ebu Iesu zamao onameꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu ḡaruna hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa huaro, “Hosana, Davida mariga nigunihi! Zuhiꞌa Boro niḡano areꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune! Hosana, hitana huneo nigunihi!”
21.10: Iesuꞌa Ierusalema diuḡirotene, ne azaḡa niduꞌa haraeꞌenaꞌa, ḡadimutitiro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe iniu?”
21.11: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa naenaeziro, “ꞌAdiꞌe peroveta vazeḡa Iesu, Galilea habaꞌano Nazareta neḡa vazeḡa.” Kuru Neḡa Deheniro (Mareko 11:15-19; Luka 19:45-48; Ioane 2:13-22)
21.12: Ebu Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌa diuḡadu hoiteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu seroneꞌeteꞌe azaḡa hegoze buziro. Ebu hadi seniso ziniꞌeteꞌe azaḡa fata zu Tubugo niniḡa seroneꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ehoro habaꞌa mae ḡihuniro.
21.13: Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Badiꞌa neꞌe kuru neḡa reꞌuma.' Rehano zaeꞌa kuru neḡaꞌe ḡonore azaḡa neḡano ḡihuniro.”
21.14: Ubuma kuruḡa azaḡa ebu oda sauꞌa azaḡaniꞌa ani vaḡe kuru neḡa habaꞌa aradu aniꞌa faiziro.
21.15: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Iesuꞌa haḡai gigiꞌa nunu haḡairoteꞌe horoniro. Ebu tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌaꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌano huauꞌenaꞌa, “Hosana, Davida mariga!” rae reiroteꞌe igiro. ꞌOugadu ze maḡune rudaro.
21.16: Ebu ze Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ḡa tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌaꞌa nagini raꞌeteꞌe igiꞌehe? Ze gararoꞌi!” Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “E igiꞌohe. Rehano zaꞌe Buka Zaḡoḡa mene meꞌodirohe? 'Badiꞌaꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa zu ene guraḡaguraḡaniꞌa ani nigunoga ihoziro.' ”
21.17: Eꞌe enogano ani ze muhizadu Ierusalema ḡutuꞌaḡa onamiro ebu Betania neḡa onamadu ohere eꞌea baziro. Figi Ireḡaniꞌa Roraro (Mareko 11:12-14, 20-24)
21.18: Irarirotene, Iesuꞌa Ierusalema bare onamiro. Eꞌe ibiḡano ani vininiro.
21.19: Ebu figi ireḡa ibi genaḡano horonadu huga vaḡe onamiro. Rehano ire huga oꞌoꞌa zu rouḡa daꞌo horonadu ire eꞌe niro, “Ḡa mene bare hudaꞌuma!” ꞌOugadu ire eꞌeꞌa zogone roraro.
21.20: Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa eꞌe horonadu zaguzagaro ebu ḡadiniro, “Nougenouge figi ireḡaniꞌa ḡarihe roraneha?”
21.21: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, za Badiꞌa mazao fine zu mene ꞌadaꞌadazine, eḡeꞌa figi ireḡa ꞌahi mazao haḡataꞌaꞌe zaeꞌa zuni haḡaiꞌuma. Ebu maḡa ꞌahi ninaꞌa, 'Ḡihitadu davara zamaḡano buanoꞌi,' rae reine, ꞌouge fureraꞌuma.
21.22: Zaeꞌa kurauꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano nagini umineꞌeteꞌeꞌa hugano fureraꞌuma. Zaeꞌa eꞌe mae ḡihinine, zae umino niduꞌa hidiꞌuma.” Iesu Gigiꞌaḡa moneo Ḡadiniro (Mareko 11:27-33; Luka 20:1-8)
21.23: Ebu Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa diuḡadu vaze ihozirotene, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa ani vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Ḡa noꞌe gigiꞌaḡa hina ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌohe? Iniuꞌa ꞌahi gigiꞌaḡa ḡaniro?”
21.24: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡe zuni ḡadimu ꞌahoga zinihi. Zaeꞌa naenaehine, eḡe zuni noꞌe gigiꞌaḡa hina ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe ihoziꞌuma.
21.25: Ioaneꞌa babatiso zinirotaꞌaꞌe noumanoꞌo? Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ga vaze mazaonoꞌo?” Ze zeḡeꞌa bare ḡoꞌaneꞌenaꞌa, ḡadimutitiro, “Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo reine, 'Za nougadu Ioane ḡoere mene mae ḡihiniro?' rae ifiꞌuma.
21.26: Rehano vaze mazaonoꞌo reine, eme vaze rihozeꞌohe, mazaḡa zeḡe niduꞌa Ioaneꞌe hube hune peroveta vazeḡa rae mae ḡihineꞌohe.”
21.27: Eꞌanoꞌo ze ꞌahige naenaeniro, “Emeꞌe aḡuꞌa.” Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡe zuni noꞌe gigiꞌaḡa hina haḡai ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe mene ihoziꞌuma.” Ubuga Aheu Hari Idaidaḡa
21.28: Iesuꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze boroboro mazao hari idaidaḡa ꞌahoga ziro, “Za hari idaidaḡa ꞌahi zamaroꞌi. Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ubuga aheu teite radiunu. Aniꞌa ubuga ibiꞌa vaḡe onamadu niro, 'Eḡe tahiꞌa, ḡa izidi vaini mebaḡano gaui onamoꞌi.'
21.29: Ebu ubuganiꞌa naenaeniro, 'E mene onamiꞌuma.' Rehano ani vesuꞌu zamaḡa ḡihunadu onamiro.
21.30: Ebu moganiꞌa ubuga veḡa vaḡe onamadu ubuga ibiꞌa niroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa idaḡa niro. Aniꞌa Moga niro, 'E onamiꞌuma.' Rehano ani mene onamiro.
21.31: Zaꞌa zamareꞌetene, ubuga aheu boꞌaḡano iniuꞌa moga ura haḡairo?” Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Ubuga ibiꞌa.” Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, takesi azaḡa zu daro fuꞌa roḡaeḡaroḡaeḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ibite diuḡiꞌuma. Zeḡeꞌa zae vitiziꞌuma.
21.32: Ioane Babatisoꞌe ibi duduḡa ihozoga radu zae vaḡe ariro, rehano za mene mae ḡihiniro. U takesi azaḡa zu daro fuꞌa roḡaeḡaroḡaeḡaꞌe ani ḡoere mae ḡihiniro. Za zeḡeꞌa ꞌouge haḡairoteꞌe horoniro rehano, mene ḡihuradu ani mene mae ḡihiniro.” Hihi Azaḡa Sauꞌa Hari Idaidaḡa (Mareko 12:1-12; Luka 20:9-19)
21.33: Iesuꞌa bare ziro, “Hari idaidaḡa ꞌahoga egoꞌi. Haba vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu. Aniꞌa vaini mebaḡa ḡoranadu ḡabiꞌa merau varahiro, ebu vaini maḡa vuḡa gigeꞌeteꞌe veize iduḡa ꞌahoga huꞌiro, zu ehamuꞌeteꞌe neḡa hitaga haḡairo. Hena vaini mebaḡa eꞌe hihi azaḡa nu ꞌevoreo tiro, ebu aniꞌe haba ꞌahoga onamadu mada faḡa ragavinu.
21.34: Hiriveꞌeteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa hanitirotene, vaini maḡa nu mouga radu aniꞌa ane tuḡure azaḡaꞌe hihi azaḡa vaḡe tuḡuze onamiro.
21.35: Rehano zeḡeꞌa tuḡure azaḡa oboze teadu tibaꞌe bouniro, ꞌahogaꞌe maro ebu ꞌahogaꞌe hadi hina mau bohiniro.
21.36: Hena haba vazeḡaniꞌa tuḡureḡa azaḡa ibiꞌa vitine ufeta ḡehaḡa zeḡe vaḡe bare tuḡuziro, rehano ze tuḡure azaḡa eꞌe mazao haḡai tiba eꞌe bare haḡairo.
21.37: Ḡonagano aniꞌa ubuga zeḡe vaḡe tuḡunadu ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Ze eḡe ubude gubaniꞌuma gaogi.'
21.38: Rehano hihi azaḡaniꞌa ubuga horonirotene, zeḡeꞌa neneḡaniro, 'Aniꞌe moga mazaonoꞌo vaini mebaḡa ꞌadi meiteꞌe vazeḡa. Eme ani matihi ebu vaini mebaḡa ꞌadi emeḡeꞌa meihi.'
21.39: Eꞌanoꞌo zeꞌa ani obone teadu vaini mebaḡanonoꞌo ani uhine bunadu mau runiro.”
21.40: Ebu Iesuꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze boroboro ḡadiziro, “ꞌOugadu vaini mebaḡa vazeḡaꞌe hihi azaḡa eꞌe vaḡe arine, zeḡe mazao nougiꞌuma?”
21.41: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Aniꞌa hihi azaḡa eꞌe mau ruziꞌuma. Ebu vaini mebaḡaꞌe hihi azaḡa ꞌahoga nu ziniꞌuma. ꞌOugine, hiriveꞌeteꞌe madaḡano zeḡeꞌa ani huga nu haꞌuma.”
21.42: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe Buka Zaḡoḡano ḡoere ꞌahi mene meꞌodirohe? 'Vazeꞌa hadi hina ne ogorarotene, zeꞌa mae modiroteꞌe hadiḡaꞌe ne duꞌe rinedeꞌeteꞌe hadiḡa reiro. Aꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa. Emeḡeꞌa ḡianadu zaguzagauꞌohe.'
21.43: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, Badiꞌaꞌa za, Isaraela azaḡa mene bare zuhiꞌaziꞌuma, rehano haba ꞌahoga azaḡa ane ura haḡaeꞌetaꞌaꞌe zuhiꞌaziꞌuma.
21.44: Iniuꞌa hadi eꞌe rana higaune, ani varadu tahitahiꞌuma zu hadi eꞌeꞌa iniu rana higaune, aniꞌe seꞌetiꞌuma.”
21.45: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa Iesu hari idaidaḡa igirotene, Iesuꞌa zeḡe moneo reirotaꞌaꞌe ederiro.
21.46: ꞌOugadu zeꞌe Iesu obone tihi reiro. Rehano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa zeḡe mazao maḡuniꞌuma radu rihoziro, mazaḡa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesuꞌe peroveta vazeḡa rae mae ḡihiniro.

22.1: Iesuꞌa hari idaidaḡa nu hina bare ḡoreziro,
22.2: “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe kini ꞌahoga heuḡa. Aniꞌa ubuga veize hahu muiḡa haḡairo.
22.3: Ebu huziroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa mui aroga veize tuḡure azaḡa zeḡe vaḡe tuḡuziro. Rehano zeꞌe aroga hezahiro.
22.4: Ebu aniꞌa tuḡure azaḡa ꞌahoga nu bare tuḡuzeꞌenaꞌa, ziro, 'Eḡeꞌa huzateꞌe azaḡaꞌe ꞌahige rae zoꞌi: Eḡeꞌa zae veize mui ruhibeha. Boromakau zu mani iga manadu ogomu niduꞌa ꞌai ruhibeha. Hahu muiḡa uꞌa aroꞌi.'
22.5: Rehano ze teḡa riraro ebu zeḡe edeḡano onamiro. ꞌAhogaꞌe mebaḡa onamiro ebu ꞌahogaꞌe hadi vaḡi onamiro.
22.6: Ebu nuꞌe tuḡure azaḡa oboze teadu sausauziro ebu zimi ruziro.
22.7: Kiniꞌa eꞌe igirotene, ani maḡune rudaro. Ebu ani uti azaḡa tuḡuzadu gorugoru azaḡa eꞌe zimi hauḡiro zu neze zuni hufi haoniro.
22.8: Ebu ane tuḡure azaḡa huzadu ziro, 'E hahu muiḡa ꞌai ruhibe idaneha, rehano eḡeꞌa huziroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe arogaꞌe mene idaḡa.
22.9: Eꞌanoꞌo ibi boroboro onamadu horoziteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa mui aroga veize huzoꞌi.'
22.10: Ebu ane tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa ibi boroboro onamadu hidiroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa, manoḡa zu sauꞌa azaḡa niduꞌa nuꞌoziro ebu zamaze onamadu huziroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa mui neḡa iri'avoniro.
22.11: Ebu kiniꞌa iꞌudo azaḡa ḡiazihi radu diuḡirotene, vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa hahu mui dabuaḡa mene vidaroteꞌe horoniro.
22.12: ꞌOugadu aneꞌa ḡadiniro, ꞌEḡe nabudi, ḡaꞌe hahu dabuaḡa mene vidaneha. Nougenouge ꞌadi diuḡi areha?' Rehano ani ḡoere ꞌahoga mene reiro.
22.13: ꞌOugadu kiniꞌa ane gau azaḡa ziro, 'Ani ꞌevoꞌa zu odaḡa batunadu enone uzaboḡano feune bunoꞌi. Ane eꞌea niaꞌuma zu ḡononeḡa atitiꞌuma.'”
22.14: Ḡonagano Iesuꞌa ziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa huziroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ḡehaḡa, rehano ohotiroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe tahiḡa daꞌo.” Takesi Hadiḡa Iniu Haꞌuma? (Mareko 12:13-17; Luka 20:20-26)
22.15: Eꞌe madaḡano Farisea azaḡaniꞌa onamadu, “Iesuꞌa ḡoere veꞌoḡa ꞌahoga reine obone tiꞌuma,” rae ḡoꞌaniro.
22.16: Ebu zeꞌa zeḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa zu kini Heroda mone azaḡaꞌe Iesu mazao tuḡuzadu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, emeꞌe edeḡa, ḡaꞌe huga daꞌo ḡoereꞌohe zu Badiꞌa mone ibiḡa hugano ihozeꞌohe ebu vaze niduꞌa mazao mene inaheꞌenaꞌa, vaze uꞌano zamaḡo mene haganeꞌohe.
22.17: Eꞌanoꞌo ḡaꞌe nouge rae zamareꞌohe? Emeꞌe Roma kiniḡa mazao takesi haune, duduḡa ga mene?”
22.18: Iesuꞌe zeḡe zamarone sauꞌa ederadu ziro, “Zaꞌe zama guhi azaḡa, nougadu eḡe tuhuheꞌohe?
22.19: Takesi hadiḡa ihohoꞌi.” Ze Roma hadiḡa tiba mae harotene,
22.20: aneꞌa ḡadiziro, “Iniu viga zu iniu niḡaꞌe eꞌe rana mirihiro?”
22.21: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Aꞌe Roma kiniḡa viga zu niḡa.” Ebu aneꞌa ziro, “Tena Roma kiniḡa ḡauꞌe Roma kiniḡa hanoꞌi, u Badiꞌa ḡauꞌe Badiꞌa hanoꞌi.”
22.22: Ze ani ḡoere igirotene zaguzagaro ebu ani muhinadu oname ḡouriro. Runeonoꞌo Bare Ḡabodeꞌeteꞌe Ḡadimuḡa (Mareko 12:18-27; Luka 20:27-40)
22.23: Eꞌe madaḡano Sadukea azaḡa nuꞌa Iesu vaḡe ariro. Sadukea azaḡaꞌe vazeꞌa runeonoꞌo mene bare ḡabodiꞌuma rae reiro. Zeḡeꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro,
22.24: “Ihore vazeḡa, Moseꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa ꞌahoga ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Ohoze ꞌahoganiꞌa rudanadu ani inugaꞌe ubuga ꞌoꞌoꞌa reine, ohoze negoḡaniꞌa ḡozobaḡa teite hahuriꞌuma, ebu ubuga furenadu ubuganiꞌa rune negoḡa ehaꞌa meꞌuma.'
22.25: Tena hari ꞌahi zamaroꞌi. Negoḡa niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fareꞌa radiunu. Ibiꞌaniꞌa hahuriro ebu ubuga oꞌoꞌa rudaro. ꞌOugadu negoḡa aheuḡaniꞌa ḡozobaḡa teite hahuriro.
22.26: Rehano ane zuni ubuga oꞌoꞌa rudaro, ebu negoḡa uḡiduḡa onamo fuꞌo aheu fare mazao ꞌuguḡaniꞌa idane fureraro.
22.28: Tena runeonoꞌo bare ḡaboditeꞌe madaḡano roḡae aꞌe iniu inuga reꞌuma? Mazaḡa ohoze niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fareꞌa ani teite hahuriro.”
22.29: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Zaꞌa zamareꞌetaꞌaꞌe veꞌoḡa, mazaḡa zaꞌe Buka Zaḡoḡa ga Badiꞌa gigiꞌaḡa moneo aḡuꞌa.
22.30: Runeonoꞌo bare ḡaboditeꞌe madaḡanoꞌe ohoze zu roḡaeꞌe mene hahuriꞌuma. Zeꞌe tuḡure viga adureo teigiꞌuma.
22.31: Rune azaḡaniꞌa bare ḡabodeꞌeteꞌe moneo, Badiꞌaꞌa reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa zaeꞌa mene meꞌodirohe? Aneꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro,
22.32: 'Eꞌe Aberahamo Badiꞌa, Isako Badiꞌa zu Iakobo Badiꞌa.' Badiꞌaꞌe mene rune azaḡa Badiꞌa, rehano ḡabone azaḡa Badiꞌa.”
22.33: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesu ihoreḡa ḡoeꞌa igirotene, zaguzagaro. Goro Ḡoeꞌa Ḡihiꞌa Hune (Mareko 12:28-34; Luka 10:25-28)
22.34: Ebu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa Iesuꞌa Sadukea azaḡa ḡadimu naenaenadu hebeze ꞌuiroteꞌe hariḡa igirotene, tibano nuꞌoraro.
22.35: Ebu zeḡe boꞌaḡano Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu tuhune nurihi radu ḡadiniro,
22.36: “Ihore vazeḡa, Mose goro ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano noꞌe goro ḡoeꞌaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune?”
22.37: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Goro ḡoeꞌa ḡihiꞌa huneꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe: 'Zuhiꞌa Boro ḡae Badiꞌa zamaḡo niduꞌa hina, vineḡo niduꞌa hina zu zamaroneḡo niduꞌa hina zamare borofoꞌi.'
22.38: Aꞌe goro ḡoeꞌa ibiꞌa zu ḡihiꞌa hune.
22.39: Goro ḡoeꞌa ḡihiꞌa hune aheuḡa zuni eꞌe heuḡa: 'Ḡa ḡae bare zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe teige, nabugo zuni zamare borofoꞌi.'
22.40: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa ebu peroveta azaḡaniꞌa ihoziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌaꞌe goro ḡoeꞌa aheu eꞌe rana ohoniro.” Kerisoꞌe Iniu Mariga? (Mareko 12:35-37; Luka 20:41-44)
22.41: Farisea azaḡaniꞌa nuꞌoraroteꞌe zamaḡano Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro,
22.42: “Zaꞌe Keriso moneo nouge rae zamareꞌohe? Aniꞌe iniu mariga?” Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Aniꞌe Davida mariga.”
22.43: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Tena nougadu Davidaꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa ihonadu Keriso mazao Zuhiꞌa Boro rae huniro? Aniꞌe ꞌahige rae reiro,
22.44: 'Badiꞌaꞌa eḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro niro, “Eḡe edaꞌe moneo ehoroꞌi, onamo eḡeꞌa agireḡo niduꞌa madu odaḡo ꞌuꞌuḡano raharahaziꞌuma.”'
22.45: Davidaꞌa Keriso mazao Zuhiꞌa Boro rae huniro. Tena Kerisoꞌe nougenouge Davida mariga reꞌuma?”
22.46: Ebu vazeni ꞌahoga zuni Iesu mene naenaeniro. Eꞌe enogano vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu mene bare ḡadiniro.

23.1: Ebu Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro,
23.2: “Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡaꞌe Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe iḡuꞌa meiroteꞌe azaḡa.
23.3: Eꞌanoꞌo zeꞌa nagini raꞌeteꞌe egozenadu haḡaoꞌi. Rehano zeḡe haḡaiꞌe ago hegotoꞌi, mazaḡa zeꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare zae ihozeꞌeteꞌe idunaḡano mene haḡaeꞌohe.
23.4: Ze ihoreꞌe riga hune radu vazeꞌa eꞌe hegotoga mene idaḡa. Zeꞌe vaze daꞌo aduga boro ziniꞌohe, rehano zeḡe ꞌevore huduꞌa tiba hina zu mene hune danazeꞌohe.
23.5: Ze vazeꞌa horozoga veize haḡai niduꞌa haḡaeꞌohe. Ze Badiꞌa ḡoere soꞌaḡa ufeꞌeteꞌe umaḡa ufeta rafane haḡadu amusize rana tatuhe uteꞌohe zu dabuaze faḡafeꞌohe.
23.6: Muioꞌe nize boro azaḡaniꞌa ehoreꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano ehoroga urateꞌohe, zu nuꞌonuꞌo neḡanoꞌe vaze boroboroꞌa ehoreꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano ehoroga urateꞌohe.
23.7: Ebu vaze ḡehaḡa habaꞌanoꞌe vazeꞌa gubazeꞌenaꞌa, zeḡe mazao unihoga zu 'Ihore Vazeḡa,' rae huzoga urateꞌohe.
23.8: Rehano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa zae mazao 'Ihore Vazeḡa' rae huzoga gararoꞌi, mazaḡa za ihore vazeḡaꞌe tiba daꞌo. Zae niduꞌaꞌe idaḡa daꞌo, negoze zu ezeze.
23.9: Ebu rahao ꞌada vaze ꞌahoga 'Mama,' rae ago hunoꞌi, mazaḡa adureo radiuꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa daꞌoꞌe zae Mama.
23.10: Ebu vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa zae mazao 'Ibitoziꞌeteꞌe Vazeḡa' rae huzoga gararo'i, mazaḡa zae ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Keriso daꞌo.
23.11: Zae boꞌaḡano iniuꞌe vaze ḡihiꞌa hune reine, aniꞌe zae tuḡure azaḡa reꞌuma.
23.12: Iniu vaze aneꞌa bare niḡa mae itine, Badiꞌaꞌa niḡa mae ovoiꞌuma, u iniu vaze aneꞌa bare niḡa mae ovoine, Badiꞌaꞌa niḡa mae itiꞌuma.
23.13: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡa, zaꞌe zama guhi azaḡa! Aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Mazaḡa zaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌazoga urateꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ibize ꞌueꞌohe. Zaꞌe zaeꞌa bare eꞌe mene urateꞌohe ebu urateꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zuni ꞌueꞌohe.
23.15: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡa, zaꞌe zama guhi azaḡa! Aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Vaze tibaniꞌa ḡihuradu zae ihore hegotoga veize zaeꞌa davara zu haba ragave onameꞌohe. Ebu vaze ꞌahoga matene, ani ihonadu aniꞌa haḡai sauꞌa zae vitize ufeta haḡaeꞌohe. Ebu aniꞌe ire roga radiu tuḡutuḡu diuḡadu adugaꞌe zae vitize ḡae aheu hideꞌohe.
23.16: Zaꞌe vaze ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, rehano ubuma kuruḡa azaḡa! Aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Zaeꞌa ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Iniuꞌa kuru neḡa niḡano ḡoitorine, aꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa. Rehano iniuꞌa kuru neḡa zamaḡano golo hina ḡoitorine, aꞌe riḡa radu aniꞌa ane ḡoitore tihitihiniꞌuma.'
23.17: Zaꞌe ubuma kuruḡa kauriḡa azaḡa! Noꞌe ufeta ḡihiꞌaḡa? Golo ga kuru neḡa? Kuru neḡaꞌe ufeta ḡihiꞌaḡa, mazaḡa goloꞌe kuru neḡa zamaḡano tiroteꞌe uꞌano aꞌe zaḡoḡa raꞌohe.
23.18: Ebu za ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Iniuꞌa dibuꞌo fataḡa niḡano ḡoitorine, aꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa. Rehano iniuꞌa dibuꞌo fataḡano ḡahunoneḡa hina ḡoitorine, aꞌe riḡa radu aniꞌa ane ḡoitore tihitihiniꞌuma.'
23.19: Zaꞌe ubuma kuruḡa azaḡa! Noꞌe ufeta ḡihiꞌaḡa? Ḡahunoneḡa ga dibuꞌo fataḡa? Dibuꞌo fataḡaꞌe ufeta ḡihiꞌaḡa, mazaḡa ḡahunoneḡaꞌe dibuꞌo fataḡa rana tiroteꞌe uꞌano aꞌe zaḡoḡa raꞌohe.
23.20: Iniuꞌa dibuꞌo fataḡa niḡano ḡoitoreꞌetene, dibuꞌo fataḡa ebu eꞌe rana ḡau niduꞌa hina ḡoitoreꞌohe.
23.21: Ebu iniuꞌa kuru neḡano ḡoitoreꞌetene, kuru neḡa niḡano ebu eꞌea ḡabode radiuꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa niḡano ḡoitoreꞌohe.
23.22: Zu iniuꞌa adure niḡano ḡoitoreꞌetene, Badiꞌa ehoro habaꞌa hina zu eꞌe rana ehoreꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa niḡano ḡoitoreꞌohe.
23.23: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡa, zaꞌe zama guhi azaḡa! Aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Mazaḡa zaꞌe tirara mebaḡano eḡa zu murari teige komeꞌa fase ogomuḡa niduꞌaonoꞌo sinu gaubananao rovonadu sinu tiba mone ḡauḡa Badiꞌa hauꞌohe. Rehano Mose goro ḡoeꞌano ḡau ufeta boroboroꞌe igi modeꞌohe. Aꞌe haḡai duduḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe, vaze vetuḡaziꞌeteꞌe zu zama niduꞌa hina haḡaeꞌeteꞌe raꞌohe. Za ḡau boro ꞌadiꞌe haḡaifo ebu komeꞌakomeꞌa zuni mene igi modifo.
23.24: Zaꞌe vaze ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, rehano ubuma kuruḡa azaḡa! Zaꞌe vu zamaḡano ofene horoneꞌetene beuꞌe modadu gageꞌohe, rehano kameloꞌe une tauḡeꞌohe.
23.25: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡa, zaꞌe zama guhi azaḡa! Aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Zaꞌe bioze zu siuvaze enoga daꞌo vuzuꞌe deheneꞌohe, mazaḡa zamazeo matuꞌu veize daꞌo radiu tauḡitauḡeꞌohe zu ununuꞌa iriꞌaveꞌohe.
23.26: Ubuma kuruḡa Farisea azaḡa! Bio zu siuva zamaḡa ibite geno vuzuꞌe dehenoꞌi, ꞌougine enoga zuni deheraꞌuma.
23.27: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡa, zaꞌe zama guhi azaḡa! Aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Zaꞌe ꞌuruḡa hina asiroteꞌe rune iduḡa heuḡa. Rune iduḡa enoga ḡianine manoḡa tauḡi, rehano zamaḡaꞌe rune azaḡa isine zu torare niduꞌa iriꞌaveꞌohe.
23.28: Eꞌe teige, vazeꞌa zae enone daꞌo ḡiazadu zaꞌe duduḡa azaḡa rae raꞌohe, rehano zamazeꞌe zama guhi zu haḡai sauꞌaniꞌa iriꞌaveꞌohe.
23.29: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡa, zaꞌe zama guhi azaḡa! Aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Zaꞌe vouḡazeꞌa ibite zimiroteꞌe peroveta azaḡa rune iduḡa ogoruꞌohe, ebu haḡai duduḡa azaḡa rune iduḡa rohorohoneꞌohe.
23.30: Ebu zaꞌe ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Emeꞌa vouḡafe madaḡano radifone, zeḡeꞌa peroveta azaḡa goruzihi rae reirotene zeḡe teite mene tiburafo.'
23.31: ꞌOugadu za zaeꞌa bare peroveta azaḡa goruziroteꞌe azaḡa mariga rae fureneꞌohe.
23.32: Eꞌanoꞌo zae zuni vouḡaze teige haḡaoꞌi. Zeḡeꞌa ḡadahiroteꞌe gauḡa zaeꞌa haḡae hauḡoꞌi!
23.33: Zaꞌe mohe! Zarama ubugaubuga! Badiꞌaꞌa kotazadu zaꞌe ire roga radiu tuḡutuḡu zamaḡano mae feuziꞌuma ebu eꞌeanoꞌo feranogaꞌe mene idaraꞌuma.
23.34: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa peroveta azaḡa, huhuzaḡa azaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zae vaḡe tuḡuzeꞌohe. Rehano nuꞌe zaeꞌa goruziꞌuma, nuꞌe satauroziꞌuma ebu nuꞌe zae nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano masiziꞌuma zu haba ꞌahoganonoꞌo haba ꞌahoga ze hegotadu sausauziꞌuma.
23.35: Zaeꞌa raha ꞌada duduḡa azaḡa niduꞌa goruziro. Ze ibite duduḡa vazeḡa Abela mau runiroteꞌeanoꞌo onao ḡonagano Berekia ubuga Zekaria maro. Zekariaꞌe kuru neḡa zu dibuꞌo fataḡa boꞌaḡano mau runiro. ꞌOugadu eꞌe naeḡa niduꞌaꞌe zaeꞌa odohiꞌuma.
23.36: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, eꞌe aduga niduꞌaꞌe izidi eganiꞌa odohiꞌuma.” Ierusalema Aduga Hidiꞌuma (Luka 13:34-35)
23.37: “O, Ierusalema, Ierusalema, zaꞌa peroveta azaḡa zimiro zu Badiꞌaꞌa tuḡuziroteꞌe azaḡa hadi hina zimi ruziro. Kokorokuꞌa isaḡa zamaḡano ubuga gugubeꞌeteꞌe teige, eḡeꞌa ḡae ḡehaḡa zae taufihi reiro, rehano zaꞌe mene uratinu!
23.38: Ḡianoꞌi, neze fahadu haba bohaꞌa teigiꞌuma.
23.39: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, za e mene bare horohiꞌuma, onamo zaeꞌa raenaꞌa, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro niḡano areꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune,' rae reiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa meꞌuma.”

24.1: Iesuꞌa kuru neḡanonoꞌo buau onamirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ani vaḡe aradu kuru neḡa habaꞌano ne iraḡa nunu ihoniro.
24.2: ꞌOugadu aniꞌa ziro, “Za ḡau ꞌadi niduꞌa horoneꞌehe? Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, kuru neḡa ꞌadi fahe ḡuzuhadu hadini ꞌahoganiꞌa hadi ꞌahoga ranao mene radiꞌuma.” Mada Ḡonagano Haḡai Nu Badeḡa (Mareko 13:3-13; Luka 21:7-19)
24.3: Iesuꞌa Olivi Maḡano ehorirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe zeḡe daꞌo ani vaḡe sifu onamadu ḡadiniro, “Eꞌeguḡaniꞌa naniꞌa fureraꞌuma? Mada ḡonagano zu ḡaeꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡanoꞌe nagi haḡai nu badeḡaniꞌa ibite fureraꞌuma? Eme efoꞌi.”
24.4: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa za mene soꞌosoꞌozifine tohutohoꞌi.
24.5: Vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa eḡe niḡano aradu 'Eꞌe Keriso,' rae reꞌuma ebu vaze ḡehaḡa soꞌosoꞌoziꞌuma.
24.6: Zaꞌe utiutiꞌa fureraroteꞌe hariḡa zu fureraꞌuma rae raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa nunu igiꞌuma, rehano zamazeꞌa ago ꞌadaꞌadazoꞌi. Eꞌeguḡaniꞌa hube hune ibite fureraꞌuma, rehano ꞌize mene mada ḡonaga.
24.7: Haba ꞌahoganiꞌa haba ꞌahoga teite utitiꞌuma, zu gavamani ꞌahoganiꞌa gavamani ꞌahoga teite utitiꞌuma. Haba nunu zamaḡano zagaꞌa hiaꞌuma, zu habaꞌa borofe hagariꞌuma.
24.8: Eꞌeguḡa niduꞌaꞌe ene ꞌizema fureranogano gigiꞌaniꞌa ḡadahe fureruꞌeteꞌe heuḡa.
24.9: Ebu vazeꞌa za riꞌizadu sausauziꞌuma zu zimiꞌuma. Eḡe uꞌano, haba azaḡa niduꞌa zae heꞌeheꞌeziꞌuma.
24.10: Eꞌe madaḡano vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌeꞌa dauḡiꞌuma, revotitiꞌuma zu heꞌeheꞌetitiꞌuma.
24.11: Ebu ḡuriro peroveta azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa fureranadu vaze ḡehaḡa soꞌoziꞌuma.
24.12: Vaze sauꞌaniꞌa ufeta bororuꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa zeḡe negoze nabudize mene zamare borofiꞌuma.
24.13: Rehano iniu edau gigaru onamo ḡonaga meiteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone hidiꞌuma.
24.14: Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe hariḡa manoḡaꞌe raha ꞌadi niduꞌa zamaḡano haramadu habaꞌahabaꞌa azaḡa niduꞌa mazao rae fureniꞌuma. Ebu hena mada ḡonaganiꞌa ariꞌuma.” Aduga Boro Hune (Mareko 13:14-23; Luka 21:20-24)
24.15: “Ibite peroveta vazeḡa, Danielaꞌa ḡoeriroteꞌe teige, haba sausauneꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa sauꞌa bagaḡaniꞌa haba zaḡoḡano edauꞌeteꞌe zaꞌa horoniteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma (ꞌadi meꞌodeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, ḡoere huga ꞌadi faine ederoꞌi).
24.16: Eꞌe madaḡano Iudea habaꞌano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe maḡa ferau itoꞌi.
24.17: Iniuꞌa ne enogano radiuꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡauḡa mouga veize ne zamaḡa ago diuḡoꞌi.
24.18: Mebao hiheꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa zuni dabua mouga veize ago bare onamoꞌi.
24.19: Eꞌe madaḡano ahiꞌeta roḡaeḡa ebu nune hina ene guraḡa ḡubuzeꞌeteꞌe roḡaeḡaꞌe feranoga mene idaḡa radu aduga boro hidiꞌuma!
24.20: ꞌUguḡaniꞌa irugu madaḡano ga Bana Madaḡano mene fureranoga veize kuranoꞌi.
24.21: Mazaḡa eꞌe madaḡano vaze niduꞌa aduga boro hune hidiꞌuma. Badiꞌaꞌa ḡadaheḡano ḡau niduꞌa haḡairoteꞌeanoꞌo onao izidi aduga ꞌuguḡaniꞌa mene fureraro, ebu vesuꞌu zuni mene bare fureraꞌuma.
24.22: Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa eꞌe madaḡa mene futufine, vazeni ꞌahoga zuni mene ḡabode radiꞌuma. Rehano ani aneꞌa ohotiroteꞌe azaḡa veize eꞌe madaḡa futufiꞌuma.
24.23: Eꞌe madaḡano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa zinaꞌa, 'Ḡianoꞌi, Kerisoꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe!' ga 'Aniꞌe ꞌomo eꞌe!' rae zoꞌidene, ze ḡoere ago mae ḡihinoꞌi.
24.24: Mazaḡa ḡuriro kerisoḡa zu ḡuriro perovetaḡa azaḡaniꞌa fureranadu haḡai nu badeḡa boro bagaḡa zu haḡai gigiꞌa haḡaeꞌenaꞌa, vaze soꞌoziꞌuma. Ze idaḡa reine, Badiꞌaꞌa ohotiroteꞌe azaḡa zuni soꞌoziꞌuma.
24.25: Tohutohe radoꞌi. Eꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ꞌizema fureranogano eḡeꞌa ibite zae ihozeꞌohe.
24.26: Eꞌanoꞌo vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa zinaꞌa, 'Ḡianoꞌi, Kerisoꞌe haba bohaꞌano,' rae roꞌidene, ḡianihi radu ago onamoꞌi. Ga, 'Ḡianoꞌi, aniꞌe ne zamaḡano,' rae roꞌidene, eꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe ago mae ḡihinoꞌi.
24.27: Vaze Ubuganiꞌa bare arine, vaze niduꞌa huneꞌa horoniꞌuma. Aꞌe viriꞌa vazahadu madaꞌa iteꞌeteꞌe moneonoꞌo ovoeꞌeteꞌe moneo aganadu vaze niduꞌa tabara horoneꞌeteꞌe heuḡa.
24.28: Naginiꞌa rudaroteꞌe habaꞌano gaozaꞌa nuꞌoraꞌuma.” Vaze Ubuganiꞌa Ariꞌuma (Mareko 13:24-27; Luka 21:25-28)
24.29: “Aduga madaḡaniꞌa hauḡine, 'Zogone madaꞌa uzaboraꞌuma, batoꞌa mene agaraꞌuma, buzuvaꞌa adureonoꞌo rururu buaꞌuma, ebu adure gigiꞌaḡaniꞌa hagahagariꞌuma.'
24.30: Eꞌe madaḡano Vaze Ubuganiꞌa ariteꞌe ihozeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa nu badeḡaniꞌa adureo fureraꞌuma, ebu raha ꞌadao habaꞌahabaꞌa azaḡa niduꞌa niau ḡouriꞌuma. Ebu ze Vaze Ubuganiꞌa gigiꞌaḡa boro zu agaḡa boro hune madu adureo ḡoze hina areꞌeteꞌe horoniꞌuma.
24.31: Ebu bigoro ago boro zamaḡano aniꞌa ane tuḡure viga ḡehaḡa tuḡuziꞌuma, ebu zeḡeꞌa adure ḡonaga ꞌahaonoꞌo onamo adure ḡonaga ꞌomo, haba niduꞌa zamaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa ohotiroteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌoziꞌuma.” Figi Ireḡa Hari Idaidaḡa (Mareko 13:28-31; Luka 21:29-33)
24.32: “Figi ireḡa ḡianadu ꞌahi ederoꞌi. Ezaganiꞌa butiru itadu rouḡaniꞌa udufaꞌoga horoneꞌetene, zaꞌe edeḡa, irugu madaḡaniꞌa haniteha.
24.33: Eꞌe teige, ꞌahiguḡaniꞌa fureranoga horonoꞌidene, Vaze Ubuganiꞌa zae ibihetao haniteha rae ederoꞌi.
24.34: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, izidi egaꞌe mene hauḡiꞌuma, onamo ꞌahiguḡa niduꞌa fureraꞌuma.
24.35: Adure zu rahaꞌe hauḡiꞌuma, rehano eḡe ḡoereꞌe mene hune hauḡiꞌuma.” Vaze Ubuganiꞌa Ariteꞌe Madaḡa veize Ruhibe Radoꞌi (Mareko 13:32-37; Luka 17:26-30, 34-36)
24.36: “Rehano vazeni ꞌahoga zuni ꞌuguḡaniꞌa fureratiteꞌe madaḡaꞌe aḡuꞌa. Adureo tuḡure viga ebu Badiꞌa Ubuga zuni aḡuꞌa, rehano Moga daꞌo edeḡa.
24.37: Vaze Ubuganiꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡaꞌe Noa madaḡa teigiꞌuma.
24.38: Zobo boroꞌa ꞌizema zubuzogano, vaze niduꞌa iḡaiḡa haḡainuteꞌe teige ogaunu, gaginu zu hahurinu, onamo Noaꞌa ḡasi boro diuḡiro.
24.39: Rehano ze naginiꞌa fureraꞌuma mene ederiro, onamo zobo boroꞌa zubuzadu hunuhune ḡouriro. Vaze Ubuganiꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡaꞌe eꞌe madaḡa teigiꞌuma.
24.40: Eꞌe madaḡano vaze aheuꞌa mebao gaue radiuꞌeteꞌea, ꞌahogaꞌe zamahanadu onamiꞌuma, u ꞌahogaꞌe muhine iḡuniꞌuma.
24.41: Roḡae aheuꞌe ꞌuvahu mirune radiuꞌeteꞌea, ꞌahogaꞌe zamahanadu onamiꞌuma, u ꞌahogaꞌe muhine iḡuniꞌuma.
24.42: Eꞌanoꞌo tohutohoꞌi, mazaḡa zaꞌe aḡuꞌa, noꞌe madaḡano zae Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ariꞌuma.
24.43: ꞌAdi zamaroꞌi. Ḡonore vazeḡaniꞌa ohere noꞌe madaḡano aritaꞌaꞌe ne vazeḡaniꞌa ederifone, aniꞌe evate radiuꞌenaꞌa neḡa faine taufadu ḡonore vazeḡaniꞌa diuḡogaꞌe mene idarafo.
24.44: Eꞌanoꞌo zae zuni ruhibe radoꞌi, mazaḡa Vaze Ubugaꞌe zaeꞌa mene zamareꞌeteꞌe madaḡano ariꞌuma.” Tuḡure Azaḡa Aheu Hari Idaidaḡa (Luka 12:41-48)
24.45: “Iniuꞌe vaze huhuzaḡa zu zamaḡa niduꞌa hina gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa? Tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahogaꞌe vaze ꞌuguḡa reine, zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa aniꞌe tuḡure vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡano mae ohonadu ꞌahige rae niꞌuma, 'Tuḡure azaḡa niduꞌa taufoꞌi. Ogomuze zuni mada idunane zenoꞌi.'
24.46: Ebu tuḡure vazeḡa eꞌeꞌa ꞌouge gauine ebu zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa bare feuradu horonine, tuḡure vazeḡa aꞌe matuꞌe rudaꞌuma.
24.47: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, aniꞌe zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa ane tohe niduꞌa taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡano ohoniꞌuma.
24.48: Rehano tuḡure vazeḡa aꞌe sauꞌa reine, ani aneꞌa bare ꞌahige zamariꞌuma, 'Eḡe zuhiꞌaꞌe vesuꞌu faḡanobuꞌu ariꞌuma.'
24.49: Ebu tuḡure azaḡa niduꞌa bouziꞌuma zu gagone azaḡa teite ufeta ogau gage sautaꞌuma.
24.50: Ebu aniꞌa mene zamareꞌeteꞌe zu mene edereꞌeteꞌe madaḡano zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa bare aradu,
24.51: ani ahiri variꞌe tahitahiꞌuma ebu zama niduꞌa hina mene gaueꞌeteꞌe azaḡa habaꞌano ohonadu aduga boro haꞌuma. Eꞌea ani niaꞌuma zu ḡononeḡa atitiꞌuma.”

25.1: Iesuꞌa bare reiro, “Eꞌe madaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe nogoba gaubanana teigiꞌuma. Ze ihureze madu hahu ohoze iziga hidoga veize onamiro.
25.2: Zeḡe boꞌaḡano fuꞌoꞌe kauriḡa ebu fuꞌoꞌe huhuzaḡa.
25.3: Nogoba kauriḡa fuꞌoꞌe ihureze odohiro, rehano ihure vuḡaꞌe mene meiro.
25.4: U nogoba huhuzaḡa fuꞌoꞌe ihurezeta ihure vuḡa biozeo abe odohiro.
25.5: Ebu hahu ohoze iziganiꞌa mene ḡarihe arirotene, ze ubumaze anozadu bazubazu uhiro.
25.6: Ohere nemanema ze ago ꞌahoga igiro, 'Hahu ohoze iziganiꞌa feureha! Buanadu ani hidoꞌi!'
25.7: ꞌOugirotene nogoba niduꞌa evatadu ihureze ruhibiro.
25.8: Ebu nogoba kauriḡa fuꞌoꞌa nogoba huhuzaḡa fuꞌo umiziro, 'Za ihure vuḡa nuḡo eme rifoꞌi, mazaḡa eme ihureꞌe vidauꞌohe.'
25.9: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeziro, 'Mene, 'ahiꞌe za zu emeḡe niduꞌa veize mene idaḡa. Ihure vuḡa seroneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa vaḡe onamadu zae veize nu hoitoꞌi.'
25.10: Rehano ze ihureze vuḡa hoitoga uꞌa onamiroteꞌea, hahu ohoze iziganiꞌa feuriro. Ebu ihureze zu ihureze vuḡa ruhibiroteꞌe nogobaḡa fuꞌoꞌa ani teite mui habaꞌa diuḡiro ebu ibihetaḡaꞌe hararo.
25.11: Vesuꞌu nogoba kauriḡa fuꞌoꞌa feuradu reiro, 'Vaze boro! Vaze boro! Ibiheta vavaofoꞌi!'
25.12: Rehano aneꞌa naenaeziro, 'Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, e za aḡuꞌa.'
25.13: Eꞌanoꞌo tohutohe radoꞌi, mazaḡa eḡeꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡaꞌe zaꞌe aḡuꞌa.” Tuḡure Azaḡa Uḡidu Hari Idaidaḡa (Luka 19:11-27)
25.14: “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe haba faḡa ragaveꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoga heuḡa. Aniꞌa iḡunirotene, tuḡureḡa azaḡa ane ḡau niduꞌa zenadu faine taufoꞌi rae reiro.
25.15: Zeḡe tibatiba inaraze idunaḡano, ꞌahogaꞌe hadi silivaḡa fuse fuꞌo, ꞌahogaꞌe fuse aheu ebu ꞌahogaꞌe fuse tiba ziniro. Ebu aniꞌa haba faḡa ragaviro.
25.16: Hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa fuꞌo meiroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe zogone onamadu eꞌe hadiḡa hina gauiro, ebu hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa fuꞌo ragate hidiro.
25.17: Hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa aheu meiroteꞌe vazeḡa zuni ꞌouge haḡadu hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa aheu ragate hidiro.
25.18: Rehano hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa tiba meiroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe onamadu rahao idu huꞌiro, ebu zuhiꞌaḡa hadi eꞌea gure ꞌuꞌuru tiro.
25.19: Mada faḡa ḡarugano tuḡure azaḡa zuhiꞌazeꞌa bariro. Ebu zeḡeꞌa ane hadi hina nougenouge gauiroteꞌe ederifine huziro.
25.20: Hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa fuꞌo meiroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa hadi fuseḡa fuꞌo bare ragate hidirotaꞌaꞌe odohe aradu niro, 'Zuhiꞌa, ḡaꞌa hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa fuꞌo iniro. Ḡianoꞌi, eḡeꞌa hadi eꞌe hina gauadu hadi fuseḡa fuꞌo ragate hidiro.'
25.21: Zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa niro, 'Manoḡa tauḡi, ḡaꞌe tuḡure vazeḡa manoḡa zu zamaḡo niduꞌa hina gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa! Ḡaeꞌa gau komeꞌa zamaḡo niduꞌa hina faine odohe gauiro ꞌahine, eḡeꞌa ḡau ḡehaḡa taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡano ohoꞌiꞌuma. Aroꞌi, zuhiꞌaḡo teite matuꞌihi.'
25.22: Ebu hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa aheu meiroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa aradu niro, 'Zuhiꞌa, ḡaꞌa hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa aheu iniro. Ḡianoꞌi, eḡeꞌa hadi eꞌe hina gauadu hadi fuseḡa aheu ragate hidiro.'
25.23: Zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa niro, 'Manoḡa tauḡi, ḡaꞌe tuḡure vazeḡa manoḡa zu zamaḡo niduꞌa hina gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa! Ḡaeꞌa gau komeꞌa zamaḡo niduꞌa hina faine odohe gauiro ꞌahine, eḡeꞌa ḡau ḡehaḡa taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡano ohoꞌiꞌuma. Aroꞌi, zuhiꞌaḡo teite matuꞌihi.'
25.24: Rehano hadi siliva fuseḡa tiba meiroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa aradu niro, 'Zuhiꞌa, ḡaꞌe vaze riḡa. E ederiro, vazeꞌa ḡoraroteꞌe ḡauḡa ḡaeꞌa hiriveꞌohe, ebu vazeꞌa feune ḡoraroteꞌe ezoneḡa ḡaeꞌa hirive nuꞌoneꞌohe.
25.25: Eꞌanoꞌo e ḡa rihoꞌadu rahao gure tiro. Ḡae hadi ꞌahi bare moꞌi.'
25.26: Zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa naenaeniro, 'Ḡaꞌe tuḡure vazeḡa sauꞌa ebu tubuḡa! Ḡaꞌe vazeꞌa ḡoraroteꞌe ḡauḡa eḡeꞌa hiriveꞌohe ebu vazeꞌa feune ḡoraroteꞌe ezoneḡa eḡeꞌa hirive nuꞌoneꞌohe rae ederirohe?
25.27: ꞌOugirotene, ḡa nougadu hadi tiꞌeteꞌe neḡano eḡe hadi mene tiro? ꞌOugifone, e bare aradu eḡe hadi ufeta ragate meifo.'
25.28: Hena zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa tuḡure azaḡa ziro, 'Hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa tiba ani mazaonoꞌo bare madu hadi silivaḡa fuseḡa gaubanana meiroteꞌe vazeḡa hanoꞌi.
25.29: Iniuꞌa nagini hidiroteꞌe faine odohe gauine, ani bare ufeta borofe hidiꞌuma. Rehano iniuꞌa nagini hidiroteꞌe mene faine odohe gauine, ani mazao nagini komeꞌa zuni meiniꞌuma.
25.30: Ebu tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌadiꞌe eḡe veize mene faine gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahine, enona uzabo zamaḡano mae feunoꞌi. Eꞌea ani niaꞌuma ebu ḡonoga atitiꞌuma.'” Badiꞌa Kota Ḡonaga
25.31: Ebu Iesuꞌa reiro, “Vaze Ubuganiꞌa niḡa mae ḡihineꞌenaꞌa, tuḡure viga niduꞌa teite arine, aniꞌe ane ehoro habaꞌa, kini ehoro habaꞌa ḡihiꞌaḡano ehoriꞌuma.
25.32: Aniꞌa habaꞌahabaꞌa azaḡa niduꞌa ane zamao nuꞌozadu mamoe taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa mamoeꞌe gouti mazaonoꞌo rovozeꞌeteꞌe teige, ze rovoziꞌuma.
25.33: Ebu iniu vaze mamoe heuḡaꞌe ane edaꞌe moneo zu iniu vaze gouti heuḡaꞌe ane kauri moneo ohoziꞌuma.
25.34: Ebu hena kinizeꞌa edaꞌe mone azaḡa ziꞌuma, 'Zaꞌe eḡe Mama mazaonoꞌo manohuga meiroteꞌe azaḡa. Aroꞌi ebu eḡeꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano radoꞌi. Eꞌe habaꞌaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa ḡau niduꞌa haḡairoteꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo ruhiniro.
25.35: Mazaḡa e vinihirotene zaeꞌa ogomu inido, zu e irinehe moꞌohirotene zaeꞌa vu inido, ebu e iꞌudo vazeḡa reirotene zaeꞌa zae neo huhe zouhido.
25.36: Dabuahe oꞌoꞌa reirotene zaeꞌa dabua inido, zu e ugihirotene zaeꞌa eḡe taufido, ebu e ḡuꞌa neḡano radirotene zaeꞌa ḡiahi ariro.'
25.37: Ebu duduḡa azaḡaniꞌa naenaeniꞌuma, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro, eme naniꞌa ḡaꞌe viniꞌiroteꞌe horo'adu ogomu ḡanido? Naniꞌa eme ḡaꞌe irigo moꞌoꞌiroteꞌe horoꞌadu vu ḡanido?
25.38: Naniꞌa eme ḡaꞌe iꞌudo vazeḡa reiroteꞌe horoꞌadu neo huḡade zouꞌido? Naniꞌa eme dabuaḡo ꞌoꞌoꞌa reiroteꞌe horoꞌadu dabua ḡanido?
25.39: Naniꞌa eme ḡa ugiꞌiroteꞌe ga ḡuꞌa neḡano radiroteꞌe horoꞌadu ḡa ḡiaꞌi amido?'
25.40: Ebu kinizeꞌa naenaeziꞌuma, 'Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zaeꞌa eḡe nego nabudi ꞌahi boꞌaḡano ḡonaga vazeḡa ꞌahoga veize ꞌouge haḡairotaꞌaꞌe eḡe veize haḡairoteꞌe heuḡa.'
25.41: Ebu kinizeꞌa vaetadu kauri mone azaḡa ziꞌuma, 'Zaꞌe aduga tuḡutuḡu meiroteꞌe azaḡa, eḡe mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi, ebu Satani zu ane tuḡure viga niduꞌa veize ruhiniroteꞌe ire rogaḡa radiu tuḡutuḡu zamaḡa diuḡoꞌi.
25.42: Mazaḡa e vinihirotene zaeꞌa ogomu mene inido, zu e irinehe moꞌohirotene zaeꞌa vu mene inido.
25.43: E iꞌudo vazeḡa reirotene zaeꞌa neo mene huhe zouhido, zu e dabuahe oꞌoꞌa reirotene zaeꞌa dabua mene inido, ebu e ugihirotene zu ḡuꞌa neḡano radirotene, zaeꞌa e mene taufido.'
25.44: ꞌOugadu zeꞌa naenaeniꞌuma, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro, naniꞌa eme ḡaꞌe viniꞌiroteꞌe ga irigo moꞌoꞌiroteꞌe ga iꞌudo vazeḡa reiroteꞌe ga dabuaḡo ꞌoꞌoꞌa reiroteꞌe ga ugiꞌiroteꞌe ga ḡuꞌa neḡano radiroteꞌe horoꞌadu mene danaꞌido?'
25.45: Ebu kinizeꞌa naenaeziꞌuma, 'Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, ꞌahi azaḡa boꞌaḡano ḡonaga vazeḡa ꞌahoga veize mene haḡairotaꞌaꞌe eḡe veize mene haḡairoteꞌe heuḡa.'
25.46: Eꞌanoꞌo kauri mone azaḡaꞌe aduga tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma, u duduḡa azaḡaꞌe ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma.”

26.1: Iesuꞌa ḡoere eꞌe niduꞌa rae hauḡirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro,
26.2: “Zaꞌe edeḡa, mada aheu enogano Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa meꞌuma ebu Vaze Ubugaꞌe satauronoga veize agire ꞌevora riꞌiniꞌuma.”
26.3: Eꞌe madaḡano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa, niḡa Kaiafa neo nuꞌoraro.
26.4: Ebu ze Iesu soꞌonadu obone teadu manoga veize ibiḡa ḡoꞌane vaḡiro.
26.5: Rehano ze zeḡeꞌa bare reiro, “Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa madaḡanoꞌe mene idaḡa, mazaḡa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa utitofiꞌuma.” Roḡae ꞌAhoganiꞌa Dehoro Hohoḡa Iesu rana Beuꞌiro (Mareko 14:3-9; Ioane 12:1-8)
26.6: Iesuꞌe Betania neḡano ibite referaꞌa meiroteꞌe vazeḡa, niḡa Simona neo radiunu.
26.7: Aniꞌa ogomu fataḡa zamao tave ehoreꞌenaꞌa ogauꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano, roḡae ꞌahoganiꞌa dehoro hohoḡa manoḡa naeḡa boroꞌe bioḡa komeꞌa manohuga iriꞌavonadu mae ariro, ebu Iesu vadinio beuꞌiro.
26.8: Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa eꞌe horonirotene, ze maḡune rudaro ebu niro, “Nougadu dehoro hohoḡa ꞌahiꞌe mode hauḡeha?
26.9: Aꞌe hadi boro hina seronadu zahara azaḡa zinifo.”
26.10: Iesuꞌa eꞌe horonadu ziro, “Za nougadu roḡae ꞌadi aduga hauꞌohe? Aniꞌe eḡe veize manohuga haḡaeha.
26.11: Zahara azaḡaꞌe iḡaiḡa zae teite radiꞌuma, u eꞌe iḡaiḡa zae teite mene radiꞌuma.
26.12: Aniꞌe eḡeꞌa rudanadu guriteꞌe madaḡa ruhiboga veize dehoro hohoḡa eḡe ahiri rana beuꞌeha.
26.13: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, raha niduꞌa zamaḡano noꞌe habaꞌano hari manoḡa haramine, aniꞌa haḡateꞌe haḡaiḡa ꞌahi meꞌodadu ani zamariꞌuma.” Iudaꞌa Iesu Revohaꞌuma rae Ḡoitoriro (Mareko 14:10-11; Luka 22:3-6)
26.14: Eꞌe enogano Iesu tahiꞌaḡa gaubanana aheu fare boꞌaḡano tahiꞌa ꞌahoga, Isakariota vazeḡa Iudaꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa vaḡe onamiro,
26.15: ebu ḡadiziro, “E Iesu zae ꞌevoreo riꞌinine, za nagini iniꞌuma?” ꞌOugirotene ze hadi silivaḡa 30 meꞌodadu haro.
26.16: Eꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo aniꞌa Iesu zeḡe ꞌevoreo riꞌinoga veize mada manoḡa ꞌahoga vaḡiro. Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa Ogomuḡa Aro (Mareko 14:12-21; Luka 22:7-14, 21-23; Ioane 13:21-30)
26.17: Isiti Oꞌoꞌa ꞌUvahuḡa Odoga Muiḡa zamaḡano mada ibiꞌaꞌe Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa. Eꞌe madaḡa meirotene, Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ane vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Ḡa urao eme Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ogomuḡaꞌe nouma ruhibe tiꞌuma?”
26.18: Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Ne boro diuḡadu vaze ꞌahoga vaḡoꞌi ebu noꞌi, 'Ihore vazeḡaniꞌa ꞌahige raꞌohe: Eḡe mada ꞌai haniteha. E eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite ḡae neo Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ogomuḡa au tiburaꞌuma.'”
26.19: Eꞌanoꞌo Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe Iesuꞌa ziroteꞌe idunaḡano Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ruhibe tiro.
26.20: Ḡoravararotene, Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare teite ogomu fataḡa babaḡano ehoriro.
26.21: Ebu ze ogauꞌeteꞌea Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zae boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa eḡe revoniꞌuma.”
26.22: Ebu ze zamaze adudanadu zeḡezeḡeꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eꞌe mene, ineo?”
26.23: Aneꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡe teite idaḡa siuvao ꞌevoꞌa tare auꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa revoniꞌuma.
26.24: Vaze Ubuga moneo Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌe idunaḡano Vaze Ubuganiꞌa rudaꞌuma. Rehano ani revohatiteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe aduga boro hidiꞌuma. Aniꞌe mene furerafone ufeta manoḡa reifo.”
26.25: Ebu ani revohatiteꞌe vazeḡa, Iudaꞌa niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, eꞌe mene, ineo?” Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Aꞌe ḡae.” Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa Ane Tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite Ogomu Ḡonaga Aro (Mareko 14:22-26; Luka 22:15-20; 1Korinto 11:23-25)
26.26: Ze ogauꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano, Iesuꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga madu kuraro ebu vahegadu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziniro. Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “ꞌAdi madu anoꞌi. ꞌAdiꞌe eḡe ahiri.”
26.27: Ebu aniꞌa vaini vuḡa bioḡa madu kuraroteꞌe ḡarugano ziniro. Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “Zae niduꞌa, ꞌahi gagoꞌi.
26.28: Vaini vuḡa bioḡa ꞌadiꞌe eḡe ru. Aꞌe eḡeꞌa vaze ḡehaḡa haḡaize sauꞌa rae modoga veize ruhe beꞌunadu ohoneꞌeteꞌe ḡoitore ḡoeꞌa.
26.29: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, eꞌe vaini vuḡa mene bare gagiꞌuma, onamo eḡe Mamaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡano zae teite vaini vuḡa iziga gagiꞌuma.”
26.30: Ebu ze bada ꞌahoga mae hauḡadu Olivi Maḡa onamiro. Peteroꞌa Iesu Oꞌoniꞌuma rae Reiro (Mareko 14:27-31; Luka 22:31-34; Ioane 13:36-38)
26.31: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Izidi ohere zae niduꞌa eḡe muhihe feraꞌuma. Mazaḡa Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Badiꞌaꞌa mamoe taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa mau runiꞌuma, ebu mamoeḡaꞌe ferau ḡouriꞌuma.'
26.32: Rehano eḡeꞌa runeonoꞌo bare ḡaboditeꞌe enogano zae zamao Galilea habaꞌa onamiꞌuma.”
26.33: Peteroꞌa Iesu niro, “Vaze niduꞌa ferau muhiꞌiꞌuma rehano, eꞌe mene hune ferau muhiꞌiꞌuma!”
26.34: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ḡaꞌohe, izidi ohere ꞌizema kokorokuꞌa uganogano ḡaeꞌa ḡae uḡidu eḡe oꞌohiꞌuma.”
26.35: Rehano Peteroꞌa niro, “E mene oꞌoꞌiꞌuma. Ḡae teite rudaune zuni idaḡa!” Ebu ane tahiꞌaḡa niduꞌa zuni ꞌouge reiro. Getesemane Habaꞌano Kuraro (Mareko 14:32-42; Luka 22:39-46)
26.36: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite haba ꞌahoga, niḡa Getesemane onamadu ziro, “ꞌAda ehore radoꞌi, u eꞌe kuranoga veize ꞌomo onamiꞌuma.”
26.37: Ebu aniꞌe Petero ebu Zebedeo ubuga aheu, Iakobo zu Ioane tutuze onamiro. Ani zamaḡa ḡadahe ariro zu adudaro.
26.38: ꞌOugadu aniꞌa ziro, “Zamahe are rudauꞌohe. Zaꞌe ꞌada radadu eḡe teite evate radoꞌi.”
26.39: Ebu ani tahiḡa faḡa onamiro zu rahao ḡuḡuradu kuraro, “Eḡe Mama, ḡa idaḡa roꞌidene, eḡe mazaonoꞌo bio aduga ꞌadi mae vaḡinoꞌi. Rehano eḡe mene urao, ḡae urao daꞌo haḡaoꞌi.”
26.40: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa vaḡe bare arirotene, ze bazeꞌeteꞌe horoziro. Ebu aniꞌa Petero niro, “Za mada tahiḡa zuni eḡe teite evate radoga mene idaḡahe?
26.41: Sataniꞌa tuhuzadu zaeꞌa mene uitifine tohutohoꞌi zu kuranoꞌi. Zamazeꞌe urateꞌohe, rehano ahirizeꞌe taoḡa.”
26.42: Ebu Iesuꞌa bare onamadu ḡae aheuḡano kuraro, “Eḡe Mama, e bio ꞌahi hube hune gage huniꞌuma roꞌidene, ḡae ura haḡaoꞌi.”
26.43: Aniꞌa bare arirotene, ze bare bazeꞌeteꞌe horoziro, mazaḡa ubumazeꞌa ufeta anoziro.
26.44: Aniꞌa ze muhizadu bare onamiro ebu ibite kuraroteꞌe teige ḡae uḡiduḡano bare kuraro.
26.45: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa vaḡe bare aradu ziro, “Za ꞌize bazeꞌehe zu ahirize ohoneꞌehe? Ḡiꞌanoꞌi, madaḡa ꞌai maha, ebu Vaze Ubugaꞌe haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌiniꞌuma.
26.46: Iḡunadu onamihi. Ḡianoꞌi, eḡe revoniteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌai feureha.” Iesu Obone Tiro (Mareko 14:43-50; Luka 22:47-53; Ioane 18:3-12)
26.47: Iesuꞌa ꞌize ḡoereꞌeteꞌea, Iesu tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga, Iudaꞌa feuriro. Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa tuḡuziroteꞌe azaḡa ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa benisi zu somori boro madu Iuda teite ariro.
26.48: Ebu Iesu revoharoteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe aneꞌa nougenouge haḡaiteꞌe moneo ibite ihoziro, “Eḡeꞌa furaꞌiniteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Iesu. Ani obone toꞌi.”
26.49: Ebu aniꞌa zogone Iesu vaḡe onamadu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa! Manoḡahe?” Ebu aniꞌa furaꞌiniro.
26.50: Iesuꞌa niro, “Eḡe vaze, ḡa ꞌahao nagini haḡaiteꞌe haḡaiḡa haḡaoꞌi.” Ebu Iuda teite ariroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa onamadu Iesu obone tiro.
26.51: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesu ḡati vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa benisiḡa ahase bunadu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa tuḡure vazeḡa udirotene teḡaḡa variꞌe butiro.
26.52: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa niro, “Benisiḡo bare iḡuꞌano ofoꞌi! Benisi hina vaze matihi raꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe zeḡe zuni benisi uꞌano rudaꞌuma.
26.53: Eḡeꞌa Mamahe uminine, aneꞌa tuḡure viga ḡehaḡa bagaḡa zogone tuḡuzadu emeḡe biriꞌuma. Za eḡeꞌa ꞌouge uminoga idaḡa rae mene zamareꞌehe?
26.54: Rehano e ꞌougine, Buka Zaḡoḡano eḡe mazao ꞌahiguḡaniꞌa fureraꞌuma rae reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa mene hudaꞌuma.”
26.55: Ebu Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ziro, “Zaꞌe ḡonore vazeḡa obone tiꞌeteꞌe teige, benisi ebu somori boro madu eḡe obohe touga veize arahe? Mada niduꞌa eꞌe kuru neḡa habaꞌano ihore radiunu. Eꞌe madaḡano zaꞌe mene obohe tiro.
26.56: Rehano peroveta azaḡaniꞌa mirihiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudafine ꞌahiguḡaniꞌa fureraneha.” ꞌOugirotene ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa niduꞌaꞌe Iesu muhine feraro. Iesuꞌe Kotao Ohoniro (Mareko 14:53-65; Luka 22:54-55, 63-71; Ioane 18:12-14, 19-24)
26.57: Ebu Iesu obone tiroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa Kaiafa vaḡe tutune onamiro. Eꞌea Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa nuꞌoranadu radiunu.
26.58: U Peteroꞌe faḡanonoꞌo Iesu hegotadu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa ne habaꞌano feuriro. Ebu naginiꞌa fureratiteꞌe ḡianoga veize ne habaꞌa diuḡadu eꞌe neḡa ḡianeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teite ehoriro.
26.59: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo boro azaḡaniꞌa Iesu manoga veize ani moneo ḡuriro ḡoeꞌaḡoeꞌa vaḡiro.
26.60: Ebu vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa aradu Iesu moneo ḡuriro ḡoeꞌa rae fureniro, rehano ze ani veꞌoḡaꞌe mene horoniro. Ḡonagano vaze aheuꞌa iḡune edaro.
26.61: Ebu ze ꞌahige rae fureniro, “Vaze ꞌadaꞌa raenaꞌa, 'Eḡeꞌa Badiꞌa kuru neḡa fahadu mada uḡidu zamaḡano bare ogoranogaꞌe idaḡa,' rae reiro.”
26.62: ꞌOuge reirotene, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa edau iḡunadu Iesu niro, “Zeꞌa ḡaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae fureneꞌohe. Ḡa zeḡe ḡoere mene naenaeniꞌumahe?”
26.63: Rehano Iesuꞌe sifu radiro. Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa niro, “E ḡabode radiuꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa niḡano riḡa ḡadimuꞌohe. Ḡaꞌe Keriso, Badiꞌa Ubuga ga mene? Efoꞌi.”
26.64: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Oꞌe, ḡaeꞌa eꞌe Keriso rae raha. Rehano eḡeꞌa zae niduꞌa ziꞌohe, zama moneo Vaze Ubugaꞌe Gigiꞌa Boro Badiꞌaḡa edaꞌe moneo ehoradu zuhiꞌaziteꞌe zu adureo ḡoze hina ariteꞌe horoniꞌuma.”
26.65: ꞌOuge reirotene, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa dabuaḡa zegadu ziro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe Badiꞌa rae sausauneha! Eme aniꞌe veꞌoḡa rae raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa bare vaḡiꞌumahe? Izidi aniꞌa Badiꞌa rae sausaunateꞌe zae niduꞌa egeha.
26.66: Zaꞌe nouge rae zamareꞌohe?” Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Ani runeo tuḡuniꞌuma!”
26.67: Ebu zeꞌa Iesu iraḡa rana soꞌabide vaniro zu ꞌevoreze hina bouniro. Vaze nuꞌa ubumaḡa dabua hina ꞌuadu faꞌone arahiro,
26.68: “Keriso, efoꞌi. Iniuꞌa faꞌoꞌeha?” Peteroꞌa Iesu Oꞌoniro (Mareko 14:66-72; Luka 22:56-62; Ioane 18:15-18, 25-27)
26.69: Ebu Peteroꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa ne habaꞌano ehore radiroteꞌea, tuḡure roḡaeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ane uꞌa aradu niro, “Ḡae zuni Galilea vazeḡa Iesu teite radiunu.”
26.70: Rehano Peteroꞌa zeḡe niduꞌa zamao oꞌoniro, “E ḡaꞌa nagini raꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa.”
26.71: Ebu Peteroꞌa ne ḡabiriḡa ibihetaḡa uꞌa onamirotene, tuḡure roḡaeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa horonadu eꞌea radiunuteꞌe azaḡa ziro, “ꞌAdiꞌe Nazareta vazeḡa Iesu teite radiunu.”
26.72: Ebu Peteroꞌa bare oꞌonadu ḡoere rinede tiro, “Eꞌe vaze aꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa!”
26.73: Mada tahiḡa enogano eꞌea edau radiunuteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Petero vaḡe aradu niro, “Hube hune ḡa zu Iesu duḡuru boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga, mazaḡa ḡae ago iraḡaꞌe Galilea habaꞌa ago iraḡa.”
26.74: Ebu ani ḡoere rinede teadu reiro, “E ḡuririne aduga hidiꞌuma! E vaze aꞌe aḡuꞌa!” Ani Ꞌouge reirotene, kokorokuꞌa ugaro.
26.75: Ebu Peteroꞌe Iesuꞌa ꞌahige rae niroteꞌe zamariro, “Kokorokuꞌa ꞌizema uganogano ḡaeꞌa eḡe ḡae uḡidu oꞌohiꞌuma.” Ebu aniꞌa ne enogano buanadu niau rudaro.

27.1: Oherebau uzeuze dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa nuꞌoranadu Iesu manoga veize ḡoere idaniro.
27.2: Ze ani autadu Roma gavana vazeḡa Pilato vaḡe tutune onamiro ebu ane ꞌevora riꞌiniro. Iudaꞌa Ane Bare Bodaniro (Apostolo 1:18-19)
27.3: Iesu revoharoteꞌe vazeḡa Iudaꞌa Iesuꞌe runeo tuḡuniꞌuma rae reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa igirotene, ani haḡaiḡa sauꞌa uꞌano aneꞌa bare zamaḡaniꞌa adudaro. Eꞌanoꞌo siliva hadiḡa 30 madu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze boroboro bare ziniro.
27.4: Ebu aneꞌa ziro, “E haḡai sauꞌa haḡaeha, mazaḡa eḡeꞌa haḡai sauꞌa oꞌoꞌa vazeḡa revohanadu ani runeo tuḡuneha.” ꞌOugadu zeḡeꞌa niro, “Aꞌe emeḡeꞌa mene haḡaeha, rehano ḡaeꞌa bare haḡaeha. Ḡae edeḡano haḡaoꞌi.”
27.5: ꞌOugirotene, Iudaꞌa kuru neḡa zamaḡano hadiḡa feuniro ebu onamadu aneꞌa bare bodane runiro.
27.6: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa hadiḡa madu reiro, “Hadi ꞌadiꞌe vaze matihi radu haroteꞌe hadiḡa ꞌahine, kuru neḡa hadiḡa teite tibune tougaꞌe mene idaḡa.”
27.7: Zeḡeꞌa ꞌouge ḡoꞌaniroteꞌe enogano, eꞌe hadiḡa hina ḡoḡore haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa haba ꞌahoga hoitadu eꞌe habaꞌano avoꞌa azaḡa guriꞌuma rae reiro.
27.8: Eꞌanoꞌo haba aꞌe Ru Habaꞌa rae hunadu izidi zuni deꞌuge rae huneꞌohe.
27.9: ꞌOugadu Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta vazeḡa Ieremiaonoꞌo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro, “Zeḡeꞌa siliva hadiḡa 30 meiro. Aꞌe Isaraela azaḡaniꞌa vaze eꞌe naeḡa rae ohoniroteꞌe hadiḡa.
27.10: Ebu Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ihiroteꞌe teige, zeꞌa hadi eꞌe hina ḡoḡore haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa haba hoitiro.” Iesuꞌe Pilato zamao Kotaniro (Mareko 15:2-5; Luka 23:3-5; Ioane 18:33-38)
27.11: Ebu Iesuꞌe Roma gavana vazeḡa Pilato zamao edau radiro. Ebu Pilatoꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe Iuda azaḡa kinihe?” Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Oꞌe, ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare eꞌe kini rae raha.”
27.12: Rehano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa Iesuꞌe veꞌoḡa rae riḡa ḡoerirotene, Iesuꞌe mene naenaeziro.
27.13: Hena Pilatoꞌa ḡadiniro, “Zeꞌa ḡaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ḡehaḡa rae fureneꞌohe. Ḡa mene igiꞌehe?”
27.14: Rehano Iesuꞌa zeḡe ḡoere tiba zuni mene naenaeziro. ꞌOugadu Pilatoꞌa zaguzagau huniro. Iesu Runeo Tuḡuniꞌuma Reiro (Mareko 15:6-15; Luka 23:13-25; Ioane 18:39-19:16)
27.15: Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa madaḡano Roma gavana vazeḡaꞌe Iuda azaḡaniꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe ḡuꞌa vazeḡa ꞌahoga tuḡune bunido.
27.16: Eꞌe madaḡano ḡuꞌa neḡano vaze ꞌahoga, niḡa Barabasiꞌa radiunu. Vaze niduꞌa ani ederiro.
27.17: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa nuꞌorarotene, Pilatoꞌa ḡadiziro, “Za uraꞌe eḡeꞌa iniu tuḡune buniꞌuma, Barabasi ga Keriso raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa Iesu?”
27.18: Mazaḡa Pilatoꞌe zeꞌa Iesu ahiahiniroteꞌe uꞌano, ani riꞌinirotaꞌaꞌe ederiro.
27.19: Pilatoꞌa kota habaꞌano ehorinuteꞌe zamaḡano inuganiꞌa ani veize ḡoere tuḡuriro, “Ḡa veꞌoḡa oꞌoꞌa vazeḡa eꞌe mazao haḡai sauꞌa ꞌahoga ago haḡaoꞌi. Eꞌe ohoḡore ohere iḡunao ani uꞌano zamaheꞌa ufeta adudaneha.”
27.20: Rehano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa Barabasi tuḡune bunadu Iesu manoga veize vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Pilato uminoga tuḡutuḡuziro.
27.21: Pilatoꞌa ḡadiziro, “Vaze aheu boꞌaḡano zaꞌe eḡeꞌa iniu tuḡune bunoga urateꞌohe?” Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Barabasi!”
27.22: Ebu Pilatoꞌa ḡadiziro, “Tena e Keriso raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa Iesu mazaoꞌe nougiꞌuma?” Zeḡe niduꞌa niro, “Aniꞌe Satauronoꞌi!”
27.23: Pilatoꞌa ḡadiziro, “Nougadu? Ani haḡai sauꞌa nagiga haḡairo?” Rehano zeḡeꞌa ufeta ḡihau huaro, “Satauronoꞌi!”
27.24: Pilatoꞌe Iesu veize gauni ꞌahoga haḡaogaꞌe mene idaḡa reirotaꞌaꞌe ederiro. Ebu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ufeta maḡune haraeꞌeteꞌe horonirotene, zeḡe ubumao vu tahiḡa madu ꞌevoꞌa vuzuꞌiro ebu ziro, “E vaze ꞌahaꞌa rudatiteꞌe moneo veꞌoḡa ꞌahoga mene haḡaeha. Zae daꞌo eꞌe naeḡa moꞌi.”
27.25: ꞌOugadu vaze niduꞌa naenaeniro, “Ani rudaune, eꞌe naeḡaꞌe emeḡe zu marigafeꞌa meꞌuma!”
27.26: Eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌe zeḡe veize Barabasi ḡuꞌa neḡanonoꞌo tuḡune buniro, rehano Iesuꞌe masiniroteꞌe enogano satauronoga veize uti azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌiniro. Uti Azaḡaniꞌa Iesu Ḡirihoharo (Mareko 15:16-20; Ioane 19:2-3)
27.27: Gavana uti azaḡa nuꞌa Iesuꞌe gavana ne zamaḡa tutune onamiro, ebu uti azaḡa niduꞌa ani zamao huze nuꞌoziro.
27.28: Ebu ze Iesu dabua fuhiꞌohanadu dabua kanaḡa duhuḡa hune vidoharo.
27.29: Ebu ire ezaga meigameiga ḡurunadu kini vadiga adiriḡa teige vadigano redoharo, zu Gubu somoriḡa edaꞌe ꞌevoꞌano obonoharo. Ebu obenaze hina ani mazao ḡuḡureꞌenaꞌa ḡirihoharo, “Iuda azaḡa kini, nigunihi!”
27.30: Ebu ze ani rana soꞌabide vaniro zu Gubu somoriḡa eꞌe madu vadiga rana barebare bouniro.
27.31: Ḡirihohau hauḡirotene, ani vidoharoteꞌe dabuaḡa fuhiꞌadu ane dabua bare vidoharo. Ebu satauronoga radu tutune onamiro. Iesu Satauroniro (Mareko 15:21-32; Luka 23:26-43; Ioane 19:17-27)
27.32: Uti azaḡaniꞌa Iesu tutune onamiroteꞌe zamaḡano Kurene vazeḡa ꞌahoga, niḡa Simona hidiro, ebu aniꞌa Iesu satauro herate onamoga veize tuḡutuḡuniro.
27.33: Ebu ze Gologota rae huneꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano feuriro (Gologota hugaꞌe Vadini Isiga Haba'a).
27.34: Eꞌea ze vaini vuḡa ḡau ꞌahoga ḡiḡiꞌa bagaḡa teite mirunadu gagoharo. Rehano aneꞌa tahiḡa gage nuradu gagoga mene uratiro.
27.35: Zeḡeꞌa Iesu satauroniroteꞌe ḡarugano kaḡusi arahoḡa arahadu Iesu dabua ḡahugotitiro.
27.36: Ebu eꞌea ze ehoradu Iesu ḡiane radiro.
27.37: Ze Iesu haḡai sauꞌaꞌe nagini rae ihozifine ane satauro hitagano ꞌahige mirihadu tiro, “ꞌADIꞌE IESU, IUDA AZAḠ KINI.”
27.38: Ebu ḡonore azaḡa aheu zuni ani teite satauroziro. ꞌAhogaꞌe ane edaꞌe moneo zu ꞌahogaꞌe ane kauri moneo ikokoziro.
27.39: Ebu uhiḡano vitau onamiroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa vadinize miruneꞌenaꞌa, Iesu rae sausauniro,
27.40: “Ḡaꞌe kuru neḡa fahadu mada uḡidu zamaḡano bare ohoniꞌuma rae reiroteꞌe vazeḡa. Ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare ḡaboꞌoꞌi! Ḡa Badiꞌa Ubuga roꞌidene, satauronoꞌo buau ovaoꞌi!”
27.41: Eꞌe teige, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa, Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa zuni ḡirihohauꞌenaꞌa ḡoeriro,
27.42: “Aniꞌa vaze nunu ḡaboziro, rehano ani aneꞌa bare ḡabonogaꞌe mene idaḡa! Aniꞌe Iuda azaḡa kini, eꞌanoꞌo izidi hune satauronoꞌo bua ovaoꞌi, ꞌougine eme ani mazao fiꞌuma!
27.43: Aniꞌe Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa uratine izidi ani ḡaboniꞌuma, mazaḡa aneꞌa raenaꞌa, 'E Badiꞌa Ubuga,' rae reiro.”
27.44: Zeḡe teige, Iesu teite idaḡa satauroziroteꞌe ḡonore azaḡaniꞌa zuni ani rae sausauniro. Iesu Rune (Mareko 15:33-41; Luka 23:44-49; Ioane 19:28-30)
27.45: Madai kirikiri meirotene, haba niduꞌa uzaboꞌa ꞌuiro, onamo ḡorava mone mada uḡidu.
27.46: Ḡorava madaḡa uḡidu meirotene, Iesuꞌa ḡihau huaro, “Eli, Eli, lama sabatani?” Ḡoere eꞌe hugaꞌe, “Eḡe Badiꞌa, eḡe Badiꞌa, ḡa nougadu eḡe modeha?”
27.47: Eꞌea edau radiroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano nuꞌe ḡoere eꞌe egadu reiro, “Aniꞌa Elia huneꞌohe.”
27.48: Ebu zeḡe boꞌaḡano ꞌahoganiꞌa zogone dure onamadu vu romane zouneꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa meiro, ebu vaini vuḡa ḡiḡiꞌa iriꞌavonadu Gubu somoriḡa rana tiro, ebu Iesu gagoharo.
27.49: Rehano vaze nuꞌe reiro, “Ani modoꞌi. Eliaꞌa ovadu ḡaboniꞌuma ga mene, ḡianihi.”
27.50: Ebu Iesuꞌa agoḡa boro hina bare ḡihau huanadu iriga riꞌiro.
27.51: Eꞌe madaḡano kuru neḡano Haba Zaḡoḡa Hune ꞌueꞌeteꞌe dabuaḡaniꞌa hitaganonoꞌo ꞌuꞌuḡa ḡuzu zigau ꞌaꞌadaro. Ebu rahaꞌa hagariro zu vatavaꞌa ꞌaꞌadanadu bohatu ḡouriro.
27.52: Ebu rune iduḡa ꞌaꞌadanadu Badiꞌa mone azaḡa ḡehaḡa ahirizeꞌa ḡabode iḡune ḡouriro.
27.53: Ze iduzeonoꞌo buaro, ebu Iesuꞌa bare ḡabodiroteꞌe enogano Ierusalema onamadu vaze ḡehaḡa zamao fureraro.
27.54: Uti vazeḡa boro zu ane teite Iesu ḡiane radiroteꞌe uti azaḡaꞌe rahaꞌa hagariroteꞌe zu naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe horonirotene, rihau rudanadu reiro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe hube hune Badiꞌa Ubuga!”
27.55: Eꞌea roḡae ḡehaḡaniꞌa zuni faḡanonoꞌo ehamu radiro. Zeꞌe Iesu dananoga veize Galilea habaꞌanonoꞌo hegote ariro.
27.56: Zeḡe boꞌaḡano Magadala roḡaeḡa Maria, ebu Iakobo zu Iosefa vize Maria, ebu Zebedeo ubugaubuga Iakobo zu Ioane vizeꞌa radiunu. Iesu Guriro (Mareko 15:42-47; Luka 23:50-56; Ioane 19:38-42)
27.57: Ḡoravararotene, maꞌora vazeḡa, niḡa Iosefaꞌa ariro. Aniꞌe Arimate vazeḡa zu Iesu tahiꞌa ꞌahoga.
27.58: Aniꞌa Pilato vaḡe onamadu Iesu ahiri mouga veize uminiro, ebu Pilatoꞌa ḡoere tuḡuradu Iesu ahiri haro.
27.59: ꞌOugadu Iosefaꞌa Iesu ahiri madu dabua deheḡa manoḡa hina ꞌumiro.
27.60: Ebu vatava huꞌiroteꞌe iduḡa, Iosefa ane rune iduḡa iziga zamaḡano Iesu ahiri tiro. Ebu hadi boro hina ibihetaḡano kiune ꞌuadu mode onamiro.
27.61: U Magadala roḡaeḡa Maria zu Maria ꞌahogaꞌe iduḡa zama ḡoha ehore radiro. Uti Azaḡaniꞌa Idu Habaꞌa Ḡiane Radiro
27.62: Irarirotene, aꞌe Bana Madaḡa. Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa Pilato vaḡe onamiro.
27.63: Ebu ze Pilato niro, “Vaze boro, ḡuriro vazeḡa eꞌeꞌa ꞌize ḡabode radiroteꞌe zamaḡano reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa emeꞌa zamareꞌohe. Aniꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, 'E mada uḡiduḡano bare ḡabode iḡuniꞌuma.'
27.64: Eꞌanoꞌo mada uḡidu zamaḡano uti azaḡaniꞌa ani idu faine ḡianoga veize eme umiꞌeꞌohe. Mene ꞌougine, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa aradu ani ahiri ḡonotaꞌuma ebu vaze zinaꞌa, 'Aniꞌe bare ḡabode iḡuneha,' rae reꞌuma. ꞌOugine zeꞌa vaze ufeta soꞌoziꞌuma. Aꞌe ibite soꞌozirotaꞌaꞌe vitiniꞌuma.”
27.65: Pilatoꞌa naenaeziro, “Uti azaḡa nu tutuze onamadu zae edeḡano iduḡa faine ḡiane radoꞌi.”
27.66: ꞌOugirotene, ze uti azaḡa teite onamadu iduḡa ibiheta hadiḡa boro faifaine hararo, ebu vazeꞌa mene vavaꞌifine gudune ꞌahoga tiro, ebu uti azaḡaꞌe iduḡa ḡiane radiro.

28.1: Bana Madaḡa ḡarugano fura oherebau uzeuze Magadala roḡaeḡa Maria zu Maria ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu idu ḡianoga radu onamiro.
28.2: Eꞌe madaḡano tabara habaꞌa borofe hagariro, ebu Zuhiꞌa Boro tuḡure viganiꞌa adureonoꞌo ovadu idu uhiḡa onamiro, ebu hadiḡa boro kiune vaḡinadu eꞌe rana ehoriro.
28.3: Ani iraḡaꞌe viriꞌa fuꞌuradu vazavazaheꞌeteꞌe teigiro ebu dabuaḡaꞌe ḡoze teige ꞌuraro.
28.4: Idu ḡianeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ani horonadu rihau rudaro ꞌahine, rereraro ebu rune azaḡa teigiro.
28.5: Ebu tuḡure viganiꞌa roḡae aheu ziro, “Ago rihanoꞌi. Eḡe edeḡa, zaꞌe satauroniroteꞌe vazeḡa Iesu vaḡeꞌohe.
28.6: Aniꞌe ꞌahao oꞌoꞌa, rehano aniꞌa reiroteꞌe teige bare ḡabodeha. Aroꞌi ebu aniꞌa bazateꞌe habaꞌa ḡianoꞌi.
28.7: Ebu za ḡarihe onamadu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ꞌahige zoꞌi, 'Aniꞌe rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡabodeha. Aniꞌe zae zamao Galilea habaꞌa ibite onamiꞌuma ebu eꞌea za ani horoniꞌuma.' Eḡeꞌa zeateꞌe ḡoeꞌa faine ihozoꞌi.”
28.8: Eꞌanoꞌo roḡaeroḡaeꞌe rihozeta zu matuꞌuzeta iduonoꞌo ḡarihe iḡunadu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌa zouga veize zeḡe vaḡe dure onamiro.
28.9: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesuꞌa tabara zeḡe mazao fureranadu ziro, “Zaꞌe manoḡahe?” ꞌOuge reirotene, ze ani uhiḡa onamiro zu odaḡa obonadu ani mazao kuraro.
28.10: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Ago rihanoꞌi. Onamadu eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa ꞌahige rae zoꞌi, 'Galilea habaꞌa onamoꞌi.' Eꞌea ze eḡe horohiꞌuma.” Iesu Iduḡa Ḡianiroteꞌe Uti Azaḡaniꞌa Hari Meꞌodiro
28.11: Roḡaeroḡaeꞌa onamiroteꞌea, Iesu idu ḡiane radiroteꞌe uti azaḡa boꞌaḡano nuꞌa ne boro diuḡadu naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe hariḡa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa meꞌodoziniro.
28.12: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa vaze boroboro teite nuꞌoranadu ḡoꞌaniro, ebu iduḡa ḡiane radiroteꞌe uti azaḡa hadi boro zenadu,
28.13: ꞌahige rae ziro, “Zaꞌe ꞌahige rae roꞌi, 'Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ohere aradu eme bazuꞌenona ani ahiri ḡonotu feraneha.'
28.14: ꞌAhi hariḡa gavana vazeḡaniꞌa igine, emeḡeꞌa zae veize ani mazao faine ḡoeriꞌuma ebu zaꞌe aduga ꞌahoga mene hidiꞌuma.”
28.15: Eꞌanoꞌo iduḡa ḡiane radiroteꞌe uti azaḡaniꞌa hadi madu zeḡeꞌa ziroteꞌe idunaḡano ḡoeriro. Ebu eꞌe hariḡaniꞌa Iuda azaḡa mazao bororaro zu izidi madaḡano zuni vazeꞌa ꞌouge raꞌohe. Iesu Tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Haḡae Huniteꞌe Gauḡa Ihoziro (Mareko 16:14-18; Luka 24:36-49; Ioane 20:19-23; Apostolo 1:6-8)
28.16: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌa gaubanana tiba fareꞌa Galilea habaꞌa onamadu aniꞌa ihoziroteꞌe maḡano feuriro.
28.17: Feurirotene, ze ani horonadu ani mazao kuraro. Rehano nuꞌe zamaze ꞌadaꞌadaziro.
28.18: Ebu Iesuꞌa zeḡe vaḡe aradu ziro, “Adure zu raha gigiꞌaḡa niduꞌaꞌe eḡe iniro.
28.19: Eꞌanoꞌo zaꞌe onamadu habaꞌahabaꞌa azaḡa niduꞌa eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa rouga veize zamazoꞌi. Moga, Ubuga zu Vine Zaḡoḡa niḡano babatisozoꞌi,
28.20: ebu eḡeꞌa haḡaoꞌi rae ziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa zeḡeꞌa hegotoga veize ihozoꞌi. Ḡianoꞌi, eḡeꞌa iḡaiḡa zae teite radiuꞌohe zu radiꞌuma onamo mada ḡonaga.”

1.1: Badiꞌa Ubuga, Iesu Keriso hari manoḡaꞌe ꞌahige ḡadahiro.
1.2: Peroveta vazeḡa Isaiaꞌa Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, “Ḡianoꞌi, eḡeꞌa eḡe ḡoere odohe onamiteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoga ḡae zamao ibite tuḡuniꞌuma. Aniꞌe ḡae veize ibiḡo ruhibiꞌuma.”
1.3: “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa haba bohaꞌano huauꞌohe, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro veize ibi ruhiboꞌi, ebu ani veize ibi mae dudunoꞌi.'”
1.4: Ebu Ioane Babatisoꞌa haba bohaꞌano aradu ꞌahige haramiro, “Haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡihuradu babatiso moꞌi! ꞌOugine, Badi'a'a haḡaize sau'a rae modiꞌuma!”
1.5: Ebu Iudea habaꞌa azaḡa niduꞌa zu Ierusalema azaḡa niduꞌa ani vaḡe onamiro. Ebu haḡaize sauꞌa rae furenadu Ioaneꞌa Ioridana vuḡano babatisoziro.
1.6: Ioaneꞌe kamelo iguḡa hina haḡairoteꞌe dabuaḡa vidaro, zu mani ogaḡa miniḡa hina gabaꞌiḡano utiro, ebu fihore zu butu ꞌavoreḡa godaga aro.
1.7: Ebu aniꞌa ꞌahige haramoziro, “Eḡe ḡaruna ariteꞌe vazeḡa inaraḡaꞌe ufeta ḡihiꞌaḡa zu eḡe vitihoga. Eḡe'a ḡuḡuradu ani tamaka miniḡa fuhiꞌeꞌeteꞌe tuḡureḡa vazeḡano rouga zuni mene idaḡa.
1.8: Eꞌe vu hina babatisoziꞌohe, rehano aniꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡa hina babatisoziꞌuma.” Ioaneꞌa Iesu Babatisoniro (Mataio 3:13-17; Luka 3:21-22)
1.9: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesuꞌa Galilea habaꞌa Nazareta neḡanonoꞌo aradu Ioaneꞌa Ioridana vuḡano Iesu babatisoniro.
1.10: Iesuꞌa vuonoꞌo gaba tire onamirotene, adureꞌa ꞌaꞌadaroteꞌe zu Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa Tubugo niniḡa teige ani vaḡe ovairoteꞌe horoniro.
1.11: Ebu adureonoꞌo ago ꞌahoganiꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ḡa'e eḡe zamarone ubude. Eḡeꞌa ḡae uꞌano, matu'e rudau'ohe.” Sataniꞌa Iesu Tuhune Nuriro (Mataio 4:1-11; Luka 4:1-13)
1.12: Ebu hena zogone Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa Iesu tutune haba bohaꞌa onamiro.
1.13: Ebu haba bohaꞌano mada 40 zamaḡano Sataniꞌa Iesu tuhuniro. Ani butu maniḡa teite radiro zu tuḡure vigaviganiꞌa ani taufiro. Iesu Tahiꞌa Ḡazaḡa Huziro (Mataio 4:12-22; Luka 4:14-15, 5:1-11)
1.14: Ioaneꞌe ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoniroteꞌe enogano Iesuꞌa Galilea habaꞌa onamadu Badiꞌa hari manoḡa harame ragaviro.
1.15: Aniꞌa ꞌahige haramiro, “Madaꞌe areha. Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa haniteha. Ḡihuroꞌi ebu hari manoḡa mae ḡihinoꞌi.”
1.16: Iesuꞌa Galilea duꞌuraḡa genaḡano onameꞌenogano, Simona ebu negoḡa Andereaꞌa duꞌurao reꞌeva feuneꞌeteꞌe horoziro. Zeꞌe ḡozone mauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa.
1.17: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡe ḡaruna hegotoꞌi. Eḡeꞌa zae huzadu zaꞌe vaze reꞌevaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡano reꞌuma.”
1.18: ꞌOuge reirotene, ze zogone reꞌevaze modadu ane hegote onamiro.
1.19: Iesuꞌa eꞌeanoꞌo tahiḡa faḡa onamirotene, Zebedeo ubuga aheu, Iakobo zu negoḡa Ioaneꞌa ḡasi zamaḡano zeḡe reꞌeva zigoga faine radiunuteꞌe horoziro.
1.20: ꞌOugadu aniꞌa zogone ze huziro, ebu zeꞌa moze Zebedeoꞌe gau azaḡa teite ḡasio modadu ani hegote onamiro. Vine Sauꞌaḡeta Vazeḡa Fainiro (Luka 4:31-37)
1.21: Iesu ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Kaperanauma onamiro. Ebu Bana Madaḡa meirotene, Iesuꞌa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa diuḡadu ihore ḡadaheniro.
1.22: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ane ihore uꞌano zaguzagaro. Mazaḡa Iesuꞌe Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teige mene ihoziro, rehano Badiꞌa gigiꞌaḡa hina ihoziro.
1.23: Eꞌe madaḡano vine sau'aḡeta vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa nu'onu'o neḡano radiunu. Aniꞌa agoḡa boro hina ꞌahige huaro,
1.24: “Nazareta vazeḡa Iesu! Ḡa emeḡe mazao nougihi raꞌohe? Ḡa eme ruifoga radu arahe? E edeḡa, ḡaꞌe iniu. Ḡa'e Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ariroteꞌe Vazeḡa Zaḡoḡa!”
1.25: Iesuꞌa vine sauꞌa roniro, “Hezo'a! Vaze e'e mazaonoꞌo buanoꞌi!”
1.26: Ebu vine sauꞌaniꞌa vaze eꞌe mae ketoketonadu ḡihau ḡaniḡanauꞌenaꞌa ani mazaonoꞌo buaro.
1.27: Ebu vaze niduꞌa zaguzaganadu zeḡeꞌa bare ḡadimutitiro, “ꞌAdiꞌe nagini? Ihore iziga ꞌahoga gigiꞌaḡeta! Aniꞌa vine sauꞌa riḡa ziꞌetene, ze ani egohauꞌohe.”
1.28: Ebu Iesu hariḡaꞌe ḡarihe Galilea habaꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano bororaro. Petero Emoḡa Roḡaeḡa Fainiro (Mataio 8:14-17; Luka 4:38-41)
1.29: Ze nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa modadu Iakobo zu Ioane teite Simona zu Anderea neze onamiro.
1.30: Simona emoḡa roḡaeḡaꞌe ahiꞌaniꞌa gigine runadu evane rana baze radiro, ebu ze ani moneo Iesu niro.
1.31: Ebu Iesuꞌa ani uhiḡa onamadu ꞌevoꞌa oboniro ebu ani abine ḡihiniro. ꞌOugirotene, ane ahiꞌa gigiꞌa ꞌai dauḡiro ebu aniꞌa zeḡe veize ogomu ruhibiro. Vaze Ḡehaḡa Faiziro
1.32: Madaꞌa zuburadu ḡoravararotene, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ugi azaḡa zu vine sauꞌazeta azaḡa niduꞌa Iesu vaḡe tutuze ariro.
1.33: Ebu ne azaḡa niduꞌa ibihetao nuꞌoraro.
1.34: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa ugi nunu azaḡa ḡehaḡa faiziro ebu vine sauꞌa ḡehaḡa zuni hegoze buziro. Rehano ani vine sauꞌasauꞌaniꞌa ḡoerogaꞌe ꞌuiro, mazaḡa ze ederiro, Iesuꞌe iniu. Galilea Habaꞌano Haramiro (Luka 4:42-44)
1.35: Oherebau uzeuze, ꞌizema agaranogano, Iesuꞌa iḡunadu haba bohaꞌa ꞌahoga onamiro ebu eꞌea kuraro.
1.36: Ebu Simona zu ane ḡatiniroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ani vaḡe onamiro.
1.37: Ze ani horonadu niro, “Vaze niduꞌa ḡa vaḡeꞌohe.”
1.38: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eme ne uhiḡauhiḡa onamihi. Eꞌea zuni eḡeꞌa haramiꞌuma. Gau ꞌahi veize eḡeꞌa ariro.”
1.39: Eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌe Galilea habaꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano ragaveꞌenaꞌa, Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano haramiro zu vine sauꞌasauꞌa hegoze buziro. Refera Vazeḡa Fainiro (Mataio 8:1-4; Luka 5:12-16)
1.40: Refera vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu vaḡe ariro, ebu ane obena hina tuḡadu uminiro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡa uratine, eḡe faihogaꞌe idaḡa.”
1.41: Iesuꞌa vetuḡaniro ꞌahine, ane ꞌevore einadu vaze eꞌe oboniro ebu niro, “E urateꞌohe. Ḡaꞌe deheru manoroꞌi!”
1.42: ꞌOugirotene, referaꞌa zogone dauḡiro ebu aniꞌa manoriro.
1.43: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡoere riḡa neadu zogone ani tuḡune vaḡiniro. Iesuꞌa ꞌahige rae niro,
1.44: “Vazeni ꞌahoga ago noꞌi, rehano dibuꞌo vazeḡa vaḡe onamadu ahiriḡo ihonoꞌi. Ebu ḡaeꞌa deheru manorataꞌaꞌe vazeꞌa ederifine, Moseꞌa reiroteꞌe dibuꞌoḡa mae onamadu Badiꞌa dibuꞌohanoꞌi.”
1.45: Rehano ani onamadu eꞌe hariḡa hunio ḡadahe rae fureniro ebu hariḡaꞌe bororaro. Eꞌe uꞌano, Iesuꞌe ne hunio diuḡoga mene idaranadu enona vaze oꞌoꞌa habaꞌano radiro. Rehano vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ꞌize haba nunuonoꞌo ani vaḡe ariro.

2.1: Mada nu ḡarugano Iesuꞌa Kaperanauma bare ariro ebu aniꞌa ne ariroteꞌe hariḡaniꞌa bororaro.
2.2: Eꞌanoꞌo vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa nuꞌoranadu ibiheta enogano zuni iriꞌaviro. Ebu Iesuꞌa haramoziro.
2.3: Eꞌe madaḡano ahiꞌa mene haganeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahogaꞌe vaze ḡazaḡaniꞌa herate ariro.
2.4: Rehano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ꞌahine, ze ani Iesu vaḡe odohe onamoga mene idararo. Eꞌanoꞌo zeꞌa Iesu hitaga binuḡa mae bohaniro, ebu binu bohaꞌanonoꞌo ahiꞌa mene haganeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa baze radiuꞌeteꞌe farata miniḡeta hina ovoe dabanadu Iesu zamao bazune tiro.
2.5: Zeḡeꞌa Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe Iesuꞌa horonadu ahiꞌa mene haganeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa niro, “Ubude, ḡae haḡai sauꞌa ꞌai rae modeha.”
2.6: Eꞌe madaḡano Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌa eꞌea ehoriro ebu zeḡeꞌa bare ꞌahige rae zamariro,
2.7: “Nougadu vaze ꞌahiꞌe ꞌouge raꞌohe? Aniꞌa Badiꞌa rae sausauneꞌohe. Badiꞌaꞌa daꞌo vaze haḡai sauꞌa rae modeꞌohe!”
2.8: Iesuꞌe zeḡeꞌa zamazeo nagini zamareꞌetaꞌaꞌe zogone ederadu ziro, “Zaꞌe nougadu eꞌeguḡa zamareꞌohe?
2.9: Ahiꞌa mene haganeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa mazao noꞌe ḡoeꞌa nine, ufiḡa? 'Ḡae haḡai sauꞌa ꞌai rae modeha,' rae niꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ga 'Iḡunoꞌi ebu farataḡo madu onamoꞌi,' rae niꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa?
2.10: Rehano Vaze Ubuganiꞌa raha ꞌadao haḡai sauꞌa rae modeꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa meirotaꞌaꞌe zaeꞌa ederiꞌuma.” Ebu Iesuꞌa ahiꞌa mene haganeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa niro,
2.11: “Eḡeꞌa ḡaꞌohe, iḡunoꞌi ebu farataḡo madu neḡo onamoꞌi.”
2.12: ꞌOuge reirotene, ani iḡunadu farataḡa meiro ebu vaze niduꞌa zamao buau vaḡiniro. Vaze niduꞌaꞌe zaguzaganadu ꞌahige Badiꞌa niguniro, “Eme ꞌahiguḡa mene hune horoniro!” Levi Huniro (Mataio 9:9-13; Luka 5:27-32)
2.13: Iesuꞌa bare Galilea duꞌuraḡa genaḡa onamiro. Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa niduꞌa ani vaḡe ariro ebu aniꞌa ze ḡadahe ihoziro.
2.14: Iesuꞌa onameꞌeteꞌea, Alefeo ubuga, niḡa Leviꞌe takesi fataḡa uhiḡano ehore radiroteꞌe horoniro. ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa niro, “Eḡe hegotoꞌi.” Ebu Leviꞌa iḡunadu Iesu hegotiro.
2.15: Iesuꞌa Levi neo ḡorava ogomu auꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano takesi azaḡa zu haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesu zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite ogau tiburaro. Mazaḡa Iesu hegotiroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ḡehaḡa.
2.16: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe Farisea azaḡaniꞌa Iesuꞌe takesi azaḡa zu haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa teite ogauꞌeteꞌe horozirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡadiziro, “Ani nougadu takesi azaḡa zu haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa teite ogau tiburuꞌohe?”
