2.17: Iesuꞌa eꞌe egadu ziro, “Ugi oꞌoꞌa azaḡaꞌe gohe vazeḡa mene vaḡeꞌohe, rehano ugi azaḡaniꞌa gohe vazeḡa vaḡeꞌohe. Eꞌe teige, e iniu zeḡeꞌa bare duduḡa azaḡa rae zamareꞌeteꞌe azaḡa huzoga radu mene ariro, rehano iniu zeḡeꞌa bare haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa rae zamareꞌeteꞌe azaḡa huzoga radu ariro.” Ogomu moneo Zaḡozaḡeꞌeteꞌe (Mataio 9:14-17; Luka 5:33-39)
2.18: Mada ꞌahogano Ioane tahiꞌatahiꞌa zu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa ogomu moneo zaḡozaḡe radiunu. Ebu vaze nuꞌa aradu Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ioane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ebu Farisea azaḡa tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe ogomu moneo zaḡozaḡeꞌohe. Rehano ḡae tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe nougadu ogomu moneo mene zaḡozaḡeꞌohe?”
2.19: Ebu Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Hahu muiḡa madaḡano hahu ohozeḡa iziganiꞌa huziroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa hahu ohozeḡa iziga teite radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ze ogomu moneo zaḡozaḡiꞌumahe? Ze ane teite radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡanoꞌe ogomu moneo mene zaḡozaḡiꞌuma.
2.20: Rehano zeḡe mazaonoꞌo hahu ohozeḡa izigaꞌe mae vaḡiniteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa arine, ze ogomu moneo zaḡozaḡiꞌuma.
2.21: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa dabua iziga variꞌe madu dabua amahiḡa mene banineꞌohe, mazaḡa dabuaḡa vuzuꞌine, dabua siꞌiga izigaꞌe ḡuanadu amahiḡa hutubiꞌuma zu borofe zigiꞌuma.
2.22: Ebu vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa vaini vuḡa fuseḡa amahiḡa zamaḡano vaini vuḡa iziga mene beꞌune ufiꞌohe. Beꞌune ufine, vaini vuḡa iziganiꞌa bare busure bororanadu vaini vuḡa fuseḡa amahiḡaniꞌa zigaꞌuma, ebu vaini vuḡa zu vaini vuḡa fuseḡa sausauniꞌuma. Eꞌanoꞌo vaini vuḡa izigaꞌe vaini vuḡa fuseḡa izigano beuꞌe ufiꞌuma.” Bana Madaḡa moneo Ḡadimaro (Mataio 12:1-8; Luka 6:1-5)
2.23: Bana Madaḡa ꞌahogano Iesuꞌa vuidi mebaḡa zamaḡano onamiro. Ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa onameꞌeteꞌea, vuidi maḡa nu ririꞌe ḡadahe meiro.
2.24: Ebu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa Iesu niro, “Ḡianoꞌi! Ḡae tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe nougadu Bana Madaḡa goroḡa varadeꞌohe?”
2.25: Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Zaꞌe Buka Zaḡoḡa mene meꞌodirohe? Davida zu ani ḡatiniroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ogomu oꞌoꞌa radu vinize ruzirotene, Davidaꞌa nougiro?
2.26: Abiataꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa madaḡano, Davidaꞌa Badiꞌa ne diuḡadu dibuꞌo azaḡaniꞌa daꞌo auꞌeteꞌe dibuꞌo ꞌuvahuḡa odoga aro, ebu ani ḡatiniroteꞌe azaḡa zuni ziniro.”
2.27: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Vazeꞌe Bana Madaḡa veize mene haḡairo, rehano Bana Madaḡaꞌe vaze veize haḡairo.
2.28: Eꞌanoꞌo Vaze Ubugaꞌe Bana Madaḡa Zuhiꞌaḡa.”

3.1: Bana Madaḡa ꞌahogano Iesuꞌa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa bare diuḡiro. Eꞌea nae ꞌevoꞌa hoega vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu.
3.2: Farisea azaḡa nuꞌe Iesuꞌa Bana Madaḡano vaze eꞌe fainiꞌuma ga meneꞌe ḡianihi radu ehamu radiro. Aniꞌa vaze eꞌe fainine, kotao ohoniꞌuma rae reiro.
3.3: Ebu Iesuꞌa ꞌevoꞌa hoega vazeḡa niro, “Iḡunadu vaze niduꞌa zamao aroꞌi.”
3.4: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Bana Madaḡano nagini haḡaineꞌe duduḡa? Manoḡa haḡaiꞌuma ga sauꞌa haḡaiꞌuma? Vaze ḡaboziꞌuma ga zimiꞌuma?” ꞌOuge reirotene, ze mene naenaeniro.
3.5: Ebu aniꞌa zeḡe mazao maḡunadu zeḡe niduꞌa ḡiaziro, ebu zamaze rinedirotaꞌaꞌe ederadu zamaḡaniꞌa adudaro. Ebu vaze eꞌe niro, “ꞌEvoꞌo ꞌeinoꞌi.” Aniꞌa ꞌevoꞌa ꞌeinirotene, ꞌevoꞌaniꞌa manoriro.
3.6: Ebu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡanonoꞌo buau ḡouriro, ebu Heroda mone azaḡa teite nuꞌoranadu nougenouge Iesu matiteꞌe moneo ḡadahe ḡoꞌane tiburaro. Vaze Ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesu Hegotiro
3.7: Iesuꞌe ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite vaḡinadu duꞌura onamiro, ebu Galilea habaꞌanonoꞌo vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani hegotiro.
3.8: Ebu Iudea habaꞌa, Ierusalema, Idumea habaꞌa zu Ioridana moneafa habaꞌa, Turo zu Sidono uhiḡa neḡaneḡanonoꞌo vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesuꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa niduꞌa egadu ani vaḡe ariro.
3.9: Vaze ufeta ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesu vaḡe ariroteꞌe uꞌano, aniꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa mene tuꞌihifine, ḡasi komeꞌa ꞌahoga ruhiboꞌi.”
3.10: Aniꞌa vaze ḡehaḡa faiziro ꞌahine, ugi nunu azaḡaniꞌa Iesu ahiꞌa obonoga veize bibititiro.
3.11: Vine sauꞌasauꞌaꞌe nouma ani horonirotene, ani zamao higau bauriro ebu ḡihau huaro, “Ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa Ubuga!”
3.12: Rehano Iesuꞌe riḡa ḡoreziro, “Eꞌe iniu rae vaze ago ihozoꞌi.” Iesu Tahiꞌa Gaubanana Aheu Fare Huziro (Mataio 10:1-4; Luka 6:12-16)
3.13: Iesuꞌa maḡa ꞌahoga itadu iniu aniꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe azaḡa huze nuꞌozirotene, ze ani vaḡe ariro.
3.14: Ebu aniꞌe tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare ohotadu zeꞌe apostolo azaḡa rae huziro. ꞌOugadu ze Iesu teite radiro ebu zeꞌa haramifine tuḡuziro,
3.15: ebu vine sauꞌa hegoze buzeꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa ziniro.
3.16: Aniꞌa ohotiroteꞌe apostolo azaḡa gaubanana aheu fare nizeꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe: Simona (niḡa ꞌahogaꞌe Petero),
3.17: Zebedeo ubuga Iakobo zu negoḡa Ioane (Iesuꞌa ze nize ꞌahogaꞌe Boanere rae turahiro. Eꞌe hugaꞌe Viri Ubugaubuga),
3.18: Anderea, Filipi, Batolomeo, Mataio, Tomasi, Alefeo ubuga Iakobo, Tadeo, Zelota vazeḡa Simona,
3.19: ebu Iesu revoharoteꞌe vazeḡa, Isakariota vazeḡa Iuda. Iesu zu Belezebulo (Mataio 12:22-32; Luka 11:14-23, 12:10)
3.20: Ebu Iesuꞌa ne diuḡirotene, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa bare nuꞌoraro, eꞌanoꞌo ani zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe oganoga mene idararo.
3.21: Iesu viꞌa zu negoḡa duḡuruꞌa ane hari egadu ani zamahanoga veize onamiro, mazaḡa vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa, “Iesu vadiganiꞌa sautaro,” rae reiro.
3.22: Ebu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Ierusalemaonoꞌo ovadu ꞌahige rae reiro, “Aniꞌe Belezebuloꞌa ragano reiro. Aniꞌe vine sauꞌasauꞌa zuhiꞌaḡa inaraḡa hina vine sauꞌasauꞌa hegoze buzeꞌohe.”
3.23: Ebu Iesuꞌa ze huzadu hari idaidaḡa hina ziro, “Nougenouge Sataniꞌa Satani hegone buniꞌuma?
3.24: Haba tiba zamaḡano zeḡeꞌa rovotadu utitine, haba aꞌe mene edau gigaraꞌuma.
3.25: Ebu ne tiba zamaḡano zeḡeꞌa rovotadu utitine, ne aꞌe mene edau gigaraꞌuma.
3.26: Ebu Sataniꞌa ane bare agirohaune zu rovotine, aniꞌe edau gigaranogaꞌe mene idaḡa ebu ane ḡonaganiꞌa ariꞌuma.
3.27: Hube hune, ibite inara vazeḡa mene batune tine, ane ne diuḡadu ane tohe ḡonotu buau tauḡogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Ibite inara vazeḡa batune tine, ane ne toheḡa ḡonotanogaꞌe idaraꞌuma.
3.28: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, vaze haḡai sauꞌa niduꞌa ebu Badiꞌa rae sausauneꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa rae modiꞌuma.
3.29: Rehano iniuꞌa Vine Zaḡoḡa rae sausaunine, ane haḡai sauꞌaꞌe mene rae modiꞌuma ebu aniꞌa haḡai sauꞌa barebare haḡaiꞌuma, onamo tuḡutuḡu.”
3.30: Iesuꞌa ꞌouge reirotaꞌaꞌe mazaḡa zeꞌa, “Iesuꞌe vine sauꞌaḡeta,” rae reiro. Iesu Viꞌa ebu Negoḡa Duḡuru (Mataio 12:46-50; Luka 8:19-21)
3.31: Ebu Iesu viꞌa zu negoḡa duḡuruꞌa ani vaḡe ariro. Ze ne enogano edauꞌenaꞌa, ani hunoga veize vaze ꞌahoga tuḡune diuḡiro.
3.32: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani gabakekene ehoriro ebu zeḡeꞌa Iesu niro, “Viꞌu zu negoḡo duḡuruꞌa enoneo ḡa vaḡeꞌohe.”
3.33: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Iniuꞌe eḡe nanu zu eḡe nego duḡuru?”
3.34: Ebu aniꞌa ane gabakekene ehore radiroteꞌe azaḡa ḡiazadu ziro, “Eḡe nanu zu eḡe nego duḡuruꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe!
3.35: IniuꞋa Badiꞌa ura haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe nego, eze ebu nanu.”

4.1: Iesuꞌa duꞌura genaḡano ḡadahe ihoziro. Ebu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani babaḡano nuꞌorarotene, aniꞌe ḡasio tiradu duꞌura mone ehoriro ebu vaze niduꞌaꞌe duꞌura genaḡano edaro.
4.2: Ebu Iesuꞌa hari idaidaḡa hina ḡau ḡehaḡa ihoziro. Aniꞌa ihoziroteꞌe zamaḡano ꞌahige rae ziro,
4.3: “Abitoꞌi! Hihi vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa mebaḡano ezone ḡora onamiro.
4.4: Ani ezone feune ḡorarotene, nuꞌe ibio rururaro ebu niniꞌa aradu au hauḡiro.
4.5: Ezone nuꞌe hadi habaꞌano rururaro ebu rahaḡaꞌe mene baruḡa. Rahaḡaꞌe mene baruḡa radu ezoneꞌe ḡarihe ḡuhuriro.
4.6: Rehano madaꞌa hiarotene, gigiꞌaḡaniꞌa ḡuhuḡa manadu roraro, mazaḡa taiga oꞌoꞌa.
4.7: Ezone nuꞌe ve renogano rururaro ebu ve renoganiꞌa ezone ḡuhuḡa simarinadu ezoneꞌe mene iniro.
4.8: U ezone nuꞌe raha manoḡano rururanadu faine ḡuhure bororaro. Ebu nuꞌe huga ḡae 30, nuꞌe huga ḡae 60 ebu nuꞌe huga ḡae 100 hudaro.”
4.9: Ebu Iesuꞌa bare ḡoeriro, “Teḡaḡeta vazeḡaꞌe faifaine egadu huga ederoꞌi.” Nougadu Hari Idaidaḡa hina Ḡoeriro? (Mataio 13:10-17; Luka 8:9-10)
4.10: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane daꞌo radirotene, ane uhiḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite hari idaidaḡa eꞌe moneo ḡadiniro.
4.11: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe moneo ꞌuꞌuru tirotaꞌaꞌe zae mazao fureniro, rehano enone azaḡa mazaoꞌe ḡau niduꞌa hari idaidaḡa hina ḡoreziro.
4.12: Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Ze horoneꞌe rehano, hugaꞌe mene horoniꞌuma. Ze igiꞌe rehano, hugaꞌe mene ederiꞌuma. Ze mene ꞌougifone, ḡihuradu Badiꞌaꞌa haḡaize sauꞌa rae modifo.' ” Hari Idaidaḡa Huga Ihoziro (Mataio 13:18-23; Luka 8:11-15)
4.13: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Za hari idaidaḡa ꞌahi aḡuꞌahe? Tena za nougenouge hari idaidaḡa ꞌahogaꞌahoga huga ederiꞌuma?
4.15: Vaze nuꞌe ibio rururaroteꞌe ezoga zu Badiꞌa ḡoereꞌe zamazeo ḡoraroteꞌe heuḡa. Ze ḡoere eꞌe igiꞌetene, Sataniꞌa aradu zamazeo ḡoraroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa mae vaḡineꞌohe.
4.16: Vaze nuꞌe hadi habaꞌano rururaroteꞌe ezoga heuḡa. Zeꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere igiꞌetene matuꞌeꞌenaꞌa, zogone mae ḡihineꞌohe.
4.17: Rehano zeꞌa fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe taiga oꞌoꞌa radu mada tahiḡa daꞌo fieꞌohe. Ebu Badiꞌa ḡoere mae ḡihiniroteꞌe uꞌano, aduga zu sauꞌa hideꞌetene, zogone uiteꞌohe.
4.18: Vaze nuꞌe ve renogano rururaroteꞌe ezoga heuḡa. Zeꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere igiꞌe rehano,
4.19: ḡaboneze zamaḡano zamaze aduga borofeꞌohe, haba toheḡa barebare mouga veize ufeta zamareꞌohe zu ḡau nunu meihi rae ufeta inareꞌohe. ꞌUguḡaniꞌa Badiꞌa ḡoere ꞌuadu zeꞌe mene iniꞌohe.
4.20: U vaze nuꞌe raha manoḡano rururaroteꞌe ezoga heuḡa. Zeꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere igiꞌohe zu mae ḡihineꞌohe, ebu ḡae 30, ḡae 60 ga ḡae 100 hudauꞌohe.” Ihure Hariḡa Idaidaḡa (Luka 8:16-18)
4.21: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Za ihure madu siuva ga bazuni fataḡa ꞌuꞌuḡano tiꞌehe? Mene, ihure odaḡa rana tiꞌohe.
4.22: Mazaḡa ꞌuꞌuru radiuꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌa fureraꞌuma, ebu ogone ḡahineꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa zuni horoniꞌuma.
4.23: Teḡaḡeta vazeḡaꞌe faifaine egadu huga ederoꞌi.”
4.24: Iesuꞌa bare ziro, “Nagini zaeꞌa igiꞌeteꞌe faifaine egoꞌi. Zaeꞌa vaze nagini hauꞌeteꞌe idunaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌouge zae ziniꞌuma ebu ufeta ragate ziniꞌuma.
4.25: Faifaine zamare igiꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa edeḡa ufeta boro ziniꞌuma. U mene faine zamare igiꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe zeḡe edeḡa zuni mae vaḡiniꞌuma.” Ezoneꞌa Ḡuhureꞌeteꞌe Hariḡa Idaidaḡa
4.26: Iesuꞌa bare ziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe ꞌahiguḡa. Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa rahao ezone feune ḡorauꞌohe.
4.27: Ohere zu madai ani bazeꞌeteꞌe zu evateꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ezoneꞌa ḡuhureꞌohe zu farauꞌohe, rehano ani ꞌuguḡaniꞌa nougenouge fureruꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa.
4.28: Rahaꞌe aneꞌa bare ezone ḡuhunadu huga iniꞌohe: Ibite geno gabaḡa haḡaeꞌohe, ebu hena rouḡa haḡaeꞌohe, ebu ḡonagano iniꞌohe.
4.29: Huganiꞌa hiḡudeꞌetene, ani kari hina variꞌeꞌohe, mazaḡa hiriveꞌeteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa feureha.” Badiꞌaꞌa Zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe moneo Ḡoeriro (Mataio 13:31-32; Luka 13:18-19)
4.30: Iesuꞌa bare ziro, “Eme Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe nagini heuḡa rae reꞌuma? Naginio idaniꞌuma?
4.31: Aꞌe Kuava maḡa komeꞌa tiba heuḡa. Maḡa eꞌe madu rahao ḡorauꞌeteꞌe madaḡanoꞌe aꞌe komeꞌa fase.
4.32: Rehano ḡorarotene, aꞌe ḡuhure farauꞌohe, ebu mebao ḡuhureꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌa vitize bororanadu ezaga boroboro raꞌohe. Ebu hitagano niniꞌa aradu ezaga boroboro zauhaḡano neze ogoruꞌohe.”
4.33: Ze faine ederifine, Iesuꞌa hari idaidaḡa ꞌuguḡa ḡehaḡa hina ḡoreziro.
4.34: Aniꞌe hari idaidaḡa hina daꞌo ḡoreziro, rehano ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite daꞌo radiroteꞌe zamaḡanoꞌe ḡau niduꞌa huga ihoziro. Iesuꞌa Zavara Boro Roḡeniro (Mataio 8:23-27; Luka 8:22-25)
4.35: Eꞌe madaḡa ḡoravararotene, Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Eme duꞌura moneafa fare onamihi.”
4.36: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa muhiziro ebu Iesuꞌa ehore radiroteꞌe ḡasiḡano tiradu fare onamiro. Ebu ḡasi ꞌahogaꞌahoga zuni Iesu teite onamiro.
4.37: Ebu zavara boroꞌa feuradu saꞌuꞌa ḡasio kafere diuḡiro ebu vuꞌa ḡasi nariga iri'avoniro.
4.38: Rehano Iesuꞌe ḡasi avaḡa ḡuzuḡano vadini zahareꞌeteꞌe hina ḡatite baze radiro. ꞌOugirotene, Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ani evanadu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, eme nariga rudauꞌeteꞌe ḡa mene zamareꞌehe?”
4.39: Ebu Iesuꞌa evatadu zavara riḡa roniro ebu saꞌu niro, “Roḡeranoꞌi! Ago hagaroꞌi!” Ebu zavaraꞌa dauḡiro zu roḡeraro.
4.40: Ebu aniꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Za nougadu rihau rudauꞌohe? Zaꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe ꞌize oꞌoꞌahe?”
4.41: Zeꞌe rihau rudaro ebu ḡadimutitiro, “Vaze ꞌahiꞌe iniu? Zavara zu saꞌuꞌa zuni ani ḡoere egohuꞌohe!”

5.1: Iesu zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Galilea duꞌuraḡa moneafa ruhau faradu Gerasa azaḡa habao hebetiro.
5.2: Iesuꞌa ḡasionoꞌo buarotene, vine sauꞌaḡeta vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa idu habaꞌanonoꞌo aradu Iesu hidiro.
5.3: Aniꞌe idu habaꞌano radiunu ebu vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa ani auri adiriḡa hina zuni batunoga mene idararo.
5.4: Mazaḡa ḡae ḡehaḡa auri adiriḡa hina odaḡa zu ꞌevoꞌa batuniro rehano, ani auri adiriḡa riꞌi tahitahiro. Vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa ani obone touga mene idararo.
5.5: Ohere zu madai ani idu habaꞌano ebu maḡano radiuꞌenaꞌa, niau ḡaniḡanaunu ebu hadi hina aneꞌa bare sausauninu.
5.6: Ani faḡanonoꞌo Iesu horonirotene, ani uꞌa dure onamadu obenaḡa hina ane zamao tuḡiro.
5.7: Ebu agoḡa boro hina ḡihau niro, “Iesu, Ḡihiꞌa Hune Badiꞌaḡa Ubuga! Ḡaꞌe eḡe mazaonoꞌo nagini urateꞌohe? Badiꞌa niḡano e umiꞌeꞌohe, aduga ago enoꞌi!”
5.8: Aniꞌa ꞌouge reirotaꞌaꞌe mazaḡa Iesuꞌa vine sauꞌa ꞌahige riḡa ḡoreniro, “Vine sauꞌa, ani mazaonoꞌo buanoꞌi!”
5.9: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡa niḡo iniu?” Aniꞌa naenaeniro, “E niꞌe Legioni, mazaḡa emeꞌe ḡehaḡa.”
5.10: Ebu vine sauꞌaꞌe Iesuꞌa ze eꞌe habaꞌanonoꞌo mene tuḡuze buzoga barebare uminiro.
5.11: Eꞌe madaḡano maḡa komeꞌa ꞌahogano aba ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ogau radiunu.
5.12: ꞌOugadu vine sauꞌasauꞌaniꞌa Iesu uminiro, “Eme aba ḡuḡuvaḡa zamaḡano diuḡoga tuḡufoꞌi.”
5.13: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Idaḡa, buꞌanadu onamoꞌi.” Ebu vine sauꞌasauꞌa ꞌai vaze eꞌe mazaonoꞌo buanadu aba ḡuḡuvaḡa mazao diuḡe ḡouriro. Ebu aba ḡuḡuvaḡa niduꞌa 2,000 heuḡaniꞌa maḡa komeꞌa gagaḡanonoꞌo dure ovoradu duꞌurao hunuhune rudaro.
5.14: Aba taufeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ferau manahadu hari ꞌahi ne boroboro zu ne komeꞌakomeꞌa azaḡa meꞌodoziniro. Ebu vaze niduꞌa naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe ḡianoga radu onamiro.
5.15: Ze Iesu vaḡe arirotene, Legioni vineḡa sauꞌasauꞌaḡaniꞌa ragano reiroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa dabua vidanadu zamarone manoḡano ehore radiuꞌeteꞌe horoniro. ꞌOugadu zeꞌe rihau ḡouriro.
5.16: Ebu naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe niduꞌa horoniroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa vine sauꞌaḡeta vazeḡa zu aba ḡuḡuvaḡa mazao naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe meꞌodoziniro.
5.17: ꞌOugadu ze Iesuꞌa zeḡe habaonoꞌo vaḡinoga umidiro.
5.18: Iesuꞌa ḡasi zamaḡa diuḡirotene, vine sauꞌaniꞌa ragano reiroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa ani teite onamoga uminiro.
5.19: Rehano Iesuꞌa mene uratadu ꞌahige rae niro, “Neḡo onamadu ḡae teite ne tibano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ḡae mazao manoḡa borofe haḡateꞌe zu ḡae borofe vetuḡaḡadateꞌe ihozoꞌi.”
5.20: Eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌa onamadu Dekapoli zamaḡano Iesuꞌa ani mazao manoḡa borofe haḡairoteꞌe ḡadahe ziro. ꞌOugirotene vaze niduꞌa zaguzagaro. Iairo Aboḡa zu Ugi Roḡaeḡa (Mataio 9:18-26; Luka 8:40-56)
5.21: Iesuꞌa bare ḡasi hina duꞌura moneafa fare onamirotene, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani gabaḡeḡeniro ebu aniꞌe duꞌura eꞌe genaḡano radiro.
5.22: Ebu nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa ꞌahoga, niḡa Iairoꞌa ariro. Ani Iesu horonirotene Iesu oda babaḡano ḡuḡuriro,
5.23: ebu ḡihau uminiro, “Eḡe aboe komeꞌaꞌe rudauꞌohe. Ḡaeꞌa aradu ane rana ꞌevoꞌo toꞌi, ꞌougine ani manoriꞌuma zu ḡabodiꞌuma.”
5.24: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa ane teite onamiro. Ebu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesu hegotadu ani bibine varahe onamiro.
5.25: Ebu roḡae ugi madu muri gaubanana aheu fare adugano radiunuteꞌe roḡaeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu.
5.26: Aniꞌe gohe azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa ḡianiroteꞌe zamaḡano aduga boro hidiro ebu toheḡa niduꞌa mode hauḡiro. Rehano ani ugiꞌe mene manoriro zu ufeta bororaro.
5.27: Aniꞌa Iesu hari igirotene, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa zamaḡano Iesu ḡaruna aradu ani dabua tahiḡa oboniro.
5.28: Mazaḡa aniꞌe ꞌahige zamariro, “Eꞌa ane dabua tahiḡa obone tauḡine, e manoriꞌuma.”
5.29: ꞌOugirotene, ugiḡaniꞌa hauḡiro ebu aniꞌe ane ahirio ugiḡaniꞌa manorirotaꞌaꞌe ederiro.
5.30: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa zogone ederiro, ani mazaonoꞌo gigiꞌaḡaniꞌa buau vaḡiniro. Ebu Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa zamaḡano ḡihure tehadu ḡadiziro, “Iniuꞌa eḡe dabua oboneha?”
5.31: Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ḡae bibiꞌe varaheꞌeteꞌe horoneꞌohe. Nougadu, 'Iniuꞌa eḡe oboheha?' rae ḡadimuꞌohe?”
5.32: Rehano Iesuꞌe iniuꞌa ani dabua oboniroteꞌe ḡianihi radu ꞌize tehe vaḡovaḡiro.
5.33: Ebu roḡae aꞌe ane mazao naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe ederiro ꞌahine, rihauꞌenaꞌa rereraro ebu Iesu vaḡe aradu ani oda babaḡano ḡuḡuriro. Ebu ane mazao naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe moneo huga niduꞌa niro.
5.34: Ebu Iesuꞌa niro, “Aboe, ḡaeꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, ugiḡoꞌa manoreha. Zama roḡeḡota onamoꞌi ebu ugiḡonoꞌo manoroꞌi.”
5.35: Iesuꞌa ꞌize ḡoereꞌeteꞌea, nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa, Iairo neonoꞌo vaze nuꞌa aradu Iairo niro, “Aboḡoꞌe rudaneha. Nougadu ihore vazeḡa barebare umineꞌohe?”
5.36: Iesuꞌa zeḡe ḡoere egadu Iairo niro, “Ago rihanoꞌi, rehano fie tauḡoꞌi.”
5.37: Iesuꞌe vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa ani hegotoga garariro, rehano Petero, Iakobo ebu Iakobo negoḡa Ioane daꞌo zamaziro.
5.38: Ze nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa neo feurirotene, Iesuꞌe vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ḡihau harae ḡunuḡuneꞌeteꞌe zu niauꞌeteꞌe horoziro.
5.39: Aniꞌa ne zamaḡa diuḡadu ziro, “Nougadu za harae ḡunuḡuneꞌohe zu niauꞌohe? Roḡae komeꞌa aꞌe mene rudaneha, rehano bazeꞌohe.”
5.40: Rehano ze ani eḡofoharo. Aniꞌa zeḡe niduꞌa enone tuḡuze buziroteꞌe enogano, roḡae komeꞌa moga zu viꞌa ebu ane teite ariroteꞌe tahiꞌaḡa uḡidu zamazadu roḡae komeꞌaniꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa diuḡiro.
5.41: Ebu Iesuꞌa roḡae komeꞌa ꞌevoꞌano abinadu niro, “Talita komi!” Ḡoere eꞌe hugaꞌe, “Roḡae komeꞌa, eḡeꞌa ḡaꞌohe, iḡunoꞌi!”
5.42: ꞌOuge reirotene, roḡae komeꞌaniꞌa zogone iḡune edanadu ragaviro. Ani muriꞌe gaubanana aheu fare. ꞌOugadu ze ufeta zaguzagaro.
5.43: Ebu Iesuꞌa hari eꞌe moneo vazeni ꞌahoga ago noꞌi rae riḡa ziro, ebu tahiꞌa komeꞌa eꞌeꞌa ogafine ogomu nu hanoꞌi rae ziro.

6.1: Iesuꞌa eꞌe habaꞌa modadu ane haba onamiro. Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa zuni ḡatiniro.
6.2: Bana Madaḡa meirotene, ani nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano ihore ḡadahiro, ebu iniuꞌa eꞌe igiroteꞌe azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa zaguzagaro. Ze ꞌahige ḡadimutitiro, “Vaze ꞌahiꞌe noumaonoꞌo ꞌahiguḡa niduꞌa meiro? Aniꞌa meiroteꞌe zamaroneḡa huhuzaḡaꞌe nagini? Ani haḡai gigiꞌa nougenouge haḡaeꞌohe?
6.3: Vaze ahiꞌe ne ogoruꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa zu Maria ubuga, oꞌehe? Ani negoḡa duḡuruꞌe Iakobo, Iosefa, Iuda ebu Simona. Ane ezeḡa niduꞌaꞌe ꞌahao emeḡe teite radiuꞌohe.” Ebu zeꞌa ani hezahoharo.
6.4: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Peroveta vazeḡaꞌe haba nunu zamaḡano vazeꞌa gubaneꞌohe, rehano ane haba azaḡa, ane nabuga ebu ane ne azaḡaniꞌa daꞌo mene gubaneꞌohe.”
6.5: Aniꞌa eꞌea haḡai gigiꞌa ꞌahoga zuni mene haḡairo, rehano ane ꞌevore ugi azaḡa nu rana teadu faiziro.
6.6: Ebu Iesuꞌe zeḡeꞌa ani mazao mene firoteꞌe uꞌano zaguzagaro. Iesuꞌa Ane Tahiꞌatahiꞌa Gaubanana Aheu Fare Tuḡuziro (Mataio 10:1, 5-15; Luka 9:1-6) Ebu Iesuꞌa neḡaneḡa ragaveꞌenaꞌa, ihoziro.
6.7: Aniꞌa ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare huze nuꞌoziro. Ebu ze aheuaheu tuḡuzadu vine sauꞌasauꞌa hegoze buziꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa ziniro.
6.8: Ebu aniꞌa ihoziro, “Zae ragavo zamaḡano ḡau ꞌahoga ago moꞌi, rehano tuḡuze daꞌo moꞌi. Ogomu ga fuse ago odohoꞌi, ebu niharazeo hadi zuni ago odohoꞌi.
6.9: Tamakaze haḡaoꞌi, rehano dabua ꞌahoga ago odohoꞌi.
6.10: Noꞌe neḡa diuḡoꞌidene eꞌea daꞌo radoꞌi, onamo ne eꞌe mode iḡunoꞌi.
6.11: Noꞌe habaꞌa azaḡaniꞌa zae mene mae zouzoꞌidene, ga ḡoereze mene egozenoꞌidene, odaze huꞌuruḡa zauhe mode manahadu eꞌe habaꞌa mode iḡunoꞌi. ꞌOuge haḡadu zeḡeꞌa zae mazao sauꞌa haḡairoteꞌe ihozoꞌi.”
6.12: Eꞌanoꞌo ze onamadu vazeꞌa ḡihuroga veize haramiro.
6.13: Zeꞌe vine sauꞌa ḡehaḡa hegoze buziro ebu ugi azaḡa ḡehaḡa mazao dehoro asozenadu faiziro. Ioane Babatisoꞌa Rudaro (Mataio 14:1-12; Luka 9:7-9)
6.14: Iesu niꞌe haba niduꞌa zamaḡano bororanadu vaze niduꞌa ederiro ꞌahine, Galilea habaꞌa kiniḡa, Heroda zuni Iesu moneo igiro. Vaze nuꞌe ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ioane Babatisoꞌa rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡabodiro. Eꞌanoꞌo aneꞌa haḡai gigiꞌa inaraḡa hina gaueꞌohe.”
6.15: Ebu vaze nuꞌe raenaꞌa, “Aniꞌe Elia,” ebu vaze nuꞌe raenaꞌa, “Aniꞌe amahi peroveta azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoga.”
6.16: Rehano Herodaꞌa eꞌe igirotene, ꞌahige rae reiro, “Eḡeꞌa ꞌunuḡa variꞌe riꞌiroteꞌe vazeḡa, Ioaneꞌa runeonoꞌo ḡabodeha!”
6.17: Ibite Herodaꞌa negoḡa Filipi inuga Herodia meiro ꞌahine, Ioaneꞌa roniro. Eꞌanoꞌo Herodaꞌa uti azaḡa tuḡuzadu Ioane obone tiro ebu ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoniro.
6.18: Mazaḡa Ioaneꞌa Heroda mazao barebare niro, “Ḡaꞌa negoḡo inuga meirotaꞌaꞌe mene duduḡa.”
6.19: Eꞌanoꞌo Herodiaꞌa Ioane agirohanadu matihi reiro, rehano mene idararo.
6.20: Mazaḡa Ioaneꞌe duduḡa zu zaḡoḡa vazeḡa rae Herodaꞌa ederadu aniꞌe Ioane rihoniro ebu ani biriro. Ebu ani Ioane ḡoere igirotene, zamazeꞌa ufeta ꞌadaꞌadaziro, rehano Ioane ḡoere egoga uratiro.
6.21: Rehano mada manoḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ariro. Herodaꞌa fureraroteꞌe madaḡa meirotene, aniꞌa vaze boroboro zu uti vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa ebu Galilea habaꞌa azaḡa boroboro huzadu mui boro haḡairo.
6.22: Ebu Heroda aboḡaniꞌa diuḡi aradu zavonirotene, aniꞌa Heroda ebu ane iꞌudo azaḡa matuꞌoziro. ꞌOugadu kini Herodaꞌa aboḡa niro, “Ḡa urani ꞌahoga umihoꞌi, ꞌougine eḡeꞌa ḡaniꞌuma.”
6.23: Ebu Herodaꞌa ani teite ḡoitoradu ane ḡoere rinede tiro, “Ḡa nagini umihine, ḡaniꞌuma. Ḡaeꞌa uratoꞌidene, eḡe haba niduꞌaonoꞌo ḡahaꞌa zuni ḡaniꞌuma.”
6.24: ꞌOugadu roḡae eꞌea bua onamadu viꞌa niro, “E nagini uminiꞌuma?” Viꞌaniꞌa naenaeniro, “Ioane Babatiso vadini uminoꞌi.”
6.25: Roḡae eꞌeꞌa zogone kini vaḡe bare onamadu uminiro, “Izidi ꞌada Ioane Babatiso vadini siuva rana teadu eḡe enoga urateꞌohe.”
6.26: Herodaꞌe zamaḡaniꞌa ufeta adudaro, rehano ani aneꞌa huziroteꞌe azaḡa zamao ane ḡoere rinede tiro ꞌahine, aboḡaniꞌa uminiroteꞌe ḡauḡa hezahohanoga mene uratiro.
6.27: Eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌa zogone ane uti vazeḡa ꞌahoga riḡa ḡorenadu Ioane vadini variꞌe riꞌioga veize tuḡuniro. Ebu uti vazeḡaniꞌa onamadu ḡuꞌa neḡano Ioane vadini variꞌe riꞌiro.
6.28: Ebu vadigaꞌe siuva rana teadu bare odohe ariro ebu roḡae tahiꞌaḡa hanadu aneꞌa viꞌa haro.
6.29: Ioane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ꞌahi igirotene, onamadu Ioane ahiri meiro ebu idu zamaḡano guriro. Vaze Niduꞌa 5,000 Ḡubuziro (Mataio 14:13-21; Luka 9:10-17; Ioane 6:1-14)
6.30: Apostolo azaḡaniꞌa Iesu varahe nuꞌoraro. Ebu zeḡeꞌa haḡairoteꞌe zu ihoziroteꞌe niduꞌa ani mazao meꞌodiro.
6.31: Eꞌea vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa oname onainu ꞌahine, ze ogatiteꞌe madaḡani ꞌahoga oꞌoꞌa. ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Vaze oꞌoꞌa habaꞌa ꞌahoga onamihi ebu ahirife tahiḡa ohonihi.”
6.32: Ebu ze zeḡe daꞌo ḡasi hina vaze oꞌoꞌa habaꞌa onamiro.
6.33: Rehano vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ze horozadu zeꞌa onameꞌetaꞌaꞌe ederiro. Ebu neḡaneḡa niduꞌaonoꞌo odao ze zamao dure ibitiro.
6.34: Iesuꞌa ḡasionoꞌo buanadu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa horozirotene vetuḡaziro, mazaḡa zeꞌe vazeꞌa mene taufeꞌeteꞌe mamoeḡa teigiro. Eꞌanoꞌo ani ḡau ḡehaḡa moneo ze ḡadahe ihoziro.
6.35: Ḡoravararotene, Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ani vaḡe aradu niro, “ꞌAhiꞌe haba bohaꞌa zu mada ꞌai zubureha.
6.36: Ogomuze hoite afine, vaze niduꞌa ne uhiḡauhiḡano tuḡuze vaḡizoꞌi.”
6.37: Rehano ani naenaeziro, “Zaeꞌa ogomu nu zenoꞌi.” Rehano zeḡeꞌa niro, “Zeḡe niduꞌa veize bato fuꞌo uḡidu fare gauḡa hadiḡa meine, idaḡa! Emeꞌa eꞌe hadiḡa ufeta boro hina ꞌuvahu odoga hoitadu zeḡe ḡubuziꞌumahe?”
6.38: Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Zae mazao ꞌuvahu odoga nugu eꞌe? Onamadu ḡianoꞌi.” Zeꞌa ḡianadu niro, “Emeḡe mazaoꞌe ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo zu ḡozone aheu.”
6.39: Ebu Iesuꞌa vaze niduꞌa ve ḡabodoraḡa rana rovonerovone ehorifine ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro.
6.40: Ebu ze vaze 100 ga 50 rovonerovone ehoriro.
6.41: Ebu Iesuꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo zu ḡozone aheu madu adure ite ḡianeꞌenaꞌa, Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi reiro. Ebu ꞌuvahu odoga vahege tahitahadu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziniro, ebu ze vaze niduꞌa ḡahuge ziniro. Aniꞌa ḡozone aheu zuni zeḡe niduꞌa ḡahuge ziniro.
6.43: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga zu ḡozone ḡahaꞌaḡahaꞌa nuꞌonadu tunahu niduꞌa gaubanana aheu fare iriꞌavoniro.
6.44: Ogaroteꞌe azaḡa ohoze daꞌoꞌe niduꞌa 5,000. Vu rana Onamiro (Mataio 14:22-33; Ioane 6:15-21)
6.45: Iesuꞌa zogone ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa tuḡuzeꞌenaꞌa ziro, “Ḡasio tiradu eḡe vitihe duꞌura moneafa faradu Betesaida onamoꞌi.” U Iesuꞌe vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa tuḡuziro.
6.46: Aniꞌa ze muhiziroteꞌe enogano kuranoga radu maḡa komeꞌa itiro.
6.47: Ḡoravararotene, ḡasizeꞌe duꞌura nemao radiro ebu Iesuꞌe ane daꞌo gabao radiro.
6.48: Aniꞌe ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ḡurizabuo reve inaroga horoziro, mazaḡa zavara boroꞌa zeḡe vaḡe gudau ariro. Iraranae reirotene, aniꞌa duꞌura rana edanadu zeḡe vaḡe onamiro. Ani zeḡe vitizihi reiro.
6.49: Rehano ze aniꞌa duꞌura rana ariroteꞌe horonirotene, aniꞌe vine rae zamariro. Ebu ze huau ḡaniḡanaro,
6.50: mazaḡa zeḡe niduꞌa ani horonadu rihau rudaro. Rehano Iesuꞌa zogone ziro, “Zamaze rinedoꞌi! ꞌAdiꞌe eḡe. Ago rihanoꞌi.”
6.51: Ebu ani zeḡe teite ḡasio tiriro ebu zavaraꞌa dauḡiro. ꞌOugadu zeꞌe zaguzagau rudaro,
6.52: mazaḡa ze Iesuꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga hina vaze ḡehaḡa ḡubuziroteꞌe moneo huga mene ederiro zu zamazeꞌe turaro. Ugi Azaḡa Faiziro (Mataio 14:34-36)
6.53: Ze duꞌura faradu Genesareta neḡano hebetiro ebu ḡasi eꞌea ute tiro.
6.54: Ze ḡasionoꞌo buarotene, haba eꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Iesuꞌa arirotaꞌaꞌe ederiro.
6.55: Ze eꞌe habaꞌa neḡaneḡa niduꞌa dure ragaviro ebu Iesuꞌa noꞌe habaꞌano radiuꞌeteꞌe igirotene, ugi azaḡa farata rana heratadu Iesu vaḡe tutuze onamiro.
6.56: Ebu ani noꞌe neḡa zamaḡa, ne boro ga ne komeꞌa onamirotene, ze ugi azaḡa maketi habaꞌano bazune tiro. Ebu ugi azaḡaniꞌa ani dabua ꞌariḡa tahiḡa daꞌo obonoga veize uminiro. ꞌOugadu oboniroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe ugizeꞌa manoriro.

7.1: Farisea azaḡa zu Ierusalemaonoꞌo ariroteꞌe goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌa Iesu varahe nuꞌoraro.
7.2: Ze Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌa nuꞌa ꞌevoreze mene vuzuꞌadu ꞌevoreze toraga hina ogomu auꞌeteꞌe horoziro.
7.3: Farisea azaḡa zu Iuda azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe vouḡaze haḡai idunaḡano ꞌevoreze vuzuꞌadu ogomu aro.
7.4: Ze maketi habaꞌanonoꞌo onaeꞌetene, ꞌevoreze vuzuꞌadu ogomu aro. Ebu vouḡazeꞌa ihoziroteꞌe haḡaiḡa ꞌahogaꞌahogaꞌe ḡehaḡa. Ze bio, ḡoḡore ebu siuva vuzuꞌeꞌeteꞌe moneo zuni ihoziro.
7.5: Eꞌanoꞌo Farisea azaḡa zu goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Nougadu ḡae tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe emeḡe vaze boroboro haḡai idunaḡano mene radiuꞌenaꞌa, ꞌevoreze mene vuzuꞌadu ogomu auꞌohe?”
7.6: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Peroveta vazeḡa Isaiaꞌa zama guhi azaḡa, zae moneo Badiꞌa ḡoere rae furenirotaꞌaꞌe duduḡa. Aniꞌa ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'ꞌAhi azaḡaꞌe hebeze hina eḡe gubaheꞌohe, rehano zamazeꞌe eḡe mazaonoꞌo faḡa hune.
7.7: Zeꞌa Badiꞌa mazao kurauꞌetaꞌaꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa. Zeꞌe vazeꞌa tiroteꞌe goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌohe.'
7.8: Zaꞌe Badiꞌa goro ḡoere riḡa enonadu vouḡaze haḡai obone giganeꞌohe.”
7.9: Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe vouḡaze haḡai hegotoga veize Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa ḡarihe fase mae vaḡineꞌohe.
7.10: Moseꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Viꞌu mogo gubazoꞌi,' ebu 'Iniuꞌa ane viꞌa moga rae sausauzine, ani mau runiꞌuma.'
7.11: Rehano zaꞌe vize moze mazao ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Fase, e zae danazoga mene idaḡa, mazaḡa eḡeꞌa danaziteꞌe ḡauḡa ꞌahiꞌe Badiꞌa hatiteꞌe ḡahunoneḡa raha.'
7.12: Zaꞌe ꞌouge raꞌenaꞌa, vize moze veize gau ꞌahoga mene haḡaoga ihozeꞌohe.
7.13: Eꞌe ibiḡano zaeꞌa vouḡaze mazaonoꞌo meiroteꞌe haḡaiḡa nunu hegotoga veize, Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa mae vaḡineꞌohe. Zaꞌe ꞌuguḡa haḡai ḡehaḡa haḡaeꞌohe.” Vaze Sausauneꞌeteꞌe Ḡauḡa (Mataio 15:10-20)
7.14: Ebu hena Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ane vaḡe bare huzadu ziro, “Zae niduꞌa eḡe ḡoere egadu huga eꞌe ederoꞌi.
7.15: Vaze enoneonoꞌo zamaḡa diuḡeꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe vaze mene toratoraneꞌohe. Rehano vaze zamaḡanonoꞌo buauꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe vaze toratoraneꞌohe.”
7.17: Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa muhizadu ne diuḡirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa hari idaidaḡa moneo ḡadiniro.
7.18: Aniꞌa ḡadiziro, “Zaꞌe ꞌize mene edeḡahe? Vaze enoneonoꞌo vaze zamaḡa diuḡeꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe vaze mene toratoraneꞌohe. Za eꞌe aḡuꞌahe?
7.19: Mazaḡa aꞌe vaze zama mene diuḡeꞌohe, rehano isiḡa zamaḡa diuḡadu ahirionoꞌo buauꞌohe.” Iesuꞌa ꞌouge raꞌenaꞌa, ogomu niduꞌaꞌe deheḡa rae ihoziro.
7.20: Ebu aniꞌa bare ziro, “Naginiꞌa vaze zamaonoꞌo buauꞌetaꞌaꞌe vaze toratoraneꞌohe.
7.21: Mazaḡa vaze zamaonoꞌo zamarone sauꞌaniꞌa buauꞌohe. Aꞌe daro fuꞌa, ḡonore, gorugoru,
7.22: ubuma ḡezo, ununu, vaze sausaunihi raꞌeteꞌe zamaroneḡa, soꞌosoꞌo haḡaiḡa, matuꞌu veize radiu tauḡitauḡeꞌeteꞌe, ahiahi, vaze rae sausauzeꞌeteꞌe, nize mae iteꞌeteꞌe ebu zamarone kauriḡa raꞌohe.
7.23: Eꞌeguḡa sauꞌa niduꞌa vaze zamaonoꞌo buanadu vaze toratoraneꞌohe.” Sirofonikia Roḡaeḡaniꞌa Iesu mazao Firo (Mataio 15:21-28)
7.24: Iesuꞌa eꞌe habaꞌa modadu Turo onamiro ebu ne ꞌahoga diuḡiro. Aniꞌe vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa mene ederoga uratiro. Rehano ani ꞌuꞌuru radogaꞌe mene idararo.
7.25: Eꞌea roḡae ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu ebu ane aboḡaꞌe vine sauꞌaniꞌa ragano reiro. Roḡae aꞌe Iesu hariḡa egadu ani vaḡe ariro ebu odaḡa babaḡano ḡuḡuriro.
7.26: Roḡae aꞌe mene Iuda roḡaeḡa, rehano Siria habaꞌano Fonikiao fureraro. Ani ane aboḡa mazaonoꞌo vine sauꞌa hegone bunifine Iesu uminiro.
7.27: Rehano Iesuꞌa roḡae eꞌe niro, “Ibite geno tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡubuziꞌuma, mazaḡa tahiꞌatahiꞌa ogomu madu ḡuni hanogaꞌe mene idaḡa.”
7.28: Roḡae eꞌeꞌa naenaeniro, “A hube, Zuhiꞌa Boro. Rehano fata ꞌuꞌuḡano ḡuniꞌe zuni tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa mae modeꞌeteꞌe ogomuḡa mumuḡa auꞌohe.”
7.29: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡae naenaeꞌe manoḡa. Eꞌanoꞌo ḡa neḡo onamoꞌi. Vine sauꞌaꞌe aboḡa mazaonoꞌo vaḡineha.”
7.30: Roḡae eꞌeꞌa ne onamirotene, ane aboḡaꞌe evane rana bazoga zu vine sauꞌaꞌe ani mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoga horoniro. Teḡa Kuru zu Mumutafa Vazeḡa Fainiro
7.31: Hena Iesuꞌa Turo modadu Sidono vitiniro. Ebu Dekapoli habaꞌa onamadu Galilea duꞌuraḡa ovoiro.
7.32: Eꞌea vaze nuꞌa teḡa kuru zu mumutafa vazeḡa ꞌahoga Iesu vaḡe tutune aradu aniꞌa ꞌevoꞌa vaze eꞌe rana touga uminiro.
7.33: Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaonoꞌo vaze eꞌe genaḡa zamahu onamadu ane ꞌevore huduꞌa vaze eꞌe teḡa zamaḡano zouniro, ebu ane ꞌevoreo soꞌabidadu vaze eꞌe mazane oboniro.
7.34: Ebu adure ite ḡianadu heriro ebu vaze eꞌe niro, “Efata!” Ḡoere eꞌe hugaꞌe, “Raꞌanoꞌi!”
7.35: ꞌOugirotene, zogone vaze eꞌe teḡaḡaniꞌa raꞌaro zu ane mazaneꞌe ufiraro ebu ani faine ḡoere ḡadahiro.
7.36: Iesuꞌa vazeni ꞌahoga ago noꞌi rae riḡa ziro. Aniꞌa barebare ꞌouge ziro rehano, ze barebare ani hari rae fureniro.
7.37: Vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ufeta zaguzaganadu ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ani ḡau niduꞌa faifaine haḡaeꞌohe! Teḡa kuru azaḡa faizadu ze igiꞌohe, ebu mumutafa azaḡa faizadu ze ḡoereꞌohe.”

8.1: Eꞌe madaḡano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa nuꞌoraro. Ze anoga ogomuḡa oꞌoꞌa radu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ane uhiḡa huze aradu ziro,
8.2: “E ꞌahi duḡuru vetuḡaziꞌohe, mazaḡa ze ꞌahao mada uḡidu eḡe teite radiuꞌohe zu ogomuze oꞌoꞌa.
8.3: Eḡeꞌa ze vinini nezeo tuḡuzine, ze ibio higau bauriꞌuma, mazaḡa zeḡe boꞌaḡano nuꞌe haba faḡanonoꞌo areha.”
8.4: Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa naenaeniro, “Haba bohaꞌano ꞌada iniuꞌa ogomu ḡehaḡa madu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ꞌahi ḡubuziꞌuma?”
8.5: Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Zae mazao ꞌuvahu odogaꞌe nugu?” Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “ꞌUvahu odogaꞌe fuꞌo aheu fare zu ḡozone komeꞌaꞌe tahiḡa.”
8.6: Ebu aniꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa rahao ehoroga radu ziro. Ebu hena ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo aheu fare zu ḡozone nu madu Badiꞌa mazao kuraro. Ebu vahegadu vaze ḡahuge zenoga veize ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziniro, ebu zeꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ḡahugiro.
8.7: Zeḡe mazao ḡozone komeꞌa nu zuni eꞌe. Iesuꞌa eꞌe madu kuraro ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa zeadu zeꞌa ḡahugiro.
8.8: Vaze niduꞌa au idararo. Ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ogomu ḡahaꞌaḡahaꞌa mae ufadu tunahu niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fare iri'avoniro.
8.9: Eꞌea ogaroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano ohoze daꞌo niduꞌa 4,000. Iesuꞌa ze tuḡuze vaḡiziro.
8.10: Ebu ani zogone ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite ḡasio tiradu Dalumanuta habaꞌa onamiro. Farisea Azaḡaniꞌa Haḡai Nu Badeḡa Umidiro (Mataio 16:1-4)
8.11: Farisea azaḡaniꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu ani teite ḡadahe taꞌirotitiro. Ze ani tuhune nurihi radu uminiro, “Badiꞌa gigiꞌaḡa hina haḡai nu badeḡa haḡaoꞌi.”
8.12: Iesuꞌa hereꞌenaꞌa zamaḡaniꞌa adudanadu ꞌahige rae ziro, “Nogadu izidi egaꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa umideꞌohe? Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, haḡai nu badeḡani ꞌahoga zuni mene furenoziniꞌuma.”
8.13: Ebu hena aniꞌa ze muhizadu ḡasio bare tiriro ebu duꞌura moneafa fare onamiro. Farisea Azaḡa zu Herodaꞌe Isiti Heuḡa (Mataio 16:5-12)
8.14: Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga mae odohoga aḡutaro ebu zeḡe ḡasi zamaḡanoꞌe ꞌuvahu odoga tiba daꞌo horoniro.
8.15: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa riḡa iraduguziro, “Tohutohoꞌi. Farisea azaḡa zu Heroda ḡiazoꞌi, mazaḡa zeꞌe isiti heuḡa.”
8.16: ꞌOugadu ze zeḡeꞌa bare ḡoꞌaniro, “Emeḡe mazaoꞌe ꞌuvahu odoga oꞌoꞌa radu ani ꞌouge raꞌohe.”
8.17: Iesuꞌa ze nagini ḡoꞌanirotaꞌaꞌe ederadu ḡadiziro, “Nougadu zae mazao ꞌuvahu odoga oꞌoꞌa radu ḡoꞌaneꞌohe? Za ꞌize mene horoneꞌehe ga mene edeḡahe? Za zamaze tuḡahe?
8.18: Zaꞌe ubumazeta, rehano ehamanoga mene idaḡahe? Ebu teḡazeta, rehano abitoga mene idaḡahe? Za mene zamareꞌehe?
8.19: Eḡeꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo hina vaze 5,000 ḡubuzirotene, ḡahaꞌaḡahaꞌaꞌe tunahu nugu iriꞌavoniro?” Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Tunahu gaubanana aheu fare.”
8.20: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Eḡeꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo aheu fare hina vaze 4,000 ḡubuzirotene, ḡahaꞌaḡahaꞌaꞌe tunahu nugu iriꞌavoniro?” Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Tunahu fuꞌo aheu fare.”
8.21: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Za ꞌize mene edeḡahe?” Betesaida Neḡano Ubuma Kuruḡa Vazeḡa Fainiro
8.22: Zeꞌe Betesaida neḡa ariro. Ebu vaze nuꞌa ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa ꞌahoga tutune aradu Iesuꞌa ani obonifine uminiro.
8.23: Iesuꞌa ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa ꞌevoꞌano abinadu ani tutune neonoꞌo vaḡiniro. Aniꞌa vaze eꞌe ubuma rana soꞌabidiro ebu ane ꞌevore ani rana teadu ḡadiniro, “Ḡa ḡau ꞌahoga horoneꞌehe?”
8.24: Ani dude ehamanadu niro, “E vaze horozeꞌohe. Ze horozogaꞌe ireꞌa edau ragaveꞌeteꞌe heuḡa.”
8.25: Ebu Iesuꞌa bare ane ꞌevore vaze eꞌe ubuma rana tiro. ꞌOugirotene, ane ubumaꞌa raꞌanadu bare ehamaro ebu ḡau niduꞌa faine horoniro.
8.26: Iesuꞌa ani ane ne tuḡuneꞌenaꞌa niro, “Betesaida neḡa ago diuḡoꞌi.” Peteroꞌa Iesuꞌe Keriso rae Reiro (Mataio 16:13-20; Luka 9:18-21)
8.27: Iesu zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Kaisarea Filipo habaꞌano neḡaneḡa ragave onamiro. Eꞌe ibiḡano Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡadiziro, “Vazeꞌa eꞌe iniu rae raꞌohe?”
8.28: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Nuꞌe ḡaꞌe Ioane babatiso, nuꞌe Elia, ebu nuꞌe amahi peroveta vazeḡa ꞌahoga rae raꞌohe.”
8.29: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “U zaꞌe eꞌe iniu rae raꞌohe?” Peteroꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡaꞌe Keriso.”
8.30: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡoere riḡa ziro, “Eḡe moneo vazeni ꞌahoga zuni ago noꞌi.” Iesuꞌa Ane Aduga zu Rune moneo Ihoziro (Mataio 16:21-28; Luka 9:22-27)
8.31: Ebu hena Iesuꞌa ane rune moneo ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡadahe ihoziro, “Vaze Ubuganiꞌa aduga ḡehaḡa hidiꞌuma. Ebu vaze boroboro, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa hezahohaꞌuma zu goruniꞌuma. Ebu ani mada uḡidu enogano bare ḡabodiꞌuma.”
8.32: Aniꞌa eꞌe moneo deheru ḡoerirotene, Peteroꞌa Iesu ane genaḡano zamahu onamadu ḡadahe roniro.
8.33: Rehano Iesuꞌa tehadu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡiazeꞌenaꞌa, Petero roniro, “Satani, eḡe mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi! Ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa gau mene zamareꞌohe, rehano vaze gau zamareꞌohe.”
8.34: Ebu hena Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ane vaḡe huze nuꞌozadu ziro, “Iniuꞌa eḡe hegotihi rae roꞌidene, ane ura niduꞌa modadu ane satauro odoheꞌenaꞌa, eḡe hegotoꞌi.
8.35: Mazaḡa iniu ane ḡabone obone giganeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone tuḡutuḡu mene hidiꞌuma. Rehano iniuꞌa eḡe zu hari manoḡa veize ane ḡabone ahetine, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma.
8.36: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa haba niduꞌa meiteꞌe ḡarugano ḡaboneḡa daunine, nagi manoḡa hidiꞌuma?
8.37: Ḡau ꞌahoga hanadu ḡaboneḡa bare mouga idaḡahe?
8.38: Izidi madaḡa azaḡaꞌe daro zu haḡai sauꞌa futauꞌohe. Eꞌe zamaḡano iniuꞌa eḡe zu eḡe ḡoere uꞌano mazagaronine, Vaze Ubuga zuni Moga agaḡano ebu tuḡure viga zaḡoḡa niduꞌa agaḡano ariteꞌe madaḡano vaze eꞌe uꞌano mazagaroniꞌuma.”

9.1: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, izidi ꞌada edau radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze nuꞌa ꞌizema rudanogano Badiꞌaꞌa gigiꞌaḡa hina aradu zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe horoniꞌuma.” Iesu Iraḡaniꞌa Nufiro (Mataio 17:1-13; Luka 9:28-36)
9.2: Mada fuꞌo tiba fare enogano Iesuꞌa Petero, Iakobo ebu Ioane zamazadu zeḡe daꞌo maḡa boro itiro. Eꞌea ani iraḡaniꞌa zeḡe zamao nufiro.
9.3: Dabuaḡaꞌe ꞌurau vazavazahiro. Haba niduꞌa zamaḡano vazeni ꞌahoga zuni vuzuꞌe dehenadu ꞌouge ꞌuranogaꞌe mene idararo.
9.4: Ebu zeḡe zamao Elia zu Moseꞌa fureranadu Iesu teite ḡoeriro.
9.5: ꞌOugadu Peteroꞌa Iesu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, eme ꞌahao radiune manoḡa. Emeḡe uḡiduꞌa nugo taruha uḡidu ogoratihi. Tibaꞌe ḡae veize, tibaꞌe Mose veize ebu tibaꞌe Elia veize ogoraꞌuma.”
9.6: Peteroꞌe nagini raꞌetaꞌaꞌe mene ederiro, mazaḡa ze rihau rudaro.
9.7: Ebu ḡozeꞌa fureranadu ze ogoziro ebu ḡozeonoꞌo ago ꞌahoganiꞌa ziro, “ꞌAhiꞌe eḡe zamarone Ubude. Za ani ḡoere egohanoꞌi.”
9.8: Ḡarihe fase zeꞌa ehamu vaḡirotene, vazeni ꞌahoga mene horoniro, rehano Iesu daꞌo horoniro.
9.9: Ze maḡanonoꞌo ovairoteꞌea, Iesuꞌa riḡa ziro, “Zaꞌa horonataꞌaꞌe vazeni ꞌahoga ago noꞌi, onamo Vaze Ubuganiꞌa rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡabodiꞌuma.”
9.10: ꞌOugadu ze nagini horoniroteꞌe zeḡe daꞌo zamariro, rehano runeonoꞌo ḡabodiꞌuma rae reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa huga moneo ḡadimutitiro.
9.11: Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Nougadu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa, ꞌEliaꞌe ibite ariꞌuma,' rae raꞌohe?”
9.12: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Hube hune Eliaꞌa ibite aradu ḡau niduꞌa ruhibiꞌuma. Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Vaze Ubugaꞌe aduga boro hidiꞌuma ebu vazeꞌa ani hezahohaꞌuma.' Aꞌe nougadu mirihiro?
9.13: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, Elia ꞌai amahi ariro. Rehano vazeꞌa ani mene ederadu Buka Zaḡoḡano ane moneo mirihiroteꞌe teige, ani mazao zeḡe ura haḡaiḡa haḡairo.” Tahiꞌa Komeꞌa Vine Sauꞌaḡeta Fainiro (Mataio 17:14-20; Luka 9:37-43)
9.14: Iesu zu ane tahiꞌa uḡiduꞌa ane tahiꞌa ꞌahogaꞌahoga vaḡe ovairotene, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌa edau ḡeḡezeꞌeteꞌe, zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa zeḡe teite taꞌirotiteꞌeteꞌe horoziro.
9.15: Vaze niduꞌa Iesu horonadu ḡihau zaguzagaro, ebu ani uꞌa dure onamadu ani mazao, “Manoḡahe?” rae unihiro.
9.16: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡadiziro, “Zaꞌe zeḡe teite nagini moneo taꞌirotiteꞌohe?”
9.17: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa naenaeniro, “Ihore vazeḡa, e eḡe ubude ḡae vaḡe tutune areha. Aniꞌe vine sauꞌaniꞌa agatohanadu ḡoerogaꞌe mene idaḡa.
9.18: Vine sauꞌaniꞌa noumao ani agatohauꞌetene, ani rahao mae feuneꞌohe. ꞌOugadu ani hebeꞌano busureꞌohe, ḡonoga atiteꞌohe ebu ahiꞌaniꞌa taiduꞌohe. E ḡae tahiꞌatahiꞌa mazao vine sauꞌa hegone bunoga veize umizeha, rehano ze mene idaraneha.”
9.19: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Zaꞌe mene fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa! E zae teite noꞌe faḡa radiꞌuma? E zae mazao noꞌe faḡa zamahe obone tiꞌuma? Tahiꞌa komeꞌa eꞌe eḡe vaḡe tutune aroꞌi.”
9.20: Eꞌanoꞌo ze ani tutune ariro. Vine sauꞌaniꞌa Iesu horonirotene, zogone tahiꞌa komeꞌa aꞌe mae ketoketonadu aniꞌe rahao higau bauriro ebu hebeꞌano busureꞌenaꞌa, kiure ragaviro.
9.21: Ebu Iesuꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌa moga ḡadiniro, “Ani noꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo ugi ꞌahi meiro?” Moganiꞌa naenaeniro, “Ani komeꞌa madaḡanonoꞌo meiro.
9.22: Vine sauꞌaniꞌa ḡae ḡehaḡa ani manoga veize ire rogao ga vuo ani mae feuniro. Rehano ḡaeꞌa ḡauni ꞌahoga haḡaogaꞌe idaḡa roꞌidene, emeḡe vetuḡafoꞌi zu danafoꞌi.”
9.23: Iesuꞌa niro, “'Idaḡa roꞌidene,' rae ago roꞌi. Iniu fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ḡau niduꞌa haḡaogaꞌe idaḡa.”
9.24: Tahiꞌa komeꞌa moganiꞌa zogone agoḡa boro hina ḡihau niro, “E fieꞌohe. Eḡeꞌa fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe zoreḡa ꞌahine, eḡe danahoꞌi!”
9.25: Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa dure areꞌeteꞌe horozirotene, vine sauꞌa roniro, “Vaze mae teḡa kuru zu mumutafa azaḡano sausauzeꞌeteꞌe viga, eḡeꞌa riḡa ḡaꞌohe, ani mazaonoꞌo buanoꞌi ebu ani mazao ago bare diuḡoꞌi.”
9.26: ꞌOugirotene, vine sauꞌaniꞌa ḡihau ḡaniḡanaro ebu tahiꞌa komeꞌa mae ketoketonadu buau vaḡiniro. Tahiꞌa aꞌe rune vazeḡa teigiro ꞌahine, zeḡeꞌa, “Ani rudaneha,” rae reiro.
9.27: Rehano Iesuꞌa ꞌevoꞌano ani obonadu abine ḡihinirotene, ani edau iḡuniro.
9.28: Iesuꞌa ne ꞌahoga diuḡirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa sifu ḡadiniro, “Emeꞌa nougadu vine sauꞌa hegone bunoga mene idaraneha?”
9.29: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “ꞌAhiguḡa vine sauꞌaꞌe kuru hina daꞌo mae buzeꞌohe.” Iesuꞌa Ane Rune moneo Bare rae Fureniro (Mataio 17:22-23; Luka 9:43b-45)
9.30: Ze eꞌe habaꞌa modadu Galilea habaꞌa vitau onamiro. Iesuꞌe vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa ze noumao radiuꞌetaꞌaꞌe ederoga mene uratiro,
9.31: mazaḡa aniꞌe ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ihozinu. Aniꞌa ꞌahige rae ziro, “Vaze Ubugaꞌe agireḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌiniꞌuma. Ze ani maꞌuma ebu mada uḡidu enogano aniꞌa bare ḡabodiꞌuma.”
9.32: Rehano Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe ane ḡoere huga mene ederiro ebu eꞌe moneo bare ḡadimanoga zuni riharo. Iniuꞌe Ḡihiꞌa hune? (Mataio 18:1-5; Luka 9:46-48)
9.33: Ze Kaperanauma neḡa onamiro. Iesuꞌa neo radirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡadiziro, “Za ibio nagi moneo roteteha?”
9.34: Rehano ze sifu radiro, mazaḡa ze ibio iniuꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune moneo rotetiro.
9.35: Iesuꞌa ehoriroteꞌe enogano ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare huzadu ziro, “Iniuꞌe vaze ibiꞌa reihi reine, aniꞌe vaze ḡonaga rae radu vaze niduꞌa tuḡure vazeḡano reꞌuma.”
9.36: Aniꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌa ꞌahoga zamahanadu zeḡe boꞌaḡano ohoniro ebu ane ꞌevore hina ohanadu ziro,
9.37: “Iniuꞌa eḡe niḡano tahiꞌa komeꞌa ꞌahiguḡa mae ḡihinine, aniꞌe eḡe mae ḡihiheꞌohe. Ebu iniuꞌa eḡe mae ḡihihine, aniꞌe eḡe daꞌo mene mae ḡihiheꞌohe, rehano eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa mae ḡihineꞌohe.” Eme mene Agirofiꞌeteꞌe Vazeḡaꞌe Emeḡe none Vazeḡa (Luka 9:49-50)
9.38: Ioaneꞌa Iesu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, eme vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ḡae niḡano vine sauꞌasauꞌa hegoze buziroteꞌe horoniro. ꞌOugadu emeḡeꞌa ani garariro, mazaḡa aniꞌe mene emeḡe none vazeḡa.”
9.39: Iesuꞌa niro, “Ani ago gararoꞌi. Iniuꞌa eḡe niḡano haḡai gigiꞌa haḡairoteꞌe ḡarugano eḡe rae sausauheꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa.
9.40: Eme mene agirofiꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe emeḡe none vazeḡa.
9.41: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa zaꞌe Keriso mone azaḡa radu vu bioḡa tiba ziniꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe aniꞌa meiteꞌe naeḡa mene hune dauniꞌuma.” Vaze Haḡai Sauꞌano Tutune Veꞌoneꞌeteꞌe Vazeḡa (Mataio 18:6-9; Luka 17:1-2)
9.42: “Ebu eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa komeꞌakomeꞌa ꞌahiguḡa boꞌaḡano tiba zuni haḡai sauꞌano tutune veꞌoneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe hadi horeḡa ane ꞌunuo autadu davarao mae feunineꞌe ufeta manoḡa.
9.43: ꞌEvoreḡo naeḡaniꞌa haḡai sauꞌano tutuꞌe veꞌoꞌoꞌidene, variꞌe modoꞌi. ꞌEvo'o tiba hina ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidogaꞌe ufeta manoḡa. Aꞌe ꞌevoreḡo aheu hina ire roga mene hauḡeꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano mae feuꞌoga vitineꞌohe.
9.45: Odaḡo naeḡaniꞌa haḡai sauꞌano tutuꞌe veꞌoꞌoꞌidene, variꞌe modoꞌi. Odaḡo tiba hina ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidogaꞌe ufeta manoḡa. Aꞌe odaḡo aheu hina ire roga radiu tuḡutuḡu zamaḡano mae feuꞌoga vitineꞌohe.
9.47: Ubumaḡo naeḡaniꞌa haḡai sauꞌano tutuꞌe veꞌoꞌoꞌidene, ḡude modoꞌi. Ubumaḡo tiba hina Badiꞌaꞌa zihiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa diuḡogaꞌe ufeta manoḡa. Aꞌe ubumaḡo aheu hina ire roga radiu tuḡutuḡu zamaḡano mae feuꞌoga vitineꞌohe.
9.48: Ire rogao radiu tuḡutuḡeꞌeteꞌe idiḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa ahirize aꞌuma ebu ire rogaꞌe mene hune vidaꞌuma.
9.49: Dibuꞌo rana dama teadu deheneꞌeteꞌe teige, vaze niduꞌaꞌe ire roga hina deheziꞌuma.
9.50: Damaꞌe manoḡa, rehano iniganiꞌa hauḡine, nougenouge bare inidaꞌuma? Zae boꞌaḡano dama teadu unihotitoꞌi.”

10.1: Iesuꞌa eꞌe habaꞌa modadu Iudea habaꞌa onamiro ebu hena Ioridana vuḡa moneafa onamiro. Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani vaḡe bare ariro ebu aneꞌa iḡaiḡa haḡainuteꞌe teige ze ihoziro.
10.2: Ebu Farisea azaḡa nuꞌa Iesu tuhune nurifine ani vaḡe aradu ḡadiniro, “Ohozeꞌa inuga modogaꞌe idaḡahe?”
10.3: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Moseꞌa nagi goro ḡoeꞌa ziro?”
10.4: Zeꞌa niro, “Moseꞌe ohozeꞌa inuga modoꞌidene, aniꞌa ihore soꞌaḡa mirihadu inuga hauꞌeteꞌe enogano inuga modogaꞌe idaḡa rae reiro.”
10.5: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Zamaze riḡa ꞌahine, Moseꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa eꞌe mirihadu ziniro.
10.6: Rehano ḡadaheḡano Badiꞌaꞌa ḡau niduꞌa haḡairotene, vaze haḡadu zeꞌe ohoze zu roḡae reiro.
10.7: Eꞌanoꞌo ohozeꞌe viꞌa moga modadu inuga teite tiburaꞌuma,
10.8: ebu anianine ahiri tiba reꞌuma. ꞌOugadu zeꞌe mene aheu, rehano ahiri tiba.
10.9: Eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa tibuzirotaꞌaꞌe vazeꞌa mene rovoniꞌuma.”
10.10: Ze bare ne diuḡirotene, Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa eꞌe moneo ḡadiniro.
10.11: Ebu aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Iniuꞌa inuga modadu roḡae ꞌahoga teite hahurine, aniꞌe inuga agirohanadu ubuma ḡezauꞌeteꞌe heuḡa.
10.12: Ebu roḡaeꞌa iꞌa modadu ohoze ꞌahoga teite hahurine, aniꞌe ubuma ḡezauꞌeteꞌe heuḡa.” Iesuꞌa Tahiꞌa Komeꞌakomeꞌa veize Kuraro (Mataio 19:13-15; Luka 18:15-17)
10.13: Vaze nuꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa tutuze Iesu vaḡe ariro, mazaḡa Iesuꞌa ꞌevoꞌa zeḡe rana touga uratiro. Rehano ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ze roziro.
10.14: Iesuꞌa eꞌe horonirotene, ani zamaḡa ḡuginadu ziro, “Tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa eḡe vaḡe arogaꞌe idaḡa roꞌi zu ago gararoꞌi. Mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa teigeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa.
10.15: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌa teige Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe mene mae ḡihinine, aniꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaniꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa mene reꞌuma.”
10.16: Ebu Iesuꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa ane ꞌevore hina ohaziro, ebu ꞌevoꞌa zeḡe rana teadu ze manohuga hidifine kuraro. Maꞌora Vazeḡa (Mataio 19:16-30; Luka 18:18-30)
10.17: Iesuꞌa ane ibiḡano ḡadahe onamirotene, vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ane vaḡe dure aradu Iesu zamao obenaḡa hina tuḡiro ebu ḡadiniro, “Ihore vazeḡa manoḡa, e nougine, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma?”
10.18: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡa nougadu eꞌe manoḡa rae raꞌohe? Vazeni ꞌahoga zuni mene manoḡa, rehano Badiꞌa ane daꞌo manoḡa.
10.19: Ḡaꞌe Mose goro ḡoeꞌa edeḡa: 'Ago gorugoroꞌi, ubuma ago ḡezanoꞌi, ago ḡonotanoꞌi, vaze moneo ago ḡuriroꞌi, vaze ago soꞌosoꞌozoꞌi ebu viꞌu mogo gubazoꞌi.' ”
10.20: Aniꞌa Iesu naenaeniro, “Ihore vazeḡa, eꞌe komeꞌanonoꞌo ḡoere ꞌahi niduꞌa hegote ariro.”
10.21: Iesuꞌa ani ḡiaḡianadu ani zamare borofiro. Ebu aniꞌa niro, “Ḡa ḡau ꞌahoga ꞌize mene haḡaeha. Onamadu ḡauḡo niduꞌa seronoꞌi ebu zahara azaḡa zenoꞌi. ꞌOugine, ḡa adureo ḡau naeḡa boroboro hidiꞌuma. Ebu aradu eḡe hegotoꞌi.”
10.22: Aniꞌa Iesu ḡoere egadu zaguzagaro ebu zamaḡaniꞌa adudu bororuꞌenaꞌa iḡuniro, mazaḡa aniꞌe ufeta maꞌora vazeḡa.
10.23: Iesuꞌa ehamu varahiro ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Maꞌora azaḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa rougaꞌe riḡa bagaḡa.”
10.24: Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe Iesu ḡoere egadu zaguzagaro. Ebu Iesuꞌa bare ziro, “Eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa, vazeꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa rougaꞌe riḡa bagaḡa.
10.25: Kameroꞌa niduru hoꞌoga diuḡogaꞌe riḡa. Rehano maꞌora vazeḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaniꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa rougaꞌe ufeta riḡa.”
10.26: Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe ufeta hune zaguzagaro ebu zeḡeꞌa bare ḡadimutitiro, “ꞌOugine, iniuꞌa ḡabone hidiꞌuma?”
10.27: Iesuꞌa ḡiazadu ziro, “Vaze aneꞌa bare ḡabone hidogaꞌe mene idaḡa, rehano Badiꞌaꞌe idaḡa. Badiꞌaꞌa ḡau niduꞌa haḡaogaꞌe idaḡa.”
10.28: Ebu Peteroꞌa niro, “Eme emeḡe ḡau niduꞌa modadu ḡa hegotiro.”
10.29: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa eḡe zu hari manoḡa veize neḡa, negoḡa, ezeḡa, viꞌa, moga, tahiꞌaḡa ga mebaḡa modine,
10.30: aniꞌe izidi madaḡano aduga hidiꞌuma rehano, naeḡa ḡae 100 hidiꞌuma—neḡa, negoḡa, ezeḡa, viꞌa, tahiꞌaḡa ebu mebaḡa bare hidiꞌuma. Ebu zama moneo ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma.
10.31: Rehano vaze ibiꞌa ḡehaḡaꞌe ḡonaga reꞌuma, u vaze ḡonaga ḡehaḡaꞌe ibiꞌa reꞌuma.” Iesuꞌa Ane Rune moneo Ḡae Uḡiduḡa Ihoziro (Mataio 20:17-19; Luka 18:31-34)
10.32: Iesu zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe Ierusalema iteꞌeteꞌea, Iesuꞌa ibitiro ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe zaguzagaro zu ani hegotiroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe riharo. Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare ane uhiḡa huze aradu naginiꞌa ani mazao fureratiteꞌe ihoziro,
10.33: “Emeꞌe Ierusalema iteꞌohe. Ebu Vaze Ubugaꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌiniꞌuma. Ze ani runeo tuḡuniꞌuma zu Iuda mene azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌiniꞌuma.
10.34: Ebu Iuda mene azaḡaꞌe ḡirihohaꞌuma, ani rana soꞌabidiꞌuma, masiniꞌuma zu goruniꞌuma. Rehano mada uḡidu ḡarugano aneꞌa bare ḡabodi'uma.” Iakobo ebu Ioaneꞌa Iesu Uminiro (Mataio 20:20-28)
10.35: Ebu Zebedeo ubugaubuga, Iakobo zu Ioaneꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, emeꞌa nagini umideꞌeteꞌe ḡaeꞌa emeḡe veize haḡaoga urateꞌohe.”
10.36: Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Zaꞌe eḡeꞌa zae veize nagini haḡaoga urateꞌohe?”
10.37: Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡaeꞌa niḡo mae ḡihiniteꞌe madaḡano emeḡe boꞌaḡano tibaꞌe ḡae edaꞌe mone zu ꞌahogaꞌe ḡae kauri mone iḡuꞌa ḡihiꞌaḡano ehoroga urateꞌohe.”
10.38: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Za zaeꞌa nagini umiheꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa. Eḡeꞌa gageꞌeteꞌe bioḡa aduga zaeꞌa gagoga idaḡahe, zu eḡeꞌa meiroteꞌe babatisoḡa hina zaeꞌa babatisozoga idaḡahe?”
10.39: Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Oꞌe, eme idaḡa.” Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe eḡeꞌa gageꞌeteꞌe bioḡa gagiꞌuma ebu eḡeꞌa meiroteꞌe babatisoḡa meꞌuma.
10.40: Rehano eḡe edaꞌe mone zu kauri mone iḡuꞌa ḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe eḡeꞌa mene ziniꞌuma, rehano Badiꞌaꞌa ohoziroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa daꞌo iḡuri eꞌe meꞌuma.”
10.41: Iesu tahiꞌa gaubananaꞌa eꞌe igirotene, Iakobo zu Ioane mazao maḡuniro.
10.42: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa ze huze nuꞌozadu ziro, “Za edeḡa, Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡa zuhiꞌaziꞌohe rae zamareꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe zeḡe haba azaḡa riḡa zuhiꞌaziꞌohe, ebu gavana vazeḡa boroboroꞌe zeḡe haba azaḡa rana edauꞌohe.
10.43: Rehano zaꞌe ze ago teigoꞌi. Zae boꞌaḡano iniuꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune reihi reine, aniꞌe zae tuḡure vazeḡano reꞌuma.
10.44: Ebu iniuꞌe zae boꞌaḡano vaze ibiꞌa reihi reine, aniꞌe vaze niduꞌa tuḡure vazeḡano reꞌuma.
10.45: Mazaḡa Vaze Ubugaꞌe vazevazeꞌa ane tuḡure azaḡano rouga radu mene ariro, rehano aniꞌe vaze tuḡure vazeḡano rouga radu ariro. Ebu vaze ḡehaḡa veize ane ḡabone hina dibuꞌifine ariro.” Ubuma Kuruḡa Vazeḡa, Batamio Fainiro (Mataio 20:29-34; Luka 18:35-43)
10.46: Ebu hena ze Ieriko ariro. Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa zu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa teite Ieriko mode iḡunirotene, ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa ꞌahoga, Timeo ubuga Batamioꞌa ibi genaḡano hadi umineꞌenaꞌa, ehore radiro.
10.47: Ani Nazareta vazeḡa Iesuꞌa vitauꞌeteꞌe igirotene, ḡihau huaro, “Iesu, Davida mariga, eḡe vetuḡahoꞌi!”
10.48: ꞌOugirotene, vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ani roniro, “Ḡa sifu radoꞌi!” Rehano ani ufeta ḡihau huaro, “Davida mariga, eḡe vetuḡahoꞌi!”
10.49: Ebu Iesuꞌa tue edanadu ziro, “Ani hunoꞌi.” Ebu ze ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa hunadu niro, “Inaroꞌi zu edau iḡunoꞌi. Iesuꞌa ḡa huḡadeꞌohe.”
10.50: Ebu aniꞌe ane raga dabuaḡa genaḡano feune modadu rafate iḡuniro ebu Iesu vaḡe onamiro.
10.51: Iesuꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡa eḡeꞌa ḡae veize nagini haḡaoga urateꞌohe?” Ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡaniꞌa niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, e ehamatihi.”
10.52: Ebu Iesuꞌa niro, “Onamoꞌi. Ḡaeꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌeꞌa ḡae manoꞌeha.” ꞌOugirotene, aniꞌa zogone bare ehamaro ebu ibio Iesu hegotiro.

11.1: Ze Ierusalema hanitadu Olivi Maḡano Betefage zu Betania neḡano feurirotene, Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌa aheu tuḡuzeꞌenaꞌa ziro,
11.2: “Zama ḡoha neḡa onamoꞌi. Eꞌe neḡa diuḡine, vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa mene ehoriroteꞌe donikiḡa ubuga batune touga horoniꞌuma. Doniki eꞌe fuhiꞌadu ꞌahi zamahu aroꞌi.
11.3: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa, 'Za nougadu ꞌahigeꞌohe?' rae ḡadizoꞌidene, 'Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa urateꞌohe ebu ḡarihe ꞌahi bare tuḡune ariꞌuma,' rae noꞌi.”
11.4: Ze onamadu doniki ubuga ꞌahoga ibi enogano ibiheta ꞌahogano batune touga horoniro ebu doniki ubuga eꞌe fuhiꞌiro.
11.5: Eꞌe madaḡano eꞌea edau radiroteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Za nougadu doniki ubuga eꞌe fuhiꞌeꞌohe?”
11.6: Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe Iesuꞌa ziroteꞌe teige naenaeziro. ꞌOugirotene, ze idaḡa radu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌa tuḡuze onamiro.
11.7: Ze doniki ubuga tutune Iesu vaḡe aradu dabuaze doniki ubuga ḡarunio zahariro ebu Iesuꞌa eꞌe rana tire ehoriro.
11.8: Ebu vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa dabuaze ibi rana hiraro, u vaze nuꞌe ire ezaga rouḡeta butuo variꞌe madu hiraro.
11.9: Ebu Iesu zamao onamiroteꞌe azaḡa zu ḡaruna hegotiroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa huaro, “Hosana! Zuhiꞌa Boro niḡano areꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune!
11.10: Nigunihi! Emeḡe mama Davidaꞌa zuhiꞌaziteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa areꞌohe!” “Hosana, hitana huneo niḡa nigunihi!”
11.11: Iesuꞌa Ierusalema diuḡadu kuru neḡa onamiro ebu eꞌea ḡau niduꞌa ḡiane ragaviro. Ḡoravararo ꞌahine, ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare teite Betania neḡa onamiro. Figi Ireḡa Roniro (Mataio 21:18-19)
11.12: Irarirotene, ze Betania neḡa mode iḡuneꞌeteꞌea Iesuꞌe vininiro.
11.13: Aniꞌa faḡanonoꞌo ehamarotene figi ireḡa rouḡeta horoniro ebu aꞌe maḡaḡeta ga oꞌoꞌaꞌe udahoga veize onamiro. Aniꞌa eꞌe uhiḡa onamadu ḡianirotene, maḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa, rehano rouḡa daꞌo horoniro, mazaḡa aꞌe mene figi ireḡaniꞌa hudauꞌeteꞌe madaḡa.
11.14: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa ire eꞌe niro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ḡae mazaonoꞌo maḡa ꞌahoga mene hune aꞌuma.” Ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe aniꞌa ꞌouge reiroteꞌe igiro. Iesuꞌa Kuru Neḡa Deheniro (Mataio 21:12-17; Luka 19:45-48; Ioane 2:13-22)
11.15: Ebu ze Ierusalemao feunirotene, Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌano diuḡadu hoiteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu seroneꞌeteꞌe azaḡa hegoze buziro. Ebu hadi seniso ziniꞌeteꞌe azaḡa fata zu Tubugo niniḡa seroneꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ehoro habaꞌa mae ḡihuniro,
11.16: ebu iniuꞌa toheze kuru neḡa habaꞌano odohe vitau oname onaeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa garariro.
11.17: Ebu aniꞌa ze ihoziro, “Buka zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Eḡe neꞌe kuru neḡa rae huniꞌuma.' Rehano zaeꞌa kuru neḡaꞌe ḡonore azaḡa neḡano ḡihuniro.”
11.18: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Iesu ḡoere igirotene, Iesu manoga radu ibi ꞌahoga ḡadahe vaḡiro. Mazaḡa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa niduꞌa ane ihore moneo zaguzagaro ꞌahine, ze ani rihoniro.
11.19: Ḡoravararotene, Iesu ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe Ierusalema ḡutuꞌaḡa onamiro. Figi Ireḡaniꞌa Roraroteꞌe moneo Iesuꞌa Ihoziro (Mataio 21:20-22)
11.20: Oherebau uzeuze, ze ibio onameꞌeteꞌea, figi ireḡaꞌe moꞌaḡanonoꞌo rorau taiga ḡuzu ovoroga horoniro.
11.21: ꞌOugirotene, Peteroꞌa zamaradu Iesu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, ḡianoꞌi! Ḡaeꞌa, 'Rudanoꞌi,' rae niroteꞌe figi ireḡaꞌe roraneha.”
11.23: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa maḡa ꞌahi ninaꞌa, 'Ḡihitadu davara zamaḡano buanoꞌi,' rae reine ebu ani zamaḡa mene ꞌadaꞌadaneꞌenaꞌa, aniꞌa nagini rateꞌeꞌa hudaꞌuma rae mae ḡihinine, ꞌuguḡaniꞌa fureraꞌuma.
11.24: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, zaeꞌa kurauꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano nagini umineꞌetaꞌaꞌe hideha rae mae ḡihinine, zaeꞌa hidiꞌuma.
11.25: Zaꞌa edanadu kurauꞌeteꞌe madaḡano, zaeꞌa vaze ꞌahoga teite agirotitoꞌidene, ane haḡai sauꞌa rae modoꞌi. ꞌOugine, Moze adureo zuni zae haḡai sauꞌa rae modiꞌuma.” Iesu Gigiꞌaḡa moneo Ḡadiniro (Mataio 21:23-27; Luka 20:1-8)
11.27: Ze Ierusalemao bare feuriro. Ebu Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌano ragaviroteꞌea, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa, Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa ani vaḡe ariro.
11.28: Ebu zeꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡa noꞌe gigiꞌaḡa hina ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌohe? Iniuꞌa ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa ḡaniro?”
11.29: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡe zuni ḡadimu ꞌahoga zinihi. Eḡe naenaehoꞌi, ꞌougine e noꞌe gigiꞌaḡa hina ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe ihoziꞌuma.
11.30: Ioaneꞌa babatiso zinirotaꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ga vaze mazaonoꞌo? Ehoꞌi!”
11.31: Ze zeḡe daꞌo ḡoꞌaneꞌenaꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo reine, 'Za nougadu Ioane ḡoere mene mae ḡihiniro?' rae ifiꞌuma.
11.32: U vaze mazaonoꞌo reine zuni mene idaḡa.” Ze vaze ḡehaḡa rihoziro, mazaḡa zeḡe niduꞌa Ioaneꞌe hube hune peroveta vazeḡa rae mae ḡihiniro.
11.33: Eꞌanoꞌo ze ꞌahige naenaeniro, “Eme aḡuꞌa.” Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡe zuni noꞌe gigiꞌaḡa hina haḡai ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe mene ihoziꞌuma.”

12.1: Hena Iesuꞌa hari idaidaḡa hina ze ḡadahe ziro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa vaini mebaḡa ꞌahoga ḡoraro. Aniꞌa vaini mebaḡa ḡoranadu ḡabiꞌa merau varahiro, ebu vaini maḡa vuḡa gigeꞌeteꞌe veize iduḡa ꞌahoga huꞌiro, zu ehamuꞌeteꞌe neḡa hitaga haḡairo. Hena vaini mebaḡa eꞌe hihi azaḡa nu ꞌevoreo tiro, ebu haba ꞌahoga onamadu mada faḡa ragaviro.
12.2: Vaini maḡa hiriveꞌeteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa feurirotene, vaini mebaḡa vazeḡaniꞌa hihi azaḡa mazaonoꞌo vaini maḡa nu mouga radu ane tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoga zeḡe vaḡe tuḡune onamiro.
12.3: Rehano ze ani obone teadu bouniro ebu ꞌevoꞌa isoḡa tuḡune baroniro.
12.4: Hena ani tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoga zeḡe vaḡe bare tuḡuniro, rehano ze ani vadigano maro ebu ani mae mazagarone runiro.
12.5: Ebu ani tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoga zeḡe vaḡe bare tuḡuniro, rehano zeꞌa ani mau runiro. Ebu aniꞌa tuḡure azaḡa ḡehaḡa bare tuḡuziro, rehano ze nuꞌe bouziro ebu nuꞌe zimi ruziro.
12.6: Ebu ani mazao tuḡuniteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe tiba daꞌo eꞌe, aꞌe ane zamarone ubuga. Ḡonagano ani ubuga tuḡuniro ebu ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Ze eḡe ubude gubaniꞌuma gaogi.'
12.7: Rehano hihi azaḡaniꞌa neneḡaniro, 'ꞌAhiꞌe moga mazaonoꞌo vaini mebaḡa ꞌahi meiteꞌe vazeḡa. Eme ani matihi, ꞌougine vaini mebaḡa ꞌadiꞌe emeḡeꞌa meꞌuma.'
12.8: Eꞌanoꞌo ze ubuga obone teadu mau runiro, ebu ani vaini mebaḡa enonao mae feuniro.
12.9: ꞌOugadu vaini mebaḡa vazeḡaꞌe zeḡe mazao nougiꞌuma? Ani aradu hihi azaḡa mau ruziꞌuma ebu vaini mebaḡaꞌe vaze nu ziniꞌuma.
12.10: Zaꞌe Buka Zaḡoḡano ḡoere ꞌahi mene meꞌodirohe? 'Vazeꞌa hadi hina ne ogorarotene, zeꞌa mae modiroteꞌe hadiḡaꞌe ne duꞌe rinedeꞌeteꞌe hadiḡa reiro.
12.11: Aꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa. Emeḡeꞌa ḡianeꞌetene, zaguzagauꞌohe.' ”
12.12: Ebu hena dibuꞌo azaḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa, Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ebu vaze boroboroꞌe Iesuꞌa zeḡe moneo hari idaidaḡa reiroteꞌe ederirotene, Iesu obone tihi reiro. Rehano ze vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa zeḡe mazao maḡuniꞌuma radu rihoziro ꞌahine, Iesu muhinadu oname ḡouriro. Takesiꞌe Iniu Haꞌuma? (Mataio 22:15-22; Luka 20:20-26)
12.13: Vesu ze Iesuꞌa ḡoere rae veꞌonine obone touga veize Farisea azaḡa zu Heroda mone azaḡa nuꞌe Iesu vaḡe tuḡuziro.
12.14: Ze ani vaḡe aradu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, eme edeḡa, ḡaꞌe huga daꞌo ḡoereꞌohe, vaze uꞌano zamaḡo mene haganeꞌohe, vaze niduꞌa mazao mene inaheꞌohe zu Badiꞌa mone ibiḡa hugano ihozeꞌohe. Emeꞌe Roma kiniḡa mazao takesi haune, idaḡa ga mene?
12.15: Eme takesi ani haꞌuma ga mene?” Rehano Iesuꞌa ze ani soꞌonihi rae raꞌetaꞌaꞌe ederadu ziro, “Nougadu zaꞌe eḡe soꞌohihi radu tuhuheꞌohe? Roma hadiḡa tiba odohe aradu ihohoꞌi.”
12.16: Zeꞌa Roma hadiḡa tiba odohe arirotene Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Iniu viga zu iniu niḡaꞌe hadi eꞌe rana mirihiro?” Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Aꞌe Roma kiniḡa viga zu niḡa.”
12.17: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Roma kiniḡa ḡauꞌe Roma kiniḡa hanoꞌi, u Badiꞌa ḡauꞌe Badiꞌa hanoꞌi.” Ebu zeꞌe ani ḡoere egadu zaguzagaro. Runeonoꞌo Bare Ḡabodeꞌeteꞌe moneo Ḡadiniro (Mataio 22:23-33; Luka 20:27-40)
12.18: Ebu hena Sadukea azaḡa nuꞌa Iesu vaḡe ariro. Zeꞌe vazeꞌa runeonoꞌo mene bare ḡabodiꞌuma rae raꞌeteꞌe azaḡa.
12.19: Zeḡeꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ihore vazeḡa, Moseꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa ꞌahoga ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Ohoze ꞌahoganiꞌa rudanadu ane inugaꞌe ubuga ꞌoꞌoꞌa reine, ohoze negoḡaniꞌa ḡozobaḡa teite hahuriꞌuma, ebu ubuga furenadu ubuganiꞌa rune negoḡa ehaꞌa meꞌuma.'
12.20: Hari ꞌahi zamaroꞌi. Negoḡa niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fareꞌa radiunu. Ibiꞌaniꞌa hahuriro ebu ubuga oꞌoꞌa rudaro.
12.21: Ebu negoḡa aheuḡaniꞌa ḡozobaḡa teite hahuriro, rehano ane zuni ubuga oꞌoꞌa rudaro. Ebu negoḡa uḡiduḡa mazao zuni ꞌuguḡaniꞌa idane fureraro.
12.22: Ebu negoḡa niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fareꞌa ubudeze oꞌoꞌa rudaro. Ḡonagano ḡozoba eꞌe zuni rudaro.
12.23: ꞌOugadu runeonoꞌo bare ḡaboditeꞌe madaḡano roḡae aꞌe iniu inuga reꞌuma? Mazaḡa ohoze niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fareꞌa ani teite hahuriro.”
12.24: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Zaꞌa zamareꞌetaꞌaꞌe veꞌoḡa, mazaḡa za Buka Zaḡoḡa ga Badiꞌa gigiꞌaḡa moneo aḡuꞌa.
12.25: Rune azaḡaniꞌa bare ḡaboditeꞌe madaḡano ohoze zu roḡaeꞌe mene hahuriꞌuma. Zeꞌe tuḡure viga adureo teigiꞌuma.
12.26: Rune azaḡaniꞌa bare ḡabodeꞌeteꞌe moneoꞌe za Mose Bukaḡano ire renoga hariḡa mene meꞌodirohe? Hari eꞌe zamaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa Mose ꞌahige rae niro, 'Eꞌe Aberahamo Badiꞌa, Isako Badiꞌa zu Iakobo Badiꞌa.' Za eꞌe aḡuꞌahe?
12.27: Badiꞌaꞌe mene rune azaḡa Badiꞌa, rehano ḡabone azaḡa Badiꞌa. Zae zamaroneꞌe veꞌoḡa hune!” Goro Ḡoeꞌa Ḡihiꞌa Hune (Mataio 22:34-40; Luka 10:25-28)
12.28: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe boꞌaḡano ꞌahoganiꞌa aradu zeḡeꞌa taꞌirotiteꞌeteꞌe igiro. Ebu aniꞌe Iesuꞌa faine naenaeziroteꞌe horonadu ḡadiniro, “Goro ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano noꞌe goro ḡoeꞌaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune?”
12.29: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Goro ḡoeꞌa ḡihiꞌa huneꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe: 'Isaraela azaḡa, egoꞌi. Zuhiꞌa Boro emeḡe Badiꞌaꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro tibuhuga.
12.30: Zamaze niduꞌa hina, vineze niduꞌa hina, zamaroneze niduꞌa hina zu inaraze niduꞌa hina Zuhiꞌa Boro zae Badiꞌa zamare borofoꞌi.'
12.31: Goro ḡoeꞌa ḡihiꞌa hune aheuḡaꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe: 'Za zae bare zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe teige, nabudize zamare borofoꞌi. Goro ḡoeꞌani ꞌahoga goro ḡoeꞌa ꞌahiguḡa mene vitinoga.' ”
12.32: Ebu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa Iesu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, ḡae ḡoere ꞌahiꞌe duduḡa: Badiꞌaꞌe tibuhuga. Badiꞌani ꞌahogaꞌe oꞌoꞌa.
12.33: Zamaze niduꞌa hina, zamaroneze niduꞌa hina zu inaraze niduꞌa hina Badiꞌa zamare borofeꞌetaꞌaꞌe, ebu za zae bare zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe teige nabudize zamare borofeꞌetaꞌaꞌe hufi haoneꞌeteꞌe dibuꞌoḡa zu ḡahunone niduꞌa vitinoga.”
12.34: Iesuꞌa ani fairu doḡoꞌani naenaeniroteꞌe horonirotene, ani niro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaḡaniteꞌe madaḡaꞌe mene faḡa.” Eꞌe enogano vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu mene bare ḡadiniro. Kerisoꞌe Iniu Mariga? (Mataio 22:41-46; Luka 20:41-44)
12.35: Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌano ihoziroteꞌea, vaze ḡadiziro, “Nougadu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Kerisoꞌe Davida mariga rae raꞌohe?
12.36: Davidaꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa ihonadu ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Badiꞌaꞌa eḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro niro, “Eḡe edaꞌe moneo ehoroꞌi, onamo eḡeꞌa agireḡo niduꞌa madu odaḡo ꞌuꞌuḡano raharahaziꞌuma.”'
12.37: Davida aneꞌa bare Keriso mazao, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro,' rae huniro. Tena Kerisoꞌe nougenouge Davida mariga reꞌuma?” Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa huneꞌa matuꞌeꞌenaꞌa, Iesu ḡoere igiro. Mose Goro Ḡoeꞌa Ihozeꞌeteꞌe Azaḡa Roziro (Mataio 23:1-36; Luka 20:45-47)
12.38: Iesuꞌa vaze ihozeꞌenaꞌa, ꞌahige rae ziro, “Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ḡiazoꞌi. Ze dabua manoḡa faḡa vidau ragavoga zu vaze ḡehaḡa habaꞌano vazeꞌa ze gubazeꞌenaꞌa, zeḡe mazao unihoga,
12.39: ebu nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano vaze boroboroꞌa ehoreꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano ehoroga urateꞌohe zu muio nize boro azaḡaniꞌa ehoreꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano ehoroga urateꞌohe.
12.40: Ebu zeꞌe ḡozoba soꞌozadu toheze niduꞌa meizeꞌohe zu vaze ihozifine faḡafe ḡurire kurauꞌohe. ꞌUguḡa azaḡaꞌe aduga boro bagaḡa hidiꞌuma.” Ḡozoba Ḡaunone Hadiḡa (Luka 21:1-4)
12.41: Iesuꞌa kuru neḡano ḡahunone mauḡaḡa moneḡudune ehoradu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ḡahunone mauḡa zamaḡano hadize ufiꞌeteꞌe muririro. Ebu maꞌora azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa hadi boro ufiro.
12.42: Rehano zahara ḡozoba ꞌahoganiꞌa aradu kopa hadiḡa komeꞌa aheu ufiro. Aꞌe hadi komeꞌa fase.
12.43: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa huze nuꞌozadu ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zahara ḡozobaḡa ꞌadaꞌa vaze niduꞌa vitize ḡahunone mauḡa zamaḡano hadi boro ofeha.
12.44: Zeḡe niduꞌaꞌe hadize ḡehaḡa rehano, tahiḡa daꞌo ofeha. U ḡozoba ꞌadiꞌe zahara roḡaeḡa, rehano ane hadi niduꞌa ebu ane ogomu hadiḡa niduꞌa ofeha.”

13.1: Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa mode buarotene, ane tahiꞌa ꞌahoganiꞌa niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, ḡianoꞌi. Ne hadiḡa niduꞌaꞌe horeḡa hune! Ne iraḡa niduꞌaꞌe manoḡa tauḡi!”
13.2: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡa ne boro ꞌahi niduꞌa horoneꞌehe? Ne ꞌahi niduꞌa fahe ḡuzuhiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa aradu hadini ꞌahoganiꞌa hadi ꞌahoga rana mene radiꞌuma.” Aduga zu Sauꞌaniꞌa Fureraꞌuma (Mataio 24:3-14; Luka 21:7-19)
13.3: Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa moneḡudune Olivi Maḡano ehoreꞌeteꞌea, Petero, Iakobo, Ioane ebu Andereaꞌa sifu ḡadiniro,
13.4: “Eme efoꞌi. Eꞌeguḡaꞌe naniꞌa fureraꞌuma? Ebu eꞌeguḡaniꞌa nariga fureranateꞌe madaḡanoꞌe nagi haḡai nu badeḡaniꞌa ibite fureraꞌuma?”
13.5: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa zae mene soꞌosoꞌozifine tohutohoꞌi.
13.6: Vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa eḡe niḡano aradu 'Eꞌe Keriso,' rae raꞌenaꞌa, vaze ḡehaḡa soꞌosoꞌoziꞌuma.
13.7: Zaꞌe utiꞌa fureraroteꞌe hariḡa zu fureraꞌuma rae raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa nunu egoꞌidene, zamazeꞌa ago ꞌadaꞌadazoꞌi. Eꞌeguḡaniꞌa hube hune ibite fureraꞌuma, rehano mada ḡonagaꞌe ꞌize mene ariꞌuma.
13.8: Haba ꞌahoganiꞌa haba ꞌahoga teite utitiꞌuma zu gavamani ꞌahoganiꞌa gavamani ꞌahoga teite utitiꞌuma. Haba nunu zamaḡano habaꞌa borofe hagariꞌuma zu zagaꞌa hiaꞌuma. Eꞌeguḡa niduꞌaꞌe ene ꞌizema fureranogano gigiꞌaniꞌa ḡadahe fureruꞌeteꞌe heuḡa.
13.9: Zaꞌe tohutohoꞌi. Vazeꞌa zae oboze teadu kotao ohoziꞌuma ebu zeḡe nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano masiziꞌuma. Eḡe uꞌano, zaꞌe gavamani azaḡa zu kini azaḡa mazao tutuze onamadu edauꞌenaꞌa, eḡe hari manoḡa zeḡe zamao rae fureniꞌuma.
13.10: Ebu hari manoḡaꞌe habaꞌahabaꞌa azaḡa niduꞌa mazao ibite harame huniꞌuma.
13.11: Vazeꞌa kotao za oboze toꞌidene, nagini rae ḡoeriteꞌe moneo zamaze ago ibite adudanoꞌi. Eꞌe madaḡano za nougenouge rae ḡoeriteꞌe moneo ihoziꞌuma ebu ihoziteꞌe ḡoeꞌa idunaḡano reꞌuma, mazaḡa ḡoere aꞌe mene zae mazaonoꞌo, rehano Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa reꞌuma.
13.12: Negoḡaniꞌa negoḡa revohanadu runeo tuḡuniꞌuma, moganiꞌa ubuga revohanadu runeo tuḡuniꞌuma ebu ubudezeꞌa vize moze agirozeadu runeo tuḡuziꞌuma.
13.13: Eḡe uꞌano vaze niduꞌa za heꞌeheꞌeziꞌuma. Rehano iniu edau gigaru onamo ḡonaga meiteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone hidiꞌuma.” Aduga Boro Bagaḡa (Mataio 24:15-28; Luka 21:20-24)
13.14: “Haba sausauneꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa sauꞌa bagaḡaniꞌa mene edatiteꞌe habaꞌano edauꞌeteꞌe zaeꞌa horoniteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma (ꞌadi meꞌodeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, ḡoere huga ꞌadi faine ederoꞌi). Eꞌe madaḡano Iudea habaꞌano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe maḡa ferau itoꞌi.
13.15: Ne enogano radiuꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡauḡa mouga veize ne zamaḡa ago diuḡoꞌi.
13.16: Mebao hiheꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe dabua mouga veize ago bare onamoꞌi.
13.17: Eꞌe madaḡano ahiꞌeta roḡaeḡa zu nune hina ene guraḡa ḡubuzeꞌeteꞌe roḡaeḡaꞌe feranoga mene idaḡa radu aduga boro hidiꞌuma!
13.18: ꞌUguḡaniꞌa irugu madaḡano mene fureranoga veize kuranoꞌi.
13.19: Mazaḡa eꞌe madaḡano vaze niduꞌa aduga boro hune hidiꞌuma. Badiꞌaꞌa ḡadaheḡano ḡau niduꞌa haḡairoteꞌeanoꞌo onao izidi, aduga ꞌuguḡaniꞌa mene fureraro ebu vesuꞌu zuni mene bare fureraꞌuma.
13.20: Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa eꞌe madaḡa mene futufine, vaze tiba zuni mene ḡabode radiꞌuma. Rehano ani aneꞌa ohozadu zamaziroteꞌe azaḡa veize eꞌe madaḡa futufiro.
13.21: Eꞌe madaḡano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa zinaꞌa, 'Ḡianoꞌi, Kerisoꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe!' ga 'Ḡianoꞌi, aniꞌe ꞌomo eꞌe!' rae zoꞌidene, eꞌe ḡoeꞌa ago mae ḡihinoꞌi.
13.22: Mazaḡa ḡuriro kerisoḡa zu ḡuriro peroveta azaḡaniꞌa fureranadu haḡai nu badeḡa zu haḡai gigiꞌa haḡaeꞌenaꞌa, vaze soꞌoziꞌuma. Ze idaḡa reine, Badiꞌaꞌa ohotiroteꞌe azaḡa zuni soꞌoziꞌuma.
13.23: Eꞌanoꞌo za tohutohoꞌi. Eꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ꞌizema fureranogano eḡeꞌa ḡau niduꞌa zae ibite ihozeha.” Vaze Ubuganiꞌa Ariꞌuma (Mataio 24:29-31; Luka 21:25-28)
13.24: “Rehano aduga madaḡaniꞌa hauḡine, 'Madaꞌa uzaboraꞌuma, batoꞌa mene agaraꞌuma,
13.25: buzuvaꞌa adureonoꞌo rururu buaꞌuma, ebu adure gigiꞌaḡaniꞌa hagahagariꞌuma.'
13.26: Eꞌe madaḡano ze Vaze Ubuganiꞌa gigiꞌaḡa boro zu agaḡa boro hune madu ḡoze hina areꞌeteꞌe horoniꞌuma.
13.27: Ebu aniꞌa ane tuḡure viga ḡehaḡa tuḡuziꞌuma, ebu zeḡeꞌa haba ḡonaganonoꞌo adure ḡonagano, haba niduꞌa zamaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa ohotiroteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌoziꞌuma.” Figi Ireḡa Hari Idaidaḡa (Mataio 24:32-35; Luka 21:29-33)
13.28: “Figi ireḡa ḡianadu ꞌahi ederoꞌi. Ezaganiꞌa butiru itadu rouḡaniꞌa udufaꞌoga horoneꞌetene, zaꞌe irugu madaḡaniꞌa haniteha rae edereꞌohe.
13.29: Eꞌe teige, ꞌahiguḡaniꞌa fureranoga horonoꞌidene, Vaze Ubugaꞌe zae ibiheta uhiḡano rae ederoꞌi.
13.30: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, izidi egaꞌe mene hauḡiꞌuma, onamo ꞌahiguḡa niduꞌa fureraꞌuma.
13.31: Adure zu rahaꞌe hauḡiꞌuma, rehano eḡe ḡoereꞌe mene hune hauḡiꞌuma.” Eꞌe Madaḡaꞌe Aḡuꞌa (Mataio 24:36-44)
13.32: “Rehano vazeni ꞌahoga zuni ꞌuguḡaniꞌa fureratiteꞌe madaḡaꞌe aḡuꞌa. Adureo tuḡure viga ebu Badiꞌa Ubuga zuni aḡuꞌa, rehano Moga daꞌo edeḡa.
13.33: Tohutohe radoꞌi, mazaḡa zaꞌe aḡuꞌa, eꞌe madaḡaniꞌa naniꞌa ariꞌuma.
13.34: Aꞌe vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa haba faḡa onameꞌeteꞌe hariḡa ꞌahoga heuḡa. Ani iḡuneꞌetene, tuḡureḡa azaḡa huzadu ane ḡau niduꞌa faine taufoꞌi rae raꞌohe, zeḡe tibatiba gau tibatiba ziniꞌohe, ebu ibiheta taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe faine ḡianoꞌi rae raꞌohe.
13.35: Eꞌanoꞌo tohutohoꞌi, mazaḡa za aḡuꞌa, ne Zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa noꞌe madaḡano naniꞌa bare ariꞌuma. Aꞌe ḡorava oheꞌano, ga ohere nemanema, ga irara oheꞌano kokorokuꞌa ugauꞌeteꞌe madaḡano, ga oheredauꞌe za aḡuꞌa.
13.36: Aniꞌa tabara aradu za bazuna mene horozifine zaꞌe evatoꞌi.
13.37: Eḡeꞌa za ziꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe vaze niduꞌa ziꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa: Evate radoꞌi!”

14.1: Mada aheu enoganoꞌe Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ebu Isiti Oꞌoꞌa ꞌUvahu Odoga Muiḡa meꞌuma rae reirotene, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Iesu soꞌonadu obone teadu manoga veize ibiḡa ḡoꞌane vaḡiro.
14.2: Rehano ze zeḡeꞌa bare ꞌahige rae reiro, “Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa madaḡanoꞌe mene idaḡa. ꞌOugine, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa utitofiꞌuma.” Roḡae ꞌAhoganiꞌa Dehoro Hohoḡa Iesu rana Beuꞌiro (Mataio 26:6-13; Ioane 12:1-8)
14.3: Iesuꞌe Betania neḡano ibite referaꞌa meiroteꞌe vazeḡa Simona neo ogau radiro. Eꞌe madaḡano roḡae ꞌahoganiꞌa dehoro huga hohoḡa manoḡa naeḡa boro, niḡa Nadoꞌe bioḡa komeꞌa manohuga iriꞌavonadu mae ariro. Ebu bioḡa komeꞌa eꞌe varadadu Iesu vadinio dehoro hohoḡa beuꞌiro.
14.4: Rehano eꞌea vaze nuꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare maḡune ḡadimutitiro, “Nougadu dehoro hohoḡa ꞌadi mode hauḡeha?
14.5: Aꞌe seronifone, muri tiba gau hadiḡa vitinifo ebu eꞌe hadiḡaꞌe zahara azaḡa zinifo.” ꞌOugadu ze roḡae eꞌe roniro.
14.6: Rehano Iesuꞌa ziro, “Roḡae ꞌahi ago gararoꞌi. Za nougadu ani aduga hauꞌohe? Aniꞌe eḡe mazao manoḡa hune haḡaeha.
14.7: Zahara azaḡaꞌe iḡaiḡa zae teite radiꞌuma radu zaeꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe madaḡa niduꞌa ze danazogaꞌe idaḡa. Rehano eꞌe iḡaiḡa zae teite mene radiꞌuma.
14.8: Aniꞌe aneꞌa nagini haḡaoga idaḡa raꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa haḡaeha. Eḡeꞌa rudanadu guriteꞌe madaḡa ibite ruhiboga veize dehoro hohoḡa eḡe ahiri rana beuꞌeha.
14.9: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, raha niduꞌa zamaḡano noꞌe habaꞌano hari manoḡa haramine, aniꞌa haḡateꞌe haḡaiḡa ꞌahi meꞌodadu ani zamariꞌuma.” Iudaꞌa Iesu Revohaꞌuma rae Reiro (Mataio 26:14-16; Luka 22:3-6)
14.10: Iesu tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare boꞌaḡano tahiꞌa ꞌahoga, Isakariota vazeḡa Iudaꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa ꞌevoreo Iesu riꞌinoga veize zeḡe vaḡe onamiro.
14.11: Zeꞌe Iuda ḡoere egadu matuꞌe rudaro ebu hadi silivaḡa nu haꞌuma rae ḡoere tiro. ꞌOugadu Iudaꞌa Iesu zeḡe ꞌevoreo riꞌinoga veize mada manoḡa ꞌahoga vaḡiro. Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa Ogomuḡa Aro (Mataio 26:17-25; Luka 22:7-13, 21-23; Ioane 13:21-30)
14.12: Isiti Oꞌoꞌa ꞌUvahuḡa Odoga Muiḡa zamaḡano mada ibiꞌaꞌe Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa. Eꞌe madaḡano dibuꞌo mamoeḡa ubuga maro. Eꞌe madaḡa meirotene, Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡa urao eme nouma Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ogomuḡa ruhibe tiꞌuma?”
14.13: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌa aheu tuḡuzeꞌenaꞌa, ziro, “Ne boro diuḡine, ohoze ꞌahoganiꞌa vu ḡoḡoreḡa odohe onameꞌeteꞌe horoniꞌuma. Ebu ani hegotadu aneꞌa diuḡeꞌeteꞌe neḡa diuḡoꞌi.
14.14: Diuḡadu ne eꞌe vazeḡa noꞌi, 'Ihore vazeḡaniꞌa ꞌahige raꞌohe: E eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ogomuḡa atihi. Iꞌudo azaḡa veize ruhibiroteꞌe habaꞌaꞌe noumao?'
14.15: ꞌOugine, aniꞌa ne hitagano bazuni neḡa boro ꞌahoga ihoziꞌuma zu zaꞌe ehoro habaꞌa ruhibe teateꞌe horoniꞌuma. Eꞌea ogomufe ruhibe toꞌi.”
14.16: Iesu tahiꞌa aheuꞌa iḡunadu ne boro diuḡiro ebu Iesuꞌa ziroteꞌe idunane niduꞌa horoniro. ꞌOugadu ze Iḡine Modiroteꞌe muiḡa ruhibe tiro.
14.17: Ḡoravararotene, Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare teite feuri ariro.
14.18: Ze ogomu fataḡa babaḡano ehoradu ogauꞌeteꞌea, Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zae boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa eḡe revoniꞌuma. Aniꞌe eḡe teite ogauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.”
14.19: Ze zamazeꞌa adudanadu zeḡe tibatibaniꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Eꞌe mene, ineo?”
14.20: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Aniꞌe zae, gaubanana aheu fare boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga. Eḡe teite siuva zamaḡano idaḡa ꞌuvahu odoga tare auꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.
14.21: Vaze Ubuga moneo Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌe idunaḡano Vaze Ubuganiꞌa rudaꞌuma. Rehano ani revohatiteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe aduga boro hidiꞌuma. Aniꞌe mene furerafone, ufeta manoḡa reifo.” Ḡonaga Ogomuḡa Aro (Mataio 26:26-30; Luka 22:14-20; 1Korinto 11:23-25)
14.22: Ze ogauꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano, Iesuꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga madu kuraro, ebu vahegadu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziniro. Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “ꞌAdi madu anoꞌi. ꞌAdiꞌe eḡe ahiri.”
14.23: Ebu hena ani vaini vuḡa bioḡa madu kuraro, ebu zenadu zeḡe niduꞌa eꞌe gagiro.
14.24: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “ꞌAhiꞌe eḡeꞌa vaze ḡehaḡa veize beꞌuneꞌeteꞌe ruhe hina ohoneꞌeteꞌe ḡoitore ḡoeꞌa.
14.25: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, eꞌe vaini vuḡa mene bare gagiꞌuma, onamo Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡano vaini vuḡa iziga gagiꞌuma.”
14.26: Ebu ze bada ꞌahoga mae hauḡadu Olivi Maḡa onamiro. Peteroꞌa Iesu Oꞌoniꞌuma rae Ihoziro (Mataio 26:31-35; Luka 22:31-34; Ioane 13:36-38)
14.27: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zae niduꞌa muhihe feraꞌuma. Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Badiꞌaꞌa mamoe taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa mau runiꞌuma ebu mamoeḡaꞌe ferau ḡouriꞌuma.'
14.28: Rehano eḡeꞌa runeonoꞌo bare ḡaboditeꞌe enogano zae zamao Galilea habaꞌa ibite onamiꞌuma.”
14.29: Peteroꞌa Iesu niro, “Vaze niduꞌa ḡae uꞌano ferau muhiꞌiꞌuma rehano, eꞌe mene hune ferau muhiꞌiꞌuma!”
14.30: Iesuꞌa niro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ḡaꞌohe, izidi ohere kokorokuꞌa ꞌizema ḡae aheu uganogano ḡaeꞌa ḡae uḡidu eḡe oꞌohiꞌuma.”
14.31: Rehano Peteroꞌa ḡihau niro, “E mene oꞌoꞌiꞌuma. Ḡae teite rudaune zuni idaḡa!” Ebu ane tahiꞌa niduꞌa zuni ꞌouge reiro. Iesuꞌa Getesemane Habaꞌano Kuraro (Mataio 26:36-46; Luka 22:39-46)
14.32: Ebu zeḡe niduꞌa haba ꞌahoga niḡa Getesemane onamadu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “E kurauꞌeteꞌea, zaꞌe ꞌaha ehore radoꞌi.”
14.33: Ebu aniꞌe Petero, Iakobo zu Ioane tutuze onamiro. Ani zamaḡa ḡadahe ariro zu adudaro.
14.34: ꞌOugadu aniꞌa ziro, “Zamahe are rudauꞌohe. Zaꞌe ꞌadao radadu evate radoꞌi.”
14.35: Ani tahiḡa faḡa onamiro ebu rahao ḡuḡuradu kuraro, “Ḡa idaḡa roꞌidene, eḡe mazaonoꞌo mada aduga ꞌahi mae vaḡinoꞌi.”
14.36: Aniꞌa uminiro, “Mama, eḡe Mama, ḡaꞌe ḡau niduꞌa haḡaogaꞌe edeḡa. Eḡe mazaonoꞌo bio aduga ꞌahi mae vaḡinoꞌi. Rehano eḡe mene urao, ḡae urao daꞌo haḡaoꞌi.”
14.37: Ebu aniꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa vaḡe bare onamirotene, ze bazeꞌeteꞌe horoziro. Ebu aniꞌa Petero niro, “Simona, ḡa bazeꞌehe? Ḡa mada tahiḡa zuni evate radogaꞌe mene idaḡahe?
14.38: Sataniꞌa tuhuzadu zaeꞌa mene uitifine, tohutohoꞌi zu kuranoꞌi. Zamazeꞌe urateꞌohe, rehano ahirizeꞌe taoḡa.”
14.39: Ebu ani bare onamadu ibite kuraroteꞌe teige kuraro.
14.40: Aniꞌa bare arirotene, ze bazeꞌeteꞌe bare horoziro, mazaḡa ubumazeꞌa ufeta anoziro. Zeꞌe ani mazao nagini reiteꞌe mene ederiro.
14.41: Iesuꞌa ḡae uḡiduḡano bare aradu ziro, “Za ꞌize bazeꞌehe zu ahirize ohoneꞌehe? Eꞌe daꞌo! Madaḡa ꞌai maha. Ḡianoꞌi, Vaze Ubugaꞌe haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌiniꞌuma.
14.42: Iḡunoꞌi, eme onamihi! Ḡianoꞌi, eḡe revoniꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌai feureha.” Iesu Obone Tiro (Mataio 26:47-56; Luka 22:47-53; Ioane 18:1-12)
14.43: Iesuꞌa ꞌize ḡoereꞌeteꞌea, Iesu tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga Iudaꞌa feuriro. Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa, Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa tuḡuziroteꞌe azaḡa ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa benisi zu somori boro madu Iuda teite ariro.
14.44: Ebu Iesu revohauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe aneꞌa nougenouge haḡaiteꞌe moneo ibite ihoziro, “Eḡeꞌa furaꞌiniteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Iesu. Ani obone teadu zamahu onamoꞌi.”
14.45: Ebu aniꞌa zogone Iesu vaḡe onamadu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa!” Ebu aniꞌa furaꞌiniro.
14.46: Ebu ze ꞌevoreze hina Iesu obone tiro.
14.47: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesu uhiḡano edau radiroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano ꞌahoganiꞌa benisiḡa ahase bunadu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa tuḡure vazeḡa udirotene, teḡaḡa variꞌe butiro.
14.48: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe ḡonore vazeḡa obone tiꞌeteꞌe teige, benisi ebu somori boro madu eḡe obohe touga veize arahe?
14.49: Mada niduꞌa eꞌe zae teite kuru neḡa habaꞌano ihore radiunu. Eꞌe madaḡano zaꞌe mene obohe tiro. Rehano Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudafine, ꞌahiguḡaniꞌa fureraneha.”
14.50: ꞌOugirotene, ane tahiꞌa niduꞌaꞌe Iesu muhine feraro.
14.51: Tahiꞌa iziga ꞌahogaꞌe ahiꞌa isoḡa rana dabua rafaḡa vidanadu Iesu hegotiro. Rehano Iesu obone tirotene,
14.52: ani dabuaḡa mae modadu ani firina feraro. Iesuꞌe Kotao Ohoniro (Mataio 26:57-68; Luka 22:54-55, 63-71; Ioane 18:13-14, 19-24)
14.53: Zeꞌa Iesu obone teadu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa vaḡe tutune onamiro. Ebu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa, vaze boroboro zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa tiburu nuꞌoraro.
14.54: U Peteroꞌe faḡanonoꞌo Iesu hegotadu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa ne habaꞌano feuriro. Ebu eꞌe neḡa ḡianeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teite ehoradu aneꞌa bare ire roga idiro.
14.55: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo boro auḡeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Iesu manoga veize ani moneo ḡuriro ḡoeꞌa nunu vaḡiro, rehano ze mene horoniro.
14.56: Vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesu mazao ḡuriro ḡoeꞌa nunu rae fureniro, rehano zeḡe ḡoereꞌe mene tiba reiro.
14.57: Ebu vaze nuꞌa edau iḡunadu ani mazao ḡuriro ḡoeꞌa rae fureniro,
14.58: “Eme aniꞌa reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa igiro. Aniꞌa raenaꞌa, 'Eꞌe vazeꞌa ꞌevoreze hina ogoraroteꞌe kuruḡa neḡa ꞌahi fahiꞌuma, ebu vaze ꞌevore hina mene haḡairoteꞌe kuruḡa neḡa mada uḡiduḡa zamaḡano bare ogoraꞌuma,' rae reiro.”
14.59: Rehano zeḡe ḡoereꞌe mene idaḡa reiro.
14.60: ꞌOuge reirotene, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa zeḡe zamao edau iḡunadu Iesu ḡadiniro, “Zeꞌa ḡaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae fureneꞌohe. Ḡa zeḡe ḡoere mene naenaeniꞌumahe?”
14.61: Rehano Iesuꞌe sifu radiro ebu mene naenaeniro. Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa bare ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe Keriso, Ḡihiꞌa Hune Badiꞌaḡa Ubugahe?”
14.62: Iesuꞌa niro, “Oꞌe, eꞌe Keriso. Zaꞌe Vaze Ubuganiꞌa Gigiꞌa Boro Badiꞌaḡa edaꞌe moneo ehoradu zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zu adureo ḡoze hina areꞌeteꞌe horoniꞌuma.”
14.63: ꞌOugadu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa ane dabua zigiro ebu ḡadiziro, “Emeꞌa aniꞌe veꞌoḡa rae raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa bare vaḡiꞌumahe?
14.64: Izidi aniꞌa Badiꞌa rae sausaunateꞌe zae niduꞌa egeha. Za nouge rae zamareꞌohe?” Zeḡe niduꞌa naenaeniro, “Aniꞌe veꞌoḡa radu runeo tuḡuniꞌuma.”
14.65: Ebu vaze nuꞌa ani rana soꞌabide vaniro, ebu ani ubuma ꞌuadu ꞌevoreze hina faꞌoneꞌenaꞌa niro, “Peroveta Vazeḡa, efoꞌi. Iniuꞌa faꞌoꞌeha?” Ebu kota neḡa ḡiane radiuꞌeteꞌe uti azaḡaniꞌa ani zamahanadu bouniro. Peteroꞌa Iesu Oꞌoniro (Mataio 26:69-75; Luka 22:56-62; Ioane 18:15-18, 25-27)
14.66: Peteroꞌa kota neḡa habaꞌa ꞌuꞌuḡano radiuꞌeteꞌea, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa tuḡure roḡaeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ariro.
14.67: Aniꞌe Peteroꞌa ire roga genaḡano ideꞌeteꞌe horonirotene, Petero ḡiane runeꞌenaꞌa niro, “Ḡa zuni Nazareta vazeḡa Iesu teite radiudo.”
14.68: Rehano Peteroꞌa oꞌonadu niro, “E ḡaeꞌa nagini raꞌetaꞌaꞌe mene edereꞌohe zu mene zamare huneꞌohe.” Ebu Peteroꞌe ḡabiri ibihetaḡano buau onamiro.
14.69: Tuḡure roḡaeḡaniꞌa Petero eꞌea horonirotene, edau varahiroteꞌe azaḡa bare ziro, “Vaze ꞌahiꞌe Iesu duḡuru boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga.”
14.70: Rehano Peteroꞌa bare oꞌoniro. Mada tahiḡa ḡarugano ani uhiḡano edau radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa niro, “Hube hune ḡa Iesu hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga, mazaḡa ḡae zuni Galilea vazeḡa.”
14.71: Ebu ani ḡoere rinede teadu ziro, “E ḡuririne, aduga hidiꞌuma. E zaeꞌa raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa aꞌe aḡuꞌa!”
14.72: Aniꞌa ꞌouge reirotene, kokorokuꞌa ḡae aheuḡa ugaro. ꞌOugadu Peteroꞌe Iesuꞌa ani niroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa zamariro, “Kokorokuꞌa ḡae aheu ꞌizema uganogano, ḡaꞌe ḡae uḡidu eḡe oꞌohiꞌuma.” Ebu ani rahao ḡuḡuradu niaro.

15.1: Oherebau uzeuze, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa vaze boroboro zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teite ḡoꞌaniro. Aꞌe Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo boro. Ebu ze Iesu autadu Pilato vaḡe tutune onamiro ebu ane ꞌevora riꞌiniro.
15.2: Pilatoꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe Iuda azaḡa kinihe?” Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Oꞌe, ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare eꞌe kini raꞌohe.”
15.3: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa ḡau ḡehaḡa moneo Iesuꞌe veꞌoḡa rae niro.
15.4: Pilatoꞌa bare Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ḡa mene naenaeziꞌumahe? Ḡianoꞌi, zeꞌa ḡaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ḡehaḡa rae fureneꞌohe.”
15.5: Rehano Iesuꞌe ꞌize mene bare naenaeziro ebu Pilatoꞌa zaguzagau huniro. Iesuꞌe Runeo Tuḡuniꞌuma rae Reiro (Mataio 27:15-26; Luka 23:13-25; Ioane 18:39-19:16)
15.6: Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa madaḡano Roma gavana vazeḡaꞌe Iuda azaḡaniꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe ḡuꞌa vazeḡa ꞌahoga tuḡune bunido.
15.7: Eꞌe madaḡano vaze ꞌahoga, niḡa Barabasiꞌe Roma gavana utitoziniroteꞌe madaḡano vaze zimiroteꞌe azaḡa teite ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoniro.
15.8: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Pilato vaḡe onamadu aniꞌa zeḡe veize haḡaidoteꞌe teige ꞌouge haḡaoga uminiro.
15.9: Pilatoꞌa ḡadiziro, “Za eḡeꞌa Iuda azaḡa kini tuḡune bunoga urateꞌehe?”
15.10: Mazaḡa Pilatoꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa Iesu ahiahiniroteꞌe uꞌano, ani riꞌinirotaꞌaꞌe ederiro.
15.11: Rehano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa Barabasi tuḡune bunoga veize vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Pilato uminoga tuḡutuḡuziro.
15.12: Ebu Pilatoꞌa ḡadiziro, “Tena e zaeꞌa Iuda azaḡa kini rae huneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa mazao nougiꞌuma?”
15.14: Pilatoꞌa ḡadiziro, “Nougadu? Ani nagi haḡai sauꞌa haḡairo?” Rehano ze ḡihau bagaḡa hounaꞌiro, “Ani satauronoꞌi!”
15.15: Pilatoꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa matuꞌozenoga veize Barabasi zeḡe mazao mae bohane buniro. Ebu Iesuꞌe masiniroteꞌe enogano satauronoga veize uti azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌiniro. Uti Azaḡaniꞌa Iesu Ḡirihoharo (Mataio 27:27-31; Ioane 19:2-3)
15.16: Uti azaḡa nuꞌa Iesuꞌe gavana vazeḡa ne zamaḡa tutune diuḡiro ebu uti azaḡa niduꞌa huze nuꞌoziro.
15.17: Ebu ze Iesu dabua kanaḡa duhuḡa hune vidoharo, zu ire ezaga meigameiga ḡurunadu kini vadiga adiriḡa teige vadinigano redoharo.
15.18: Ebu Iesu ḡirihoharo, “Iuda azaḡa kini, nigunihi!”
15.19: Ze Gubu somoriḡa ꞌahoga hina ane vadini rana barebare bouniro ebu soꞌabide vaniro. Ze obenaze hina tuḡadu ani mazao soꞌone ḡuḡuriro.
15.20: Ḡirihohau hauḡirotene, ani vidoharoteꞌe dabuaḡa kanaḡa fuiꞌadu ane dabua bare vidoharo. Ebu satauronoga radu tutune onamiro. Iesu Satauroniro (Mataio 27:32-44; Luka 23:26-43; Ioane 19:17-27)
15.21: Kurene vazeḡa ꞌahoga, Alesana zu Rufo moze, niḡa Simonaꞌa guniꞌa neḡanonoꞌo vitau onaminu. Ebu uti azaḡaꞌe aniꞌa Iesu satauro herate onamoga veize tuḡutuḡuniro.
15.22: Ze Iesuꞌe Gologota rae huneꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa tutune onamiro. Gologota hugaꞌe Vadini Isiga Habaꞌa.
15.23: Ebu ze murava ꞌahoga vaini vuḡa teite mirunadu Iesu haro, rehano ani mene meiro.
15.24: Ebu ze Iesu satauroniroteꞌe enogano Iesu dabuaꞌe iniuꞌa meꞌuma radu kaḡusi arahoḡa arahiro ebu ḡahugotitiro.
