10.36: Iesuꞌa eꞌe hariḡa hauḡirotene, Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ḡadiniro, “Vaze uḡidu ꞌadi boꞌaḡano ḡae zamaroneꞌe iniuꞌe ḡonore azaḡa hidiroteꞌe vazeḡa nabuga?”
10.37: Aniꞌa naenaeniro, “Ani vetuḡaneadu dananiroteꞌe vazeḡa.” Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡa zuni onamadu ꞌouge haḡaoꞌi.” Iesuꞌa Mareta zu Maria Ne Diuḡiro
10.38: Iesu zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ragave onamadu ne ꞌahogano feuriro. Ebu roḡae ꞌahoga, niḡa Maretaꞌa neḡano Iesu mae zouniro.
10.39: Maretaꞌe negoḡeta zu niḡaꞌe Maria. Mariaꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro oda babaḡano ehoradu nagini reiroteꞌe igi radiro.
10.40: U Maretaꞌe vaze ḡubuzoga veize gau ḡehaḡa haḡainuteꞌe uꞌano zamaḡaniꞌa adudaro. Eꞌanoꞌo ani Iesu vaḡe aradu niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, negoheꞌa eḡe daꞌo gaueꞌeteꞌe horohe tauḡeꞌohe. Ḡa eꞌe mene zamareꞌehe? Ani e danahoga veize noꞌi!”
10.41: Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa naenaeniro, “Mareta, Mareta, ḡaꞌe gau ḡehaḡa uꞌano zamaḡoꞌe aduduꞌohe zu maḡuneꞌohe.
10.42: Rehano gau boroꞌe tiba daꞌo, ebu Mariaꞌa gau eꞌe ohotiro. Eꞌanoꞌo vazeni ꞌahoga aniꞌa ꞌouge haḡaeꞌeteꞌe mene garariꞌuma.”

11.1: Mada ꞌahogano Iesuꞌe haba ꞌahogano kurau radiro. Kuru hauḡirotene, ane tahiꞌa ꞌahoganiꞌa niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, Ioane Babatisoꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa kuru ihoziroteꞌe teige, emeḡe zuni kuru ihofoꞌi.”
11.2: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe kuranoꞌidene, ꞌahige kuranoꞌi: 'Mama, eme umiꞌeꞌohe, ḡae niꞌe zaḡoḡa reꞌuma, ebu ḡaeꞌa ḡau niduꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌuma.
11.3: Mada niduꞌa emeḡeꞌa atiteꞌe ogomuḡa rifiꞌenoꞌi,
11.4: ebu emeꞌa emeḡe mazao sauꞌa haḡairoteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa haḡaize sauꞌa rae modeꞌeteꞌe teige, emeḡe haḡai sauꞌa rae modoꞌi. Ebu eme haḡai sauꞌa haḡaihi raꞌeteꞌe zamaroneḡanonoꞌo mae tutufe vaḡifoꞌi.'”
11.5: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Hari idaidaḡa ꞌahi zamaroꞌi. Zae boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahogaꞌe nabudiḡeta. Ohe nema ꞌahogano nabuganiꞌa ane vaze ne onamadu uminiro, 'Eḡe vaze, ꞌuvahu odoga uḡidu enoꞌi,
11.6: mazaḡa eḡe vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ragaveꞌeteꞌea iziduꞌu eḡe vaḡe areha, rehano e hatiteꞌe ogomuḡa oꞌoꞌa.'
11.7: Ebu ne vazeḡaniꞌa naenaeniro, 'Zamahe ago adudunoꞌi. Ibiheta ꞌai bireha, ebu e eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite bazeꞌe ꞌahine, iḡunadu ḡau ꞌahoga ḡanogaꞌe mene idaḡa.'” Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ḡadiziro, “Za zuni ꞌouge naenaeniꞌumahe?
11.8: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, aniꞌe nabuga veize daꞌoꞌe iḡunadu ꞌuvahu odoga mene haꞌuma, rehano nabuganiꞌa barebare umineꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, iḡunadu umideꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa haꞌuma.
11.9: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, uminoꞌi, ꞌougine ziniꞌuma. Vaḡoꞌi, ꞌougine horoniꞌuma. Ibiheta toketokeroꞌi, ꞌougine ibiheta vavaoziniꞌuma.
11.10: Umineꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ziniꞌuma, vaḡeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa horoniꞌuma, ebu ibiheta toketokereꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ibiheta vavaoziniꞌuma.
11.11: Zae boꞌaḡano iniu ubuganiꞌa ḡozone umidine, moganiꞌa ḡozone mene hanadu mohe haꞌumahe?
11.12: Ebu ubuganiꞌa kokoroku maḡa umidine, moganiꞌa asiasi haꞌumahe?
11.13: Zaꞌe sauꞌa azaḡa rehano, ḡahunone manoḡa ubudeze zenoga urateꞌohe. Eꞌe teige, zae Moze adureo radiuꞌetaꞌaꞌe ane mazao umideꞌeteꞌe azaḡa hube hune Vine Zaḡoḡa ziniꞌuma.” Iesu zu Belezebulo (Mataio 12:22-30; Mareko 3:20-27)
11.14: Mada ꞌahogano Iesuꞌa mumutafa vazeḡa ꞌahoga mazaonoꞌo vine sauꞌa hegone buniro. Vine sauꞌaniꞌa ani mode buarotene, mumutafa vazeḡaniꞌa bare ḡoeriro ebu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa zaguzagaro.
11.15: Rehano vaze nuꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Iesuꞌa vine sauꞌasauꞌa zuhiꞌaḡa, Belezebulo inaraḡa hina vine sauꞌasauꞌa hegoze buzeꞌohe.”
11.16: U nuꞌe Iesu tuhune nurihi radu uminiro, “Badiꞌa gigiꞌaḡa hina haḡai nu badeḡa haḡaoꞌi.”
11.17: Rehano Iesuꞌa ze nouge rae zamarirotaꞌaꞌe ederadu ziro, “Haba tiba zamaḡano zeḡeꞌa rovotadu utitine, eꞌe habaꞌaꞌe aneꞌa bare ruiniꞌuma. Ebu ne tiba zamaḡano zeḡeꞌa rovotadu utitine, ne eꞌe aneꞌa bare higaꞌuma.
11.18: Sataniꞌe aneꞌa bare rovonadu ane zamaḡano utitine, aneꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe habaꞌaꞌe nougenouge edau gigaraꞌuma? Zaꞌe eḡeꞌa Belezebulo inaraḡa hina vine sauꞌa hegone buneꞌohe rae raꞌohe, rehano ꞌougine ani aneꞌa bare ruiniꞌuma.
11.19: Eḡeꞌa Belezebulo inaraḡa hina vine sauꞌa hegoze buzifone, zae tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe iniu inara hina vine sauꞌa hegoze buzifo? Zae tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare zaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae reꞌuma.
11.20: Rehano eḡeꞌa vine sauꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa inaraḡa hina hegoze buzine, Badiꞌaꞌa amahi zae zuhiꞌazi radiuꞌohe.
11.21: Inara vazeḡaniꞌa uti ḡauḡa nunu hina neḡa taufine, ḡauḡa niduꞌaꞌe manoḡa radiꞌuma.
11.22: Rehano inara ufeta boro vazeḡaniꞌa arine, inara vazeḡa utite raharahaniꞌuma. Inara vazeḡaꞌe uti ḡauḡaniꞌa ani biriꞌuma rae zamariꞌuma. Rehano inara ufeta boro vazeḡaniꞌa inara vazeḡa uti ḡauḡa meiniꞌuma ebu ani ne ḡau niduꞌa zuni meinadu ḡahuge ḡuzuhiꞌuma.
11.23: Iniu eḡe teite mene reine, aniꞌe eḡe agirohiꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Ebu iniu eḡe teite Badiꞌa veize vaze mene nuꞌozine, ani Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo vaze rovozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.” Vine Sauꞌaniꞌa Bariro (Mataio 12:43-45)
11.24: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Vine sauꞌa ꞌahoganiꞌa vaze ꞌahoga mazaonoꞌo buauꞌetene, ahiꞌa ohonoga radu vu oꞌoꞌa habaꞌa vaḡe ragaveꞌohe. Rehano mene horoneꞌetene, ani ꞌahige rae raꞌohe, 'Eḡeꞌa ibite radiroteꞌe neḡa bare onamihi.'
11.25: Ebu ani baradu vaze eꞌe horoneꞌetene, aniꞌe neḡa deheḡa hune zu idaidane touga heuḡa.
11.26: Ebu vine sauꞌa eꞌeꞌa onamadu vine sauꞌa niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fare, ufeta hune sauꞌa zamaze areꞌohe, ebu ze vaze eꞌe zamaḡano diuḡe radiuꞌohe. ꞌOugadu vaze eꞌeꞌa mada ibiꞌa vitine ufeta sautuꞌohe.” Matuꞌu Huga
11.27: Iesuꞌa ḡoere eꞌe raꞌeteꞌea, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa boꞌaḡano roḡae ꞌahoganiꞌa agoḡa boro hina Iesu niro, “Ḡa fureꞌiroteꞌe zu ḡubuꞌe borofiroteꞌe roḡaeḡaniꞌa matuꞌe rudauꞌohe!”
11.28: Rehano Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Badiꞌa ḡoere egohauꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa matuꞌe rudauꞌohe.” Iona Haḡai Nu Badeḡa (Mataio 12:38-42; Mareko 8:12)
11.29: Iesu vaḡe ariroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ufeta ḡehararotene, Iesuꞌa ziro, “Izidi egaꞌe sauꞌa, ebu ze haḡai nu badeḡa umideꞌohe. Rehano Iona mazao fureraroteꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa daꞌo furenoziniꞌuma.
11.30: Iona mazao naginiꞌa furerarotaꞌaꞌe Nineva azaḡa mazao haḡai nu badeḡa reiro. Eꞌe teige, Vaze Ubuga mazao naginiꞌa fureratitaꞌaꞌe izidi ega mazao haḡai nu badeḡa reꞌuma.
11.31: Badiꞌa kota madaḡano Siba habaꞌa kini roḡaeḡaniꞌa izidi ega azaḡa teite iḡune edanadu zeꞌe veꞌoḡa rae roziꞌuma. Mazaḡa ibite madaḡano Siba habaꞌa kini roḡaeḡaniꞌa haba ḡonaga faḡa huneonoꞌo kini Solomona zamarone huhuzaḡa abitoga veize onamiro. U izidi Solomona vitinoga vazeḡaꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe, rehano ze ane ḡoere abitoga mene urateꞌohe.
11.32: Badiꞌa kota madaḡano Nineva azaḡaniꞌa izidi ega azaḡa teite iḡune edanadu zeꞌe veꞌoḡa rae roziꞌuma. Mazaḡa ibite madaḡano Nineva azaḡaꞌe Iona haramo abitadu haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡihure ḡouriro. Izidi Iona vitinoga vazeḡaꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe, rehano ze ane ḡoere mene abitadu mene ḡihureꞌohe.” Ahiri Agaḡa (Mataio 5:15, 6:22-23)
11.33: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ihure hofadu mene ꞌuꞌuru tiꞌe ga siuva hina mene ogone tiꞌohe. Rehano ne diuḡeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa agaḡa horonoga veize ihure odaḡa rana tiꞌohe.
11.34: Zae ubumaꞌe ahirize ihureḡa. Ubumazeꞌe manoḡa reine, ahirizeꞌe agaḡaniꞌa iriꞌavoniꞌuma. Rehano ubumazeꞌe sauꞌa reine, ahirizeꞌe uzaboꞌa iriꞌavoniꞌuma.
11.35: Eꞌanoꞌo zae zamao agaḡaꞌe uzabo ga meneꞌe faine ḡianoꞌi.
11.36: Zae ahiriꞌe agaḡaniꞌa iriꞌavonadu uzabo ꞌahoga oꞌoꞌa reine, ihure agaḡaniꞌa zae rana agaruꞌeteꞌe teige, ahirize niduꞌaꞌe agaḡaniꞌa iriꞌavoniꞌuma.” Farisea Azaḡa zu Mose Goro Ḡoeꞌa Ihozeꞌeteꞌe Azaḡa Roziro (Mataio 23:1-36; Mareko 12:38-40; Luka 20:45-47)
11.37: Iesuꞌa ḡoere hauḡirotene, Farisea vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ane teite oganoga uminiro. Ebu Iesuꞌa ani ne onamadu ogomu fataḡa uhiḡano ehoriro.
11.38: Ebu Farisea vazeḡaꞌe Iesuꞌa ꞌizema oganogano ꞌevoꞌa mene vuzuꞌiroteꞌe horonirotene zaguzagaro.
11.39: Ebu Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa Farisea vazeḡa eꞌe niro, “Farisea azaḡa, izidi zaꞌe bioze zu siuvaze enoga daꞌo vuzuꞌe deheneꞌohe. Rehano zamazeoꞌe ununu zu sauꞌaniꞌa iriꞌaveꞌohe.
11.40: Zaꞌe mene huhuzaḡa! Badiꞌaꞌa enone daꞌo mene haḡairo, rehano zama zuni haḡairo.
11.41: Eꞌanoꞌo ḡauze zahara azaḡa zenoꞌi, ꞌougine zae enone zu zama niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa ubumao deheḡa hune reꞌuma.
11.42: Farisea azaḡa, za aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Mazaḡa zaꞌe tirara mebaḡano eḡa zu murari teige komeꞌa fase ogomuḡa niduꞌaonoꞌo sinu gaubananao rovonadu sinu tiba ḡauḡa Badiꞌa hauꞌohe. Rehano haḡai duduḡa haḡaoga zu Badiꞌa zamare borofogaꞌe igi modeꞌohe. Za ḡau boro ꞌadiꞌe haḡaifo ebu komeꞌakomeꞌa zuni mene igi modifo.
11.43: Farisea azaḡa, zaꞌe aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Mazaḡa zaꞌe nu'onu'o neḡano vaze boroboroꞌa ehoreꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano ehoroga urateꞌohe, zu vaze ḡehaḡa habaꞌano ze zae gubazeꞌenaꞌa, zae mazao unihoga urateꞌohe.
11.44: Zaꞌe aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Mazaḡa zaꞌe rune iduḡa ꞌuꞌuruḡa heuḡa. Rune ahiꞌaꞌe idu zamaḡano ruhuḡa rehano, vazeꞌa mene ederadu eꞌe rana oname onaeꞌohe.”
11.45: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, ḡa ꞌouge ḡoereꞌetene, emeḡe zuni rae sausaufeꞌohe.”
11.46: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, zae zuni aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Mazaḡa zaꞌe ihore riga hune hina vaze aduga boro ziniꞌohe, rehano zae ꞌevore huduꞌa tiba hina zu mene hune danazeꞌohe.
11.47: Zaꞌe aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Mazaḡa vouḡazeꞌa ibite zimiroteꞌe peroveta azaḡa rune iduḡa zaeꞌa ogoruꞌohe.
11.48: Vouḡazeꞌa peroveta azaḡa zimiro ebu zaeꞌa iduze ogoruꞌohe. ꞌOugadu za vouḡazeꞌa haḡai duduḡa haḡairo rae fureneꞌohe zu ihozeꞌohe.
11.49: Eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌa huhuzaḡaniꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Eḡeꞌa peroveta azaḡa zu apostolo azaḡa nu zeḡe mazao tuḡuziꞌuma, rehano ze nuꞌe zimiꞌuma zu nuꞌe sausauziꞌuma.'
11.50: Badiꞌaꞌa raha ꞌadi haḡairoteꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo peroveta azaḡa zimiro. Eꞌanoꞌo eꞌe aduga niduꞌaꞌe izidi eganiꞌa odohiꞌuma.
11.51: Ze ibite Abela mau runiroteꞌeanoꞌo onao ḡonagano Zekaria maro. Zekariaꞌe dibuꞌo fataḡa zu kuru neḡano Haba Zaḡoḡa boꞌaḡano mau runiro. Oꞌe, eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, eꞌe aduga niduꞌaꞌe izidi eganiꞌa odohiꞌuma.
11.52: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, zaꞌe aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Mazaḡa Badiꞌa edereꞌeteꞌe ibiḡa ibihetaḡa vavaꞌeꞌeteꞌe kiḡaꞌe zaeꞌa meiniro. Rehano za mene diuḡiro ebu diuḡihi raꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zuni zaeꞌa garariro.”
11.53: Iesuꞌe ḡoere hauḡadu ne beꞌanoꞌo buarotene, Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa ani riḡa agiroharo ebu ḡadimu ḡehaḡa hina aduaduniro.
11.54: Mazaḡa Iesuꞌa ḡoere nu rae veꞌonine, ani obone tihi rae reiro.

12.1: Eꞌe madaḡano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa nuꞌoraro ꞌahine, nariga odaze rana edaro. Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ibite ziro, “Zaꞌe Farisea azaḡa ḡiazoꞌi, mazaḡa zeꞌe zama guhi azaḡa ebu isiti heuḡa.
12.2: Rehano ꞌuꞌuru radiroteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌa fureraꞌuma, ebu ogone ḡahiniroteꞌe ḡauḡa zuni ederiꞌuma.
12.3: Eꞌanoꞌo zaꞌa uzabo zamaḡano nagini sifu reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe vazeꞌa mada agaḡano igiꞌuma. Ebu zaꞌe bazuni neḡa zamaḡano nagini gumude reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa vazeꞌa ne binuḡa hitaganonoꞌo rae fureniꞌuma.
12.4: Eḡe nego nabudi, eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe. Ahiri mauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ago rihozoꞌi, mazaḡa zeꞌe vine sausaunogaꞌe mene idaḡa.
12.5: U za iniu rihoniteꞌe eḡeꞌa ihoziꞌuma. Aniꞌe vaze manadu ire roga radiu tuḡutuḡu zamaḡano mae feuzeꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa obone tiꞌohe. Ani rihonoꞌi. Hube hune eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, ani daꞌo rihonoꞌi.
12.6: Tiburi niniḡa fuꞌo hadi komeꞌa hina seroneꞌohe. Rehano Badiꞌaꞌa zeḡe boꞌaḡano tiba zuni mene aḡutu modeꞌohe.
12.7: Badiꞌaꞌa zae zamare borofadu vadinize iguḡa niduꞌa nugu zuni edeḡa. Eꞌano'o ago rihanoꞌi, mazaḡa zaꞌe Badiꞌa ubumao tiburi niniḡa ḡehaḡa ufeta vitize ḡihiꞌaḡa.
12.8: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa vaze ubumao eḡe moneo edaune, Vaze Ubuga zuni Badiꞌa tuḡure viga niduꞌa ubumao ani moneo edaꞌuma.
12.9: Rehano iniuꞌa vaze ubumao eḡe oꞌohine, eḡe zuni Badiꞌa tuḡure viga niduꞌa ubumao ani oꞌoniꞌuma.
12.10: Iniuꞌa Vaze Ubuga agirohauꞌenaꞌa rae sausaunine, Badiꞌaꞌa ane haḡai sauꞌa rae modiꞌuma, rehano iniuꞌa Vine Zaḡoḡa agirohauꞌenaꞌa rae sausaunine, ane haḡai sauꞌaꞌe mene rae modiꞌuma.
12.11: Eḡe uꞌano, zaꞌe kotao tutuze onamadu nu'onu'o neḡano zuhiꞌaḡazuhiꞌaḡa zu inarazeta azaḡa zamao ohozoꞌidene, nougenouge zae bare biriteꞌe ga nagini rae ḡoeriteꞌe moneo zamaze ago adudanoꞌi.
12.12: Mazaḡa eꞌe madaḡano zaeꞌa nouge rae ḡoeriteꞌe moneo Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa ihoziꞌuma.” Maꞌora Vazeḡa Kauriḡa Hari Idaidaḡa
12.13: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa boꞌaḡano Iesu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, mamafeꞌa mode rudaroteꞌe toheḡa nu rovonadu naeḡa eḡe enoga veize negohe noꞌi.”
12.14: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Nego, vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa toheze ḡahugeꞌeteꞌe gauḡa veize e mene ohohiro.”
12.15: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Za ununu haḡaiḡa mene haḡaifine, zamaze obone giganoꞌi! Mazaḡa vazeꞌa tohe ḡehaḡaonoꞌo ḡabone mene hideꞌohe.”
12.16: Ebu hari ꞌahoga idane ziro, “Maꞌora vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa mebaḡano ogomu manomano hiriviro.
12.17: Ebu ani aneꞌa bare zamariro, 'E ogomuhe godoḡo neḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa. E nougiꞌuma?'
12.18: Ebu ani raenaꞌa, 'E ꞌahige haḡaine manoḡa! Ogomu godoḡo neḡa amahiḡaꞌe fahadu boro iziga ogoraꞌuma ebu ogomuhe zu tohehe niduꞌa eꞌea zouniꞌuma.'
12.19: Ebu ani aneꞌa bare raenaꞌa, ꞌE muri faḡa radoga veize ogomu boro hune ruhibe teha. Eꞌanoꞌo eꞌe ogauꞌenaꞌa zu gageꞌenaꞌa matuꞌe onamiꞌuma!'
12.20: Rehano Badiꞌaꞌa niro, 'Ḡaꞌe mene huhuzaḡa. Eḡeꞌa izidi ohere ḡae ḡabone mae vaḡinine, ḡa ruhibateꞌe toheḡa'e iniuꞌa meꞌuma?'”
12.21: Iesuꞌa ḡonagano ḡoeriro, “ꞌUguḡa vazeḡaꞌe ane tohe daꞌo nuꞌoneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, rehano Badiꞌa ubumao aniꞌe mene maꞌora vazeḡa.” Ago Zamare Adudanoꞌi (Mataio 6:25-34, 19:21)
12.22: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, zae ḡabone veize nagi ogomu aꞌuma, ga ahirize veize nagi dabua vidaꞌuma rae ago zamare adudanoꞌi.
12.23: Mazaḡa ḡaboneꞌe ogomu vitinoga, zu ahiriꞌe dabua vitinoga.
12.24: Nugo gaoza zamaroꞌi. Ze ezone mene ḡorauꞌohe, mene hiriveꞌohe, ebu ogomu godoḡo neḡa zu oꞌoꞌa. Rehano Badiꞌaꞌa ḡubuzeꞌohe. Zaꞌe nini vitize hunoga.
12.25: Zae boꞌaḡano iniuꞌa zamare adudu radiune, ḡaboneḡaꞌe tahiḡa nu faraꞌumahe?
12.26: Zaꞌe ḡau komeꞌa ꞌahoga haḡaoga zuni mene idaḡa. Nougadu ḡau ꞌahogaꞌahoga veize zamare aduduꞌohe?
12.27: Butu kakaḡaꞌe nougenouge ḡuhureꞌeteꞌe zamaroꞌi. Ze mene gaueꞌohe ga dabuaze mene turineꞌohe. Rehano eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, butu kakaḡa ꞌahoga zuni maꞌora vazeḡa kini Solomonaꞌa haḡairoteꞌe dabuaḡa manomano vitine hunoga.
12.28: Ebu butu veḡaꞌe izidi ḡaboga, u ohoḡoreꞌe masinadu ireo hufi haoniꞌuma. Rehano Badiꞌaꞌa dabua vidohauꞌohe. Zaꞌe ve vitinoga, eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa dabua manoḡa ufeta vidoziniꞌuma. Rehano zaꞌa Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe tahiḡa fase!
12.29: Eꞌanoꞌo zaꞌe nagini aꞌuma ga nagini gagiꞌuma rae ago ufeta zamaroꞌi, zu zamaze ago adudanoꞌi.
12.30: Mazaḡa Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡaniꞌa eꞌeguḡa niduꞌa vaḡe inareꞌohe, rehano Mozeꞌe zaeꞌa eꞌeguḡa urateꞌeteꞌe edereꞌohe.
12.31: Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌazoga vaḡoꞌi, ꞌougine eꞌeguḡa niduꞌa zuni ziniꞌuma.
12.32: Mamoe komeꞌakomeꞌa, za ago rihanoꞌi, mazaḡa zae Mamaꞌa za zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe uꞌano matuꞌe rudauꞌohe.
12.33: Ebu toheze seronadu hadiḡaꞌe zahara azaḡa zenoꞌi. Zae veize mene zigatiteꞌe hadi fuseḡa haḡaoꞌi, zu mene hauḡiteꞌe toheḡa adureo nuꞌone toꞌi. Eꞌea ḡonoreꞌa mene areꞌohe ebu zuhiꞌa mene sausauneꞌohe.
12.34: Mazaḡa za ḡauze naeḡa boro nouma tine, zamaroneze zuni eꞌea tiꞌohe.” Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa Ariteꞌe veize Ruhiboꞌi (Mataio 24:45-51)
12.35: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe gau dabuaḡa haḡadu ruhibe radoꞌi, ebu ihureze agane modoꞌi.
12.36: Zuhiꞌazeꞌa hahu muiḡanonoꞌo baradu ibihetao toketokerine, ibiheta ḡarihe vavaꞌoga veize guhineꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teigoꞌi.
12.37: Zuhiꞌazeꞌa baradu ane tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa ani guhine radiuꞌeteꞌe horozine, ane tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa matuꞌe rudaꞌuma. Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zuhiꞌazeꞌa gau dabuaḡa vidanadu ogauꞌeteꞌe fataḡa uhiḡano ane tuḡure azaḡa ohoziꞌuma, ebu zeḡe babaḡano edauꞌenaꞌa, ogomu ḡahugiꞌuma.
12.38: Ebu zuhiꞌazeꞌa ohere ga uzeuze feuradu tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa ani guhine radiuꞌeteꞌe horozine, ani tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa matuꞌe rudaꞌuma.
12.39: Rehano za ꞌadi zamaroꞌi. Ne vazeḡaniꞌa ḡonore vazeḡaꞌe noꞌe madaḡano ani ne aritaꞌaꞌe ederifone, ḡonore vazeḡaniꞌa mene diuḡoga veize ani neḡa faine taufifo.
12.40: Eꞌe teige, zae zuni ruhibe radoꞌi, mazaḡa Vaze Ubugaꞌe za mene edereꞌeteꞌe madaḡano ariꞌuma.”
12.41: Ebu Peteroꞌa niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡaeꞌa hari idaidaḡa ꞌadiꞌe emeḡe daꞌo veize ga vaze niduꞌa veize zuni?”
12.42: Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa naenaeniro, “Iniuꞌe vaze huhuzaḡa zu zamaḡa niduꞌa hina gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa? Tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahogaꞌe vaze ꞌuguḡa reine, zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa aniꞌe tuḡure vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡano mae ohonadu ꞌahige niꞌuma, 'Ḡa tuḡure azaḡa niduꞌa taufoꞌi. Ogomuze zuni mada idunane zenoꞌi.'
12.43: Ebu tuḡure vazeḡa eꞌeꞌa ꞌouge gauine ebu zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa bare feuradu horonine, tuḡure vazeḡa aꞌe matuꞌe rudaꞌuma.
12.44: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, aniꞌe zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa ane tohe niduꞌa taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡano ohoniꞌuma.
12.45: Rehano tuḡure vazeḡa aꞌe aneꞌa bare raenaꞌa, 'Eḡe zuhiꞌaꞌe vesuꞌu faḡanobuꞌu ariꞌuma,' rae zamaradu ohoze tuḡure azaḡa zu roḡae tuḡure azaḡa niduꞌa bouzine zu ufeta ogau gage baboraune, nougiꞌuma?
12.46: Aniꞌa mene zamareꞌeteꞌe zu mene edereꞌeteꞌe madaḡano zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa bare aradu ane ahiri variꞌe tahitahiꞌuma, ebu zama niduꞌa hina mene gaueꞌeteꞌe azaḡa habaꞌano ohonadu aduga boro haꞌuma.
12.47: Tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe ane zuhiꞌaꞌa nagini urateꞌetaꞌaꞌe edereꞌe rehano, mene ruhibine zu mene haḡaine, aniꞌe boune sausauniꞌuma.
12.48: U tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe ane zuhiꞌa ura mene ederadu veꞌoḡa haḡaine, aniꞌe tahiḡa boune tauḡiꞌuma. Iniuꞌe Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ḡehaḡa hidine, Badiꞌaꞌe ani mazaonoꞌo ḡehaḡa mouga urateꞌohe. Ebu iniuꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa ane gau boro haune, Badiꞌaꞌe ani mazaonoꞌo ḡehaḡa umideꞌohe.” Mene Uniho Manoḡa, Rehano Rovotiꞌuma (Mataio 10:34-36)
12.49: Iesuꞌa bare ziro, “Eḡeꞌa raha ꞌadi hofoga radu ire roga mae ariro. Ire rogaꞌa amahi raha ꞌadi iri radiune, e matuꞌe rudaꞌuma.
12.50: Rehano e aduga hiditeꞌe babatisoḡa meꞌuma, zu zamaheꞌe adudaꞌuma onamo ḡonaga meꞌuma.
12.51: Zaꞌe eḡeꞌa raha ꞌada uniho manoḡa mae ovairo rae zamareꞌehe? Mene. Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, e vaze rovoze ḡuzuhoga veize ovairo.
12.52: Izidionoꞌo onamo zama moneo eḡe uꞌano ne azaḡaꞌe rovotiꞌuma. Ne eꞌe azaḡaꞌe fuꞌo reine, zeḡe boꞌaḡano rovotadu uḡiduꞌa aheu teite agirotitiꞌuma, ga aheuꞌa uḡidu teite agirotitiꞌuma.
12.53: Moganiꞌa ubuga teite agirotitiꞌuma, ga ubuganiꞌa moga teite agirotitiꞌuma. Viꞌaniꞌa aboḡa teite agirotitiꞌuma, ga aboḡaniꞌa viꞌa teite agirotitiꞌuma. Viꞌaniꞌa ubuga inuga teite agirotitiꞌuma, ga ubuga inuganiꞌa iꞌa viꞌa teite agirotitiꞌuma.” Madaḡa Ederoꞌi (Mataio 16:2-3, 5:25-26)
12.54: Iesuꞌa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ziro, “Zaꞌe ḡozeꞌa ḡutanoga horoneꞌetene, zogone ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Iruguꞌa ruꞌaꞌuma.' A hube, iruguꞌa ruꞌauꞌohe.
12.55: Ebu ohere ḡozeꞌa bororanadu nahuduꞌetene, zaꞌa raenaꞌa, 'Madaꞌa hiaꞌuma.' A hube, madaꞌa hiauꞌohe.
12.56: Zama guhi azaḡa! Zaꞌe adure zu raha iraḡa horoneꞌetene, naginiꞌa fureratitaꞌaꞌe edereꞌohe. Rehano izidi madaḡano naginiꞌa fureru radiuꞌeteꞌe moneo huga eꞌe mene edereꞌohe.
12.57: Za nougadu zaeꞌa bare naginiꞌe duduḡa rae mene edereꞌohe?
12.58: Ḡaꞌe vaze ꞌahoga hadiḡa meiroteꞌe uꞌano aniꞌa kotao ohoꞌihi radu ani teite onamoꞌidene, ibio uniho manofoga veize inare hunoꞌi. Mene ꞌougine, aniꞌa oboꞌe teadu kota vazeḡa mazao tutuꞌe onamiꞌuma, ebu hena kota vazeḡaniꞌa ḡuꞌa neḡa taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌevoreo ohoꞌadu ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoꞌiꞌuma.
12.59: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, za ḡuꞌa neḡanonoꞌo mene buaꞌuma, onamo zaeꞌa ani hadi niduꞌaꞌe baroniꞌuma.”

13.1: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesu teite radiroteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌa Iesu niro, “Galilea azaḡa nuꞌa Badiꞌa dibuꞌohauꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano Pilatoꞌa zemeha.”
13.2: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Zae zamarone, zeḡe haḡai sauꞌaꞌe Galilea azaḡa ꞌomo haḡaize sauꞌa roꞌanoga ꞌahine, ꞌouge rudaneha rae raꞌehe?
13.3: Mene. Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, zae zuni zae haḡai sauꞌanonoꞌo mene ḡihurine, zeḡe teige zae niduꞌa rudaꞌuma.
13.4: Ebu za edeḡa, Siloama habaꞌano ne hitaganiꞌa fahanadu vaze niduꞌa 18 rudaro. Zae zamarone, zeḡe haḡai sauꞌaꞌe Ierusalema azaḡa niduꞌa haḡaize sauꞌa roꞌanoga rae raꞌehe?
13.5: Mene. Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, zae zuni zae haḡai sauꞌanonoꞌo mene ḡihurine, zeḡe teige zae niduꞌa rudaꞌuma.” Figi Ireḡa Huga Oꞌoꞌa Hari Idaidaḡa
13.6: Ebu Iesuꞌa hari ꞌahoga idaniro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa vaini mebaḡano figi ireḡa ḡoraro. Eꞌe enogano aniꞌa huga nu reꞌoga veize onamiro, rehano huga ꞌahoga mene horoniro.
13.7: Eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌa meba ḡianeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa niro, 'E muri uḡidu zamaḡano huga reꞌoga veize arido, rehano hugani ꞌahoga mene horonido. Eꞌanoꞌo udi higanoꞌi! Nougaꞌahi haba daꞌo iriꞌavone tauḡiꞌohe?'
13.8: Ebu meba ḡianeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa naenaeniro, 'Vaze boro, ge muri tiba daꞌo bare modoꞌi. Eḡeꞌa ire varahe hoꞌadu mazaḡano busi mumuḡa teadu ḡianiꞌuma.
13.9: ꞌOugine, muri tiba enogano manoḡa hudaꞌuma. Mene hudanoꞌidene, udi higonoꞌi.'” Iesuꞌa Bana Madaḡano Ḡaruga Sauꞌa Roḡaeḡa Fainiro
13.10: Bana Madaḡa ꞌahogano Iesuꞌe nu'onu'o neḡano ihoze radiunu.
13.11: Ebu eꞌea roḡae ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu. Vine sauꞌaniꞌa ani ragano radu ḡaruga mae beꞌoniro ꞌahine, aniꞌe muri 18 mene edau faraunu.
13.12: Iesuꞌa ani horonirotene, ane vaḡe aroga veize hunadu niro, “Roḡae, ḡae ugi ꞌai manoreha.”
13.13: Ebu Iesuꞌa ꞌevoꞌa ane rana tirotene, ani zogone edau fararo zu Badiꞌa niguniro.
13.14: Rehano nu'onu'o neḡa vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe maḡuniro, mazaḡa Iesuꞌa Bana Madaḡano ugi roḡaeḡa fainiro. Aniꞌa vaze ziro, “Eme mada fuꞌo tiba fare zamaḡano gauiꞌuma. Eꞌanoꞌo ugi azaḡaꞌe eꞌe madaḡano aradu manoriꞌuma, u Bana Madaḡanoꞌe mene ꞌougiꞌuma.”
13.15: Ebu Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa naenaeniro, “Za, zama guhi azaḡa! Zae tibatiba zuni Bana Madaḡano boromakauze ga donikize maḡuzeonoꞌo fuiꞌe bunadu tutuze onamadu vu gagoziniꞌohe.
13.16: Tena Aberahamo mariga raꞌeteꞌe roḡaeḡa ꞌadiꞌe nougiꞌuma? Aniꞌe Sataniꞌa muri 18 ogoru tiro. Bana Madaḡano ani fuiꞌe bunogaꞌe mene idaḡahe?”
13.17: Iesuꞌa ꞌouge reirotene, ani agiroharoteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe mazagaroziro, u vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaꞌe aneꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa manomano niduꞌa uꞌano, matuꞌiro. Badiꞌaꞌa Zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe moneo Hari Idaidaniro (Mataio 13:31-33; Mareko 4:30-32)
13.18: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe nagini heuḡa? Naginio idaniꞌuma?
13.19: Aꞌe Kuava maḡa komeꞌa tiba vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa madu mebaḡano ḡoraroteꞌe heuḡa. Ebu maḡa komeꞌa eꞌeꞌa ḡuhuradu ire boro reirotene, hitagano niniꞌa rafiu aradu ezagano neze ogoraro.”
13.20: Iesuꞌa bare ziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌetaꞌaꞌe naginio idaniꞌuma?
13.21: Aꞌe isiti heuḡa. Roḡaeꞌa isiti tahiḡa madu ꞌuvahuḡa ḡehaḡa teite mirune tibunirotene ꞌuvahu niduꞌa ubararo.” Ibiheta Kokosiḡa (Mataio 7:13-14, 21-23)
13.22: Iesuꞌa Ierusalema onameꞌeteꞌea, habaꞌahabaꞌano zu neḡaneḡano ihoze onamiro.
13.23: Ebu vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, Badiꞌaꞌa vaze tahiḡa daꞌo ḡaboziꞌumahe?” Iesuꞌa naenaeziro,
13.24: “Ḡabone hidihi roꞌidene, ibiheta kokosiḡa diuḡoga veize inare hunoꞌi. Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, vaze ḡehaḡaꞌe eꞌe diuḡihi reꞌuma rehano, mene idaraꞌuma.
13.25: Ne vazeḡaniꞌa iḡunadu ibiheta haraune, zaꞌe enona edanadu toketokereꞌenaꞌa ꞌahige uminiꞌuma, 'Vaze boro, ibiheta vavaꞌoꞌi!' Rehano ani naenaeziꞌuma, 'E za noumanoꞌo arataꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa.'
13.26: Ebu za ꞌahige reꞌuma, 'Eme ḡae teite ogaro zu gagiro ebu ḡaꞌe ibio ihofiro.'
13.27: Rehano ani naenaeziꞌuma, 'Za noumanoꞌo arataꞌaꞌe e aḡuꞌa. Za, haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa, eḡe mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi!'
13.28: Ebu za Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano Aberahamo, Isako, Iakobo zu peroveta azaḡa niduꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe zu zaꞌe enona mae feuzeꞌeteꞌe horoziꞌuma. ꞌOugadu zaꞌe niaꞌuma zu ḡononeze atitiꞌuma.
13.29: Iuda mene azaḡaniꞌa madaꞌa iteꞌeteꞌe moneonoꞌo zu madaꞌa zubureꞌeteꞌe moneonoꞌo zu haba niduꞌaonoꞌo aradu Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ogau tiburaꞌuma.
13.30: Hube hune, vaze ibiꞌaꞌe ḡonaga reꞌuma ebu vaze ḡonagaꞌe ibiꞌa reꞌuma.” Iesuꞌa Ierusalema uꞌano Niaro (Mataio 23:37-39)
13.31: Eꞌe madaḡano Farisea azaḡa nuꞌa Iesu vaḡe aradu niro, “ꞌAdanoꞌo vaḡinadu haba ꞌahoga onamoꞌi, mazaḡa kini Herodaꞌa ḡamihi raꞌohe.”
13.32: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Aniꞌe butu ḡuniḡa soꞌosoꞌoḡa. Ani vaḡe onamadu ꞌahige noꞌi, 'E mada mene faḡano vine sauꞌa hegoze buziꞌuma zu ugi azaḡa faiziꞌuma, ebu hena eḡe gau niduꞌa haḡae hauḡiꞌuma.'
13.33: Naginiꞌa eḡe mazao fureraune zuni, e izidi, ohoḡore, iḡano zu mada nu eḡe ibio onamiꞌuma, onamo Ierusalemao feuriꞌuma. Mazaḡa peroveta azaḡaꞌe Ierusalema habaꞌa enogano mene rudaꞌuma.
13.34: O, Ierusalema, Ierusalema, zaꞌa peroveta azaḡa zimiro, zu Badiꞌaꞌa tuḡuziroteꞌe azaḡa hadi hina zimi ruziro. Kokorokuꞌa isaḡa zamaḡano ubuga gugubeꞌeteꞌe teige, eḡeꞌa ḡae ḡehaḡa zae taufihi reiro, rehano zaꞌe mene uratinu!
13.35: Ḡianoꞌi, neze fahadu mae modiꞌuma. Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, zaꞌe e mene bare horohiꞌuma, onamo zaeꞌa raenaꞌa, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro niḡano areꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune,' rae reiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa meꞌuma.”

14.1: Bana Madaḡa ꞌahogano Iesuꞌa Farisea azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoga neo ogomu anoga veize onamiro. Ebu vaze nuꞌa ani uhiḡano ḡiaḡiane radiro.
14.2: Eꞌea Iesu zamao vaze ꞌahogaꞌe uginadu ꞌevoꞌa zu odaḡaꞌe miniroteꞌeꞌa radiro.
14.3: Ebu Iesuꞌa Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡa ḡadiziro, “Zaꞌa zamareꞌetene Bana Madaḡano ugi vazeḡa fainogaꞌe idaḡa ga mene?”
14.4: Zeꞌa mene naenaeniro. Iesuꞌa ꞌevoꞌa hina ugi vazeḡa oboneꞌenaꞌa, fainadu tuḡune vaḡiniro.
14.5: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zae boꞌaḡano Bana Madaḡano iniu ubuga ga boromakauꞌa idu vuḡa zamaḡano ovoine, ḡarihe mae ḡihiniꞌuma ga mene?”
14.6: ꞌOuge reirotene, ze mene naenaeniro. Nize mae Ovoroꞌi
14.7: Muio huziroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa hitana ehoroḡano ehoroga Iesuꞌa horozirotene, hari ꞌahoga idaniro,
14.8: “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa hahu muiḡa auḡoga veize ḡa huḡadoꞌidene, hitana ehoroḡano ago ehoroꞌi. Mazaḡa ufeta hitaga vazeḡa zuni hunine,
14.9: ḡanine huzateꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa ḡa vaḡe aradu ꞌahige ḡeꞌuma, 'Ḡae ehoro habaꞌa vaze ꞌadi hanoꞌi.' ꞌOugine, ḡa mazagaroꞌadu ḡonaga ehoroḡa onamiꞌuma.
14.10: Eꞌanoꞌo mui vazeḡaniꞌa huḡadoꞌidene, ḡonaga ehoroḡano ehoroꞌi. ꞌOugine, huḡadiroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa horoꞌadu ḡa vaḡe ariꞌuma, ebu ꞌahige ḡeꞌuma, 'Eḡe vaze, iḡunadu hitana ehoroḡano ehoroꞌi.' ꞌOugine, ḡae teite huziroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ḡa niguꞌiꞌuma.
14.11: Iniu vaze aneꞌa bare niḡa mae itine, Badiꞌaꞌa niḡa mae ovoiꞌuma, u iniu vaze aneꞌa bare niḡa mae ovoine, Badiꞌaꞌa niḡa mae itiꞌuma.”
14.12: Ebu Iesuꞌa ani huniroteꞌe vazeḡa niro, “Madai ogomu ga ḡorava ogomu veize vaze huzoꞌidene, vazeḡo, negoḡo, nabugo ga ḡae uhiḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe maꞌora azaḡa ago huzoꞌi. ꞌOugine zeꞌa ḡa bare naenae huḡadadu ḡaeꞌa haḡaiḡo naeḡa meꞌuma.
14.13: Rehano ḡa mui madaḡano zahara azaḡa, oda sauꞌa azaḡa, edanoga mene idaḡa azaḡa ebu ubumaze kuruḡa azaḡa huzoꞌi.
14.14: ꞌOugine ḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa manohuga ḡaniꞌuma. Zeꞌe baronoḡanogaꞌe mene idaḡa ꞌahine, duduḡa azaḡaniꞌa bare ḡaboditeꞌe madaḡano, ḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa haḡaiḡo naeḡa ḡaniꞌuma.” Mui Boro Hari Idaidaḡa (Mataio 22:1-10)
14.15: Iesu teite ogau radiroteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu ḡoere egadu Iesu niro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ogau tiburuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe.”
14.16: Ebu Iesuꞌa niro, “Mada ꞌahogano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa mui boro ruhibadu vaze ḡehaḡa huziro.
14.17: Mui madaḡa reirotene, ani tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoga huziroteꞌe azaḡa vaḡe tuḡunadu ꞌahige rae ziro, 'Mui boro veize ḡau niduꞌa izidi ruhibeha. Eꞌanoꞌo zae niduꞌa aroꞌi.'
14.18: Rehano zeḡe niduꞌaꞌe ḡoere nunufiro. Ibite huniroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa raenaꞌa, 'E haba iziga hoiteha, eꞌanoꞌo e haba eꞌe ḡiani onamihi. E mene amateꞌe moneo ago maḡunoꞌi.'
14.19: Ebu vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa raenaꞌa, 'E boromakau gaubanana hoiteha. Eꞌanoꞌo e ze manoga ga meneꞌe tuhune nurihi. E mene amateꞌe moneo ago maḡunoꞌi.'
14.20: Ebu vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa raenaꞌa, 'E iziduꞌu hahureha, eꞌanoꞌo e mene amiꞌuma.'
14.21: Tuḡure vazeḡaniꞌa bare onamadu zeꞌa reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa zuhiꞌaḡa ihoniro. Ihonirotene mui vazeḡaꞌe maḡune rudaro ebu tuḡure vazeḡa niro, 'Ne ibi boroboro zu ibi komeꞌakomeꞌa ḡarihe onamadu zahara azaḡa, oda sauꞌa azaḡa, ubumaze kuruḡa azaḡa zu edanoga mene idaḡa azaḡa zamaze aroꞌi.'
14.22: Ebu tuḡure vazeḡaniꞌa onamadu ꞌouge haḡairo, ebu baradu zuhiꞌaḡa niro, 'Zuhiꞌa, ḡaꞌa ehateꞌe gauḡa haḡaeha, rehano ne ꞌize mene iriꞌaveha.'
14.23: Zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa tuḡure vazeḡa niro, 'Ibi boro zu ibi komeꞌa onamoꞌi ebu vaze niduꞌa teꞌoteꞌozadu zamaze aroꞌi. Vazeꞌe eḡe ne iri'avonoꞌi.
14.24: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, ibite mui veize huziroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe eḡe mui tahiḡa zuni mene auḡiꞌuma.'” Iesu Hegoteꞌeteꞌe Ibiḡa (Mataio 10:37-38)
14.25: Mada ꞌahogano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesu teite ragavinu. Ebu Iesuꞌa vaetadu ziro,
14.26: “Iniuꞌa eḡe ḡaruna hegotoga uratoꞌidene, eḡe zamare borofoꞌi. Iniuꞌa moga zu viꞌa, inuga zu ubuga, negoḡa zu ezeḡa, ebu ḡaboneḡaꞌe eḡe ufeta vitihe zamare borofine, aniꞌe eḡe mene tahiꞌa reꞌuma.
14.27: Iniuꞌa ane satauro odohadu eḡe ḡaruna mene hegotine, aniꞌe eḡe mene tahiꞌa reꞌuma.
14.28: Zae boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa hitaga neḡa ogoranoga uratine, ibite geno ehoradu hadi nugu hina ogoru hauḡiꞌuma rae zamariꞌuma, zu hadiḡaꞌe ne eꞌe ogoranoga veize idaḡa ga meneꞌe ḡianiꞌuma.
14.29: Aniꞌa iḡite ohonadu mene ogoru hauḡine, vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa eꞌe horonadu ḡirihohaꞌuma.
14.30: Zeꞌe ꞌahige reꞌuma, 'Vaze ꞌadiꞌe ne ohoniro, rehano hauḡogaꞌe mene idararo.'
14.31: Ebu kini ꞌahoganiꞌa kini ꞌahoga teite uti onamine, ani ibite geno ehoradu ꞌahige rae zamariꞌuma, 'Eḡe uti azaḡaꞌe 10,000 ebu ani uti azaḡa 20,000. E kini eꞌe teite utitine, ani vitiniꞌuma ga mene?'
14.32: Ani vitinoga mene idaḡa reine, kini eꞌe ꞌize faḡano radiuꞌeteꞌea, ani teite uniho manoḡa mouga veize hari odohe dureꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa tuḡuniꞌuma.
14.33: Eꞌe teige, zae boꞌaḡano iniuꞌa ane ḡau niduꞌa moditeꞌe moneo ibite mene zamarine, aniꞌe eḡe mene tahiꞌa reꞌuma.” Dama Mene Iniga (Mataio 5:13; Mareko 9:50)
14.34: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe dama heuḡa. Damaꞌe manoḡa, rehano iniganiꞌa dauḡine, nougenouge bare inidaꞌuma?
14.35: Dama mene inigaꞌe raha ga ogomu ḡuhuneꞌeteꞌe busiḡa veize zuni mene manoḡa ꞌahine, mae modeꞌohe. Teḡaḡeta vazeḡaꞌe faifaine egadu huga ederoꞌi.”

15.1: Mada ꞌahogano takesi azaḡa ebu haḡai sauꞌa azaḡaniꞌa Iesu ḡoere abitihi radu ani uhiḡano nuꞌoraro.
15.2: Rehano Farisea azaḡa ebu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe mene matuꞌiro ebu ufeta ḡoeriro, “Iesuꞌe haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa mae zouzadu zeḡe teite ogau tiburuꞌohe.”
15.3: Eꞌanoꞌo Iesuꞌa hari ꞌahoga idane ziro,
15.4: “Zae boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoga mazao mamoeḡaꞌe 100. Rehano tibaniꞌa dauḡine, ani nougiꞌuma? Aniꞌe mamoe 99 haba bohaꞌano modadu mamoe dauḡoga vaḡe ragaviꞌuma onamo horoniꞌuma.
15.5: Mamoe dauḡoga horone meine, ani matuꞌe rudanadu mae ane herao tiꞌuma,
15.6: ebu ani bare ne onamiꞌuma. Ebu ane vaze, negoḡa zu nabuga huze nuꞌozadu ziꞌuma, 'Eꞌe eḡe mamoe dauḡoga horoneha. Eꞌanoꞌo eḡe teite matu'ihi.'
15.7: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, haḡai sauꞌa vazeḡa tibaniꞌa ḡihurine, adureo ani uꞌano matuꞌiꞌuma. Duduḡa azaḡaꞌe haḡaize sauꞌa oꞌoꞌa radu mene ḡihureꞌohe. Adureo duduḡa azaḡa 99 uꞌano matuꞌiꞌuma, rehano haḡai sauꞌa vazeḡa tibaniꞌa ḡihurine, ufeta matuꞌiꞌuma.” Hadi Dauḡoga Hari Idaidaḡa
15.8: Iesuꞌa hari ꞌahoga idaniro, “Roḡae ꞌahoga mazao hadi niduꞌa gaubanana, rehano tibaniꞌa dauḡine, ani nougiꞌuma? Aniꞌe ihureḡa tinadu ne fodeꞌenaꞌa, haba niduꞌa faine ḡiane vaḡiꞌuma onamo horoniꞌuma.
15.9: Ebu horone meine, ane vaze, negoḡa zu nabuga huzadu ziꞌuma, 'Eꞌe eḡe hadi dauḡoga horoneha, eꞌanoꞌo eḡe teite matuꞌihi.'
15.10: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, haḡai sauꞌa vazeḡa tibaniꞌa ḡihurine, Badiꞌa tuḡure viga niduꞌaꞌe matuꞌiꞌuma.” Ubuga Dauḡoga Hari Idaidaḡa
15.11: Ebu Iesuꞌa hari ꞌahoga bare idaniro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ubuga aheu teite radiunu.
15.12: Mada ꞌahogano ubuga veḡaniꞌa moga niro, 'Mama, ḡae tohe zamaḡano initeꞌe toheḡa niduꞌa enoꞌi.' Eꞌanoꞌo moganiꞌa ane tohe ubuga aheu veize rovonadu ziniro.
15.13: Mada nu enogano, ubuga veḡaniꞌa ḡauḡa niduꞌa nuꞌonadu haba faḡa ꞌahoga onamiro. Ebu eꞌea ani ane matuꞌu uꞌano radiu tauḡitauḡadu hadiḡa niduꞌa modiro.
15.14: Ani hadiḡa niduꞌa mode hauḡirotene, eꞌe habaꞌano zahara boroꞌa buaro ebu ani vinine runiro.
15.15: Eꞌanoꞌo ani gauoga veize eꞌe habaꞌa vazeḡa ꞌahoga vaḡe onamiro, ebu vaze eꞌeꞌa ani haba bohaꞌano aba taufeꞌeteꞌe gauḡa haro.
15.16: Ani eꞌea vinine runadu ani zama boroꞌe aba ogomu atihi reiro, rehano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ogomu ꞌahoga mene haro.
15.17: Ḡonagano zamaḡaniꞌa bohatanadu ani aneꞌa bare ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Eḡe mama veize gaueꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ogomuze ḡehaḡa bagaḡa, u eꞌe ahama vinihe ruheꞌohe.
15.18: E mama vaḡe bare onamadu ꞌahige niꞌuma, “Mama, e Badiꞌa zu ḡa mazao haḡai sauꞌa haḡairo.
15.19: Eꞌanoꞌo e ḡae ubugo rae ago huhoꞌi, rehano ḡae veize gaueꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze tiba teige huhoꞌi.”'
15.20: Ebu aniꞌa iḡunadu moga vaḡe bare onamiro. Ani ꞌize faḡano ariroteꞌea, moganiꞌa horoniro. Mogaꞌe ubuga vetuḡaneadu ani ubuga uꞌa dure onamiro ebu ahainadu furaꞌiniro.
15.21: Ubuganiꞌa moga niro, 'Mama, eꞌe Badiꞌa zu ḡa mazao haḡai sauꞌa haḡairo, eꞌanoꞌo e ḡae ubugo rae ago huhoꞌi.'
15.22: Rehano moganiꞌa tuḡure azaḡa ziro, 'Dabua manoḡa ḡarihe odohe aradu ubudehe vidohanoꞌi. ꞌEvore adiriḡa redohanoꞌi zu tamaka redohanoꞌi.
15.23: Ebu boromakau modohuḡa iga odohe aradu manoꞌi. Eme matuꞌiꞌhi zu ogau tiburatihi.
15.24: Mazaḡa eḡe ubude ꞌahiꞌe rudanadu bare ḡabodeha, ebu ani dauḡadu bare horone maha.' Eꞌanoꞌo ze mui boro haḡadu zeḡe niduꞌa matuꞌe tiburaro.
15.25: ꞌOugiroteꞌe zamaḡano ubuga ibiꞌaniꞌa mebao gaue radiunu. Ani ne uꞌa bare onamadu ne uhiḡano feurirotene, badahe zavoneꞌeteꞌe haraoḡa igiro.
15.26: Ebu ani tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoga hunadu naginiꞌa fureruꞌeteꞌe ḡadiniro.
15.27: Tuḡure vazeḡaniꞌa naenaeniro, 'Negoḡoꞌa manoḡa bare feureha, eꞌanoꞌo mogoꞌa boromakau modohuḡa iga manadu mui boro haḡaeha.'
15.28: ꞌOuge reirotene ubuga ibiꞌaniꞌa maḡune rudaro ebu ne zamaḡa diuḡoga mene uratiro. Ebu moganiꞌa buanadu ne diuḡifine ani uminiro.
15.29: Rehano aniꞌa moga naenaeniro, 'Mama, zamaroꞌi! E muri ḡehaḡa tuḡure vazeḡa teige ḡae veize gaue areꞌohe zu ḡae ḡoere mene hezahohaunu. Rehano e eḡe nabudi teite matuꞌifine ḡaeꞌa gouti ubuga tiba zuni mene manoniro.
15.30: U ubugo ꞌahaꞌa daro fuꞌa roḡaeḡaroḡaeḡa teite ḡae tohe mode hauḡadu ne uꞌa bare aratene, ḡa boromakau modohuḡa iga mano haneha!'
15.31: Ebu moganiꞌa niro, 'Eḡe ubude, ḡa mada niduꞌa eḡe teite radiuꞌohe, eꞌanoꞌo eḡe ḡau niduꞌaꞌe ḡae veize raꞌohe.
15.32: U negoḡoꞌe rudanadu bare ḡabodeha zu dauḡadu bare horoneha. Eꞌanoꞌo emeḡeꞌa mui haḡadu matuꞌiꞌuma.'”

16.1: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Maꞌora vazeḡa ꞌahoga ane ḡau niduꞌa taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu. Mada ꞌahogano maꞌora vazeḡaꞌe ane ḡau taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa ani hadi au hauḡinuteꞌe igiro.
16.2: ꞌOugirotene, maꞌora vazeḡaniꞌa ani hunadu niro, 'Ḡae moneo igiꞌeteꞌe hariḡaꞌe hubehe? Ḡaeꞌa eḡe hadi hina nougenouge gauinuteꞌe faine meꞌodonoꞌi, mazaḡa ḡaꞌe eḡe ḡau mene bare taufiꞌuma.'
16.3: ꞌOuge nirotene, ani aneꞌa bare reiro, 'Eḡe zuhiꞌaꞌa gauhe eḡe mazaonoꞌo mae vaḡiniꞌuma. E izidi nougiꞌuma? E ahiri gauḡa moneo inarahe ꞌoꞌoꞌa zu hadi umidoga mazagaroheꞌohe.
16.4: O, e nougitaꞌaꞌe edereha. ꞌAhige haḡaine, gau ꞌahi moditeꞌe madaḡano vazeꞌa zeḡe neo huhe zouhiꞌuma.'
16.5: ꞌOugadu aniꞌa ane zuhiꞌa ḡau meiroteꞌe azaḡa tibatiba huziro. Ebu zeḡe boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoga ḡadiniro, 'Ḡaꞌa eḡe zuhiꞌa ḡauꞌe nugu meiro?'
16.6: Vaze eꞌeꞌa naenaeniro, 'E olivi dehoroḡa 800 gareni meiro.' Zuhiꞌaḡa ḡau taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa niro, 'Ḡae soꞌa ꞌahi moꞌi, ebu ḡarihe ehoradu 400 gareni rae bare mirihoꞌi.'
16.7: Ebu hena vaze ꞌahoga ḡadiniro, 'Ḡa eḡe zuhiꞌa ḡauꞌe nugu meiro?' Vaze eꞌeꞌa naenaeniro, 'Vuidi fuseḡa niduꞌa 100 meiro.' Aniꞌa niro, 'Ḡae soꞌa ꞌahi madu fuse niduꞌa 80 rae bare mirihoꞌi.'
16.8: Zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa ane ḡau taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa nagini haḡairoteꞌe igirotene, ani ḡuriro vazeḡa rehano, niguniro, mazaḡa haḡaiḡaꞌe huhuzaḡa. Eꞌe teige, raha ꞌadao Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡaꞌe zeḡe veize gauoga ufeta huhuzaḡa. Zeꞌe agaḡa azaḡa vitizoga.
16.9: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, zaꞌe raha ꞌada ḡau madu vaze danazoꞌi, ꞌougine zeꞌe zae nabudi reꞌuma. Ebu ḡauze niduꞌa hauḡadu zae zuni rudaune, zeꞌe radiu tuḡutuḡu habaꞌano za horozadu mae zouziꞌuma.
16.10: Iniuꞌa gau komeꞌa veize zamaḡa niduꞌa hina faine haḡaine, gau boro zuni ꞌouge haḡaiꞌuma. U iniuꞌa gau komeꞌano ḡuririne, gau boro veize zuni ḡuririꞌuma.
16.11: Za raha ḡauḡa madu zamaze niduꞌa hina mene faine taufine, iniuꞌa ḡau manomano zenadu taufoꞌi rae reꞌuma?
16.12: Ebu za vaze ḡau madu zamaze niduꞌa hina mene faine taufine, iniuꞌa zaeꞌa meiteꞌe gau naeḡa ziniꞌuma?
16.13: Tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe zuhiꞌa aheu veize gauoga mene idaḡa. Ani ꞌahogaꞌe heꞌeheꞌeniꞌuma, u ꞌahogaꞌe zamare borofiꞌuma. Ebu ꞌahoga veize faine gauiꞌuma, u ꞌahogaꞌe turuniꞌuma. Eꞌe teige, zaꞌe Badiꞌa ebu hadi, aheu veize gauoga mene idaḡa.”
16.14: Farisea azaḡaꞌe hadi zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe uꞌano Iesu ḡoere igirotene, Iesu eḡofoharo.
16.15: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe vaze ubumao zaeꞌa bare duduḡa raꞌohe, rehano Badiꞌaꞌe zae zama sauꞌa edeḡa. Vazeꞌa ḡau boro raꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa heꞌeheꞌeneꞌohe.
16.16: Ioane Babatisoꞌa ꞌizema arogano Mose goro ḡoeꞌa zu peroveta azaḡa ḡoere hina vaze ibitoziro. Eꞌe enogano Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe moneo hari manoḡaꞌe harameꞌohe, ebu vaze ḡehaḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano diuḡoga veize inareꞌohe.
16.17: Adure zu rahaꞌe dauḡiꞌuma, rehano Mose goro ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa boꞌaḡano komeꞌa ꞌahoga zuni mene hune dauḡiꞌuma.
16.18: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ꞌahoganiꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Iniuꞌa inuga modadu roḡae ꞌahoga teite hahurine, aniꞌe ubuma ḡezauꞌohe. Ebu iniu iꞌaniꞌa modiroteꞌe roḡaeḡa teite hahurine, ani zuni ubuma ḡezauꞌohe.'” Maꞌora Vazeḡa ebu Lazaro
16.19: Iesuꞌa hari ꞌahoga idaniro, “Maꞌora vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu. Ani dabua manoḡa naeḡa boro vidaunu zu mada niduꞌa ne manoḡa huneo ogomu manoḡa au radiunu.
16.20: U ani ne ḡabiriḡa ibihetaḡano zahara vazeḡa, niḡa Lazaroꞌa baze radiunu. Ani ahiriꞌe idiri ḡunuḡa.
16.21: Ani maꞌora vazeḡaniꞌa fatao oganadu mumuḡaniꞌa rururaudoteꞌe ufe atihi reinu. Ḡuniꞌa zuni aradu ane idiri ubidinu.
16.22: Ebu hena Lazaroꞌa rudarotene, tuḡure viganiꞌa ovadu Aberahamo vaḡe zamahu itiro. Ebu maꞌora vazeḡa zuni rudanadu guriro.
16.23: Maꞌora vazeḡaꞌe rune azaḡa haba onamadu gigiꞌa boro uꞌano huau ḡaniḡanaro. Ebu eꞌea ite ḡianirotene, faḡano Aberahamo horoniro zu ane babaḡano Lazaroꞌa ehore radiroteꞌe horoniro.
16.24: ꞌOugadu aniꞌa huau niro, 'Mama Aberahamo! Eḡe vetuḡahoꞌi! Lazaro tuḡunadu ane ꞌevore huduꞌa vuo taradu mazanehe amunanoꞌi. E ire roga duhuḡa zamaḡano gigiꞌa boro hideꞌohe.'
16.25: Rehano Aberahamoꞌa naenaeniro, 'Ubude, ḡa ꞌahi zamaroꞌi. Ḡaꞌa rahao ḡabode radiudoteꞌe madaḡano ḡau manomano hidinu, u Lazaroꞌe aduga nunu hidinu. Eꞌanoꞌo Lazaroꞌe izidi ꞌahao matuꞌe radiuꞌohe, u ḡaꞌe gigiꞌa hideꞌohe.
16.26: Mene eꞌe daꞌo, emeḡe zu zae boꞌaḡanoꞌe dofara boro. Vaze ꞌahoga ꞌahaonoꞌo zae mone fare amoga mene idaḡa, ebu ꞌomanoꞌo emeḡe none fare aroga zuni mene idaḡa.'
16.27: ꞌOuge reirotene, maꞌora vazeḡaniꞌa naenaeniro, 'Mama Aberahamo, e ḡa umiꞌeꞌohe. Lazaro eḡe ne tuḡune onamoꞌi.
16.28: Negohe niduꞌaꞌe fuꞌo. Lazaroꞌa zeḡe vaḡe onamadu riḡa iraduguzine, ze eḡeꞌa gigiꞌa hideꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa ꞌada mene ariꞌuma.'
16.29: Rehano Aberahamoꞌa niro, 'Mose zu peroveta azaḡaniꞌa mirihiroteꞌe soꞌaḡaꞌe zeḡe mazao, eꞌanoꞌo ze eꞌe meꞌodadu faine ederiꞌuma.'
16.30: Ebu maꞌora vazeḡaniꞌa niro, 'Mene, mama Aberahamo, rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano ꞌahoganiꞌa bare ḡabodadu zeḡe vaḡe onamine, zeꞌe ḡihuriꞌuma.'
16.31: Rehano Aberahamoꞌa niro, 'Ze Mose zu peroveta azaḡa ḡoere mene egozinine, rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡabode iḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡa ḡoere zuni mene hune egohaꞌuma.'”

17.1: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Vaze ibi sauꞌano tutuzeꞌeteꞌeꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe mada niduꞌa fureruꞌohe, rehano vaze haḡai sauꞌano tutuzeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe aduga boro hidiꞌuma.
17.2: Aniꞌa vaze komeꞌakomeꞌa boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga haḡai sauꞌano tutune veꞌonine, hadi horeḡa ane ꞌunuo autadu davarao mae feunogaꞌe ufeta manoḡa.
17.3: Eꞌanoꞌo zaeꞌa bare tohutohoꞌi! Ekalesia nabugoꞌa haḡai sauꞌa haḡaoꞌidene, ronoꞌi. Ebu aniꞌa haḡaiḡa sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡihuroꞌidene, haḡaiḡa sauꞌa rae modoꞌi.
17.4: Aniꞌa mada tiba zamaḡano ḡae fuꞌo aheu fare ḡae mazao haḡai sauꞌa haḡaoꞌidene, zu ḡae fuꞌo aheu fare ḡae vaḡe bare aradu raenaꞌa, 'E ḡae mazao haḡai sauꞌa haḡaeha. E mene bare haḡaiꞌuma,' rae roꞌidene, ane haḡai sauꞌa aḡutu modoꞌi.”
17.5: Apostolo azaḡaniꞌa Zuhiꞌa Boro niro, “Eme ḡa mazao fieꞌeteꞌe ufeta borofoꞌi!”
17.6: Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa naenaeziro, “Zaꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe fufu maḡa komeꞌa tiba heuḡa radu Irimo ireḡa ninaꞌa, 'Ḡaeꞌa bare taigota iḡunadu davarao ḡuhuroꞌi,' rae reine, ireḡaniꞌa zae ḡoere egoziniꞌuma.
17.7: Zae boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoga teite reine, tuḡure vazeḡa eꞌeꞌa mebao raha huꞌiꞌuma ga mamoe taufiꞌuma. Ebu aniꞌa gauonoꞌo bare arine, ane zuhiꞌaꞌa ninaꞌa, 'Aroꞌi, ehoradu oganoꞌi,' rae reꞌumahe?
17.8: Mene. Ane zuhiꞌaꞌa ꞌahige reꞌuma, 'Eḡe veize ḡorava ogomuḡa ḡorohadu ruhiboꞌi, ebu e ibite oganoga veize danahoꞌi. Eꞌe ḡaruganobuꞌu ḡa oganoꞌi.'
17.9: Ebu tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa rateꞌe gauḡa haḡairoteꞌe uꞌano zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa ani mazao manoḡa tauḡi rae niꞌumahe? Mene.
17.10: Eꞌanoꞌo zae zuni Badiꞌaꞌa ziꞌeteꞌe gauḡa haḡae hauḡoꞌidene, ꞌahige roꞌi, 'Eme tuḡure azaḡa komeꞌa. Eme emeḡeꞌa haḡae huniteꞌe gauḡa haḡae tauḡeha.'” Refera Azaḡa Gaubanana Faiziro
17.11: Iesuꞌa Ierusalema onamiroteꞌe ibiḡano Samaria zu Galilea habaꞌa nemaḡano vitine onamiro.
17.12: Ebu aniꞌa ne ꞌahoga diuḡirotene, refera azaḡa gaubanana hidiro. Ze faḡano edanadu Iesu horoniro,
17.13: ebu ḡihau huaro, “Vaze boro Iesu, eme vetuḡafoꞌi!”
17.14: Iesuꞌa horozadu ziro, “Dibuꞌo azaḡa vaḡe onamadu ahirize ihozoꞌi.” Ebu ze ibio onameꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano, referazeꞌa deheru manoriro.
17.15: Zeḡe boꞌaḡano vaze tibaꞌe referaḡaniꞌa manoroga horonirotene, agoḡa boro hina Badiꞌa niguneꞌenaꞌa, Iesu vaḡe bare ariro.
17.16: Ebu ani Iesu oda babaḡano ḡuḡuradu manoḡa tauḡi rae niro. Vaze ꞌadiꞌe Samaria vazeḡa.
17.17: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡadiniro, “E vaze gaubanana faizeha, rehano vaze fuꞌo ḡazaḡa fareꞌe noumao?
17.18: Iuda mene vazeḡa, ḡaꞌa daꞌo aradu Badiꞌa niguneꞌehe?”
17.19: Ebu Iesuꞌa niro, “Iḡunadu onamoꞌi. Ḡaeꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, ḡaeꞌa manoreha.” Badiꞌaꞌa Zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe Madaḡa (Mataio 24:23-28, 37-41)
17.20: Mada ꞌahogano Farisea azaḡaniꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡaꞌe naniꞌa ariꞌuma?” Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡaꞌe ubumaze hina ḡianoga mene idaḡa.
17.21: 'Ḡianoꞌi, ꞌahama raꞌohe!' ga 'ꞌOmoa raꞌohe!' rae mene reꞌuma, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zae boꞌaḡano zuhiꞌaziꞌohe.”
17.22: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌa zazore mone Vaze Ubuga rahao ḡianihi reiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma, rehano zaꞌe ani mene horoniꞌuma.
17.23: Vazeꞌa raenaꞌa, 'Ḡianoꞌi, Iesuꞌe ꞌomo eꞌe,' ga 'Iesuꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe,' rae zoꞌidene, ago buau onamoꞌi zu ago hegotoꞌi.
17.24: Vaze Ubuganiꞌa bare arine, vaze niduꞌa huneꞌa horoniꞌuma. Aꞌe viriꞌa vazahadu adure naenaenoꞌo aganadu vaze niduꞌa horoneꞌeteꞌe heuḡa.
17.25: Rehano ibite aniꞌe aduga ḡehaḡa hidiꞌuma zu izidi eganiꞌa ani hezahohaꞌuma.
17.26: Vaze Ubuganiꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡanoꞌe Noa madaḡa teigiꞌuma.
17.27: Eꞌe madaḡano vaze niduꞌa iḡaiḡa haḡainuteꞌe teige ogaunu, gaginu zu hahurinu, onamo Noaꞌa ḡasi boro diuḡiro. Ebu hena zobo boroꞌa aradu zeḡe niduꞌa ruize hauḡiro.
17.28: ꞌUguḡaniꞌa Lota madaḡano zuni fureraro. Vaze niduꞌa iḡaiḡa haḡainuteꞌe teige ogaunu, gaginu, hoitinu, seroninu, hihinu ebu neze ogoraunu.
17.29: Rehano Lotaꞌa Sodoma mode iḡunirotene, ire roga zu sulifuꞌa adureonoꞌo irugu teige rururu ovoadu zeḡe niduꞌa hune ruize hauḡiro.
17.30: Vaze Ubuganiꞌa bare arine, eꞌe madaḡa teigiꞌuma.
17.31: Eꞌe madaḡano iniu ne enogano radiuꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡauḡa mouga veize ne zamaḡa mene diuḡiꞌuma. Mebao hiheꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa zuni ne bare mene onamiꞌuma.
17.33: Iniuꞌa ane ḡabone obone giganine, ani ḡabone tuḡutuḡu mene hidiꞌuma. Rehano iniuꞌa ane ḡabone eḡe veize ahetine, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma.
17.34: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, e bare ariteꞌe oheꞌano vaze aheuꞌe evane tibano bazeꞌeteꞌea ꞌahogaꞌe zamahanadu onamiꞌuma, u ꞌahogaꞌe muhine iḡuniꞌuma.
17.35: Roḡae aheuꞌe ꞌuvahu mirune radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ꞌahogaꞌe zamahanadu iḡuniꞌuma, u ꞌahogaꞌe muhine iḡuniꞌuma.”
17.37: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ḡadiniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eꞌeguḡaniꞌa noumao fureraꞌuma?” Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Naginiꞌa rudaroteꞌe habaꞌano gaozaꞌa nuꞌoraꞌuma.”

18.1: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa iḡaiḡa kuranoga zu kuru mene modoga veize hari ꞌahoga idane ziro,
18.2: “Haba ꞌahogano kota vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu. Aniꞌe Badiꞌa mene rihoninu zu vaze mene gubazinu.
18.3: Eꞌe habaꞌano ḡozoba ꞌahoganiꞌa zuni radiunu. Ani barebare kota vazeḡa vaḡe onamadu uminiro, 'Agire vazeḡaniꞌa eḡe mazao sauꞌa haḡaeꞌohe. Ḡaeꞌa ane haḡai sauꞌa naeḡa hanoꞌi!'
18.4: Kota vazeḡaꞌe faḡa hune ḡozoba eꞌe dananoga mene uratiro. Rehano vesuꞌu ani aneꞌa bare ꞌahige rae reiro, 'E Badiꞌa mene rihoneꞌohe zu vaze mene gubazeꞌohe.
18.5: Rehano ḡozoba ꞌadi e ufeta ḡunuḡunuheꞌe ꞌahine, e ani umido egadu dananiꞌuma. Mene ꞌougine, ani barebare aradu e fuḡofuḡohiꞌuma!'”
18.6: Ebu Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa bare reiro, “Zaꞌe Kota vazeḡaniꞌa nagini raꞌeteꞌe egoꞌi.
18.7: Badiꞌaꞌe aneꞌa ohotiroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ohere zu madai uminine, zeḡe umido ziniꞌuma, ebu danazogaꞌe mene sasiꞌuma.
18.8: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, Badiꞌaꞌa nagini duduḡa raꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa ḡarihe ziniꞌuma. Rehano Vaze Ubuganiꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡano, Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa nu horoziꞌuma ga mene?” Farisea Vazeḡa zu Takesi Vazeḡa Hari Idaidaḡa
18.9: Iesuꞌa ze zeḡeꞌa bare duduḡa rae raꞌeteꞌe zu vaze ovoe ḡiazeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao hari ꞌahoga idane ziro,
18.10: “Mada ꞌahogano vaze aheuꞌa kuranoga radu kuru neḡa itiro. Vaze ꞌahogaꞌe Farisea vazeḡa zu ꞌahogaꞌe takesi vazeḡa.
18.11: Farisea vazeḡaꞌe edanadu aneꞌa bare ꞌahige kuraro, 'Badiꞌa, manoḡa tauḡi, mazaḡa eꞌe ḡonore azaḡa, haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa, ubuma ḡezo azaḡa zu ꞌuguḡa azaḡa nunu mene heuḡa, ebu takesi vazeḡa ꞌomo zu mene heuḡa.
18.12: Fura tiba zamaḡano e ḡae aheu ogomu moneo zaḡozaḡeꞌohe, zu eḡeꞌa hidiroteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌaonoꞌo sinu gaubananao rovonadu sinu tiba ḡauḡa ḡaneꞌohe.'
18.13: U takesi vazeḡaꞌe faḡano edanadu adure ḡoha zuni mene ite ehamuꞌenaꞌa ebu ꞌuꞌuga faꞌofaꞌoneꞌenaꞌa ꞌahige kuraro, 'Badiꞌa, eꞌe haḡai sauꞌa vazeḡa. Vetuḡahoꞌi!'
18.14: Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, Badiꞌa ubumao duduḡa rae radu neḡa bariroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe mene Farisea vazeḡa, rehano takesi vazeḡa. Iniu aneꞌa bare niḡa mae itine, Badiꞌaꞌa niḡa mae ovoiꞌuma, u iniu aneꞌa bare niḡa mae ovoine, Badiꞌaꞌa niḡa mae itiꞌuma.” Iesu zu Tahiꞌa Komeꞌakomeꞌa (Mataio 19:13-15; Mareko 10:13-16)
18.15: Mada ꞌahogano vaze nuꞌa eneze guraḡa zuni tutuzadu Iesu vaḡe ariro, mazaḡa Iesuꞌa ꞌevoꞌa zeḡe rana touga uratiro. Rehano ani tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa horozadu tutuze ariroteꞌe azaḡa roziro.
18.16: ꞌOugirotene, Iesuꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa huziro ebu vaze eꞌea ziro, “Tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa eḡe mazao tuḡuzoꞌi. Ze ago gararoꞌi. Mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe tahiꞌa komeꞌakomeꞌa teigeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa.
18.17: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa tahiꞌa komeꞌa teige Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe mene mae ḡihinine, ani Badiꞌaꞌa mene zuhiꞌaniꞌuma.” Maꞌora Vazeḡa (Mataio 19:16-30; Mareko 10:17-31)
18.18: Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ihore vazeḡa manoḡa, e nougine, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma?”
18.19: Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡa nougadu eꞌe manoḡa rae raꞌohe? Vazeni ꞌahoga zuni mene hune manoḡa, rehano Badiꞌa ane daꞌo manoḡa.
18.20: Ḡa Mose goro ḡoeꞌa edeḡa: 'Ubuma ago ḡezanoꞌi, vaze ago gorunoꞌi, ago ḡonotanoꞌi, vaze moneo ago ḡuriroꞌi ebu viꞌu mogo gubazoꞌi.' ”
18.21: Aniꞌa naenaeniro, “E komeꞌanonoꞌo ḡoere ꞌahi niduꞌa hegote ariro.”
18.22: Iesuꞌa ani ḡoere egadu niro, “Ḡa ḡau ꞌahoga ꞌize mene haḡaeha. Ḡauḡo niduꞌa seronadu zahara azaḡa zenoꞌi. ꞌOugine ḡa adureo ḡau naeḡa boroboro hidiꞌuma. Ebu aradu eḡe hegotoꞌi.”
18.23: Aniꞌa Iesu ḡoere igirotene, zamaḡaniꞌa adudaro, mazaḡa aniꞌe ufeta maꞌora vazeḡa.
18.24: Ebu Iesuꞌa ani horonadu reiro, “Maꞌora azaḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa rougaꞌe riḡa bagaḡa.
18.25: Kameroꞌe niduru hoꞌoga diuḡogaꞌe riḡa. Rehano maꞌora vazeḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaniꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa rougaꞌe ufeta riḡa.”
18.26: Eꞌe igiroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ḡadiniro, “ꞌOugine, iniuꞌa ḡabone hidiꞌuma?”
18.27: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Vaze aneꞌa bare ḡabone hidogaꞌe mene idaḡa, rehano Badiꞌaꞌe idaḡa.”
18.28: Ebu Peteroꞌa niro, “Eme emeḡe ḡau niduꞌa modadu ḡa hegotiro.”
18.29: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniu Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe veize neḡa, inuga, negoḡa, viꞌa moga ga tahiꞌaḡa modine,
18.30: aniꞌe izidi madaḡano ane naeḡa ḡae ḡehaḡa hidiꞌuma, ebu zama moneo ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma.” Iesuꞌa Ane Rune moneo Ḡae Uḡiduḡano Ihoziro (Mataio 20:17-19; Mareko 10:32-34)
18.31: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare ani uhiḡano nuꞌozadu ziro, “Eme Ierusalema iteꞌohe. Eꞌea feurine, peroveta azaḡaniꞌa Vaze Ubuga moneo mirihiroteꞌe niduꞌa hudaꞌuma.
18.32: Vaze Ubugaꞌe Iuda mene azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌinadu zeꞌa ḡirihohaꞌuma, ani mae mazagaroniꞌuma, ani rana soꞌabidiꞌuma,
18.33: masiniꞌuma zu maꞌuma. Rehano mada uḡiduḡano aniꞌa bare ḡabode iḡuniꞌuma.”
18.34: Rehano Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe ane ḡoere huga mene ederiro, mazaḡa ḡoere huga aꞌe ꞌuꞌuruga ꞌahine, aniꞌa nagini zirotaꞌaꞌe mene ederiro. Iesuꞌa Ubuma Kuruḡa Vazeḡa Fainiro (Mataio 20:29-34; Mareko 10:46-52)
18.35: Iesuꞌa Ieriko hanitirotene, ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ibi genaḡano ehoradu vaze mazao hadi umidinu.
18.36: Ani vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa harae vitauꞌeteꞌe egadu naginiꞌa fureruꞌeteꞌe ḡadimaro.
18.37: Ebu zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Nazareta vazeḡa Iesuꞌa vitauꞌohe.”
18.38: Ze ꞌouge nirotene, ani ḡihau huaro, “Davida mariga Iesu, eḡe vetuḡahoꞌi!”
18.39: ꞌOugirotene, ibitiroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa roniro, “Ḡa sifu radoꞌi!” Rehano ani ufeta ḡihau huaro, “Davida mariga, eḡe vetuḡahoꞌ!”
18.40: Ebu Iesuꞌa tue edanadu ziro, “Ani tutune aroꞌi.”
18.41: Aniꞌa Iesu vaḡe arirotene, Iesuꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡa eḡeꞌa ḡae veize nagini haḡaoga urateꞌohe?” Aniꞌa naenaeniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, e ehamatihi.”
18.42: Iesuꞌa niro, “Ehamanoꞌi. Ḡaeꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌeꞌa manoꞌeha.”
18.43: ꞌOugirotene, ani zogone manoradu faine ehamaro, zu Badiꞌa niguneꞌenaꞌa Iesu hegotiro. Vaze niduꞌa eꞌe horonirotene, zeḡe zuni Badiꞌa niguniro.

19.2: Eꞌea vaze ꞌahoga niḡa Zakaioꞌa radiunu. Aniꞌe takesi vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa zu maꞌora vazeḡa.
19.3: Ani Iesuꞌe iniu rae ḡianihi reiro, rehano aniꞌe vaze futuꞌa ꞌahine, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa boꞌaḡano Iesu horonogaꞌe mene idararo.
19.4: Eꞌanoꞌo ani Iesu ḡianoga radu dure ibitiro, ebu Hiru ireḡa ꞌahoga sibiriro, mazaḡa Iesuꞌa eꞌe ibiḡano vitaꞌuma rae reiro.
19.5: Ebu Iesuꞌa eꞌe habaꞌano feurirotene, ite ehamanadu Zakaio niro, “Zakaio, ḡarihe bua ovaoꞌi. E izidi ḡae neo radiꞌuma.”
19.6: ꞌOugadu Zakaioꞌe ḡarihe sibire buanadu matuꞌeꞌenaꞌa, ane neo Iesu mae ḡihiniro.
19.7: Vaze niduꞌa eꞌe horonadu gumude ḡoeriro, “Iesuꞌa haḡai sauꞌa vazeḡa neo diuḡadu radiuꞌohe.”
19.8: Ebu Zakaioꞌa edanadu Zuhiꞌa Boro niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡianoꞌi. E izidi eḡe ḡau niduꞌaonoꞌo ḡahaꞌa zahara azaḡa ziniꞌuma. Ebu eḡeꞌa vaze soꞌozadu ḡau ꞌahoga meiniro reine, ḡae ḡazaḡa bare baronoziniꞌuma.”
19.9: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Izidi ḡa zu ḡae teite ne tibano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ḡabone hideha. Izidi Zakaio zuni Aberahamo mariga.
19.10: Vaze Ubugaꞌe dauḡiroteꞌe azaḡa vaḡadu ḡabozoga veize ariro.” Tuḡure Azaḡa Gaubanana Hari Idaidaḡa (Mataio 25:14-30)
19.11: Iesuꞌa Ierusalema hanitirotene vaze niduꞌa ꞌahige rae zamariro, “Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa zogone fureraꞌuma.” ꞌOugadu ze Iesu ḡoere ꞌize abiteꞌeteꞌea, Iesuꞌa hari ꞌahoga idane ziro,
19.12: “Niḡa boro vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu. Aniꞌa kini iḡuri mouga veize haba faḡa onamadu bare arihi rae reiro.
19.13: Aniꞌa iḡuniroteꞌe madaḡano tuḡureḡa azaḡa gaubanana huzadu zeḡe tibatiba hadi silivaḡa tibatiba ziniro. Ebu aniꞌa ziro, 'Hadi ꞌahi hina gauadu hadi borofoꞌi, onamo eḡeꞌa bare ariꞌuma.'
19.14: U ane haba azaḡaniꞌa ani heꞌeheꞌenadu ane ḡaruna hari odohe onameꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa tuḡunadu haba zuhiꞌaḡa mazao uminiro, 'Eme aniꞌe emeḡe kini rouga mene urateꞌohe.'
19.15: Rehano haba zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa ani kinio ohonadu bare ariro. Ebu hadi silivaḡa ziniroteꞌe tuḡure azaḡa huzadu zeꞌa nougenouge hadi borofirotaꞌaꞌe ederihi rae reiro.
19.16: Ebu tuḡure vazeḡa ibiꞌaniꞌa ane vaḡe aradu niro, 'Zuhiꞌa, ḡaeꞌa iniroteꞌe hadi silivaḡa tiba hina hadi silivaḡa gaubanana ragate haḡairo.'
19.17: Ane zuhiꞌaꞌa niro, 'Manoḡa taugi, ḡaꞌe tuḡure vazeḡa manoḡa! Ḡaeꞌa zamaḡo niduꞌa hina gau komeꞌa faine odohe gauiro ꞌahine, ne niduꞌa gaubanana ḡianeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡano ohoꞌiꞌuma.'
19.18: Ebu tuḡure vazeḡa aheuḡaniꞌa aradu niro, 'Zuhiꞌa, ḡaeꞌa iniroteꞌe hadi silivaḡa tiba hina hadi silivaḡa fuꞌo ragate haḡairo.'
19.19: Zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa naenaeniro, 'Manoḡa tauḡi! Ḡa zuni ne niduꞌa fuꞌo ḡianeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡano ohoꞌiꞌuma.'
19.20: Rehano tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa aradu niro, 'Zuhiꞌa, ḡae hadiꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe. Eḡeꞌa mene daunoga veize dabua hina ꞌumadu ꞌuꞌuru tiro.
19.21: Ḡaꞌe vaze riḡa. Vazeꞌa tiroteꞌe ḡauḡa ḡaeꞌa maꞌohe, zu vazeꞌa ḡoraroteꞌe ḡauḡa ḡaeꞌa hiriveꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo e ḡa rihoꞌadu ꞌouge haḡairo.'
19.22: Zuhiꞌaḡaniꞌa niro, 'Ḡaꞌe tuḡure vazeḡa sauꞌa! Ḡaeꞌa rateꞌe ḡoeꞌa uꞌano, e aduga ḡaniꞌuma! Ḡae zamarone, eꞌe vaze riḡa radu e vazeꞌa tiroteꞌe ḡauḡa maꞌohe zu ḡoraroteꞌe ḡauḡa hiriveꞌohe rae ederirohe?
19.23: ꞌOugirotene, ḡa nougadu hadi tiꞌeteꞌe neḡano eḡe hadi mene tiro? ꞌOugifone, e bare aradu hadi eꞌe bare ragate meifo.'
19.24: Ebu ani vaetadu uhiḡano edaroteꞌe azaḡa ziro, 'Ani mazaonoꞌo hadi silivaḡa tiba eꞌe moꞌi, ebu hadi silivaḡa gaubanana meiroteꞌe tuḡure vazeḡa hanoꞌi.'
19.25: Rehano zeḡeꞌa niro, 'Zuhiꞌa, ani hadi silivaḡa gaubanana amahi meiro.'
19.26: Ani naenaeziro, 'Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe. Iniuꞌa nagini hidiroteꞌe faine odohe gauine, ani bare borofe hidiꞌuma. Rehano iniuꞌa nagini hidiroteꞌe mene faine odohe gauine, ani mazao nagini komeꞌa zuni meiniꞌuma.
19.27: Ebu eḡeꞌa kini rouga mene uratiroteꞌe agire azaḡa tutuze aradu eḡe zamao mau ruzoꞌi.'” Iesuꞌa Ierusalema Diuḡiro (Mataio 21:1-11; Mareko 11:1-11; Ioane 12:12-19)
19.28: Iesuꞌa ḡoere hauḡadu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa vitize Ierusalema uꞌa itiro.
19.29: Ebu aniꞌa Olivi Maḡano Betefage zu Betania neḡano feurirotene, ane tahiꞌa aheu tuḡuzeꞌenaꞌa ziro,
19.30: “Zama mone neḡa onamoꞌi. Eꞌe neḡa diuḡine, vazeni ꞌahoga mene ehoriroteꞌe donikiḡa ubuga batune touga horoniꞌuma. Ebu fuhiꞌadu ꞌahi zamahu aroꞌi.
19.31: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa, 'Nougadu fuiꞌeꞌohe?' rae ḡadizoꞌidene, 'Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa urateꞌohe,' rae noꞌi.”
19.32: Ebu Iesuꞌa tuḡuziroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ibite ne eꞌe onamirotene, Iesuꞌa ziroteꞌe teige doniki ubuga ꞌahoga horoniro.
19.33: Ze doniki ubuga eꞌe fuhiꞌiroteꞌe zamaḡano doniki taufeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ḡadiziro, “Za nougadu doniki ubuga fuhiꞌeꞌohe?”
19.34: Zeꞌa naenaeziro, “Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa urateꞌohe.” Ze ꞌouge reirotene doniki taufeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ziniro.
19.35: Ebu ze doniki ubuga tutune Iesu vaḡe aradu dabuaze doniki ubuga ḡarunio zahariro, ebu Iesuꞌa eꞌe rana tire ehoriro.
19.36: Ebu Iesuꞌa onameꞌeteꞌea, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa dabuaze ane ibio hiraro.
19.37: Ebu Iesuꞌa Olivi Maḡanonoꞌo ovoeꞌeteꞌe ibiḡa hanitirotene, ane hegoteꞌeteꞌe vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa niduꞌa onameꞌenaꞌa, matuꞌuzeta huaro zu Badiꞌa niguniro, mazaḡa ze Iesuꞌa haḡainuteꞌe haḡai gigiꞌaḡa niduꞌa horoniro.
19.38: Zeꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro niḡano areꞌeteꞌe kiniḡaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune! Adureo uniho manoḡa, hitana huneo Badiꞌa nigunihi!”
19.39: Rehano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa boꞌaḡano Farisea azaḡa nuꞌa Iesu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, ḡa hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ꞌouge huauꞌeteꞌe gararoꞌi!”
19.40: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, ze sifu radiune, hadi niduꞌa ḡihau huaꞌuma.” Iesuꞌa Ierusalema uꞌano Niaro
19.41: Iesuꞌa Ierusalema hanitadu eꞌe horonirotene niaro.
19.42: Ebu aniꞌa reiro, “Ierusalema azaḡa, izidi zaꞌe uniho manoḡa maꞌeteꞌe ibiḡa ederifone, manoḡa reifo. Rehano izidi za eꞌe ederoga mene idaḡa.
19.43: Mada ꞌahoganiꞌa zae mazao fureraꞌuma. Eꞌe madaḡano zae agire azaḡaniꞌa raha ḡabiꞌa haḡadu merau ganaḡeḡeziꞌuma, ebu zamao haoziꞌuma.
19.44: Zeḡeꞌa zae haba zu haba azaḡa niduꞌa rahao zimi feuziꞌuma. Ebu zae ne ogoraroteꞌe hadiḡa niduꞌa fahe ḡuzuhadu hadini ꞌahoga hadi ꞌahoga ranao mene radiꞌuma, mazaḡa zaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zae vaḡe ariroteꞌe madaḡa mene ederiro.” Iesuꞌa Kuru Neḡa Deheniro (Mataio 21:12-17; Mareko 11:15-19; Ioane 2:13-22)
19.45: Ebu Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌano diuḡadu serosero azaḡa hegoze buziro.
19.46: Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Badiꞌa neꞌe kuru neḡa reꞌuma.' Rehano zaeꞌa kuru neḡaꞌe ḡonore azaḡa neḡano ḡihuniro.”
19.47: Ebu Iesuꞌa mada niduꞌa kuru neḡano ihoziro. Rehano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa, Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu vaze ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ani matihi reiro.
19.48: Rehano ze ani matiteꞌe ibiḡa ꞌahoga mene horoniro, mazaḡa vaze niduꞌa Iesu ḡoere faifaine abitinu.

20.1: Mada ꞌahogano Iesuꞌa kuru neḡano ihozinu zu hari manoḡa haraminu. Eꞌe madaḡano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa, Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa ani vaḡe onamiro.
20.2: Ebu ze Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ḡa noꞌe gigiꞌaḡa hina ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌohe? Iniuꞌa ꞌahi gigiꞌaḡa ḡaniro? Efoꞌi.”
20.3: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡe zuni ḡadimu ꞌahoga zinihi.
20.4: Ioaneꞌa babatiso zinirotaꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ga vaze mazaonoꞌo? Ehoꞌi.”
20.5: Ze zeḡe daꞌo ḡoꞌaneꞌenaꞌa, ꞌahige rae reiro, “Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo reine, 'Za nougadu Ioane ḡoere mene mae ḡihiniro?' rae ifiꞌuma.
20.6: U vaze mazaonoꞌo reine, vaze niduꞌa hadi hina uḡufiꞌuma, mazaḡa zeḡe niduꞌa Ioaneꞌe hube hune peroveta vazeḡa rae mae ḡihineꞌohe.”
20.7: Eꞌanoꞌo ze ꞌahige naenaeniro, “Eme aḡuꞌa, Ioaneꞌa babatiso zinirotaꞌaꞌe iniu mazaonoꞌo ariro.”
20.8: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡe zuni noꞌe gigiꞌaḡa hina haḡai ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe mene ihoziꞌuma.” Hihi Azaḡa Sauꞌa Hari Idaidaḡa (Mataio 21:33-46; Mareko 12:1-12)
20.9: Iesuꞌa vaze mazao hari ꞌahi idane ziro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa vaini mebaḡa ḡoranadu hihi azaḡa nu ꞌevoreo tiro. Ebu aniꞌa haba ꞌahoga onamadu mada faḡa ragavinu.
20.10: Vaini maḡa hiriveꞌeteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa feurirotene, vaini mebaḡa vazeḡaniꞌa vaini maḡa nu mouga radu ane tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoga hihi azaḡa vaḡe tuḡune onamiro. Rehano zeꞌa ani bounadu ꞌevoꞌa isoḡa tuḡune baroniro.
20.11: Hena ani tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahoga zeḡe vaḡe bare tuḡuniro, rehano zeꞌa ani zuni bouniro, ani mae mazagarone runiro zu ꞌevoꞌa isoḡa tuḡune baroniro.
20.12: Ebu ani tuḡure vazeḡa uḡiduḡa zeḡe vaḡe bare tuḡuniro, rehano ze ani ru hanadu uhine baroniro.
20.13: ꞌOugadu vaini mebaḡa vazeḡaniꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, 'E nougiꞌuma? Eḡe zamarone ubude tuḡuniꞌuma. Ze ani gubaniꞌuma gaogi.'
20.14: Rehano hihi azaḡaniꞌa ubuga horonirotene, zeḡeꞌa ḡoꞌaneꞌenaꞌa, neneḡaniro, 'Aniꞌe moga mazaonoꞌo vaini mebaḡa ꞌadi meiteꞌe vazeḡa. Eme ani matihi, ꞌougine vaini mebaḡa ꞌadiꞌe emeḡeꞌa meꞌuma.'
20.15: Eꞌanoꞌo zeꞌa vaini mebaḡanonoꞌo ubuga uhine bunadu mau runiro. ꞌOugadu vaini mebaḡa vazeḡaꞌe zeḡe mazao nougiꞌuma?
20.16: Ani aradu hihi azaḡa mau ruziꞌuma ebu vaini mebaḡaꞌe vaze nu ziniꞌuma.” Vazevazeꞌa hari eꞌe egadu reiro, “Eꞌeguḡaniꞌa mene fureraune manoḡa!”
20.17: Ebu Iesuꞌa ze ḡiaḡiazadu ziro, “Tena Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ꞌadi huga zamaroꞌi, 'Vazeꞌa hadi hina ne ogorarotene, zeꞌa mae modiroteꞌe hadiḡaꞌe ne duꞌe rinedeꞌeteꞌe hadiḡa reiro.'
20.18: Iniuꞌa hadi eꞌe rana higaune, ani varadu tahitahiꞌuma, zu hadi eꞌeꞌa vaze ꞌahoga rana higaune, aniꞌe seꞌetiꞌuma.”
20.19: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe Iesuꞌa zeḡe moneo hari idaidaḡa reiroteꞌe ederirotene, Iesu zogone obone tihi reiro. Rehano ze vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa zeḡe mazao maḡuniꞌuma radu rihoziro. Takesiꞌe Iniu Haꞌuma? (Mataio 22:15-22; Mareko 12:13-17)
20.20: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa Iesu obone tihi radu ḡiaḡianiro. Zeꞌe vaze duduḡa rae soꞌosoꞌozeꞌeteꞌe rihirihi azaḡa nu Iesu vaḡe tuḡuziro, mazaḡa Iesuꞌa ḡoere nu rae veꞌorine, aniꞌe Roma gavana vazeḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌinihi rae reiro.
20.21: Ebu rihirihi azaḡaniꞌa Iesu vaḡe onamadu ḡadiniro, “Ihore vazeḡa, eme edeḡa, ḡaꞌe huga daꞌo ḡoereꞌohe zu ihozeꞌohe, vaze niduꞌa mazao mene inaheꞌohe, ebu Badiꞌa mone ibiḡa hugano ihozeꞌohe.
20.22: Emeꞌe Roma kiniḡa mazao takesi haune, duduḡa ga mene?”
20.23: Iesuꞌa ze ani soꞌonihi raꞌetaꞌaꞌe ederadu ziro,
20.24: “Roma hadiḡa tiba ihohoꞌi. Iniu viga zu iniu niḡa eꞌe rana mirihiro?” Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Aꞌe Roma kiniḡa viga zu niḡa.”
20.25: Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “Tena Roma kiniḡa ḡauꞌe Roma kiniḡa hanoꞌi, u Badiꞌa ḡauꞌe Badiꞌa hanoꞌi.”
20.26: ꞌOugadu ze vaze zamao Iesu ḡoereꞌe veꞌoḡa rae rouga mene idararo, ebu Iesuꞌa ḡadimuze naenaeniroteꞌe uꞌano ze zaguzaganadu sifu radiro. Runeonoꞌo Bare Ḡabodeꞌeteꞌe moneo Ḡoeriro (Mataio 22:23-33; Mareko 12:18-27)
20.27: Sadukea azaḡa nuꞌa Iesu vaḡe ariro. Zeꞌe vazeꞌa runeonoꞌo mene bare ḡabode iḡuniꞌuma rae raꞌeteꞌe azaḡa.
20.28: Ze Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ihore vazeḡa, Moseꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa ꞌahoga ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Ohoze ꞌahoganiꞌa rudanadu ane inugaꞌe ubuga ꞌoꞌoꞌa reine, ohoze negoḡaniꞌa ḡozobaḡa teite hahuriꞌuma, ebu ubuga furenine ubuganiꞌa rune negoḡa ehaꞌa meꞌuma.'
20.29: Hari ꞌahi zamaroꞌi. Nego niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fare radiunu. Ibiꞌaniꞌa hahuriro ebu ubuga oꞌoꞌa rudaro.
20.30: ꞌOugadu negoḡa aheuḡaniꞌa ḡozobaḡa teite hahuriro.
20.31: Ebu negoḡa uḡiduḡa zuni ani teite hahuriro. Ebu negoḡa niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fare ḡozobaḡa teite hahuriro, rehano zeḡe niduꞌa ubudeze oꞌoꞌa rudaro.
20.33: ꞌOugadu runeonoꞌo bare ḡabode iḡuniteꞌe madaḡano roḡae aꞌe iniu inuga reꞌuma? Mazaḡa ohoze niduꞌa fuꞌo aheu fareꞌa ani teite hahuriro.”
20.34: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Raha ꞌadao radiuꞌeteꞌe ohozeḡa zu roḡaeḡaꞌe hahureꞌohe.
20.35: Rehano runeonoꞌo bare ḡabode iḡunadu Badiꞌa habao radoga idaḡa raꞌeteꞌe ohozeḡa zu roḡaeḡaꞌe mene hahuriꞌuma.
20.36: Ebu ze mene bare rudaꞌuma, mazaḡa zeꞌe tuḡure viga heuḡa. Zeꞌe runeonoꞌo ḡabodiroteꞌe azaḡa uꞌano, Badiꞌa ubuga raꞌohe.
20.37: Rune azaḡaniꞌa bare ḡabodeꞌeteꞌe moneo, Mose zuni ire renoga hariḡa ihoziro. Eꞌea ani Badiꞌa ꞌahige huniro, 'Aberahamo Badiꞌa, Isako Badiꞌa zu Iakobo Badiꞌa.'
20.38: Badiꞌaꞌe mene rune azaḡa Badiꞌa, rehano ḡabone azaḡa Badiꞌa. Zeḡe niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa veize ḡabodeꞌohe.”
20.39: Ebu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌa naenaeniro, “Ihore vazeḡa, ḡae naenaeꞌe manoḡa tauḡi!”
20.40: Eꞌe enogano ze Iesu mene bare inare ḡadiniro. Kerisoꞌe Iniu Mariga? (Mataio 22:41-46; Mareko 12:35-37)
20.41: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Nougadu vazeꞌa Kerisoꞌe Davida mariga raꞌohe?
20.42: Davidaꞌa Keriso moneo Salamo bukaḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Badiꞌaꞌa eḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro niro, “Eḡe edaꞌe moneo ehoroꞌi,
20.43: onamo eḡeꞌa agireḡo niduꞌa madu odaḡo ꞌuꞌuḡano raharahaziꞌuma.”'
20.44: Davidaꞌa Keriso mazao, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro,' rae huniro. Tena Kerisoꞌe nougenouge Davida mariga reꞌuma?” Mose Goro Ḡoeꞌa Ihozeꞌeteꞌe Azaḡa Ḡiazoꞌi (Mataio 23:1-36; Mareko 12:38-40; Luka 11:37-54)
20.45: Vaze niduꞌa Iesu ḡoere abitiroteꞌea, Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro,
20.46: “Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ḡiazoꞌi. Ze dabua manoḡa faḡa vidau ragavoga, vaze ḡehaḡa habaꞌano vazeꞌa ze gubazeꞌenaꞌa, zeḡe mazao unihoga, nuꞌonuꞌo neḡano vaze boroboroꞌa ehoreꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano ehoroga, zu muio nize boro azaḡaniꞌa ehoreꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano ehoroga urateꞌohe.
20.47: Ebu zeꞌe ḡozoba soꞌozadu toheze niduꞌa meizeꞌohe, zu vaze ihozifine faḡafe ḡurire kurauꞌohe. ꞌUguḡa azaḡaꞌe aduga boro bagaḡa hidiꞌuma.”

21.1: Iesuꞌa kuru neḡano maꞌora azaḡaniꞌa ḡahunone mauḡa zamaḡano zeḡe ḡahunone ufiꞌeteꞌe horoziro.
21.2: Ebu zahara ḡozobaḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa kopa hadiḡa komeꞌa aheu ufiroteꞌe zuni horoniro.
21.3: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zahara ḡozobaḡa ꞌadaꞌa vaze niduꞌa ufeta vitize hadi boro ofeha.
21.4: Zeḡe niduꞌaꞌe hadize ḡehaḡa rehano, tahiḡa daꞌo ofeha. U ḡozoba ꞌadiꞌe zahara roḡaeḡa, rehano ane hadiḡa niduꞌa ebu ane ogomu hadiḡa niduꞌa ofeha.” Kuru Neḡa Fahe Ḡuzuhiteꞌe moneo Ḡoeriro (Mataio 24:1-2; Mareko 13:1-2)
21.5: Iesu tahiꞌa nuꞌa kuru neḡa horonadu aꞌe hadi manoḡa zu Badiꞌa haroteꞌe ḡahunoneḡa hina rohorohoniroteꞌe moneo niguniro. Rehano Iesuꞌa ziro,
21.6: “Izidi zaeꞌa horoneꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌaꞌe fahe ḡuzuhiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma. Eꞌe madaḡano hadini ꞌahoga hadi ꞌahoga rana mene radiꞌuma.” Haḡai Nu Badeḡa zu Aduga (Mataio 24:3-14; Mareko 13:3-13)
21.7: ꞌOugadu ze Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ihore vazeḡa, eꞌeguḡaniꞌa naniꞌa fureraꞌuma? Ebu eꞌeguḡaniꞌa nariga fureranateꞌe madaḡanoꞌe nagi haḡai nu badeḡaniꞌa ibite fureraꞌuma?”
21.8: Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa zae mene soꞌosoꞌozifine tohutohoꞌi. Vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa eḡe niḡano aradu ꞌahige reꞌuma, 'Eꞌe Keriso,' ebu 'Madaḡa ꞌai haniteha!' Rehano ze ago hegotoꞌi.
21.9: Uti zu roteto hariḡa egoꞌidene, ago rihanoꞌi. Eꞌeguḡaniꞌa hube hune ibite fureraꞌuma, rehano mada ḡonagaꞌe zogone mene ariꞌuma.”
21.10: Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “Haba ꞌahoganiꞌa haba ꞌahoga teite utitiꞌuma, zu gavamani ꞌahoganiꞌa gavamani ꞌahoga teite utitiꞌuma.
21.11: Haba nunuo habaꞌa borofe hagariꞌuma, zagaꞌa hiaꞌuma zu ugi boroꞌa fureraꞌuma. Ebu adureonoꞌo riho ḡauḡa zu haḡai nu badeḡa boroboroꞌa fureraꞌuma.
21.12: Rehano eꞌeguḡaniꞌa ꞌizema fureranogano, vazevazeꞌa za oboze teadu sausauziꞌuma, ebu nu'onu'o neḡano zu ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoze tiꞌuma. Eḡe uꞌano, kini zu gavana azaḡa mazao zae tutuze onamiꞌuma.
21.13: Aꞌe zaeꞌa zeḡe mazao eḡe hari manoḡa rae fureniteꞌe madaḡa reꞌuma.
21.14: Eꞌanoꞌo zamaze rinedadu nougenouge zae bare biriteꞌe moneo zamaze ago ibite adudanoꞌi.
21.15: Mazaḡa eḡeꞌa ḡoere zu zamarone huhuzaḡa zenadu agireze ꞌahoganiꞌa zuni zae mene agatoziꞌuma ebu zae ḡoere mene hezahohaꞌuma.
21.16: Zae vize moze, negoze, nabudize zu zae vazeꞌa zuni za revoziniꞌuma, ebu zae boꞌaḡano nuꞌe runeo tuḡuziꞌuma.
21.17: Eḡe uꞌano vaze niduꞌa za heꞌeheꞌeziꞌuma.
21.18: Rehano iguze tiba zuni mene dauniꞌuma.
21.19: Zaeꞌa edau gigaraune, ḡabone hidiꞌuma.” Ierusalema Habaꞌa Ruiniꞌuma (Mataio 24:15-21; Mareko 13:14-19)
21.20: “Ierusalemaꞌe uti azaḡaniꞌa ganaḡeḡenoga horonoꞌidene, aꞌe Ierusalema ruiniteꞌe madaḡa ꞌai haniteha rae ederiꞌuma.
21.21: Eꞌe madaḡano Iudea habaꞌano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe maḡa ferau itoꞌi. Ierusalema zamaḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ferau vaḡinoꞌi, ebu guniꞌa neḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Ierusalema ago diuḡoꞌi.
21.22: Mazaḡa eꞌe madaḡaꞌe Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa hudanadu Ierusalema azaḡa aduga boro ziniteꞌe madaḡa reꞌuma.
21.23: Eꞌe madaḡano ahiꞌeta roḡaeḡa zu nune hina ene guraḡa ḡubuzeꞌeteꞌe roḡaeḡaꞌe feranoga mene idaḡa radu aduga boro hidiꞌuma! Raha ꞌahao aduga boro bagaḡaniꞌa fureraꞌuma, ebu Badiꞌa zama ḡugiꞌa vaze mazao fureraꞌuma.
21.24: Zeꞌe benisi hina zimi ruziꞌuma, ebu ḡuꞌa azaḡa teige oboze teadu ꞌavoꞌa habaꞌa nunu tutuze onamiꞌuma. Iuda mene azaḡaniꞌa Ierusalema ruinadu zuhiꞌaniꞌuma, onamo zeḡe madaꞌa hauḡiꞌuma.” Iesuꞌa Ariteꞌe Madaḡa (Mataio 24:29-31; Mareko 13:24-27)
21.25: “Ebu mada, bato zu buzuva ragano haḡai nu badeḡa horoniꞌuma. Raha ꞌada haba nunu azaḡaniꞌa davara zu saꞌu boroboro guguḡa uꞌano, rihau rudaꞌuma ebu zamazeꞌa ꞌadaꞌadiꞌuma.
21.26: Vazeꞌa nagini rahao ꞌada fureratitaꞌaꞌe edereꞌe ꞌahine, rihau rudanadu higau bauriꞌuma, mazaḡa adure gigiꞌaḡaniꞌa hagahagariꞌuma.
21.27: Eꞌe madaḡano ze Vaze Ubuganiꞌa gigiꞌaḡa boro zu agaḡa boro hune madu ḡoze hina areꞌeteꞌe horoniꞌuma.
21.28: ꞌAhiguḡaniꞌa ḡadahe fureranoꞌidene, iḡunadu dude ehamanoꞌi, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zae ḡaboziteꞌe madaḡa ꞌai haniteha.” Figi Ireḡa Hari Idaidaḡa (Mataio 24:32-35; Mareko 13:28-31)
21.29: Ebu Iesuꞌa hari ꞌahoga idane ziro, “Figi ireḡa zu ire nunu ḡianoꞌi.
21.30: Za zaeꞌa bare ire rouḡaniꞌa udufaꞌoga horoneꞌetene, irugu madaḡaniꞌa haniteha rae edereꞌohe.
21.31: Eꞌe teige, ꞌahiguḡaniꞌa fureranoga horonoꞌidene, Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa haniteha rae ederoꞌi.
21.32: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, izidi egaꞌe mene hauḡiꞌuma, onamo ꞌahiguḡa niduꞌa fureraꞌuma.
21.33: Adure zu rahaꞌe hauḡiꞌuma, rehano eḡe ḡoereꞌe mene hune hauḡiꞌuma.” Ruhibe Radoꞌi
21.34: “Zaꞌe ufeta reꞌoreꞌeteꞌe zu gageꞌeteꞌe ebu ḡaboneze zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, zamaze mene adudafine tohutohoꞌi. Ebu zaꞌe eḡeꞌa bare areꞌeteꞌe madaḡano mene zaguzagafine zae bare ḡiazoꞌi, mazaḡa eꞌe madaḡaꞌe ꞌahiri miniḡaniꞌa mani tabara ꞌahiriniꞌeteꞌe teigiꞌuma.
21.35: Eꞌe madaḡaniꞌa raha ꞌada vaze niduꞌa mazao fureraꞌuma.
21.36: Eꞌanoꞌo aduganiꞌa fureratiteꞌe madaḡano feranoga zu Vaze Ubuga zamao edanoga veize, mada niduꞌa kurauꞌenaꞌa tohutohe radoꞌi.”
21.37: Mada niduꞌa Iesuꞌe kuru neḡano ihozinu, u ohere niduꞌaꞌe vaḡinadu Olivi Maḡa rae huneꞌeteꞌe maḡano radiunu.
21.38: Ebu oherebau uzeuze vaze niduꞌa Iesu ḡoere abitoga veize kuru neḡa onamiro.

22.1: Isiti Oꞌoꞌa ꞌUvauḡa Odoga Muiḡa, niḡa ꞌahogaꞌe Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa madaḡaniꞌa hanitiro.
22.2: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Iesu matiteꞌe ibiḡa nu vaḡiro, mazaḡa ze vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa maḡuniꞌuma radu rihoziro.
22.3: Isakariota vazeḡa, niḡa Iudaꞌe Iesu tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare boꞌaḡano tahiꞌa ꞌahoga. Sataniꞌa ane zama diuḡiro.
22.4: Aniꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu kuru neḡa uti vazeḡa boroboro vaḡe onamadu zeḡe ꞌevoreo Iesu riꞌiniteꞌe ibiḡa ḡoꞌane vaḡiro.
22.5: Ze matuꞌe rudanadu Iuda hadi haꞌuma rae ḡoitoriro.
22.6: Iudaꞌa zuni, “Idaḡa,” radu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa oꞌoꞌa madaḡano Iesu riꞌinoga veize mada manoḡa ꞌahoga vaḡiro. Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa Ruhibe Tiro (Mataio 26:17-25; Mareko 14:12-21; Ioane 13:21-30)
22.7: Isiti Oꞌoꞌa ꞌUvahuḡa Odoga Muiḡa zamaḡano mada ibiꞌaꞌe Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa. Eꞌe madaḡano dibuꞌo mamoeḡa ubuga maro.
22.8: Eꞌe madaḡa meirotene, Iesuꞌa Petero zu Ioane tuḡuzeꞌenaꞌa, ziro, “Onamadu emeḡe veize Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ogomuḡa ruhibe toꞌi.”
22.9: Ebu zeꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡa urao eme nouma ruhibe tiꞌuma?”
22.10: Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Ne boro diuḡine, ohoze ꞌahoganiꞌa vu ḡoḡoreḡa odohe onameꞌeteꞌe horoniꞌuma. Ebu ani hegotadu aneꞌa diuḡeꞌeteꞌe neḡa diuḡoꞌi.
22.11: Diuḡadu eꞌe ne vazeḡa noꞌi, 'Ihore vazeḡaniꞌa ꞌahige raꞌohe: E eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ogomuḡa atihi. Iꞌudo azaḡa veize ruhibiroteꞌe habaꞌaꞌe noumao?'
22.12: ꞌOugine, aniꞌa ne hitagano bazuni neḡa boro ꞌahoga ihoziꞌuma, zu zaꞌe ehoro habaꞌa ruhibe teateꞌe horoniꞌuma. Eꞌea ogomufe ruhibe toꞌi.”
22.13: Ze iḡunadu onamiro, ebu Iesuꞌa ziroteꞌe idunane niduꞌa horoniro. ꞌOugadu Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ruhibe tiro. Ḡonaga Ogomuḡa Aro (Mataio 26:26-30; Mareko 14:22-26; 1Korinto 11:23-25)
22.14: Madaḡaniꞌa feurirotene, Iesu apostolo azaḡa teite ogomu fataḡa uhiḡano ehoriro.
22.15: Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “E ꞌizema aduga hidogano, zae teite Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ogomuḡa ꞌadi anoga hube hune uratiro.
22.16: Mazaḡa eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, eꞌe Mui ogomuḡa ꞌahiꞌe mene bare aꞌuma, onamo Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡano Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡaniꞌa hugano fureraꞌuma.”
22.17: Ebu aniꞌa vaini vuḡa bioḡa madu Badiꞌa mazao kuraro ebu ziro, “Bio ꞌahi madu zaꞌe tahitahe gagoꞌi.
22.18: Mazaḡa eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, eꞌe vaini vuḡa mene bare gagiꞌuma, onamo Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma.”
22.19: Ebu ani ꞌuvahu odoga meiro zu Badiꞌa mazao kuranadu vahege ziniro, ebu ziro, “ꞌUvahu odoga ꞌahiꞌe zae veize moditeꞌe ahirihe. Zaeꞌa eḡe zamarifine iḡaiḡa ꞌahi haḡaoꞌi.”
22.20: Ebu ḡorava ogomuḡa enogano ani vaini vuḡa bioḡa madu ziro, “Vaini vuḡa bioḡa ꞌahiꞌe eḡeꞌa zae veize beꞌuneꞌeteꞌe ruhe hina ohoneꞌeteꞌe ḡoitoreḡa iziga.
22.21: Rehano eḡe revoniteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe teite ogau tiburuꞌohe.
22.22: Vaze Ubugaꞌe Badiꞌa urao rudaꞌuma. Rehano ani revohatiteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe aduga boro hidiꞌuma.”
22.23: ꞌOugadu ze zeḡeꞌa bare ḡadimutitiro, “Emeḡe boꞌaḡano iniuꞌa ꞌougiꞌuma?” Iniuꞌe Niḡa Boro?
22.24: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌa boꞌaḡano iniuꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune radu ze zeḡeꞌa bare taꞌirotitiro.
22.25: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡa habaꞌano kini niduꞌaꞌe zeḡe haba azaḡa riḡa zuhiꞌaziꞌohe. Ebu inaraze hina zeḡe haba azaḡa rana edauꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare 'Duꞌu Vazeḡa' rae huzeꞌohe.
22.26: Rehano za ze ago teigoꞌi. Zae boꞌaḡano vaze ḡihiꞌaḡa huneꞌe tahiꞌa komeꞌa teigiꞌuma, ebu iniu zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe tuḡure vazeḡa teigiꞌuma.
22.27: Iniuꞌe ufeta ḡihiꞌaḡa? Ehore ogauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ga tuḡure vazeḡa? Aꞌe ehore ogauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Rehano eꞌe zae boꞌaḡano tuḡure vazeḡa heuḡa.
22.28: Zaꞌe eḡeꞌa aduga hidiroteꞌe zamaḡano eḡe teite radiroteꞌe azaḡa.
22.29: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡe Mamaꞌa ḡau niduꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa iniroteꞌe teige, eḡeꞌa zae zuni eꞌe gigiꞌaḡa ziniꞌohe.
22.30: Ebu zaꞌe eḡeꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano eḡe teite ogaꞌuma zu gagiꞌuma, ebu kini ehoro habaꞌano ehoradu Isaraela azaḡa, urabo niduꞌa gaubanana aheu fare kotaziꞌuma.” Peteroꞌa Iesu Oꞌoniꞌuma rae Ihoziro (Mataio 26:31-35; Mareko 14:27-31; Ioane 13:36-38)
22.31: Ebu Iesuꞌa Simona niro, “Simona, Simona, ꞌadi egoꞌi. Sataniꞌa vuidi zuizuineꞌeteꞌe teige, zae zama tuhunoga veize Badiꞌa uminiro.
22.32: Rehano ḡaeꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌeꞌa mene dauḡifine, e ḡae veize kuraro. Eꞌanoꞌo ḡaeꞌa ḡihuradu eḡe vaḡe bariteꞌe madaḡano negoḡo duḡuru inarazoꞌi.”
22.33: Peteroꞌa naenaeniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eꞌe ḡae teite ḡuꞌa neḡano diuḡiꞌuma, ebu ḡae teite rudaꞌuma zuni idaḡa!”
22.34: Iesuꞌa niro, “Petero, eḡeꞌa ḡaꞌohe, izidi ohere kokorokuꞌa ꞌizema uganogano, ḡaeꞌa ḡae uḡidu oꞌoheꞌenaꞌa, e aḡuꞌa rae reꞌuma.” Hadi Fuseḡa, Nihara zu Benisi
22.35: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Zaeꞌa eḡe gau haḡaoga veize tuḡuziroteꞌe madaḡano zaꞌe hadi fuseḡa, nihara ebu tamaka mene odohe onamiro. Eꞌe madaḡano ḡau ꞌahoga ferezirohe?” Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Mene.”
22.36: Aniꞌa ziro, “Izidi zaꞌe hadi fusezeta zu niharazeta roꞌidene, eꞌe moꞌi. Ebu zaꞌe benisize oꞌoꞌa roꞌidene, dabuaze seronadu eꞌe hoitoꞌi.
22.37: Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Vazevazeꞌa aniꞌe ḡonore azaḡa boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga rae zamariꞌuma.' Eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, eꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa eḡe mazao hudaꞌuma. Hube hune eḡe moneo mirihiroteꞌeꞌa izidi hudauꞌohe.”
22.38: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, emeḡe mazaoꞌe benisi aheu.” Iesuꞌa ziro, “Ahiḡa.” Iesuꞌa Olivi Maḡano Kuraro (Mataio 26:36-46; Mareko 14:32-42)
22.39: Ebu Iesuꞌe iḡaiḡa haḡainuteꞌe teige, Olivi Maḡa onamiro zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ane hegotiro.
22.40: Aniꞌa eꞌe habaꞌano feuradu ziro, “Sataniꞌa tuhuzadu zaeꞌa mene uitifine kuranoꞌi.”
22.41: Ebu Iesuꞌa ze modadu tahiḡa mobade onamiro ebu obena hina tuḡadu kuraro,
22.42: “Mama, ḡa uratoꞌidene, eḡe mazaonoꞌo bio aduga ꞌadi mae vaḡinoꞌi. Rehano eḡe mene urao, ḡae urao daꞌo haḡaoꞌi.”
22.43: Eꞌe madaḡano tuḡure viga ꞌahoganiꞌa adureonoꞌo ane vaḡe ovadu inaraharo.
22.44: Ani zamaḡa ufeta adudanadu zamaḡa niduꞌa hina ufeta inare kuraro. Eꞌanoꞌo irairaḡaniꞌa ru teige rahao sore buaro.
22.45: Ebu Iesuꞌa kuru hauḡadu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa vaḡe bare onamirotene ze bazeꞌeteꞌe horoziro, mazaḡa zamaze ufeta aradu ahirizeꞌa taoraro.
22.46: Eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌa ziro, “Za nougadu baze radiuꞌohe? Iḡunoꞌi, ebu Sataniꞌa tuhuzadu zaeꞌa mene uitifine kuranoꞌi.” Iesu Obone Tiro (Mataio 26:47-56; Mareko 14:43-50; Ioane 18:3-11)
22.47: Iesuꞌa ꞌize ḡoereꞌeteꞌea, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani vaḡe ariro. Ebu Iesu tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga, Iudaꞌa ibitadu Iesu furaꞌinoga veize ani uhiḡa ariro.
22.48: Rehano Iesuꞌa niro, “Iuda, ḡaꞌe Vaze Ubuga furaꞌinadu revohatihi raꞌehe?”
22.49: Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe naginiꞌa fureruꞌeteꞌe horonadu Iesu niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eme benisi hina utitoziniꞌumahe?”
22.50: Ebu zeḡe boꞌaḡano ꞌahoganiꞌa benisi ahase bunadu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa tuḡure vazeḡa udirotene, edaꞌe teḡaḡa variꞌe butiro.
22.51: Rehano Iesuꞌa niro, “Ago ꞌougoꞌi!” Ebu Iesuꞌa vaze eꞌe teḡa obonadu fainiro.
22.52: Ebu Iesuꞌa ani obone touga veize ariroteꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa, kuru neḡa vazeḡa boroboro zu vaze boroboro ziro, “Zaꞌe ḡonore vazeḡa obone tiꞌeteꞌe teige, benisi ebu somori boro madu eḡe obohe touga veize arahe?
22.53: Mada niduꞌa eꞌe zae teite kuru neḡa habaꞌano radiunu. Eꞌe madaḡano zaꞌe mene obohe tiro. Rehano izidiꞌe zae madaḡa zu uzaboꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe madaḡa.” Peteroꞌa Iesu Oꞌoniro (Mataio 26:57-58, 69-75; Mareko 14:53-54, 66-72; Ioane 18:12-18, 25-27)
22.54: Zeꞌa Iesu obone teadu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa ne tutune onamiro. U Peteroꞌe faḡanonoꞌo zeḡe ḡaruna hegotiro.
22.55: Vaze nuꞌa eꞌe ne habaꞌa nemaḡano ire roga hofadu ehore ḡeḡemaḡiro. Petero zuni zeḡe teite ehoriro.
22.56: ꞌOugirotene, tuḡure roḡaeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa Peteroꞌe ire roga genaḡano ehoreꞌeteꞌe horoniro. Ani Petero ḡiane runeꞌenaꞌa reiro, “Vaze ꞌadi zuni Iesu teite radiudo.”
22.57: Rehano Peteroꞌa oꞌonadu niro, “Roḡae, e ani aḡua.”
22.58: Mada tahiḡa enogano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa horonadu niro, “Ḡa zuni Iesu hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga.” Rehano Peteroꞌa niro, “Ohoze, eꞌe mene!”
22.59: Mada tahiḡa ḡarugano, vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa barebare ḡoeriro, “Vaze ꞌadi hube hune Iesu teite radiudo, mazaḡa ani zuni Galilea vazeḡa.”
22.60: Rehano Peteroꞌa naenaeniro, “Ohoze, e ḡaꞌa nagini raꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa!” Peteroꞌa ꞌize ḡoereꞌeteꞌea, kokorokuꞌa ugaro.
22.61: Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa vaetadu Petero ḡianiro. ꞌOugadu Peteroꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ꞌahige rae niroteꞌe zamariro, “Izidi ohere kokorokuꞌa ꞌizema uganogano, ḡaꞌa ḡae uḡidu eḡe oꞌohiꞌuma.”
22.62: Ebu aniꞌa ne enona buanadu niau rudaro. Uti Azaḡaniꞌa Iesu rae Sausauniro zu Masiniro (Mataio 26:67-68; Mareko 14:65)
22.63: Iesu ḡiane radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ani ḡirihoharo zu bouniro.
22.64: Ze ani ubuma ꞌuadu ḡadiniro, “Peroveta vazeḡa, iniuꞌa ḡa bouꞌeha? Efoꞌi.”
22.65: Ebu ze ḡoere nunu hina ani rae sausauniro. Iesu Kotao Ohoniro (Mataio 26:59-66; Mareko 14:55-64; Ioane 18:19-24)
22.66: Irarirotene, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa nuꞌoranadu vaze boroboroꞌa ibitohauꞌeteꞌe kotaḡano ḡoꞌaniro. Ebu Iesuꞌe zeḡe kotao tutune mae ohoniro.
22.67: Ebu zeꞌa niro, “Ḡaꞌe Keriso roꞌidene, efoꞌi.” Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡeꞌa, 'Oꞌe,' rae zine zuni, zaꞌe eḡe ḡoere mene mae ḡihiniꞌuma.
22.68: Ebu eḡeꞌa, 'E Kerisohe?' rae ḡadizine zuni, zaꞌe mene naenaehiꞌuma.
22.69: Rehano izidionoꞌo onamo zama mone Vaze Ubuganiꞌa Gigiꞌaḡa Boro Badiꞌaḡa edaꞌe moneo ehoriꞌuma.”
22.70: Zeḡe niduꞌa ḡadiniro, “Tena ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa Ubugahe?” Aniꞌa ziro, “Za zaeꞌa bare eꞌe Keriso rae raꞌohe.”
22.71: Ebu ze zeḡeꞌa bare neneḡaniro, “Eme aniꞌe veꞌoḡa rae raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa bare vaḡiꞌumahe? Emeḡeꞌa ane hebeonoꞌo ḡoere veꞌoḡa rateꞌe egeha!”

23.1: Ebu kota azaḡa niduꞌa iḡunadu Iesu Pilato vaḡe tutune onamiro.
23.2: Zeḡeꞌa Pilato mazao Iesuꞌe veꞌoḡa rae fureniro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe emeḡe ne azaḡa soꞌozadu ibi veꞌoḡano tutuzeꞌohe. Roma kiniḡa mazao takesi hauꞌeteꞌe garareꞌohe, zu ani aneꞌa bare raenaꞌa, 'Eꞌe Keriso, kini,' rae raꞌohe.”
23.3: Eꞌanoꞌo Pilatoꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe Iuda azaḡa kinihe?” Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Oꞌe, ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare eꞌe kini rae raꞌohe.”
23.4: ꞌOugadu Pilatoꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ziro, “E ani mazaonoꞌo veꞌoḡa ꞌahoga mene horoneꞌohe.”
23.5: Rehano ze teꞌoteꞌau ḡoeriro, “Aniꞌe Galilea habaꞌanonoꞌo Iudea habaꞌa niduꞌa onamo Ierusalema ꞌahi zuni vaze ḡehaḡa ihozeꞌenaꞌa, ibi veꞌoḡano tutuzeꞌohe.” Iesu Heroda zamao mae Ohoniro
23.6: Pilatoꞌa ḡoereze egadu ḡadiziro, “Iesuꞌe Galilea vazeḡahe?”
23.7: Ani Iesuꞌe kini Herodaꞌa ḡianeꞌeteꞌe Galilea habaꞌa vazeḡa rae ederadu ani Heroda vaḡe tuḡuniro. Eꞌe madaḡano Herodaꞌe Ierusalema zamaḡano radiunu.
23.8: Herodaꞌa Iesu horonirotene, matuꞌe rudaro, mazaḡa ani amahionoꞌo Iesu ḡianihi reiro, zu Iesu hariḡa igiro ꞌahine, Iesuꞌa haḡai gigiꞌa haḡaoga horonihi reiro.
23.9: Eꞌanoꞌo Herodaꞌe ḡadimu ḡehaḡa Iesu ḡadiniro, rehano Iesuꞌa mene naenaeniro.
23.10: Eꞌea edau radiuꞌeteꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Iesu ꞌuteꞌenaꞌa, ufeta rae sausauniro.
23.11: Heroda zu ane uti azaḡaꞌe Iesu rae sausauniro zu ḡirihoharo. Ebu dabua manoḡa vidohanadu Pilato vaḡe bare tuḡune onamiro.
23.12: Ibite Heroda ebu Pilatoꞌe agirotitido, rehano eꞌe madaḡanoꞌe vazetitiro. Iesu Runeo Tuḡuniꞌuma rae Reiro (Mataio 27:15-26; Mareko 15:6-15; Ioane 18:39-19:16)
23.13: Pilatoꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa, vaze boroboro ebu haba azaḡa huze nuꞌoziro.
23.14: Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe vaze ꞌadaꞌa haba azaḡa ibi veꞌoḡano ibitoziro radu tutune areha. Rehano eḡeꞌa zae zamao ani ḡadinatene, zaeꞌa ane moneo rateꞌe veꞌoḡa ꞌahogani mene horoneha.
23.15: Heroda zuni ani mazaonoꞌo veꞌoḡani ꞌahoga mene horonadu emeḡe vaḡe bare tuḡune areha. Hube hune, ani mazaoꞌe runeo tuḡuniteꞌe veꞌoḡani ꞌahogaꞌe oꞌoꞌa.
23.16: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa ani masinadu tuḡune buniꞌuma.”
23.18: Rehano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa niduꞌa huau iḡuniro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe manoꞌi, u Barabasiꞌe tuḡune bunoꞌi!”
23.19: Barabasiꞌe Ierusalema zamaḡano Roma gavamani utitoziniro zu vaze zimiro ꞌahine, ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoniro.
23.20: U Pilatoꞌe Iesu tuḡune bunihi radu bare ziro.
23.21: Rehano ze ḡihau huaro, “Ani satauronoꞌi! Satauronoꞌi!”
23.22: Ebu Pilatoꞌa ḡae uḡiduḡano ziro, “Ani nagi veꞌoḡa haḡairo? E ani rune moneo tuḡuniteꞌe veꞌoḡani ꞌahoga mene horoneha. Eꞌanoꞌo e ani masinadu tuḡune buniꞌuma.”
23.23: Rehano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesu satauronoga veize ḡihau teꞌoteꞌau huaro. ꞌOugadu zeḡe agoꞌe ane ago ufeta vitiniro.
23.24: Eꞌanoꞌo Pilatoꞌe zeḡe ura haḡaiꞌuma rae reiro.
23.25: Ebu ani zeḡeꞌa uminiroteꞌe teige, Roma gavamani utitoziniroteꞌe zu vaze goruziroteꞌe vazeḡa, Barabasi ḡuꞌa neḡanonoꞌo mae buniro. U zeḡe urao Iesuꞌe satauronoga veize uti azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌiniro. Iesu Satauroniro (Mataio 27:32-44; Mareko 15:21-32; Ioane 19:17-27)
23.26: Uti azaḡaniꞌa Iesu tutune onamiroteꞌea, Kurene vazeḡa ꞌahoga niḡa Simona hidiro. Ze aniꞌa guniꞌa neḡanonoꞌo areꞌeteꞌe ibiḡano obonadu Iesu satauro mae heratoharo, ebu Iesu ḡaruna hegotoga veize tuḡutuḡuniro.
23.27: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa zuni Iesu hegote onamiro. Zeḡe boꞌaḡano roḡaeroḡaeꞌa Iesu vetuḡaneadu niau kuaro.
23.28: Iesuꞌa tehadu ziro, “Ierusalema aboḡaaboḡa, eḡe uꞌano ago nianoꞌi, rehano za zu ubudeze veize nianoꞌi.
