23.29: Mazaḡa aduga boro hiditeꞌe madaḡaniꞌa arine, vaze niduꞌa ꞌahige reꞌuma, 'Gabani roḡaeḡa, ene mene hune fureniroteꞌe roḡaeḡa, zu nune hina ene mene hune ḡubuziroteꞌe roḡaeḡaꞌe manoḡa tauḡi!'
23.30: Eꞌe madaḡano ze maḡa niꞌuma, 'Emeḡe rana iḡau buanoꞌi!' ebu maḡa komeꞌa niꞌuma, 'Fahanadu emeḡe ḡahifoꞌi!'
23.31: Eꞌe ire ḡaboga heuḡa, rehano zaeꞌa satauroheꞌohe. ꞌOugine za, ire roḡa azaḡa, aduga ufeta boro hidiꞌuma.”
23.32: Ḡonore azaḡa aheu zuni Iesu teite zemoga radu tutuze onamiro.
23.33: Ebu zeꞌe Vadini Isiga rae huneꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano feuriro. Eꞌea Iesu zu ḡonore azaḡa aheu satauroziro. Vaze ꞌahogaꞌe Iesu edaꞌe moneo zu ꞌahogaꞌe kauri moneo ikokoziro.
23.34: Ebu Iesuꞌa satauronoꞌo reiro, “Mama, zeḡe haḡai sauꞌa aḡutu modoꞌi, mazaḡa zeꞌe nagini haḡaeꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa.” Ze kaḡusi arahoḡa arahadu Iesu dabua ḡahugotitiro.
23.35: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa edanadu muririnu. U vaze ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Iesu ḡirihohauꞌenaꞌa ḡoeriro, “Ani vaze nunu ḡaboziro. Aniꞌe Keriso, Badiꞌaꞌa ohotiroteꞌe vazeḡa reine, ani aneꞌa bare ḡaboniꞌuma!”
23.36: Uti azaḡaniꞌa zuni ani vaḡe aradu rae sausauniro ebu vaini vuḡa ḡiḡiꞌa gagoharo.
23.37: Ebu zeḡeꞌa niro, “Ḡaꞌe Iuda azaḡa kini roꞌidene, ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare ḡaboꞌoꞌi!”
23.38: Iesu satauro hitaganoꞌe ane haḡai sauꞌaꞌe nagini rae ihozifine ꞌahige rae mirihiro, “ꞌADIꞌE IUDA AZAḠA KINI.”
23.39: Iesu teite satauroniroteꞌe ḡonore vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa zuni ani rae sausauniro, “Ḡaꞌe mene Kerisohe? Ḡa ḡae bare zu emeḡe ḡabofoꞌi!”
23.40: Rehano ḡonore vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ḡonore vazeḡa ꞌomo roniro, “Ḡa Badiꞌa mene rihoneꞌehe? Ḡae zuni ane teite idaḡa runeo tuḡuzeha.
23.41: Emetaneꞌe emeḡe haḡai sauꞌa uꞌano eꞌe naeḡa aduga hideꞌohe, rehano vaze ꞌadiꞌe haḡai sauꞌa ꞌahogani mene haḡairo.”
23.42: Ebu aneꞌa Iesu niro, “Iesu, ḡaeꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa diuḡoꞌidene, eḡe zuni zamaroꞌi.”
23.43: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ḡaꞌohe, izidi ḡaꞌe eḡe teite Badiꞌa habao radiꞌuma.” Iesuꞌa Rudaro (Mataio 27:45-56; Mareko 15:33-41; Ioane 19:28-30)
23.44: Madai kirikiri meirotene, haba niduꞌa uzaboꞌa ꞌuiro, onamo ḡorava mone mada uḡidu.
23.45: Mada mene hiaro, ebu kuru neḡano Haba Zaḡoḡa Hune ꞌueꞌeteꞌe dabuaḡaniꞌa nemao zigau ꞌaꞌadaro.
23.46: Ebu Iesuꞌa agoḡa boro hina ḡihau huaro, “Mama, eḡe vineꞌe ḡae ꞌevoreo tiꞌohe.” Ani ꞌouge huaroteꞌe enogano iriga riꞌiro.
23.47: Roma uti vazeḡa boroꞌe naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe horonirotene, ani Badiꞌa niguniro ebu ꞌahige rae reiro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe hube hune vaze duduḡa reiro!”
23.48: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa zuni Iesuꞌa satauro rana rudaroteꞌe muririro, ebu naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe horonirotene zamaze ufeta areꞌenaꞌa, neze bare ḡouriro.
23.49: Iesu edeḡa azaḡa niduꞌa zu Galilea habaꞌanonoꞌo hegote ariroteꞌe roḡaeḡaroḡaeḡaꞌe faḡano edanadu eꞌe niduꞌa muririro. Iesu Guriro (Mataio 27:57-61; Mareko 15:42-47; Ioane 19:38-42)
23.50: Vaze ꞌahoga, niḡa Iosefaꞌa radiunu. Aniꞌe vaze manoḡa zu duduḡa, ebu Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo boro ibitohauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoga.
23.51: Aniꞌe Iudea habaꞌano Arimate neḡa vazeḡa, zu Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe guhine radiunu. Ebu aniꞌe nuꞌonuꞌo azaḡa boroboroꞌa Iesu matihi reirotene, ḡoereze zu haḡaize mene mae ḡihiniro.
23.52: Aniꞌa Pilato vaḡe onamadu Iesu ahiꞌa mouga veize uminiro, ebu Pilatoꞌa ani ꞌevoꞌa riꞌiniro.
23.53: ꞌOugadu Iosefaꞌa satauronoꞌo Iesu ahiri mae bunadu dabua manoḡa hina ꞌumiro. Ebu vatava huꞌiroteꞌe iduḡa zamaḡano Iesu ahiri tiro. Idu aꞌe rune vaze ꞌahoga ꞌize mene tiroteꞌe iduḡa iziga.
23.54: Aꞌe Bana Madaḡa veize ruhibeꞌeteꞌe ḡoravaḡa, ebu Bana Madaḡa hanitiro.
23.55: Galilea habaꞌanonoꞌo Iesu hegote ariroteꞌe roḡaeḡaroḡaeḡaꞌe Iosefa hegote onamadu iduḡa horoniro, ebu Iesu ahiri nouma tiroteꞌe horoniro.
23.56: Ebu ze neze baradu Iesu ahiri asohanoga veize murava hohoḡa zu dehoro hohoḡa manoḡa ruhibiro. Ebu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa idunaḡano Bana Madaḡano ze ahirize ohone baniro.

24.1: Fura oherebau uzeuze, roḡaeroḡaeꞌe zeꞌa ruhibiroteꞌe muravaḡa hohoḡa madu idu onamiro.
24.2: Ze feurirotene, idu ꞌuiroteꞌe hadiḡa boro kiune vaḡinoga horoniro.
24.3: Ebu ze diuḡirotene, Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu ahiri mene horoniro.
24.4: ꞌOugadu zamare ꞌadaꞌadiroteꞌea, ohoze aheuꞌa tabara zeḡe babaḡano edaro. Zeꞌe dabua vazavazahoḡa vidaro.
24.5: Ebu roḡaeroḡaeꞌa rihau rudanadu ubumaze rahao ḡuḡuriro. Rehano ohoze aheuꞌa ziro, “Za nougadu ḡabone vazeḡa rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaḡeꞌohe?
24.6: Ani ꞌahao ꞌoꞌoꞌa, rehano bare ḡabode iḡuneha. Aniꞌa Galilea habaꞌano zae teite radiunutene, nagini ziroteꞌe zamaroꞌi.
24.7: Aniꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Vaze Ubugaꞌe haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa ꞌevoreo riꞌini huniꞌuma ebu satauroniꞌuma, rehano mada uḡiduḡano bare ḡabode iḡuniꞌuma.'”
24.8: ꞌOuge reirotene, roḡaeroḡaeꞌa Iesuꞌa reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa zamariro.
24.9: Ze iduonoꞌo baradu zeḡe mazao naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe niduꞌa Iesu tahiꞌa gaubanana tiba fare zu vaze niduꞌa ziro.
24.10: Idu onamiroteꞌe roḡaeḡaroḡaeḡaꞌe Magadala roḡaeḡa Maria, Ioana, Iakobo viꞌa Maria ebu roḡae nunu. Zeꞌe naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe apostolo azaḡa ziro.
24.11: Rehano apostolo azaḡaꞌe zeḡe ḡoereꞌe ḡiriho hariḡa radu mene mae ḡihiniro.
24.12: U Peteroꞌe iḡunadu idu dure onamiro. Ebu aniꞌa ḡuḡuradu idu zamaḡa ḡianirotene, Iesu ahiri ꞌumiroteꞌe dabuaḡa daꞌo deꞌea radoga horoniro. Ebu ani naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe zamare ꞌadaꞌadeꞌenaꞌa, neḡa bare onamiro. Iesuꞌa Emausa Neḡa Ibiḡano Fureraro (Mareko 16:12-13)
24.13: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesu hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze aheuꞌa Emausa neḡa onamiro. Eꞌe neḡa faḡaꞌe Ierusalemaonoꞌo gaubanana tiba fare kilomita.
24.14: Zeꞌe naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe niduꞌa moneo ḡoretitinu.
24.15: Zeḡeꞌa ḡoꞌane onameꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano, Iesuꞌa zeḡe uhiḡa aradu zeḡe teite onamiro.
24.16: Ze ani horoniro rehano, aꞌe Iesu rae mene ederiro, mazaḡa ubumaze ꞌuadu ze ani mene ederiro.
24.17: Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Zaꞌe onameꞌenaꞌa, nagini ḡoꞌaneꞌohe?” Ebu zamazeꞌa areꞌenaꞌa, ze tue edaro.
24.18: Zeḡe boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoga, niḡa Kuleopaꞌa niro, “Mada nu zamaḡano Ierusalemao naginiꞌa fureranataꞌaꞌe vaze niduꞌa edeḡa. Ḡaꞌe eꞌea radiunu rehano, ḡae daꞌo aḡuꞌahe?”
24.19: Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Naginiꞌa fureraneha?” Ze naenaeniro, “Aꞌe Nazareta vazeḡa Iesu hariḡa. Aniꞌe Badiꞌa zu vaze niduꞌa zamao haḡai gigiꞌaḡa haḡainuteꞌe zu ḡoere gigiꞌaḡa haraminuteꞌe peroveta vazeḡa.
24.20: Rehano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Iesu runeo tuḡuniꞌuma radu satauroniro.
24.21: Eme aniꞌe Isaraela azaḡa agireze mazaonoꞌo bohaze buziteꞌe vazeḡa rae mae ḡihiniro. Mene eꞌe daꞌo, izidi Iesu rudaroteꞌe madaḡa enogano mada uḡidu maha,
24.22: ebu emeḡe boꞌaḡano roḡae nuꞌa emeḡe mae zaguzagufeha. Ze izidi oherebau uzeuze idu onameha,
24.23: rehano Iesu ahiꞌa mene horoneha. Ebu ze bare aradu ꞌahige rae raha, 'Tuḡure viga nuꞌa fureranadu Iesuꞌe bare ḡabodeha rae raha.'
24.24: Eꞌanoꞌo emeḡe boꞌaḡano vaze nuꞌa idu onamatene, roḡaeroḡaeꞌa rateꞌe teige horoneha, ebu zeḡe zuni Iesu ahiꞌaꞌe mene horoneha.”
24.25: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe kauriḡa. Za peroveta azaḡaniꞌa reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa ufeta negane mae ḡihineꞌohe.
24.26: Peroveta azaḡaniꞌa reiroteꞌe teige, Kerisoꞌe ꞌouge aduga meꞌuma ebu hena ane haba ḡihiꞌa hune diuḡiꞌuma.”
24.27: Ebu Iesuꞌa Moseonoꞌo onamo peroveta azaḡa niduꞌa ani moneo Buka Zaḡoḡa niduꞌa zamaḡano nagini mirihiroteꞌe faine ihoziro.
24.28: Ze Emausa neḡa hanitirotene, Iesuꞌe ꞌize ibio onameꞌeteꞌe teigiro.
24.29: ꞌOugadu ze Iesu ḡihau uminiro, “Ḡoravaraneha zu madaꞌe hauḡeha. Emeḡe ne onamadu bazihi.” Eꞌanoꞌo Iesuꞌa zeḡe neo bazi onamiro.
24.30: Aniꞌa zeḡe teite ogomu atihi radu ehorirotene, ꞌuvahu odoga madu Badiꞌa mazao kuraro ebu vahege ziniro.
24.31: ꞌOugirotene, ubumazeꞌa bohatanadu aniꞌe Iesu rae ederiro. Rehano zeḡe mazaonoꞌo aniꞌa dauḡiro.
24.32: Ebu ze ḡoretitiro, “Aneꞌa ibio eme teite ḡoerateꞌe zu Buka Zaḡoḡa huga ihofateꞌe zamaḡano zamafeꞌa matuꞌe rudaneha!”
24.33: Ebu ze zogone iḡunadu Ierusalema bare itiro, ebu eꞌea Iesu tahiꞌa gaubanana tiba fare zu zeḡe teite radiunuteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa nuꞌoru tiburaroteꞌe horoziro.
24.34: Zeꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Hube hune Iesuꞌa bare ḡabodeha ebu Simona mazao fureraneha!”
24.35: ꞌOugadu vaze aheu eꞌeꞌa zuni Emausa ibiḡano zeḡe mazao naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe ihoziro, zu Iesuꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga vahegirotene aniꞌe Iesu rae ederiroteꞌe hariḡa meꞌodoziniro. Iesuꞌa Ane Tahiꞌatahiꞌa mazao Fureraro (Mataio 28:16-20; Mareko 16:14-18; Ioane 20:19-23; Apostolo 1:6-8)
24.36: Ze harize meꞌodeꞌeteꞌea, Iesu aneꞌa bare zeḡe boꞌaḡano edaro ebu ziro, “Zama roḡeḡaꞌe zae teite radoꞌi.”
24.37: Rehano zeꞌe zaguzagaro zu rihau rudaro, mazaḡa ze ane vine horoneꞌohe rae zamariro.
24.38: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe nougadu rihauꞌohe? Nougadu zamare doudeꞌohe?
24.39: Eḡe ꞌevore zu oda ḡianoꞌi. ꞌAhiꞌe eḡe! Obohoꞌi zu ḡiahoꞌi. Vineꞌe modare zu isine oꞌoꞌa, rehano za horoheꞌeteꞌe teige, eꞌe modareheta zu isineheta.”
24.40: Aniꞌa ꞌouge radu ꞌevoꞌa zu odaḡa ihoziro.
24.41: Rehano ze matuꞌe rudaroteꞌe zu zaguzagaroteꞌe uꞌano, ꞌize Iesu ḡoere mene mae ḡihiniro. Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Zae mazao ogomu nu eꞌehe?”
24.42: ꞌOugadu ze ḡozone kiroḡa tiba haro.
24.43: Ebu aniꞌa madu zeḡe zamao aro.
24.44: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa zae teite radiunuteꞌe madaḡano ꞌahige rae ziro, 'Mose goro ḡoeꞌa, peroveta azaḡa buka zu Salamo bukaḡa zamaḡano eḡe moneo mirihiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa hube hune hudaꞌuma.'”
24.45: Ebu Iesuꞌa ze Buka Zaḡoḡa huga ederoga veize zamaze bohaniro.
24.46: Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Kerisoꞌe aduga hidiꞌuma, ebu mada uḡiduḡano rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡabodiꞌuma.
24.47: Ebu Keriso niḡano vaze haḡaiḡa sauꞌa rae modeꞌeteꞌe hariḡa manoḡaꞌe Ierusalemaonoꞌo onamo habaꞌahabaꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano haramiꞌuma.'
24.48: Zaꞌe eꞌeguḡa niduꞌa hudaroteꞌe horoneha, eꞌanoꞌo zaeꞌa vaze niduꞌa mazao eḡe hari manoḡa haramiꞌuma.
24.49: Ḡiꞌanoꞌi, eḡe Mamaꞌa ḡoitoriroteꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡa eḡeꞌa zae mazao tuḡuniꞌuma. Eꞌanoꞌo Ierusalema zamaḡano guhiu radoꞌi, onamo adureonoꞌo areꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡaniꞌa zae iri'avoziꞌuma.” Iesuꞌa Adure Itiro (Mareko 16:19-20; Apostolo 1:9-11)
24.50: Ebu Iesuꞌa ze tutuzadu Betania neḡa uhiḡa onamiro. Ebu ꞌevoꞌa ḡihinadu zeḡe veize kuraro.
24.51: Aniꞌa zeḡe veize kurauꞌenaꞌa ze muhiziro, ebu ani adure ḡoha mae ḡihine itiro.
24.52: Ebu ze Iesu mazao kuraro zu matuꞌuzeta Ierusalema bare onamiro.
24.53: Ebu ze Badiꞌa niguneꞌenaꞌa, iḡaiḡa kuru neḡano radiunu.

1.1: Ḡadaheḡano Ḡoere rae huneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa radiunu. Ḡoere aꞌe Badiꞌa teite radiunu ebu Ḡoere eꞌe Badiꞌa.
1.2: Aniꞌe ꞌizema raha zu adure ꞌadi haḡaogano Badiꞌa teite radiunu.
1.3: Badiꞌaꞌa anionoꞌo ḡau niduꞌa haḡairo. Anionoꞌo mene haḡairoteꞌe ḡauḡa ꞌahogaꞌe oꞌoꞌa.
1.4: Ani zamaḡano ḡaboneḡeta. Ḡabone eꞌeꞌa vaze agazeꞌeteꞌe agaḡa.
1.5: Agaḡaꞌe uzabo zamaḡano agaruꞌohe, u uzaboꞌe agaḡa vinoga mene idararo.
1.6: Badiꞌaꞌa vaze ꞌahoga tuḡuniro. Ani niꞌe Ioane.
1.7: Aniꞌe agaḡa eꞌe moneo vaze ihozifine ebu ze ani ḡoere egadu agaḡa mazao fifine ariro.
1.8: Ioaneꞌe mene eꞌe agaḡa, rehano agaḡa eꞌe moneo ihozoga veize ariro.
1.9: Agaḡaꞌe raha ꞌada ariro. Aniꞌe agaḡa huga ebu vaze niduꞌa agaziro.
1.10: Aniꞌe raha ꞌahao radiro ebu raha ꞌadiꞌe ani mazaonoꞌo haḡairo. Rehano raha azaḡaniꞌa ani mene ederiro.
1.11: Aniꞌe ane haba ariro, rehano ani haba azaḡaniꞌa mene mae ḡihiniro.
1.12: U iniuꞌa ani mae ḡihinadu ani mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa ubugaubuga reiteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa ziniro.
1.13: Ze Badiꞌa ubugaubuga raꞌetaꞌaꞌe mene vouḡaze ruonoꞌo, ga mene vaze uraonoꞌo, ga mene vazeꞌa toganiroteꞌe uꞌano, rehano Badiꞌa urao zeꞌe ane ubugaubuga rae reiro.
1.14: Ḡoereꞌe vazeo reiro ebu emeḡe boꞌaḡano radiro. Eme aniꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae ederiro. Aniꞌe Badiꞌa Ubuga Tibuhuga, ḡihiꞌa hune rae reiro. Aniꞌe vaze zamare borofiro zu ḡoere huga reiro.
1.15: Ioaneꞌa ani moneo rae fureneꞌenaꞌa, ḡihau ḡoeriro, “E ibite ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Eḡe ḡaruna ariteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe vitihoga ḡihiꞌaḡa, mazaḡa e ꞌizema fureranogano aniꞌe amahi radiro.' Eḡeꞌa ꞌouge ziroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ꞌadi eꞌe.”
1.16: Aniꞌe eme zamare borofeꞌe ꞌahine, emeḡe niduꞌa manohuga rifiꞌohe, ebu emeꞌa barebare manohuga hideꞌohe.
1.17: Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌaꞌe Moseonoꞌo rifiro, u Badiꞌaꞌa Iesu Keriso uꞌano, emeḡe mazao manoḡa fureniro zu ḡoere huga ihofiro.
1.18: Badiꞌaꞌe vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa mene horoniro. Rehano Ubuga tibuhuga, Moga uhiḡano radiuꞌeteꞌeꞌa Badiꞌa moneo vaze ihoziro. Aniꞌe Badiꞌa. Ioaneꞌe Mene Keriso (Mataio 3:1-12; Mareko 1:2-8; Luka 3:15-17)
1.19: Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa dibuꞌo azaḡa zu Levi urabo azaḡa Ierusalemaonoꞌo Ioane vaḡe tuḡuziro. Ebu zeḡeꞌa Ioane ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe iniu?” ꞌOugadu Ioaneꞌa ꞌahige rae fureniro.
1.20: Aniꞌe ḡau ꞌahoga zu mene ꞌuꞌuru ḡoeriro ebu huga daꞌo deheru rae fureniro, “Eꞌe mene Keriso.”
1.21: Ebu zeḡeꞌa ḡadiniro, “Tena ḡa iniu? Ḡa Eliahe?” Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “E mene.” Ze bare ḡadiniro, “Peroveta vazeḡa boro ꞌahoganiꞌa ariꞌuma rae ibite rae fureniro. Ḡaꞌe peroveta vazeḡa eꞌehe?” Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Mene.”
1.22: Ḡonagano zeḡeꞌa niro, “Ḡaꞌe iniu? Ihofoꞌi, ꞌougine eme baradu emeḡe tuḡufateꞌe azaḡa mazao ḡaꞌe iniu rae ziꞌuma. Ḡa ḡae bare moneo nouge rae raꞌohe?”
1.23: Ioaneꞌa peroveta vazeḡa Isaiaꞌa reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa hina naenaeziro, “Eꞌe haba bohaꞌano huauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, raenaꞌa, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro veize ibi mae dudunoꞌi.'”
1.24: Ioane ḡadiniroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano nuꞌe Farisea azaḡaniꞌa tuḡuziroteꞌe azaḡa.
1.25: Zeꞌa Ioane ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe mene Keriso, mene Elia zu mene peroveta vazeḡa eꞌe reine, nougadu vaze babatisoziꞌohe?”
1.26: Ioaneꞌa naenaeziro, “Eꞌe vu hina babatisoziꞌohe. Rehano zae boꞌaḡano zaeꞌa mene edereꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa edauꞌohe.
1.27: Aniꞌe eḡe ḡaruna areꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa zu eḡe vitihoga. Eḡe'a ani tamaka miniḡa fuhiꞌeꞌeteꞌe tuḡureḡa vazeḡa rae rouga zuni mene idaḡa.”
1.28: ꞌAhi niduꞌa Ioridana vuḡa moneafa Betania habaꞌano fureraro. Deꞌea Ioaneꞌa babatisozinu. Badiꞌa Mamoe Ubuga
1.29: Irarirotene, Ioaneꞌe Iesuꞌa ani vaḡe ariroteꞌe horonadu reiro, “Badiꞌa Mamoe Ubuga ḡianoꞌi! Aniꞌe raha ꞌada haḡai sauꞌa niduꞌa odohe onameꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.
1.30: Ibite e ani moneo ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Eḡe ḡaruna ariteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe vitihoga ḡihiꞌaḡa, mazaḡa e ꞌizema fureranogano aniꞌe amahi radiunu.'
1.31: E aniꞌe mene ederiro. Rehano Isaraela azaḡaniꞌa ani ederifine, e aradu vu hina babatisoziꞌohe.”
1.32: Ebu Ioaneꞌa bare rae fureniro, “E Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa Tubugo niniḡa teige adureonoꞌo ovadu ani rana kame radiuꞌeteꞌe horoniro.
1.33: E aniꞌe mene ederiro. Rehano e vu hina babatisozoga veize tuḡuhiroteꞌe Badiꞌaḡaniꞌa ꞌahige rae ihohiro, 'Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa adureonoꞌo ovadu vaze ꞌahoga rana kame radoga horonoꞌidene, aniꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡa hina babatisoziteꞌe vazeḡa rae ederoꞌi.'
1.34: E hube hune ꞌouge horonadu aniꞌe Badiꞌa Ubuga rae fureneꞌohe.” Iesu Tahiꞌa Ibiꞌa
1.35: Irarirotene, Ioaneꞌe ane tahiꞌa aheu teite eꞌe habaꞌano bare edau radiunu.
1.36: Ebu Iesuꞌa eꞌea vitau onamoga horonirotene, aniꞌa reiro, “Badiꞌa Mamoe Ubuga ḡianoꞌi!”
1.37: Ioane tahiꞌa aheuꞌa ani ḡoere egadu Iesu hegotiro.
1.38: Ebu Iesuꞌa tehadu ze ani hegoteꞌeteꞌe horozadu ziro, “Za nagini urateꞌohe?” Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Rabi, ḡa nouma radiuꞌohe?” (Rabi hugaꞌe Ihore Vazeḡa.)
1.39: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡe teite onamine, horoniꞌuma.” Ebu ze onamadu Iesuꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa horoniro, ebu eꞌe mada niduga eꞌea ane teite radiro. Aꞌe ḡorava mone mada ḡazaḡa reiro.
1.40: Ioane ḡoere egadu Iesu hegotiroteꞌe vazeḡa aheu boꞌaḡano ꞌahogaꞌe Anderea. Aniꞌe Simona Petero negoḡa.
1.41: Ani ibite negoḡa Simona vaḡe onamadu niro, “Eme Mesia horoneha.” (Mesia ḡoere ꞌahogaꞌe Keriso.)
1.42: Ebu Andereaꞌa Simona Iesu vaḡe zamahu onamiro. Iesuꞌa ani ḡianadu niro, “Ḡaꞌe Ioane ubuga, Simona. Rehano Kefa rae huḡadiꞌuma.” (Kefa, ni ꞌahogaꞌe Petero. ) Filipi zu Natanaela Huziro
1.43: Irarirotene, Iesuꞌe Galilea habaꞌa onamihi reiro. Ani ꞌizema onamogano Filipi vaḡe onamadu niro, “Eḡe hegotoꞌi.”
1.44: Filipiꞌe Betesaida vazeḡa, ebu Anderea zu Petero teite ne tiba.
1.45: Ebu Filipiꞌa Natanaela vaḡe onamadu niro, “Eme Moseꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa zamaḡano mirihiroteꞌe, zu peroveta azaḡaniꞌa zeḡe buka zamaḡano mirihiroteꞌe vazeḡa horoneha. Aniꞌe Iosefa ubuga, Nazareta vazeḡa Iesu.”
1.46: Ebu Natanaelaꞌa naenaeniro, “Nazaretaꞌe ne komeꞌa! Eꞌea nagini manoḡaniꞌa fureraꞌuma?” Filipiꞌa niro, “Aradu ḡianoꞌi.”
1.47: Ebu Iesuꞌe Natanaelaꞌa ani vaḡe areꞌeteꞌe horonirotene, Natanaela moneo ḡoeriro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe hube hune Isaraela vazeḡa. Ani mazaoꞌe ḡuriro ꞌahoga oꞌoꞌa.”
1.48: Natanaelaꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe e nougenouge edereꞌohe?” Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Filipiꞌa ꞌizema huḡadogano, ḡa figi ireḡa ꞌuꞌuḡano radiuꞌenogano horoꞌeha.”
1.49: Ebu Natanaelaꞌa niro, “Rabi, ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa Ubuga! Isaraela azaḡa kini!”
1.50: Iesuꞌa niro, “Eḡeꞌa ḡaꞌe figi ireḡa ꞌuꞌuḡano radateꞌea horoꞌeha rae radu ḡa eḡe mazao fieꞌehe? Rehano ḡa ꞌahi ufeta vitinoga ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa horoniꞌuma.”
1.51: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, za adureꞌa bohatanadu Badiꞌa tuḡure viganiꞌa Vaze Ubuga rana iteꞌeteꞌe zu ovoeꞌeteꞌe horoniꞌuma.”

2.1: Mada uḡiduḡano Galilea habaꞌano Kana neḡano hahu muiḡa ꞌahoga haḡairo, ebu Iesu viꞌaꞌe mui eꞌe zamaḡano radiro.
2.2: Mui vazeḡaniꞌa Iesu zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa zuni huziro.
2.3: Muio vaini vuḡaniꞌa hauḡirotene, viꞌaniꞌa Iesu niro, “Ze vaini vuḡaꞌe hauḡeha.”
2.4: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Roḡae boro, ḡa nougadu eḡe mazao ꞌouge raꞌohe? Eḡe gau madaḡaꞌe ꞌize mene maha.”
2.5: Rehano viꞌaniꞌa mui tuḡure azaḡa ziro, “Aniꞌa nouge rae zoꞌidene, ꞌouge haḡaoꞌi.”
2.6: Ebu hadi hina haḡairoteꞌe vu ḡoḡoreḡa fuꞌo tiba fareꞌe deꞌea. Aꞌe Iuda azaḡa goro idunaḡano, ze zu ḡauze dehenoga veize tiro. Hadi vu ḡoḡoreḡa tibatibano vu 20 gareni onamo 30 gareni iriꞌavonoga idararo.
2.7: Iesuꞌa tuḡure azaḡa ziro, “Ḡoḡore niduꞌa vu iriꞌavonoꞌi.” ꞌOugadu ze vu beuꞌe ite hebeꞌano iri'avoniro.
2.8: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Vu nu iḡi vaḡinadu mui ibitohauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ha onamoꞌi.” Eꞌanoꞌo ze ꞌouge haḡairo.
2.9: Ebu mui ibitohauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa vu eꞌe vaini vuḡano reiroteꞌe gage nuriro. Aniꞌe vaini vuḡa eꞌe noumanoꞌo mae arirotaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa, u vu iḡi vaḡiniroteꞌe tuḡure azaḡaꞌe edeḡa. Ebu mui ibitohauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa hahu iziga ohozeḡa huniro.
2.10: Ebu ani matuꞌeꞌenaꞌa, hahu iziga ohozeḡa niro, “Vaze niduꞌa vaini vuḡa manoḡa tauḡi ibite oma mae fureneꞌohe. Ebu mui azaḡaniꞌa gage sautuꞌetuꞌu hena tahiḡa manoḡa mae fureneꞌohe. Rehano ḡaeꞌa onao izidi vaini vuḡa manoḡa tauḡi vazevaze veize modeha.”
2.11: Iesuꞌa haḡai nu badeḡa ibiꞌaꞌe Galilea habaꞌano Kana neḡano ꞌahige haḡairo. ꞌOugadu ani ane ni mae ḡihiniro, ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ani mazao firo.
2.12: Mui ḡarugano Iesuꞌe viꞌa, negoḡa duḡuru zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite Kaperanauma ovoiro. Ebu eꞌea mada nu radiro. Kuru Neḡa Deheniro (Mataio 21:12-13; Mareko 11:15-17; Luka 19:45-46)
2.13: Iuda azaḡa Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa madaḡaniꞌa hanitirotene, Iesuꞌe Ierusalema itiro.
2.14: Ebu ani vaze nuꞌe kuru neḡa habaꞌano boromakau, mamoe zu Tubugo niniḡa seronoga horoziro, ebu nuꞌe fataze babaḡano ehoradu hadi seniso zenoga horoziro.
2.15: ꞌOugadu ani mini hina masizeꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa haḡadu eꞌe hina zeḡe niduꞌa ebu mamoe zu boromakau niduꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌanonoꞌo masize ḡururuziro. Ebu hadi seniso ziniꞌeteꞌe azaḡa hadize beuꞌe ḡuzuhiro, zu fataze mae ḡihuniro.
2.16: Ebu Tubugo niniḡa seroneꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ziro, “Ḡau ꞌahi niduꞌa ꞌadanoꞌo mae vaḡinoꞌi! Mamahe neꞌe maketi habaꞌano ago haḡaoꞌi!”
2.17: Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe Buka Zaḡoḡano ḡoere ꞌahi zamariro, “E Badiꞌa ne zamare borofeꞌohe.”
2.18: Ebu Iuda azaḡaniꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡa nagi gigiꞌaḡa hina ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌohe? Ḡae gigiꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo roꞌidene, haḡai nu badeḡa ihofoꞌi.”
2.19: Ebu Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Kuru neḡa ꞌadi fahoꞌi, ꞌougine eḡeꞌa mada uḡidu zamaḡano bare ohoniꞌuma.”
2.20: Zeḡeꞌa niro, “Kuru neḡa ꞌadi ogorarotene muri 46 madu hauḡiro. U ḡaꞌe mada uḡidu zamaḡano ohoniꞌuma rae raꞌehe?”
2.21: Rehano Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa reirotaꞌaꞌe ane ahiri moneo reiro.
2.22: Iesuꞌe runeonoꞌo bare iḡuniroteꞌe ḡarugano, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ani ḡoere zamariro. Ebu ze Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ebu Iesuꞌa reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa mae ḡihiniro.
2.23: Iesuꞌe Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa madaḡano Ierusalemao radiunu. Ebu vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa aneꞌa haḡai nu badeḡa haḡairoteꞌe horonadu ani mazao firo.
2.24: Rehano aniꞌe ze mene mae ḡihiziro, mazaḡa vaze niduꞌa zamaze ederiro.
2.25: Vaze zamao naginiꞌa radiuꞌetaꞌaꞌe zuni Iesuꞌa ederiroteꞌe uꞌano, aniꞌe vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa vaze ꞌahoga moneo ani ihonoga mene uratiro.

3.1: Farisea vazeḡa ꞌahoga, niḡa Nikodemoꞌa radiunu. Aniꞌe Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoga.
3.2: Ohere ꞌahogano ani Iesu vaḡe aradu niro, “Rabi, emeꞌe edeḡa, ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ariroteꞌe ihore vazeḡa. Mazaḡa iniuꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa ani teite mene radiune, ani ḡaꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa nu badeḡa haḡaoga mene idaḡa.”
3.3: Ebu Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ḡaꞌohe, iniuꞌa mene bare fureraune , Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe horonoga mene idaḡa.”
3.4: Ebu Nikodemoꞌa niro, “Vaze boroꞌe nougenouge bare fureranoga idaḡa? Aniꞌe viꞌa isi zamaḡano bare diuḡadu fureranoga mene idaḡa.”
3.5: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ḡaꞌohe, iniuꞌa vu zu Vine Zaḡoḡa hina mene bare fureraune, aniꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaniꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa rouga mene idaḡa.
3.6: Vazeꞌe nanu mama ahirionoꞌo ahirio fureruꞌohe. U vineꞌe Badiꞌa Vigaonoꞌo fureruꞌohe.
3.7: Eḡeꞌa zinaꞌa, 'Zaꞌe bare fureranoꞌi,' rae rateꞌe uꞌano, ago zaguzaganoꞌi.
3.8: Zaizaiꞌa ane edeḡano zaiduꞌohe. Ḡaꞌe zaizai igiꞌohe, rehano aniꞌa noumanoꞌo areꞌeteꞌe zu noꞌe onameꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa. Eꞌe teige, Vine Zaḡoḡaonoꞌo fureraroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa zuni ꞌouge fureruꞌohe.”
3.9: Ebu Nikodemoꞌa ḡadiniro, “Nougenouge ꞌahiguḡaniꞌa fureruꞌohe?”
3.10: Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡaꞌe Isaraela azaḡa ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, rehano nougadu ꞌahiguḡaꞌe aḡuꞌa?
3.11: E hube hune ḡaꞌohe. Eme nagini edere ḡauḡa ḡoereꞌohe, zu nagini horoniroteꞌe ḡauḡa rae fureneꞌohe. Rehano za emeꞌa rae fureneꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe mene mae ḡihineꞌohe.
3.12: Eꞌa raha ꞌadao fureruꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa moneo ziro, rehano zaꞌe mene mae ḡihineꞌohe. ꞌOugadu adureo fureruꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa moneo zine, nougenouge mae ḡihiniꞌuma?
3.13: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa adure ꞌize mene itiro, rehano Vaze Ubuga, adureonoꞌo ovairoteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa daꞌo itiro.
3.14: Ibite madaḡano Moseꞌa haba bohaꞌano mohe iraḡa haḡadu somori faḡa rana teadu mae ḡihiniro. Eꞌe teige, Vaze Ubuga zuni vazeꞌa satauro rana mae ḡihiniꞌuma.
3.15: Aꞌe ani mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidifine raꞌohe.
3.16: Badiꞌaꞌa raha ꞌadi azaḡa ufeta zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, ani Ubuga tibuhuga ziniro. Aꞌe, iniu ani mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe mene rudanadu ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidifine raꞌohe.
3.17: Badiꞌaꞌa raha ꞌadi azaḡa kotazoga veize ani Ubuga mene tuḡuniro, rehano ani uꞌano ze ḡabozoga veize tuḡuniro.
3.18: Iniu ani mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe mene kotazeꞌohe. Rehano mene fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe amahi kotaziro, mazaḡa ze Badiꞌa Ubuga tibuhuga mazao mene firo.
3.19: Agaḡaꞌe rahao ariro, rehano vazeꞌa agaḡa mene zamariro ebu haḡaize sauꞌa uꞌano, ze uzabo ufeta zamariro. Eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa kotao ohoziro.
3.20: Haḡai sauꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe agaḡa heꞌeheꞌenadu agaḡa vaḡe mene areꞌohe, mazaḡa haḡaize sauꞌa rae fureniꞌuma radu rihauꞌohe.
3.21: Rehano ḡoere huga hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe agaḡa vaḡe areꞌohe. Aꞌe, ze Badiꞌa ḡoere hegotadu haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa deheru ihozifine raꞌohe.” Ioane Babatisoꞌa Iesu moneo rae Fureniro
3.22: Eꞌe ḡarugano Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite Iudea habaꞌa onamiro, ebu eꞌea zeḡe teite mada nu radiuꞌenaꞌa, vaze babatisoziro.
3.23: Ioane Babatiso zuni Salema neḡa uhiḡano Enoni neḡano babatisozinu, mazaḡa eꞌe habaꞌaꞌe vu boro. Vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa babatiso mouga radu ani vaḡe arinu.
3.24: Eꞌe madaḡano Ioaneꞌe ꞌizema ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoniro.
3.25: Ioane tahiꞌaḡa nuꞌa Iuda vazeḡa ꞌahoga teite ahiri ga ḡau faifaine vuzuꞌeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa moneo taꞌirotitiro.
3.26: Ebu Ioane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Ioane vaḡe aradu niro, “Rabi, Ioridana vuḡa moneafa ꞌoma ḡae teite radateꞌe zu ḡaeꞌa rae furenateꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa babatisoziꞌohe, ebu vaze niduꞌa ane vaḡe onameꞌohe.”
3.27: Ebu Ioaneꞌa naenaeziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa inaraḡa mene haune, vazeni ꞌahoga ꞌouge gauoga mene idaḡa.
3.28: Eḡeꞌa ꞌahige rae ziro, 'Eꞌe mene Keriso, rehano e ani veize ibite tuḡuhiro.' Eꞌanoꞌo za eḡe ḡoere ꞌahi vaze niduꞌa mazao rae fureniꞌuma.
3.29: E hari ꞌahoga idane ziꞌohe. Hahu roḡaeḡa izigaꞌe hahu ohozeḡa iziganiꞌa maꞌohe. U hahu ohozeḡa iziga nabugaꞌe edauꞌenaꞌa, hahu ohozeḡa iziga ḡoere igiꞌohe. Igiꞌetene, aniꞌe matuꞌe rudauꞌohe. Hari eꞌe teige, eꞌe hahu ohozeḡa iziga nabuga heuḡa. E zae mazaonoꞌo ani hari egadu matuꞌe rudauꞌohe.
3.30: Aniꞌe ufeta ḡihiꞌa reꞌuma, u eꞌe ufeta ovoroga reꞌuma.” Adureonoꞌo Ovaeꞌeteꞌe Vazeḡa
3.31: “Hitanaonoꞌo ovaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune. Aniꞌe ḡau niduꞌa vitinoga. U rahaonoꞌo areꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe raha ꞌadi vazeḡa, zu rahao fureruꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa moneo ḡoereꞌohe. Adureonoꞌo ovaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡau niduꞌa vitinoga.
3.32: Aniꞌa horoniroteꞌe zu igiroteꞌe ḡauḡa rae fureneꞌohe, rehano vazeni ꞌahogaꞌe ani ḡoere mene mae ḡihineꞌohe.
3.33: Ani ḡoere mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoereꞌe hube hune rae raꞌohe.
3.34: Badiꞌaꞌa tuḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere ziꞌohe, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa Vine Zaḡoḡa hanadu Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa iḡaiḡa ani teite radiuꞌohe.
3.35: Moganiꞌa Ubuga zamare borofadu ḡau niduꞌa ani ꞌevora riꞌiniro.
3.36: Iniu Ubuga mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiro. U iniu Ubuga hezahohauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone mene hidiꞌuma, rehano Badiꞌa zama ḡugiꞌaniꞌa ani ragano reꞌuma.”

4.1: Iesuꞌa Ioane vitine ani tahiꞌatahiꞌa ufeta ḡehaḡa zamazadu babatisoziꞌeteꞌe hariḡa Farisea azaḡaniꞌa igiro.
4.2: Aꞌe Iesuꞌa mene babatisoziro, rehano ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa babatisoziro.
4.3: Aniꞌe Farisea azaḡaniꞌa ani moneo ḡoereꞌeteꞌe ederirotene, Iudea habaꞌa modadu bare Galilea habaꞌa onamiro.
4.4: Galilea habaꞌa onameꞌeteꞌe ibiḡano aniꞌe Samaria habaꞌa vitine onamiro.
4.5: ꞌOugadu Samaria habaꞌano ne boro ꞌahoga, niḡa Sukao feuriro. Eꞌe neḡaꞌe Iakoboꞌa ubuga Iosefa haroteꞌe habaꞌa uhiḡano,
4.6: ebu Iakobo idu vuḡa zuni eꞌea. Iesuꞌa ibi faḡa aradu fuḡone runiro ꞌahine, idu vuḡa genaḡano ehore radiro. Aꞌe madai kirikiri.
4.7: Samaria roḡaeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa vu abi ariro. Iesuꞌa ani horonadu niro, “Vu gagifine nu iniꞌumahe?”
4.8: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe ogomu hoitoga veize ne onamadu ani teite mene radiro.
4.9: Ebu Samaria roḡaeḡaniꞌa niro, “Ḡaꞌe Iuda vazeḡa, u eꞌe Samaria roḡaeḡa. Nougadu ḡa eḡe mazao vu umideꞌohe?” Iuda azaḡaꞌe Samaria azaḡa teite mene tiburuꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, ani ꞌouge rae reiro.
4.10: Ebu Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡa Badiꞌaꞌa nagi ḡahunoneḡa ḡanihi rae ederifone zu ḡae mazao vu umiꞌeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe iniu rae ederifone, ḡa umihadu eḡeꞌa ḡabone vuḡa ḡanifo.”
4.11: Roḡae eꞌeꞌa niro, “Vaze boro, ḡae mazao vu abeꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa zu idu vuḡa ꞌahiꞌe vo hutuna. Ḡabone vuḡaꞌe nouma meꞌuma?
4.12: Emeḡe vouḡa Iakoboꞌa idu vuḡa ꞌahi rifiro. Ani idu ꞌahi vuḡanonoꞌo vu gagiro, ebu ani ubuga duḡuru zu aneꞌa ḡubuziroteꞌe ḡauḡa zuni vu ꞌahi gagiro. Ḡaꞌe ani ufeta vitine ḡihiꞌaḡahe?”
4.13: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Iniuꞌa vu ꞌadi gageꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe iriganiꞌa bare moꞌoniꞌuma.
4.14: Rehano iniu eḡeꞌa hauꞌeteꞌe vuḡa gageꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe iriga mene bare moꞌoniꞌuma. Eḡeꞌa hauꞌeteꞌe vuḡaꞌe ane zamao sore iteꞌeteꞌe iduḡa vuḡa teigiꞌuma ebu ḡabone tuḡutuḡu haꞌuma.”
4.15: Roḡae eꞌeꞌa niro, “Vaze boro, eꞌe vuḡaꞌe eḡe enoꞌi. ꞌOugine, irinehe mene bare moꞌohiꞌuma zu vu aboḡa veize e ꞌahi mene bare ariꞌuma.”
4.16: Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡa onamadu iꞌu hune aroꞌi.”
4.17: Roḡae eꞌeꞌa naenaeniro, “E ihe oꞌoꞌa.” Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡaꞌa iꞌu oꞌoꞌa raꞌetaꞌaꞌe hube.
4.18: Ḡaꞌe ibite iꞌu fuꞌo meiro, ebu izidi ḡae teite radiuꞌeteꞌe ohozeḡa zuni ḡae mene iꞌu. Ḡaꞌa rataꞌaꞌe hube.”
4.19: Ebu roḡae eꞌeꞌa niro, “Vaze boro, e ḡaꞌe peroveta vazeḡa rae edereha.
4.20: Vouḡafe, Samaria azaḡaniꞌa Gerizimi maḡa ꞌada kuraro. Rehano za, Iuda azaḡaꞌe, 'Kuru habaꞌaꞌe Ierusalema daꞌo,' rae raꞌohe.”
4.21: Iesuꞌa niro, “Roḡae, eḡe ḡoere ꞌahi mae ḡihinoꞌi. Mada ꞌahoganiꞌa arine, za Mama mazao kurauꞌeteꞌe habaꞌaꞌe mene maḡa ꞌada ga mene Ierusalemao reꞌuma.
4.22: Za, Samaria azaḡaꞌe iniu mazao kurauꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa. U eme, Iuda azaḡaꞌe iniu mazao kurauꞌetaꞌaꞌe edeḡa, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa vaze ḡaboziteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Iuda azaḡa mazaonoꞌo tuḡuniro.
4.23: Rehano hube hune kurauꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Badiꞌa Vine inaraḡa hina zu ḡoere huga hina Mama mazao kuratiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma, ebu izidiꞌe eꞌe madaḡa raꞌohe. Mamaꞌa ani mazao ꞌouge kurauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa vaḡeꞌohe.
4.24: Badiꞌaꞌe vine, eꞌanoꞌo iniuꞌa ani mazao kurauꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Badiꞌa Vine inaraḡa hina zu ḡoere huga hina kuraꞌuma.”
4.25: Roḡae eꞌeꞌa niro, “Eḡe edeḡa, Mesia, Keriso rae huneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ariꞌuma. Aniꞌa arine, ḡau niduꞌa ihofiꞌuma.”
4.26: Iesuꞌa niro, “Izidi ḡaꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Keriso, eḡe.” Iesu Tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Bariro
4.27: Iesuꞌa ꞌouge ḡoerirotene, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa feuri ariro. Ebu ze zaguzagaro, mazaḡa aniꞌe roḡae ꞌahoga teite ḡoere radiro. Rehano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu mazao ninaꞌa, “Ḡa nougihi raꞌohe?” ga “Ḡa nougadu ani teite ḡoereꞌohe?” rae mene ḡadiniro.
4.28: Ebu roḡae eꞌeꞌa vu ḡoḡoreḡa modadu ne onamiro, ebu ne azaḡa ziro,
4.29: “Aradu vaze ꞌadi ḡianoꞌi! Ani eḡeꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa niduꞌa eheha. Aniꞌe Keriso gaogi!”
4.30: Ebu ze neze modadu Iesu vaḡe onamiro. Hiriveꞌeteꞌe Azaḡa
4.31: Eꞌe zamaḡano Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Iesu uminiro, “Rabi, ḡa ogomu nu anoꞌi.”
4.32: Rehano aniꞌa ziro, “Ogomuꞌe eḡe mazao eꞌe, rehano zaꞌe ogomu eꞌe moneoꞌe aḡuꞌa.”
4.33: Ebu ze zeḡeꞌa bare ḡadimutitiro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ogomu hanahe?”
4.34: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡe ogomuꞌe eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa ura haḡaeꞌeteꞌe zu ane gau haḡae huneꞌeteꞌe raꞌohe.
4.35: Zaꞌe, 'Bato ḡazaḡa enogano hiriviteꞌe madaḡa meꞌuma,' rae raꞌohe. Rehano eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, ubumaze raꞌanadu meba faine ḡianoꞌi. Meba ogomuḡaniꞌa hudanadu hiriveꞌeteꞌe madaḡa ꞌai maha.
4.36: Hiriveꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe gauḡa naeḡa hideꞌohe, ebu ane hirivadu ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hideꞌeteꞌe huga nuꞌoneꞌohe. ꞌOugine, ḡorauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa zu hiriveꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, anianine matuꞌe tiburaꞌuma.
4.37: Ḡoere ꞌahiꞌe hube, 'Vaze ꞌahogaꞌe ḡorauꞌohe ebu ꞌahogaꞌe hiriveꞌohe.'
4.38: Zaeꞌa mene ḡoraroteꞌe ogomuḡa hirivoga veize e za tuḡuziro. Vaze ꞌahogaꞌahogaꞌe gau boro haḡairo, u zaꞌe zeḡe gauonoꞌo huga maꞌohe.” Samaria Azaḡaniꞌa Iesu mazao Firo
4.39: Ne beꞌanoꞌo Samaria azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesu mazao firo, mazaḡa roḡae eꞌeꞌa ꞌahige rae fureniro, “Ani eꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa niduꞌa eheha.”
4.40: Ze ani vaḡe aradu uminiro, “Emeḡe teite mada nu radoꞌi.” ꞌOugadu aniꞌe zeḡe teite mada aheu eꞌea radiro.
4.41: Ebu Iesu ḡoere uꞌano, vaze ufeta ḡehaḡaniꞌa ani mazao firo.
4.42: Ebu zeḡeꞌa roḡae eꞌe niro, “Emeꞌe mene ḡae ḡoere uꞌano, rehano eme emeḡeꞌa bare ani ḡoere egateꞌe uꞌano ani mazao fieꞌohe. Mazaḡa eme edereha, vaze ꞌadiꞌe hube hune raha ꞌadi azaḡa niduꞌa ḡabozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.” Kini Gau Vazeḡa Ubuga Fainiro (Mataio 8:5-13; Luka 7:1-10)
4.43: Mada aheu enogano Iesuꞌe eꞌea iḡunadu Galilea habaꞌa onamiro.
4.44: Mazaḡa ani aneꞌa bare ꞌahige rae reiro, “Peroveta vazeḡaꞌe ane haba azaḡaniꞌa mene gubaneꞌohe.”
4.45: Ani Galilea habaꞌano feurirotene, Galilea azaḡaniꞌa ani mae zouniro, mazaḡa ze Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa madaḡano Ierusalemao radiuꞌenaꞌa, Iesuꞌa Mui eꞌe zamaḡano haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa niduꞌa horoniro.
4.46: Ebu Iesuꞌa Galilea habaꞌano Kana neḡa bare onamiro. Aꞌe vu ḡihune vaini vuḡano haḡairoteꞌe neḡa. Eꞌea kini gau vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa radiunu, ebu ani ubugaꞌe ugiꞌa madu Kaperanauma zamaḡano radiunu.
4.47: Aniꞌe Iesuꞌa Iudea habaꞌanonoꞌo Galilea habaꞌano feuri ariroteꞌe igirotene, ani vaḡe onamadu uminiro, “Ubudeheꞌe ugiꞌa madu nariga rudauꞌohe. Ḡa eḡe teite Kaperanauma ovoadu ani fainoꞌi.”
4.48: Ebu Iesuꞌa niro, “Zaꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa zu zaguzagatiteꞌe haḡaiḡa mene horonine, eḡe mazao mene fiꞌuma.”
4.49: Kini gau vazeḡaniꞌa niro, “Vaze boro, ubudehe ꞌizema rudanogano, aro ovoihi.”
4.50: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Onamoꞌi. Ubugoꞌe ḡabodiꞌuma.” ꞌOuge reirotene, ani Iesu ḡoere mae ḡihiniro ebu ani ne ovoiro.
4.51: Ani ibio ovoeꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano, ane tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa ani hidadu ihoniro, “Ubugoꞌe ḡabodeha!”
4.52: Ebu aniꞌa ḡadiziro, “Ubudeheꞌe naniꞌa manoreha?” Zeḡeꞌa niro, “Ohoḡore ḡorava mone mada tiba zamaḡano gigiꞌaniꞌa hauḡeha.”
4.53: ꞌOugadu mogaꞌe ederiro, eꞌe madaḡaꞌe Iesuꞌa, “Ubugoꞌe ḡabodiꞌuma,” rae reiroteꞌe madaḡa. Eꞌanoꞌo ani zu ane neo tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe Iesu mazao firo.
4.54: Aꞌe Iesuꞌa Iudea habaꞌanonoꞌo Galilea habaꞌa ariroteꞌe enogano haḡairoteꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa aheuḡa.

5.1: Eꞌe enogano Iuda azaḡa mui madaḡa ꞌahoga meirotene, Iesuꞌe Ierusalema itiro.
5.2: Ierusalema zamaḡano ibiheta ꞌahoga niḡaꞌe Mamoe Ibiheta. Ibiheta eꞌe uhiḡano Heberu ḡoeꞌano Betesaida rae huneꞌeteꞌe duꞌuraḡa komeꞌa ꞌahogaꞌe eꞌe, ebu eꞌe duꞌuraḡa genaḡano ibi zauhaḡaꞌe fuꞌo.
5.3: Ebu ugi azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa mada niduꞌa eꞌea baze baninu. Zeꞌe ubuma kuruḡa azaḡa, oda sauꞌa azaḡa zu ahiꞌa mene haganeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa.
5.5: Zeḡe boꞌaḡano muri 38 zamaḡano uginiroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa radiunu.
5.6: Iesuꞌa ani deꞌea baze radiuꞌeteꞌe horonadu ani faḡa hune uginirotaꞌaꞌe ederiro. ꞌOugadu aneꞌa ugi vazeḡa niro, “Ḡa manoroga urateꞌehe?”
5.7: Ugi vazeḡaniꞌa naenaeniro, “Vaze boro, vuꞌa hagareꞌetene, vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa duꞌura zamaḡano e mene danahe ohoheꞌohe. Ebu e eḡeꞌa bare diuḡi onameꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ibite diuḡeꞌohe.”
5.8: Ebu Iesuꞌa niro, “Iḡunoꞌi, ebu farataḡo madu onamoꞌi.”
5.9: Eꞌebone ugi vazeḡa ꞌai zogone manoriro ebu farataḡa madu onamiro. Eꞌe madaḡaꞌe Bana Madaḡa.
5.10: Eꞌanoꞌo Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ugionoꞌo manoriroteꞌe vazeḡa niro, “Izidiꞌe Bana Madaḡa. Ḡaꞌa farataḡo odoheꞌetaꞌaꞌe Mose goro ḡoeꞌa variꞌeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa.”
5.11: Rehano aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Faihateꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa, 'Farataḡo madu onamoꞌi,' rae eheha.”
5.12: Zeḡeꞌa ḡadiniro, “Iniu vazeꞌa, 'Farataḡo madu onamoꞌi,' rae ḡaha?”
5.13: Rehano manoriroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe iniuꞌa ani fainirotaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa, mazaḡa Iesuꞌa eꞌea radiroteꞌe azaḡa ḡunuḡano dauḡiro.
5.14: Eꞌe enogano Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌano ani hidadu niro, “Ḡianoꞌi, ḡa ꞌai manoreha. Eꞌanoꞌo ufeta sauꞌaniꞌa ḡae mazao mene fureranoga veize, haḡai sauꞌa ago bare haḡaoꞌi.”
5.15: Ebu vaze eꞌeꞌa onamadu Iuda azaḡa boroboro ziro, “Faihateꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Iesu.” Badiꞌa Ubuga
5.16: Iesuꞌa ugi vazeḡa Bana Madaḡano fainiroteꞌe uꞌano, Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Iesu rae sausauniro.
5.17: Rehano Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡe Mamaꞌa mada niduꞌa gaueꞌohe onao izidi, eꞌanoꞌo eḡe zuni gaueꞌohe.”
5.18: Iesuꞌa ꞌouge reiro ꞌahine, Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ani matihi radu ufeta inariro. Aꞌe mene mazaḡa Iesuꞌa Bana Madaḡa goroḡa variꞌiroteꞌe daꞌo, rehano mazaḡa ani aneꞌa bare, “Badiꞌaꞌe eḡe Mama,” radu aneꞌa bare Badiꞌa teite idaniro.
5.19: Ebu Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, Badiꞌa Ubugaꞌe ane daꞌo ḡau ꞌahoga haḡaogaꞌe mene idaḡa, rehano Moganiꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa horonadu eꞌe hegote haḡaeꞌohe. Mazaḡa Moganiꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa Badiꞌa Ubuga zuni haḡaeꞌohe.
5.20: Mogaꞌe ani Ubuga zamare borofeꞌohe, ebu aniꞌa nagini haḡaeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa niduꞌa Ubuga ihoneꞌohe. Ebu ꞌahiguḡa ufeta vitineꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa Ubuga ihonadu zae mae zaguzaguziꞌuma.
5.21: Moganiꞌa rune azaḡa mae ḡihizadu ḡabozeꞌeteꞌe teige, Ubuga zuni aneꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ḡabone ziniꞌohe.
5.22: Ebu Moganiꞌa vaze ꞌahoga mene kotazeꞌohe, rehano kota gauḡa niduꞌaꞌe Ubuga ꞌevora tiro.
5.23: Eꞌanoꞌo vaze niduꞌaꞌe Moga gubaneꞌeteꞌe teige, Ubuga zuni gubaniꞌuma. Iniu Ubuga mene gubaneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ani tuḡuniroteꞌe Moga mene gubaneꞌohe.
5.24: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniu eḡe ḡoere igiꞌeteꞌe zu eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiro. Badiꞌaꞌa ani mene kotaneꞌohe ebu aniꞌe runeonoꞌo ḡabone meiro.
5.25: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, rune azaḡaniꞌa Baidꞌa Ubuga ago igiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma, ebu izidi feureha. Ani ago igiꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ḡabodiꞌuma.
5.26: Mogaꞌe vaze ḡabozeꞌeteꞌe ḡaboneḡa meiroteꞌe teige, Ubuga zuni hanadu Ubugaꞌe ḡabozeꞌeteꞌe ḡaboneḡa meiro.
5.27: Ebu aniꞌe Vaze Ubuga radu Moganiꞌa vaze kotazeꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa haro.
5.28: Eꞌe moneo ago zaguzaganoꞌi, mazaḡa mada ꞌahoganiꞌa arine, rune azaḡa niduꞌa iduonoꞌo Ubuga ago igiꞌuma,
5.29: ebu ze bare ḡabodiꞌuma. Manoḡa haḡairoteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ḡabone veize bare ḡabodiꞌuma, u sauꞌa haḡairoteꞌe azaḡaꞌe kotazoga veize bare ḡabodiꞌuma.
5.30: E ḡau ꞌahoga eḡeꞌa bare haḡaogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Mamaꞌa ihiꞌeteꞌe idunaḡano, e vaze kotazeꞌohe. Eḡe kotaꞌe duduḡa, mazaḡa e eḡe urao mene haḡaeꞌohe, rehano eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa urao haḡaeꞌohe.” Iesu moneo rae Fureniro
5.31: “E eḡeꞌa bare eḡe moneo rae furenine, za mene mae ḡihihiꞌuma.
5.32: Rehano Mamaꞌa eḡe veize rae fureneꞌohe. E edeḡa, ane eḡe moneo rae fureneꞌetaꞌaꞌe hube.
5.33: Zaꞌa vaze nu Ioane vaḡe tuḡuzirotene, ani eḡe moneo ḡoere huga rae fureniro.
5.34: E vazeꞌa eḡe moneo rae furenoga mene urateꞌohe. Rehano e Ioane ḡoereꞌe hube rae ziꞌetaꞌaꞌe zaꞌa ani ḡoere egadu ḡabone hidoga veize raꞌohe.
5.35: Ioaneꞌe ihure duhuḡa teige zamaze aganiro, ebu za mada tahiḡa ani agaḡano matuꞌihi reiro.
5.36: Rehano eḡe moneo rae fureneꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa ꞌahogaꞌe eḡe mazao eꞌe. Aꞌe Ioaneꞌa eḡe moneo rae fureniroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa vitinoga. Mamaꞌa eḡe mazao gau nu enadu 'Haḡae hauḡoꞌi,' reiro, ebu e izidi eꞌe gauḡa niduꞌa haḡaeꞌohe. Eꞌe gauḡa niduꞌa Mamaꞌa eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe rae fureneꞌohe.
5.37: Ebu Mamaꞌa eḡe tuḡuhadu ani aneꞌa bare eḡe moneo rae fureniro. Rehano za ani ago mene hune igiro zu iraḡa mene hune horoniro.
5.38: Za aniꞌa tuḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡa mazao mene fieꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, ani ḡoereꞌe zae zamao mene radiuꞌohe.
5.39: Zaꞌe Buka Zaḡoḡa faifaine ḡianeꞌohe, mazaḡa eꞌe ḡianine, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma rae zamareꞌohe. Buka Zaḡoḡaniꞌa eḡe moneo rae fureneꞌohe.
5.40: Rehano za eḡe vaḡe aradu ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidoga hezahohauꞌohe.
5.41: E vazeꞌa niguheꞌeteꞌe mene mae ḡihineꞌohe.
5.42: E edeḡa, za zamaze niduꞌa hina Badiꞌa mene zamareꞌohe.
5.43: Eꞌe Mamahe niḡano ariro, rehano za e mene mae ḡihiheꞌohe. U vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ane niḡano arine, za ani mae ḡihiniꞌuma.
5.44: Za zaeꞌa bare nigutiteꞌohe, rehano Badiꞌa tibuhuganiꞌa za niguzoga mene uratadu eꞌe veizeꞌe mene inareꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo zaꞌa eḡe mazao fioga zuni mene idaḡa.
5.45: Eḡeꞌa Mama ubumao za kotao ohoziꞌuma rae ago zamaroꞌi. Za kotao ohozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Mose. Zaꞌe Mose goro ḡoeꞌa hegotadu ḡabone hidiꞌuma rae zamareꞌohe.
5.46: Zaeꞌa Mose mae ḡihinifone, eḡe mazao fifo, mazaḡa aniꞌe Buka Zaḡoḡano eḡe moneo mirihiro.
5.47: Rehano za Moseꞌa mirihiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe mene mae ḡihineꞌohe. Tena nougenouge eḡe ḡoere mae ḡihiniꞌuma?”

6.1: Eꞌe enogano Iesuꞌe Galilea duꞌuraḡa, niḡa ꞌahogaꞌe Tiberia, moneafa fare onamiro.
6.2: Ebu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ani hegotiro, mazaḡa ze aniꞌa ugi azaḡa mazao haḡairoteꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa horoniro.
6.3: Ebu Iesuꞌa maḡa itadu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite eꞌea ehoriro.
6.4: Iuda azaḡa Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡaꞌe hanitiro.
6.5: Iesuꞌa dude ehamanadu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ane vaḡe areꞌeteꞌe horonirotene, Filipi ḡadiniro, “Eme vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ꞌadi ḡubuzoga veize ꞌuvahu odogaꞌe nouma hoitiꞌuma?”
6.6: Ani Filipi tuhune nurihi radu ꞌouge rae ḡadimaro, mazaḡa ani aneꞌa bare nagini haḡaiꞌuma rae ederiro.
6.7: Ebu Filipiꞌa naenaeniro, “Bato fuꞌo uḡidu fare gauḡa hadiḡa hina ꞌuvahu odoga hoitadu, ze tibatiba anoga veize tahitahe zinine zuni mene idaraꞌuma.”
6.8: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌa ꞌahoga, Simona Petero negoḡa, Andereaꞌa niro,
6.9: “ꞌAdao tahiꞌa ohozeḡa ꞌahoga mazaoꞌe ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo zu ḡozone aheu eꞌe, rehano vaze ufeta ḡehaḡa uꞌano mene idaraꞌuma.”
6.10: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Vaze niduꞌa ehoroꞌi rae zoꞌi.” Aꞌe ve ḡunuḡa habaꞌa uꞌano, zeḡe niduꞌa eꞌe rana ehoriro. Zeḡe boꞌaḡano ohoze niduꞌaꞌe 5,000 heuḡa.
6.11: Ebu Iesuꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga madu Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi reiro, ebu eꞌea ehore radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ḡahugiro. Ebu ḡozone zuni ꞌouge haḡadu zeḡe urao borofe aro.
6.12: Vaze niduꞌa au ubararotene, Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Ogomu ḡahaꞌaḡahaꞌa ago mode tauḡoꞌi, rehano niduꞌa nuꞌonoꞌi.”
6.13: Eꞌanoꞌo ꞌuvahu odoga fuꞌo hina vaze niduꞌa borofe aroteꞌe enogano modiroteꞌe ogomuḡa nuꞌonirotene, tunahu niduꞌa gaubanana aheu fare iri'avoniro.
6.14: Iesuꞌa haḡai nu badeḡa haḡairoteꞌe vaze niduꞌa horonadu ꞌahige ḡadahe ḡoeriro, “Hube hune vaze ꞌadiꞌe raha ꞌahao ariꞌuma rae reiroteꞌe peroveta vazeḡa!”
6.15: Iesuꞌe zeꞌa aradu inaraze hina ani obone kinio ohonihi rae ederiro. ꞌOugadu ane daꞌo maḡa bare itiro. Vu rana Onamiro (Mataio 14:22-27; Mareko 6:45-52)
6.16: Ḡoravararotene, Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe Galilea duꞌuraḡa ovoiro.
6.17: Uzaborarotene, Iesuꞌa zeḡe vaḡe mene ariroteꞌe uꞌano, ze ḡasio tiriro ebu duꞌura moneafa faradu Kaperanauma onamiro.
6.18: Ebu zavara boroꞌa feuradu saꞌuꞌa vu kafeniro.
6.19: Ze fuꞌo ga fuꞌo tiba fare kilomita reve onamirotene, Iesuꞌa vu rana onamadu ḡasize hanitiroteꞌe horoniro. ꞌOugadu ze rihau rudaro.
6.20: Rehano aneꞌa ziro, “ꞌAdiꞌe eḡe. Ago rihanoꞌi.”
6.21: Eꞌebone ze ani ḡasio mae zouniro ebu ḡasiꞌe zeḡeꞌa onameꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano zogone hebetiro.
6.22: Irarirotene, duꞌura moneafao radiuꞌeteꞌe vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ederiro, ohoḡoreꞌe ḡasi tiba daꞌo eꞌea radiro, ebu Iesuꞌe ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite ḡasio mene tiradu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa daꞌo onamiro.
6.23: Eꞌe madaḡano ḡasi nuꞌe Tiberiaonoꞌo ariro, ebu Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa kuranadu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ꞌuvahu odoga hina ḡubuziroteꞌe habaꞌano hebetiro.
6.24: Ebu Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ehamanadu Iesu zu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe deꞌea mene horozirotene, ḡasizeo tiradu Iesu vaḡe Kaperanauma onamiro. Iesuꞌe Ḡabone Ziniꞌeteꞌe Ogomuḡa
6.25: Ze Iesu duꞌura moneafao horonadu ḡadiniro, “Rabi, ḡa naniꞌa ꞌaha feureha?”
6.26: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, za eḡe vaḡeꞌetaꞌaꞌe, mene mazaḡa eḡeꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa horoneha, rehano mazaḡa ꞌuvahu odoga au idaraneha.
6.27: Ruhuruꞌeteꞌe ogomuḡa veize ago gauoꞌi, rehano ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidifine mene hauḡeꞌeteꞌe ogomuḡa veize gauoꞌi. Eꞌe ogomuḡaꞌe Vaze Ubuganiꞌa ziniꞌuma, mazaḡa aniꞌe ꞌouge haḡaoga veize Moga Badiꞌaꞌa ohoniro.”
6.28: Ebu zeḡeꞌa ḡadiniro, “Badiꞌa gauḡa haḡaifine eme nougiꞌuma?”
6.29: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Badiꞌa gauḡaꞌe aneꞌa tuḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡa mazao fieꞌeteꞌe raꞌohe.”
6.30: Zeḡeꞌa niro, “Eme horonadu ḡae mazao fioga veize, ḡa haḡai nu badeḡa ꞌahoga haḡaoꞌi. Ḡa nagi haḡai nu badeḡa haḡaiꞌuma?
6.31: Buka Zaḡoḡano Moseꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa moneo ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Vaze niduꞌa anoga veize aniꞌa adureonoꞌo ogomu ziniro.' Eꞌe teige, eme vouḡaꞌe haba bohaꞌano onamiroteꞌe zamaḡano mana aro.”
6.32: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, adureonoꞌo ogomu ziniroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe mene Mose, rehano eḡe Mama. Aniꞌa adureonoꞌo ogomu huga ziniꞌohe.
6.33: Badiꞌaꞌa ziniꞌeteꞌe ogomuḡaꞌe adureonoꞌo ovadu raha ꞌadi azaḡa ḡabone ziniꞌohe.”
6.34: Zeḡeꞌa niro, “Vaze boro, eꞌe ogomuḡaꞌe mada niduꞌa rifoꞌi.”
6.35: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eꞌe ḡabone ziniꞌeteꞌe ogomuḡa. Iniu eḡe vaḡe areꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe mene hune vininiꞌuma, ebu iniu eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe iriga mene hune moꞌoniꞌuma.
6.36: Rehano e ibite ziroteꞌe teige, zaꞌe e horoheha rehano, eḡe mazao mene fieꞌohe.
6.37: Mamaꞌa iniꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe eḡe vaḡe ariꞌuma, ebu iniu eḡe vaḡe areꞌeteꞌe vazaḡaꞌe eḡeꞌa mene hune hegone vaḡiniꞌuma.
6.38: Eḡeꞌa eḡe ura haḡaoga veize adureonoꞌo mene ovairo, rehano eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa ura haḡaoga veize ovairo.
6.39: Ebu eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa uraꞌe, aniꞌa iniroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano tiba zuni eḡeꞌa mene daunadu, mada ḡonagano zeḡe niduꞌa bare ḡabozeꞌeteꞌe raꞌohe.
6.40: Eḡe Mamaꞌe iniu Ubuga horonadu ane mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidoga urateꞌohe. E mada ḡonagano ze bare ḡaboziꞌuma.”
6.41: Ebu Iuda azaḡaniꞌa Iesu moneo gumude ḡoeriro, mazaḡa ani aneꞌa bare adureonoꞌo ovairoteꞌe ogomuḡa rae reiro.
6.42: Ebu ze ꞌahige rae reiro, “Vaze ꞌahiꞌe Iosefa ubuga Iesu. Eme ani viꞌa zu moga edeḡa. Ani nougadu, 'Eꞌe adureonoꞌo ovairo,' rae raꞌohe?”
6.43: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Za eḡe moneo ago gumude ḡoeroꞌi.
6.44: Mamaheꞌa eḡe tuḡuhiro. Eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌa vaze mene ibitohaune, vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa eḡe vaḡe aroga mene idaḡa. Eḡe vaḡe areꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe mada ḡonagano eḡeꞌa bare ḡaboniꞌuma.
6.45: Buka Zaḡoḡano peroveta azaḡaniꞌa ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Badiꞌaꞌa zeḡe niduꞌa ihoziꞌuma.' Iniu Mama ḡoere egohuꞌeteꞌe zu ani mazaonoꞌo edeḡa maꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe eḡe vaḡe areꞌohe.
6.46: Vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa Mama mene horoniro, rehano Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ariroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa daꞌo Mama horoniro.
6.47: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniu eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiro.
6.49: Zae vouḡaꞌe haba bohaꞌano mana aro, rehano ze rudaro.
6.50: U ogomu ꞌadiꞌe adureonoꞌo ovadu iniuꞌa eꞌe aune, ani mene rudaꞌuma.
6.51: Eꞌe adureonoꞌo ovadu ḡabone ziniꞌeteꞌe ogomuḡa. Iniu ogomu ꞌahi aune, radiu tuḡutuḡiꞌuma. Eꞌe ogomuḡaꞌe eḡe ahiri. Raha ꞌadi azaḡa ḡabozifine, eḡeꞌa ahirihe ziniꞌuma.”
6.52: Ebu Iuda azaḡaniꞌa zeḡeꞌa bare taꞌirotiteꞌenaꞌa, ꞌahige rae reiro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe nougenouge ahiꞌa rifadu eme aꞌuma?”
6.53: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, za Vaze Ubuga ahiri mene aune zu ruḡa mene gagine, zamazeo ḡaboneꞌe oꞌoꞌa.
6.54: Iniu eḡe ahiri auꞌeteꞌe zu ruhe gageꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiro, ebu mada ḡonagano eḡeꞌa ani bare ḡaboniꞌuma.
6.55: Mazaḡa eḡe ahiriꞌe ogomu huga zu eḡe ruꞌe vu huga.
6.56: Iniu eḡe ahiri auꞌeteꞌe zu eḡe ru gageꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe teite tiburanadu radiuꞌohe, ebu eḡe zuni ani teite tiburanadu radiuꞌohe.
6.57: Mama ḡabode radiuꞌeteꞌeꞌa tuḡuhiro, zu ani uꞌano eḡe zuni ḡabodeꞌohe. Eꞌe teige, iniu eḡe ahiri auꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe uꞌano ḡabodiꞌuma.
6.58: Eꞌe adureonoꞌo ovairoteꞌe ogomuḡa huga. Ogomu ꞌahiꞌe mene vouḡazeꞌa aroteꞌe ogomuḡa heuḡa. Ze oganadu vesuꞌu rudaro. U ogomu ꞌahi auꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidiꞌuma.”
6.59: Iesuꞌa ꞌadi ḡoeꞌa Kaperanauma nu'onu'o neḡano ihoziroteꞌe zamaḡano ziro. Iesu Tahiꞌa Ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesu Muhiniro
6.60: Iesu tahiꞌa ḡehaḡaniꞌa ani ḡoere eꞌe egadu ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ani ihoreꞌe riḡa. Iniuꞌa eꞌe mae ḡihiniꞌuma?”
6.61: Iesuꞌe ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ḡoere eꞌe uꞌano gumudeꞌeteꞌe ederadu ziro, “Ḡoere eꞌe uꞌano zamaze aduduꞌehe?
6.62: Tena za Vaze Ubuganiꞌa ibite radiroteꞌe habaꞌa bare itoga horonine, nougiꞌuma?
6.63: Badiꞌa Vineꞌe ḡabone ziniꞌohe. Vaze inaraonoꞌo ḡabone hidoga mene idaḡa. Eḡeꞌa zeateꞌe ḡoeꞌanonoꞌo za Badiꞌa Vine maꞌohe zu ḡabone hideꞌohe.
6.64: Rehano zae boꞌaḡano nuꞌe eḡe mazao mene fieꞌohe.” Iesuꞌe ḡadaheḡanonoꞌo iniuꞌa ani mazao mene firotaꞌaꞌe zu iniuꞌa revohatitaꞌaꞌe ederiro ꞌahine, ꞌouge reiro.
6.65: Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “Eꞌe uꞌano, e ibite ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Mamaꞌa iniu eḡe vaḡe aroga gararine, vazeni ꞌahoga zuni eḡe vaḡe arogaꞌe mene idaḡa.'”
6.66: Eꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo ane tahiꞌa ḡehaḡaniꞌa ani modadu mene bare hegotiro.
6.67: Ebu Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare ḡadiziro, “Zae zuni eḡe modihi raꞌehe?”
6.68: Simona Peteroꞌa naenaeniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu rifiꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe ḡae mazao, eꞌanoꞌo eme ḡa mene modiꞌuma.
6.69: Eme ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ariroteꞌe Vazeḡa Zaḡoḡa rae fieꞌohe zu edereꞌohe.”
6.70: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “E za, gaubanana aheu fare ohoziro, rehano zae boꞌaḡano vaze tibaꞌe Diaboloꞌa ragano reiro.”
6.71: Iesuꞌa Isakariota vazeḡa Simona ubuga, Iuda moneo ꞌouge reiro. Ani zuni Iesu tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare boꞌaḡano tahiꞌa ꞌahoga, rehano vesuꞌu Iesu revohatiteꞌe vazeḡa reiro.

7.1: Eꞌe enogano Iesuꞌa Galilea habaꞌano ragave onamiro. Ani Iudea habaꞌano ragavoga mene uratiro, mazaḡa eꞌea Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ani matihi radu guhine radiro.
7.2: Ebu Iuda azaḡa mui ꞌahoga, Taruha Muiḡaniꞌa hanitiro.
7.3: ꞌOugadu Iesu negoḡa duḡuruꞌa Iesu niro, “Ḡa haba ꞌahi modadu Iudea habaꞌa onamoꞌi. ꞌOugine ḡa hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ḡaeꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe haḡai gigiꞌaḡa horoniꞌuma.
7.4: Iniu ane bare vaze mazao furenihi raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe gau ꞌahoga mene sifu haḡaeꞌohe. Ḡa haḡai ꞌahiguḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, raha ꞌadi azaḡa niduꞌa mazao ḡaeꞌa bare fureꞌoꞌi.”
7.5: Iesu negoḡa duḡuruꞌa ꞌouge nirotaꞌaꞌe mazaḡa zeḡe zuni ani mene mae ḡihiniro.
7.6: Ebu Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Izidiꞌe eḡeꞌa mene onamiteꞌe madaḡa, rehano za zae ura madaḡano onamogaꞌe idaḡa.
7.7: Raha ꞌadi azaḡaꞌe za mene heꞌeheꞌezeꞌohe, u eꞌe heꞌeheꞌeheꞌohe, mazaḡa e haḡaizeꞌe sauꞌa rae fureneꞌohe.
7.8: Za mui eꞌe veize onamoꞌi. E izidiꞌe mui eꞌe veize mene onamiꞌuma, mazaḡa eḡe madaꞌe ꞌize mene feureha.”
7.9: Ani ꞌouge rae zeadu Galilea habaꞌano radiro.
7.10: Iesu negoḡa duḡuruꞌe mui eꞌe uꞌa itiroteꞌe enogano ani vazeꞌa mene ederifine vesuꞌu sifu itiro.
7.11: Ebu Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa mui madaḡano Iesu vaḡe ragaveꞌenaꞌa, vaze eꞌea ḡadimaro, “Vaze aꞌe noumao?”
7.12: Ebu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesu moneo gumudiro. Nuꞌe raenaꞌa, “Aniꞌe vaze manoḡa,” ebu nuꞌe raenaꞌa, “Mene, ani vaze soꞌozeꞌohe,” rae reiro.
7.13: Rehano ze Iuda azaḡa boroboro rihoziro ꞌahine, Iesu moneo hunio mene rae fureniro. Kuru Neḡano Ihoziro
7.14: Mui eꞌe ḡahaꞌa hauḡirotene, Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌa itadu vaze ḡadahe ihoziro.
7.15: ꞌOugadu Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe zaguzaganadu ꞌahige rae reiro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe mene hune mirihiro, rehano ani edeḡa ꞌahiguḡaꞌe nougenouge meiro?”
7.16: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡe ihoreꞌe mene eḡe mazaonoꞌo, rehano eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa mazaonoꞌo ariro.
7.17: Iniu Badiꞌa ura haḡaihi raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ederiꞌuma, eḡe ihoreꞌe Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ariro ga eḡe edeḡanonoꞌo ariro.
7.18: Iniu ane edeḡano ḡoereꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe vazeꞌa ani nigunoga urateꞌohe. U ani tuḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡa nigunoga urateꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡoere huga raꞌohe zu ani mazao veꞌoḡa oꞌoꞌa.
7.19: Moseꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa za ziniro, rehano zae boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoga zuni eꞌe mene hegoteꞌohe. Nougadu za e uḡuhe ruhihi raꞌohe?”
7.20: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa naenaeniro, “Vine sauꞌaniꞌa ḡa ragano reiro! Ḡa ḡame nuriꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa.”
7.21: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa Bana Madaḡano haḡai gigiꞌa ꞌahoga haḡadu zae niduꞌa zaguzagauꞌohe.
7.22: Moseꞌa ahiri rana iḡuri haḡaeꞌeteꞌe goroḡa ḡoeꞌa ziniro. (Ahiri rana iḡuri haḡaeꞌeteꞌe goroḡa ḡoeꞌaꞌe mene Moseonoꞌo, rehano ꞌizema Moseꞌa fureranogano vouḡazeonoꞌo ariro.) Eꞌanoꞌo za Bana Madaḡano zuni tahiꞌa komeꞌa ahiri rana iḡuri haḡaeꞌohe.
7.23: Za Mose goro ḡoeꞌa mene variꞌoga veize, mada tibatiba Bana Madaḡano zuni tahiꞌa komeꞌa ahiri rana iḡuri haḡaeꞌohe. Tena eḡeꞌa Bana Madaḡano vaze ꞌahoga ahiri niduꞌa fainiroteꞌe uꞌano, za nougadu eḡe mazao maḡuneꞌohe?
7.24: Zaꞌe vaze enona daꞌo ḡianadu veꞌoḡa rae ago roꞌi. Rehano huga ḡianadu duduḡa ga veꞌoḡa rae roꞌi.” Iesuꞌe Kerisohe?
7.25: Eꞌe madaḡano Ierusalemao radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ḡadimutitiro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe zeꞌa matihi rae inareꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.
7.26: Ani hunio ḡoereꞌohe, rehano ze ani rana ḡoere ꞌahoga mene raꞌohe. Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa zuni aniꞌe hube hune Keriso raꞌeteꞌe mae ḡihineꞌehe?
7.27: Rehano aniꞌe mene Keriso, mazaḡa eme vaze ꞌadi noumanoꞌo arirotaꞌaꞌe edeḡa. Kerisoꞌa arine, vazeni ꞌahoga zuni ani noumanoꞌo ariroteꞌe mene ederiꞌuma.”
7.28: Ebu Iesu ꞌize kuru neḡa habaꞌano ihozeꞌeteꞌea, ani ḡihau ḡoeriro, “Oꞌe, za e edeḡa ebu e noumanoꞌo arirotaꞌaꞌe edeḡa. Rehano e eḡe edeḡano mene ariro. Eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe Badiꞌaꞌe hube hune. Za ani aḡuꞌa.
7.29: U e ani edeḡa, mazaḡa eꞌe ani mazaonoꞌo ariro zu aniꞌa eḡe tuḡuhiro.”
7.30: ꞌOuge reirotene, ze Iesu obone ti nuriro, rehano vaze ꞌahoga ꞌevoꞌa hina mene oboniro, mazaḡa ani madaḡaniꞌa ꞌize mene feuriro.
7.31: Rehano vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze ḡehaḡaꞌe Iesu mazao fiadu reiro, “Kerisoꞌa aradu haḡai nu badeḡa haḡaine zuni, vaze ꞌadi mene ufeta vitine haḡaiꞌuma!”
7.32: Farisea azaḡaꞌe vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesu moneo ꞌouge gumude ḡoeriroteꞌe igiro. Eꞌanoꞌo dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa Iesu obone tihi radu kuru neḡa uti azaḡa tuḡuziro.
7.33: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa ziro, “E zae teite mada tahiḡa daꞌo radadu eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa vaḡe onamiꞌuma.
7.34: Za eḡe vaḡiꞌuma, rehano mene horohiꞌuma. Ebu zaꞌe eḡeꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa onamogaꞌe mene idaḡa.”
7.35: Ebu Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare ḡadimutitiro, “Ani noꞌe onamiꞌuma ꞌahine, eme ani mene horoniꞌuma raꞌohe? Ani Iuda azaḡaniꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe Giriki azaḡa haba onamadu Giriki azaḡa ihoziꞌumahe?
7.36: Aniꞌa ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Za eḡe vaḡiꞌuma, rehano mene horohiꞌuma, ebu eḡeꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa aroga zuni mene idaḡa.' Eꞌe hugaꞌe nagini?” Ḡabone Vuḡa
7.37: Mui ḡonaga madaḡaꞌe mada boro hune. Iesuꞌa edau iḡunadu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa huze ziro, “Iniu iriga moꞌoneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe vaḡe aroꞌi ebu gagoꞌi.
7.38: Buka Zaḡoḡano reiroteꞌe teige, iniu eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone vuḡaniꞌa vu boro teige ane zamaḡanonoꞌo sore buaꞌuma.”
7.39: Aneꞌa ḡabone vuḡa reirotaꞌaꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡa moneo rae radu iniu ani mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe eꞌe hidiꞌuma rae reiro. Rehano eꞌe madaḡano Vine Zaḡoḡaꞌe ze ꞌize mene hidiro, mazaḡa Iesuꞌe ꞌize satauro rana mene rudanadu ani niꞌe mene mae ḡihiniro.
7.40: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ḡoere eꞌe igirotene, nuꞌe ꞌahige rae reiro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe hube hune peroveta vazeḡa. Aꞌe emeḡeꞌa guhineꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.”
7.41: U vaze nuꞌe raenaꞌa, “Aniꞌe Keriso,” ebu nuꞌe raenaꞌa, “Mene, Kerisoꞌe Galilea habaꞌanonoꞌo mene ariꞌuma.
7.42: Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Kerisoꞌe kini Davida mariganonoꞌo zu Davida ne Betelehemaonoꞌo ariꞌuma.' ”
7.43: Eꞌanoꞌo vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaꞌe Iesu uꞌano aꞌadaro.
7.44: Vaze nuꞌe ani obone tihi reiro, rehano vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa ani rana ꞌevore mene tiro. Vaze Boroboroꞌa Iesu mazao Mene Firo
7.45: Ebu kuru neḡa uti azaḡaniꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Farisea azaḡa vaḡe bare onamiro. Ebu zeꞌa uti azaḡa ḡadiziro, “Za nougadu ani mene obone teadu tutune areha?”
7.46: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeziro, “Vaze ꞌadi teige ḡoere manoḡa ḡoeriroteꞌe vazaḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa!”
7.47: Farisea azaḡaniꞌa ziro, “Zae zuni aniꞌa soꞌozahe?
7.48: Vaze ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ga Farisea azaḡa boꞌaḡano ani mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoga eꞌehe? Mene!
7.49: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa ꞌahiꞌe Mose goro ḡoeꞌa aḡuꞌa ꞌahine, ani mazao fieꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo ze radiu tuḡutuḡu adugaḡa hidiꞌuma!”
7.50: Ibite Iesu vaḡe onamiroteꞌe vazeḡa, Nikodemo zuni Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoga. Aniꞌa ḡadiziro,
7.51: “Emeḡe goro idunaḡano, emeꞌe vaze ḡoere egadu aniꞌa nagini haḡaeꞌeteꞌe ꞌizema ederogano aniꞌe veꞌoḡa rae mene raꞌohe.”
7.52: ꞌOugadu zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡae zuni Galilea vazeḡahe? Buka Zaḡoḡa bare meꞌodoꞌi, ꞌougine peroveta vazeḡani ꞌahoga Galilea habaꞌano mene fureruꞌetaꞌaꞌe ederiꞌuma.”
7.53: Ebu ze zeḡezeḡe ne oname ḡouriro.

8.2: Irarirotene, oherebau uzeuze ani kuru neḡa habaꞌa onamiro. Ebu vaze niduꞌa ani vaḡe onamirotene, ani ehoradu ihoziro.
8.3: Ebu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa ubuma ḡezo roḡaeḡa ꞌahoga obone teadu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa zamao ohone tiro.
8.4: Ebu ze Iesu niro, “Ihore vazeḡa, roḡae ꞌadaꞌa ubuma ḡezo haḡaeꞌeteꞌe emeḡeꞌa horonadu obone teha.
8.5: Mose goro ḡoeꞌano Moseꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, ꞌRoḡae ꞌuguḡaꞌe hadi hina mau runoꞌi.' Ḡaꞌe nouge rae zamareꞌohe?”
8.6: Ze ani tuhune nurihi radu ꞌouge rae ḡadimaro, mazaḡa aniꞌa veꞌore naenaezine ani kotao mae ohonihi reiro. Rehano Iesuꞌa ḡuḡuradu ꞌevoꞌa hina rahao mirihiro.
8.7: Ze Iesu barebare ḡadinirotene, aniꞌa iḡune edanadu ziro, “Zae boꞌaḡano iniu mazao haḡai sauꞌa oꞌoꞌa vazeḡaniꞌa ibite geno hadi hina ani mau bohinoꞌi.”
8.8: Ebu ani bare ḡuḡuradu ꞌevoꞌa hina rahao mirihiro.
8.9: Ze Iesu ḡoere igirotene, ze tibatiba iḡune ḡouriro. Vaze boroboroꞌa ibitiro ebu komeꞌakomeꞌaꞌe vesuꞌu iḡuniro. Ebu Iesu ane daꞌo roḡae edauꞌeteꞌe teite eꞌea radiro.
8.10: Ebu Iesuꞌa bare iḡune edanadu roḡae eꞌe ḡadiniro, “Roḡae, ze noumao? Ḡaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡani ꞌahogaꞌe oꞌoꞌahe?”
8.11: Aneꞌa naenaeniro, “Vazeni ꞌahoga oꞌoꞌa, vaze boro.” Iesuꞌa niro, “Eḡe zuni ḡaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae mene raꞌohe. Onamoꞌi, ebu izidionoꞌo zama moneo haḡai sauꞌa ago bare haḡaoꞌi.” Iesuꞌe Raha ꞌAdi Agaḡa
8.12: Iesuꞌa bare ḡoeriro, “Eꞌe raha ꞌadi agaḡa. Iniu eḡe hegoteꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe uzabo zamaḡano mene hune ragaviꞌuma, rehano ḡabone hideꞌeteꞌe agaḡa meꞌuma.”
8.13: Farisea azaḡaniꞌa niro, “Ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare ḡae moneo rae fureneꞌohe. Aꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa!”
8.14: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “E eḡeꞌa bare eḡe moneo rae fureneꞌohe, rehano eḡe ḡoereꞌe huga, mazaḡa e noumanoꞌo ariroteꞌe zu noꞌe onamitaꞌaꞌe edeḡa. U zaꞌe eḡeꞌa noumanoꞌo ariroteꞌe zu noꞌe onamitaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa.
8.15: Za raha azaḡa zamarone idunaḡano iniuꞌe duduḡa ga veꞌoḡa rae raꞌohe. Rehano e vaze ꞌahoga mazao duduḡa ga veꞌoḡa rae mene raꞌohe.
8.16: Rehano eḡeꞌa vaze mazao duduḡa ga veꞌoḡa rae reine zuni, aꞌe duduga, mazaḡa mene eḡe daꞌo, rehano eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe Mamaheꞌa eḡe teite radiuꞌohe.
8.17: Zae goro ḡoeꞌano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Vaze aheuꞌe ḡoere tiba reine, aꞌe hube.'
8.18: E eḡeꞌa bare eḡe moneo rae fureneꞌohe, ebu eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe Mamahe zuni eḡe moneo rae fureneꞌohe.”
8.19: Ebu zeḡeꞌa ḡadiniro, “ꞌOugadu mogoꞌe noumao?” Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Za eḡe zu Mamaꞌe aḡuꞌa. Zaeꞌa eḡe ederifone, eḡe Mama zuni ederifo.”
8.20: Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌano ḡahunone hadiḡa ufeꞌeteꞌe maḡuḡa uhiḡano ihozeꞌeteꞌea, ḡoere ꞌadi ziro. Rehano ani madaꞌe ꞌize mene feuriro ꞌahine, ze ani mene obone tiro. Iesuꞌa Ane Rune moneo Ihoziro
8.21: Iesuꞌa bare ziro, “Eꞌe oname dauḡiꞌuma, u zaꞌe eḡe vaḡiꞌuma, rehano za haḡaize sauꞌa zamaḡano rudaꞌuma. Ebu eḡeꞌa onamiteꞌe habaꞌaꞌe zaꞌa aroga mene idaḡa.”
8.22: Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare ḡadimutitiro, “Ani aneꞌa bare maꞌumahe? Mazaḡa aniꞌa onamiteꞌe habaꞌaꞌe emeḡeꞌa onamogaꞌe mene idaḡa rae raꞌohe.”
8.23: Rehano Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe ꞌuꞌuḡanonoꞌo ariro, u eꞌe hitanaonoꞌo ariro. Zaꞌe raha ꞌadi azaḡa, u eꞌe raha ꞌadi mene vazeḡa.
8.24: Eꞌanoꞌo e zeha, 'Za haḡaize sauꞌa zamaḡano rudaꞌuma.' Za eḡeꞌa eḡe moneo iniu rae raꞌeteꞌe mene mae ḡihinine, za haḡaize sauꞌa zamaḡano rudaꞌuma.”
8.25: Zeḡeꞌa ḡadiniro, “Tena ḡa iniu?” Iesuꞌa ziro, “E ḡadaheḡanonoꞌo eꞌe iniu rae ziꞌohe.
8.26: E zae moneo zihi raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe ḡehaḡa ebu zaꞌe veꞌoḡa raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa zuni ḡehaḡa. Rehano eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe huga radu e ani mazaonoꞌo igiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa daꞌo raha azaḡa ziꞌohe.”
8.27: Rehano ze Iesuꞌa Moga moneo zirotaꞌaꞌe mene ederiro.
8.28: Eꞌanoꞌo Iesuꞌa ziro, “Vaze Ubugaꞌe zaeꞌa satauro rana mae ḡihiniteꞌe madaḡano, za eḡeꞌa ziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe rae ederiꞌuma. Ebu e eḡe edeḡano ḡau ꞌahoga mene haḡaeꞌeteꞌe, rehano Mamaꞌa ihohiroteꞌe ḡauḡa daꞌo ḡoereꞌetaꞌaꞌe ederiꞌuma.
8.29: Eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe teite radiuꞌohe. Aniꞌe eḡe daꞌo mene mode tauḡiro, mazaḡa e iḡaiḡa aniꞌa matuꞌeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa daꞌo haḡaeꞌohe.”
8.30: Iesuꞌa ꞌouge reirotene, vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ani mazao firo. Aberahamo Mariga
8.31: Ebu Iesuꞌa Iuda azaḡa ani mazao fieꞌeteꞌe ziro, “Za eḡe ihore hegotine, hube hune eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa reꞌuma.
8.32: Ebu za ḡoere huga ederiꞌuma. Zaꞌe tuḡure azaḡa teigeꞌohe, rehano ḡoere huga eꞌeꞌa tuḡure azaḡanonoꞌo za bohaze buziꞌuma.”
8.33: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Emeꞌe Aberahamo mariga. Eme vaze ꞌahoga tuḡure azaḡa mene hune reiro. Ḡa nougadu emeꞌe tuḡure azaḡanonoꞌo bohafe bufiꞌuma raꞌohe?”
8.34: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniu haḡai sauꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe haḡai sauꞌa tuḡure vazeḡa raꞌohe.
8.35: Ebu tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe ani teite ne tibano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teite iḡaiḡa mene radiuꞌohe. U ubugaꞌe ani teite ne tibano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teite iḡaiḡa radiuꞌohe onamo tuḡutuḡu.
8.36: Eꞌanoꞌo Ubuganiꞌa za haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo bohaze buzine, zaꞌe hube hune haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo buau radiꞌuma.
8.37: E edeḡa, zaꞌe Aberahamo mariga. Rehano eḡe ḡoereꞌe zae zamao oꞌoꞌa uꞌano, za eḡe uḡuhe ruhihi raꞌohe.
8.38: E Mamaꞌa ihohiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ziꞌohe. Rehano zaꞌe moze mazaonoꞌo igiroteꞌe haḡaeꞌohe.”
8.39: Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Aberahamoꞌe emeḡe mama.” Iesuꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe Aberahamo ubugaubuga reifone, Aberahamoꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa haḡaifo.
8.40: Eꞌe Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo igiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa huga ziro, rehano za e uḡuhe ruhihi raꞌohe. Aberahamoꞌe mene ꞌougiro.
8.41: Zaꞌe zae mozeꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa haḡaeꞌohe.” Ebu zeḡeꞌa niro, “Emeꞌe mene butu ega. Badiꞌa ane daꞌoꞌe emeḡe Mama.”
8.42: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Badiꞌaꞌe Moze reifone, za e zamare borofifo, mazaḡa e Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo aradu izidi ꞌaha radiuꞌohe. E eḡeꞌa bare mene ariro, rehano aniꞌa tuḡuhadu ariro.
8.43: Za nougadu eḡeꞌa raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa mene edereꞌohe? Mazaḡa zaꞌe eḡe ḡoere egoga mene urateꞌohe.
8.44: Mozeꞌe Diabolo, ebu zaꞌe moze ura haḡaihi raꞌohe. Aniꞌe ḡadaheḡanonoꞌo vaze maro zu hugano mene haḡaeꞌohe, mazaḡa ani zamaoꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa. Aniꞌa ḡurireꞌetaꞌaꞌe ane haḡai, mazaḡa aniꞌe ḡuriro vazeḡa, zu ḡuriro niduꞌaꞌe ani mazaonoꞌo fureruꞌohe.
8.45: Eḡeꞌa ḡoere huga ziꞌe ꞌahine, za eḡe mazao mene fieꞌohe.
8.46: Zae boꞌaḡano iniuꞌa eḡe mazao sauꞌa ꞌahoga horonadu eꞌe veꞌoḡa rae reꞌuma? E ḡoere huga raꞌohe, rehano nougadu zaꞌe eḡe mazao mene fieꞌohe?
8.47: Iniu Badiꞌa mone vazeḡaꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere igiꞌohe. Zaꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere mene igiꞌohe, mazaḡa zaꞌe Badiꞌa mene mone azaḡa.” Iesu zu Aberahamo
8.48: Ebu Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa Iesu naenaeniro, “Ḡa Samaria vazeḡa teige veꞌore ḡoereꞌohe, zu vine sauꞌaniꞌa ḡae ragano reiro. Emeḡe ḡoere ꞌahiꞌe mene duduḡahe?”
8.49: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “E mene vine sauꞌaheta, rehano Mamahe gubaneꞌohe. U zaꞌe e mene gubaheꞌohe.
8.50: E vazeꞌa nihe mae ḡihinoga mene umizeꞌohe. Rehano vazeꞌa nihe mae ḡihinoga urateꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe teite radiuꞌohe, ebu aniꞌe kota vazeḡa.
8.51: Rehano eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniuꞌa eḡe ḡoere hegotine, aniꞌe mene hune rudaꞌuma.”
8.52: Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa niro, “Izidi eme edereha, ḡaꞌe vine sauꞌaḡota! Aberahamo zu peroveta azaḡa zuni rudaro, rehano ḡa raenaꞌa, 'Iniu eḡe ḡoere hegoteꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe mene hune rudaꞌuma,' rae raꞌohe.
8.53: Ḡaꞌe emeḡe vouḡa Aberahamo ufeta vitinogahe? Aniꞌe rudaro ebu peroveta azaḡa zuni rudaro. Ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare iniu rae zamareꞌohe?”
8.54: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “E eḡeꞌa bare nihe mae ḡihinine, aꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa. Nihe mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe Mama. Aniꞌe zaeꞌa zae Badiꞌa rae huneꞌohe.
8.55: Zaꞌe ani aḡuꞌa, u eꞌe ani edeḡa. E ani aḡuꞌa rae reifone, e zae teige ḡuriro vazeḡa reifo. Rehano e ani edeḡa zu ani ḡoere hegoteꞌohe.
8.56: Zae vouḡa Aberahamoꞌe e raha ꞌada areꞌeteꞌe madaḡa horoniꞌuma rae zamaradu matuꞌe rudaro. Ebu aniꞌe eꞌe madaḡa horonadu matuꞌiro.”
8.57: Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa niro, “Ḡa muriḡo 50 ꞌize mene maha. Nougenouge hena Aberahamo horoniro?”
8.58: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, Aberahamoꞌe ꞌizema fureranogano, eꞌe radiro.”
8.59: Eꞌebone ze hadi mae ḡihinadu Iesu mau runihi reiro. Rehano ani kuru neḡa habaꞌanonoꞌo ꞌuꞌuru buanadu dauḡiro.

9.1: Iesuꞌa onamiroteꞌea, fureraroteꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa ꞌahoga horoniro.
9.2: Ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ḡadiniro, “Rabi, aniꞌa ubumaḡa kuruḡano furerarotaꞌaꞌe ane haḡai sauꞌa uꞌano ga viꞌa moga haḡai sauꞌa uꞌano?”
9.3: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Aꞌe ani mene haḡai sauꞌa ga viꞌa moga haḡai sauꞌa uꞌano, rehano ani ḡabone zamaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa nougenouge gaueꞌeteꞌe vaze ihozoga veize ani ubumaḡa kuruḡano fureraro.
9.4: Madaꞌa agaruꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano emeḡeꞌa eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa gau haḡaiꞌuma. Ohereꞌa arine, vazeni ꞌahogaꞌe gauoga mene idaḡa.
9.5: E ꞌize raha ꞌada radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡanoꞌe eꞌe raha ꞌadi agaḡa.”
9.6: Iesuꞌa ꞌouge reiroteꞌe enogano aneꞌa rahao soꞌabidiro, ebu soꞌareḡa hina taḡora haḡadu vaze eꞌe ubuma rana ase ḡuzuhiro.
9.7: Ebu aniꞌa niro, “Siloami duꞌura komeꞌa onamadu vuzuꞌoꞌi.” (Siloami hugaꞌe Tuḡuniro.) Ebu vaze eꞌeꞌa onamadu eꞌe vuḡano vuzuꞌirotene, ubumaḡaniꞌa raꞌanadu bare ariro.
9.8: ꞌOugadu ane nabudi zu aneꞌa umididoteꞌe ibite horoniroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ḡadimutitiro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe ehoradu umide banidoteꞌe vazeḡa, oꞌehe?”
9.9: Vaze nuꞌe raenaꞌa, “Oꞌe, aniꞌe vaze eꞌe,” u nuꞌe raenaꞌa, “Mene, ꞌadiꞌe ani heuḡa,” rae reiro. Rehano ani aneꞌa bare ꞌahige rae reiro, “Oꞌe, vaze aꞌe eḡe.”
9.11: Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Iesu rae huneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa taḡora haḡadu ubumahe rana ase ḡuzuheha. Ebu aniꞌa, 'Siloami duꞌura komeꞌa onamadu vuzuꞌoꞌi,' rae eheha. Eꞌanoꞌo e onamadu eꞌea vuzuꞌeha ebu ehamanogaꞌe idaraneha.”
9.12: Zeḡeꞌa ḡadiniro, “Vaze aꞌe noumao?” Aneꞌa ziro, “E aḡuꞌa.” Farisea Azaḡaꞌe Ubuma Kuruḡa Vazeḡaniꞌa Manoriroteꞌe moneo Udahiro
9.13: Ebu ze ibite ubuma kuruḡa reiroteꞌe vazeḡa zamahanadu Farisea azaḡa vaḡe onamiro.
9.14: Iesuꞌa taḡora haḡadu vaze eꞌe ubuma fainiroteꞌe madaḡaꞌe Bana Madaḡa.
9.15: Eꞌanoꞌo Farisea azaḡaniꞌa zu ḡadiniro, “Ḡa nougenouge ehamanogaꞌe idaraneha?” Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Aneꞌa taḡora haḡadu ubumahe rana ase ḡuzuheha. Ebu e vuzuꞌadu izidi ehamuꞌohe.”
9.16: Ebu Farisea azaḡa nuꞌa reiro, “Vaze aꞌe mene Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ariroteꞌe vazeḡa, mazaḡa ani Bana Madaḡa goro ḡoeꞌa mene hegoteꞌohe.” U nuꞌe reiro, “Aniꞌe haḡai sauꞌa vazeḡa reine, haḡai nu badeḡa ꞌahiguḡa haḡaogaꞌe mene idaḡa.” ꞌOugadu ze zeḡeꞌa bare rovotiro.
9.17: Eꞌanoꞌo ze ubuma kuruḡa reiroteꞌe vazeḡa bare ḡadiniro, “Ani ubumaḡo faineha. Ḡaꞌe ani iniu rae zamareꞌohe?” Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Aniꞌe peroveta vazeḡa.”
9.18: Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa ani ibite ubuma kuruḡa reiroteꞌe zu izidi ehamanoga idararoteꞌe mene mae ḡihiniro. Eꞌanoꞌo ze ani viꞌa moga huze zouziro.
9.19: Ebu zeḡeꞌa ḡadiziro, “ꞌAhiꞌe zae ubudehe? Aniꞌe hube ubumaḡa kuruḡano furerarohe? Ani nougadu izidiꞌe hena ehamuꞌohe?”
9.20: Viꞌa moganiꞌa naenaeziro, “Oꞌe, aniꞌe emeḡe ubude, ebu ani ubuma kuruḡano furerarotaꞌaꞌe emeꞌe edeḡa.
9.21: Rehano eme aḡuꞌa, ani nougenouge izidi ehamuꞌohe zu iniuꞌa ubumaḡa faineha. Nugo ḡadinoꞌi. Ani vaze boro ꞌahine, aneꞌa bare ḡoeriꞌuma.”
9.22: Ani viꞌa moganiꞌa Iuda azaḡa boroboro rihoziroteꞌe uꞌano, ꞌouge reiro. Mazaḡa zeḡeꞌa raenaꞌa, “Iniuꞌa Iesuꞌe Keriso rae reine, ani nu'onu'o neḡanonoꞌo mae vaḡiniꞌuma,” rae ziro.
9.23: Eꞌanoꞌo viꞌa moganiꞌa, “Aniꞌe vaze boro, eꞌanoꞌo ani ḡadinoꞌi,” rae reiro.
9.24: Mada aheuḡano ze ibite ubuma kuruḡa reiroteꞌe vazeḡa hunadu niro, “Badiꞌa ubumao huga ḡoeroꞌi. Emeꞌe edeḡa, Iesuꞌe haḡai sauꞌa vazeḡa.”
9.25: Aneꞌa naenaeziro, “E aḡuꞌa, aniꞌe haḡai sauꞌa vazeḡa ga mene, rehano e ḡau tibaꞌe edeḡa. Ibite e ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa, rehano izidi ehamuꞌohe.”
9.26: Zeḡeꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ani ḡa mazao nagini haḡaeha? Nougenouge faiꞌadu ubumaḡo raꞌaneha?”
9.27: Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “E amahi zeha, rehano za mene egeha. Nougadu eḡe ḡoere bare igihi raꞌohe? Zae zuni ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa reihi raꞌehe?”
9.28: ꞌOugadu ze ani rae sausauniro ebu niro, “Ḡaꞌe ane tahiꞌa, u emeꞌe Mose tahiꞌatahiꞌa!
9.29: Eme Badiꞌaꞌa Mose ḡorenirotaꞌaꞌe edeḡa, rehano eme vaze aꞌe noumanoꞌo arirotaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa.”
9.30: Vaze eꞌeꞌa naenaeziro, “E zaguzagauꞌohe! Aniꞌa ubumahe manoneha, rehano za ani noumanoꞌo arirotaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa!
9.31: Emeꞌe edeḡa, Badiꞌaꞌe haḡai sauꞌa azaḡa ḡoereꞌe mene igiꞌohe, rehano iniu ane mazao kurauꞌeteꞌe zu ane urao haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ḡoereꞌe igiꞌohe.
9.32: Badiꞌaꞌa raha ꞌadi haḡairoteꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo onao izidi, ubuma kuruḡano fureraroteꞌe vazeḡa fainiroteꞌe hariḡa vazeni ꞌahoga mene igiro.
9.33: Vaze ꞌadiꞌe mene Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo reifone, ani ḡau ꞌahoga haḡaoga mene idaḡa reifo.”
9.34: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡaꞌe fureraroteꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo haḡai sauꞌaniꞌa iriꞌaveꞌohe. Ḡaeꞌa eme ihofihi raꞌehe?” Ebu ze ani hegone buniro. Vine moneo Ubuma Kuruḡa Azaḡa
9.35: Iesuꞌa ze ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa eꞌe hegone buniroteꞌe igiro. Eꞌanoꞌo ani vaḡadu hidirotene ḡadiniro, “Ḡa Vaze Ubuga mazao fieꞌehe?”
9.36: Vaze eꞌeꞌa naenaeniro, “Vaze boro, aniꞌe iniu? Ḡa ihine, e ani mazao fiꞌuma.”
9.37: Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡaꞌa ani horoneha zu ani izidi ḡae teite ḡoereꞌohe.”
9.38: Vaze eꞌeꞌa niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, e ḡae mazao fieꞌohe!” Ebu aneꞌa ḡuḡuradu ani mazao kuraro.
9.39: Iesuꞌa niro, “Eḡeꞌa kotazoga veize raha ꞌadi ariro. Aꞌe ubuma kuruḡa azaḡaniꞌa ehamanoga veize, zu ehamuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ubumaꞌa kuranoga veize raꞌohe.”
9.40: Ebu Iesu teite radiroteꞌe Farisea azaḡa nuꞌe ani ḡoere egadu niro, “Emeꞌe mene ubuma kuruḡa azaḡa!”
9.41: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Za hube hune ubuma kuruḡa azaḡa reifone, Badiꞌaꞌa haḡaize sauꞌa rae modifo. Rehano zaꞌe ehamuꞌohe rae raꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, haḡaize sauꞌaꞌe mene rae modeꞌohe.”

10.1: Iesuꞌa reiro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniu ḡabiri ibihetaḡanonoꞌo mamoe habaꞌa mene diuḡadu ibi ꞌahogano sibire diuḡeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡonore vazeḡa.
10.2: U ḡabiri ibihetaḡanonoꞌo diuḡeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe mamoe taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.
10.3: Ḡabiri ibihetaḡa taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa ani veize ibiheta vavaꞌohauꞌohe zu mamoeḡaꞌe ane ago igiꞌohe. Ebu aniꞌa mamoeḡa nizeo huzadu ibitozi buzeꞌohe.
10.4: Huze buzatene aneꞌa ibitadu zeḡe niduꞌa ani hegoteꞌohe, mazaḡa ze ani agoꞌe edeḡa.
10.5: Zeꞌe aḡuꞌa vazeḡa ḡaruna mene hegotiꞌuma zu ani mazaonoꞌo feraꞌuma, mazaḡa zeꞌe aḡuꞌa vazeḡa agoꞌe aḡuꞌa.”
10.6: Iesuꞌa ḡoere ꞌouge rae idane ziro, rehano ze aniꞌa ziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa huga mene ederiro.
10.7: Eꞌanoꞌo Iesuꞌa bare ziro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, e mamoe ḡabiri ibihetaḡa.
10.8: Eḡe zamao ibite ariroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ḡonore azaḡa. Rehano mamoeꞌe zeḡe ḡoere mene egoziniro.
10.9: Eꞌe ibiheta. Iniuꞌa eḡe mazaonoꞌo diuḡine, aniꞌe ḡabone hidiꞌuma. Ebu aniꞌe buau diuḡiꞌuma zu ogomu manoḡa hidiꞌuma.
10.10: Ḡonore vazeḡaꞌe ḡonotafine zu zimifine ebu ruizifine areꞌohe. U eꞌe mamoe niduꞌa ḡabone hidadu zeḡe ḡabone niduꞌa zamaḡano manoḡaniꞌa iriꞌavoga veize ariro.
10.11: Eꞌe mamoe taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa manoḡa. Mamoe taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa manoḡaꞌe mamoeḡa uꞌano ḡaboneḡa aheteꞌohe.
10.12: U hadi vaḡeꞌenaꞌa, gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe mamoe mene taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Mamoeꞌe mene ani mamoe. Eꞌanoꞌo ani butu ḡuniḡaniꞌa aroga horoneꞌetene, mamoe niduꞌa mode ferauꞌohe. Ebu butu ḡuniḡaniꞌa mamoe agatozenadu niduꞌa avoavo oname ḡoureꞌohe.
10.13: Aniꞌe hadi vaḡe gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa radu mamoe mene faine taufeꞌe ꞌahine, ferauꞌohe.
10.14: Eꞌe mamoe taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa manoḡa. Eꞌe mamoehe edeḡa zu zeꞌe e edeḡa.
10.15: Aꞌe Mamaꞌa e edeḡa zu eꞌe Mama edeḡa heuḡa. E ḡabonehe mamoe veize aheteꞌohe.
10.16: Mamoe ꞌahoga nuꞌe eḡe mazao, rehano zeꞌe ḡabiri ꞌahi zamaḡanoꞌe oꞌoꞌa. Zeḡe zuni eḡeꞌa zamaze ariꞌuma. Ze eḡe ḡoere igiꞌuma, ebu zeḡe niduꞌa tiburu radiꞌuma, zu vaze tibaniꞌa zeḡe taufiꞌuma.
10.17: Mamaheꞌe eḡe zamare borofeꞌohe, mazaḡa e ḡabonehe bare meifine ḡabonehe aheteꞌohe.
10.18: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa eḡe ḡabone mene mae vaḡineꞌohe, rehano e eḡeꞌa bare ḡabonehe aheteꞌohe. E ḡabonehe aheteꞌeteꞌe zu bare maꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa meiro. Aꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa eḡe mazao, 'Haḡae hunoꞌi,' rae reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa.”
10.19: Iesuꞌa ꞌouge reiroteꞌe uꞌano, Iuda azaḡaniꞌa zeḡe boꞌaḡano bare rovotiro.
10.20: Zeḡe boꞌaḡano vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ani vine sauꞌaniꞌa ragano radu zamaroneḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa. Za nougadu ani ḡoere igiꞌohe?”
10.21: Rehano vaze nuꞌe ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ḡoere ꞌahiꞌe mene vine sauꞌaniꞌa ragano reiroteꞌe vazeḡa ḡoeꞌa. Vine sauꞌaniꞌa ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa fainogaꞌe mene idaḡa.” Iuda Azaḡa Boroboroꞌa Iesu Hezahoharo
10.22: Ierusalemao Kuru Neḡa Giginiroteꞌe Muiḡa meiro, zu eꞌe madaḡaꞌe nahune madaḡa.
10.23: Ebu Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌano Solomona Ibi Zauhaḡano ragavinu.
10.24: Ebu Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa gabaḡeḡenadu ḡadiniro, “Ḡa naniꞌa ḡoere huga ifiꞌuma? Zamafeꞌe ufeta doudeꞌohe. Ḡa Keriso roꞌidene, ḡoere rae dehenofoꞌi.”
10.25: Ebu Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “E ziro, rehano za eḡe ḡoereꞌe mene mae ḡihineꞌohe. E eḡe Mama niḡano haḡaeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa gigiꞌaꞌa eḡe moneo rae fureneꞌohe.
10.26: Rehano za eḡe mene mamoe ꞌahine, eḡe mazao mene fieꞌohe.
10.27: Eḡe mamoeꞌe agohe igiꞌohe. E ze edeḡa ebu ze e hegoteꞌohe.
10.28: Eḡeꞌa ḡabone tuḡutuḡu zeḡe ziniꞌohe. Ze mene hune ruiziꞌuma ebu vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa eḡe ꞌevoreonoꞌo mene meiziꞌuma.
10.29: Mamaheꞌa ze eḡe iniro. Aniꞌe ḡau niduꞌa ufeta vitine ḡihiꞌaḡa. Vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa ze Mamahe ꞌevore mazaonoꞌo meizoga mene idaḡa.
10.31: Ebu Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa bare hadi mae ḡihinadu matihi reiro.
10.32: Rehano Iesuꞌa ziro, “E Mama gigiꞌaḡa hina haḡai manoḡa ḡehaḡa haḡadu ihoziro. Haḡai manoḡa eꞌe boꞌaḡano noꞌe haḡaiḡa uꞌano, za uḡuhe ruhihi raꞌohe?”
10.33: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Eme hadi hina ḡamihi raꞌetaꞌaꞌe mazaḡa mene ḡaeꞌa haḡai manoḡa haḡairo, rehano mazaḡa ḡa Badiꞌa rae sausauneꞌohe. Ḡaꞌe vaze tauḡi, rehano ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare Badiꞌa rae raꞌohe.”
10.34: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Zae Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Badiꞌaꞌa raenaꞌa, “Zaꞌe badiꞌa.”'
10.35: Badiꞌaꞌe ane ḡoere ziniroteꞌe azaḡa mazao, 'badiꞌa,' rae huziro. Ebu Buka Zaḡoḡaꞌe varadoga mene idaḡa.
10.36: Eꞌe Mamaꞌa mae zaḡozaḡohadu raha ꞌahao tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa. E eḡeꞌa bare Badiꞌa Ubuga rae raꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, za eꞌa Badiꞌa rae sausauneꞌohe rae raꞌehe?
10.37: E Mamahe gau mene haḡaoꞌidene, za eḡe mazao ago fioꞌi.
10.38: U e Mamahe gau haḡaoꞌidene, za eḡe ḡoere mene mae ḡihineꞌe rehano, eḡeꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa mae ḡihinoꞌi. ꞌOugine, Mamaꞌe eḡe teite zu eꞌe ane teite radiuꞌetaꞌaꞌe ederiꞌuma zu zamariꞌuma.”
10.39: ꞌOugadu ze ani bare obone nuriro, rehano ani zeḡe ꞌevoreonoꞌo feraro.
10.40: Ebu Iesuꞌa Ioridana duꞌura bare fare onamiro. Aꞌe Ioaneꞌa ibite vaze babatisozinuteꞌe habaꞌa. Iesuꞌe eꞌea radiro.
10.41: Vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ani vaḡe ariro ebu zeḡeꞌa bare ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ioaneꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa mene haḡairo, rehano aneꞌa vaze ꞌadi moneo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌaꞌe hube.”
10.42: Ebu eꞌea vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesu mazao firo.

11.1: Vaze ꞌahoga, niḡa Lazaroꞌa radiunu. Ani uginiro ebu ezeḡa aheu, Maria zu Mareta teite Betania neḡano radiunu.
11.2: Mariaꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro oda rana dehoro hohoḡa manoḡa beꞌunadu iguḡa hina odaḡa zauhiroteꞌe roḡaeḡa. Ani ezeḡa Lazaroꞌe uginiro.
11.3: Eꞌanoꞌo ezeḡa aheuꞌa vaze ꞌahoga Iesu vaḡe tuḡunadu niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡaeꞌa zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ugiḡa.”
11.4: Iesuꞌa hari eꞌe egadu ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ugiḡa eꞌe uꞌano, ani mene rudaꞌuma, rehano Badiꞌa ni mae ḡihinoga veize ꞌahiguḡaniꞌa fureraro. Ugi eꞌe uꞌano, Badiꞌa Ubuga ni mae ḡihiniꞌuma.”
11.5: Iesuꞌe Mareta, negoḡa Maria zu ezeḡa Lazaro zamare borofiro.
11.6: Rehano ani Lazaroꞌa uginiroteꞌe hariḡa igirotene, ani aneꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano mada aheu bare radiro.
11.7: Eꞌe enogano Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Aroꞌi, Iudea habaꞌa bare onamihi.”
11.8: Zeḡeꞌa niro, “Rabi, izidi Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa hadi hina ḡamihi raha. Rehano ḡa eꞌe habaꞌa bare onamihi raꞌehe?”
11.9: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Oꞌe. Mada tiba zamaḡano agaḡa madaḡa niduꞌaꞌe gaubanana aheu fare. Vazeꞌa agaḡa madaḡano ragavine mene uitiꞌuma, mazaḡa raha ꞌadi agazeꞌeteꞌe agaḡa horoneꞌohe.
11.10: U ohore zamaḡano ragavine, ze uitiꞌuma, mazaḡa zeḡe mazao agaḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa.”
11.11: Aniꞌa ꞌouge reiroteꞌe enogano, bare ziro, “Emeḡe nabudi Lazaroꞌe bazeꞌohe. Rehano e ani vaḡe onamadu evaniꞌuma.”
11.12: Ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa naenaeniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ani bazeꞌohe reine, ani manoriꞌuma.”
11.13: Iesuꞌa Lazaro rune moneo ḡoeriro, rehano ze Iesu ḡoere egadu, “Lazaroꞌe huga bazeꞌohe,” rae zamariro.
11.15: E ani teite mene radiroteꞌe uꞌano, matuꞌeꞌohe. Aꞌe zae veize raꞌohe, mazaḡa eꞌe uꞌano, za eḡe mazao fiꞌuma. Rehano izidi eme ani vaḡe onamihi.”
11.16: Ebu Atoa rae huneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, Tomasiꞌa Iesu tahiꞌa niduꞌa ziro, “Aroꞌi, emeḡe zuni ani teite rudafine onamihi.” Iesuꞌe Ḡabone ebu Vaze Bare Ḡabozeꞌohe
11.17: Iesuꞌa Betania neḡano hanitirotene, Lazaroꞌe amahi idu zamaḡano mada ḡazaḡa radiroteꞌe igiro.
11.18: Betania neḡaꞌe Ierusalema uhiḡano, zu faḡaꞌe uḡidu kilomita mene vitinoga.
11.19: Eꞌanoꞌo Iuda azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa Mareta zu Maria vaḡe ariro, mazaḡa ezeze rune uꞌano zamaze namizihi reiro.
11.20: Maretaꞌe Iesuꞌa areꞌeteꞌe igirotene, Iesu hidoga radu onamiro, u Mariaꞌe neo radiro.
11.21: Ebu Maretaꞌa Iesu hidadu niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡa ꞌaha reifone, ezeheꞌe mene rudafo.
11.22: Rehano e edeḡa, izidi zuni ḡa Badiꞌa mazao nagini umidine aneꞌa ḡaniꞌuma.”
11.24: Maretaꞌa niro, “E edeḡa, mada ḡonagano vaze niduꞌa runeonoꞌo bare iḡuneꞌeteꞌe madaḡano aniꞌe bare ḡabodiꞌuma.”
11.25: Iesuꞌa niro, “Eꞌe rune azaḡa bare ḡabozeꞌohe, zu ḡabone ziniꞌohe. Iniu eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe rudaune zuni, bare ḡabodiꞌuma.
11.26: Ebu iniu ḡabodeꞌeteꞌe zu eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe mene hune rudaꞌuma. Ḡa ḡoere ꞌahi mae ḡihineꞌehe?”
11.27: Aneꞌa niro, “Oꞌe, Zuhiꞌa Boro, e ḡaꞌe Keriso ebu raha ꞌada ariꞌuma rae reiroteꞌe vazeḡa, Badiꞌa Ubuga rae mae ḡihineꞌohe.”
11.28: Maretaꞌe ꞌouge reiroteꞌe enogano bare ne onamadu negoḡa Maria genaḡa zamahu onamiro ebu niro, “Ihore vazeḡaꞌe emeḡe haba haniteha. Aniꞌe ḡa ḡiaꞌihi raꞌohe.”
11.29: Mariaꞌa ani ḡoere igirotene, ḡarihe iḡunadu Iesu vaḡe onamiro.
11.30: Iesuꞌe ꞌize zeḡe ne mene diuḡadu Maretaꞌa ani hidiroteꞌe habaꞌano radiunu.
11.31: Ne zamaḡano Maria namine radiuꞌeteꞌe Iuda azaḡaꞌe aneꞌa ḡarihe iḡunadu bua onamoga horoniro. Ebu zeḡe zuni ani hegote buaro, mazaḡa ze aniꞌa nianoga veize Lazaro idu onameꞌohe rae zamariro.
11.32: Mariaꞌe Iesuꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano feuradu ani horoniro. Ebu Iesu oda babaḡano ḡuḡuradu niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡaꞌe ꞌaha reifone, eḡe ezeꞌe mene rudafo.”
11.33: Iesuꞌa Maria zu ane teite ariroteꞌe Iuda azaḡaniꞌa niauꞌeteꞌe horonirotene, zamaḡa ariro zu adudaro.
11.34: Ebu Iesuꞌa ḡadiziro, “Za Lazaro ahiꞌa nouma tiro?” Ze naenaeniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, aradu ḡianoꞌi.”
11.36: ꞌOugadu Iuda azaḡaniꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ḡianoꞌi, ani Lazaro ufeta zamare borofiro!”
11.37: Rehano zeḡe boꞌaḡano nuꞌe ꞌahige reiro, “Aniꞌe ubuma kuruḡa vazeḡa ubuma raꞌaniro. Rehano Lazaroꞌa mene rudafine ḡau ꞌahoga haḡaogaꞌe mene idararohe?” Lazaro Bare Ḡaboniro
11.38: Iesu zamaꞌe bare borofe areꞌenaꞌa, Lazaro idu onamiro. Iduḡaꞌe hoꞌoga boro zu ibihetaꞌe hadi boro ꞌahoga hina ꞌuiro.
11.39: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Hadi ꞌahi mae vaḡinoꞌi.” ꞌOugirotene rune vazeḡa ezeḡa, Maretaꞌa niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ani ahiriꞌe mada ḡazaḡa idu zamaḡano radeha, eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌe ufeta ḡezoḡa.”
11.40: Iesuꞌa niro, “E ꞌahige ḡaha, 'Ḡa eḡe mazao fine, Badiꞌaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae ederiꞌuma.'”
11.41: ꞌOugadu ze hadi mae vaḡiniro. Ebu Iesuꞌa adure ḡohani ḡianadu reiro, “Mama, e ḡae mazao manoḡa tauḡi raꞌohe, mazaḡa ḡaeꞌa eḡe ḡoere abitoneha.
11.42: E edeḡa, ḡa iḡaiḡa eḡe ḡoere abitoniꞌohe. Rehano ꞌada edauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa veize e ꞌahige raꞌohe. Ze ḡaꞌa e tuḡuhirotaꞌaꞌe mae ḡihinoga urateꞌohe.”
11.43: Aneꞌa ꞌouge reiroteꞌe enogano ḡihau huaro, “Lazaro, bua aroꞌi!”
11.44: Ebu rune vazeḡa ꞌai bua ariro! ꞌEvoꞌa zu odaḡa ꞌumiroteꞌe dabuaḡa kuiḡa ebu iraḡa ꞌumiroteꞌe dabuaḡaꞌe ꞌize ahiꞌano buaro. Iesuꞌa ziro, “Ani ragavifine dabuaḡa mae vaḡinoꞌi.” Iesu Manoga veize Ḡoꞌaniro (Mataio 26:1-5; Mareko 14:1-2; Luka 22:1-2)
11.45: Ebu Maria vaḡe onamiroteꞌe Iuda azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesuꞌa nagini haḡairoteꞌe horonadu ani mazao firo.
11.46: Rehano zeḡe boꞌaḡano nuꞌe Farisea azaḡa vaḡe onamadu Iesuꞌa nagini haḡairoteꞌe meꞌodoziniro.
11.47: ꞌOugadu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa Iuda azaḡa boroboro huzadu nu'onu'o boro meiro, ebu ze zeḡeꞌa bare ḡadimutitiro, “Eme nougiꞌuma? Vaze ꞌadi haḡai nu badeḡa ḡehaḡa haḡaeꞌohe.
11.48: Eme aniꞌa ꞌahige haḡaoga ḡiane modine, vaze niduꞌa ani mazao fiꞌuma. Ebu Roma azaḡaniꞌa aradu emeḡe haba zu emeḡe haba azaḡa ruiziꞌuma.”
11.49: Ebu zeḡe boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoga, niḡa Kaiafaꞌe eꞌe muriḡano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa reiro. Aneꞌa ziro, “Zaꞌe ḡauni ꞌahoga zuni mene edereꞌohe!
11.50: Vaze niduꞌa veize vaze tibaniꞌa rudanogaꞌe ufeta manoḡa, ebu Roma azaḡaniꞌa Iuda azaḡa niduꞌa ruizogaꞌe ufeta sauꞌa. Za aꞌe mene zamareꞌehe?”
11.51: Ani ane zamaroneonoꞌo mene ꞌouge reiro. Aniꞌe eꞌe muriḡano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa uꞌano, Badiꞌaꞌa ihonadu Iesuꞌe Iuda azaḡa niduꞌa veize rudatiteꞌe aneꞌa rae fureniro.
11.52: Aꞌe mene Iuda azaḡa veize daꞌo, rehano haba nunu avoavo radiuꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌa ubugaubuga nuꞌozadu tiburanoga veize rae fureniro.
11.53: Eꞌanoꞌo eꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo ze Iesu manoga ibiḡa ḡoꞌaniro.
11.54: Eꞌe uꞌano, Iesuꞌe Iuda azaḡa boꞌaḡano hunioꞌe mene ragavinu. Aniꞌe eꞌe habaꞌa modadu haba bohaꞌa uhiḡano ne ꞌahoga, Efaraima onamiro ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite deꞌea radiro.
11.55: Ebu Iuda azaḡa Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡaniꞌa hanitirotene, vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa neḡaneḡanonoꞌo Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ꞌizema mougano Ierusalema itiro. Mazaḡa ze ibite itadu Iuda azaḡa goro idunaḡano Badiꞌa ubumao ze zeḡeꞌa bare dehezihi reiro.
11.56: Ebu ze Iesu vaḡeꞌenaꞌa, kuru neḡa habaꞌano edanadu ḡadimutitiro, “Zaꞌe nouge rae zamareꞌohe? Aniꞌe Mui ꞌahi veize ariꞌuma ga mene?”
11.57: Eꞌe madaḡano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa Iesu obone tihi radu vaze niduꞌa riḡa ḡoreziro, “Iniuꞌa Iesuꞌe nouma radiuꞌetaꞌaꞌe ederoꞌidene, ihofoꞌi!”

12.1: Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa veize mada fuꞌo tiba fare ꞌizema mougano, Iesuꞌa Betania neḡano feuriro. Aꞌe Iesuꞌa bare ḡaboniroteꞌe vazeḡa, Lazaroꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe neḡa.
12.2: Eꞌanoꞌo eꞌea Iesu veize ḡorava ogomuḡa ruhibiro. Maretaꞌa ogomu haḡairo ebu Lazaroꞌe Iesu teite ogomu fataḡa babaḡano tave ehoriroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano radiro.
12.3: Ebu Mariaꞌa dehoro huga hohoḡa naeḡa boro, niḡa Nado bio komeꞌa iriꞌavonadu mae ariro. Ebu dehoro hohoḡa eꞌe Iesu oda rana beuꞌiro, ebu iguḡa hina zauhiro. Eꞌanoꞌo ne zamaḡanoꞌe dehoro hohoḡaniꞌa iriꞌaviro.
12.4: Rehano Iesu tahiꞌa ꞌahoga, vesuꞌu ani revohatiteꞌe tahiꞌaḡa ꞌahoga, Isakariota vazeḡa Iudaꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro,
12.5: “Dehoro hohoḡa ꞌadi seronadu muri tiba gau hadiḡa hidifo ebu eꞌe hadiḡaꞌe zahara azaḡa zinifo.”
12.6: Aniꞌe mene zahara azaḡa zamariro, rehano aniꞌe ḡonore vazeḡa radu ꞌouge reiro. Aniꞌe zeḡe hadi fuseḡa taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa radu fuse zamaḡano ufiroteꞌe hadiḡa ane veize ḡonotaudo.
12.7: Ebu Iesuꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Roḡae ꞌahiꞌe ago gararoꞌi, mazaḡa aniꞌe e rudanadu guriteꞌe madaḡa veize dehoro ꞌadi ruhibeha.
12.8: Zahara azaḡaꞌe iḡaiḡa zae teite radiꞌuma, u eꞌe iḡaiḡa zae teite mene radiꞌuma.”
12.9: Iuda azaḡa ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesuꞌa Betania neḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe igirotene, eꞌe neḡa onamiro. Aꞌe mene Iesu daꞌo ḡianoga veize, rehano aneꞌa rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡaboniroteꞌe vazeḡa Lazaro zuni ḡianoga veize reiro.
12.10: Eꞌanoꞌo dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe Lazaro zuni matihi rae ḡoꞌaniro,
