12.11: mazaḡa Lazaro uꞌano, Iuda azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa ze modadu Iesu vaḡe onamiro ebu ani mazao firo. Ierusalema Diuḡiro (Mataio 21:1-11; Mareko 11:1-11; Luka 19:28-40)
12.12: Irarirotene, Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa veize Ierusalema itiroteꞌe vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa Iesuꞌe Ierusalema aroga igiro.
12.13: Eꞌanoꞌo ze Sigi rouga variꞌe madu ani hidoga veize onamiro. Ebu ze ḡihau huaro, “Hosana! Zuhiꞌa Boro niḡano areꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune! Isaraela azaḡa kiniḡaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune!”
12.14: Iesuꞌa doniki ubuga horonadu eꞌe rana tire ehoriro. Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro,
12.15: “Ierusalema azaḡa, ago rihanoꞌi. Ḡianoꞌi, zae kiniꞌa doniki ubuga rana ehoradu areꞌohe.”
12.16: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe ꞌahiguḡa mene faine zamariro. Rehano Iesuꞌa runeonoꞌo bare ḡabodiroteꞌe enogano, Buka Zaḡoḡano ani moneo ꞌahiguḡa mirihiroteꞌe zu vazevazeꞌa ani mazao ꞌouge haḡairotaꞌaꞌe ederiro.
12.17: Ebu Iesuꞌa iduonoꞌo Lazaro hunadu rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡaboniroteꞌe madaḡano, ani teite radiroteꞌe vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa eꞌe hariḡa vaze mazao barebare rae fureniro.
12.18: Ebu vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesuꞌa haḡai nu badeḡa ꞌadi haḡairoteꞌe igiro ꞌahine, ze ani hidoga radu ane vaḡe onamiro.
12.19: Eꞌanoꞌo Farisea azaḡaꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare neneḡaniro, “Ḡianoꞌi. ꞌAhiꞌe mene emeꞌa haḡaihi reiroteꞌe haḡaiḡa. Raha azaḡa niduꞌa ani hegote onamiro!” Iesuꞌa Ane Rune moneo rae Fureniro
12.20: Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡano Badiꞌa mazao kuranoga veize Ierusalema onamiroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano Giriki azaḡa nuꞌa radiunu.
12.21: Giriki azaḡa eꞌeꞌa Galilea habaꞌa Betesaida vazeḡa Filipi vaḡe onamadu uminiro, “Vaze boro, emeꞌe Iesu ḡianihi raꞌohe.”
12.22: Ebu Filipiꞌa onamadu Anderea niro, ebu anianine Iesu vaḡe onamadu ḡadiniro.
12.23: Ebu Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Badiꞌaꞌa Vaze Ubugaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae ihoziteꞌe madaḡaꞌe maha.
12.24: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe. Vuidi maḡa rahao mene gurine, aniꞌe maḡa isoḡa radiꞌuma. Rehano ani rahao gurine, ḡehaḡaniꞌa hudaꞌuma.
12.25: Iniuꞌa ane ḡabone zamare borofine, ḡabone tuḡutuḡu mene hidiꞌuma. Rehano iniuꞌa raha ꞌada ane ḡabone heꞌeheꞌenine, ḡabode radiꞌuma onamo radiu tuḡutuḡu.
12.26: Iniuꞌa eḡe tuḡure vazeḡa reihi roꞌidene, eḡe hegotoꞌi. Eꞌe noꞌe habaꞌano radiune, eḡe tuḡure vazeḡa zuni eꞌea radiꞌuma. Eḡe tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe eḡe Mamaꞌa niguniꞌuma.
12.27: Izidi eḡe zamaꞌe aduduꞌohe. E nagini reꞌuma? 'Mama, aduga madaḡa ꞌahaonoꞌo e ḡabohoꞌi,' rae reꞌuma ga? Mene, e aduga madaḡa ꞌahi mouga veize ariro.
12.28: Mama, ḡae ni mae ḡihinoꞌi!” ꞌOugadu ago ꞌahoganiꞌa adureonoꞌo ꞌahige rae reiro, “Eḡeꞌa nihe mae ḡihineha zu bare mae ḡihiniꞌuma.”
12.29: Vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa eꞌea ḡoere eꞌe egadu, “Viriꞌa fuꞌureꞌohe,” rae reiro. Ebu nuꞌe, “Tuḡure viganiꞌa ani mazao ḡoereha,” rae reiro.
12.30: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Ago aꞌe mene eḡe veize, rehano zae veize ḡoereha.
12.31: Izidiꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa raha ꞌadi azaḡa kotazeꞌeteꞌe madaḡa. Izidiꞌe raha ꞌadi zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, Satani mae vaḡiniꞌuma.
12.32: Rehano vazeꞌa rahaonoꞌo eḡe mae ḡihihine, eḡeꞌa vaze niduꞌa eḡe vaḡe hutube ariꞌuma.”
12.33: Iesuꞌe aneꞌa nougenouge rudatiteꞌe moneo ihozifine ꞌouge rae reiro.
12.34: Ebu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa niro, “Buka Zaḡoḡanonoꞌo eme ꞌahige edereꞌohe, 'Kerisoꞌe radiu tuḡutuḡu.' Rehano ḡaꞌe nougadu, 'Vaze Ubugaꞌe rahaonoꞌo mae ḡihiniꞌuma,' rae raꞌohe? Vaze Ubugaꞌe iniu?”
12.35: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Agaḡaꞌe mada tahiḡa bare zae teite radiꞌuma. Agaḡaꞌe zae teite radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano oname onaoꞌi, ꞌougine zaꞌe uzaboꞌa mene ḡahiziꞌuma. Uzabo zamaḡano ragaveꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ani noꞌe onameꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa.
12.36: Agaḡaꞌe zae teite radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano agaḡa mazao fioꞌi, ꞌougine za agaḡa ubuga reꞌuma.” Iesuꞌa ꞌouge ziroteꞌe enogano, muhize onamadu zeḡe mazaonoꞌo uꞌuraro. Iesu mazao Mene Fieꞌeteꞌe Azaḡa
12.37: Iesuꞌa haḡai nu badeḡa ḡehaḡa vaze zamao haḡairo, rehano ze ꞌize ani mazao mene firo.
12.38: Peroveta vazeḡa Isaiaꞌa reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, emeḡeꞌa haramiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe vazeꞌa mene mae ḡihiniro. Ḡaeꞌa gigiꞌaḡo ze ihoziro, rehano ze mene mae ḡihiniro.”
12.39: Nougadu ze Iesu mazao fioga mene idararoteꞌe moneo Isaiaꞌa ꞌahige bare rae reiro,
12.40: “Badiꞌaꞌa ubumaze kuruniro zu zeḡe zama ꞌuiro. Eꞌe uꞌano, ze ubumaze hina horoneꞌe rehano, hugaꞌe mene horoniꞌuma, zu zamaze hina mene faine zamariꞌuma. Aꞌe, ze eḡe vaḡe ḡihure baradu mene manoroga veize raꞌohe.”
12.41: Isaiaꞌa ꞌahige rae reirotaꞌaꞌe mazaḡa ani Iesuꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae ederiro zu ani moneo ḡoeriro.
12.42: U vaze ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa Iesu mazao firo. Rehano ze ani mazao fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe vaze ꞌahoga mene niro, mazaḡa Farisea azaḡaniꞌa nu'onu'o neḡanonoꞌo ze mae buziꞌuma radu riharo.
12.43: Ze vazeꞌa ze niguzeꞌetaꞌaꞌe ufeta zamariro, rehano Badiꞌaꞌa ze niguzeꞌetaꞌaꞌe mene zamariro.
12.44: Ebu Iesuꞌa agoḡa boro hina ḡihau ḡoeriro, “Iniu eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe mazao daꞌo mene fieꞌohe, rehano eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa mazao fieꞌohe.
12.45: Ebu iniu eḡe ḡiaheꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa ḡianeꞌohe.
12.46: Agaḡa teige, e raha ꞌahi ariro. Aꞌe eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe uzabo zamaḡano mene radoga veize raꞌohe.
12.47: Iniu eḡe ḡoere egadu mene hegotine zuni, e ani mene kotaniꞌuma. Mazaḡa eꞌe raha azaḡa kotazoga veize mene ariro, rehano ḡabozoga veize ariro.
12.48: Eḡe hezahohiꞌeteꞌe zu eḡe ḡoere mene mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa kotaneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ꞌahoga. Mada ḡonagano eḡeꞌa rateꞌe ḡoeꞌa ꞌadi hina ani kotaniꞌuma.
12.49: E eḡe edeḡano mene ḡoeriro, rehano eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe Mamaheꞌa e nagini rouga zu nouge rae rouga ihohiro.
12.50: E edeḡa, ani goro ḡoeꞌaniꞌa ḡabone tuḡutuḡu ibiḡano ibitoziꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo e Mamaꞌa nagini ihiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa daꞌo raꞌohe.”

13.1: Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ꞌizema mougano, Iesuꞌe aneꞌa raha ꞌadi modadu Mama vaḡe ititeꞌe madaḡa meirotaꞌaꞌe ederiro. Ebu aneꞌa raha ꞌada ane hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zamare borofiro, onamo ani rudatiteꞌe madaḡa meiro.
13.2: Ḡoravaḡano ze ogomu tiburu aunu. Diaboloꞌa Isakariota vazeḡa Simona ubuga, Iuda zamaḡa amahi tutunadu Iesu revohatihi reiro.
13.3: Iesuꞌe ederiro, Moganiꞌa ḡau niduꞌa ani ꞌevora tiro ebu aneꞌa Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo aradu bare Badiꞌa vaḡe itiꞌuma.
13.4: Eꞌanoꞌo ani ogauꞌeteꞌe habaꞌanonoꞌo iḡunadu raga dabuaḡa mae vaḡine tiro, ebu ahiri zauheꞌeteꞌe dabuaḡa madu gabaꞌiḡano autiro.
13.5: Ebu siuva duꞌuḡano vu beuꞌadu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa oda vuzuꞌiro, zu autiroteꞌe dabuaḡa hina zauhiro.
13.6: Iesuꞌa Simona Petero vaḡirotene, Peteroꞌa niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡa eḡe oda vuzuꞌihi raꞌehe?”
13.7: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eḡeꞌa nagini haḡaeꞌetaꞌaꞌe ḡa izidiꞌe aḡuꞌa, rehano vesuꞌu ederiꞌuma.”
13.8: Peteroꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ḡa eḡe odaꞌe mene hune vuzuꞌiꞌuma!” Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eḡeꞌa ḡae oda mene vuzuꞌine, ḡaꞌe eḡe mene tahiꞌa reꞌuma.”
13.9: Simona Peteroꞌa niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eḡe oda daꞌo mene, rehano ꞌevorehe ebu vadinihe zuni vuzuꞌoꞌi.”
13.10: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Viriroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe odaḡa daꞌo vuzuꞌeꞌohe. Ani ahiꞌaꞌe niduꞌa deheḡa. Ebu zaꞌe deheḡa, rehano zae niduꞌa boꞌaḡano tibaꞌe mene deheḡa.”
13.11: Iesuꞌe iniuꞌa ani revohatiteꞌe ederiro, eꞌanoꞌo, “Zae boꞌaḡano tibaꞌe mene deheḡa,” rae reiro.
13.12: Iesuꞌa odaze vuzuꞌe hauḡirotene, raga dabuaḡa bare haḡadu ogomu fataḡa uhiḡano ehoriro. Ebu aneꞌa ziro, “Za eꞌa zae veize haḡateꞌe haḡaiḡa hugaꞌe edeḡahe?
13.13: Za eḡe mazao ihore vazeḡa zu Zuhiꞌa Boro rae huheꞌohe. Zaꞌa raꞌetaꞌaꞌe hube, eꞌe ꞌuguḡa vazeḡa.
13.14: Eꞌe zae Zuhiꞌa Boro ebu ihore vazeḡa, rehano zae oda vuzuꞌeha. Eꞌanoꞌo zae zuni ꞌahoganiꞌa ꞌahoga oda vuzuꞌiꞌuma.
13.15: Eḡeꞌa zae veize haḡateꞌe teige, zae zuni haḡaifine e ꞌahige haḡadu ihozeha.
13.16: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe. Tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe ane zuhiꞌa mene vitinoga, ebu iniuꞌa tuḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ani tuḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡa mene vitinoga.
13.17: Za eꞌa izidi haḡataꞌaꞌe ederadu nize mae ovoeꞌenaꞌa vaze danazine, matuꞌe rudaꞌuma.” Iesu Revohatiteꞌe Vazeḡa (Mataio 26:20-25; Mareko 14:17-21; Luka 22:21-23)
13.18: “E zae niduꞌa mazao mene ḡoereꞌohe. E eḡeꞌa ohotiroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe edeḡa. Rehano Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiroteꞌeꞌa hudaꞌuma, 'Eḡe ogomu tiburu auꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa ḡihuradu e agirohiro.'
13.19: ꞌUguḡaniꞌa ꞌizema fureranogano izidi eḡeꞌa ziꞌohe, mazaḡa ꞌuguḡaniꞌa fureratiteꞌe madaḡano eḡeꞌa eꞌe iniu rae ihoziroteꞌe zaeꞌa mae ḡihinifine raꞌohe.
13.20: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, iniu eḡeꞌa tuḡuneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe mae ḡihiheꞌohe. Ebu iniu eḡe mae ḡihiheꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa mae ḡihineꞌohe.”
13.21: Iesuꞌa ḡoere ꞌadi reirotene, zamaḡaniꞌa adudaro ebu ꞌahige rae fureniro, “Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zae boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa eḡe revoniꞌuma.”
13.22: Ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe aniꞌa iniu moneo reirotaꞌaꞌe mene ederadu ze zeḡeꞌa bare ḡiatitiro.
13.23: Iesu zamarone tahiꞌaḡaniꞌa Iesu uhiḡano tave ehore radiro.
13.24: Eꞌanoꞌo Simona Peteroꞌa ubumaḡa hina tahiꞌa eꞌe niro, “Ani iniu moneo raꞌeteꞌe ḡadinoꞌi.”
13.25: Eꞌanoꞌo ani Iesu mazao aroranadu ḡadiniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, aꞌe iniu?”
13.26: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga tahiḡa siuvao taradu hauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa revoniꞌuma.” Ebu aniꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga tahiḡa taradu Isakariota vazeḡa Simona ubuga, Iuda haro.
13.27: Ebu Iudaꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga eꞌe meirotene, Sataniꞌa zamaḡa diuḡiro. Ebu Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡaꞌa haḡaiteꞌe haḡaiḡaꞌe ḡarihe haḡaoꞌi.”
13.28: Eꞌea ogau radiroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano vazeni ꞌahoga zuni Iesuꞌe nougadu Iuda mazao ꞌouge rae reiroteꞌe mene ederiro.
13.29: Iudaꞌe hadize taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa uꞌano, Iesu tahiꞌa nuꞌe ꞌahige zamariro, “Mui veize eme ura ḡauḡa nu hoitoga veize ga zahara azaḡa ḡau nu zenoga veize Iesuꞌa Iuda umineha.”
13.30: Iudaꞌa ꞌuvahu odoga eꞌe madu zogone buaro. Aꞌe ohere zamaḡano. Zamarotitoꞌi
13.31: Iudaꞌa buarotene Iesuꞌa ziro, “Izidi Vaze Ubuga mae ḡihineꞌohe ebu ani uꞌano Badiꞌa mae ḡihineꞌohe.
13.32: Ubuga uꞌano Badiꞌa mae ḡihinine, Badiꞌaꞌe aneꞌa bare Ubuga mae ḡihiniꞌuma, ebu aneꞌa zogone ꞌougiꞌuma.
13.33: Eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa, e zae teite mada tahiḡa daꞌo radiꞌuma. Za eḡe vaḡiꞌuma, rehano ibite Iuda azaḡa boroboro ziroteꞌe teige, za idane ziꞌohe, 'Eḡeꞌa onamiteꞌe habaꞌa zaꞌe aroga mene idaḡa.'
13.34: E goro ḡoeꞌa iziga ziniꞌohe. Zaeꞌa zamarotitoꞌi. Eḡeꞌa za zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe teige, zae zuni zamarotitoꞌi.
13.35: Zaeꞌa zamarotitine, vaze niduꞌa eꞌe horonadu zaꞌe eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa rae ederiꞌuma.” Peteroꞌa Iesu Oꞌoniꞌuma rae Reiro (Mataio 26:31-35; Mareko 14:27-31; Luka 22:31-34)
13.36: Simona Peteroꞌa Iesu ḡadiniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡa noꞌe onamiꞌuma?” Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eḡeꞌa onamiteꞌe habaꞌaꞌe ḡaꞌa hegotoga izidi mene idaḡa. Rehano vesuꞌu eḡe hegotiꞌuma.”
13.37: Peteroꞌa niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, e nougadu izidi ḡa hegotogaꞌe mene idaḡa? Eḡeꞌa ḡae veize ḡabonehe zuni ahetiꞌuma.”
13.38: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡa eḡe veize ḡaboneḡo ahetiꞌumahe? Eḡeꞌa hube hune ḡaꞌohe, ꞌizema kokorokuꞌa uganogano ḡa ḡae uḡidu eḡe oꞌohiꞌuma.”

14.1: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa ziro, “Ago zamare adudanoꞌi. Badiꞌa mazao fioꞌi ebu eḡe mazao zuni fioꞌi.
14.2: Eḡe Mama neoꞌe radone habaꞌa ḡehaḡa. Aꞌe hube mene reifone, e ꞌahi mene reifo. E zae veize haba ꞌahoga ruhibe touga radu onamiꞌuma.
14.3: Onamadu zae veize haba ꞌahoga ruhibine, e bare ariꞌuma, ebu eḡe teite radifine zamazadu zaꞌe eḡe habao radiꞌuma.
14.4: Eꞌa onamiteꞌe habaꞌa ibiḡaꞌe zaꞌe edeḡa.”
14.5: Tomasiꞌa Iesu niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, eme ḡaꞌa noꞌe onamiꞌumaꞌe aḡuꞌa. Eme nougenouge ibi eꞌe ederiꞌuma?”
14.6: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eꞌe Mama vaḡe onameꞌeteꞌe ibiḡa, zu ḡoere huga ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, zu ḡabone tuḡutuḡu ziniꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Eḡe mazaonoꞌo mene reine, vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa Mama vaḡe onamogaꞌe mene idaḡa.
14.7: Za hube hune e ederine, eḡe Mama zuni ederiꞌuma. Izidionoꞌo onamo zaꞌe ani edereꞌohe ebu ani horoniro.”
14.8: Filipiꞌa niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, Mama ihofoꞌi. Eme eꞌe daꞌo urateꞌohe.”
14.9: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Eꞌe mada boro hune zae teite radiunu. Rehano Filipi, ḡa e aḡuꞌahe? Iniu eḡe horohiroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Mama zuni horoniro. Ḡa nougadu, 'Mama ihofoꞌi,' rae raꞌohe?
14.10: Ḡa eꞌe Mama teite tiburaroteꞌe zu Mamaꞌe eḡe teite tiburaroteꞌe mene mae ḡihineꞌehe? Eḡeꞌa ziꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe eḡe edeḡano mene raꞌohe, rehano eḡe teite tiburanadu radiuꞌeteꞌe Mamaheꞌa ane gau haḡaeꞌohe.
14.11: Eḡe mazao fioꞌi. Eꞌe Mama teite tiburaroteꞌe zu Mamaꞌe eḡe teite tiburaroteꞌe mae ḡihinoꞌi. Eꞌe mae ḡihinoga mene idaḡa roꞌidene, eḡeꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe haḡai gigiꞌaḡa horonadu eḡe ḡoere mae ḡihinoꞌi.
14.12: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe. Iniu eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa eḡeꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa zuni haḡaiꞌuma, ebu deꞌeguḡa ufeta vitine haḡai ḡihiꞌaḡa haḡaiꞌuma, mazaḡa e Mama vaḡe onamiꞌuma.
14.13: Ebu za eḡe niḡano nagini umidine, eḡeꞌa ꞌouge haḡaiꞌuma. Aꞌe Ubuga uꞌano Badiꞌa ni mae ḡihinifine raꞌohe.
14.14: Za eḡe niḡano nagini umidine, eḡeꞌa ꞌouge haḡaiꞌuma.” Vine Zaḡoḡa moneo Ihoziro
14.15: “Za eḡe zamare borofoꞌidene, eḡe goro ḡoeꞌa hegotoꞌi.
14.16: Eḡeꞌa Mama uminadu aneꞌa za danazeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa zae mazao tuḡuniꞌuma, zu aniꞌe zae teite radiꞌuma onamo tuḡutuḡu.
14.17: Aniꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡa. Ani Badiꞌa moneo ḡoere huga ihozeꞌohe. Raha ꞌadi azaḡaniꞌa ani mene horoneꞌohe, zu ani mene edereꞌe ꞌahine, ani mae ḡihinogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Rehano zaꞌe ani edeḡa, mazaḡa aniꞌe zae teite radiuꞌohe zu zae teite tiburaꞌuma.
14.18: E zaꞌe butu ega teige mene modiꞌuma, rehano zae vaḡe ariꞌuma.
14.19: Mada tahiḡa enogano raha ꞌadi azaḡaniꞌa e mene bare horohiꞌuma. Rehano zaꞌe e horohiꞌuma, mazaḡa eꞌe bare ḡabodiꞌuma ꞌahine, zae zuni ḡabodiꞌuma.
14.20: Eꞌe madaḡano zaꞌe ederiꞌuma, e eḡe Mama teite tiburaro, zu za eḡe teite tiburaro, ebu e zae teite tiburaro.
14.21: Iniu eḡe goro ḡoeꞌa mae ḡihinadu eḡe hegoteꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Iniu eḡe zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe Mamaꞌa ani zamare borofiꞌuma, ebu eḡeꞌa ani zamare borofiꞌuma, zu ani mazao eḡeꞌa fureraꞌuma.”
14.22: Ebu mene Isakariota vazeḡa, Iuda ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡaꞌe eme mazaoꞌe fureratihi, rehano raha azaḡa mazaoꞌe mene fureratihi raꞌohe. Nougadu ꞌouge raꞌohe?”
14.23: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Iniuꞌa eḡe zamare borofine, eḡe ḡoere hegotiꞌuma, zu eḡe Mamaꞌa ani zamare borofiꞌuma. Ebu Mamahe zu eḡeꞌa ani vaḡe onamadu ani teite ne tibano radiꞌuma.
14.24: Rehano iniu e mene zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe ḡoere mene hegoteꞌohe. Zaeꞌa eḡe mazaonoꞌo igiꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ꞌadiꞌe eḡe mene ḡoere, rehano eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe Mamahe ḡoere.
14.25: E zae teite radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ḡoere ꞌahi zeha.
14.26: Rehano Mamaꞌa eḡe niḡano za danazeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, Vine Zaḡoḡa tuḡuniꞌuma, zu Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa ḡau niduꞌa ihoziꞌuma. Ebu aniꞌe eꞌa ziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa zaeꞌa zamarifine ibitoziꞌuma.
14.27: E zama roḡeḡa zae teite modeꞌohe. E eḡe zama roḡeḡa ziniꞌohe. Eḡeꞌa ziniꞌeteꞌe zama roḡeḡaꞌe mene raha azaḡaniꞌa ziniꞌeteꞌe heuḡa. Zamaze ago adudanoꞌi, zu ago rihanoꞌi.
14.28: E ꞌahige rae zirotaꞌaꞌe za igiro, 'Eꞌe zae muhize onamiꞌuma zu zae vaḡe bare ariꞌuma.' Zaꞌa e zamare borofifone, e Mama vaḡe onameꞌeteꞌe uꞌano zaeꞌa matuꞌifo, mazaḡa Mamaꞌe eḡe vitihe ufeta ḡihiꞌa hune.
14.29: ꞌIzema eꞌeguḡaniꞌa fureranogano izidi eꞌa ihozeha. Aꞌe, eꞌeguḡaniꞌa fureraune, za eḡeꞌa ziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa mae ḡihinifine raꞌohe.
14.30: E zae teite mene faḡa ḡoeriꞌuma, mazaḡa raha zuhiꞌaḡa, Sataniꞌa eḡe agirohifine areꞌohe. Rehano aniꞌe eḡe raharahaheꞌeteꞌe inaraḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa.
14.31: U raha azaḡaꞌe eḡeꞌa Mama zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe zu Mamaꞌa tuḡuhadu e ḡabonehe aheteꞌetaꞌaꞌe ederiꞌuma. Iḡunoꞌi, haba ꞌahi modihi.”

15.1: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eꞌe vaini ireḡa huga, ebu eḡe Mamaꞌe vaini mebaḡa taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.
15.2: Eḡe rana kamadu mene hudauꞌeteꞌe ezaga niduꞌaꞌe aneꞌa variꞌe modeꞌohe. U hudauꞌeteꞌe ezagaꞌe ufeta ḡehaḡaniꞌa hudanoga veize aneꞌa rirahe idaneꞌohe.
15.3: Eḡeꞌa ziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa uꞌano, zaꞌe amahi deheraro.
15.4: Eḡe teite tiburanadu radoꞌi, ꞌougine eḡe zuni zae teite tiburanadu radiꞌuma. Ezagaꞌe vaini ireḡano mene kamine, ani aneꞌa bare hudanogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Eꞌe teige, za eḡe teite mene tiburanadu radiune, za zaeꞌa bare hudanogaꞌe mene idaḡa.
15.5: Eꞌe vaini ireḡa zu zaꞌe ezaga. Iniu eḡe teite tiburanadu radiune zu e ani teite tiburanadu radiune, aniꞌe ḡeharu hudaꞌuma. Mazaḡa za eḡe muhihine, ḡau ꞌahoga haḡaogaꞌe mene idaḡa.
15.6: Iniu eḡe teite mene tiburanadu radiuꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ezaga variꞌe modadu rorauꞌeteꞌe teigeꞌohe. Ezaga ꞌuguḡaꞌe vazeꞌa nuꞌonadu ire rogao feune hufi haoneꞌohe.
15.7: Zaꞌe eḡe teite tiburanadu radoꞌidene zu eḡe ḡoere hegotoꞌidene, za nagini urateꞌeteꞌe umidoꞌi, ꞌougine hidiꞌuma.
15.8: Zaꞌa ḡeharu hudanadu zaꞌe eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa rae vazevaze ihozine, zeꞌa eḡe Mama mae ḡihiniꞌuma.
15.9: Mamaꞌa eḡe zamare borofiroteꞌe teige, eḡe zuni za zamare borofiro. Zaꞌe eḡe zamarone azaḡa rouga veize, eḡe teite tiburanadu radiuꞌenoꞌi.
15.10: E eḡe Mama goro ḡoeꞌa hegotadu aniꞌa e zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe teige, zaeꞌa eḡe goro ḡoeꞌa hegotine, eḡeꞌa za zamare borofiꞌuma.
15.11: E ḡoere ꞌahi zeataꞌaꞌe, eḡe matuꞌuꞌe zae teite radadu zae matuꞌuꞌa iriꞌavoga veize raꞌohe.
15.12: Eḡe goro ḡoeꞌaꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe: Eḡeꞌa za zamare borofiroteꞌe teige, zaeꞌa zamarotitoꞌi.
15.13: Iniuꞌa ane vaze veize ane ḡabone ahetine, aꞌe vaze zamarone ḡihiꞌa hune ebu zamarone nunu vitinoga.
15.14: Za eꞌa ziꞌeteꞌe goro ḡoeꞌa hegotine, eḡe vaze raꞌohe.
15.15: E zaꞌe tuḡure azaḡa rae mene bare huziꞌuma, mazaḡa tuḡure azaḡaꞌe zuhiꞌazeꞌa nagini haḡaeꞌeteꞌe mene edereꞌohe. Rehano zaꞌe eḡe vaze rae huzeha, mazaḡa e eḡe Mama mazaonoꞌo igiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa ihoziro.
15.16: Zaeꞌa e mene ohotiro, rehano eḡeꞌa za huzadu ohotiro. Eꞌanoꞌo zaeꞌa onamadu hudaꞌuma zu zae hugaꞌe mene hauḡiꞌuma. ꞌOugine, eḡe niḡano zaꞌa Mama mazao nagini umineꞌeteꞌe aneꞌa ziniꞌuma.
15.17: Eḡe goro ḡoeꞌaꞌe ꞌahi eꞌe: Zaeꞌa zamarotitoꞌi.” Raha Azaḡaniꞌa Iesu Tahiꞌatahiꞌa Heꞌeheꞌezeꞌohe
15.18: “Raha azaḡaniꞌa za heꞌeheꞌezoꞌidene, zeꞌa ibite e heꞌeheꞌehirotaꞌaꞌe ederoꞌi.
15.19: Zaꞌe raha azaḡa moneo reifone, ze zaꞌe zeḡe mone azaḡa radu za zamare borofifo. Rehano zaꞌe mene raha azaḡa moneo ꞌahine, zu eḡeꞌa za raha azaḡa mazaonoꞌo zamazadu ohotiro ꞌahine, zeꞌe za heꞌeheꞌezeꞌohe.
15.20: Eꞌa ziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ꞌahi zamaroꞌi, 'Tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe ane zuhiꞌa mene vitinoga.' Ze e sausauhine, zae zuni sausauziꞌuma. Ebu ze eḡe ihore egohaune, zae ihore zuni egohaꞌuma.
15.21: Zaꞌe eḡe none uꞌano zu zeꞌe eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa aḡuꞌa uꞌano, zeꞌa zae mazao ꞌouge haḡaiꞌuma.
15.22: Eꞌa aradu ze mene zifone, zeꞌe haḡaize sauꞌa uꞌano zamaze mene adudafo. Rehano izidiꞌe ze haḡaize sauꞌa moneo ḡoere nunu rougaꞌe mene idaḡa.
15.23: Iniu eḡe heꞌeheꞌeheꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe eḡe Mama zuni heꞌeheꞌeneꞌohe.
15.24: Eꞌa zeḡe boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa mene haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa mene haḡaifone, ze haḡaize sauꞌa uꞌano zamaze mene adudafo. Izidi ze eḡeꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa gigiꞌa ꞌahiguḡa horoniro rehano, eḡe zu eḡe Mama heꞌeheꞌefiro.
15.25: ꞌOugadu zeḡe Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌeꞌa hudaro, 'Zeꞌa mazaḡa oꞌoꞌano e heꞌeheꞌehiro.'
15.26: Eꞌa Mama mazaonoꞌo zae mazao tuḡuniteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe zae danazeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, zu Mama mazaonoꞌo aradu ḡoere huga ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Aniꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡa. Aniꞌa arine, eḡe moneo rae fureniꞌuma.
15.27: Ebu zae zuni eḡe moneo rae fureniꞌuma, mazaḡa zaꞌe ḡadaheḡanonoꞌo eḡe teite radiro.”

16.1: “Eꞌa ḡoere ꞌahi zeataꞌaꞌe zaeꞌa eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe mene modoga veize raꞌohe.
16.2: Ze nu'onu'o neḡanonoꞌo zae mae vaḡiziꞌuma. Ebu mada ꞌahoga meine, zae zimiꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare Badiꞌa veize gaueꞌohe rae zamariꞌuma.
16.3: Ze ꞌuguḡa haḡaiꞌuma, mazaḡa zeꞌe Mama zu e aḡuꞌa.
16.4: E ḡoere ꞌahi zeataꞌaꞌe ꞌuguḡaniꞌa fureraune, za eḡeꞌa ziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa zamaroga veize raꞌohe. E ḡoere ꞌahi ḡadaheḡano mene ziro, mazaḡa e zae teite radiro.” Vine Zaḡoḡa Gauḡa
16.5: “Izidi e eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe vazeḡa vaḡe onamiꞌuma. Rehano zae boꞌaḡano vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa, 'Ḡa noꞌe onamiꞌuma?' rae mene ḡadiheꞌohe.
16.6: Mazaḡa e ḡoere ꞌahi zeateꞌe uꞌano, zamaze are rudauꞌohe.
16.7: Rehano eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, e za muhizeꞌetaꞌaꞌe zae veizeꞌe ufeta manoḡa. Mazaḡa e mene muhizine, danazeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa zae vaḡe mene ariꞌuma. Rehano e za muhizine, eḡeꞌa ani zae vaḡe tuḡuniꞌuma.
16.8: Aniꞌa arine, haḡai sauꞌa moneo, vaze duduḡa moneo ebu kota moneo raha azaḡaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae fureniꞌuma.
16.9: Haḡai sauꞌa moneo rae fureneꞌetaꞌaꞌe mazaḡa ze eḡe mazao mene fieꞌohe.
16.10: Vaze duduḡa moneo fureneꞌetaꞌaꞌe mazaḡa eꞌe Mama vaḡe onamiꞌuma ebu za e mene bare horohiꞌuma.
16.11: Ebu kota moneo rae fureneꞌetaꞌaꞌe mazaḡa raha ꞌadi azaḡa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, Satani kotaniro.
16.12: E za zihi raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe ḡehaḡa, rehano izidi zaꞌe faine zamarogaꞌe mene idaḡa.
16.13: Rehano ḡoere huga ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa arine, aniꞌa zae ibitozeadu zaeꞌa ḡoere huga niduꞌa ederiꞌuma. Aniꞌe ane edeḡano mene ḡoeriꞌuma, rehano Mama mazao igiꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa daꞌo reꞌuma. Ebu zama moneo naginiꞌa fureratiteꞌe ziꞌuma.
16.14: Aniꞌa eꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae ihoziꞌuma, mazaḡa aniꞌe eḡe ḡoere madu ziꞌuma.
16.15: Ḡau niduꞌaꞌe Mama mazao, ebu ani ḡau niduꞌaꞌe eḡe ḡau. Eꞌanoꞌo e ꞌahige rae zeha, 'Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa eḡe ḡoere madu za ihoziꞌuma.'
16.16: Mada tahiḡa ḡarugano za e mene bare horohiꞌuma, ebu mada tahiḡa ḡarugano e bare horohiꞌuma.” Zamaze Areꞌetaꞌaꞌe Ḡihuradu Bare Matuꞌiꞌuma
16.17: Iesu tahiꞌa nuꞌa neneḡaniro, “Ani ḡoere hugaꞌe nagini? Ani ꞌahige raꞌohe, 'Mada tahiḡa ḡarugano za e mene bare horohiꞌuma, ebu mada tahiḡa ḡarugano e bare horohiꞌuma,' ebu 'Mazaḡa e Mama vaḡe onamiꞌuma.'”
16.18: Ze zeḡeꞌa bare ḡadimutitiro, “'Mada tahiḡa ḡarugano,' rae rataꞌaꞌe hugaꞌe nagini? Eme aniꞌa nagini ḡoereꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa.”
16.19: Iesuꞌe ze ane ḡoere moneo ḡadinihi reirotaꞌaꞌe ederadu ziro, “E ꞌahige zeha, 'Mada tahiḡa ḡarugano za e mene bare horohiꞌuma, ebu mada tahiḡa ḡarugano e bare horohiꞌuma.' Zaꞌe ḡoere ꞌahi huga moneo ḡadimutiteꞌehe?
16.20: Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, zaꞌe niau ḡoinahiꞌuma, u raha azaḡaꞌe matuꞌiꞌuma. Zaꞌe zamaze ariꞌuma, rehano zamaze areꞌetaꞌaꞌe ḡihuradu matuꞌiꞌuma.
16.21: Roḡae ꞌahoganiꞌa ene fureneꞌetene zamaze aduduꞌohe, mazaḡa gigiꞌa boro meiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa maha. Rehano ani ene furenatene, ani gigiꞌa aḡutuꞌohe, mazaḡa eneꞌa rahao fureranadu matuꞌeꞌohe.
16.22: Eꞌe teige, izidi zaꞌe zamaze areꞌohe, rehano e za bare ḡiaziꞌuma ebu zaꞌe matuiꞌuma. Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa za matuꞌu ꞌahi mene meiniꞌuma.
16.23: Eꞌe madaḡano zaꞌe ḡadimu ꞌahoga mene ḡadihiꞌuma. Eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, eḡe niḡano Mama nagini uminine, aneꞌa ziniꞌuma.
16.24: Ibite onao izidi eḡe niḡano za Badiꞌa mazao ḡau ꞌahoga mene uminiro. Uminoꞌi, ꞌougine hidiꞌuma ebu za matuꞌuꞌa iriꞌaviꞌuma.
16.25: E hari idaidaḡa hina ḡoreziro. Rehano mada ꞌahoga meine, hari idaidaḡa hina mene bare ḡoreziꞌuma, ebu Mama moneo dehene ziꞌuma.
16.26: Eꞌe madaḡanoꞌe za eḡe niḡano Mama mazao uminiꞌuma. Eḡeꞌa zae veize Mama uminiꞌuma rae mene ziꞌohe.
16.27: Zaꞌe eḡe zamare borofiroteꞌe zu za eꞌa Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ariroteꞌe mae ḡihiniroteꞌe uꞌano, Mamaꞌe aneꞌa bare za zamare borofeꞌohe.
16.28: Eꞌe Mama mazaonoꞌo raha ꞌahi ariro. Izidi e raha ꞌahi modadu Mama vaḡe bare onamiꞌuma.”
16.29: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa reiro, “Izidi ḡa dehene ḡoereꞌohe ebu hari idaidaḡa mene raꞌohe.
16.30: Izidi eme edereha, ḡaꞌe ḡau niduꞌa edeḡa zu ḡa vaze ḡadimu ibite ederadu ze bare ḡadiꞌoga mene urateꞌohe. Eꞌe uꞌano, eme ḡaꞌa Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ariroteꞌe mae ḡihineꞌohe.”
16.31: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “Izidi zaꞌe eḡe mazao fieꞌehe?
16.32: Rehano mada ꞌahoganiꞌa areꞌohe, ebu izidi maha. Eꞌe madaḡano za tibatiba neze uꞌa rovote ḡouriꞌuma ebu eḡe daꞌo muhihiꞌuma. Rehano eꞌe mene eḡe daꞌo, mazaḡa eḡe Mamaꞌe eḡe teite radiuꞌohe.
16.33: E ḡoere ꞌahi zeataꞌaꞌe za eḡe teite tiburanadu zamaze roḡenoga veize raꞌohe. Raha ꞌada za aduga hideꞌohe, rehano inaroꞌi! Eḡeꞌa raha ꞌadi gigiꞌaḡa raharahaniro.”

17.1: Iesuꞌa ḡoere ꞌahi ziroteꞌe enogano, adure ḡohani ḡianadu kuraro, “Mama, madaḡaꞌe maha. Ubugoꞌa ḡaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae ihozifine, ḡaeꞌa Ubugoꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae ihozoꞌi.
17.2: Mazaḡa ḡaeꞌa Ubuga haroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ḡabone tuḡutuḡu zenoga veize, vaze niduꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa Ubuga haro.
17.3: Ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hideꞌeteꞌe ibiḡaꞌe vazeꞌa ḡa, Badiꞌa tibuhuga ebu ḡaeꞌa tuḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡa, Iesu Keriso edereꞌeteꞌe raꞌohe.
17.4: Ḡaeꞌa iniroteꞌe gauḡaꞌe eḡeꞌa hauḡiro. ꞌOugadu e raha ꞌada ḡaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae ihoziro.
17.5: Mama, raha zu aduga ꞌizema haḡaogano niheꞌe niḡo teite mae ḡihiniroteꞌe teige, izidi zuni niheꞌe niḡo teite mae ḡihinoꞌi.” Iesuꞌa Ane Tahiꞌatahiꞌa veize Kuraro
17.6: “E ḡaꞌa raha ꞌadao iniroteꞌe azaḡa mazao ḡae moneo rae fureniro. Zeꞌe ḡae tahiꞌatahiꞌa rae reiro, ebu ḡaeꞌa ze iniro, zu ze ḡae ḡoere hegotiro.
17.7: Izidi ze ḡaꞌa iniroteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌaꞌe ḡae mazaonoꞌo arirotaꞌaꞌe edeḡa.
17.8: Mazaḡa ḡaꞌa ihiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa eḡeꞌa ziro ebu zeḡeꞌa mae ḡihiniro. Ze eḡeꞌa ḡae mazaonoꞌo arirotaꞌaꞌe hube hune ederiro, zu ḡaeꞌa eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe mae ḡihiniro.
17.9: E zeḡe veize kurauꞌohe. E raha azaḡa veize mene kurauꞌohe, rehano ḡaeꞌa iniroteꞌe azaḡa veize kurauꞌohe, mazaḡa zeꞌe ḡae tahiꞌatahiꞌa.
17.10: Eḡe ḡau niduꞌaꞌe ḡae ḡau, ebu ḡae ḡau niduꞌaꞌe eḡe ḡau. Ze eꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae raꞌohe.
17.11: Eꞌe raha ꞌada mene bare radiꞌuma ebu ḡae vaḡe amiꞌuma. Rehano zeꞌe raha ꞌada radiꞌuma. Mama Zaḡoḡa, ḡa niḡo iniro. Ḡae niḡano ze biroꞌi ebu ḡa eḡe teite tiburaroteꞌe teige, zeḡe niduꞌa mae tibuzoꞌi.
17.12: E zeḡe teite radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ḡaeꞌa iniroteꞌe niḡa inaraḡa hina ze faine biriro zu taufiro, eꞌanoꞌo zeḡe niduꞌa mene dauḡiro. Rehano tiba daꞌo ruineꞌeteꞌe ibiḡa uꞌa diuḡiro. ꞌOugadu Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro.
17.13: Izidi e ḡae vaḡe amiꞌuma. Eꞌe raha ꞌada zeḡe veize ꞌahige kurauꞌohe, mazaḡa e matuꞌe rudauꞌeteꞌe teige, zeḡe zuni matuꞌuꞌa iriꞌavozoga veize raꞌohe.
17.14: E ḡoereḡo ze ziniro, rehano raha azaḡaniꞌa ze heꞌeheꞌeziro, mazaḡa eꞌe mene raha azaḡa moneo teige, zeꞌe mene raha azaḡa moneo raꞌohe.
17.15: E ḡaꞌa ze rahaonoꞌo zamaze vaḡizoga veize mene umiꞌeꞌohe, rehano Satani mazaonoꞌo ze biroga veize umiꞌeꞌohe.
17.16: Eꞌe mene raha azaḡa moneo teige, zeḡe zuni mene raha azaḡa moneo raꞌohe.
17.17: Ze ḡoere huga hina zaḡozaḡozoꞌi. Ḡae ḡoereꞌe huga.
17.18: Ḡaeꞌa e raha ꞌada tuḡuhiroteꞌe teige, eḡeꞌa ze raha azaḡa mazao tuḡuziro.
17.19: Zeḡe veize e eḡeꞌa bare zaḡozaḡoheꞌohe, mazaḡa zeḡe zuni ḡoere huga hina zaḡozaḡozoga veize raꞌohe.” Fieꞌeteꞌe Azaḡa veize Kuraro
17.20: “E eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa veize daꞌo mene kurauꞌohe, rehano ze ḡoere egadu eḡe mazao fiteꞌe azaḡa veize zuni kurauꞌohe.
17.21: Mama, ḡa eḡe teite tiburaroteꞌe zu e ḡae teite tiburaroteꞌe teige, zeḡe niduꞌa tiburafine kurauꞌohe. Ebu zeḡe zuni emeḡe teite tiburanadu raha azaḡaniꞌa ḡa eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe mae ḡihinoga veize kurauꞌohe.
17.22: Ḡa eꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae ihoziroteꞌe teige, eḡe zuni zeꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae ihoziro, mazaḡa emeꞌe tiburaroteꞌe teige, zeḡe zuni tiburafine raꞌohe.
17.23: E zeḡe teite tiburaro zu ḡa eḡe teite tiburaro. E zeḡe niduꞌa hube hune tiburanoga veize kurauꞌohe. Mazaḡa ḡaeꞌa e tuḡuhiroteꞌe ebu e zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe teige, ḡaeꞌa zeḡe zuni zamare borofeꞌetaꞌaꞌe raha azaḡaniꞌa ederifine raꞌohe.
17.24: Mama, e ḡaeꞌa iniroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe eḡeꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe habaꞌano eḡe teite radoga urateꞌohe. Ebu ꞌizema raha zu adure haḡaogano ḡaeꞌa eḡe zamare borofadu ḡa eꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae reirotaꞌaꞌe zeḡe zuni ederoga urateꞌohe.
17.25: Mama duduḡa hune, raha azaḡaꞌe ḡa aḡuꞌa, rehano e ḡaꞌe edeḡa. Ebu eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe ḡaeꞌa eḡe tuḡuhirotaꞌaꞌe edeḡa.
17.26: E zeḡe mazao ḡa ihoziro ebu barebare ihoziꞌuma. Aꞌe ḡaꞌa e zamare borofiroteꞌe teige, zeḡe zuni vaze ꞌahogaꞌahoga zamare borofoga zu e zeḡe teite tiburanoga veize raꞌohe.”

18.1: Iesuꞌa kuraroteꞌe enogano, ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite Kiderona doꞌoḡa moneafa onamiro. Eꞌea olivi ireḡa mebaḡa ꞌahoga eꞌe, ebu ani ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite eꞌe mebaḡa diuḡiro.
18.2: Iesu revoharoteꞌe vazeḡa, Iuda zuni eꞌe habaꞌa ederiro, mazaḡa Iesuꞌa ḡae ḡehaḡa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite deꞌea nuꞌoraro.
18.3: Eꞌanoꞌo Iudaꞌa Roma uti azaḡa, ebu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu Farisea azaḡaniꞌa tuḡuziroteꞌe kuru neḡa uti azaḡa teite ariro. Ze ihure nunu zu uti ḡauḡa madu meba eꞌe diuḡiro.
18.4: Iesuꞌe ane mazao naginiꞌa fureratiteꞌe ederadu zeḡe vaḡe onamiro ebu ḡadiziro, “Zaꞌe iniu vaḡeꞌohe?”
18.5: Zeḡeꞌa naenaeniro, “Nazareta vazeḡa Iesu.” Ebu aniꞌa ziro, “Aꞌe eḡe.” Ani revoharoteꞌe vazeḡa, Iudaꞌe zeḡe teite deꞌea edau radiro.
18.6: Iesuꞌa, “Aꞌe eḡe,” rae zirotene, ze suve ḡouradu rahao higau bauriro.
18.7: Ebu Iesuꞌa bare ḡadiziro, “Zaꞌe iniu vaḡeꞌohe?” Zeꞌa niro, “Nazareta vazeḡa Iesu.”
18.8: Iesuꞌa naenaeziro, “E zeha, aꞌe eḡe. Za e vaḡoꞌidene, eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe ahete modoꞌi.”
18.9: Aniꞌa ꞌouge reirotaꞌaꞌe ibite ꞌahige kuraroteꞌeꞌa hudanoga veize reiro, “E ḡaeꞌa iniroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano tiba zuni mene dauniro.”
18.10: Eꞌe madaḡano Simona Peteroꞌe benisiḡeta. Aneꞌa eꞌe ahase bunadu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa tuḡure vazeḡa udirotene, edaꞌe teḡaḡa variꞌe butiro. Tuḡure vazeḡa niḡaꞌe Malokusi.
18.11: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa Petero niro, “Benisiḡo bare iḡuꞌano ofoꞌi! Eḡe Mamaꞌa iniroteꞌe bioḡa ꞌahi eḡeꞌa gage huniꞌuma.” Iesuꞌe Anasi vaḡe Tutune Onamiro (Mataio 26:57-58; Mareko 14:53-54; Luka 22:54)
18.12: Roma uti azaḡa zu uti vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa ebu kuru neḡa ḡianeꞌeteꞌe Iuda uti azaḡaniꞌa Iesu obone teadu autiro.
18.13: Ebu ze ani Anasi vaḡe ibite tutune onamiro. Anasiꞌe Kaiafa emoḡa zu Kaiafaꞌe eꞌe muriḡano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa.
18.14: Kaiafaꞌe ibite Iuda azaḡa boroboro mazao ꞌahige iraduguziro, “Vaze niduꞌa veize vaze tibaniꞌa rudauneꞌe ufeta manoḡa.” Peteroꞌa Iesu Oꞌoniro (Mataio 26:69-70; Mareko 14:66-68; Luka 22:55-57)
18.15: Simona Petero zu Iesu tahiꞌa ꞌahoganiꞌa Iesu hegote onamiro. Tahiꞌa eꞌeꞌa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa ederadu Iesu teite dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa ne habaꞌa diuḡiro.
18.16: Rehano Peteroꞌe ibiheta enogano edau radiro. Eꞌanoꞌo dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa edereꞌeteꞌe tahiꞌaḡa eꞌeꞌa buanadu ibiheta taufeꞌeteꞌe roḡaeḡa ḡoreniro, ebu Petero mae zouniro.
18.17: ꞌOugirotene, ibiheta taufeꞌeteꞌe roḡaeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa Petero niro, “Vaze ꞌomo tahiꞌatahiꞌa boꞌaḡano ḡae zuni tahiꞌa ꞌahogahe?” Aneꞌa naenaeniro, “Eꞌe mene.”
18.18: Eꞌe madaḡanoꞌe nahune, eꞌanoꞌo tuḡure azaḡa zu kuru neḡa uti azaḡaniꞌa ahirize giginoga radu ire roga hufiro, ebu ire roga gabaḡeḡenadu idiro. Petero zuni ahiꞌa gigineꞌenaꞌa, zeḡe teite edau radiro. Anasiꞌa Iesu Ḡadiniro (Mataio 26:59-66; Mareko 14:55-64; Luka 22:66-71)
18.19: Eꞌe madaḡano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa Iesu mazao ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa zu ane ihore moneo ḡadiniro.
18.20: Ebu Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “E hunio vaze niduꞌa mazao ḡoeriro. Iuda azaḡa niduꞌa nuꞌoruꞌeteꞌe kuru neḡa ga nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa zamaḡano iḡaiḡa ihoziro. E ḡoere ꞌahoga mene ꞌuꞌuru reiro.
18.21: Ḡa nougadu e ḡadiheꞌohe? Eḡe ḡoere igiroteꞌe azaḡa ḡadizoꞌi. Ze eꞌa nagini reirotaꞌaꞌe edeḡa.”
18.22: Iesuꞌa ꞌouge reirotene, kuru neḡa uti vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ani uhiḡano edanadu iraḡano faꞌoniro ebu niro, “Ḡa dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa mene gubaneꞌohe!”
18.23: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “E ḡoere ꞌahoga veꞌore roꞌidene, naginiꞌe veꞌoḡa rae furenoꞌi. Rehano e ḡoere huga roꞌidene, nougadu irahe faꞌoneha?”
18.24: Ebu Anasiꞌa Iesu ꞌevore ꞌize utoga zamaḡano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa, Kaiafa vaḡe tuḡuniro. Peteroꞌa Iesu Bare Oꞌoniro (Mataio 26:71-75; Mareko 14:69-72; Luka 22:58-62)
18.25: Simona Peteroꞌa edanadu ire roga genaḡano ide radiroteꞌea, vaze nuꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌa boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga, oꞌehe?” Rehano aneꞌa oꞌoniro, “Eꞌe mene.”
18.26: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa tuḡure vazeḡa ꞌahogaꞌe Peteroꞌa teḡaḡa variꞌiroteꞌe vazeḡa nabuga. Aneꞌa niro, “Eḡeꞌa ḡa ani teite olivi ireḡa mebaḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe horoꞌeha.”
18.27: Peteroꞌa bare oꞌoniro. Aneꞌa ꞌouge reirotene, kokorokuꞌa ugaro. Iesu Pilato vaḡe Tutune Onamiro (Mataio 27:1-2, 11-14; Mareko 15:1-5; Luka 23:1-5)
18.28: Ebu Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa Iesu Kaiafa mazaonoꞌo Roma gavana vazeḡa neḡa tutune onamiro. Aꞌe Oherebau uzeuze reiro. Zeꞌe Roma gavana ne zamaḡa mene diuḡiro. Mazaḡa aniꞌe Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa vazeḡa radu, ane ne diuḡine ze toradanadu Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa anoga mene idaḡa rae zamariro.
18.29: Eꞌanoꞌo Pilatoꞌa zeḡe vaḡe bua aradu ḡoreziro, “Vaze ꞌadiꞌe nagini haḡadu za aniꞌe veꞌoḡa rae raꞌohe?”
18.30: Ze naenaeniro, “Vaze ꞌahiꞌe mene vaze sauꞌa reifone, emeꞌa ani ḡae ꞌevoreo mene riꞌinifo.”
18.31: Pilatoꞌa ziro, “Zaeꞌa ani tutune onamadu zae goro hina kotanoꞌi.” Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa naenaeniro, “Eme, Iuda azaḡaꞌe vaze ꞌahoga runeo tuḡunogaꞌe mene idaḡa.”
18.32: ꞌOugadu Iesuꞌa nougenouge rudatiteꞌe moneo reiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaro.
18.33: Pilatoꞌa ane ne bare diuḡadu Iesu huniro ebu ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe Iuda azaḡa kinihe?”
18.34: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡadimu ꞌadiꞌe ḡae mazaonoꞌo ga vaze nuꞌa eḡe moneo ḡeiro?”
18.35: Pilatoꞌa naenaeniro, “Eꞌe mene Iuda vazeḡa. Ḡae haba azaḡa zu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa eḡe ꞌevoreo riꞌiꞌeha. Ḡa nagini haḡairo?”
18.36: Iesuꞌa niro, “Eꞌe mene raha ꞌadi zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe kiniḡa. Eꞌe raha ꞌadi zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe kiniḡa reifone, eḡe tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa Iuda azaḡa boroboro utitozenadu zeḡe ꞌevoreo eḡe riꞌihoga gararifo. Eḡeꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe habaꞌaꞌe mene raha ꞌadi, rehano haba ꞌahoga.”
18.37: Pilatoꞌa niro, “Tena ḡaꞌe kinihe?” Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare eꞌe kini raꞌohe. Aꞌe hube. E ḡoere huga rae furenoga veize fureraro zu raha ꞌahi ariro. Iniu ḡoere huga hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe eḡe ḡoere igiꞌohe.”
18.38: Pilatoꞌa ḡadiniro, “Ḡoere hugaꞌe nagini?” Iesu Runeo Tuḡuniro (Mataio 27:15-31; Mareko 15:6-20; Luka 23:13-25) Pilatoꞌa ꞌouge reiroteꞌe enogano, Iuda azaḡa boroboro vaḡe bare buanadu ziro, “E sauꞌa ꞌahoga ani mazaonoꞌo mene horoneha.
18.39: Rehano Iuda azaḡa haḡai idunaḡano, Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡano e zae veize ḡuꞌa vazeḡa ꞌahoga tuḡune buneꞌohe. Za eꞌa Iuda azaḡa kini tuḡune bunoga urateꞌehe?”
18.40: Ze bare ḡihau huaro, “Ani mene, rehano Barabasi mae bunoꞌi!” Barabasiꞌe ḡonore vazeḡa.

19.1: Eꞌanoꞌo Pilatoꞌa Iesu zamahu onamadu uti azaḡaniꞌa masiniro.
19.2: Ebu uti azaḡaniꞌa ire ezaga meigameiga mae ḡurunadu kini vadiga adiriḡa teige, vadigano redoharo ebu dabua kanaḡa vidoharo.
19.3: Ebu ze barebare ane vaḡe aradu ḡirihoharo, “Iuda azaḡa kini, nigunihi!” Ebu ze iraḡano faꞌoniro.
19.4: Pilatoꞌa bare buanadu Iuda azaḡa boroboro ziro, “Ḡianoꞌi. E Iesu zamahu zae mazao buniꞌuma. ꞌOugine, za eḡeꞌa ane mazaonoꞌo sauꞌani ꞌahoga mene horonataꞌaꞌe ederiꞌuma.”
19.5: Ebu Iesuꞌa ire ezaga meigameiga vadigano zu dabua kanaḡaḡeta bua ariro. Pilatoꞌa ziro, “Ḡianoꞌi, vaze aꞌe ꞌadi eꞌe!”
19.6: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu kuru neḡa uti azaḡaniꞌa Iesu horonirotene, ze ḡihau huaro, “Ani satauronoꞌi! Satauronoꞌi!” Pilatoꞌa ziro, “Zaeꞌa tutune onamadu satauronoꞌi. Eꞌe ani mazaonoꞌo veꞌoḡani ꞌahoga mene horoneha.”
19.7: Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa naenaeniro, “Emeḡe goro ḡoeꞌa idunaḡano aniꞌe rudaꞌuma, mazaḡa ani aneꞌa bare Badiꞌa Ubuga rae reiro.”
19.8: Pilatoꞌa zeḡe ḡoere igirotene, ufeta riharo.
19.9: Ebu ane ne bare diuḡadu Iesu ḡadiniro, “Ḡaꞌe noumanoꞌo ariro?” Rehano Iesuꞌa mene naenaeniro.
19.10: Pilatoꞌa niro, “Ḡa mene ḡorehiꞌumahe? Ḡa tuḡuꞌe buḡaditeꞌe ga satauroḡaditeꞌe gigiꞌaḡaꞌe eḡeꞌa meiro. Ḡa mene edereꞌehe?”
19.11: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Badiꞌaꞌa e sausauheꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa mene ḡanifone, ḡa e sausauhoga mene idarafo. Eꞌanoꞌo ḡae ꞌevoreo riꞌihateꞌe vazeḡa sauꞌaꞌe ufeta boro, aꞌe ḡae sauꞌa vitinoga.”
19.12: Iesu ḡoere uꞌano, Pilatoꞌa ani tuḡune bunihi rae inariro. Rehano Iuda azaḡa boroboroꞌa houhoune niro, “Ḡa vaze ꞌahi tuḡune bunine, ḡaꞌe mene Roma kiniḡa mone vazeḡa. Iniuꞌa ane bare kini rae reine, aniꞌe Roma kiniḡa agirohauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.”
19.13: Pilatoꞌa ḡoere eꞌe igirotene, Iesu zamahu bunadu kota habaꞌano ehoriro. Kota vazeḡa ehoroḡa habaꞌaꞌe Vatava hina Ruruḡiro rae huniroteꞌe habaꞌano tiro. Aꞌe Heberu ḡoeꞌano Gabata rae huniro.
19.14: Eꞌe madaḡaꞌe Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa ꞌizema mougano, ruhibeꞌeteꞌe madaḡa zu madai kirikiri. Pilatoꞌa Iuda azaḡa ziro, “Ḡianoꞌi, zae kiniꞌe ꞌadi eꞌe.”
19.15: Zeḡeꞌa huaro, “Manoꞌi! Manoꞌi! Satauronoꞌi!” Pilatoꞌa ḡadiziro, “E zae kini satauroniꞌumahe?” Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa naenaeniro, “Emeḡe kini ꞌahogaꞌe oꞌoꞌa, rehano Roma kiniḡa daꞌo.”
19.16: Eꞌanoꞌo Pilatoꞌa Iesu satauronoga veize zeḡe ꞌevoreo riꞌiniro. Iesu Satauroniro (Mataio 27:32-44; Mareko 15:21-32; Luka 23:26-43) Ebu uti azaḡaniꞌa Iesu tutune onamiro.
19.17: Iesuꞌa ane satauro odoheꞌenaꞌa, Vadini Isiḡa rae huneꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa onamiro. Aꞌe Heberu ḡoeꞌano Gologota rae huniro.
19.18: Eꞌea ze Iesu satauroniro. Vaze aheu zuni ane edaꞌe moneo ebu kauri moneo satauroziro, u Iesuꞌe nemao satauroniro.
19.19: Pilatoꞌa Iesu haḡai sauꞌaꞌe nagini rae ihozifine, ire rafaḡa rana mirihadu satauro rana tiro. Aꞌe ꞌahige rae mirihiro, “NAZARETA VAZEḠA IESU, IUDA AZAḠ KINI.”
19.20: Mirihirotaꞌaꞌe Iuda azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa meꞌodiro. Mazaḡa Iesu satauroniroteꞌe habaꞌaꞌe Ierusalema uhiḡano, ebu aꞌe Heberu ḡoeꞌano, Roma ḡoeꞌano, zu Giriki ḡoeꞌano mirihiro.
19.21: Eꞌanoꞌo dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa Pilato niro, “'Iuda Azaḡa Kini,' rae ago mirihoꞌi, rehano 'Eꞌe Iuda Azaḡa Kini,' rae mirihoꞌi.”
19.22: Pilatoꞌa naenaeziro, “E eḡeꞌa mirihihi rae raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa miriheha.”
19.23: Ebu Iesu satauronirotene, uti azaḡaniꞌa Iesu raga dabuaḡa madu ḡazaḡano rovoniro, ebu zeḡeꞌa tibatiba meiro. Ze zizuni dabuaḡa zuni meiro. Aꞌe hitanaonoꞌo oda ḡuzu dabuaḡa tiba zu mene variꞌe turiniroteꞌe dabuaḡa.
19.24: Eꞌanoꞌo uti azaḡaniꞌa neneḡaniro, “ꞌAdiꞌe mene zigiꞌuma. Kaḡusi arahoḡa arahadu iniuꞌa meiteꞌe ḡianiꞌuma.” ꞌOugadu Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌeꞌa hudaro, “Ze eḡe raga dabuaḡa ḡahugotitiro, ebu zizuni dabuaḡaꞌe kaḡusi arahoḡa arahadu meiro.” Eꞌanoꞌo uti azaḡaniꞌa ꞌouge haḡairo.
19.25: Iesu satauro uhiḡano Iesu viꞌa, viꞌa negoḡa, Kolopasi inuga Maria, ebu Magadala roḡaeḡa Mariaꞌa edau radiro.
19.26: Iesuꞌa viꞌa zu ane zamarone tahiꞌaḡa viꞌa uhiḡano edauꞌeteꞌe horozirotene, viꞌa niro, “Roḡae boro, aniꞌe ḡae ubugo.”
19.27: Ebu Iesuꞌa tahiꞌa eꞌe niro, “Aniꞌe ḡae viꞌu.” Eꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo tahiꞌa eꞌeꞌa Iesu viꞌa tutune ane ne onamadu taufiro. Iesu Rune (Mataio 27:45-56; Mareko 15:33-41; Luka 23:44-49)
19.28: Eꞌe enogano, Iesuꞌe ani gauḡa niduꞌa izidi hauḡataꞌaꞌe ederiro. Ebu Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌeꞌa hudanoga veize ꞌahige rae reiro, “E irinehe moꞌoheha.”
19.29: Eꞌea vaini vuḡa ḡiḡiꞌa ḡoḡoreḡa ꞌahoga eꞌe. Eꞌanoꞌo ze vu romane zouneꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa madu vaini vuḡa ḡiḡiꞌa iriꞌavoniro, ebu Gubu somoriḡa rana teadu ani mazaneo ite tiro.
19.30: Iesuꞌa vaini vuḡa ḡiḡiꞌaḡa gagadu ꞌahige rae reiro, “Eḡe gau niduꞌa hauḡeha.” Ebu vadiga ḡuḡuradu iriga riꞌiro.
19.31: Eꞌe madaḡaꞌe Bana Madaḡa ruhibeꞌeteꞌe madaḡa, ebu irarirotene Iḡine Modiroteꞌe Muiḡa zamaḡano Bana Madaḡa boro reiro. Iuda azaḡaniꞌa Bana Madaḡano rune ahiꞌa satauro rana modoga mene uratiro ꞌahine, rune azaḡa odaze vahegadu ahirize satauronoꞌo mae vaḡinoga veize Pilato uminiro.
19.32: Eꞌanoꞌo uti azaḡaniꞌa onamadu Iesu teite satauroniroteꞌe vazeḡa ibiꞌa odaḡa vahegiro, ebu vaze ꞌahoga odaḡa vahegiro.
19.33: Rehano ze Iesu vaḡe onamirotene, ani amahi rudanoga horoniro, eꞌanoꞌo odaḡa mene vahegiro.
19.34: Rehano uti vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa garaḡota hina rebeḡano ḡounadu ru zu vuꞌa zogone sore buaro.
19.35: (Aꞌe eꞌeguḡa horoniroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa rae fureniroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa. Aniꞌa rae fureniroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe huga. Ani aneꞌa ḡoere huga ziꞌetaꞌaꞌe edereꞌohe, ebu zae zuni mae ḡihinifine rae fureneꞌohe.)
19.36: ꞌAhiguḡaniꞌa Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌeꞌa hudanoga veize fureraro, “Isiga tiba zuni mene vahegaꞌuma.”
19.37: Ebu Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae reiro, “Zeḡeꞌa ḡouniroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe zeḡeꞌa ḡianiꞌuma.” Iesu Guriro (Mataio 27:57-61; Mareko 15:42-47; Luka 23:50-56)
19.38: Eꞌe enogano Arimate vazeḡa, Iosefaꞌa Pilato vaḡe onamadu Iesu ahiri satauronoꞌo mae bunoga veize uminiro. Aniꞌe Iesu tahiꞌa ꞌahoga, rehano eꞌe moneo vaze ꞌahoga mene ihoniro, mazaḡa aniꞌe Iuda azaḡa boroboro rihoziro. Pilatoꞌa, “Idaḡa,” rae reirotene, ani onamadu Iesu ahiri mae onamiro.
19.39: Nikodemoꞌe ibite ohere Iesu vaḡe onamiroteꞌe vazeḡa. Ani zuni Iosefa teite onamiro. Aniꞌe murava hohoḡa aloe teite mirunadu odohe ariro. Aꞌe 34 kilo heuḡa.
19.40: Ebu Iuda azaḡa rune gureꞌeteꞌe ibiḡano, ze Iesu ahiri madu miruniroteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe dabua manoḡa kuiḡa teite ꞌumiro.
19.41: Iesu satauroniroteꞌe habaꞌano kaka mebaḡa ꞌahoga eꞌe, ebu eꞌea vatava iduḡa ꞌahoga eꞌe. Aꞌe rune vazeḡani ꞌahoga ꞌizema tiroteꞌe iduḡa iziga.
19.42: Eꞌe madaḡanoꞌe Iuda azaḡaniꞌa Bana Madaḡa veize ruhibeꞌeteꞌe madaḡa ebu idu aꞌe zeḡe uhiḡano ꞌahine, ze Iesu ahiriꞌe eꞌe zamaḡano tiro.

20.1: Fura oherebau uzeuze ꞌize uzaboḡano, Magadala roḡaeḡa Mariaꞌa idu onamiro ebu idu ꞌuiroteꞌe hadiḡa boro kiune vaḡinoga horoniro.
20.2: Eꞌanoꞌo aneꞌa Simona Petero zu Iesu zamarone tahiꞌaḡa vaḡe dure onamadu ziro, “Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa Zuhiꞌa Boro ahiri iduonoꞌo mae vaḡineha. Ze ani noꞌe habaꞌano teataꞌaꞌe eme aḡuꞌa!”
20.3: Ebu Petero zu Iesu zamarone tahiꞌaḡaniꞌa iḡunadu idu habaꞌa uꞌa onamiro.
20.4: Anianine dure onamirotene, tahiꞌa eꞌeꞌa ḡihau duradu Petero vitine iduo ibite feuriro.
20.5: Ani ḡuḡuradu idu zamaḡa ḡianirotene, Iesu ꞌumiroteꞌe dabuaḡa kuiḡa daꞌo deꞌea radoga horoniro, rehano aniꞌe mene diuḡiro.
20.6: Simona Petero zuni ani hegote feuri ariro. Ani idu zamaḡa diuḡirotene, Iesu ahiri ꞌumiroteꞌe dabuaḡa kuiḡaꞌe deꞌea radoga horoniro,
20.7: ebu Iesu vadiga ꞌumiroteꞌe dabuaḡa horoniro. Rehano vadiga dabuaḡaꞌe ḡuadu ahiri ꞌumiroteꞌe dabuaḡa kuiḡanonoꞌo avo tiro.
20.8: Ebu ibite iduo feuriroteꞌe tahiꞌaḡaniꞌa diuḡiro. Ane zuni horonadu Maria ḡoere mae ḡihiniro.
20.9: Rehano ze Buka Zaḡoḡano Iesuꞌa rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare iḡuniꞌuma rae reiroteꞌe ꞌize mene zamariro.
20.10: Ebu Iesu tahiꞌa aheuꞌa baradu neze onamiro. Iesuꞌa Magadala Roḡaeḡa Maria mazao Fureraro (Mareko 16:9-11)
20.11: Rehano Mariaꞌa idu enogano edanadu niau radiro. Aniꞌa niauꞌenaꞌa, idu zamaḡa dire ḡianiro.
20.12: Ebu dabua ꞌuruḡa vidaroteꞌe tuḡure viga aheu horoziro. Ze Iesu ahiri bazune tiroteꞌe habaꞌano ehore radiunu. Tuḡure viga ꞌahogaꞌe vadiga ḡoha ebu ꞌahogaꞌe odaḡa ḡuzuo radiunu.
20.13: Ze Maria ḡadiniro, “Roḡae, ḡa nougadu niauꞌohe?” Aniꞌa naenaeziro, “Vazeꞌa eḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro mae vaḡineha. Ze nouma teataꞌaꞌe e aḡuꞌa.”
20.14: Ebu Mariaꞌa tehirotene, Iesuꞌa edau radoga horoniro, rehano aꞌe Iesu rae mene ederiro.
20.15: Iesuꞌa ḡadiniro, “Roḡae, ḡa nougadu niauꞌohe? Ḡa iniu vaḡeꞌohe?” Mariaꞌa aniꞌe kaka mebaḡa ḡianeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa rae zamaradu niro, “Vaze boro, ḡaꞌa ani ahiri mae onameha roꞌidene, nouma teateꞌe ehoꞌi, ꞌougine eḡeꞌa meꞌuma.”
20.16: Iesuꞌa niro, “Maria.” Mariaꞌa tehadu Heberu ḡoeꞌano niro, “Raboni!” (Eꞌe ḡoeꞌa hugaꞌe Ihore vazeḡa.)
20.17: Iesuꞌa niro, “Ago obohoꞌi, mazaḡa e ꞌize Mama vaḡe mene iteha. Ḡa eḡe tahiꞌatahiꞌa vaḡe onamadu ꞌahige ihozoꞌi, 'Eꞌe Mama vaḡe itiꞌuma. Aniꞌe eḡe Mama zuni zae Moze, eḡe Badiꞌa zuni zae Badiꞌa.'”
20.18: Eꞌanoꞌo Magadala roḡaeḡa Mariaꞌa Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌa vaḡe onamadu ihoziro, “E Zuhiꞌa Boro horoneha!” Ebu ani Iesuꞌa niroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ziro. Iesuꞌa Ane Tahiꞌatahiꞌa mazao Fureraro (Mataio 28:16-20; Mareko 16:14-18; Luka 24:36-49)
20.19: Eꞌe furaḡa ḡoravaḡano Iesu tahiꞌa niduꞌa nuꞌorarotene, ze ne ibihetaḡa niduꞌa hararo, mazaḡa Iuda azaḡa rihoziro. Eꞌe madaḡano Iesuꞌa diuḡi ariro ebu zeḡe boꞌaḡano edanadu ziro, “Zama roḡeḡaꞌe zae teite radoꞌi.”
20.20: Aneꞌa ḡoere eꞌe ziroteꞌe enogano ꞌevoꞌa zu rebeḡa ihoziro. Ebu ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa Zuhiꞌa Boro horonadu ze matuꞌe rudaro.
20.21: Ebu Iesuꞌa bare ziro, “Zama roḡeḡa zae teite radiuꞌenoꞌi. Mamaꞌa eḡe tuḡuhiroteꞌe teige, e za tuḡuzeꞌohe.”
20.22: Ebu Iesuꞌa zeḡe rana irine hodadu ziro, “Vine Zaḡoḡa moꞌi.
20.23: Zaꞌa vaze ꞌahoga haḡai sauꞌa rae modine, Badiꞌaꞌa ane haḡai sauꞌa rae modiꞌuma. U zaꞌa vaze ꞌahoga haḡai sauꞌa mene rae modine, Badiꞌaꞌa ane haḡai sauꞌa mene rae modiꞌuma.” Tomasi mazao Fureraro
20.24: Iesu tahiꞌa gaubanana aheu fare boꞌaḡano tahiꞌa ꞌahogaꞌe Tomasi, niḡa ꞌahogaꞌe Atoꞌa. Aniꞌe Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa vaḡe arirotene, zeḡe teite mene radiro.
20.25: Eꞌanoꞌo Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa niro, “Eme Zuhiꞌa Boro horoneha.” Rehano aniꞌa naenaeziro, “E ani ꞌevore ikoko iḡuꞌa horonine, ebu eḡe ꞌevore huduꞌa ane ꞌevore ikoko iḡuꞌano surubine, zu eḡe ꞌevore ane rebe iḡuꞌano surubine, zae ḡoere mae ḡihiniꞌuma.”
20.26: Fura tiba enogano Iesu tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌa ne zamaḡano bare radiro, ebu Tomasi zuni zeḡe teite radiro. Zeḡe ne ibihetaꞌe haranoga, rehano Iesuꞌa diuḡadu zeḡe boꞌaḡano edaro ebu ziro, “Zama roḡeḡa zae teite radoꞌi.”
20.27: Ebu aniꞌa Tomasi niro, “ꞌEvoꞌo huduꞌa ꞌaha teadu ꞌevorehe ḡianoꞌi, ebu ꞌevoꞌo ꞌeinadu rebeheo suruboꞌi. Zamaḡo ago ꞌadaꞌadoꞌi, rehano fioꞌi.”
20.28: Tomasiꞌa naenaeniro, “Eḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro, eḡe Badiꞌa!”
20.29: Iesuꞌa niro, “Ḡa eḡe horoheha ꞌahine, eḡe mazao fieꞌehe? E mene horohadu eḡe mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe matuꞌeꞌohe.” Ioaneꞌa Nagini veize Buka ꞌAhi Mirihiroteꞌe moneo Ḡoeriro
20.30: Iesuꞌa ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa zamao haḡai nu badeḡa nunu haḡairo. Eꞌe niduꞌa buka ꞌahi zamaḡano mene mirihiro.
20.31: Rehano e ꞌahige mirihirotaꞌaꞌe zaeꞌa Iesuꞌe Keriso, Badiꞌa Ubuga rae mae ḡihinifine, ebu ani mazao fiadu ani niḡano ḡabone hidifine raꞌohe.

21.1: Eꞌe enogano Iesuꞌa Tiberia duꞌuraḡano ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa mazao bare fureraro. Eꞌe hariḡaꞌe ꞌahiguḡa.
21.2: Simona Petero, Atoa rae huneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa Tomasi, Galilea habaꞌano Kana neḡa vazeḡa Natanaela, Zebedeo ubuga aheu, ebu Iesu tahiꞌa aheuꞌa deꞌea nuꞌoranadu radiro.
21.3: Simona Peteroꞌa ziro, “E reꞌevi onameꞌohe.” Zeḡeꞌa niro, “Emeḡe zuni ḡae teite onamiꞌuma.” Eꞌanoꞌo ze onamadu ḡasio tiriro. Rehano eꞌe oheꞌano ḡozoneni ꞌahoga mene maro.
21.4: Irarirotene, oherebau uzeuze Iesuꞌa hesao edaro, rehano ane tahiꞌatahiꞌaꞌe aꞌe Iesu rae mene ederiro.
21.5: Ebu aniꞌa ḡadiziro, “Eḡe vaze, za ḡozoneni ꞌahoga mene manahe?” Zeꞌa naenaeniro, “Mene maneha.”
21.6: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Ḡasize edaꞌe naeo reꞌevaze ꞌeinoꞌi, ꞌougine za ḡozone nu maꞌuma.” Ze reꞌeva ꞌeinirotene, reꞌevaze bare hegogaꞌe mene idararo, mazaḡa reꞌevaꞌe ḡozoneꞌa ufeta iriꞌaviro.
21.7: Ebu Iesu zamarone tahiꞌaḡaniꞌa Petero niro, “Aꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro!” Peteroꞌa dabuaḡa fuhiꞌadu reꞌevinu. Aniꞌa, “Aꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro,” rae igirotene, raga dabuaḡa bare vidanadu vuo rafate buaro ebu hesa mone ḡemabe onamiro.
21.8: U tahiꞌa ꞌahogaꞌahogaꞌe ḡozoneꞌa iriꞌaviroteꞌe reꞌevaḡa obone teadu ahaseꞌenaꞌa, ḡasio hesa mone onamiro. Mazaḡa zeꞌe gabaonoꞌo mene faḡa, 90 mita daꞌo.
21.9: Ze hesao buarotene, ḡeꞌare rana ḡozone rafohoga zu ꞌuvahu odoga horoniro.
21.10: Ebu Iesuꞌa ziro, “Za iziduꞌu manateꞌe ḡozoneḡa nu mae aroꞌi.”
21.11: Eꞌanoꞌo Simona Peteroꞌa ḡasio tiradu ḡozone boroboroꞌa iriꞌaviroteꞌe reꞌevaḡa ahasiro ebu gabao tiro. Ḡozone niduꞌaꞌe 153. Ḡozoneꞌe ḡehaḡa bagaḡa rehano, reꞌevaꞌe mene zigaro.
21.12: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Aradu oherebau ogomuḡa anoꞌi.” Rehano zeḡe boꞌaḡano ꞌahoga zuni ani mazao, “Ḡa iniu?” rae mene ḡadine nuriro, mazaḡa ze aniꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro rae ederiro.
21.13: Iesuꞌa onamadu ꞌuvahu odoga meiro ebu ze ziniro. Ḡozone zu madu ziniro.
21.14: ꞌAdiꞌe Iesuꞌa rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡabodiroteꞌe enogano ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa mazao ḡae uḡiduḡa fureraroteꞌe madaḡa reiro. Iesuꞌa Petero Ḡae Uḡidu Ḡadiniro
21.15: Ze ogau hauḡirotene, Iesuꞌa Simona Petero ḡadiniro, “Ioane ubuga Simona, ḡa e zamare borofeꞌehe? ꞌAhi duḡuruꞌa e zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe vitizogahe?” Peteroꞌa niro, “Oꞌe, Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡa eḡeꞌa ḡa zamare borofeꞌetaꞌaꞌe edeḡa.” Iesuꞌa niro, “Eḡe mamoe ubugaubuga ḡubuzoꞌi.”
21.16: Iesuꞌa ḡae aheuḡa niro, “Ioane ubuga Simona, ḡa e zamare borofeꞌehe?” Peteroꞌa niro, “Oꞌe, Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡa eꞌa ḡa zamare borofeꞌetaꞌaꞌe edeḡa.” Iesuꞌa niro, “Eḡe mamoe taufoꞌi.”
21.17: Iesuꞌa ḡae uḡiduḡa niro, “Ioane ubuga Simona, ḡa e zamare borofeꞌehe?” Iesuꞌa ḡae uḡiduḡa, “Ḡa e zamare borofeꞌehe?” rae ḡadiniro ꞌahine, Peteroꞌe zamaḡaniꞌa adudanadu niro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡa ḡau niduꞌa edeḡa. Eḡeꞌa ḡa zamare borofeꞌetaꞌaꞌe ḡa edeḡa.” Iesuꞌa niro, “Eḡe mamoe ḡubuzoꞌi.
21.18: E hube hune ḡaꞌohe. Ḡaꞌe tahiꞌa iziga madaḡanoꞌe ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare dabuaḡo vidanadu ḡaeꞌa uratiroteꞌe habaꞌa onamido. Rehano ḡa vourine, vazeꞌa ꞌevoꞌo ꞌeinadu dabua vidoḡaniꞌuma ebu ḡaeꞌa mene urateꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa tutuꞌe onamiꞌuma.”
21.19: Iesuꞌe ꞌahi ḡoeꞌa hina Peteroꞌa nougenouge rudanadu Badiꞌa ni mae ḡihiniteꞌe moneo dehene ihoziro. Ebu Iesuꞌa Petero niro, “Eḡe hegotoꞌi.”
21.20: Ebu Peteroꞌa tehadu Iesu zamarone tahiꞌaḡaniꞌa anianine hegoteꞌeteꞌe horoniro. Aniꞌe ibite ḡorava ogomu anogano Iesu mazao aroranadu, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, iniuꞌa revoḡaniꞌuma?” rae ḡadiniroteꞌe vazeḡa.
21.21: Peteroꞌa ani horonirotene, Iesu ḡadiniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, tahiꞌa ꞌadiꞌe nougiꞌuma?”
21.22: Iesuꞌa naenaeniro, “Aniꞌe izidionoꞌo onamo eḡeꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡano ḡabode radoga e uratoꞌidene zuni, ḡa ani moneo ago zamaroꞌi. Ḡaꞌe eḡe hegotoꞌi!”
21.23: Eꞌanoꞌo Iesu ḡoere ꞌadiꞌe Iesu hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano bororanadu ze tahiꞌa aꞌe mene rudaꞌuma rae reiro. Rehano Iesuꞌa aniꞌe mene rudaꞌuma rae mene niro, rehano ꞌahige daꞌo reiro, “Aniꞌe izidionoꞌo onamo eḡeꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡano ḡabode radoga e uratoꞌidene zuni, ḡa ani moneoꞌe ago zamaroꞌi.” Ḡoere Ḡonaga
21.24: Eꞌe ꞌahiguḡa horonadu rae fureneꞌeteꞌe ebu mirihiroteꞌe tahiꞌaḡa. Emeḡe niduꞌa edeḡa, eḡeꞌa rae fureneꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe huga.
21.25: Iesuꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa nunuꞌe ḡehaḡa. Eḡe zamarone, Iesu haḡaiḡa niduꞌa hune mirihine, buka aꞌe ufeta ḡehaḡa reꞌuma, ebu raha ꞌada buka eꞌe niduꞌa titeꞌe habaꞌaꞌe oꞌoꞌa reꞌuma.

1.1: Vaze boro Teofilo, e buka ibiꞌa zamaḡano Iesuꞌa gauinuteꞌe zu ihozinuteꞌe niduꞌa moneo mirihiro.
1.2: Ebu Vine Zaḡoḡaonoꞌo aneꞌa ohotiroteꞌe apostolo azaḡa ihoziroteꞌe ḡarugano adure ḡoha mae itiroteꞌe moneo mirihiro.
1.3: Iesuꞌe aduga hidadu rudaroteꞌe enogano, ani ꞌize ḡaboga raꞌeteꞌe ihozoga veize haḡai nunu furenoziniro. Aniꞌe mada 40 zamaḡano apostolo azaḡa mazao fureraro ebu Badiꞌaꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe moneo ḡoeriro.
1.4: Iesuꞌa zeḡe teite nuꞌoraroteꞌe madaḡano aneꞌa ḡoere riḡa ziro, “Ierusalema ago modoꞌi, ebu eḡe Mamaꞌa ḡoitoriroteꞌe ḡahunoneḡa guhine radoꞌi. Aꞌe zaeꞌa eḡe mazaonoꞌo igiroteꞌe ḡoitore ḡoeꞌa.
1.5: Ioaneꞌe vu hina babatisoziro, rehano zaꞌe mada nu enogano Vine Zaḡoḡa hina babatiso meꞌuma.” Iesuꞌe Adure Ḡoha mae Itiro
1.6: Mada ꞌahogano apostolo azaḡaniꞌa nuꞌoru tiburarotene, Iesu ḡadiniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, izidiꞌe ḡaeꞌa Isaraela bare madu Isaraela azaḡa baronoziniteꞌe madaḡahe?”
1.7: Iesuꞌa ziro, “Eꞌe madaḡaꞌe Mamaꞌa ane gigiꞌaḡa hina ohoniro ꞌahine, za ederogaꞌe mene idaḡa.
1.8: Rehano Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa zae vaḡe ovaiteꞌe madaḡano zaꞌe gigiꞌaḡa meꞌuma, ebu Ierusalemao zu Iudea habaꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano ebu Samaria habaꞌano onamo haba ḡonagano eḡe hari rae fureniꞌuma.”
1.9: Aneꞌa ꞌouge reiroteꞌe enogano, ani zeḡe ubumao adure ḡoha mae ḡihine itiro, ebu ḡozeꞌa ani ꞌuadu ze ani mene horoniro.
1.10: Iesuꞌe adure ḡoha mae iteꞌeteꞌea, ze adure ḡohani gagau ḡiane radirotene, tabara dabua ꞌuruḡa vidaroteꞌe tuḡure viga aheuꞌa zeḡe uhiḡano edaro.
1.11: Ebu tuḡure viga aheuꞌa ziro, “Galilea azaḡa, za nougadu ꞌahao edauꞌenaꞌa, adure ḡohani ḡianeꞌohe? Iesuꞌe zae mazaonoꞌo adure ḡohani mae ḡihine iteha. Ani ꞌouge adure ḡoha mae itateꞌe zaeꞌa horonateꞌe teige, vesuꞌu bare ꞌouge ovamiꞌuma.” Iuda Iḡurio Matia Ohoniro
1.12: Ebu hena apostolo azaḡaꞌe Olivi Maḡa rae huniroteꞌe habaꞌanonoꞌo Ierusalema bare onamiro. Eꞌe faḡaꞌe Ierusalemaonoꞌo tiba kilomita heuḡa radu Bana Madaḡano ragavogaꞌe idararo.
1.13: Ze Ierusalemao feurirotene, zeḡeꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe hitaga neḡa diuḡi itiro. Zeꞌe Petero, Ioane, Iakobo, Anderea, Filipi, Tomasi, Batolomeo, Mataio, Alefeo ubuga Iakobo, Zelota vazeḡa Simona ebu Iakobo ubuga Iuda.
1.14: Zeḡe niduꞌaꞌe roḡae nu ebu Iesu viꞌa Maria zu Iesu negoḡa duḡuru teite zamaze tibunadu iḡaiḡa kurau nuꞌoraunu.
1.15: Eꞌe madaḡano fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa nuꞌoraro. Zeḡe niduꞌaꞌe 120 heuḡa. Zeḡe boꞌaḡano Peteroꞌa iḡune edaro.
1.16: Ebu aneꞌa ḡoeriro, “Nego nabudi, ibite Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa Davidaonoꞌo Iuda moneo Buka Zaḡoḡano mirihiroteꞌeꞌa hudaro. Aꞌe Iudaꞌa Iesu obone tiroteꞌe azaḡa ibitoziroteꞌe hariḡa.
1.17: Iudaꞌe emeḡe boꞌaḡano tahiꞌaḡa ꞌahoga reiro, ebu emeḡe teite gau tiba haḡainu.
1.18: Rehano ani haḡai sauꞌa haḡadu meiroteꞌe hadiḡa hina haba ꞌahoga hoitiro. Eꞌea vadini ibine uite ovoiro, ebu ahiꞌaniꞌa fuꞌuradu isiḡaniꞌa ḡudau rururaro.
1.19: ꞌAhi hariḡaꞌe Ierusalema azaḡa niduꞌa igiro, eꞌanoꞌo ze zeḡe ḡoereo eꞌe habaꞌaꞌe Akeledama rae huniro. Eꞌe hugaꞌe Ru Habaꞌa.
1.20: Salamo zamaḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Ane habaꞌe ḡahuturanoꞌi. Vazeni ꞌahoga zuni eꞌea mene radiꞌuma,' ebu 'Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa aniꞌa ibitohauꞌeteꞌe gauḡa iḡuꞌa meꞌuma.'
1.21: Eꞌanoꞌo Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesuꞌa emeḡe teite ragavinuteꞌe madaḡa niduꞌa emeḡe teite raudoteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze ꞌahoga ohoniꞌuma.
1.22: Aniꞌe Ioaneꞌa babatisoziroteꞌe madaḡanonoꞌo onamo Iesuꞌe emeḡe mazaonoꞌo mae adure ḡoha itiroteꞌe madaḡano, emeḡe teite radiunuteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano ohoniꞌuma. Aniꞌe emeḡe teite Iesuꞌa bare ḡabodiroteꞌe rae fureneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa reꞌuma.”
1.23: Eꞌanoꞌo ze vaze aheu meiro. ꞌAhogaꞌe Barasaba ga Iusito rae huneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa Iosefa, ebu ꞌahogaꞌe Matia.
1.24: Ebu ze ꞌahige kuraro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡaꞌe vaze niduꞌa zama edeḡa. Ḡa vaze aheu ꞌahi boꞌaḡano iniu ohoteha?
1.25: Iudaꞌa modiroteꞌe apostolo gauḡa iḡuꞌa meiteꞌe vazeḡa ihofoꞌi. Iudaꞌe eꞌe gauḡa modadu aneꞌa raditeꞌe habaꞌa onamiro.”
1.26: Ebu ze eꞌe veize kaḡusi arahoḡa arahirotene, Matia meiro. ꞌOugadu Matiaꞌe apostolo azaḡa gaubanana tiba fare teite apostolo vazeḡa reiro.

2.1: Pentikosi Muiḡa meirotene, fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa haba tibano nuꞌoraro.
2.2: Eꞌe zamaḡano zavara boroꞌa areꞌeteꞌe teige, guguḡa boroꞌa adureonoꞌo tabara gudau ovairo. Eꞌe guguḡaniꞌa zeꞌa nuꞌoraroteꞌe neḡa iriꞌavoniro.
2.3: Ebu ire rogaꞌa duhuruꞌeteꞌe heuḡaniꞌa mazane teige rovotadu vaze tibatiba ranao duhuranoga horoniro.
2.4: Ebu Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa eꞌea radiunuteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa iriꞌavoziro ebu Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa ibitozeadu ḡoere nunuo ḡoeriro.
2.5: Eꞌe madaḡanoꞌe haba ꞌahogaꞌahogano radiuꞌeteꞌe Iuda azaḡaniꞌa Ierusalema aradu radiunu. Zeꞌe Badiꞌa gubaneꞌeteꞌe azaḡa.
2.6: Fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa harairotene, vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa isau ariro. Ebu zamazeꞌa ꞌadaꞌadaziro, mazaḡa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaꞌe zeḡezeḡe ḡoereo fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ḡoeroga igiro.
2.7: Ebu ze ufeta zaguzaganadu ꞌahige rae reiro, “Ḡiazoꞌi! Izidi ḡoereꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Galilea azaḡa, oꞌehe?
2.8: Rehano eme zeꞌa emeḡe tibatiba ḡoereo ḡoereꞌeteꞌe igiꞌohe. ꞌAhiguḡaniꞌa nougenouge fureraneha?
2.9: Emeḡe boꞌaḡano nuꞌe Patia azaḡa, Media azaḡa, zu Elama azaḡa. Ebu nuꞌe Mesopotamia, Iudea, Kapadokia, Ponito, Asia,
2.10: Ferigia, Pamufulia, zu Izipi habaꞌano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, ebu Kurene uhiḡano Libia habaꞌano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa. Ebu nuꞌe Ierusalema ḡianihi radu ariroteꞌe Roma azaḡa.
2.11: Ebu nuꞌe Iuda azaḡa, zu ḡihuradu Iuda azaḡa teige Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, ebu Kerete ꞌumuḡa azaḡa, zu Arabia habaꞌa azaḡa. Eme zeḡeꞌa Badiꞌa haḡai gigiꞌaḡa emeḡe tibatiba ḡoereo raꞌeteꞌe igiꞌohe!”
2.12: Ze zaguzagauꞌenaꞌa ebu zamazeꞌa ꞌadaꞌadazeꞌenaꞌa, ḡadimutitiro, “ꞌAhi hugaꞌe nagini?”
2.13: Rehano vaze nuꞌe ḡirihoziro, “Ze vaini vuḡa ufeta gageha.” Peteroꞌa Vaze Ḡuḡuvaḡa Haramoziro
2.14: Ebu Peteroꞌa apostolo azaḡa gaubanana tiba fare teite iḡune edanadu vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa mazao agoḡa borofadu haramiro, “Iuda azaḡa zu Ierusalemao radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa, e haḡai ꞌadaꞌa nougenouge fureranateꞌe ihozihi. Eḡe ḡoere faine abitoꞌi.
2.15: Zaꞌe ꞌahi duḡuruꞌe vaini vuḡa gageha rae zamareꞌe gaogi. ꞌAhi ꞌize oherebau mada fuꞌo ḡazaḡa fare, eꞌanoꞌo ze mene gageha.
2.16: Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta vazeḡa Ioelaonoꞌo rae fureniroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudaneha,
2.17: 'Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌahige raꞌohe: Mada ḡonagano eḡeꞌa vaze niduꞌa rana eḡe Vine ovoe beꞌuniꞌuma. Ubudeze zu aboezeꞌe eḡe ḡoere rae fureniꞌuma, zae tahiꞌa izigaizigaꞌe ahiri raꞌaga iḡunaḡa horoniꞌuma, vaze vouḡavouḡaꞌe iḡunaꞌuma.
2.18: Eꞌe madaḡano eḡe tuḡure azaḡa ohoze zu tuḡure azaḡa roḡae rana eḡeꞌa eḡe Vine ovoe beꞌuniꞌuma, ebu zeḡe zuni eḡe ḡoere rae fureniꞌuma.
2.19: Ebu eḡeꞌa hitanaoꞌe zaguzagatiteꞌe haḡaiḡa adureo fureniꞌuma, ebu ꞌuꞌuḡanoꞌe haḡai nu badeḡa rahao fureniꞌuma. Ru, ire roga ebu ḡisi baruḡa fureniꞌuma.
2.20: Zuhiꞌa Boro ḡihiꞌa hune ebu niḡa mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ꞌizema arogano, madaꞌa ḡihuradu uzaboraꞌuma, ebu batoꞌe ḡihuradu ru teige kanaraꞌuma.
2.21: Ebu iniu Zuhiꞌa Boro mazao ḡaniḡanauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ḡabone hidiꞌuma.'
2.22: Isaraela azaḡa, ḡoere ꞌahi egoꞌi. Za edeḡa, Nazareta vazeḡa Iesuꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa tuḡunadu gigiꞌa haḡaiḡa, zaguzagatiteꞌe haḡaiḡa, zu haḡai nu badeḡa ḡehaḡa zae boꞌaḡano haḡainu. Badiꞌaꞌa eꞌeguḡa haḡaiḡa Iesuonoꞌo haḡadu Iesuꞌe aniꞌa tuḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡa rae dehene fureniro.
2.23: Iesuꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa amahi toganadu irina ederiroteꞌe idunaḡano zae ꞌevoreo riꞌiniro. Ebu zaꞌe Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡa ꞌevoreo ani riꞌinadu satauro rana ikokoni runediro.
2.24: Rehano Badiꞌaꞌe ani rune zamaḡano aduga hidiroteꞌeanoꞌo bohane bunadu bare ḡaboniro, mazaḡa rune gigiꞌaḡaꞌe Iesu obone touga mene idararo.
2.25: Davidaꞌe Iesu moneo ꞌahige rae reiro, 'E iḡaiḡa eḡe zamao Zuhiꞌa Boro horoninu. Aniꞌe eḡe edaꞌe moneo radiuꞌe ꞌahine, ḡau ꞌahoganiꞌa e mene hagahiꞌuma.
2.26: Eꞌanoꞌo zamaheꞌa matuꞌeꞌohe, zu hebehe hina Badiꞌa niguneꞌenaꞌa, matuꞌeꞌohe. E ahirihe zuni runeonoꞌo bare ḡaboditeꞌe mae ḡihineꞌenaꞌa, guhine radiuꞌohe.
2.27: Mazaḡa Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa vinehe rune habaꞌano mene modiꞌuma, ebu Zuhiꞌa Boro veize zamaḡa niduꞌa hina gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ahiꞌaniꞌa ruhuranoga veize mene mode tauḡiꞌuma.
2.28: Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ḡabone ibiḡa ihohiro, ebu Zuhiꞌa Boro ubumao matuꞌu hina iriꞌavohiꞌuma.'
2.29: Nego nabudi, eḡeꞌa hube hune ziꞌohe, vouḡafe Davidaꞌe rudanadu guriro ebu ani iduꞌe izidi radiuꞌohe.
2.30: Rehano aniꞌe peroveta vazeḡa ꞌahine, Badiꞌaꞌa ane mazao ꞌahige ḡoeꞌa rinede tirotaꞌaꞌe ederiro, 'Davida mariga ꞌahoganiꞌa ane iḡuri madu kini reꞌuma.'
2.31: Davidaꞌe zama moneo naginiꞌa fureratiteꞌe irina horonadu Kerisoꞌa bare ḡaboditeꞌe moneo ꞌahige rae fureniro, 'Kerisoꞌe rune habaꞌano mene modiꞌuma, zu ahiꞌaꞌe mene ruhuraꞌuma.'
2.32: Ebu Iesu ꞌahiꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa bare ḡaboniro. Emeḡe niduꞌa eꞌe horonadu rae fureneꞌohe.
2.33: Ebu aniꞌe mae ḡihinadu Badiꞌa edaꞌe moneo ohoniro. Ebu aniꞌe Moganiꞌa ḡoitoriroteꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡa madu emeḡe mazao ovoe beꞌuniro. Zaꞌe izidi ꞌada eꞌe horoneꞌohe zu igiꞌohe.
2.34: U Davidaꞌe adure ḡoha mene itiro, rehano ani ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Badiꞌaꞌa eḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro niro, “Eḡe edaꞌe moneo ehoroꞌi,
2.35: onamo eḡeꞌa agireḡo madu odaḡo ꞌuꞌuḡano raharahaziꞌuma.”'
2.36: Eꞌanoꞌo Isaraela azaḡa niduꞌa faine ederoꞌi. Zaeꞌa satauroniroteꞌe vazeḡa, Iesuꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa Zuhiꞌa Boro zu Keriso rae ohoniro.”
2.37: Ze eꞌe igirotene, zamaze tuḡano babaharo, ebu Petero zu apostolo azaḡa ḡadiziro, “Negofe duḡuru, eme nougiꞌuma?”
2.38: Peteroꞌa naenaeziro, “Zae niduꞌa, zamaze ḡihunoꞌi, ebu Iesu Keriso niḡano babatiso moꞌi. ꞌOugine, Badiꞌaꞌa zae haḡai sauꞌa rae modiꞌuma ebu Badiꞌa ḡahunoneḡa, Vine Zaḡoḡa ziniꞌuma.
2.39: Ḡoitore ḡoeꞌa ꞌadiꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro emeḡe Badiꞌaꞌa huziroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa veize tiro. Aꞌe zae, ubudeze zu haba faḡafaḡa azaḡa niduꞌa raꞌohe.”
2.40: Ebu Peteroꞌa ḡoere nunu rae fureniro ebu iraduguziro, “Haḡai veꞌoḡa azaḡa ꞌahi mazaonoꞌo vaḡinadu ḡabone moꞌi.”
2.41: Eꞌanoꞌo ane haramo mae ḡihiniroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe babatiso meiro. Eꞌe madaḡano vaze niduꞌa 3,000 heuḡaꞌe babatiso madu fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa moneo ragate mae zouziro. Fieꞌeteꞌe Azaḡa Ḡabone Ibiḡa
2.42: Ze apostolo azaḡa ihoreḡa zamaze niduꞌa hina abitoharo, ebu unihe tiburanoga, tiburu oganoga, zu kuranoga veize inariro.
2.43: Ebu apostolo azaḡaniꞌa gigiꞌa haḡaiḡa zu haḡai nu badeḡa ḡehaḡa haḡainuteꞌe uꞌano, vaze niduꞌa rihau rudaro.
2.44: Fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa tibano nuꞌoru radiunu ebu ḡauze niduꞌa ḡahugotitinu.
2.45: Ebu toheze zu ḡauze seronadu iniu hadizeꞌa ferezinuteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa zininu.
2.46: Ebu ze mada niduꞌa kuru neḡano nuꞌoranadu kuraunu. Ebu aneane neo nuꞌoranadu matuꞌuzeta zu zamaze manoḡano ogau tiburaunu,
2.47: zu Badiꞌa niguninu. ꞌOugadu vaze niduꞌa ze niguzinu. Ebu Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa mada niduꞌa ḡabone hideꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ragate borofe tuḡuzadu fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa bororaro.

3.1: Mada ꞌahogano ḡorava mone mada uḡidu zamaḡano, Petero zu Ioaneꞌa kuru madaḡano kuru neḡa itiro.
3.2: Ebu Iraḡa Manoḡa rae huneꞌeteꞌe ibihetaḡa ꞌahoga genaḡano odaḡa sauꞌa vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ehore radiro. Aniꞌe ꞌouge fureraro ebu vazeꞌa ani mada niduꞌa herate onamadu eꞌe ibihetaḡa genaḡano ohoninu, ebu ani kuru neḡa diuḡeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao hadi umidinu.
3.3: Ani Petero zu Ioaneꞌa kuru neḡa diuḡihi raꞌenogano horozadu hadi umiziro.
3.4: Rehano Petero zu Ioaneꞌa ḡiane runadu Peteroꞌa niro, “Eme ḡiafoꞌi.”
3.5: Odaḡa sauꞌa vazeḡaꞌe ḡau ꞌahoga hidiꞌuma rae zamareꞌenaꞌa, ḡiaziro.
3.6: Rehano Peteroꞌa niro, “E hadihe oꞌoꞌa rehano, eḡe mazao radiuꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa ḡaniꞌuma. Eḡeꞌa ḡaꞌohe, Nazareta vazeḡa Iesu Keriso niḡano iḡunadu onamoꞌi!”
3.7: Ebu Peteroꞌa ane edaꞌe ꞌevoꞌa mae ḡihinirotene, odaḡa zu kekeḡaniꞌa tabara inariro.
3.8: Ebu ani rafate iḡune edaro zu oname onairo. Ebu ani rafate onameꞌenaꞌa zu Badiꞌa niguneꞌenaꞌa, zeḡe teite kuru neḡa diuḡiro.
3.9: Vaze niduꞌa aniꞌa Badiꞌa niguneꞌenaꞌa, oname onaeꞌeteꞌe horoniro.
3.10: Ebu ze aniꞌe kuru neḡa ibihetaḡa, Iraḡa Manoḡa genaḡano iḡaiḡa ehoradu vaze mazao hadi umidinuteꞌe vazeḡa rae ederiro. Ebu ane mazao naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe uꞌano, ze zaguzagau rudaro. Peteroꞌa Kuru Neḡa Habaꞌano Haramiro
3.11: Odaḡa manoriroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa Petero zu Ioane hegote ragaveꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano, vaze niduꞌa zaguzaganadu kuru neḡa habaꞌano Solomona Ibi Zauhaḡano zeḡe vaḡe isau dure ariro.
3.12: Peteroꞌa vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa aroga horozadu ziro, “Isaraela azaḡa, za nougaꞌahi zaguzagauꞌohe? Ebu nougaꞌahi ḡiaḡiafeꞌohe? Za emeꞌa gigiꞌafe hina vaze ꞌahi faineha ga eme hube hune Badiꞌa gubaneꞌeteꞌe uꞌano ani faineha rae zamareꞌehe?
3.13: Aberahamo, Isako, Iakobo zu vouḡafeꞌa kuranohaunuteꞌe Badiꞌaḡaniꞌa ane tuḡure vazeḡa Iesu mae ḡihiniro. Rehano zaꞌe ani Pilato ꞌevoreo riꞌiniro. Ebu Pilatoꞌa ani tuḡune bunihi rae reirotene, zaeꞌa Pilato zamao ani hezahoharo.
3.14: Zaꞌe Vaze Zaḡoḡa zu Duduḡa hezahoharo, u vaze runediroteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoga mae bunoga umidiro.
3.15: ꞌOugadu zaꞌe ḡaboneziniꞌeteꞌe Zuhiꞌaḡa Boro maro. Rehano aniꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡaboniro. Eme eꞌe horonadu ꞌahi rae fureneꞌohe.
3.16: Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, zaꞌa horoneꞌeteꞌe zu edereꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahi faineha. Iesu ni gigiꞌaḡa zu ane mazao fieꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, vaze ꞌahaꞌa manore huneha. Zae niduꞌa ꞌahi horoneꞌohe.
3.17: Nego nabudi, e edeḡa, zae ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teige zae zuni aḡuꞌa radu Iesu maro.
3.18: Rehano Kerisoꞌa aduga hiditeꞌe moneo Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta azaḡa niduꞌaonoꞌo amahi rae fureniroteꞌeꞌa ꞌahige hudaro.
3.19: Eꞌanoꞌo zaꞌe ḡihuradu Badiꞌa vaḡe bare aroꞌi. ꞌOugine aneꞌa haḡaize sauꞌa vuzuꞌe modiꞌuma,
3.20: ebu Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa vineze izifiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma, ebu zae veize Badiꞌaꞌa amahi ohoniroteꞌe vazeḡa, Keriso tuḡuniꞌuma. Aniꞌe Iesu.
3.21: Rehano ibite madaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa peroveta zaḡoḡa azaḡaonoꞌo rae fureniroteꞌe teige, Iesuꞌe adureo ꞌize radiꞌuma, onamo ḡau niduꞌa izifiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma.
3.22: Moseꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Zuhiꞌa Boro zae Badiꞌaꞌa zae ḡoere ḡumu azaḡa boꞌaḡano peroveta vazeḡa ꞌahoga eḡe heuḡa zae veize ohoniꞌuma. Aniꞌa nagini ziteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa egohanoꞌi.
3.23: Iniu ani ḡoere mene egohauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe Badiꞌa mone azaḡa mazaonoꞌo mae vaḡizadu ruiziꞌuma.'
3.24: Ebu Samuela zu ane ḡaruna ariroteꞌe peroveta azaḡa niduꞌa zuni izidi fureruꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa moneo irina rae fureniro.
3.25: Zaꞌe peroveta azaḡa mariga, zu Badiꞌaꞌa zae vouḡa teite tiroteꞌe ḡoitoreḡa ḡoeꞌa meiroteꞌe azaḡa. Mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa Aberahamo niro, 'Marigo mazaonoꞌo habaꞌahabaꞌa azaḡa niduꞌa manohuga hidiꞌuma.'
3.26: Badiꞌaꞌa ane tuḡure vazeḡa ohonadu zae mazao ibite tuḡuniro. Aꞌe, aniꞌa zae tibatiba sauꞌa ibiḡanonoꞌo mae vaḡizadu manohuga zinifine raꞌohe.”

4.1: Petero zu Ioaneꞌa ꞌize vaze ḡehaḡa ḡorezeꞌeteꞌea, dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa, kuru neḡa uti vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa zu Sadukea azaḡaniꞌa zeḡe uꞌa ariro.
4.2: Zeꞌe apostolo azaḡa aheu mazao maḡune rudaro, mazaḡa apostolo azaḡaniꞌa vaze ihozeꞌenaꞌa, Iesuꞌa bare ḡabodiroteꞌe teige, vaze zuni bare ḡabodiꞌuma rae haraminu.
4.3: Eꞌe uꞌano, ze Petero zu Ioane oboze tiro. Ebu mada ꞌai zuburiro ꞌahine, ze ḡuꞌa neḡano ohozadu eꞌea baze irariro.
4.4: Rehano zeḡe haramo igiroteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ḡoereze mae ḡihiniro. Zeḡe boꞌaḡano ohoze niduꞌaꞌe 5,000 heuḡa.
4.5: Irarirotene, Iuda azaḡa ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, vaze boroboro zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Ierusalemao nuꞌoraro.
4.6: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa Anasi, ebu Kaiafa, Ioane zu Alesana, ebu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa nabuga duḡuru niduꞌa nuꞌoraro.
4.7: Ze Petero zu Ioaneꞌe zeḡe zamao mae ohozadu ḡadiziro, “Za noꞌe gigiꞌaḡa hina ga iniu niḡano odaḡa sauꞌa vazeḡa ꞌahi faineha?”
4.8: Ebu Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa Petero iriꞌavonadu Peteroꞌa ziro, “Vazevaze zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu vaze boroboro,
4.9: za emeꞌa odaḡa sauꞌa vazeḡa mazao haḡai manoḡa haḡateꞌe zu nougenouge ani fainateꞌe moneo ḡadimuꞌehe?
4.10: ꞌOugine, zae niduꞌa zu Isaraela azaḡa niduꞌa ꞌahi ederiꞌuma. Vaze ꞌahiꞌe Nazareta vazeḡa Iesu Keriso niḡano manoradu zae zamao edauꞌohe. Iesuꞌe zaeꞌa satauroniro rehano, Badiꞌaꞌa rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡaboniroteꞌe vazeḡa.
4.11: Iesu moneo Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae mirihiro, 'Hadi hina ne ogorarotene, zaeꞌa mae modiroteꞌe hadiḡaꞌe, ne duꞌe rinedeꞌeteꞌe hadiḡa reiro.'
4.12: Eꞌanoꞌo Iesu ane daꞌo emeḡe ḡabofeꞌohe. Haba niduꞌa zamaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa emeḡe ḡabofifine tuḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahogaꞌe oꞌoꞌa.”
4.13: Nuꞌonuꞌo azaḡaꞌe Petero zu Ioaneꞌa mene rihauꞌenaꞌa, inare ḡoeroga horozirotene zaguzagaro, mazaḡa ze Petero zu Ioaneꞌe edeḡa oꞌoꞌa ebu nize oꞌoꞌa azaḡa rae ederiro. ꞌOugadu ze bare ederiro, vaze aheu ꞌadiꞌe Iesu teite radiunuteꞌe azaḡa.
4.14: Rehano ze odaḡa sauꞌa manoriroteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa Petero zu Ioane teite edanoga horoniroteꞌe uꞌano, ze ḡoereni ꞌahoga rouga mene idararo.
4.15: Eꞌanoꞌo ze Petero zu Ioaneꞌe nu'onu'o habaꞌanonoꞌo mae buzadu zeḡe daꞌo ḡoꞌaneꞌenaꞌa ḡadimutitiro,
4.16: “Eme vaze aheu ꞌahi mazao nougiꞌuma? Zeꞌa gigiꞌa haḡaiḡa haḡataꞌaꞌe Ierusalema azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe edeḡa ebu eme zuni eꞌe oꞌonoga mene idaḡa.
4.17: Rehano hari ꞌahaꞌa ne azaḡa boꞌaḡano mene bororafine, ꞌahige riḡa ziꞌuma, 'Iesu niḡano vazeni ꞌahoga ago bare ḡorenoꞌi!'”
4.18: Ebu hena ze Petero zu Ioane bare huze zouzadu riḡa ziro, “Iesu niḡano ago hune ḡoeroꞌi, zu ago hune ihozoꞌi!”
4.19: Rehano Petero zu Ioaneꞌa naenaeziro, “Badiꞌa ubumao noꞌeꞌe duduḡa? Zae ḡoere egoziniꞌuma ga Badiꞌa ḡoere egohaꞌuma? Za zaeꞌa bare ḡadizoꞌi.
4.20: Emeꞌe nagini horoniroteꞌe zu igiroteꞌe moneo rae furene huniꞌuma.”
4.21: Ebu nuꞌonuꞌo ibitohauꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa bare ḡoere riḡa zeadu tuḡuze buziro. Mazaḡa vaze niduꞌa naginiꞌa fureranateꞌe horonadu Badiꞌa niguniro ꞌahine, apostolo azaḡa adugano tuḡuziteꞌe ibiḡa mene horoniro.
4.22: Gigiꞌa haḡaiḡano manoriroteꞌe vazeḡa muriḡaꞌe 40 vitinoga. Fieꞌeteꞌe Azaḡaniꞌa Kuraro
4.23: Petero zu Ioaneꞌe tuḡuze buzirotene, ze fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa vaḡe onamiro ebu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡa zu vaze boroboroꞌa ziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa niduꞌa meꞌodoziniro.
4.24: Ze ḡoere eꞌe igirotene, zamaze tibano teadu agoze borofeꞌenaꞌa, Badiꞌa mazao kuraro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡaeꞌa adure, raha, davara, zu eꞌe zamaḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌa haḡairo.
4.25: Ḡaeꞌa Vine Zaḡoḡa tuḡunadu ḡae tuḡure vazeḡa, vouḡafe Davidaonoꞌo ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Nougadu Iuda mene azaḡaniꞌa maḡune rudauꞌohe, zu habaꞌahabaꞌa azaḡaniꞌa huga oꞌoꞌa haḡaiḡa toganeꞌohe?
4.26: Raha kiniḡa azaḡaꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare uti ruhibiro, ebu raha azaḡa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe nuꞌoranadu Zuhiꞌa Boro zu ane Keriso agatoziro.'
4.27: Aꞌe hube hune fureraro. Heroda zu Pontio Pilatoꞌa Iuda mene azaḡa zu Isaraela azaḡa teite tiburanadu Ierusalemao nuꞌoraro ebu Iesu manoga veize toganiro. Iesuꞌe ḡae tuḡure vazeḡa zaḡoḡa zu ḡaeꞌa ohoniroteꞌe vazeḡa, Keriso.
4.28: Zeꞌe ḡaeꞌa ḡae gigiꞌaḡo hina zu urao fureraꞌuma rae irina toganiroteꞌe haḡaiḡa haḡairo.
4.29: Zuhiꞌa Boro, izidi zeꞌa riho ḡoeꞌa efateꞌe zamaroꞌi. Eme, ḡae tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa mene hune rihauꞌenaꞌa, ḡae ḡoere rae furenoga veize inarafoꞌi.
4.30: Ebu ꞌevoꞌo ꞌeinadu ugi azaḡa faizoꞌi, zu ḡae tuḡure vazeḡa zaḡoḡa Iesu niḡano haḡai nu badeḡa ebu zaguzagatiteꞌe haḡaiḡa haḡaoꞌi.”
4.31: Ze kurau hauḡiroteꞌe enogano, zeḡeꞌa nuꞌoraroteꞌe habaꞌaniꞌa hagahagariro. Ebu zeḡe niduꞌa Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa iriꞌavozadu ze mene rihauꞌenaꞌa, Badiꞌa ḡoere inare rae fureniro. Fieꞌeteꞌe Azaḡaniꞌa Ḡauze Ḡahugotitiro
4.32: Fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa zamaze zu zamaroneze tibano teadu vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa, “ꞌAhiꞌe eḡe daꞌo tohe,” rae mene reiro, rehano “Vaze niduꞌa tohe,” rae raꞌenaꞌa ḡahugotitiro.
4.33: Ebu apostolo azaḡaꞌe inaraze boro hina Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesuꞌa bare ḡabodiroteꞌe moneo rae furene onamiro. Ebu Badiꞌaꞌe zeḡe mazao manoḡa borofe fureniro.
4.34: Zeḡe boꞌaḡano ḡau ꞌahoganiꞌa fereniroteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa. Mazaḡa habazeta azaḡa zu nezeta azaḡaniꞌa eꞌe seronadu hadiḡaꞌe apostolo azaḡa vaḡe odohe ariro,
4.35: ebu zeḡe zamao tiro. Ebu apostolo azaḡaniꞌa hadi eꞌe madu hadiꞌa ferezeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ḡahugoziniro.
4.36: Vaze ꞌahoga, niḡa Iosefaꞌe Levi urabo vazeḡa zu Kupuro ꞌumuḡa vazeḡa. Aniꞌe apostolo azaḡaniꞌa Banabasi rae huniro (ni eꞌe hugaꞌe 'Inaraziꞌeteꞌe Vazeḡa').
4.37: Aniꞌe ane haba seronadu hadiḡa odohe ariro ebu apostolo azaḡa zamao tiro.

5.1: Vaze ꞌahoga, niḡa Ananiaꞌa radiunu, ebu inuga niḡaꞌe Safira. Ze habaze boꞌaḡano tahiḡa seroniro.
5.2: Ebu Ananiaꞌa inugeta ḡoere idanadu eꞌe hadiḡa nuꞌe ane veize obone tiro. Ebu ḡahaꞌa daꞌo apostolo azaḡa vaḡe odohe onamadu zamazeo tiro.
5.3: Ebu Peteroꞌa niro, “Anania, nougadu zamaḡoꞌe Sataniꞌa iriꞌavonadu Vine Zaḡoḡa mazao ḡurireha ebu ḡae haba seroniroteꞌe hadiḡa ḡahaꞌaꞌe ḡae veize obone teha?
5.4: Haba aꞌe mene seroniroteꞌe madaḡano zuni ḡae haba. Ebu seroniroteꞌe enogano zuni eꞌe hadiḡaꞌe ḡae hadi radu eꞌe hina ḡae ura haḡaiḡa haḡaogaꞌe idaraneha. Rehano ḡa nougadu ḡuriro haḡaiḡa ꞌadi haḡaiꞌuma rae zamareha? Ḡa vaze mazao mene ḡurireha, rehano Badiꞌa mazao ḡurireha.”
5.5: Ananiaꞌa ḡoere eꞌe igirotene, higau bauradu rudaro. Ebu eꞌe hariḡa igiroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe niduꞌa rihau rudaro.
5.6: Ebu tahiꞌa iziga nuꞌa aradu dabua hina ahiꞌa ꞌumiro ebu herate bunadu guriro.
5.7: Mada uḡidu enogano inuganiꞌa diuḡi ariro. Ani naginiꞌa fureranataꞌaꞌe mene ederiro.
5.8: Ebu Peteroꞌa ani ḡadiniro, “Hadi ꞌadiꞌe ḡa zu iꞌuꞌa habaze seroniroteꞌe hadiḡa niduꞌahe? Ehoꞌi.” Aniꞌa naenaeniro, “Oꞌe, aꞌe seroniroteꞌe hadiḡa niduꞌa.”
5.9: Peteroꞌa niro, “Nougadu ḡanine ḡoere idanadu Zuhiꞌa Boro Vine tuhuneha? Ḡianoꞌi! Iꞌu gurateꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ibihetao diuḡi areꞌohe ebu ze ḡae zuni herate buḡadiꞌuma.”
5.10: ꞌOuge reirotene, ani zogone Petero oda babaḡano higau bauradu rudaro. Ebu iꞌa guriroteꞌe tahiꞌaḡa izigaiziganiꞌa diuḡi aradu inuganiꞌa rudanoga horoniro. Ebu ze ani herate bunadu iꞌa uhiḡano guriro.
5.11: Ekalesia azaḡa niduꞌa zu eꞌe hariḡa igiroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe rihau rudaro. Apostolo Azaḡaniꞌa Vaze Ḡehaḡa Faiziro
5.12: Apostolo azaḡaniꞌa gigiꞌa haḡaiḡa zu zaguzagatiteꞌe haḡaiḡa ḡehaḡa vaze ḡehaḡa boꞌaḡano haḡairo. Ebu fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe Solomona Ibi Zauhaḡano nuꞌoraudo.
5.13: Vazevazeꞌa ze niguziro, rehano mene fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe zeḡe teite ꞌauḡoga mene idaḡa radu tibani zuni mene ꞌauḡiro.
5.14: Rehano ohoze zu roḡae ḡehaḡaꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro mazao fiadu fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ragateragate ḡeharaunu.
5.15: ꞌOugadu Peteroꞌa ibio zeḡe uhiḡano vitauꞌeteꞌea, ze ibi genaḡano zuni ugi azaḡa tutuze aradu geda zu farata rana bazuze tiro. Mazaḡa Petero ahiri zauhaḡaniꞌa zauhazeadu ugizeꞌa manoroga uratiro.
5.16: Ebu Ierusalema uhiḡa neḡaneḡanonoꞌo vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa ugi azaḡa ebu vine sauꞌaniꞌa ragano radu gigizeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa tutuze ariro, ebu zeḡe niduꞌaꞌe manoriro. Apostolo Azaḡa Sausauziro
5.17: Ebu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa zu ane mone azaḡa, Sadukea azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe apostolo azaḡa mazao ahiahi ufeta meiro.
5.18: Eꞌanoꞌo ze apostolo azaḡa oboze teadu ḡuꞌa neḡano ohoziro.
5.19: Rehano Zuhiꞌa Boro tuḡure viganiꞌa eꞌe oheꞌano ḡuꞌa neḡa ibihetaḡa vavaꞌadu ze mae buziro.
5.20: Ebu tuḡure viganiꞌa ziro, “Onamoꞌi ebu kuru neḡa habaꞌano edanadu ḡabone iziga ḡoeꞌa ꞌahi niduꞌa vazevaze meꞌodozenoꞌi.”
5.21: Ze eꞌe igiroteꞌe enogano, oherebau uzeuze kuru neḡa habaꞌa diuḡadu vazevaze ḡadahe ihoziro. U dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa zu ane teite rauꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa aradu Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo boro veize vaze boroboro niduꞌa huze nuꞌoziro. Ebu apostolo azaḡa ḡuꞌa neḡanonoꞌo tutuze aroga veize uti azaḡa nu tuḡuziro.
5.22: Rehano ze ḡuꞌa neḡano feurirotene, apostolo azaḡa eꞌea mene horoziro. Eꞌanoꞌo ze bare onamadu ziro,
5.23: “Eme ḡuꞌa neḡa ibihetaḡaꞌe faine biroga zu ḡuꞌa neḡa ḡiane radiuꞌeteꞌe uti azaḡaꞌe ibihetao edauꞌenoga horozeha. Rehano eme ibiheta vavaꞌatene, zamaḡanoꞌe vaze ꞌahoga mene horoneha.”
5.24: Kuru neḡa taufeꞌeteꞌe uti vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa zu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe eꞌe hariḡa igirotene, naginiꞌa fureraꞌuma rae zamare ꞌadaꞌadaziro.
5.25: Ebu hena vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa aradu ziro, “Ḡianoꞌi! Zaeꞌa ḡuꞌa neḡano ohozateꞌe azaḡaꞌe kuru neḡa habaꞌano edanadu vaze ihozeꞌohe.”
5.26: Eꞌanoꞌo kuru neḡa ḡianeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe ane tahiꞌatahiꞌa teite onamadu apostolo azaḡa tutuze bare ariro. Rehano ze apostolo azaḡa mene agatoziro, mazaḡa vaze ḡuḡuvaḡaniꞌa maḡunadu hadi hina ze zimi ruziꞌuma rae rihoziro.
5.27: Ebu ze apostolo azaḡa tutuze aradu Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo boro zamaḡano ohoziro, ebu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa ḡadiziro,
5.28: “Eme zaꞌa vaze ꞌahi niḡano vazevaze mene ihozifine riḡa ziro. Rehano Ierusalema azaḡa niduꞌa zaeꞌa ihoze hauḡadu vaze eꞌeꞌa rudaroteꞌe adugaꞌe emeḡe rana tiꞌohe.”
5.29: Petero zu apostolo azaḡaniꞌa naenaeziro, “Eme vaze ḡoere mene egohaꞌuma, rehano Badiꞌa ḡoere egohaꞌuma.
5.30: Iesuꞌe zaeꞌa satauro rana midau teadu rudaro rehano, vouḡafe Badiꞌaḡaniꞌa runeonoꞌo bare ḡaboniro.
5.31: Eꞌe vazeḡaꞌe vaze ibitoziꞌeteꞌe zu ḡabozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa radu Badiꞌaꞌa ani mae ḡihiniro ebu ane edaꞌe moneo ohoniro. Aꞌe, Isaraela azaḡaniꞌa ḡihuradu haḡaize sauꞌa rae modifine raꞌohe.
5.32: Emeꞌe eꞌe niduꞌa horonadu rae fureneꞌohe, ebu Vine Zaḡoḡa zuni eꞌe rae fureneꞌohe. Vine Zaḡoḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa ane ḡoere egohauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao tuḡuniro.”
5.33: Nuꞌonuꞌo azaḡaniꞌa Petero ḡoere igirotene, ze maḡune rudanadu apostolo azaḡa zimi ruzihi reiro.
5.34: Rehano Farisea vazeḡa ꞌahoga, niḡa Gamalielaꞌa nuꞌonuꞌo azaḡa boꞌaḡano iḡune edaro. Aniꞌe Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, ebu vaze niduꞌa ani gubaniro. Aniꞌa ziro, “ꞌAhi duḡuruꞌe mada tahiḡa enona tuḡuze buzoꞌi.”
5.35: Ebu hena aniꞌa ziro, “Isaraela azaḡa, ꞌahi duḡuru mazao nagini haḡaihi raꞌetaꞌaꞌe faine zamaroꞌi.
5.36: Ibite Teudaꞌa iḡunadu raenaꞌa, 'Eꞌe nihe boro,' radu vaze niduꞌa 400 heuḡa ani hegotiro. Rehano aniꞌe mau runiroteꞌe enoganoꞌe ani hegotiroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ferefere uhiro. Ebu aneꞌa haḡainuteꞌe haḡaiḡaꞌe niduꞌa hauḡiro.
5.37: Ani ḡarugano vaze niduꞌa nize tiroteꞌe madaḡano Galilea vazeḡa, niḡa Iudaꞌa iḡune edaro. Aniꞌe vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa zamazadu Roma gavamaniḡa teite utitiro. Rehano ane zuni mau runiro, ebu ani hegotiroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ferefere uhiro.
5.38: Eꞌanoꞌo ꞌahi duḡuru moneo e za iraduguzeꞌohe. Zeḡe mazao ḡau ꞌahoga ago haḡaoꞌi ebu ze tuḡuze buzoꞌi. Mazaḡa zeḡe gau ga haḡai ꞌahiꞌe vaze mazaonoꞌo reine, aꞌe hauḡiꞌuma.
5.39: Rehano aꞌe Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo reine, za ꞌahi duḡuru ꞌuoga mene idaraꞌuma. Zaꞌe Badiꞌa utitohauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reꞌuma.” Eꞌanoꞌo ze Gamaliela ḡoere mae ḡihiniro.
5.40: Ebu apostolo azaḡa huzadu uti azaḡaniꞌa masiziro. Ebu, “Iesu niḡano ago ḡoeroꞌi,” rae riḡa zeadu tuḡuze buziro.
5.41: Apostolo azaḡaꞌe Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌonoꞌo matuꞌeꞌenaꞌa buaro. Mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zeꞌe ane mone azaḡa rae mae ḡihizadu Iesu uꞌano nize sausauneꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano tuḡuziro ꞌahine, ze matuꞌiro.
5.42: Ebu ze mada niduꞌa kuru neḡa habaꞌano zu ne tibatiba zamaḡano, Iesuꞌe Keriso rae raꞌeteꞌe hari manoḡa ꞌauꞌaune ihozinu zu haraminu.

6.1: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ḡeharu onamiro. Rehano Iuda azaḡa boꞌaḡano Giriki ḡoeꞌano ḡoereꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Heberu ḡoeꞌano ḡoereꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao maḡuniro. Mazaḡa mada niduꞌa ogomu ḡahugirotene, Giriki ḡoeꞌano ḡoereꞌeteꞌe ḡozobaḡaꞌe iḡize modiro.
6.2: Eꞌanoꞌo apostolo azaḡa gaubanana aheu fareꞌa fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa nuꞌozadu ziro, “Eme Badiꞌa ḡoere haramogaꞌe mene zamareꞌenaꞌa, ogomu ḡahugeꞌeteꞌe veize daꞌo ufeta inarine mene idaḡa.
6.3: Eꞌanoꞌo, nego nabudi, zae boꞌaḡano vaze fuꞌo aheu fare ohozoꞌi. Zaeꞌa ḡiazadu zamazeo Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa iriꞌaveꞌeteꞌe zu faifaine zamareꞌeteꞌe azaḡa moꞌi. Eme eꞌe gauḡaꞌe zeḡe ꞌevoreo riꞌiniꞌuma.
6.4: U emeꞌe kuru zu haramo gauḡa veize daꞌo inariꞌuma.”
6.5: Zeḡe niduꞌa eꞌe ḡoeꞌa mae ḡihiniro. Ebu ze vaze ꞌahoga, niḡa Stefano ohoniro. Aniꞌe fie gigaruꞌeteꞌe zu Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa iriꞌavoneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Zuni Filipi, Porokoro, Nikanoro, Timona, Pamena zu Antioka vazeḡa niḡa Nikolao ohoziro. Nikolaoꞌe mene Iuda vazeḡa rehano, zamaḡa ḡihunadu Iuda azaḡa teite kurau tiburaroteꞌe vazeḡa.
6.6: Ebu ze apostolo azaḡa zamao ohozadu apostolo azaḡaniꞌa zeḡe veize kuraro, zu ꞌevoreze zeḡe rana teadu ekalesia gau azaḡano ohoziro.
6.7: Badiꞌa ḡoereꞌe bororanadu fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Ierusalema zamaḡano ḡehararo, zu dibuꞌo azaḡa ḡehaḡaniꞌa zuni Iesu mazao firo. Stefano Obone Tiro
6.8: Stefanoꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa manoḡa zu gigiꞌa boro hina iriꞌavoniro ꞌahine, vaze ḡehaḡa boꞌaḡano zaguzagatiteꞌe haḡaiḡa zu gigiꞌa haḡaiḡa boroboro haḡainu.
6.9: Eꞌe madaḡano Tuḡure Vazeḡaonoꞌo Vaḡiniroteꞌe Azaḡa rae huzeꞌeteꞌe Iuda azaḡaniꞌa nuꞌonuꞌo neḡa ꞌahogano nuꞌoraunu. Eꞌe duḡuruꞌe Kureneonoꞌo, Alesanderiaonoꞌo, Kilikia habaꞌanonoꞌo, zu Asia habaꞌanonoꞌo ariro. Zeḡe boꞌaḡano nuꞌa Stefano teite taꞌirotitiro.
6.10: Rehano Stefanoꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa iriꞌavonadu faifaine zamareꞌenaꞌa ḡoeriro. ꞌOugadu ze ani agirohanoga mene idararo.
6.11: Eꞌanoꞌo ze sifu vaze nu soꞌoze tuḡuzadu ꞌahige rae fureniro, “Stefanoꞌa Mose zu Badiꞌa rae sausauzeꞌeteꞌe emeḡeꞌa egeha.”
6.12: Eꞌe ibiḡano ze vaze ḡuḡuvaḡa, vaze boroboro zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa tutuze soꞌozadu harae iḡuniro. Ebu ze Stefano obone teadu Iuda azaḡa nuꞌonuꞌo boro tutune onamiro.
6.13: Ebu ze ḡuriro azaḡa nu tutuze onamadu ꞌahige rae fureniro, “Vaze ꞌahiꞌe iḡaiḡa kuru neḡa zaḡoḡa zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa rae sausauneꞌohe.
6.14: Aniꞌa ꞌahige rae rougaꞌe emeḡeꞌa egeha, 'Nazareta vazeḡa Iesuꞌa kuru neḡa fahiꞌuma ebu Moseꞌa emeḡe mazao riꞌiniroteꞌe goroḡa ḡihuniꞌuma.'”
6.15: Nuꞌonuꞌo zamaḡano ehore radiroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa Stefano ḡiane runirotene, ani iraḡaꞌe tuḡure viga heuḡa horoniro.

7.1: Ebu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa Stefano ḡadiniro, “Zeꞌa ḡae moneo ḡoereꞌetaꞌaꞌe hubehe?”
7.2: Ebu Stefanoꞌa naenaeziro, “Nego nabudi ebu vaze boroboro, eḡe ḡoere egoꞌi. Emeḡe vouḡa Aberahamoꞌa Harani neḡa ꞌizema onamogano, Mesopotamia habaꞌano radiunu. Eꞌe madaḡano ḡihiꞌa hune Badiꞌaḡaniꞌa ani mazao fureranadu niro,
7.3: 'Ḡa ḡae haba zu negoḡo nabugo mode iḡunadu eḡeꞌa ihoꞌiteꞌe habaꞌa onamoꞌi.'
7.4: Eꞌanoꞌo ani Kaledea azaḡa haba modadu Harani neḡano radiro. Ebu moganiꞌa rudaroteꞌe enogano, Badiꞌaꞌa bare tuḡunadu izidi zaeꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa ꞌahi ariro.
7.5: Rehano Badiꞌaꞌa haba ꞌahao haba tahiḡani zuni Aberahamo mene haro. Rehano Aberahamo ubugaꞌe ꞌizema furenogano, Badiꞌaꞌa Aberahamo teite ḡoitoriro, 'Ḡae zu ḡae marigo duḡuruꞌa haba ꞌahi meꞌuma.'
7.6: Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌahige rae niro, 'Ḡae marigoꞌe avoꞌa azaḡa habao radiꞌuma ebu muri 400 zeꞌe tuḡure azaḡano radiuꞌenaꞌa, haba eꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ze sausauze ruziꞌuma.
7.7: Rehano marigo duḡuru tuḡutuḡuziroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe eḡeꞌa aduga ziniꞌuma. Eꞌe enogano marigo duḡuruꞌa eꞌe habaꞌa mode vaḡinadu haba ꞌaha eḡe mazao kuraꞌuma.'
7.8: Ebu hena Badiꞌaꞌa ane ḡoitore ḡoeꞌa eꞌe rinede touga veize Aberahamo niro, 'Ahiri rana iḡuri haḡaoꞌi.' Eꞌanoꞌo Aberahamo ubuga Isakoꞌa fureranadu mada fuꞌo uḡidu fare meirotene, ahiꞌa rana iḡuri haḡairo. Ebu Isakoꞌa ubuga Iakobo ahiꞌa rana iḡuri haḡairo, ebu Iakobo zuni ane ubuga gaubanana aheu fare ahirize rana iḡuri haḡairo. Ebu Iakobo ubuga duḡuruꞌe Isaraela azaḡa vouḡaze boroboro reiro.
7.9: Iakobo ubuga duḡuruꞌe negoze Iosefa mazao ahiahi meiro, eꞌanoꞌo Iosefaꞌe Izipi habaꞌa azaḡa mazao seronadu tuḡure vazeḡano reiro. Rehano Badiꞌaꞌe Iosefa teite radiunu,
7.10: ebu aniꞌa aduga hidinuteꞌe madaḡa niduꞌa zamaḡano ḡaboninu. Ebu Iosefaꞌa Farao, Farao zamao edarotene, Badiꞌaꞌa ani mazao manoḡa fureniro zu zamarone huhuzaḡa haro. ꞌOugadu Faraoꞌa ani mazao matuꞌadu Izipi habaꞌa niduꞌa zu ane ne zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡano mae ohoniro.
7.11: Eꞌe madaḡano zahara boroꞌa Izipi zu Kanana habaꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano fureranadu vaze niduꞌa aduga boro hidiro. Vouḡafe zuni ogomuzeꞌa hauḡiro.
7.12: Ebu Iakoboꞌa Izipi habaꞌano ogomu eꞌe rae igirotene, ogomu nu hoitoga veize ubuga duḡuru tuḡuziro. Aꞌe Izipi habaꞌa onamiroteꞌe ḡadaheḡa.
7.13: Ze ḡae aheuḡano tuḡuzirotene, Iosefaꞌa aniꞌe iniu rae negoḡa duḡuru ihoziro. ꞌOugadu Farao zuni Iosefa moga ebu negoḡa duḡuru moneo ederiro.
7.14: Eꞌe enogano Iosefaꞌa moga Iakobo zu nabuga niduꞌa Izipi habaꞌa aroga veize ḡoere tuḡuriro. Zeḡe niduꞌaꞌe 75.
7.15: Ebu Iakoboꞌa Izipi habaꞌa onamiro. Ebu ane zu ane ubuga niduꞌa eꞌea radiro, onamo zeḡe niduꞌa rudaro.
7.16: Ahirizeꞌe Sekemu habaꞌa odohe onamadu ibite Aberahamoꞌa Hamoro mariga mazaonoꞌo hadi hina hoitiroteꞌe iduḡano guriro.
7.17: Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa irina Aberahamo mazao tiroteꞌe ḡoitore ḡoeꞌaniꞌa hudatiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa hanitirotene, Isaraela azaḡaꞌe Izipi habaꞌano ḡehararo.
7.18: Ebu hena Iosefa hariḡa aḡuꞌa vazeḡaniꞌa Farao reiro.
