4.18: Eḡe, Pauloꞌa uhiu ḡoeꞌa ꞌadi eḡe ꞌevore hina miriheꞌohe. Eꞌe izidi ḡuꞌa neḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaroꞌi. Badiꞌaꞌa zae mazao manoḡa fureneꞌenoꞌi.

1.1: Eḡe, Paulo zu Silasi ebu Timoteoꞌa Tesalonika ekalesia veize soꞌa ꞌahi miriheꞌohe. Zaꞌe Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama zu Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Keriso mone azaḡa. Badiꞌaꞌa zae mazao manoḡa zu zama roḡeḡa ziniꞌenoꞌi. Tesalonika Ekalesia uꞌano Badiꞌa mazao Manoḡa Tauḡi rae Reiro
1.2: Emeꞌe zae niduꞌa uꞌano iḡaiḡa Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi raꞌohe, ebu emeḡe kuru zamaḡano iḡaiḡa zae veize kurauꞌohe.
1.3: Emeꞌa Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama mazao kurauꞌetene, zae moneo iḡaiḡa ꞌahige zamareꞌohe: Zaeꞌa Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌenaꞌa gaueꞌohe, zu vaze zamare borofadu gau boro haḡaeꞌohe, ebu Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Kerisoꞌa bare ariteꞌe mae ḡihineꞌenaꞌa guhineꞌeteꞌe uꞌano zamaze obone giganeꞌohe.
1.4: Nego nabudi, zaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zamare borofeꞌohe. Emeꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zae ohotirotaꞌaꞌe edeḡa.
1.5: Emeꞌa ḡoere isoḡa hina daꞌo hari manoḡa mene haramoziro, rehano Badiꞌa inaraḡa hina Vine Zaḡoḡa teite haramoziro, ebu emeḡe haramoꞌe huga rae zamare huneꞌenaꞌa, haramoziro. Zaꞌe emeꞌa zae teite radiunuteꞌe zamaḡano zae veize nougenouge radirotaꞌaꞌe edeḡa.
1.6: Zaꞌe aduga boro hidiroteꞌea Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa matuꞌu zenadu matuꞌeꞌenaꞌa hari manoḡa mae ḡihiniro. ꞌOugadu zaꞌe emeḡe zu Zuhiꞌa Boro tuhutuhufeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reiro.
1.7: Eꞌanoꞌo Makedonia zu Akaia habaꞌano ekalesia azaḡa niduꞌa zae hari egadu zae tuhutuhuziꞌuma raꞌohe.
1.8: Mazaḡa Zuhiꞌa Boro ḡoereꞌe zae mazaonoꞌo bororanadu Makedonia zu Akaia habaꞌano daꞌo mene, rehano habaꞌahabaꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano vaze niduꞌa zaeꞌa Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌeteꞌe hariḡa ederiro. Eꞌanoꞌo emeꞌe zae hariꞌe mene bare reꞌuma,
1.9: mazaḡa ze zeḡeꞌa bare zae moneo meꞌodofiro. Ze emeꞌa zae vaḡe amirotene zaeꞌa nougenouge emeḡe mae zoufiroteꞌe meꞌodofiro. Ebu zaeꞌa nougenouge ḡuriro badiꞌaḡa modadu Badiꞌa vaḡe ariroteꞌe zu ḡabode radiuꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa huga veize gaueꞌeteꞌe meꞌodofiro.
1.10: Ebu za Badiꞌaꞌa rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare ḡaboniroteꞌe vazeḡa, ane Ubuga, Iesuꞌa adureonoꞌo bare ovaiteꞌe guhineꞌeteꞌe zeḡeꞌa meꞌodofiro. Iesuꞌe zama moneo ariteꞌe vazeḡa zu Badiꞌa zama ḡugiꞌanonoꞌo emeḡe ḡabofiteꞌe vazeḡa.

2.1: Nego nabudi, za edeḡa, emeḡeꞌa zae vaḡe amirotaꞌaꞌe mene foure reiro.
2.2: Za edeḡa, ibite Filipo zamaḡano vazeꞌa aduga rifiro zu emeḡe rae sausaufiro, rehano emeꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa inarafeadu agire boro bagaḡa zamaḡano zuni Badiꞌa hari manoḡa zae mazao rae fureniro.
2.3: Mazaḡa emeꞌe zamarone veꞌoḡa ga zama toraga hina mene haramoziniꞌohe ebu zae soꞌozifine mene ḡorezeꞌohe.
2.4: Rehano emeꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa ane gau azaḡano ohofadu aniꞌa rifiroteꞌe hariḡa manoḡa ziꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo emeꞌe mene vaze matuꞌozenoga, rehano Badiꞌa matuꞌohanoga veize harameꞌohe. Badiꞌaꞌe emeḡe zama faifaine ḡianeꞌohe.
2.5: Za edeḡa, emeꞌa zamaze auꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa hina mene haramido ebu zae mazaonoꞌo manoḡa mouga radu mene soꞌoze ḡorezido. Aꞌe huga rae Badiꞌaꞌa rae fureneꞌohe.
2.6: Ebu emeꞌe vazeꞌa nigufoga veize mene inariro. Zaeꞌa ga vaze ꞌahogaꞌahoganiꞌa nigufoga mene uratiro.
2.7: Emeꞌe Keriso apostolo azaḡa radu zae tuḡutuḡuzogaꞌe idaḡa, rehano emeꞌa zae boꞌaḡano radiunutene, viꞌaniꞌa ubugaubuga taufeꞌeteꞌe teige, zae mazao roḡeru haḡainu.
2.8: Eme zae zamare borofiro ꞌahine, matuꞌeꞌenaꞌa, Badiꞌa hari manoḡa zae teite dainihi rae reiro. Mene eꞌe daꞌo, ḡabonefe zuni zae veize matuꞌe ahetihi rae reiro. Mazaḡa zaꞌe emeꞌa zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reiro.
2.9: Nego nabudi, za emeḡeꞌa ḡihau gauirotaꞌaꞌe hube hune zamareꞌohe. Emeꞌa Badiꞌa hari manoḡa zae haramozinuteꞌea, zae boꞌaḡano vazeni ꞌahoga mene aduadunifine ohere zu madai gauinu.
2.10: Zaꞌe fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa radu emeꞌa nougenouge zae mazao haḡairotaꞌaꞌe zaꞌe deheru edereꞌohe, ebu Badiꞌa zuni edereꞌohe. Emeꞌe zae mazao hube hune haḡai deheḡa zu duduḡa haḡairo zu veꞌoḡa mene haḡairo.
2.11: Zaꞌe edeḡa, moganiꞌa ubugaubuga mazao haḡaeꞌeteꞌe teige, emeꞌe zae tibatiba mazao ꞌouge haḡairo.
2.12: Emeꞌa zae inaraziro, namiziro zu iraduguziro. Aꞌe, zaeꞌa Badiꞌa matuꞌohauꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa haḡae radifine raꞌohe, mazaḡa zaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa niḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa hina zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa rouga veize huziro.
2.13: Emeꞌe iḡaiḡa Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi raꞌohe. Mazaḡa emeḡeꞌa Badiꞌa ḡoere haramozenadu zaeꞌa mae ḡihinirotene, aꞌe mene vaze ḡoere, rehano hube hune Badiꞌa ḡoere rae mae ḡihiniro. Eꞌe ḡoeꞌa zuni fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, zae zamao gaueꞌohe.
2.14: Nego nabudi, Iudea habaꞌano Badiꞌa mone ekalesia, Keriso Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao fureraroteꞌeꞌa zae mazao zuni fureraro. Zeḡeꞌa Iuda azaḡa mazaonoꞌo hidiroteꞌe adugaḡaꞌe zae zuni zae teite ḡoere ḡumu azaḡa mazaonoꞌo hidiro.
2.15: Iuda azaḡaniꞌa Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu zu peroveta azaḡa zimiro, ebu emeḡe hegofe bufiro. Zeꞌe Badiꞌa mene matuꞌohauꞌohe zu vaze niduꞌa agiroziꞌohe.
2.16: Iuda azaḡaꞌe emeꞌa Iuda mene azaḡa haramozenadu ze ḡabone hidoga garareꞌohe. Deꞌugeꞌenaꞌa, ze iḡaiḡa haḡaize sauꞌa ragateragate teadu haḡaize sauꞌa niduꞌaꞌe iriꞌaveꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌa zama ḡugiꞌaniꞌa zeḡe mazao fureraro. Pauloꞌa Tesalonika Ekalesia Ḡiazoga Urateꞌohe
2.17: Nego nabudi, emeꞌa mada tahiḡa zae muhize iḡunirotene, ahirio zae mene ḡiaziro rehano, zamafeo iḡaiḡa zae zamariro. Ebu zae ḡiazoga urate rudaunu ꞌahine, zae vaḡe bare amoga radu ibi vaḡe arinu.
2.18: Eꞌanoꞌo eme zae vaḡe amihi reiro. Hube hune eḡe, Pauloꞌa barebare ibi vaḡiro rehano, Sataniꞌa emeḡe ibi ꞌuiro.
2.19: Eme uraꞌe bare ḡiazihi raꞌohe, mazaḡa zaꞌe Badiꞌa mazao fie gigaruꞌeꞌuma, onamo emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesuꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡano emeḡe niduꞌa ane zamao edaꞌuma. Eꞌe madaḡano emeꞌe zae uꞌano matuꞌiꞌuma ebu zaꞌe emeꞌa Iesu ubumao niguzadu zaꞌe aniꞌa rifiteꞌe kini vadiga adiriḡa teigiꞌuma.
2.20: Hube hune zaꞌe emeꞌa niguzeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu zae uꞌano eme matuꞌeꞌohe.

3.1: Eme ꞌouge faḡa guhiu radoga mene idararotene, emeḡe daꞌo Atena zamaḡano radiꞌuma rae zamariro,
3.2: ebu Timoteoꞌe zae vaḡe tuḡuniro. Aniꞌe emeḡe nego zu Keriso hari manoḡa haramifine emeḡe teite Badiꞌa gau haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Aniꞌa amine, zae inaraziꞌuma zu zaeꞌa fie gigaranoga veize danaziꞌuma.
3.3: ꞌOugine, za ꞌuguḡa aduga hideꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano zamazeꞌa mene hagariꞌuma. Zaꞌe edere huneꞌohe, fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, emeḡe niduꞌa aduga ꞌuguḡa hube hune hidiꞌuma.
3.4: Eme zae teite radiunuteꞌe zamaḡano emeḡe niduꞌa aduga hidiꞌuma rae irina ziro, ebu izidi zaꞌe edeḡa, eꞌe aduganiꞌa fureraro.
3.5: Eꞌanoꞌo eꞌa faḡa guhiu radoga mene idararotene, zaeꞌa nougenouge fieꞌeteꞌe ederoga veize Timoteo tuḡuniro. E Sataniꞌa ibi nunuo zae soꞌozadu emeḡeꞌa zae veize gaue arirotaꞌaꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa reꞌuma rae riharo. Timoteoꞌa Tesalonika Ekalesia moneo Hari Manoḡa Odohe Ariro
3.6: Rehano Timoteoꞌa izidi zae mazaonoꞌo emeḡe vaḡe bare aradu zaeꞌa fieꞌeteꞌe zu zamarotiteꞌeteꞌe moneo hari manoḡa meꞌodofiro. Ebu zaꞌa matuꞌeꞌenaꞌa iḡaiḡa emeḡe zamareꞌeteꞌe ihofiro, zu emeḡeꞌa ḡiaze hunihi raꞌeteꞌe teige, zae zuni ḡiafe hunihi raꞌeteꞌe ihofiro.
3.7: Eꞌanoꞌo, nego nabudi, eme aduga zu sauꞌa hideꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano zuni zaeꞌa fieꞌeteꞌe uꞌano zamafeꞌa inariro.
3.8: Zaeꞌa Zuhiꞌa Boro teite tiburanadu edau gigaruꞌe ꞌahine, izidi emeꞌa matuꞌeꞌenaꞌa, ḡabode radiuꞌohe.
3.9: Emeꞌa zae uꞌano Badiꞌa mazao ufeta manoḡa tauḡi raꞌohe, mazaḡa zae uꞌano emeꞌa emeḡe Badiꞌa zamao matuꞌu niduꞌa meiro.
3.10: Eme zae bare ḡiazoga veize zu zaeꞌa fie gigarafine danazoga veize, ohere zu madai niduꞌa ufeta inare kurauꞌohe.
3.11: Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama zu emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesuꞌa eme zae vaḡe amiteꞌe ibiḡa mae bohanifine, kurauꞌohe.
3.12: Ebu emeḡeꞌa zae zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe teige, zaezaeꞌa zamarotitoga veize zu Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa danazadu vaze zamare borofoga veize kurauꞌohe.
3.13: Ebu aniꞌa zamaze inaraneadu emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesuꞌa ane mone azaḡa niduꞌa teite ovaiteꞌe madaḡano zaꞌe Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama ubumao veꞌoḡa oꞌoꞌa zu zaḡoḡa rouga veize kurauꞌohe.

4.1: Ḡonagano, nego nabudi, emeꞌa ibite Badiꞌa matuꞌohafine nougenouge raditeꞌe moneo ihoziro, ebu zaꞌe ꞌouge radiuꞌohe. Izidi eme zaeꞌa ufeta ꞌouge haḡae radoga veize Zuhiꞌa Boro niḡano umizeꞌohe zu inaraziꞌohe.
4.2: Mazaḡa zaꞌe edeḡa, emeꞌa Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu niḡano nagi ihoreḡa ziniro.
4.3: Badiꞌaꞌe zaeꞌa zaḡozaḡe radoga urateꞌohe. Zaꞌe mene daro futaꞌuma,
4.4: zae tibatibaꞌa zaḡozaḡe zu gubaneꞌeteꞌe ibiḡano nougenouge ahirize taufeꞌeteꞌe ederiꞌuma,
4.5: Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡa, mene Iuda azaḡa teige, ubuma gezo mene haḡaiꞌuma,
4.6: ebu ꞌuguḡa haḡaiḡa nego nabudi mazao haḡadu mene mae veꞌoziꞌuma zu sausauziꞌuma. Emeꞌa amahi zae ziroteꞌe zu riḡa iraduguziroteꞌe teige, Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa haḡai ꞌuguḡa niduꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa aduga ziniꞌuma.
4.7: Eme toragano mene radifine, rehano zaḡozaḡe ḡabode radifine Badiꞌaꞌa emeḡe hufiro.
4.8: Eꞌanoꞌo ihore ꞌadi hezahohauꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe mene vaze hezahohauꞌohe, rehano Vine Zaḡoḡa ziniꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa hezahohauꞌohe.
4.9: U nego nabudi zamarotitoga moneoꞌe emeꞌa mirihozenoga mene urateꞌohe, mazaḡa za zaeꞌa bare Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo zamarotiteꞌeteꞌe ihoreḡa meiro.
4.10: Ebu hube hune zaꞌe Makedonia habaꞌano nego nabudi niduꞌa zamare borofeꞌohe. Rehano, nego nabudi, emeꞌa bare umizeꞌohe, “Za ufeta zamarotitoꞌi.”
4.11: Ebu emeꞌa zae ziroteꞌe idunaḡano roḡeru radifine inaroꞌi, zae gau faine zamareꞌenaꞌa ḡihau gauoꞌi, ebu ꞌevoreze hina gaue radoꞌi.
4.12: ꞌOugine, mene fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa zae gubaziꞌuma, zu ferezeꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa ꞌahoga oꞌoꞌa radu vaze mazao ḡau ꞌahoga mene umidiꞌuma. Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa Bare Ariꞌuma
4.13: Nego nabudi, eme zaeꞌa rune azaḡa moneo ederoga urateꞌohe. Mene fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe runeonoꞌo mene bare ḡabodiꞌuma rae zamaradu zamaze areꞌohe. Rehano zaꞌe mene zeḡe teigiꞌuma.
4.14: Eme Iesuꞌa rudanadu bare ḡabodiroteꞌe mae ḡihineꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo Iesuꞌa bare ovaiteꞌe madaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa iniu Iesu mazao fiadu rudaroteꞌe azaḡa zuni Iesu teite zamaziꞌuma.
4.15: Emeḡeꞌa Zuhiꞌa Boro ḡoere ziꞌohe. Eme ḡabode radiꞌuma onamo Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ovaiꞌuma, rehano ibite rudaroteꞌe azaḡa mene vitiziꞌuma.
4.16: Zuhiꞌa Boro aneꞌa bare adureonoꞌo ovaiteꞌe madaḡano, aniꞌe ḡoere riḡa ḡihau huaꞌuma, ebu tuḡure viga ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa huaꞌuma zu Badiꞌa bigoro hudiꞌuma. Eꞌe madaḡano Keriso mazao fiadu rudaroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ibite geno ḡabode iḡuniꞌuma.
4.17: Eꞌe enogano eme, ꞌize ḡabode radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa zeḡe teite idaḡa mae ḡihifadu ḡoze zamaḡano diuḡiꞌuma ebu adureo Zuhiꞌa Boro hidiꞌuma. Ebu emeꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro teite radiꞌuma, onamo tuḡutuḡu.
4.18: Eꞌanoꞌo zaꞌe ḡoere ꞌahiguḡa hina inaratitoꞌi.

5.1: Nego nabudi, Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡaꞌe zae veize mene mirihiꞌuma.
5.2: Mazaḡa za edeḡa hune, Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡaꞌe ḡonoreꞌa ohere areꞌeteꞌe teigiꞌuma.
5.3: Vazeꞌa raenaꞌa, “Emeꞌe uniho manoḡano sauꞌa ꞌahoga oꞌoꞌa radiuꞌohe,” rae raꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano aduga boroꞌa feuradu ze tabara ruiziꞌuma. Aꞌe roḡae ahiꞌetaniꞌa ene furenoga radu gigiꞌaniꞌa feurohuꞌeteꞌe teigiꞌuma. Ebu zeꞌe aduga boro eꞌe mode feranoga mene idaraꞌuma.
5.4: Rehano nego nabudi, zaꞌe mene uzabo zamaḡano radiuꞌe ꞌahine, Iesuꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ḡonore teige aradu za mene zaguzaguziꞌuma.
5.5: Zae niduꞌa madai zu agaḡa zamaḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa. Emeꞌe ohere zu uzabo zamaḡano mene radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa.
5.6: Eꞌanoꞌo emeꞌe bazeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mene teigiꞌuma, rehano evateꞌenaꞌa, tohutohe radiꞌuma.
5.7: Mazaḡa bazeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ohereo bazeꞌohe ebu gagone fuꞌa azaḡaꞌe ohereo gage futauꞌohe.
5.8: Rehano emeꞌe madai zamaḡano radiuꞌe ꞌahine, tohutohe radiꞌuma. Ebu fieꞌenaꞌa zamarotitiꞌuma, aꞌe utio ꞌuꞌuni biriḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe heuḡa. Ebu ḡabone hidiꞌuma rae mae ḡihineꞌenaꞌa guhiniꞌuma, aꞌe uti karaḡauḡa haḡadu vadini bireꞌeteꞌe heuḡa.
5.9: Badiꞌaꞌe zamaḡa ḡugiꞌa hina aduga rififine emeḡe mene ohotiro, rehano emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Keriso uꞌano ḡabone hidifine ohotiro.
5.10: Kerisoꞌa emeḡe veize rudaro. Aꞌe emeꞌa ḡabode radiuꞌeteꞌe ga rudaroteꞌe zamaḡano ani teite radoga veize raꞌohe.
5.11: Eꞌanoꞌo zaꞌe inaratitoꞌi ebu danatitoꞌi. Izidi hube hune zaeꞌa ꞌouge haḡaeꞌeteꞌe teige, ꞌouge haḡaeꞌenoꞌi. Ihore Ḡoeꞌa Ḡonaga
5.12: Nego nabudi, eme umizeꞌohe. Zae boꞌaḡano gau boro haḡaeꞌenaꞌa, Zuhiꞌa Boro ḡoere idunaḡano zae ibitoziꞌeteꞌe zu ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa gubazoꞌi.
5.13: Zeḡeꞌa zae veize gaueꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, ze zamare borofeꞌenaꞌa zamaze niduꞌa hina gubazoꞌi. Zaezae niduꞌa uniho manoḡa zamaḡano radoꞌi.
5.14: Nego nabudi, eme umizeꞌohe. Tubuḡa azaḡaꞌe riḡa iraduguzoꞌi, rihauꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe inarazoꞌi, zoreḡa azaḡaꞌe danazoꞌi, ebu vaze niduꞌa mazao zamaze obone giganoꞌi.
5.15: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ꞌahoga mazao sauꞌa haḡaoꞌidene, sauꞌa hina ago naenaenoꞌi, rehano zae boꞌaḡano zu vaze niduꞌa mazao iḡaiḡa manoḡa haḡaoꞌi.
5.18: Naginiꞌa fureranoꞌidene zuni, Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi roꞌi. Eꞌeguḡa niduꞌaꞌe zaeꞌa Keriso Iesu teite tiburanadu radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa zae mazaonoꞌo urateꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa.
5.19: Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa zae mazao gaueꞌeteꞌe ago ꞌuoꞌi.
5.20: Badiꞌaꞌa ihozadu rae fureneꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ago reꞌoreꞌone modoꞌi.
5.21: Ḡau niduꞌa tuhune ḡianoꞌi. Manoḡa ḡauḡa obone giganoꞌi.
5.23: Emeꞌe zama roḡeḡa rifiꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa aneꞌa ḡau niduꞌa moneo zae mae zaḡozaḡozifine kurauꞌohe. Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa danazadu emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Kerisoꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡano vineze zu ahirizeꞌe veꞌoḡa oꞌoꞌa radifine kurauꞌohe.
5.24: Zae huziroteꞌe Badiꞌaḡaꞌe zamaḡa niduꞌa hina haḡaeꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, aniꞌa hube hune ꞌouge haḡaiꞌuma.
5.27: Zuhiꞌa Boro niḡano ḡoere riḡa ziꞌohe. Soꞌa ꞌahiꞌe nego nabudi niduꞌa veize meꞌodoꞌi.
5.28: Emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Kerisoꞌa zae mazao manoḡa fureneꞌenoꞌi.

1.1: Eḡe, Paulo zu Silasi ebu Timoteoꞌa Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama zu Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Keriso mone azaḡa, Tesalonika ekalesia veize soꞌa ꞌahi miriheꞌohe.
1.2: Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama zu Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Kerisoꞌa manoḡa zu zama roḡeḡa ziniꞌenoꞌi. Badiꞌa mazao Manoḡa Tauḡi Raꞌohe
1.3: Nego nabudi, eme zae uꞌano iḡaiḡa Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi reꞌuma. Eme ꞌouge haḡaeꞌetaꞌaꞌe duduḡa. Mazaḡa zaꞌa fieꞌeteꞌeꞌa bororu onameꞌohe, ebu zae niduꞌa zamarotiteꞌetaꞌaꞌe zuni bororuꞌohe.
1.4: Eꞌanoꞌo habaꞌahabaꞌano Badiꞌa mone ekalesiaḡa nunu mazao za niguzeꞌohe. Mazaḡa zaꞌe vazeꞌa aduga ziniꞌeteꞌe zu agiroziꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano zuni zamaze obone giganeꞌohe ebu fie gigaruꞌohe. Kerisoꞌa Onaiteꞌe madaḡano Kotaziꞌuma
1.5: ꞌAhiguḡa niduꞌa Badiꞌa kotaꞌe duduḡa rae ihozeꞌohe. Badiꞌaꞌa zaꞌe aniꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌeteꞌe azaḡano rouga veize ohoziro. Eꞌe uꞌano, zaeꞌa aduga zuni hideꞌohe.
1.6: Badiꞌaꞌe iniuꞌa vaze aduga ziniꞌeteꞌe azaḡa naenaeziꞌuma. Aniꞌa za aduga ziniꞌeteꞌe azaḡa aduga hina naenaeziꞌohe.
1.7: Ebu za, aduga hideꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa ahiri ohoneꞌeteꞌe madaḡa ziniꞌuma ebu emeḡe zuni rifiꞌuma. Aꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesuꞌa ane tuḡure viga inaraḡa ḡehaḡa teite adureonoꞌo ire roga duhuḡa zamaḡano ovaiteꞌe madaḡano fureraꞌuma.
1.8: Eꞌe madaḡano Iesuꞌa Badiꞌa aḡuꞌa azaḡa zu emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu hariḡa manoḡa mene egohauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa aduga ziniꞌuma.
1.9: Zeꞌe aduga hidadu rudaꞌuma, onamo tuḡutuḡu. Ebu zeꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro mazaonoꞌo zu ane inaraḡa boro bagaḡaonoꞌo mae vaḡiziꞌuma.
1.10: Eꞌe madaḡano Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa arine, ane mone azaḡaniꞌa ane ni mae ḡihiniꞌuma ebu fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ane niguniꞌuma. Mazaḡa zaꞌe emeꞌa rae fureniroteꞌe hariḡa mae ḡihiniro.
1.11: Eꞌe uꞌano, emeꞌa zae veize iḡaiḡa kurauꞌohe. Aꞌe emeḡe Badiꞌaꞌa zae huzadu zaeꞌa ane urao radifine raꞌohe. Ebu aniꞌa inaraḡa zenadu zaeꞌa haḡai manoḡa niduꞌa haḡaihi rae raꞌeteꞌe zamaroneḡa meifine, zu zaeꞌa fieꞌenaꞌa haḡai niduꞌa haḡaifine kurauꞌohe.
1.12: ꞌOugine, emeḡe Badiꞌa zu Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Kerisoꞌa manoḡa furenozenadu zaeꞌa emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu niḡa mae ḡihiniꞌuma zu aniꞌa zae ni zuni mae ḡihiniꞌuma.

2.1: Nego nabudi, emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Kerisoꞌa bare ariteꞌe moneo zu emeḡe niduꞌa Iesu zamao nuꞌoratiteꞌe moneo emeꞌa ḡoreziꞌuma.
2.2: Vaze nuꞌa ꞌahige raꞌohe, “Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ariteꞌe madaḡa ꞌai amahi feuriro.” Ze zeḡeꞌa bare Badiꞌaꞌa ohozadu ꞌouge ziꞌohe rae raꞌohe, ga zeḡe haramo hina ꞌouge ziꞌohe. Zeꞌe emeḡe mazaonoꞌo meiroteꞌe soꞌaḡa idunaḡano ꞌouge ziꞌohe rae raꞌenaꞌa, zae soꞌozeꞌohe. Zaꞌe zeḡe ḡoere egadu zamaze ago ḡarihe hagaroꞌi zu ꞌadaꞌadazoꞌi.
2.3: Iniuꞌa ibi nunuo zae soꞌosoꞌozeꞌeteꞌe gararoꞌi. Mazaḡa Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ꞌizema arogano, vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa Badiꞌa agirohaꞌuma ebu ḡonagano Badiꞌaꞌa ruiniteꞌe vazeḡa mazao sauꞌa huneḡaniꞌa fureraꞌuma. Aniꞌe Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa varadeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.
2.4: Aniꞌe badiꞌa rae huneꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌa zu vazeꞌa kuranohauꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌa agiroziꞌuma ebu eꞌe niduꞌa rana ane ni mae ḡihiniꞌuma. Ebu aniꞌe Badiꞌa kuru neḡano ehoradu aneꞌa bare, “Eꞌe Badiꞌa,” rae fureniꞌuma.
2.5: Eꞌeguḡa moneo e zae teite radiunuteꞌe madaḡano ziro. Za mene zamareꞌehe?
2.6: Ebu za edeḡa, izidi ḡau ꞌahoganiꞌa vaze sauꞌa huneḡa eꞌe ꞌueꞌohe, rehano ane madaꞌa arine aniꞌa fureraꞌuma.
2.7: Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa varadeꞌeteꞌe zamaroneḡaniꞌa sifu inare gaueꞌohe, rehano hunioꞌe mene fureraꞌuma. Mazaḡa vaze sauꞌa huneḡaniꞌa gauiteꞌe ibiḡaꞌe vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ꞌuiꞌuma, onamo vaze sauꞌa huneḡa eꞌe ꞌueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa vaḡiniꞌuma.
2.8: Ebu hena Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa varadeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa eꞌeꞌa fureraꞌuma. Eꞌe madaḡano Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesuꞌa hebeꞌanonoꞌo irineḡa hina maꞌuma, ebu Iesuꞌa arine agaḡa boro hina ruiniꞌuma.
2.9: Badiꞌa goro ḡoeꞌa varadeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa eꞌeꞌa Satani inaraḡa madu ariꞌuma ebu Satani gauḡa haḡaiꞌuma. Aniꞌa aradu haḡai gigiꞌa nunu, haḡai nu badeḡa, zu zaguzagatiteꞌe haḡaiḡa niduꞌa ḡurire haḡaiꞌuma.
2.10: Ebu aniꞌa sauꞌa haḡaiḡa nunu hina Badiꞌaꞌa ruiziteꞌe azaḡa soꞌoziꞌuma. Mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa ruiziteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa zeḡe ḡaboziteꞌe ḡoeꞌa huga zamare borofoga hezahoharo.
2.11: Eꞌe uꞌano, Badiꞌaꞌa zeḡe mazao soꞌosoꞌozeꞌeteꞌe inaraḡa tuḡunadu zeꞌa ḡuriro ḡoeꞌa mae ḡihiniꞌuma.
2.12: Zeꞌe ḡoere huga mene mae ḡihiniro, rehano haḡai veꞌoḡa haḡaeꞌenaꞌa matuꞌiro. Eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa zeḡe niduꞌa kotaziꞌuma. Badiꞌaꞌa Ḡabozifine Ohotiro
2.13: Nego nabudi, zaꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro zamarone azaḡa. Emeꞌe iḡaiḡa zae uꞌano Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi rae huniꞌuma, mazaḡa zaꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡa hina zaḡozaḡifine zu ḡoere huga mae ḡihinadu ḡabone hidifine Badiꞌaꞌa ḡadaheḡano zae ohotiro.
2.14: Eꞌe veize, emeꞌa haramiroteꞌe hariḡa manoḡa hina Badiꞌaꞌa zae huziro. ꞌOugadu zae zuni emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Keriso ni ḡihiꞌaḡa meiro.
2.15: Eꞌanoꞌo, nego nabudi, edau gigaranadu emeḡeꞌa hebe hina ziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ga soꞌa hina ihoziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa obone giganoꞌi.
2.16: Eme zae veize emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Keriso zu Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama mazao kurauꞌohe. Badiꞌaꞌe emeḡe zamare borofeꞌohe. Aniꞌa emeḡe mazao manoḡa furenadu inarafiro onamo radiu tuḡutuḡu, ebu ḡabone tuḡutuḡu mae ḡihineꞌenaꞌa guhineꞌeteꞌe zamaroneḡa manoḡa rifiro.
2.17: Badiꞌa zu Iesuꞌa zamaze inaranoꞌi zu haḡaize manoḡa niduꞌa zu ḡoereze manoḡa niduꞌa zamaḡano inara ziniꞌenoꞌi.

3.1: Ḡonagano, nego nabudi, emeḡe veize kuranoꞌi. Aꞌe, Zuhiꞌa Boro hari manoḡaniꞌa zae boꞌaḡano bororaroteꞌe teige, vaze niduꞌa boꞌaḡano bororanadu zeꞌa mae ḡihinoga veize raꞌohe.
3.2: Ebu emeḡe sausaufeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa sauꞌa mazaonoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa ḡabofoga veize kuranoꞌi, mazaḡa vaze boꞌaḡano mene niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌohe.
3.3: Rehano Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌe zamaḡa niduꞌa hina haḡaeꞌe ꞌahine, sauꞌa ḡauḡa, Satani mazaonoꞌo zae inaraziꞌuma zu biriꞌuma.
3.4: Zaꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro mone azaḡa ꞌahine, emeꞌa haḡaoꞌi rae ziroteꞌe haḡaiḡa izidi haḡaeꞌeteꞌe ebu haḡae onamiteꞌe moneo emeꞌa hube hune edereꞌohe.
3.5: Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa zamaze ibitohanadu Badiꞌaꞌa nougenouge zae zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe zaeꞌa ederifine emeꞌa kurauꞌohe, ebu Kerisoꞌa aduga zamaḡano zamaḡa obone giganiroteꞌe zaeꞌa ederadu zae zuni ꞌouge haḡaifine kurauꞌohe. Tubuḡa Azaḡa Riḡa Iraduguziro
3.6: Nego nabudi, eme emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Keriso niḡano riḡa ziꞌohe. Iniu tubuḡa zu emeḡeꞌa ihozidoteꞌe ihoreḡa idunaḡano mene radiuꞌeteꞌe negoḡa nabuga niduꞌa mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi.
3.7: Za zaeꞌa bare edeḡa, za nougenouge eme tuhutuhufiꞌuma. Emeḡeꞌa zae teite radiunuteꞌe madaḡano emeꞌe mene tubuḡa reiro.
3.8: Eme vaze ogomuꞌe naeḡa oꞌoꞌa mene mae au tauḡiro. Ebu zae boꞌaḡano vazeni ꞌahoga aduga mene hanoga veize, eme ohere zu madai, mada niduga gau boro inare haḡairo.
3.9: Emeꞌa ꞌouge haḡairotaꞌaꞌe mene mazaḡa zae mazaonoꞌo ogomu meiteꞌe inaraḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa, rehano emeḡe haḡai zaeꞌa horonadu zae zuni emeḡe hegotifine raꞌohe.
3.10: Emeꞌa zae teite radiunuteꞌe madaḡano ꞌahige zido, “Iniuꞌa gauoga mene uratine, aniꞌe ogomu anoga zuni mene idaḡa.”
3.11: Emeꞌa zae hari igiꞌetene, zae boꞌaḡano nuꞌe tubuḡa raꞌohe. Zeꞌe mene gaueꞌenaꞌa, vaze daꞌo dudizeꞌohe.
3.12: ꞌUguḡa azaḡaꞌe emeḡeꞌa Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Keriso niḡano ꞌahige riḡa ziꞌohe zu ihozeꞌohe, “Zaꞌe sifu gauoꞌi ebu zaeꞌa bare gauadu ogomu hidoꞌi.”
3.13: Nego nabudi, zaꞌe haḡai manoḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano ago fuḡozoꞌi.
3.14: Iniu vazeꞌa emeḡeꞌa soꞌa ꞌada ihoziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa mene hegotoꞌidene, vaze eꞌe faifaine ḡianoꞌi ebu ani teite ago zaꞌuoꞌi. ꞌOugine, ani aneꞌa bare mazagaroniꞌuma.
3.15: Rehano aniꞌe zae agire vazeḡa rae ago zamaroꞌi, rehano zae nego teige riḡa iradugunoꞌi. Ḡoere Ḡonaga
3.16: Zama roḡeḡa rifiꞌeteꞌe Zuhiꞌaḡa Boroꞌa iḡaiḡa ibi niduꞌa zamaḡano ane zama roḡeḡa ziniꞌenoꞌi. Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌe zae niduꞌa teite radiuꞌenoꞌi.
3.17: Uhiu ḡoeꞌa ꞌahiꞌe eḡe, Pauloꞌa eḡe ꞌevore hina miriheꞌohe. Aꞌe eḡe soꞌa niduꞌa zamaḡano eḡeꞌa mirihiro rae ihozeꞌeteꞌe tahiḡa, zu eḡeꞌa miriheꞌeteꞌe ibiḡa.
3.18: Emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Kerisoꞌa zae niduꞌa mazao manoḡa fureneꞌenoꞌi.

1.1: Eḡe, Pauloꞌa soꞌa ꞌadi miriheꞌohe. Badiꞌaꞌe emeḡe ḡabofeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, zu Keriso Iesuꞌe emeꞌa fieꞌenaꞌa guhine radiuꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa. Badiꞌa zu Iesuꞌa eḡe ohotadu eꞌe Keriso Iesu apostolo vazeḡano reiro.
1.2: Soꞌa ꞌadiꞌe Timoteo, ḡae mazao miriheꞌohe. Ḡaꞌe hube hune eḡe ubude, mazaḡa eꞌa ḡae mazao haramadu ḡae zuni Iesu mazao firo. Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama zu emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Keriso Iesuꞌa ḡae mazao manoḡa zu vetuḡa ebu zama roḡeḡa ḡaneꞌenoꞌi. Ḡuriro Ihore Azaḡa mazao Riḡa Iraduguziro
1.3: E Makedonia habaꞌa uꞌa iḡunirotene inare ḡeiroteꞌe teige, ḡa Efeso zamaḡano radoꞌi. Eꞌea radiuꞌenaꞌa, vaze nuꞌa ḡurire ihoreḡa ihozeꞌeteꞌe gararoꞌi.
1.4: Ebu ze amahi irihineḡa zu vouḡaze ni moneo mene ufeta zamare gauifine riḡa ḡorezoꞌi. ꞌUguḡaniꞌa taꞌiro fureneꞌohe, ebu Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ḡabozoga veize Badiꞌaꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe gauḡa moneo mene hune ihozeꞌohe.
1.5: Eḡeꞌa ꞌahige riḡa ihoꞌeꞌetaꞌaꞌe vazeꞌa zamarotitoga veize raꞌohe. Vaze zamarotitogaꞌe zama deheḡanonoꞌo zu duduḡa rae zamareꞌeteꞌe haḡaeꞌeteꞌeanoꞌo zu ihore huga hube hune mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌeanoꞌo fureruꞌohe.
1.6: Rehano vaze nu'e ihore huga ꞌadi modadu huga o'oꞌano taꞌirotiteꞌeteꞌe hegoteꞌohe.
1.7: Ze'e Mose goro ḡoe'a ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reihi raꞌohe. Rehano ze zeḡeꞌa bare nagini raꞌetaꞌaꞌe aḡuꞌa, ebu zeꞌa hube hune rae raꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa moneo zuni aḡuꞌa.
1.8: Eme edeḡa, vaze'a ibi duduḡano Mose goro ḡoeꞌa hegotine, Mose goro ḡoeꞌaꞌe manoḡa.
1.9: Rehano eme edeḡa, Mose goro ḡoeꞌaꞌe duduḡa azaḡa veize mene haḡairo. Aꞌe goro ḡoeꞌa varadeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, Badiꞌa mene hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, Badiꞌa mene gubaneꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, sauꞌa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, Badiꞌa ḡoereo mene zaḡozaḡeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, Badiꞌa mazao mene kurauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, viꞌa moga ga vaze goruzeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa,
1.10: ubuma ḡezo azaḡa, ohozeꞌa ohoze teite zu roḡaeꞌa roḡae teite daroeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, vaze oboze teadu serozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, ḡurireꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, kotao ḡurireꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, ebu ihore duduḡa hezahohauꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa nunu hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa veize haḡairo.
1.11: Ihore hugaꞌe Iesu hari manoḡanonoꞌo ariro. Hari manoḡa aꞌe emeꞌa niguneꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaniꞌa rae furenadu eḡeꞌa vaze ihozifine iniro. Badiꞌaꞌa Paulo Vetuḡaniro.
1.12: Keriso Iesu emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa inarahiroteꞌe moneo eḡeꞌa ani mazao manoḡa tauḡi raꞌohe, mazaḡa aniꞌa e hube hune ani mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa rae zamaradu ane gau haḡaifine ohohiro.
1.13: E ibite Iesu rae sausauniro, zu ani hegoteꞌeteꞌe azaḡa aduga ziniro, zu utiutiḡa reiro. Rehano e ani mazao mene firoteꞌe madaḡano ani aḡuꞌa radu ꞌouge haḡairoteꞌe uꞌano, Badiꞌaꞌa eḡe vetuḡahiro.
1.14: Emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Badiꞌaꞌa manoḡa borofe iniro ꞌahine, e Keriso Iesu teite tiburanadu ani mazao fie gigaruꞌohe, ebu ani zu vaze zamare borofeꞌohe.
1.15: “Keriso Iesuꞌa sauꞌa azaḡa ḡabozoga veize raha ꞌadi ariro,” rae raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe huga, zu vaze niduꞌa mae ḡihiniteꞌe ḡoeꞌa. Ebu eꞌe sauꞌa azaḡa boꞌaḡano ufeta sauꞌa hune vazeḡa.
1.16: Rehano Badiꞌaꞌa vetuḡahiro. Aꞌe, ufeta sauꞌa hune vazeḡa, eḡe veize Keriso Iesuꞌa mada faḡa zamaḡa obone tirotaꞌaꞌe vaze niduꞌa ihozifine, ebu zeḡe zuni ane mazao fiadu ḡabone tuḡutuḡu hidifine raꞌohe.
1.17: Radiu tuḡutuḡu Kiniḡa, mene rudatiteꞌe zu mene horoneꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa tibuhuga gubanihi ebu niḡa mae ḡihinihi, onamo tuḡutuḡu! Amen. Pauloꞌa Timoteo Inaraniro
1.18: Timoteo, eḡe ubude, ibite vazeꞌa ḡae moneo Badiꞌa ḡoere rae fureniroteꞌe idunaḡano, eḡeꞌa ḡoere ꞌahi ihoꞌeꞌohe. Ḡa zeꞌa rae fureniroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa hegoteꞌenaꞌa, Keriso hari manoḡa veize faine utitoꞌi.
1.19: Ihore huga mae ḡihinoꞌi, zu naginiꞌe duduḡa ga veꞌoḡa rae faine zamaradu duduḡa daꞌo haḡaoꞌi. Vaze nuꞌe zeḡeꞌa bare zamaroneze duduḡa hezahoharo zu ḡasiꞌa fahau zubureꞌeteꞌe teige, zeꞌa fieꞌeteꞌeꞌa dauḡiro.
1.20: Zeḡe boꞌaḡano Himenaio zu Alesanaꞌe eḡeꞌa Satani ꞌevoreo riꞌiziro. Ze aduga hidadu Badiꞌa mene bare rae sausaunoga veize eḡeꞌa ihozihi reiro.

2.1: Eꞌanoꞌo e ibite geno ḡoere ꞌahi inare ḡaꞌohe. Vaze niduꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa Badiꞌa mazao umidoꞌi, zu zeḡe veize kuranoꞌi, zu vaze ꞌahogaꞌahoga veize kuranoꞌi, ebu zeḡe niduꞌa veize Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi roꞌi.
2.2: Nize boro azaḡa niduꞌa ebu kini veize kuranoꞌi. ꞌOugine, eme Badiꞌa hube hune gubaneꞌenaꞌa zu zaḡozaḡe haḡaeꞌenaꞌa, zama roḡeḡa huneo sifu radiꞌuma.
2.3: ꞌOuge kurauꞌetaꞌaꞌe manoḡa, zu emeḡe ḡabofeꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa matuꞌohauꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa.
2.4: Badiꞌaꞌe vaze niduꞌa ḡabone hidoga zu zeꞌe ihore huga ederadu mae ḡihinoga urateꞌohe.
2.5: Badiꞌaꞌe tibuhuga, ebu Badiꞌa zu vaze boꞌaḡano nema vazeḡa zuni tibuhuga. Aniꞌe vaze, Keriso Iesu.
2.6: Aniꞌa vaze niduꞌa haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo bohaze buzoga veize ane bare dibuꞌiro. Ebu ani Badiꞌaꞌa ohoniroteꞌe madaḡano ꞌouge haḡadu Badiꞌaꞌa vaze ḡaboziteꞌe rae fureniro.
2.7: Hari manoḡa eꞌe rae furenifine, Badiꞌaꞌa eꞌe haramo vazeḡano zu apostolo vazeḡano ohohiro. Ebu Iuda mene azaḡa mazao hari manoḡa huga ihozadu ze Iesu mazao fioga veize, e zeḡe ihore vazeḡano ohohiro. E huga ḡoereꞌohe zu mene ḡurireꞌohe.
2.8: E ohozeohozeꞌa haba niduꞌa zamaḡano Badiꞌa mazao kuranoga urateꞌohe. Ebu ze mene maḡuneꞌenaꞌa, mene roteteꞌenaꞌa, zu zaḡozaḡe radiuꞌenaꞌa, ꞌevoreze mae ḡihinadu kuranoga e urateꞌohe.
2.9: Ebu roḡaeroḡae zuni dabua idaidaḡa faine vidanoga, iguze mene nunufe siꞌoga, ebu hadi naeḡa boro zu naeḡa boro dabuaḡa mene vidanoga urateꞌohe.
2.10: U ze haḡai manoḡa haḡadu ze zeḡeꞌa bare Badiꞌa gubaneꞌeteꞌe roḡaeḡa rae furenoga urateꞌohe.
2.11: Roḡaeꞌe ihore azaḡa ꞌuꞌuḡano ḡoereze niduꞌa egohanadu sifu edeḡa meꞌuma.
2.12: E roḡaeꞌa ohoze ihozoga zu ibitozoga mene idaḡa raꞌohe. Ze sifu radiꞌuma.
2.13: Mazaḡa Adamuꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa ibite haḡairo ebu hena Eva haḡairo.
2.14: Sataniꞌa Adamu mene soꞌoniro, rehano Eva soꞌonadu aniꞌa haḡai sauꞌa haḡairo.
2.15: Rehano roḡaeꞌa iḡaiḡa Iesu mazao fieꞌenaꞌa, vaze zamare borofine ebu zaḡozaḡeꞌenaꞌa faine radiune, zeꞌa ene fureneꞌeteꞌeanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa ḡaboziꞌuma.

3.1: Ḡoere ꞌahiꞌe huga: Iniu ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa reihi rae raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe gau manoḡa tauḡi haḡaihi reꞌuma.
3.2: Eꞌanoꞌo ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe vazeꞌa veꞌoḡa rae raꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa mene haḡaiꞌuma, inuga tiba daꞌo meꞌuma, faine zamareꞌenaꞌa gauiꞌuma, aneꞌa bare haḡai sauꞌa hezahohaꞌuma, aniꞌe vazeꞌa gubaniꞌuma, iꞌudo azaḡa mae zouzadu ḡubuziꞌuma, zu vaze faine ihozogaꞌe idaḡa rae raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa reꞌuma.
3.3: Aniꞌe vu sauꞌa mene ufeta gagiꞌuma zu mene utiutiḡa reꞌuma, rehano roḡeru haḡaiꞌuma, mene rotetiꞌuma, zu hadi ubumaḡa mene reꞌuma.
3.4: Aniꞌa ane neo tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa faine ibitoziꞌuma zu ubugaubuganiꞌa hube hune ani gubaneꞌenaꞌa ani ḡoere egohafine ihoziꞌuma.
3.5: Iniu ane neo tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mene faine ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe nougenouge ekalesia ibitoziꞌuma?
3.6: Ekalesia izigaꞌe ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa iḡurio mene ohoniꞌuma. Aniꞌe iḡuri eꞌe meine, aneꞌa bare niḡa mae itadu Badiꞌaꞌa Diabolo kotaniroteꞌe teige, ani zuni kotaniꞌuma gaogi.
3.7: Ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe mene ekalesia azaḡaniꞌa zuni gubaneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa reꞌuma. ꞌOugine, zeꞌa ani mene rae sausauniꞌuma zu Diabolo ꞌahirio ani mene ꞌahiriniꞌuma. Diakono Azaḡa Haḡai
3.8: Diakono azaḡa zuni ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teige vazeꞌa gubazeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reꞌuma, ḡoere huga daꞌo reꞌuma, vu sauꞌa mene ufeta gagiꞌuma, zu hadi ubumaḡa mene reꞌuma.
3.9: Ze zama deheḡa hina duduḡa daꞌo zamareꞌenaꞌa, Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌuꞌuru teadu rae fureniroteꞌe ihoreḡa huga ꞌaune mae ḡihiniꞌuma.
3.10: Vaze ꞌizema ohozogano ze faine udahiꞌuma ebu zeḡe mazao veꞌoḡa oꞌoꞌa reine, diakono iḡurio ohoziꞌuma.
3.11: Diakono azaḡa teige, inudeze zuni vazeꞌa gubazeꞌeteꞌe roḡaeḡa reꞌuma, vaze mene rae sausauziꞌuma, faine zamareꞌenaꞌa gauiꞌuma, zu gau niduꞌaꞌe zamaze niduꞌa hina haḡaiꞌuma.
3.12: Diakono azaḡa zuni inuga tiba daꞌo meꞌuma, ebu ane ubugaubuga zu ane neo tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa faine ibitoziꞌuma.
3.13: Diakono gauḡa faine haḡaeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe vazeꞌa nize mae ḡihiniꞌuma, ebu ze zeḡeꞌa Keriso Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe moneo ufeta borofe rae fureniꞌuma. Badiꞌaꞌa Ihore Huga rae Fureniro
3.14: E ḡarihe amihi rehano, izidi ḡae mazao ḡoeꞌa ꞌahi miriheꞌohe,
3.15: mazaḡa e mene ḡarihe amine, vazeꞌa Badiꞌa mone nego nabudi boꞌaḡano nougenouge haḡae raditeꞌe moneo ḡa ihoꞌifine raꞌohe. Badiꞌa mone nego nabudiꞌe ḡabode radiuꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa mazao fieꞌeteꞌe ekalesiaḡa. Ebu ne ogoruꞌetene raha huꞌi sebanadu gado ohoneꞌeteꞌe teige, zeꞌe ḡoere huga rana edau gigaruꞌohe.
3.16: Zuhiꞌa Boro mazao kurauꞌenaꞌa radiuꞌeteꞌe ḡaboneḡa moneo Badiꞌaꞌa rae fureniroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune. Vaze niduꞌa ḡoere aꞌe huga raꞌohe: Aniꞌe vazeo fureraro, Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa aniꞌe duduḡa rae fureniro, aniꞌe tuḡure vigaviganiꞌa horoniro, vazeꞌa ani moneo habaꞌahabaꞌano haramiro, raha azaḡaniꞌa ani mazao firo, ebu Badiꞌaꞌa ani adure ḡoha mae itadu eꞌea aniꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae reiro.

4.1: Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa ꞌahige deheru raꞌohe. Vesu vaze nuꞌa ihore huga mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe modadu soꞌosoꞌo viga zu vine sauꞌa ihoreḡa hegotiꞌuma.
4.2: Ihore ꞌuguḡaꞌe zama guhi azaḡa ḡuriro ḡoeꞌanonoꞌo areꞌohe. Ze aḡuꞌa, zeḡe zamaroneꞌe auri gigiꞌaḡa hina hufiroteꞌe teige rudanadu zeḡe ihoreꞌe veꞌoḡa.
4.3: Ze vaze mazao, “Ago hahuroꞌi,” ebu “Ogomu nuꞌe ago anoꞌi,” rae raꞌohe. Rehano ogomu ꞌuguḡaꞌe Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe zu ihore huga edereꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi radu anoga veize Badiꞌaꞌa haḡadu rifiro.
4.4: Mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa haḡairoteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌaꞌe manoḡa. Eme ani mazao manoḡa tauḡi radu eꞌe aune, ḡauni ꞌahoga mene hezahohaꞌuma.
4.5: Mazaḡa Badiꞌa ḡoere ebu emeꞌa ogomu veize manoḡa tauḡi rae kurauꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, ogomu nidu'aꞌe zaḡoḡa. Iesu Keriso veize Gaueꞌeteꞌe Vazeḡa Manoḡa
4.6: Ḡa eḡe ḡoere ꞌadi nego nabudi faine ihozoꞌi. ꞌOugine, ḡaꞌa mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa huga zu hegoteꞌeteꞌe ihoreḡa huga hina ufeta ḡuhuradu Keriso Iesu veize gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa manoḡa reꞌuma.
4.7: Badiꞌa rae sausauneꞌeteꞌe ḡuriro hariḡa zu vouḡaze irihine hezahohanoꞌi. Rehano Badiꞌa gubaneꞌenaꞌa radoga veize ḡa ḡae bare taufoꞌi.
4.8: Ahiri faine taufine, manoḡa nu meꞌuma. Rehano Badiꞌa gubaneꞌenaꞌa radiune, ḡau niduꞌa ibiḡano manoḡa hidiꞌuma. Manoḡa aꞌe izidi madaḡano zu zama moneo Badiꞌaꞌa rifiꞌuma rae ḡoitoriroteꞌe ḡaboneḡa.
4.9: Ḡoere aꞌe huga, zu vaze niduꞌa mae ḡihiniteꞌe ḡoeꞌa.
4.10: Eme Badiꞌaꞌa ḡoitoriroteꞌe ḡaboneḡa hidifine, ḡihau gaue inareꞌohe, mazaḡa emeꞌe ḡabode radiuꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡaniꞌa eꞌe rifiꞌuma rae mae ḡihineꞌohe. Aniꞌe vaze niduꞌa ḡabozeꞌeteꞌe zu ani mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ufeta hune ḡabozeꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa.
4.11: Za ihore ꞌadi riḡa zoꞌi ebu ihozoꞌi.
4.12: Ḡaꞌe tahiꞌa iziga radu vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ḡa ovoe ḡiaoga gararoꞌi. Rehano ḡaꞌe fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa radu faine ḡoeroꞌi, faine haḡaoꞌi, vaze zamare borofoꞌi, Iesu mazao hube hune fioꞌi ebu zama deheḡa hina Badiꞌa ubumao haḡai duduḡa haḡaoꞌi. ꞌOugine, fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ḡa tuhutuhuꞌiꞌuma.
4.13: Vaze ubumao Buka Zaḡoḡa meꞌodoga, haramoga zu ihozoga veize inaroꞌi, onamo eḡeꞌa amiꞌuma.
4.14: Ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ibite ꞌevoreze ḡae rana teadu Badiꞌa ḡoere rae furenirotene, ḡa Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo ḡahunone hidiro. Ḡahunone aꞌe ago reꞌoreꞌonoꞌi.
4.15: ꞌAhiguḡa niduꞌa ḡaeꞌa zamaḡo niduꞌa hina inare haḡadu ḡaꞌa ufeta ḡuhureꞌetaꞌaꞌe vaze niduꞌa ihozoꞌi.
4.16: Ḡaboneḡo zu ihoreḡo faine ḡianoꞌi. E ḡateꞌe ꞌaune haḡaoꞌi. ꞌOugine, Badiꞌaꞌa mene ḡae daꞌo, rehano ḡae ihore igiꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zuni ḡaboziꞌuma.

5.1: Ohoze vouḡa riḡa ago ronoꞌi, rehano mogo teige iradugunoꞌi. Ohoze izigaꞌe negoḡo teige iradugunoꞌi.
5.2: Roḡae vouḡaḡaꞌe viꞌu teige iradugunoꞌi. Roḡae izigaꞌe hube hune zamaḡo deheḡa hina ezeḡo teige iraduguzoꞌi.
5.3: Dananoga vazeḡa oꞌoꞌa ḡozobaḡa niduꞌa gubazoꞌi.
5.4: Rehano ḡozoba ꞌahogaꞌe tahiꞌaḡeta ga aḡiḡeta reine, tahiꞌaḡa zu aḡiḡaniꞌa zeḡe neo tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ibite geno taufoꞌi rae ihoziꞌuma. Ebu vize moze zu aḡizeꞌa ubudeze faifairu taufiroteꞌe moneo, ubudeze zuni vize moze zu aḡize mazao baronoꞌi rae ihoziꞌuma, mazaḡa aꞌe Badiꞌa matuꞌohauꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa raꞌohe.
5.5: Dananoga vazeḡa oꞌoꞌa zu ane daꞌo radiuꞌeteꞌe ḡozobaḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa hube hune ani dananiꞌuma rae mae ḡihineꞌenaꞌa, ohere zu madai ꞌaune umide kurauꞌohe.
5.6: U iniu raha matuꞌuḡa veize daꞌo radiu tauḡeꞌeteꞌe ḡozobaḡaꞌe ḡaboga rehano, rune ḡozobaḡa raꞌohe.
5.7: Vazeꞌa ekalesia azaḡaꞌe veꞌoḡa rae mene rozifine, ꞌahiguḡa ekalesia azaḡa ihozoꞌi.
5.8: Iniu nabuga mene taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa zu nabuga boꞌaḡano ane neo tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mene ufeta taufeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe aniꞌa fieꞌeteꞌe oꞌoniroteꞌe vazeḡa. Aniꞌe sauꞌa, u mene fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ani vitinoga.
5.9: Iniu muriḡa 60 vitinoga zu ḡae tiba daꞌo hahuriroteꞌe ḡozobaḡa reine, ekalesiaꞌa danaziteꞌe ḡozobaḡa nizeo zouziꞌuma.
5.10: Ebu aniꞌa gau manoḡa haḡadu vazeꞌa niguneꞌeteꞌe ḡozobaḡa rae reꞌuma. Aniꞌe ubugaubuga faine taufiꞌuma, vaze mae zouzadu ḡubuziꞌuma, Badiꞌa mone azaḡa veize tuḡure vazeḡa teige gauꞌiꞌuma, aduga hideꞌeteꞌe azaḡa danaziꞌuma, ebu haḡai manoḡa niduꞌa haḡaifine inariꞌuma.
5.11: Ḡozoba iziga roꞌidene ḡozoba nizeo ago toꞌi. Mazaḡa ze ahiri ura haḡaihi rae zamareꞌetene Keriso veize gaueꞌeteꞌe modadu hahurihi raꞌohe.
5.12: Eꞌanoꞌo ze ibite Keriso mazao ḡoitoriroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa variꞌadu vazeꞌa ze sauꞌa haḡairo rae reꞌuma.
5.13: Ebu zeꞌe tubuḡa radu ne ꞌahogaꞌahogano ragave tauḡeꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa hegotiꞌuma. Mene tubuḡa daꞌo, rehano vaze dudiziꞌuma, vaze gauo ḡunuḡuniꞌuma, ebu mene reiteꞌe ḡoeꞌa reꞌuma.
5.14: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa, ḡozoba iziga bare hahuradu ze ubudeze furezoꞌi ebu neze faine taufoꞌi rae iraduguzeꞌohe. ꞌOugine, ze veꞌoḡa ꞌahoga mene haḡadu agire vazeḡaniꞌa ze rae sausauzoga mene idaḡa reꞌuma.
5.15: Ḡozoba nuꞌe amahi Keriso modadu Satani hegotiro.
5.16: Ekalesia roḡae ꞌahoga, ane nabuga boꞌaḡano ḡozoba nu eꞌe reine, aniꞌa ze danaziꞌuma ebu ekalesia mazao ze danazoga mene umiziꞌuma. ꞌOugine, ekalesiaꞌa iniu danazoga vazeḡa oꞌoꞌa raꞌeteꞌe ḡozobaḡa huga niduꞌa daꞌo danaziꞌuma.
5.17: Ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ekalesia faine ibitozine, ekalesia azaḡaniꞌa ze ufeta hune gubaziꞌuma. Zeḡe boꞌaḡano haramo azaḡa zu ihore azaḡa veize ufeta hune gubaziꞌuma.
5.18: Mazaḡa Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige raꞌohe, “Vazeꞌa boromakau hina vuidi hiriveꞌeteꞌe madaḡano boromakau zuni vuidi afine hebeze ago furuꞌoꞌi,” zu “Gau vazeḡaniꞌa ane gau naeḡa meꞌuma.”
5.19: Ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa veꞌoḡa haḡadu kotao ohonihi reine, ane veꞌoḡa rae fureneꞌeteꞌe azaḡa aheu ga uḡidu vaḡoꞌi. ꞌUguḡa azaḡa oꞌoꞌa roꞌidene, ani kotao ago ohonoꞌi.
5.20: Ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa sauꞌa ꞌaune haḡaine, ekalesia azaḡa ubumao rozoꞌi. ꞌOugine, vaze ꞌahogaꞌahoga zuni sauꞌa haḡaoga rihoniꞌuma.
5.21: Badiꞌa zu Keriso Iesu ebu Badiꞌaꞌa ohotiroteꞌe tuḡure viga ubumao e riḡa ḡaꞌohe. Ḡoere ꞌadi hegotoꞌi. Ḡaꞌa vaze niduꞌa mazao mene inaheꞌenaꞌa, idane haḡaoꞌi.
5.22: Ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ohozoꞌidene, zeḡe rana ꞌevoreḡo ago ḡarihe toꞌi. Vaze sauꞌano ago ꞌauḡoꞌi, rehano ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare ḡiaꞌeꞌenaꞌa, deheḡano radiuꞌenoꞌi.
5.23: Izidionoꞌo vu isoḡa daꞌo ago gagoꞌi, rehano ḡae isi veize zu ḡae ḡehaḡa maꞌeteꞌe ugiḡaꞌe manoroga veize vaini vuḡa tahiḡa zuni gagoꞌi.
5.24: Vaze nuꞌa haḡai sauꞌa furene haḡadu ze ꞌizema kotazogano haḡaize sauꞌaniꞌa fureruꞌohe. U nuꞌa haḡaize sauꞌaꞌe ꞌuꞌuru teadu vesuꞌu fureruꞌohe.
5.25: Eꞌe teige, haḡai manoḡaꞌe deheru fureranadu vazeꞌa edereꞌohe, ebu haḡai manoḡa ꞌuꞌuruḡa zuni mada ꞌahogano fureranadu vazeꞌa edereꞌohe.

6.1: Ekalesia azaḡa boꞌaḡano tuḡure azaḡaniꞌa zeḡe zama niduꞌa hina zuhiꞌaze gubaziꞌuma. ꞌOugine, vazeꞌa Badiꞌa ni zu emeḡe ihore mene rae sausauniꞌuma.
6.2: Tuḡure azaḡa zeḡe zuhiꞌaꞌe fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reine, zuhiꞌazeꞌe zeḡe ekalesia nabuga radu mene ovoe ḡiaziꞌuma. Rehano tuḡure azaḡaꞌe zuhiꞌaze veize ufeta gauꞌiꞌuma, mazaḡa zeḡe gauonoꞌo manoḡa hideꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zuni fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu Badiꞌa zamarone azaḡa. Ḡuriro Ihoreḡa Azaḡa Ḡoere ꞌadi ekalesia azaḡa ihozoꞌi ebu eꞌe hegotifine inare zoꞌi.
6.3: Vaze nuꞌe ihore ꞌahoga ihozeꞌenaꞌa, emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Keriso ihoreḡa huga zu Badiꞌa gubaneꞌeteꞌe ihoreḡa mene mae ḡihineꞌohe.
6.4: Ze zeḡeꞌa bare nize mae itadu ḡauni ꞌahoga mene edereꞌohe, zu vaze teite rotetihi zu taꞌirotitihi raꞌohe. Eꞌe uꞌano, ahiahi, roteto, vaze rae sausauzeꞌeteꞌeꞌa fureruꞌohe ebu zamarone sauꞌaniꞌa vaze ꞌadaꞌadazeꞌohe.
6.5: Ebu zamazeꞌa ufeta sautaro zu ze ihore huga modiro. Eꞌanoꞌo hadi hidoga veize ze Badiꞌa gubaneꞌohe zu zeḡe boꞌaḡano rotetoꞌa ꞌaune fureruꞌohe.
6.6: Rehano emeꞌa ḡau niduꞌa moneo idaḡa daꞌo rae zamareꞌenaꞌa, Badiꞌa gubaneꞌeteꞌe ibiḡano radiune, manoḡa boro hidiꞌuma.
6.7: Eme raha ꞌadao ahiri isoḡa fureraro ebu ahiri isoḡa rudaꞌuma.
6.8: Eꞌanoꞌo ogomu zu dabuaꞌe emeḡe mazao eꞌe reine, aꞌe idaḡa rae reꞌuma.
6.9: Maꞌora vazeḡa reihi raꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa sauꞌa haḡaihi rae raꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano uiteꞌohe. Ebu ze ꞌahirizeadu kauriḡa zu zamarone sauꞌa zamaḡano diuḡeꞌohe. ꞌOugadu ze ruizeꞌeteꞌe zu sausauzeꞌeteꞌe ibiḡano uiteꞌohe.
6.10: Sauꞌa nunu niduꞌaꞌe hadi ubumaḡaonoꞌo fureruꞌohe. Vaze nuꞌa hadi ufeta mouga veize, fieꞌeteꞌe modadu ragaviro ebu aduga boro hidadu zamaze ufeta adudaro. Ihore Ḡoeꞌa Ḡonaga
6.11: Rehano ḡa, Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, haḡai sauꞌa ꞌuguḡanonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi. Ebu Badiꞌa ubumao haḡai duduḡa haḡaoga, Badiꞌa gubanoga zu fioga, vaze zamare borofoga, aduga zamaḡano zamaḡo obone touga, zu roḡeru haḡaoga veize inaroꞌi.
6.12: Ḡaeꞌa fie gigaruꞌeteꞌe veize faifairu utitoꞌi ebu ḡabone tuḡutuḡu moꞌi. Eꞌe veize Badiꞌaꞌa ḡa huḡadiro, ebu vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ḡae ḡoere igirotene, ḡa zeḡe ubumao ḡaeꞌa fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe huga rae fureniro.
6.13: Ḡau niduꞌa ḡabone ziniꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa ubumao zu Pontio Pilato ubumao huga daꞌo rae fureniroteꞌe vazeḡa, Keriso Iesu ubumao eḡeꞌa ḡoere ꞌahi riḡa ḡaꞌohe.
6.14: Ḡa veꞌoḡa ꞌahoga ga vazeꞌa ḡaꞌe roḡaditeꞌe haḡaiḡa ꞌahoga ago haḡaoꞌi, ebu eḡe ḡoere ꞌadi ꞌaune hegotoꞌi, onamo emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Kerisoꞌa bariꞌuma.
6.15: Badiꞌaꞌa ohoniroteꞌe madaḡano Keriso tuḡuniꞌuma. Badiꞌaꞌe emeꞌa niguniteꞌe vazeḡa, zu eme Zuhiꞌafiꞌeteꞌe Vazeḡa tibuhuga, zu Kini Ḡihiꞌaḡa Hune, zu Zuhiꞌa Boro Ḡihiꞌaḡa Hune.
6.16: Ani tibuhuga daꞌo mene rudauꞌohe ebu agaḡa huneo radiuꞌohe. Vazeꞌa eꞌe agaḡa uhiḡa hune onamogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ani mene horoniro zu horonogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Ani gubanihi. Aniꞌa inaraḡa hina zuhiꞌafiꞌuma, onamo tuḡutuḡu. Amen.
6.17: Izidi madaḡano maꞌora azaḡa ꞌahige riḡa zoꞌi. Ze zeḡeꞌa bare nize mene mae itiꞌuma. Ebu mene radiu tuḡutuḡeꞌeteꞌe toheḡa mene zamare borofiꞌuma, rehano eme matuꞌe radoga veize ḡau niduꞌa borofe rifiꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa ufeta zamare borofiꞌuma.
6.18: Ebu ze haḡai manoḡa zu gau manoḡa ḡehaḡa haḡaiꞌuma, zu ḡahugone zamaroneḡa hina ḡauze zahara azaḡa teite matuꞌe ḡahugiꞌuma.
6.19: Ze ꞌouge haḡaine, zeꞌa zeḡe veize ḡau manomano adureo ragateragate teadu zama moneo ḡabone huga hidiꞌuma.
6.20: Timoteo, Iesuꞌa ḡaniroteꞌe ihoreḡa huga faine ḡianoꞌi. Badiꞌa mene gubaneꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌanonoꞌo zu huga oꞌoꞌa taꞌiroḡanonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi. Edeḡa boro rae ḡuriradu ihore huga hezahohauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi.
6.21: Ḡuriro ihoreḡa eꞌe rae fureniroteꞌe azaḡa nuꞌe zeḡeꞌa finutaꞌaꞌe modiro. Badiꞌaꞌa zae mazao manoḡa fureneꞌenoꞌi.

1.1: Eḡe, Pauloꞌa soꞌa ꞌadi miriheꞌohe. Eꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa uratadu Keriso Iesu apostolo vazeḡano reiro. Badiꞌaꞌa Keriso Iesu uꞌano vaze ḡaboziꞌuma rae ḡoitoriroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa eḡeꞌa haramifine eḡe ohotiro.
1.2: Soꞌa ꞌadiꞌe eḡe zamarone ubude Timoteo veize miriheꞌohe. Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama zu emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro Keriso Iesuꞌa ḡae mazao manoḡa, vetuḡa zu zama roḡeḡa ḡaneꞌenoꞌi. Badiꞌa mazao Manoḡa Tauḡi reiro zu Timoteo Inaraniro
1.3: Eḡe vouḡa teige, e zamarone duduḡano zu deheḡano Badiꞌa veize gaueꞌohe. Ebu e ohere zu madai kurauꞌetene, iḡaiḡa ḡa zamareꞌenaꞌa Badiꞌa mazao manoḡa tauḡi raꞌohe.
1.4: E ḡaꞌa ibite niaroteꞌe zamareꞌenaꞌa ḡiaꞌihi raꞌohe, mazaḡa e ḡa horoꞌine matuꞌe rudaꞌuma.
1.5: E ḡaeꞌa zamaḡo niduꞌa hina Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe bare zamareꞌohe. Aḡiḡu roḡaeḡa Loisi zu viꞌu Eunikeꞌa ibite firo, ebu ḡae zuni zeḡe hegotadu izidi hube hune Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe e edere huneꞌohe.
1.6: Eꞌe uꞌano, ḡa ꞌahi bare zamaroga veize ḡaꞌohe. Eḡeꞌa ḡae rana ꞌevorehe tiroteꞌe madaḡano Badiꞌaꞌa ḡaniroteꞌe ḡahunoneḡa ago daunoꞌi ebu eꞌe hina ꞌaune inare gauoꞌi.
1.7: Badiꞌaꞌa rifiroteꞌe Vigaꞌe mene riho zamaroneḡa, rehano ane gigiꞌa, vaze zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe, ebu emeꞌa bare haḡai sauꞌa hezahohauꞌeteꞌe zamaroneḡa.
1.8: Eꞌanoꞌo ḡaꞌa emeḡe Zuhiꞌa Boro moneo rae fureranoga ago mazagaroꞌoꞌi, ebu ani uꞌano e ḡuꞌa neḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe moneo ago mazagaroꞌoꞌi. Rehano Badiꞌa inaraḡa hina Iesu hari manoḡa haramifine, ḡae zuni eḡe teite aduga moꞌi.
1.9: Badiꞌaꞌa eme ḡabofiro zu emeꞌa zaḡozaḡe radifine hufiro. Aniꞌa ꞌouge haḡairotaꞌaꞌe mene emeḡeꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa uꞌano, rehano ane urao emeḡe mazao manoḡa fureniro. Manoḡa aꞌe ꞌizema mada ḡadaheḡano Keriso Iesu mazaonoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa rifiro.
1.10: Ebu emeḡe ḡabofeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, Keriso Iesuꞌa rahao fureranadu manoḡa eꞌeꞌa fureraro. Kerisoꞌa rune inaraḡa ruiniro, zu ane hari manoḡa hina mene ruhuratiteꞌe ḡaboneḡa tuḡutuḡu deheru ihofiro.
1.11: E hari manoḡa ꞌahi haramifine, Iesuꞌa eꞌe haramo vazeḡano zu apostolo vazeḡano zu ihore vazeḡano ohohiro.
1.12: Eꞌe uꞌano, e izidi ꞌahige aduga hideꞌohe, rehano e mene mazagaroheꞌohe. Mazaḡa e edeḡa hune, eḡeꞌa mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe iniu, zu eꞌa ḡabonehe haroteꞌe uꞌano aniꞌa ḡabonehe faine taufiꞌuma, onamo mada ḡonaga.
1.13: Ḡa eḡe mazaonoꞌo ihore huga igiro. Ihore aꞌe ḡa Keriso Iesu teite tiburanadu ani mazao fieꞌenaꞌa zu vaze zamare borofeꞌenaꞌa, hegote huniteꞌe ihoreḡa rae zamaroꞌi.
1.14: Emeḡe teite tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa ḡa danaꞌeꞌe ꞌahine, Badiꞌaꞌa ḡaniroteꞌe ihoreḡa huga faine hegotoꞌi.
1.15: Ḡa edeḡa, Asia habaꞌano ekalesia azaḡa niduꞌa eḡe muhihe iḡuniro. Zeḡe boꞌaḡano Fugelo ebu Heremogene zuni eḡe muhihe iḡuniro.
1.16: E Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa Onesiforo ane neo tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa vetuḡazoga veize kurauꞌohe. Mazaḡa aniꞌa ḡae ḡehaḡa inarahiro ebu e ḡuꞌa neḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe moneo ani mene mazagaroniro.
1.17: Ani Roma arirotene, ragave eḡe vaḡihi rae ufeta inaradu ḡiahiro.
1.18: E Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa bariteꞌe madaḡano Onesiforo vetuḡanoga veize kurauꞌohe. Ḡaꞌe aniꞌa Efeso zamaḡano e ufeta danahirotaꞌaꞌe hube hune edereꞌohe.

2.1: Timoteo, eḡe ubude, Keriso Iesu teite tiburanadu aniꞌa ḡae mazao fureneꞌeteꞌe manoḡaḡa zamaḡano inaroꞌi.
2.2: Eḡe ihore ḡoeꞌa igiroteꞌe azaḡa ḡehaḡa mazaonoꞌo ḡae zuni eḡe ihore ḡoeꞌa igiro. Ḡaeꞌa igiroteꞌe ihoreḡa ḡoeꞌa eꞌe iniu zamaze niduꞌa hina gaueꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao ihozoꞌi, ꞌougine zeḡe zuni vaze ꞌahogaꞌahoga ihozogaꞌe idaraꞌuma.
2.3: Ḡaꞌe Keriso Iesu veize utiteꞌeteꞌe uti vazeḡa manoḡa radu emeḡe teite ḡae zuni aduga moꞌi.
2.4: Uti gauḡa haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaniꞌa gau nunu veize mada mene hauḡeꞌohe, mazaḡa aniꞌe uti vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa matuꞌohanoga veize uti gauḡa faine haḡaoga urateꞌohe.
2.5: Iniu araho goroḡa mene hegote haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe naeḡa manoḡa mene hideꞌohe.
2.6: Hihi azaḡa inare gaueꞌeteꞌeꞌa hiriviroteꞌe ogomuḡa ibite hidiꞌuma.
2.7: Eḡeꞌa raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ꞌahi faine zamaroꞌi, mazaḡa Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ḡaꞌe ḡoere eꞌe huga niduꞌa faine ederifine danaꞌiꞌuma.
2.8: Eḡeꞌa haramiroteꞌe hariḡa manoḡa idunaḡano, Davida mariga zu rune azaḡa boꞌaḡano bare iḡuniroteꞌe vazeḡa, Iesu Keriso zamaroꞌi.
2.9: Eḡeꞌa hari manoḡa haramiroteꞌe uꞌano, e ḡonore vazeḡa teige ḡuꞌa neḡano mae ohohadu aduga hideꞌohe. Rehano Badiꞌa ḡoereꞌe ḡuꞌa neḡano ꞌuogaꞌe mene idaḡa.
2.10: Eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa ohotiroteꞌe azaḡa veize e ḡau niduꞌa moneo zamahe obone giganeꞌohe. ꞌOugadu zeḡe zuni Keriso Iesu mazao fiadu ḡabone hidiꞌuma ebu ane teite ḡihiꞌa hune rae raꞌenaꞌa, radiu tuḡutuḡiꞌuma.
2.11: Ḡoere ꞌahiꞌe huga: Emeꞌa Keriso teite rudaro reine, ani teite ḡabodiꞌuma.
2.12: Emeꞌa aduga niduꞌa zamaḡano zamafe obone giganine, ani teite zuhiꞌaziꞌuma. Emeꞌa ani oꞌonine, ani zuni eme oꞌofiꞌuma.
2.13: Emeꞌa ani mazao mene fine zuni, aniꞌa zamaḡa niduꞌa hina haḡae onamiꞌuma, mazaḡa aniꞌe iḡaiḡa duduḡa radu ane ḡoitore ḡoeꞌa oꞌonogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Badiꞌaꞌa mae Ḡihineꞌeteꞌe Gau Vazeḡa
2.14: Eꞌa ḡaꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ꞌadi ekalesia azaḡa bare ihozoꞌi. Ḡoere uꞌano mene rotetoga veize Badiꞌa ubumao riḡa iraduguzoꞌi. Rotetoꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa, ebu eꞌe igiꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe ruizeꞌohe.
2.15: Ḡaꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere huga duduḡano ihozoꞌi zu ḡauni ꞌahoga moneo ago mazagaroꞌoꞌi. Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe gau vazeḡano rouga veize zamaḡo niduꞌa hina inaroꞌi.
2.16: Badiꞌa mene gubaneꞌenaꞌa, huga oꞌoꞌa ḡoeꞌa ḡoereꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi, mazaḡa ze ḡoere ꞌuguḡa raꞌenaꞌa, Badiꞌa mene ufeta gubaniꞌuma.
2.17: Zeḡe ihoreꞌe borevo ugiḡa teige ḡarihe bororanadu vaze sausauziꞌuma. Zeḡe boꞌaḡano Humenaio ebu Fileto zuni ꞌouge ihozeꞌohe.
2.18: Anianine ihore huga modadu Badiꞌaꞌa eme runeonoꞌo amahi bare ḡabofiro rae ihozeꞌohe zu vaze nuꞌa fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe zeḡeꞌa ꞌueꞌohe.
2.19: Rehano Badiꞌa ḡoere hugaꞌe ne gadoḡa riḡa teige edau gigaruꞌohe, ebu eꞌe rana ꞌahige rae mirihiro, “Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌe ane vaze edeḡa,” zu “Iniu Zuhiꞌa Boro hegoteꞌohe rae raꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡihuriꞌuma.”
2.20: Ne boro manoḡanoꞌe mene golo siuvaḡa zu siliva siuvaḡa daꞌo, rehano ire siuvaḡa zu raha siuvaḡa zuni eꞌe. Golo siuvaḡa zu siliva siuvaḡaꞌe mada boroboro veize maꞌohe, ebu ire siuvaḡa zu raha siuvaḡaꞌe mada niduꞌa veize maꞌohe.
2.21: Iniuꞌa sauꞌa modadu ane bare dehenine, siuva manomano teige, ne vazeḡaniꞌa ani avo teadu gau manoḡa nunu haḡaifine ruhibiꞌuma, ebu aniꞌe ne vazeḡa veize gau vazeḡa manoḡa reꞌuma.
2.22: Ḡaꞌe tahiꞌa iziganiꞌa haḡaihi raꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa sauꞌanonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi. Ebu zama deheḡa hina Zuhiꞌa Boro mazao umideꞌeteꞌe azaḡa teite, Badiꞌa ubumao haḡai duduḡa haḡaoga, Keriso mazao fioga, vaze zamaroga zu zama roḡeḡa veize inaroꞌi.
2.23: Kauriḡa zu huga oꞌoꞌa taꞌiroḡano ago ꞌauḡoꞌi, mazaḡa ḡa edeḡa, eꞌe uꞌano rotetoꞌa fureruꞌohe.
2.24: Zuhiꞌa Boro tuḡure vazeḡaꞌe vaze teite mene rotetiꞌuma, vaze niduꞌa mazao manoḡa haḡaiꞌuma, faine ihoziꞌuma, zu aduganonoꞌo zamaḡa obone tiꞌuma,
2.25: ebu ani hezahohauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zuni zama manoḡa hina ihoziꞌuma. ꞌOugine, Badiꞌaꞌa zeḡe zamao gauadu zeꞌe haḡaize sauꞌanonoꞌo ḡihuriꞌuma ebu Badiꞌaꞌa ibitozeadu ḡoere huga ederiꞌuma.
2.26: Diaboloꞌa zeꞌe ꞌahirizeadu ze aniꞌa urateꞌeteꞌe gauḡa haḡaifine ibitoziro, rehano Badiꞌaꞌa danazadu ze zamare bariꞌuma ebu Diabolo mazaonoꞌo feraꞌuma.

3.1: Ḡa ꞌahi ederoꞌi. Mada ḡonagano aduga madaḡa hidiꞌuma.
3.2: Vazeꞌa zeḡe daꞌo zamare borofiꞌuma, ze hadi ubumaḡa reꞌuma, zeḡeꞌa bare niguziꞌuma, nize mae itiꞌuma, vaze rae sausauziꞌuma, nanu mama ḡoere mene igiꞌuma, manoḡa tauḡi rae mene reꞌuma, mene zaḡozaḡe radiꞌuma,
3.3: vaze mene vetuḡaziꞌuma, vaze haḡai sauꞌa mene rae modiꞌuma, vaze rae sausauziꞌuma, zeḡeꞌa bare haḡai sauꞌa mene hezahohaꞌuma, uti fuꞌa reꞌuma, haḡai manoḡa heꞌeheꞌeniꞌuma,
3.4: vaze revoziniꞌuma, mene faine zamaradu ḡurizabuo haḡaiꞌuma, ze zeḡeꞌa bare ḡihiꞌa hune rae reꞌuma, Badiꞌa mene zamare borofadu zeḡe matuꞌu daꞌo zamare borofiꞌuma,
3.5: ebu Badiꞌa ḡurire gubaniꞌuma, zu ḡaboneze ḡihuneꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa inaraḡaꞌe hezahohaꞌuma. Ḡa vaze ꞌuguḡa mazaonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi.
3.6: Zeḡe boꞌaḡano nuꞌe vaze ne sifu diuḡadu zamarone kauriḡa roḡaeḡaroḡaeḡa zamaze auꞌohe. Roḡae ꞌuguḡaꞌe haḡaize sauꞌa uꞌano aduga odoheꞌohe zu haḡai sauꞌa nunu haḡaihi rae zamareꞌohe.
3.7: Zeꞌe iḡaiḡa edeḡa maꞌohe, rehano huga ederogaꞌe mene hune idaḡa.
3.8: Iane zu Iamubareꞌa Mose agiroharoteꞌe teige, ḡuriro ihore azaḡaꞌe ihore huga agirohauꞌohe. Zeꞌe sauꞌa daꞌo zamareꞌohe zu ihore huga mene mae ḡihinadu Badiꞌaꞌa hezahoziniꞌohe.
3.9: Rehano zeḡe haḡaiꞌe mene faḡa radiu onaꞌuma, mazaḡa vaze aheu eꞌe mazao naginiꞌa fureraroteꞌe teige, zeꞌe kauriḡa rae vaze niduꞌa deheru ederiꞌuma. Ihore Ḡoeꞌa Ḡonaga
3.10: Ḡaꞌe eḡe moneo niduꞌa edereꞌohe. Eḡe ihore ḡoeꞌa, eḡe haḡai, e nagini veize gaueꞌeteꞌe, e Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe, zamahe obone giganeꞌeteꞌe, vaze zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe zu aduganonoꞌo edau gigaruꞌeteꞌe,
3.11: vazeꞌa e sausauhiroteꞌe, ebu eꞌa aduga boro hidirotaꞌaꞌe ḡa edeḡa. Antioka, Ikonio zu Lusitera habaꞌano naginiꞌa eḡe mazao fureraroteꞌe ebu eꞌa aduga eꞌe zamaḡano zamahe obone tirotaꞌaꞌe zuni ḡa edeḡa. Rehano Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa aduga eꞌe niduꞌaonoꞌo ḡabohiro.
3.12: Hube hune, iniu Keriso Iesu teite tiburanadu Badiꞌa gubaneꞌenaꞌa radihi rae raꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌaꞌe aduga hidiꞌuma.
3.13: U sauꞌa azaḡa zu soꞌosoꞌo azaḡaꞌe soꞌosoꞌotitadu sauꞌazeꞌa ufeta bororaꞌuma.
3.14: Rehano ḡa ḡaeꞌa ederiroteꞌe ebu hube hune mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa huga ꞌaune hegotoꞌi, mazaḡa ḡa iniuꞌa ihoꞌirotaꞌaꞌe edeḡa.
3.15: Ebu ḡaꞌe tahiꞌa madaḡanonoꞌo Buka Zaḡoḡa ederiro. Ebu Buka Zaḡoḡaniꞌa zamarone huhuzaḡa ḡaniro ꞌahine, ḡaꞌe Keriso Iesu mazao fiadu ḡabone hideꞌeteꞌe moneo edere huneꞌohe.
3.16: Buka Zaḡoḡa niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa vaze zamao gauadu zeḡeꞌa mirihiro. Eꞌanoꞌo aꞌe vaze ihozoga, rozoga, duduzoga zu Badiꞌa ubumao haḡai duduḡa ihozoga veizeꞌe manoḡa.
3.17: Eꞌanoꞌo Buka Zaḡoḡaniꞌa ihozadu Badiꞌa mone vazeḡaniꞌa Badiꞌa gau haḡaogaꞌe idaraꞌuma zu gau manoḡa niduꞌa faifaine haḡaiꞌuma.

4.1: Keriso Iesuꞌe ḡaboga azaḡa zu rune azaḡa kotaziteꞌe vazeḡa. Aniꞌe bare aradu vaze niduꞌa zuhiꞌaziꞌuma. E Badiꞌa zu Keriso Iesu ubumao riḡa ḡaꞌohe.
4.2: Ḡa ḡoere huga haramoꞌi, zu manoḡa madaḡano ga sauꞌa madaḡano ꞌaune haramoga veize inaroꞌi. Zamaḡo riḡa obone giganeꞌenaꞌa zu faine ihozeꞌenaꞌa, vaze duduzoꞌi, zu rozoꞌi, ebu inarazoꞌi.
4.3: Mazaḡa vazeꞌa ihore duduḡa mene igiteꞌe madaḡaniꞌa ariꞌuma. Eꞌe madaḡano ze zeḡe urao haḡai sauꞌa haḡaifine, zeḡeꞌa egogaꞌe iniga rae raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa daꞌo ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ḡeharu nuꞌoziꞌuma.
4.4: Zeꞌe ḡoere huga mene igiꞌuma ebu irihine hegotiꞌuma.
4.5: Rehano ḡaꞌe naginiꞌa fureruꞌeteꞌe faine ḡianeꞌenaꞌa haḡaoꞌi, aduga madaḡano zamaḡo obone giganoꞌi, Iesu hari manoḡa haramoꞌi, ebu Iesuꞌa ḡaniroteꞌe gauḡa niduꞌa haḡae hauḡoꞌi.
4.6: Vaini vuḡa beꞌunadu dibuꞌeꞌeteꞌe teige, e amahi ruhe beꞌuniro ebu eḡeꞌa muhiziteꞌe madaḡaꞌe haniteha.
4.7: E hari manoḡa veize faine utitiro, zu gauhe niduꞌa ibiḡano dure oname butiro, ebu eḡeꞌa fieꞌeteꞌe obone giganiro.
4.8: Eꞌanoꞌo e Badiꞌa ura ibiḡano duduḡa haḡadu Badiꞌaꞌa kini vadiga adiriḡa heuḡa naeḡa manoḡa eḡe veize ruhibiro. Eꞌe naeḡaꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro, kota vazeḡa duduḡaniꞌa aneꞌa bare ariteꞌe madaḡano iniꞌuma. Aꞌe mene eḡe daꞌo, rehano iniu aniꞌa bare ariteꞌe guhine huneꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ziniꞌuma. Pauloꞌa Ane veize Timoteo Uminiro
4.9: Ḡa eḡe vaḡe ḡarihe aroga inaroꞌi,
4.10: mazaḡa Demaꞌa raha ꞌahi ufeta zamaradu muhihiro ebu Tesalonika onamiro. Kiresikeꞌe Galatia habaꞌa onamiro, u Titoꞌe Dalamatia habaꞌa onamiro.
4.11: Luka daꞌo eḡe teite radiuꞌohe. Mareko zamahanadu ḡae teite aroꞌi, mazaḡa aniꞌe eḡe gauo danaheꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.
4.13: Ḡa aroꞌidene, Toroa zamaḡano eḡeꞌa Kapo mazao modiroteꞌe dabuaḡa baruḡa odohe aroꞌi. Zu eḡe buka odohe aroꞌi, ebu mani ogaḡa ranao mirihiroteꞌe bukaḡa nuꞌe hube hune odohe aroꞌi.
4.14: Auri hina ḡau haḡaeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, Alesanaꞌa eḡe mazao sauꞌa ḡehaḡa haḡairo. Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ane haḡai naeḡa haꞌuma.
4.15: Ḡa zuni ani ḡianoꞌi, mazaḡa aniꞌa eme haramo riḡa agiroharo.
4.16: E kotao eḡe veize ḡadahe birirotene, vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa zuni mene danahiro, rehano niduꞌa muhihiro. Rehano e Badiꞌaꞌa zeḡe haḡai sauꞌa rae modoga veize kurauꞌohe.
4.17: Rehano eḡeꞌa hari manoḡa niduꞌa harame hunifine zu Iuda mene azaḡa niduꞌa eꞌe igifine, Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa eḡe babaḡano edanadu inarahiro. Ebu laioni hebeonoꞌo e mae vaḡihiro.
4.18: Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa sauꞌa niduꞌaonoꞌo ḡabohiꞌuma ebu aneꞌa zuhiꞌaniꞌeteꞌe adureḡa habaꞌano faifaine tutuhe onamiꞌuma. Ani ni mae ḡihinihi, onamo tuḡutuḡu. Amen. Uhiu Ḡoeꞌa
4.19: Pirisika zu Akila, ebu Onesiforo zu ane neo tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao eḡe uhiu ḡoeꞌa zoꞌi.
4.20: Erasitoꞌe Korinto zamaḡano radiuꞌohe, ebu Torofimoꞌe uginadu Mileto zamaḡano muhiniro.
4.21: Nahune madaḡa ꞌizema mougano, ḡa ḡarihe ꞌahao feuroga inaroꞌi. Eubulu, Pude, Linu, Kulaudia, zu nego nabudi niduꞌa ḡae mazao uhiu ḡoeꞌa tuḡureꞌohe.
4.22: Zuhiꞌa Boroꞌa ḡae teite radiuꞌenoꞌi, ebu zae mazao manoḡa fureneꞌenoꞌi.

1.1: Eḡe, Paulo'e Badiꞌa tuḡure vazeḡa zu Iesu Keriso apostolo vazeḡa. Badiꞌaꞌa ohotiroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa fieꞌe gigaranoga veize inarazifine zu ze Badiꞌa gubanadu ḡoere huga ederoga veize ihozifine Badiꞌaꞌa ohohiro.
1.2: Fieꞌeteꞌe zu ḡoere hugaꞌe ḡabone tuḡutuḡu mae ḡihineꞌenaꞌa guhinadu maꞌohe. Mene ḡurireꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡaniꞌa ꞌizema mada ḡadaheḡano ḡabone tuḡutuḡu ziniꞌuma rae ḡoitoriro.
1.3: Badiꞌa ḡoitore ḡoeꞌaꞌe aniꞌa ohoniroteꞌe madaḡano apostolo azaḡaniꞌa haramozenadu Badiꞌaꞌa rae fureniro. Ḡabofeꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡaniꞌa ḡoere riḡa ehadu eḡeꞌa ane ḡoitore ḡoeꞌa harameꞌeteꞌe gauḡa meiro.
1.4: Eḡeꞌa Tito, ḡae veize soꞌa ꞌahi miriheꞌohe. Emeꞌa fieꞌetaꞌaꞌe tiba radu ḡaꞌe eḡe ubude huga rae reiro. Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama zu emeḡe ḡabofeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa Keriso Iesuꞌa ḡae mazao manoḡa zu zama roḡeḡa ḡaneꞌenoꞌi. Titoꞌa Kerete ꞌUmuḡano Haḡaeꞌeteꞌe Gauḡa
1.5: Eḡeꞌa Kerete ꞌumuḡano ḡa muhiꞌiro. ꞌOugadu ḡaeꞌa mene hauḡiroteꞌe gauḡa faine haḡae hauḡoga zu eḡeꞌa nougenouge haḡaoꞌi rae ḡeiroteꞌe idunaḡano neḡaneḡano ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa ohozoga e uratiro.
1.6: Ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe vazeꞌa roniteꞌe haḡaiḡa mene haḡaiꞌuma zu inugaꞌe tiba daꞌo meꞌuma. Ane ubugaubugaꞌe fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reꞌuma, zu ze vazeonoꞌo, “Haḡaizeꞌe butu abaḡa heuḡa,” ga “Ze nanu mama ḡoere mene igiꞌohe,” rae rozeꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa mene igiꞌuma.
1.7: Ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa gau hanadu gau eꞌe ibitohauꞌe ꞌahine, aniꞌe vazeꞌa roniteꞌe haḡaiḡa mene haḡaiꞌuma, aneꞌa bare niḡa mene mae itiꞌuma, mene maḡunu fuꞌa, mene gagone fuꞌa, mene uti fuꞌa, zu mene hadi ubumaḡa reꞌuma.
1.8: Rehano aniꞌe vaze mae zouzadu faine ḡubuziꞌuma, haḡai manoḡa zamariꞌuma, faine zamareꞌenaꞌa haḡaiꞌuma, duduḡa zu zaḡoḡa ibiḡano radiꞌuma, ebu aneꞌa bare haḡai sauꞌa hezahohaꞌuma.
1.9: Ani aneꞌa meiroteꞌe ihoreḡa idunaḡano ḡoere huga obone giganiꞌuma. ꞌOugadu aniꞌa ihore duduḡa hina vaze inarazogaꞌe idaraꞌuma, zu ihore huga hezahohauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa haḡaize veꞌoḡa ihozogaꞌe idaḡa reꞌuma.
1.10: Vaze ḡehaḡaniꞌa ihore huga mene igiꞌohe, zu huga oꞌoꞌa ḡoeꞌa raꞌohe, zu vaze soꞌosoꞌozeꞌohe. ꞌUguḡa azaḡaꞌe ahiri rana iḡuri haḡairoteꞌe azaḡa boꞌaḡano ufeta ḡehaḡa.
1.11: Zeḡe ḡuriro ḡoeꞌa ꞌue huniꞌuma, mazaḡa zeꞌa vaze soꞌozadu hadi mouga veize mene ihoziteꞌe ihoreḡa ihozeꞌohe, ebu ne tibano tiburu radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ruizeꞌohe.
1.12: Kerete azaḡa boꞌaḡano zeḡe peroveta vazeḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Kerete azaḡaꞌe iḡaiḡa ḡuriro azaḡa, butu agireḡa, ogomu fuꞌa, zu tubuḡa.”
1.13: Aniꞌa ꞌouge rae furenirotaꞌaꞌe hube. Eꞌanoꞌo ḡa riḡa rozoꞌi. ꞌOugine, ze hube hune fiꞌuma,
1.14: zu Iuda azaḡa ḡuriro hariḡa ga ḡoere huga hezahohauꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa teꞌoteꞌozeꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa mene igiꞌuma.
1.15: Deheḡa azaḡa mazao ḡau niduꞌaꞌe deheḡa. Rehano toraga zu mene fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao deheḡa ꞌahogaꞌe oꞌoꞌa. Ze zamaronezeꞌa toradanadu naginiꞌe duduḡa ga veꞌoḡaꞌe aḡuꞌa.
1.16: Ze zeḡeꞌa bare, “Badiꞌa edeḡa,” rae fureneꞌohe, rehano haḡaizeꞌa ze Badiꞌa oꞌoneꞌeteꞌe ihofeꞌohe. Zeꞌe ufeta sauꞌa radu vazeꞌa heꞌeheꞌezeꞌohe. Ze Badiꞌa ḡoere mene hegoteꞌohe zu manoḡa ꞌahoga haḡaogaꞌe mene idaḡa.

2.1: Ḡa ihore duduḡa idunaḡano ḡoere duduḡa zoꞌi.
2.2: Ohoze vouḡaḡavouḡaḡa moneoꞌe zeꞌa faine zamareꞌenaꞌa haḡaifine, vazeꞌa ze gubaziteꞌe haḡaiḡa haḡaifine, zeḡeꞌa bare haḡai sauꞌa hezahohafine, fie hunifine, zamarotitifine, zu aduga zamaḡano zamaze obone giganifine ihozoꞌi.
2.3: Eꞌe teige, roḡae vouḡaḡavouḡaḡa moneoꞌe zeꞌa zaḡozaḡe radifine, ḡuriro ḡoeꞌa hina vaze mene rae sausauzifine, mene gagone fuꞌa reifine zu ḡau manoḡa ihozeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reifine ihozoꞌi.
2.4: ꞌOugine, roḡae vouḡaḡavouḡaḡaniꞌa roḡae izigaiziga ihozadu roḡae izigaiziganiꞌa ize zu ubudeze zamare borofiꞌuma,
2.5: zeḡeꞌa bare haḡai sauꞌa hezahohaꞌuma, deheru radiꞌuma, ne gauḡa faine haḡaiꞌuma, vaze mazao manoḡa haḡaiꞌuma, zu ize ḡoere hegotiꞌuma. ꞌOugine, vazeni ꞌahoganiꞌa Badiꞌa ḡoere mene rae sausauniꞌuma.
2.6: Eꞌe teige, ohoze izigaiziganiꞌa zeḡeꞌa bare haḡai sauꞌa hezahohafine inarazoꞌi.
2.7: Zeꞌa ḡae tuhutuhuꞌifine ḡaeꞌa ḡau niduꞌa moneo gau manoḡa haḡaoꞌi. Ḡa vaze ihozoꞌidene, zama niduꞌa hina huga ḡoeꞌano raꞌeteꞌe ihozoꞌi.
2.8: Vazeꞌa veꞌoḡa rae mene reiteꞌe ḡoeꞌa duduḡa ihozoꞌi. ꞌOugine, ḡa hezahoḡaneꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa emeḡe moneo ḡoere sauꞌa ꞌahoga mene radu zeḡeꞌa bare mazagaroziꞌuma.
2.9: Tuḡure azaḡa moneoꞌe zeꞌa gau niduꞌa veize zuhiꞌaze ḡoere egozinifine, zuhiꞌaze matuꞌozinifine, zu zuhiꞌaze ḡoere mene naunaunifine ihozoꞌi.
2.10: Ebu zuhiꞌaze ḡauze mene ḡonozifine, rehano ze zama niduꞌa hina haḡadu zuhiꞌazeꞌa ze hube hune mae ḡihizifine ihozoꞌi. ꞌOugine, zeꞌa ḡau niduꞌa moneo ḡabofeꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa ihoreḡaꞌe manoḡa hune rae vaze dehene ihoziꞌuma.
2.11: Badiꞌaꞌa vaze ḡabozihi radu vaze niduꞌa mazao manoḡa fureniro.
2.12: Badiꞌaꞌa fureniroteꞌe manoḡaḡa uꞌano, aniꞌa ane mene gubaneꞌeteꞌe haḡaiḡa zu raha ura haḡaiḡa modoꞌi rae raꞌohe, ebu izidi raha ꞌahao emeꞌa bare haḡai sauꞌa hezahohafine, zu duduḡa haḡaifine, zu Badiꞌa gubane radifine ihofeꞌohe.
2.13: Eme ꞌouge haḡae radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano matuꞌu madaḡa ꞌahoganiꞌa ariꞌuma rae mae ḡihineꞌenaꞌa guhineꞌohe. Eꞌe madaḡano Iesu Kerisoꞌa ane ni ḡihiꞌaḡa fureniꞌuma. Iesuꞌe emeḡe Badiꞌa ḡihiꞌaḡa zu ḡabofeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa.
2.14: Kerisoꞌa emeḡe veize ane bare dibuꞌiro. Ebu haḡaife sauꞌa niduꞌaonoꞌo emeḡe bohafe bufadu dehefiro. ꞌOugadu emeꞌe gau manoḡa inare haḡaeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, ane mone azaḡa reiro.
2.15: Ḡaeꞌa ḡoere ꞌahiguḡa ihozoꞌi. Ekalesia ibitoziꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa niduꞌa hina inarazoꞌi zu rozoꞌi. Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa ḡa mene ovoe ḡiaoga gararoꞌi.

3.1: Ekalesia azaḡaniꞌa vaze ibitoziꞌeteꞌe azaḡa zu gavana azaḡa ḡoere egozinifine ebu hegotifine, zu gau manoḡa haḡaoga ruhibifine, ḡaeꞌa bare edemazoꞌi.
3.2: Ebu zeꞌa vazeni ꞌahoga zuni mene rae sausaunifine, mene rotetifine, roḡeru haḡaifine, zu vaze niduꞌa mazao faifaine haḡaifine bare edemazoꞌi.
3.3: Eme zuni ibite madaḡanoꞌe kauriḡa reiro, Badiꞌa ḡoere mene hegotiro, vazeꞌa soꞌosoꞌofiro, ebu ahiri ura nunu zu matuꞌu haḡaiḡa nunu hegoteꞌenaꞌa, haḡai sauꞌa tuḡureḡa azaḡa teige radiro. Emeḡe radone zamaḡano haḡai sauꞌa haḡairo, ahiahi haḡairo, vazeꞌa eme heꞌeheꞌefiro ebu eme heꞌeheꞌetitiro.
3.4: Rehano ḡabofeꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡaniꞌa emeḡe mazao manoḡa zu zamaroneḡa fureniro.
3.5: ꞌOugadu aniꞌa eme ḡabofiro. Mene emeꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa duduḡa uꞌano, rehano aniꞌa eme vetuḡafiroteꞌe uꞌano ḡabofiro. Aniꞌa vetuḡafeadu emeꞌa bare fureranoga veize emeḡe sauꞌa vuzuꞌe modofiro zu Vine Zaḡoḡa hina ḡabonefe izifiro. ꞌOuge haḡadu aniꞌa eme ḡabofiro.
3.6: Badiꞌaꞌa, eme ḡabofeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa Iesu Keriso uꞌano Vine Zaḡoḡa aꞌe emeḡe rana borofe iriꞌavoniro.
3.7: Badiꞌaꞌa manoḡa fureniro ꞌahine, emeꞌe ani ubumao duduḡa rae reiro. Ebu emeꞌe ḡabone tuḡutuḡu mae ḡihinadu guhineꞌeteꞌe azaḡa reiro. Emeꞌe Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama ubugaubuga radu ani mazaonoꞌo manohuga maꞌohe.
3.8: Aꞌe vazeꞌa mae ḡihineꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌa huga. Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa gau manoḡa haḡae inaroga veize ḡaꞌa eḡe ḡoere ꞌahi riḡa zoga e urateꞌohe. Gau manoḡa haḡaeꞌetaꞌaꞌe manoḡa tauḡi zu vaze niduꞌa veize manoḡa.
3.9: Rehano kaurirauꞌenaꞌa taꞌirotitoga, vouḡa nize hariḡa meꞌodoga, riḡa ḡoretitoga, zu Mose goro ḡoeꞌa moneo rotetoganonoꞌo vaḡinoꞌi, mazaḡa ꞌuguḡa mazaonoꞌoꞌe manoḡa oꞌoꞌa zu huga oꞌoꞌa.
3.10: Vazevaze mae rovozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa mazao ḡae tiba ga ḡae aheu riḡa iradugunoꞌi. Ebu aniꞌa ꞌize mene egoꞌidene, ani hezahohanoꞌi.
3.11: Ḡa edeḡa, vaze ꞌuguḡaꞌe ibi veꞌoḡano onamadu ani aneꞌa bare veꞌoḡa rae edereꞌe rehano, haḡai sauꞌa ꞌauꞌaune haḡaeꞌohe. Ihore Ḡoeꞌa zu Uhiu Ḡoeꞌa Ḡonaga
3.12: E ḡae vaḡe Aretema ga Tukiko tuḡunoꞌidene, ḡaꞌe ḡarihe hune eḡe vaḡe Nikapoli aroꞌi, mazaḡa e deꞌea nahune madaḡano radiꞌuma rae toganiro.
3.13: Mose goro ḡoeꞌa ihozeꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa niḡa Zena, zu Apoloꞌe ḡae inara niduꞌa hina danazadu zeḡeꞌa ragaviteꞌe habaꞌa tuḡuzoꞌi ebu ze mene ferezifine danazoꞌi.
3.14: Emeḡe nego nabudi zuni gau manoḡa inare haḡaiꞌuma rae ederiꞌuma. Iniu danazoga umideꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao hube hune ferezeꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa ziniꞌuma. ꞌOugine, ḡaboneze manoḡaniꞌa hudaꞌuma.
3.15: Eḡe teite radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ḡae mazao uhiu ḡoeꞌa tuḡureꞌohe. Iesu mazao fieꞌenaꞌa, emeḡe zamareꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mazao uhiu ḡoeꞌa tuḡuroꞌi. Badiꞌaꞌa zae niduꞌa mazao manoḡa fureneꞌenoꞌi.

1.1: Eḡe, Pauloꞌe Keriso Iesu uꞌano ḡuꞌa neḡano radiuꞌohe. Emeḡe zamarone vazeḡa zu gau tiba vazeḡa, Filemona veize emeḡe nego Timoteo teite soꞌa ꞌahi miriheꞌohe.
1.2: Ebu emeḡe eze Apia, zu emeḡe teite uti vazeḡa teige gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa Arekipo, zu ḡae neo nuꞌoruꞌeteꞌe ekalesia azaḡa mazao soꞌa ꞌahi miriheꞌohe.
1.3: Badiꞌa emeḡe Mama zu Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Kerisoꞌa zae mazao manoḡa zu zama roḡeḡa ziniꞌenoꞌi. Filemonaꞌa Vaze Zamare Borofeꞌohe zu Iesu mazao Fieꞌohe
1.4: E eḡe kuru zamaḡano ḡa zamareꞌetene, eḡe Badiꞌa mazao iḡaiḡa manoḡa tauḡi raꞌohe.
1.5: Mazaḡa e ḡaꞌa Badiꞌa mone azaḡa niduꞌa zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe zu Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe moneo igiꞌohe.
1.6: Eme Keriso mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa radu ḡaꞌe eme teite zaꞌuzaꞌutiteꞌohe. Eꞌe uꞌano, emeꞌa Keriso teite tiburanadu aniꞌa rifiꞌeteꞌe manohugaḡa niduꞌa moneo ḡaꞌa ufeta ederoga veize e kurauꞌohe.
1.7: Eḡe nego, ḡaeꞌa Badiꞌa mone azaḡa inaraziro zu matuꞌoziniro. Ḡaeꞌa ꞌouge ze zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, e matuꞌe rudaro zu inariro. Onesimo veize Umidiro
1.8: Eꞌanoꞌo eꞌe Keriso niḡano ḡaeꞌa haḡaiteꞌe haḡaiḡa haḡaoꞌi rae riḡa tuḡutuḡuꞌogaꞌe idaḡa.
1.9: Rehano eḡeꞌa ḡa zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, ḡae mazao umideꞌohe. Eḡe, Pauloꞌe vaze vouḡa zu izidi Keriso Iesu uꞌano ḡuꞌa neḡano radiuꞌohe.
1.10: E ḡuꞌa neḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano, Keriso hari manoḡa Onesimo mazao haramadu ani eꞌe mae ḡihiniro ebu eḡe ubude reiro. Izidi e ani veize ḡae mazao umideꞌohe.
1.11: Ibite aniꞌe ḡae mazao mene manoḡa reiro, rehano izidi aniꞌe emenane mazao manoḡa raꞌohe.
1.12: E ani tuḡune ameꞌohe, rehano e ani zamareꞌohe.
1.13: E hari manoḡa haramiro ꞌahine ḡuꞌa neḡano radiuꞌeteꞌea, aniꞌa eḡe teite radiuꞌenaꞌa, e danahoga uratiro. Mazaḡa aniꞌa eḡe danaheꞌetaꞌaꞌe ḡaꞌa eḡe danaheꞌeteꞌe teigiꞌuma.
1.14: Rehano ḡae ḡoere ꞌizema idanogano ane moneo e ḡau ꞌahoga haḡaoga mene uratiro. Mazaḡa Onesimoꞌa danahifine eḡeꞌa tuḡutuḡuꞌadu ḡaꞌa idaḡa rae rouga e mene urateꞌohe, rehano ḡa ḡaeꞌa bare uratadu idaḡa rae rouga urateꞌohe.
1.15: Aniꞌe ḡa modadu mada tahiḡa fararotaꞌaꞌe vesuꞌu aniꞌa ḡae vaḡe bare amadu iḡaiḡa ḡae teite radoga veize gaogi.
1.16: Aniꞌe izidi ḡae mene tuḡure vazeḡa daꞌo, rehano tuḡure vazeḡa ufeta vitine manoḡa vazeḡa, ḡae zamarone negoḡo radu ḡae teite radiꞌuma. E ani zamare borofeꞌohe, rehano ḡaꞌa e ufeta vitihe ani zamare borofiꞌuma, mazaḡa aniꞌe ḡae tuḡure vazeḡa zu negoḡo ꞌahoga, Zuhiꞌa Boro mazao fieꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa raꞌohe.
1.17: Eꞌanoꞌo ḡa eꞌe ḡae teite gaueꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa rae zamaroꞌidene, e mae ḡihiheꞌeteꞌe teige, ani zuni mae ḡihinoꞌi.
1.18: Aniꞌa ḡae mazao veꞌoḡa ꞌahoga haḡairo ga ḡauḡo nu meiro roꞌidene, ani aduga eḡe enoꞌi.
1.19: Eḡe, Pauloꞌa ꞌevorehe hina soꞌa ꞌadi miriheꞌohe. Eḡeꞌa ani veize baronoḡaniꞌuma. Ibite eꞌa hari manoḡa ḡae mazao haramadu ḡa ḡabone iziga hidiroteꞌe moneoꞌe eḡe mazao baronoꞌi rae mene ḡaꞌohe.
1.20: Eḡe nego, emeꞌe Zuhiꞌa Boro mazao fieꞌeteꞌe azaḡa radu e eḡeꞌa umideꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa ḡaꞌa mae ḡihinoga urateꞌohe. Keriso teite tiburaroteꞌe zamaḡano, eḡe zama inaranoꞌi zu matuꞌohanoꞌi.
1.21: Eḡe umidone ḡaeꞌa mae ḡihiniꞌuma rae zamare huneꞌenaꞌa, e ḡae mazao miriheꞌohe. E edeḡa, ḡaꞌa e umidone ufeta vitine borofe ani mazao faine haḡaiꞌuma.
1.22: Ebu ḡau ꞌahoga bare umideꞌohe: Eḡe veize neḡohe ꞌahoga ruhibe toꞌi, mazaḡa Badiꞌaꞌa zae kuru egadu e zae vaḡe bare tuḡuhoga urateꞌohe. Uhiu Ḡoeꞌa Ḡonaga
1.23: Keriso Iesu uꞌano, eḡe teite ḡuꞌa neḡano radiuꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, Epafaraꞌa ḡae mazao uhiu ḡoeꞌa tuḡureꞌohe.
1.24: Ebu eḡe teite tiburu gaueꞌeteꞌe azaḡa, Mareko, Arisitako, Dema ebu Luka zuni uhiu ḡoeꞌa tuḡureꞌohe.
1.25: Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesu Kerisoꞌa zae mazao manoḡa ziniꞌenoꞌi.

1.1: Ibite huneo Badiꞌaꞌe ḡae ḡehaḡa ibi nunuo peroveta azaḡaonoꞌo vouḡafe ḡorezido.
1.2: Rehano mada ḡonaga ꞌadi zamaḡanoꞌe Ubugaonoꞌo ḡorefiro. Badiꞌaꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌa Ubuganiꞌa meꞌuma radu ani ohoniro. Ubuga ohotadu Ubuganiꞌa adure zu raha ḡauḡa niduꞌa haḡairo.
1.3: Ubuga horonadu Badiꞌaꞌe ḡihiꞌa hune rae edereꞌohe. Ubugaꞌe Badiꞌa teite tiba radu Ubugaonoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌe nagiga rae ihofeꞌohe. Ubugaꞌe ane ḡoere gigiꞌaḡa hina ḡau niduꞌaꞌe manoḡa reifine bedaeꞌohe. Aniꞌa haḡai sauꞌa dehene hauḡiroteꞌe enogano, adureo Gigiꞌa Hune Badiꞌaḡa edaꞌe moneo ehoriro.
1.4: Aniꞌe tuḡure viga niduꞌa vitizadu ḡihiꞌa huneo reiro. Badiꞌaꞌa tuḡure viga niduꞌa nize ufeta vitizoga niḡa haro. Ubugaꞌe Tuḡure Viga Vitizoga
1.5: Badiꞌaꞌa tuḡure vigani ꞌahoga mazao zuni ꞌahige mene reiro, “Ḡaꞌe eḡe ubude, e izidi ḡa fureꞌeha.” Ebu ꞌahige zuni mene reiro, “Eꞌe ane moga reꞌuma, ebu aniꞌe eḡe ubude reꞌuma.”
1.6: Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa Ubuga ibiꞌa rahao tuḡuniꞌuma rae reirotene, ꞌahige rae reiro, “Badiꞌa tuḡure viga niduꞌaꞌe ane mazao kuranoꞌi.”
1.7: Ebu tuḡure viga moneo Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌahige rae raꞌohe, “Badiꞌaꞌa tuḡure viga zavarao ḡihuzeꞌohe, ebu ane tuḡure viga ire roga duhuḡano ḡihuzeꞌohe.”
1.8: U Badiꞌaꞌa Ubuga mazao ꞌahige rae raꞌohe, “O, Badiꞌa! Ḡa kini ehoroḡano zuhiꞌaziꞌuma onamo tuḡutuḡu, ebu ḡaꞌa ibi duduḡano ḡae mone azaḡa zuhiꞌaziꞌuma.
1.9: Ḡaꞌe haḡai duduḡa zamariro, u haḡai sauꞌaꞌe heꞌeheꞌeniro. Eꞌanoꞌo eḡe, ḡae Badiꞌaꞌa matuꞌoḡane ruḡadadu ḡaꞌe ḡae teite radiuꞌeteꞌe azaḡa vitize ohoꞌiro.”
1.10: Ebu Buka Zaḡoḡano Ubuga moneo ꞌahige rae raꞌohe, “Zuhiꞌa Boro, ḡaꞌa ḡadaheḡano raha haḡairo, ebu ꞌevoꞌo hina adure haḡairo.
1.11: Eꞌe niduꞌaꞌe roꞌore ḡouriꞌuma, u ḡaꞌe radiu tuḡutuḡu. Eꞌe niduꞌaꞌe dabua teige amahiraꞌuma,
1.12: ebu ḡaeꞌa dabua amahiḡa teige ḡue vaḡiniꞌuma. Ebu dabua amahiḡa mae vaḡinadu ꞌahoga vidauꞌeteꞌe teige eꞌe niduꞌaꞌe nufiꞌuma. U ḡaꞌe mene nufiꞌuma, ebu ḡaboneḡoꞌe ḡonaga oꞌoꞌa reꞌuma.”
1.13: Rehano Badiꞌaꞌe tuḡure vigani ꞌahoga mazao zuni ꞌahige mene niro, “Eḡe edaꞌe moneo ehoroꞌi, onamo eḡeꞌa agireḡo madu odaḡo ꞌuꞌuḡano raharahaziꞌuma.”
1.14: Tuḡure viga niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa veize gaueꞌeteꞌe viga. Ze Badiꞌaꞌa ḡaboziteꞌe azaḡa veize gauifine, Badiꞌaꞌa tuḡuziro!

2.1: Eꞌanoꞌo emeꞌe igiroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa tohutohe zamare borofiꞌuma. ꞌOugine, eꞌe ḡoeꞌanonoꞌo mene vaḡinadu ibi veꞌoḡano mene reꞌonaꞌuma.
2.2: Badiꞌaꞌa tuḡure vigaonoꞌo vouḡafe ziroteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe hube hune inaraḡeta. Eꞌanoꞌo iniuꞌa eꞌe ḡoeꞌa variꞌiroteꞌe azaḡa ga mene hegotiroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa haḡaize sauꞌa idunaḡano aduga ziniro.
2.3: ꞌOugadu ḡabone ziniteꞌe ḡoeꞌa ḡihiꞌaḡa reꞌoreꞌonine, hube hune aduga hidiꞌuma. Iniuꞌa eꞌe aduganonoꞌo feranogaꞌe idaḡa? Ḡabone rifiꞌeteꞌe moneo Zuhiꞌa Boro Iesuꞌa ibite geno rae fureniro. Ebu aniꞌa ḡabone rifiꞌeteꞌe moneo rae fureniroteꞌe ḡoeꞌa igiroteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa ani ḡoereꞌe huga rae emeḡe mazao rae fureniro.
2.4: Badiꞌa zuni zeḡe teite Iesu ḡoereꞌe huga rae fureniro. Aniꞌa haḡai nu badeḡa, zaguzagatiteꞌe haḡaiḡa zu haḡai gigiꞌa haḡadu ꞌouge rae fureniro, ebu ane urao Vine Zaḡoḡaonoꞌo ḡahunone nunu rifadu ꞌouge rae fureniro. Ḡabone Ibiḡa uꞌa Tutufe Onamiteꞌe Vazeḡa
2.5: Emeꞌe zama moneo ariteꞌe rahaḡa iziga moneo ḡorezeꞌohe. Badiꞌaꞌe tuḡure viganiꞌa eꞌe rahaḡa zuhiꞌanoga veize ze mene ohoziro.
2.6: Vaze ꞌahoganiꞌa Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae fureniro, “Zuhiꞌa Boro Badiꞌa, vazeꞌe nagi manoḡa ꞌahine, ḡaeꞌa ani zamareꞌohe? Vaze tauḡiḡaꞌe nagi manoḡa ꞌahine, ḡaeꞌa ani taufeꞌohe?
2.7: Ḡa ani mada tahiḡa daꞌo tuḡure viga ꞌuꞌuḡano ohoniro. Ḡaꞌa ani vadigano kini vadini adiriḡa vidohanadu niḡa mae ḡihiniro zu aniꞌe niḡa boro rae huniro.
2.8: Ḡaeꞌa ḡau niduꞌa ane ḡoere egohanoga veize ani ꞌuꞌuḡano mae tiro.” Ḡau niduꞌa vaze ḡoere egohanoga veize ani ꞌuꞌuḡano mae tiro ꞌahine, ane ḡoere mene egohauꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡani ꞌahoga zuni oꞌoꞌa. Rehano eme izidi ḡau niduꞌa ane ḡoere egohauꞌeteꞌe ꞌize mene horoneꞌohe.
2.9: Rehano emeꞌa horoneꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa, Iesuꞌe nagiga? Aniꞌe mada tahiḡa daꞌo tuḡure viga ꞌuꞌuḡano radadu aduga hidiro ebu rudaro. ꞌOugadu kini vadini adiriḡa Badiꞌaꞌa hanadu ani ni mae ḡihiniro zu aniꞌe niḡa boro rae huniro. Badiꞌaꞌa fureniroteꞌe manoḡaḡa uꞌano, vaze niduꞌa veize aniꞌa rudaro.
2.10: Badiꞌaꞌa ḡau niduꞌa haḡairo ebu ḡau niduꞌa iḡurizeo radifine taufeꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo aniꞌa ane ubugaubuga zamazadu ane teige nize mae ḡihizoga uratiro. ꞌOugadu ḡabone ibiḡa vavaiteꞌe vazeḡa aduga haro ebu vaze eꞌeꞌa ḡabone ibiḡa veꞌoḡa oꞌoꞌa hune vavae huniro. Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌouge haḡairotaꞌaꞌe duduḡa hune.
2.11: Vaze mae zaḡozaḡoziꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa zu iniuꞌe zaḡozaḡeꞌeteꞌe azaḡaꞌe niduꞌa Mama tiba mone raꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo Iesuꞌe zeḡe mazao ane negoḡa nabuga rae huzoga mene mazagaroneꞌohe.
2.12: Iesuꞌe Badiꞌa ꞌahige niꞌohe, “Eꞌe eḡe nego nabudi mazao niḡo rae fureniꞌuma, ebu ekalesia zamaḡano ḡae niguꞌiꞌuma.”
2.13: Ebu Iesuꞌa bare raenaꞌa, “Eꞌe Badiꞌa mazao fiꞌuma.” Ebu bare raenaꞌa, “E Badiꞌaꞌa iniroteꞌe ubugaubuga teite ꞌahi eꞌe.”
2.14: Ubugaubugaꞌe vaze radu modarezeta zu ruzeta uꞌano, Iesu zuni zeḡe teige vaze ahiri tiba meiro. Aniꞌa ꞌougirotaꞌaꞌe ahirio rudanadu vaze runeo tuḡuzeꞌeteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa oboneꞌeteꞌe Diaboloḡa ruinoga veize reiro.
2.15: Vazeꞌe rahao ꞌada radiuꞌeteꞌe madaḡa niduꞌa zamaḡano rune rihoneꞌohe. ꞌOuge rihoneꞌenaꞌa, rune tuḡure azaḡa teige radiuꞌeteꞌeanoꞌo bohaze buzoga veize Iesuꞌa rudaro.
2.16: Hube hune Iesuꞌa tuḡure vigaviga mene danazeꞌohe, rehano Aberahamo marigamariga danazeꞌohe.
2.17: Eꞌe uꞌano, ḡau niduꞌa moneo Iesuꞌe vazeo radu negoḡa nabuga teige huniꞌuma rae reiro. ꞌOugadu aniꞌe vaze vetuḡaziꞌeteꞌe zu Badiꞌa veize zama niduꞌa hina gaueꞌeteꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡano reiro, ebu vaze haḡai sauꞌa uꞌano ane bare dibuꞌiro.
2.18: Diaboloꞌa Iesu tuhunirotene, Iesu aneꞌa bare aduga hidiro ꞌahine, iniu Diaboloꞌa tuhuzeꞌeteꞌe azaḡa danazogaꞌe idaḡa.

3.1: Eꞌanoꞌo, nego nabudi, zaꞌe Badiꞌa mone azaḡa zu emeḡe teite Badiꞌaꞌa hufiroteꞌe azaḡa. Zae zamaroneꞌe Iesu mazao toꞌi. Eme Iesuꞌe Badiꞌa apostolo vazeḡa zu dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa rae fureneꞌohe.
3.2: Moseꞌa Badiꞌa ne azaḡa niduꞌa veize zamaḡa niduꞌa hina gaue huniro. Ani teige, Iesu zuni ane mae ohoniroteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa veize zamaḡa niduꞌa hina gaue huniro.
3.3: Ne ogoruꞌeteꞌe vazeḡa niꞌe ne eꞌe vitine ufeta ḡihiꞌa hune. Eꞌe teige, Iesu niꞌe Mose ni vitine ufeta ḡihiꞌa hune rae raꞌetaꞌaꞌe duduḡa.
3.4: Ne tibatibaꞌe vaze ꞌahogaꞌahoganiꞌa ogoruꞌohe, rehano Badiꞌaꞌe ḡau niduꞌa ogoraro.
3.5: Moseꞌe Badiꞌaꞌa vesuꞌu ḡoreziteꞌe ḡauḡa rae furenifine Badiꞌa tuḡure vazeḡa radu Badiꞌa ne azaḡa niduꞌa veize zamaḡa niduꞌa hina gaue huniro.
3.6: U Kerisoꞌe Badiꞌa Ubuga radu Badiꞌa ne azaḡa veize zamaḡa niduꞌa hina gaue huniro. Eme Badiꞌaꞌa ḡoitoriroteꞌe manohugaḡa mae ḡihineꞌenaꞌa ꞌaune guhinine zu eꞌe moneo mene rihauꞌenaꞌa nigunine, emeꞌe Badiꞌa ne azaḡa rae raꞌohe. Mene Fieꞌeteꞌe Azaḡa Riḡa Iraduguziro
3.7: Eꞌanoꞌo Vine Zaḡoḡaniꞌa ꞌahige raꞌohe, “Zaꞌe izidi Badiꞌa ago egoꞌidene,
3.8: vouḡaze teige zamaze ago rinedoꞌi. Zae vouḡazeꞌa haba bohaꞌano Badiꞌa, eḡe tuhuhe nuriroteꞌe madaḡano e agirohiro.
3.9: Vouḡazeꞌe eḡeꞌa muri 40 zamaḡano nagini haḡairoteꞌe horoniro rehano, eꞌea eḡe tuhuhe nuriro.
3.10: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa zeḡe mazao maḡuniro, ebu ꞌahige rae reiro, 'Zeḡe zamaꞌe iḡaiḡa ibi veꞌoḡano onameꞌohe, zu ze eḡe ibi mene ederiro.'
3.11: Eꞌanoꞌo eḡeꞌa maḡunadu ḡoere ꞌadi rinede tiro, 'Eḡeꞌa zeḡe veize ahiri ohoniteꞌe habaꞌa ruhibiro rehano, zeꞌe mene hune diuḡiꞌuma.'”
3.12: Nego nabudi, zae boꞌaḡano vazeni ꞌahoga zuni zamaḡa sauꞌa hina fieꞌenaꞌa ḡabode radiuꞌeteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa mazaonoꞌo mene farau vaḡinifine tohutohoꞌi.
3.13: Rehano Izidi rae huneꞌeteꞌe madaḡa niduꞌa zamaḡano, za zaeꞌa bare inaratitoꞌi. ꞌOugine, haḡai sauꞌaniꞌa zae boꞌaḡano vazeni ꞌahoga zamaḡa mene soꞌonadu zamaḡa mene rinediꞌuma.
3.14: Emeꞌa ḡadaheḡano Keriso mazao fie gigararo. ꞌOuge fie gigaruꞌeteꞌe obone gigane onamo ḡonaga meine, Keriso teite manohuga dainiꞌuma.
3.15: Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae reiro, “Izidi zaꞌe Badiꞌa ago egoꞌidene, vouḡazeꞌa ani mazaonoꞌo ḡihuradu agirohaudoteꞌe teige, zamaze ago rinedoꞌi.”
3.16: Badiꞌa ago igiro rehano, ani agiroharoteꞌe azaḡaꞌe iniu? Aꞌe Moseꞌa Izipi habaꞌanonoꞌo tutuze vaḡiziroteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa!
3.17: Badiꞌaꞌa muri 40 zamaḡano iniu mazao maḡuniro? Aꞌe haḡai sauꞌa haḡairo ꞌahine, rudanadu ahirizeꞌa haba bohaꞌano higau bauriroteꞌe azaḡa!
3.18: Badiꞌaꞌa iniu mazao ahiri ohoneꞌeteꞌe habaꞌa aniꞌa ruhibirotaꞌaꞌe mene hune diuḡiꞌuma rae ḡoere rinede tiro? Aꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere mene egoharoteꞌe azaḡa!
3.19: Eꞌanoꞌo emeꞌe edeḡa, ze Badiꞌa mazao mene firoteꞌe uꞌano, ahiri ohoniteꞌe habaꞌa diuḡoga mene idararo.

4.1: Badiꞌaꞌa ahiri ohoniteꞌe habaꞌa rifadu eme diuḡiꞌuma rae ḡoitoriro. Ḡoitore ḡoeꞌa eꞌe zamaḡano eme ꞌize radiuꞌohe. Eꞌanoꞌo zae boꞌaḡano eꞌe habaꞌa diuḡoga mene idaḡa raꞌeteꞌe vazeḡani ꞌahoga oꞌoꞌa reifine, eme tohutohiꞌuma.
4.2: Ibite vouḡafeꞌa igiroteꞌe teige, emeḡe zuni hari manoḡa ꞌadi igiro. Vouḡafeꞌa hari manoḡa igiro rehano, eꞌeanoꞌo manoḡa mene hidiro, mazaḡa ze hari manoḡa igirotene aꞌe ḡoere huga rae mene mae ḡihiniro.
4.3: U emeꞌe hari manoḡa mae ḡihiniro ꞌahine, ahiri ohoniteꞌe habaꞌa diuḡeꞌohe. Eꞌe moneo, Badiꞌaꞌa ꞌahige rae reiro, “Eꞌe maḡunadu ḡoere rinede tiroteꞌe teige, ꞌZeꞌe ahiri ohoniteꞌe habaꞌa eḡeꞌa ziniꞌuma reiroteꞌe zamaḡano mene hune diuḡiꞌuma.ꞌ” Badiꞌaꞌa adure zu raha haḡairoteꞌe madaḡano ani gau haḡae hauḡiro rehano, ani ꞌouge reiro.
4.4: Buka Zaḡoḡano ḡoere ꞌahogaꞌe mada fuꞌo aheu fareḡa hariḡa moneo ꞌahige rae ḡoeriro, “Badiꞌaꞌe mada fuꞌo aheu fareḡano ane gau niduꞌa hauḡadu ahiꞌa ohoniro.”
4.5: Ebu emeꞌa ḡianateꞌe ḡoeꞌa teige, Badiꞌaꞌa bare ꞌahige rae reiro, “Zeꞌe ahiri ohoniteꞌe habaꞌa eḡeꞌa ziniꞌuma reiroteꞌe zamaḡano mene hune diuḡiꞌuma.”
4.6: Eꞌanoꞌo vaze nu mazaoꞌe ahiri ohoniteꞌe habaꞌa diuḡiteꞌe ibiḡaꞌe ꞌize eꞌe. Rehano amahi hari manoḡa igiroteꞌe azaḡaꞌe Badiꞌa ḡoere mene egoharo ꞌahine, diuḡoga mene idararo.
4.7: Eꞌe uꞌano, vazeꞌa eꞌe habaꞌa diuḡoga veize Badiꞌaꞌa mada ꞌahoga ohoniro. Aꞌe Izidi rae huniro. Ebu emeꞌa ḡianateꞌe ḡoeꞌa teige, muri ḡehaḡa enogano aniꞌa Davidaonoꞌo ꞌahige rae ḡoeriro, “Izidi za Badiꞌa ago egoꞌidene, zamaze ago rinedoꞌi.”
4.8: Iosuaꞌa hube hune vouḡafe tutuze ahiri ohoniteꞌe habaꞌa diuḡiro reifone, Badiꞌaꞌa vesuꞌu ahiri ohoniteꞌe madaḡa ꞌahoga moneo mene reifo.
4.9: ꞌOugadu Badiꞌaꞌa mada fuꞌo aheu fareḡano ahiꞌa ohone baniroteꞌe teige, ane mone azaḡa zuni ahirize ohoniteꞌe madaḡaꞌe ꞌize zeḡe mazao eꞌe.
4.10: Badiꞌaꞌa ane gau hauḡadu ahiꞌa ohoniroteꞌe teige, ahiri ohoniteꞌe habaꞌa Badiꞌaꞌa ziniꞌeteꞌe zamaḡano diuḡiteꞌe vazeḡa zuni ane gau hauḡadu ahiꞌa ohoniꞌuma.
4.11: Eꞌanoꞌo emeꞌe ahirife ohoniteꞌe habaꞌa eꞌe diuḡoga veize ufeta inare huniꞌuma. Iniuꞌa ibite Badiꞌa ḡoere mene egoharoteꞌe azaḡa hegotadu mene uitifine inariꞌuma.
4.12: Badiꞌa ḡoereꞌe ḡaboga zu gigiꞌaḡa. Aꞌe eꞌaḡa zu benisi naenae eꞌaḡa vitinoga ꞌahine, vaze zama ḡounadu zama zu vine ꞌaꞌaneꞌohe ebu ꞌaꞌuꞌa zu isine mizuꞌa ꞌaꞌaneꞌohe. Ebu vaze zamarone zu ura hugaꞌe nagini rae fureneꞌohe.
4.13: Badiꞌaꞌa haḡairoteꞌe ḡauḡa niduꞌa boꞌaḡano ani mazaonoꞌo ꞌuꞌuru radiuꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡaꞌe oꞌoꞌa. Ḡau niduꞌaꞌe Badiꞌa ubumaoꞌe fureḡa zu bohaꞌa. Emeꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa niduꞌa Badiꞌa mazao rae fureniꞌuma. Iesuꞌe Dibuꞌo Vazeḡa Ḡihiꞌaḡa Boro zu Vetuḡafiꞌeteꞌe Vazeḡa
4.14: Rehano emeḡe mazaoꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa boroꞌa radiuꞌohe. Aniꞌe Iesu, Badiꞌa Ubuga. Ani adureo Badiꞌa vaḡe itiro. Eꞌanoꞌo emeꞌa Iesu mazao fieꞌeteꞌe rae furenihi zu ufeta obone giganihi.
4.15: Emeḡe mazao radiuꞌeteꞌe dibuꞌoḡa vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe emeꞌe zoreḡa rae ederadu vetuḡafiꞌohe. Mazaḡa eme haḡai sauꞌa haḡaihi rae raꞌeteꞌe zamaroneḡa Diaboloꞌa rifadu tuhufiroteꞌe teige, Diaboloꞌa ani zuni ḡau niduꞌa zamaḡano ꞌouge tuhune nuriro. Rehano ani mazao haḡai sauꞌani ꞌahogaꞌe oꞌoꞌa.
4.16: Eꞌanoꞌo Badiꞌaꞌa emeḡe mazao manoḡa fureniroteꞌe uꞌano, eme Badiꞌa mene rihoneꞌenaꞌa kini ehoro habaꞌa onamihi. ꞌOugadu eme nagini urateꞌeteꞌe madaḡa huneo Badiꞌaꞌa danafifine aniꞌa vetuḡafiꞌuma zu emeḡe mazao manoḡa fureniꞌuma.

5.1: Dibuꞌo azaḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa niduꞌaꞌe vaze boꞌaḡano ohozadu vaze veize Badiꞌa gau nunu haḡaeꞌohe. Ze vaze haḡai sauꞌa uꞌano ḡahunone ebu dibuꞌoꞌe Badiꞌa hauꞌohe.
5.2: Dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡaꞌe iniu mene ederadu ibi veꞌoḡano onameꞌeteꞌe azaḡa mae ḡihizadu namizogaꞌe idaḡa, mazaḡa ani zuni aneꞌa bare zoreradu veꞌoreꞌohe.
5.3: Ani zuni aneꞌa bare zoreradu veꞌoreꞌe ꞌahine, aneꞌa vaze haḡai sauꞌa uꞌano dibuꞌohauꞌeteꞌe teige, ane haḡai sauꞌa uꞌano zuni dibuꞌohau huniꞌuma.
5.4: Vazeni ꞌahoga zuni ane edeḡano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa iḡuri madu niḡa boro rougaꞌe mene idaḡa. Badiꞌaꞌa Aroni huniroteꞌe teige, vaze ꞌahoga hunadu aniꞌa iḡuri eꞌe maꞌohe.
5.5: Eꞌe teige, Keriso zuni ane edeḡano dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa radu niḡa ḡihiꞌaḡa mene reiro, rehano Badiꞌaꞌa eꞌe iḡuriḡano ani ohoniro. Badiꞌaꞌa Iesu ꞌahige rae niro, “Ḡaꞌe eḡe Ubude. E izidi ḡa fureꞌeha.”
5.6: Ebu Badiꞌaꞌa Buka Zaḡoḡano ꞌahige rae reiro, “Melekizedekaꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡano reiroteꞌe ibiḡa idunaḡano, ḡaꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡa tuḡutuḡu rae raꞌohe.”
5.7: Iesuꞌa vazeo radu rahao radiroteꞌe madaḡano, ani runeonoꞌo ḡaboniteꞌe Badiꞌaḡa mazao borofe niau ḡaniḡanauꞌenaꞌa, kuraro zu umidiro. Ebu Iesuꞌa Badiꞌa hube hune gubaneꞌenaꞌa egohauꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, Badiꞌaꞌa ane kuru mae ḡihiniro.
5.8: Iesuꞌe Badiꞌa Ubuga rehano, aduga hidadu Badiꞌa egohanoga moneo ederiro.
5.9: Ebu aniꞌa Badiꞌa ura haḡae hunirotene, ani egohauꞌeteꞌe azaḡa niduꞌa ḡabone tuḡutuḡu ziniꞌeteꞌe vazeḡano reiro.
5.10: Ebu Melekizedekaꞌe dibuꞌo vazeḡano reiroteꞌe ibiḡa idunaḡano, Badiꞌaꞌa ani dibuꞌo vazeḡa ḡihiꞌaḡano ohoniro. Fieꞌeteꞌeanoꞌo Uite Buauꞌeteꞌe moneo Riḡa Iraduguziro
5.11: Emeꞌe Melekizedeka zu Iesu moneo zihi rae raꞌeteꞌe ḡoeꞌaꞌe ḡehaḡa. Rehano zaꞌa faine ederogaꞌe riḡa ꞌahine, zeḡe moneo deheru ihozoga zuni riḡa.
5.12: Zaꞌe Keriso mazao fieꞌenaꞌa, muri ḡehaḡa radiu ariro ꞌahine, amahi ihore azaḡa reifo. Rehano za Badiꞌa ḡoere ufiḡaufiḡa ederoga veize iniu vazeꞌa za bare ihozoga urateꞌohe. Zaꞌe ogomu riḡa mene urateꞌohe, rehano nune urateꞌohe.
5.13: Iniu nune gageꞌeteꞌe vazeḡaꞌe ꞌize ene guraḡa teigadu ihore duduḡa mene faine edereꞌohe.
5.14: U ogomu riḡaꞌe bororu idararoteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa auꞌohe. Ze zeḡeꞌa bare manoḡa haḡaihi radu barebare ꞌouge haḡae inareꞌeteꞌe uꞌano, noꞌeꞌe manoḡa ga noꞌeꞌe sauꞌaꞌe edeḡa.

6.1: Eꞌanoꞌo emeꞌe Keriso moneo ihore ufiḡaufiḡa roꞌanadu bororu idararoteꞌe azaḡaniꞌa meiteꞌe ihoreḡa edere onamihi. Emeꞌe ihore ufiḡaufiḡa eꞌe barebare ederihi rae mene inariꞌuma. Ihore ufiḡaufiḡa aꞌe rune haḡaiḡanonoꞌo ḡihureꞌeteꞌe zu Badiꞌa mazao fieꞌeteꞌe moneo ihoreḡa,
6.2: ebu babatiso zu ahiri vuzuꞌeꞌeteꞌe goroḡa nu moneo ihoreḡa, ebu ꞌevore vaze rana tiꞌeteꞌe zu runeonoꞌo bare ḡaboditeꞌe moneo ihoreḡa, zu Badiꞌa kotao meiteꞌe naeḡa radiu tuḡutuḡu moneo ihoreḡa raꞌohe.
6.3: ꞌUguḡaꞌe mene barebare ederihi rae reꞌuma, rehano ufeta riḡa ihoreḡa ederihi rae reꞌuma. Badiꞌaꞌa uratine, ꞌouge ederogaꞌe idaraꞌuma.
6.4: Vaze nuꞌe ibite Badiꞌa agaḡano radiro, ebu Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo meiroteꞌe ḡahunoneḡaꞌe ufeta manoḡa rae ederiro, ebu ekalesia azaḡa teite Vine Zaḡoḡa madu Vine Zaḡoḡa gau haḡairo,
6.5: ebu Badiꞌa ḡoere manoḡa ederiro, zu vesuꞌu ariteꞌe madaḡano fureratiteꞌe gigiꞌaḡa ederiro.
6.6: Rehano ꞌuguḡa azaḡaniꞌa uitadu Badiꞌa mazaonoꞌo faraune, zamaze bare ḡihunoga veize ze tutuze arogaꞌe mene idaḡa. Mazaḡa ze Badiꞌa Ubuga bare satauroneadu hunio ani mae mazagaroneꞌeteꞌe heuḡa.
6.7: Iruguꞌa rahao ḡae ḡehaḡa ruꞌauꞌetene, rahaꞌe abutanadu hihi azaḡa veize ogomu manoḡaniꞌa hudauꞌohe. ꞌOugeꞌetene, raha aꞌe Badiꞌa manohuga hideꞌohe.
6.8: Rehano rahaꞌa renone zu meigameiga ḡuhuneꞌetene, raha aꞌe huga oꞌoꞌa radu radiu tuḡutuḡu adugaḡa hideꞌohe ebu ḡonaganoꞌe hufi haoniꞌuma.
6.9: Emeḡe zamarone azaḡa, emeꞌa ꞌouge raꞌe rehano, emeꞌe hube hune edeḡa, ḡau ufeta manoḡa huneꞌe zaeꞌa meiro. Aꞌe ḡabone hideꞌeteꞌe ibiḡano zae tutuzeꞌeteꞌe ḡauḡa.
6.10: Badiꞌaꞌe iḡaiḡa duduḡano haḡaeꞌe ꞌahine, zaeꞌa haḡairoteꞌe haḡaiḡa mene aḡutu modiꞌuma. Zaeꞌa Badiꞌa mone azaḡa danaziro zu izidi zuni danazeꞌohe. Eꞌe ibiḡano zaeꞌa Badiꞌa zamare borofeꞌeteꞌe ane mazao fureneꞌohe. Eꞌe moneo aniꞌa mene aḡutu modiꞌuma.
6.11: Eme urateꞌohe, zae tibatiba ꞌouge vaze danazeꞌenaꞌa Badiꞌa veize gaue inareꞌeteꞌe furene onamo mada ḡonaga meꞌuma. ꞌOugine, zaeꞌa mae ḡihineꞌenaꞌa guhineꞌeteꞌe manohugaḡaniꞌa zama moneo hube hune hudaꞌuma.
